Matthew1:1 Luno lwe lulyo lwa Yesu Kristo, muzzukulu wa Dawudi, muzzukulu wa Aburahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Aburahamu yazaala Yisaaka, Yisaaka n'azaala Yakobo, Yakobo n'azaala Yuda ne baganda be," 
Matthew1:3 Yuda n'azaala Pereezi ne Zera mu Tamari; Pereezi n'azaala Hezirooni, Hezirooni n'azaala Raamu;" 
Matthew1:4 Raamu n'azaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu n'azaala Naasoni, Naasoni n'azaala Salumooni;" 
Matthew1:5 Salumooni n'azaala Bowaazi mu Rahabu, Bowaazi n'azaala Obedi mu Ruusi, Obedi n'azaala Yesse;" 
Matthew1:6 Yesse n'azaala Dawudi Kabaka, Dawudi n'azaala Solomooni mu eyali muka Wuriya:" 
Matthew1:7 Solomooni n'azaala Rehobowaamu, Rehobowaamu n'azaala Abiya, Abiya n'azaala Asa;" 
Matthew1:8 Asa n'azaala Yehosafaati, Yehosafaati n'azaala Yoraamu, Yoraamu n'azaala Wuzziya;" 
Matthew1:9 Wuzziya n'azaala Yotamu, Yotamu n'azaala Ahazi, Ahazi n'azaala Heezeekiya;" 
Matthew1:10 Heezeekiya n'azaala Manasse, Manasse n'azaala Amoni, Amoni n'azaala Yosiya;" 
Matthew1:11 Yosiya n'azaala Yekoniya ne baganda be, mu biseera abantu ba Yisirayeli mwe baawaŋŋangusirizibwa e Babilooni." 
Matthew1:12 Nga bamaze okuwaŋŋangusirizibwa e Babilooni, Yekoniya n'azaala Seyalutiyeli, Seyalutiyeli n'azaala Zerubabbeeli;" 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabbeeli n'azaala Abiwuudi, Abiwuudi n'azaala Eliyakimu, Eliyakimu n'azaala Azori;" 
Matthew1:14 Azori n'azaala Sadoki, Sadoki n'azaala Akimu, Akimu n'azaala Eliwuudi;" 
Matthew1:15 Eliwuudi n'azaala Eleyazaari, Eleyazaari n'azaala Matani, Matani n'azaala Yakobo;" 
Matthew1:16 Yakobo n'azaala Yosefu bba Mariya, Mariya eyazaala Yesu ayitibwa Kristo." 
Matthew1:17 Kale nno emirembe gyonna, okuva ku Aburahamu okutuuka ku Dawudi, emirembe kkumi n'ena; okuva ku Dawudi okutuuka ku kuwaŋŋangusirizibwa e Babilooni, emirembe kkumi n'ena; ate okuva ku kuwaŋŋangusirizibwa e Babilooni okutuuka ku Kristo, emirembe kkumi n'ena." 
Matthew1:18 Okuzaalibwa kwa Yesu Kristo kwali bwe kuti: Mariya nnyina bwe yali ng'akyayogerezebwa Yosefu, nga tebannafumbiriganwa, n'alabika ng'ali lubuto ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Matthew1:19 Awo Yosefu bba, kubanga yali muntu mulungi, n'atayagala kumuswaza, n'alowooza okumulekayo mu kyama." 
Matthew1:20 Yali akyalowooza ebyo, malayika wa Mukama n'amulabikira mu kirooto, n'amugamba nti: “Yosefu, muzzukulu wa Dawudi, leka kutya kutwala Mariya mukazi wo, kubanga ali lubuto ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Matthew1:21 Alizaala omwana wa bulenzi, n'omutuuma erinnya lye YESU; kubanga ye wunyo alirokola abantu be mu bibi byabwe.”" 
Matthew1:22 Ebyo byonna byabaawo, okutuukiriza Mukama kye yayogerera mu mulanzi nti:" 
Matthew1:23 “Omuwala embeerera aliba olubuto, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi. Erinnya lye, balimuyita Emmanweli” (eritegeeza nti: “Katonda ali naffe”)." 
Matthew1:24 Yosefu bwe yazuukuka mu tulo, n'akola nga malayika bw'amulagidde: n'atwala mukazi we." 
Matthew1:25 Kyokka teyamumanya okutuusa lwe yamala okuzaala omwana, Yosefu n'atuuma omwana oyo erinnya lye Yesu." 
Matthew2:1 Awo Yesu bwe yazaalibwa e Betilehemu, ekibuga eky'omu Buyudaaya, mu kiseera ekyo nga Herode ye Kabaka, abasajja abeetegereza eby'emmunyeenye ne bava ebuvanjuba, ne bajja e Yerusaalemu," 
Matthew2:2 ne babuuza nti: “Kabaka w'Abayudaaya azaaliddwa ali ludda wa? Twalaba emmunyeenye ye mu buvanjuba, ne tujja okumusinza.”" 
Matthew2:3 Herode kabaka bwe yawulira, ne yeeraliikirira, era n'abalala bonna mu Yerusaalemu ne beeraliikirira." 
Matthew2:4 N'akuŋŋaanya bakabona abakulu bonna, n'abakugu abannyonnyola abantu amateeka, n'ababuuza nti: “Kristo wa kuzaalibwa wa?”" 
Matthew2:5 Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Mu Betilehemu, ekibuga ky'omu Buyudaaya, kubanga bwe kityo bwe kyawandiikibwa omulanzi nti:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Naawe Betilehemu mu nsi ya Yuda, si ggwe osembayo mu balangira ba Yuda, kubanga mu ggwe mulivaamu omukulembeze, alirabirira abantu bange Yisirayeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Awo Herode n'ayita mu kyama abasajja abeetegereza eby'emmunyeenye, n'ababuuza n'obwegendereza ekiseera kyennyini emmunyeenye kye yalabikiramu." 
Matthew2:8 N'abasindika e Betilehemu, n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mubuulirize nnyo ku mwana oyo, era nga mumulabye, muntegeeze, nange ŋŋende mmusinze.”" 
Matthew2:9 Bwe baamala okuwulira ebya kabaka, ne bagenda. Awo ne baddamu okulaba emmunyeenye gye baalaba ebuvanjuba, n'ebakulembera okutuusa lwe yajja n'eyimirira waggulu w'ekifo awali omwana." 
Matthew2:10 Bwe baalaba emmunyeenye, ne basanyuka nnyo nnyini ddala." 
Matthew2:11 Ne bayingira mu nnyumba, ne balaba omwana ng'ali ne Mariya nnyina. Ne bafukamira ne basinza omwana, ne basumulula ensawo zaabwe, ne bamutonera ebirabo: zaabu, obubaane n'ebyakawoowo ebiyitibwa mirra." 
Matthew2:12 Katonda bwe yabalabulira mu kirooto obutaddayo ewa Herode, ne bakwata ekkubo eddala, ne baddayo ewaabwe." 
Matthew2:13 Bwe baamala okugenda, malayika wa Mukama n'alabikira Yosefu mu kirooto, n'amugamba nti: “Golokoka, otwale omwana ne nnyina, oddukire e Misiri, obeere eyo okutuusa lwe ndikugamba okuvaayo, kubanga Herode ajja okunoonya omwana okumutta.”" 
Matthew2:14 Awo Yosefu n'agolokoka, n'atwala omwana ne nnyina ekiro, n'alaga e Misiri." 
Matthew2:15 N'abeera eyo okutuusa Herode lwe yafa. Kino kyali bwe kityo, Mukama kye yayogerera mu mulanzi kiryoke kituukirire, ekigamba nti: “Nayita omwana wange ave mu Misiri.”" 
Matthew2:16 Awo Herode bwe yalaba ng'abasajja abeetegereza eby'emmunyeenye bamutebuse, n'asunguwala nnyo, n'alagira okutta abaana ab'obulenzi bonna abaali e Betilehemu ne ku miriraano gyakyo, ab'emyaka ebiri, n'abaali batannagiweza, okusinziira ku kiseera kye yabuuliriza ku basajja abeetegereza eby'emmunyeenye." 
Matthew2:17 Awo ekyo omulanzi Yeremiya kye yayogera ne kituukirira, bwe yagamba nti:" 
Matthew2:18 “Mu Raama baawulira eddoboozi, okukaaba n'okukungubaga okungi, Raakeeli ng'akaabira abaana be era nga tayagala akubagizibwe, kubanga tebakyaliwo.”" 
Matthew2:19 Awo Herode bwe yamala okufa, malayika wa Mukama n'alabikira Yosefu mu kirooto e Misiri," 
Matthew2:20 n'agamba nti: “Golokoka, otwale omwana ne nnyina, olage mu nsi ya Yisirayeli, kubanga abaali banoonya omwana okumutta bafudde.”" 
Matthew2:21 Awo Yosefu n'agolokoka, n'atwala omwana ne nnyina, n'ajja mu nsi Yisirayeli." 
Matthew2:22 Kyokka bwe yawulira nti Arukyelawo ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, ng'asikidde kitaawe Herode, n'atya okulaga eyo. Awo Katonda bwe yamulabulira mu kirooto, n'alaga mu kitundu ky'e Galilaaya." 
Matthew2:23 N'ajja n'abeera mu kabuga akayitibwa Nazaareeti. Kino kyaba bwe kityo, abalanzi kye baayogera kiryoke kituukirire nti: “Aliyitibwa Munnazareeti.”" 
Matthew3:1 Mu nnaku ezo, Yowanne Omubatiza n'ajja mu ddungu ery'e Buyudaaya," 
Matthew3:2 n'ategeeza abantu nti: “Mwenenye, kubanga Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu busembedde.”" 
Matthew3:3 Yowanne ye wuuyo Yisaaya omulanzi gw'ayogerako nti: “Waliwo ayogerera mu ddungu n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: ‘Mulongoose oluguudo lwa Mukama, mutereeze amakubo ge.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Yowanne ono yayambalanga ekyambalo ekyakolebwa mu byoya by'eŋŋamiya, nga yeesiba olukoba olw'eddiba mu kiwato. Yalyanga nzige n'omubisi gw'enjuki ez'omu ttale." 
Matthew3:5 Abantu baavanga e Yerusaalemu ne mu Buyudaaya bwonna, ne mu kitundu ekiriraanye Omugga Yorudaani, ne bajja gy'ali." 
Matthew3:6 Ne baatula ebibi byabwe, n'ababatiza mu mugga Yorudaani." 
Matthew3:7 Bwe yalaba ng'Abafarisaayo bangi n'Abasaddukaayo bajja gy'ali okubatizibwa, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe abaana b'emisota egy'obusagwa, ani abalabudde nti eno y'engeri ey'okudduka obusungu bwa Katonda obugenda okujja?" 
Matthew3:8 Mukole bikolwa ebiraga nti mwenenyezza ebibi byammwe. 
Matthew3:9 Era muleke kweyinula nga mugamba nti: ‘Tulina kitaffe Aburahamu.’ Kubanga mbagamba nti Katonda asobola okufunira Aburahamu abaana ng'abaggya mu mayinja gano. 
Matthew3:10 Mufaanaanyirizibwa n'emiti: kati embazzi eteekeddwa ku kikolo kya buli muti. Ogwo ogutabala bibala birungi gujja kutemebwa, era gusuulibwe mu muliro." 
Matthew3:11 Nze mbabatiza na mazzi okulaga nti mwenenyezza, kyokka oyo anvaako emabega, ye ansinga obuyinza, sisaanira na kukwata ngatto ze. Oyo alibabatiza na Mwoyo Mutuukirivu era na muliro." 
Matthew3:12 Akutte mu ngalo olugali, ayawule empeke n'ebisusunku, empeke azikuŋŋaanyize mu tterekero, ate byo ebisusunku abyokye n'omuliro ogutazikira.”" 
Matthew3:13 Awo Yesu n'ava e Galilaaya, n'atuuka ku Mugga Yorudaani eri Yowanne, abatizibwe Yowanne." 
Matthew3:14 Kyokka Yowanne n'agezaako okumuziyiza ng'agamba nti: “Nze nanditeekeddwa okubatizibwa ggwe, naye ate ggwe ojja gye ndi?”" 
Matthew3:15 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Leka kibe bwe kityo kaakano, kubanga mu ngeri eno tujja kutuukiriza ekyo Katonda ky'ayagala.” Awo Yowanne n'akkiriza." 
Matthew3:16 Yesu bwe yamala okubatizibwa, amangwago n'ava mu mazzi, awo eggulu ne libikkuka, n'alaba Mwoyo wa Katonda ng'akka ng'ejjiba, ng'ajja ku ye." 
Matthew3:17 Era eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu, ne ligamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa era gwe nsiimira ddala.” Luk 9:35" 
Matthew4:1 Awo Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'atwala Yesu mu ddungu okukemebwa Sitaani. 
Matthew4:2 Yesu n'amalayo ennaku amakumi ana nga talya emisana n'ekiro. Bwe zaggwaako, enjala n'emuluma." 
Matthew4:3 Omukemi n'ajja n'amugamba nti: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, gamba amayinja gano gafuuke emmere.”" 
Matthew4:4 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Omuntu taba mulamu na mmere yokka, wabula na buli kigambo, Katonda ky'ayogera.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Awo Sitaani n'atwala Yesu mu Kibuga Ekitukuvu, n'amuteeka ku kitikkiro ky'Essinzizo," 
Matthew4:6 n'amugamba nti: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, weesuule wansi, kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Katonda aliragira bamalayika be bakuwanirire mu mikono gyabwe, oleme okwekoona ekigere ku jjinja.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Era kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Tokemanga Mukama Katonda wo.’ ” 
Matthew4:8 Sitaani ate n'atwala Yesu ku lusozi oluwanvu ennyo, n'amulaga obwakabaka bwonna obw'omu nsi, n'ekitiibwa kyabwo." 
Matthew4:9 N'amugamba nti: “Ebyo byonna nja kubikuwa, singa ofukamira n'onsinza.”" 
Matthew4:10 Awo Yesu n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Vvaawo Sitaani! Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Osinzanga Mukama Katonda wo, era gw'oweerezanga yekka.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Awo Sitaani n'aleka Yesu, bamalayika ne bajja ne bamuweereza." 
Matthew4:12 Awo Yesu bwe yawulira nga Yowanne aggaliddwa mu kkomera, n'agenda e Galilaaya." 
Matthew4:13 N'aleka Nazaareeti, n'ajja n'abeera e Kafarunawumu, ekiri ku nnyanja mu kitundu kya Zebbulooni ne Nafutaali." 
Matthew4:14 Kino kyaba bwe kityo, omulanzi kye yalanga kiryoke kituukirire, ekigamba nti:" 
Matthew4:15 “Ensi ya Zebbulooni, n'ensi ya Nafutaali, etunuulidde ennyanja, emitala wa Yorudaani, Galilaaya ey'ab'amawanga amalala!" 
Matthew4:16 Abantu abaabeeranga mu kizikiza balabye ekitangaala ekingi. N'abaabeeranga mu nsi y'olumbe ne mu kisiikirize kyalwo, ekitangaala kibaakidde.”" 
Matthew4:17 Okuva olwo, Yesu n'atandika okutegeeza abantu n'okubagamba nti: “Mwenenye, kubanga Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu busembedde.”" 
Matthew4:18 Yesu bwe yali ng'atambula ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja y'e Galilaaya, n'alaba abooluganda babiri, abavubi: Simooni ayitibwa Peetero, ne muganda we Andereya, nga batega akatimba mu nnyanja." 
Matthew4:19 N'abagamba nti: “Mujje muyitenga nange, ndibafuula abavubi b'abantu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Amangwago ne baleka awo obutimba bwabwe, ne bagenda naye." 
Matthew4:21 Bwe yatambulako okuva awo, n'alaba abooluganda babiri abalala: Yakobo ne Yowanne, batabani ba Zebedaayo. Baali mu lyato ne kitaabwe Zebedaayo, nga baddaabiriza obutimba bwabwe. Yesu n'abayita." 
Matthew4:22 Amangwago ne baleka awo obutimba ne kitaabwe, ne bagenda ne Yesu." 
Matthew4:23 Awo Yesu n'atambula Galilaaya yonna ng'ayigiriza mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe, ng'ategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi ag'Obwakabaka bwa Katonda, era ng'awonya obulwadde bwonna n'obuyongobevu bwonna mu bantu." 
Matthew4:24 Ettutumu lye ne libuna mu Siriya mwonna. Ne bamuleetera abalwadde ab'endwadde eza buli ngeri, n'abaalina buli ekibabonyaabonya, n'abaliko emyoyo emibi, n'ab'ensimbu, n'abakonvubye, bonna n'abawonya." 
Matthew4:25 Abantu bangi nnyo ne bajja gy'ali, nga bava mu Galilaaya ne mu kitundu ky'e Dekapoli, ne mu Kibuga Yerusaalemu, ne mu Buyudaaya, era n'emitala wa Yorudaani." 
Matthew5:1 Awo Yesu bwe yalaba abantu abangi bwe batyo, n'ayambuka ku lusozi. Bwe yamala okutuula, abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali," 
Matthew5:2 n'atandika okubayigiriza, n'agamba nti:" 
Matthew5:3 “Ba mukisa abeesiga Katonda yekka okubayamba: kubanga Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bwabwe. 
Matthew5:4 “Ba mukisa abakungubaga; kubanga abo balikubagizibwa. 
Matthew5:5 “Ba mukisa abateefu; kubanga abo baliweebwa ensi, Katonda gye yabasuubiza." 
Matthew5:6 “Ba mukisa abalumwa enjala n'ennyonta ey'okukola Katonda by'ayagala: kubanga abo balikkusibwa. 
Matthew5:7 “Ba mukisa ab'ekisa; kubanga abo balikwatirwa ekisa. 
Matthew5:8 “Ba mukisa ab'omutima omulongoofu; kubanga abo baliraba Katonda. 
Matthew5:9 “Ba mukisa abatabaganya; kubanga abo baliyitibwa baana ba Katonda. 
Matthew5:10 “Ba mukisa abayigganyizibwa olw'okukola Katonda by'ayagala; kubanga Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bwabwe. 
Matthew5:11 “Muli ba mukisa bwe banaabavumanga, bwe banaabayigganyanga, bwe banaabawaayirizanga buli kigambo kibi nga babalanga nze." 
Matthew5:12 Musanyuke, mujaganye, kubanga empeera yammwe mu ggulu nnene. N'abalanzi abaasooka mmwe okubaawo, bwe batyo bwe baayigganyizibwa." 
Matthew5:13 “Mmwe munnyo gw'ensi. Naye singa omunnyo gusaabulukuka, guzzibwamu gutya obuka bwagwo? Guba tegukyagasa, wabula gusuulibwa wabweru, abantu ne bagulinnyirira." 
Matthew5:14 “Mmwe kitangaala ky'ensi. Ekibuga ekizimbiddwa ku lusozi tekiyinza kukisibwa. 
Matthew5:15 Era tebakoleeza ttaala ne bagikweka mu kibbo, wabula bagiwanika ku kikondo, n'emulisa bonna abali mu nnyumba." 
Matthew5:16 Ekitangaala kyammwe kiteekwa okwakira bwe kityo abantu, balabe ebikolwa byammwe ebirungi, balyoke batendereze Kitammwe ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew5:17 “Muleke kulowooza nti najja kudibya Mateeka oba ebyo abalanzi bye bayigiriza. Sajja kubidibya, wabula okubituukiriza." 
Matthew5:18 Mazima mbagamba nti eggulu n'ensi nga bikyaliwo, ennukuta emu, wadde akatonnyeze akamu tekalidibizibwa mu Mateeka, okutuusa byonna lwe birituukirira." 
Matthew5:19 “Kale nno buli adibya erimu ku mateeka ago, wadde agasinga obutono, era n'ayigiriza bw'atyo abantu, aliyitibwa asembayo mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu. Kyokka oyo akwata Amateeka, n'ayigiriza n'abalala okugakwata, aliyitibwa mukulu mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu." 
Matthew5:20 Mbagamba nti: bwe mutaabenga beesigwa okusinga abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo mu kukola Katonda by'ayagala, temuliyingira Bwakabaka bwa mu ggulu." 
Matthew5:21 “Mwawulira ab'edda bwe baagambibwa nti: ‘Tottanga muntu. Alitta omuntu, aliwozesebwa.’" 
Matthew5:22 Naye nze mbagamba mmwe nti: buli muntu asunguwalira muganda we, aliwozesebwa. Oyo ayita muganda we ‘Ekitagasa’, alireetebwa mu maaso g'olukiiko olukulu. Ate aliyita muganda we ‘Omusirusiru’, asaanira okusuulibwa mu muliro ogutazikira." 
Matthew5:23 “Kale nno bw'obanga oleeta ekirabo kyo ku alutaari, n'ojjuukirira eyo nga muganda wo aliko ekigambo ky'akwemulugunyiza," 
Matthew5:24 leka awo ekirabo kyo, mu maaso ga alutaari, ogende, osooke omale okutabagana ne muganda wo, olyoke okomewo, oweeyo ekirabo kyo." 
Matthew5:25 “Bw'oba ng'ogenda n'omuntu akuwawaabira, tabagana naye mangu nga mukyali mu kkubo, aleme okukutwala ew'omulamuzi, n'omulamuzi okukuwa omuserikale, n'osuulibwa mu kkomera." 
Matthew5:26 Mazima nkugamba nti omwo tolivaamu okutuusa lw'olisasula ssente esembayo. 
Matthew5:27 “Mwawulira bwe baagambibwa nti: ‘Toyendanga.’ 
Matthew5:28 Naye nze mbagamba mmwe nti: buli atunuulira omukazi olw'okumwegomba, ng'amwenzeeko mu mutima gwe." 
Matthew5:29 Singa eriiso lyo erya ddyo likukozesa ekibi, liggyeemu, olisuule wala. Kikugasa okufiirwa ekimu ku bitundu by'omubiri gwo, okusinga omubiri gwo gwonna lwe gusuulibwa mu muliro ogutazikira." 
Matthew5:30 Era singa omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gukukozesa ekibi, gutemeko, ogusuule wala. Kikugasa okufiirwa ekimu ku bitundu by'omubiri gwo, okusinga omubiri gwo gwonna lwe gusuulibwa mu muliro ogutazikira." 
Matthew5:31 “Baagambibwa era nti: ‘Buli agoba mukazi we, amuwanga ebbaluwa ekakasa nti amugobye!’" 
Matthew5:32 Naye nze mbagamba mmwe nti buli agoba mukazi we, okuggyako ng'amugobye lwa bwenzi, aba amusudde mu bwenzi. N'oyo awasa gwe bagobye, aba ayenze." 
Matthew5:33 “Era mwawulira abantu edda bwe baagambibwa nti: ‘Tolayiranga bya bulimba, naye by'osuubizza Mukama ng'olayira, obituukirizanga.’" 
Matthew5:34 Naye nze mbagamba mmwe obutalayiranga n'akatono: newaakubadde okulayira eggulu, kubanga ye ntebe ya Katonda," 
Matthew5:35 newaakubadde ensi, kubanga Katonda gy'ateekako ebigere bye. Temulayiranga wadde Yerusaalemu, kubanga kye kibuga kya Kabaka omukulu." 
Matthew5:36 Era tolayiranga newaakubadde omutwe gwo, kubanga oluviiri olumu toyinza kulufuula lweru oba luddugavu." 
Matthew5:37 Mugambenga nti: ‘Weewaawo,’ oba nti ‘Si weewaawo’ Ebisinga ku ebyo biva mu Mubi." 
Matthew5:38 “Mwawulira bwe baagambibwa nti: ‘Eriiso ligattibwa liiso, erinnyo ligattibwa linnyo.’" 
Matthew5:39 Naye nze mbagamba mmwe nti: temuziyizanga mubi, wabula omuntu bw'akukubanga ku ttama erya ddyo, omukyusizanga n'eddala." 
Matthew5:40 “Omuntu ayagala okuwoza naawe okutwala ekkanzu yo, omulekeranga n'ekkooti." 
Matthew5:41 Era buli akuwalirizanga okutambula naye kilomita emu, otambulanga naye kilomita bbiri." 
Matthew5:42 Akusabanga omuwanga, era ayagala okukwewolako, tomwegobangako." 
Matthew5:43 “Mwawulira bwe baagambibwa nti: ‘Oyagalanga munno, n'okyawa omulabe wo.’" 
Matthew5:44 Naye nze mbagamba mmwe nti: mwagalenga abalabe bammwe, musabirenga ababayigganya," 
Matthew5:45 mulyoke mube abaana ba Kitammwe ali mu ggulu: kubanga enjuba ye agyakiza abalungi n'ababi, era atonnyeseza enkuba abakola obulungi n'abakola obubi." 
Matthew5:46 “Kale singa munaayagalanga abo nammwe ababaagala, mulifuna mpeera ki? Abasolooza b'omusolo nabo si bwe bakola?" 
Matthew5:47 Era singa munaalamusanga baganda bammwe bokka, kye mukoze ekyeyongeddeko okusinga eky'abalala kiruwa? Abantu ab'ensi nabo si kye bakola?" 
Matthew5:48 “Kale nno mmwe mubeerenga batuukirivu, nga Kitammwe ali mu ggulu bw'ali omutuukirivu." 
Matthew6:1 “Mwekuume obutakolanga bikolwa byammwe ebirungi mu maaso g'abantu balyoke babalabe, kubanga bwe mukola bwe mutyo, Kitammwe ali mu ggulu talibawa mpeera." 
Matthew6:2 Kale nno bw'ogabiranga abaavu, teweeyimbiriranga ng'abakuusa bwe bakola mu makuŋŋaaniro ne mu nguudo, abantu babawe ekitiibwa. Mazima mbagamba nti empeera yaabwe bagifunye." 
Matthew6:3 Naye ggwe bw'ogabiranga abaavu, omukono gwo ogwa kkono gulemenga okumanya ogwa ddyo kye gukola." 
Matthew6:4 Ky'ogabidde abaavu kibe kya kyama, Kitaawo alaba ebikolebwa mu kyama alikuwa empeera." 
Matthew6:5 “Era bwe mubanga musinza Katonda, temubanga ng'abakuusa, kubanga baagala okusinza Katonda nga bayimiridde mu makuŋŋaaniro ne ku mabbali g'enguudo, abantu balyoke babalabe. Mazima mbagamba nti empeera yaabwe bagifunye." 
Matthew6:6 Naye ggwe bw'obanga osinza Katonda, oyingiranga mu kisenge kyo, n'oggalawo oluggi, n'olyoka osinza Katonda mu kyama, Kitaawo alaba ebikolebwa mu kyama alikuwa empeera." 
Matthew6:7 “Bwe mubangako kye musaba Katonda, temumalanga googera bigambo bingi ng'abantu ab'ensi bwe bakola, abalowooza nti banaawulirwa lwa bigambo byabwe ebingi." 
Matthew6:8 Muleme nno kufaanana nga bo. Kitammwe amanyi bye mwetaaga, nga temunnaba na kumusaba." 
Matthew6:9 “Kale nno Katonda mumusabanga bwe muti: ‘Kitaffe ali mu ggulu, erinnya lyo lyatulwe nga bwe liri ettukuvu." 
Matthew6:10 Obwakabaka bwo bujje. By'oyagala bikolebwe mu nsi nga bwe bikolebwa mu ggulu. 
Matthew6:11 Otuwe leero emmere gye twetaaga. 
Matthew6:12 Otusonyiwe ebibi byaffe, nga naffe bwe tusonyiwa abakola ebitulumya." 
Matthew6:13 Totuleka kukemebwa, naye otuwonye omubi.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Bwe munaasonyiwanga abantu ensobi zaabwe, Kitammwe ali mu ggulu nammwe anaabasonyiwanga." 
Matthew6:15 Kyokka bwe mutaasonyiwenga bantu, nammwe Kitammwe taabasonyiwenga nsobi zammwe." 
Matthew6:16 “Bwe musiibanga, temubanga ng'abakuusa, abanakuwala ku maaso. Boonoona endabika yaabwe, abantu balyoke babalabe nti basiiba. Mazima mbagamba nti empeera yaabwe bagifunye." 
Matthew6:17 Naye ggwe bw'osiibanga, onyirizanga omutwe gwo, n'onaaba amaaso go," 
Matthew6:18 abantu baleme kukulaba nti osiiba, wabula Kitaawo atalabika ye aba akulaba. Era Kitaawo oyo alaba ebikolebwa mu kyama alikuwa empeera." 
Matthew6:19 “Temweterekeranga bugagga ku nsi kuno kwe bwonoonerwa ennyenje n'obutalagge, n'ababbi kwe basima ne babba," 
Matthew6:20 naye mweterekere obugagga mu ggulu, gye butayonoonerwa nnyenje wadde obutalagge, era ababbi gye batasima ne babba." 
Matthew6:21 Kubanga obugagga bwo gye buba, n'omutima gwo gye guba." 
Matthew6:22 “Ettaala y'omubiri lye liiso. Eriiso lyo bwe liba eddamu, omubiri gwo gwonna gujjula obutangaavu." 
Matthew6:23 Naye eriiso lyo bwe litaba ddamu, omubiri gwo gwonna gujjula ekizikiza. Kale obutangaavu mu ggwe bwe buba ekizikiza, ekizikiza ekyo kiryenkana wa!" 
Matthew6:24 “Tewali muddu ayinza kuba na bakama be babiri. Oba alikyawa omu n'ayagala omulala, oba alinywerera ku omu, n'anyooma omulala. Temuyinza kuba baddu ba Katonda, ate ne muba baddu ba bugagga obw'ensi." 
Matthew6:25 “Kyenva mbagamba nti temweraliikiriranga kye munaalya ne kye munaanywa okukuuma obulamu bwammwe, newaakubadde kye munaayambaza emibiri gyammwe. Obulamu si bwa muwendo okusinga emmere? N'omubiri si gwa muwendo okusinga ebyokwambala?" 
Matthew6:26 Mutunuulire ebinyonyi: tebisiga, tebikungula era tebitereka. Naye Kitammwe ali mu ggulu abiwa emmere. Mmwe temubisinga nnyo?" 
Matthew6:27 Ani ku mmwe bwe yeeraliikirira, ayinza okwongera wadde ekiseera ekitono ku buwanvu bw'obulamu bwe?" 
Matthew6:28 “Lwaki mweraliikirira ebyokwambala? Mutunuulire amalanga ag'omu ttale: tegakola mulimu, wadde okuluka engoye." 
Matthew6:29 Naye mbagamba nti: newaakubadde Solomooni mu kitiibwa kye kyonna, teyayambalanga ng'erimu ku go." 
Matthew6:30 Oba nga Katonda ayambaza bw'atyo omuddo ogw'omu ttale oguliwo olwa leero, ate enkeera ne gusuulibwa ku kikoomi, talisingawo nnyo okwambaza mmwe, abalina okukkiriza okutono?" 
Matthew6:31 “Kale temweraliikiriranga nga mugamba nti: ‘Tunaalya ki,’ oba nti: ‘Tunaanywa ki,’ oba nti ‘Tunaayambala ki?’" 
Matthew6:32 Ebyo byonna abantu ab'ensi bye beemalirako okunoonya. Mmwe Kitammwe amanyi nti ebyo byonna mubyetaaga. 
Matthew6:33 Naye okusingira ddala, mwemalirenga ku Bwakabaka bwe, ne ku by'ayagala mukole, ebyo byonna nabyo biribaweebwa." 
Matthew6:34 Kale temweraliikiriranga biribaawo jjo. Olunaku olwa jjo luliba n'ebyeraliikirirwa ebyalwo. Buli lunaku lubaako emitawaana egimala. 
Matthew7:1 “Temusalanga musango, nammwe guleme kubasalirwa." 
Matthew7:2 Kubanga, nga bwe musalira abalala omusango, nammwe bwe gulibasalirwa. Era ekipimo kye mukozesa okupimira abalala, kye kirikozesebwa okupimira mmwe." 
Matthew7:3 Lwaki otunuulira akasubi akali ku liiso lya muganda wo, naye n'otofa ku kisiki ekiri ku liryo?" 
Matthew7:4 Oba ogamba otya muganda wo nti: ‘Leka nkuggye akasubi ku liiso,’ sso nga ku liiso eriryo kuliko ekisiki?" 
Matthew7:5 Mukuusa ggwe, sooka oggye ekisiki ku liiso eriryo, olwo olyoke osobole okulaba obulungi, n'okuggya akasubi ku liiso lya muganda wo." 
Matthew7:6 “Ekitukuvu temukiwanga mbwa, sikulwa nga zibakyukira ne zibaluma. Era amayinja gammwe ag'omuwendo temugasuulanga mu maaso ga mbizzi, sikulwa nga zigalinnyirira." 
Matthew7:7 “Musabe, muliweebwa. Munoonye, mulizuula. Mukonkone ku luggi, muliggulirwawo," 
Matthew7:8 kubanga buli asaba afuna, oyo anoonya azuula, n'oyo akonkona ku luggi aggulirwawo." 
Matthew7:9 Ani ku mmwe awa omwana we ejjinja ng'amusabye omugaati," 
Matthew7:10 oba amuwa omusota ng'amusabye ekyennyanja? 
Matthew7:11 Kale oba nga mmwe ababi mumanyi okuwa abaana bammwe ebirungi, Kitammwe ow'omu ggulu talisingawo nnyo okuwa ebirungi abo ababimusaba?" 
Matthew7:12 “Kale nno byonna bye mwagala abalala babakolere mmwe, nammwe mubibakolerenga. Ekyo Amateeka n'enjigiriza y'abalanzi kye bitegeeza." 
Matthew7:13 “Muyingirire mu muzigo omufunda, kubanga omuzigo oguyingira mu kuzikirira gwo mugazi, n'ekkubo erituukayo ddene, era bangi abaliyitamu." 
Matthew7:14 Omuzigo oguyingira mu bulamu mufunda, n'ekkubo erituukayo lya kanyigo, n'abali zuula batono." 
Matthew7:15 “Mwekuume abalanzi ab'obulimba, abajja gye muli nga kungulu bafaanana ng'endiga, sso nga munda gye misege eminyazi." 
Matthew7:16 Mulibategeerera ku bikolwa byabwe. Abantu emizabbibu baginoga ku kawule, oba emitiini baginoga ku busaana?" 
Matthew7:17 “Omuti omulungi gubala ebibala birungi, naye omuti omubi gubala ebibala bibi." 
Matthew7:18 Omuti omulungi teguyinza kubala bibala bibi, n'omuti omubi teguyinza kubala bibala birungi." 
Matthew7:19 Buli muti ogutabala bibala birungi gutemebwa, ne gusuulibwa mu muliro." 
Matthew7:20 “Bwe kityo nno, ku bikolwa byabwe kwe mulibategeerera." 
Matthew7:21 “Omuntu addiŋŋana okumpita obuyisi nti: ‘Mukama wange, Mukama wange,’ si ye aliyingira Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, wabula oyo akola Kitange ali mu ggulu by'ayagala." 
Matthew7:22 Ku lunaku luli, bangi baliŋŋamba nti: ‘Mukama waffe, Mukama waffe, tetwayigirizanga mu linnya lyo? Tetwagobanga emyoyo emibi ku bantu nga tukozesa erinnya lyo? Era tetwakolanga ebyamagero bingi mu linnya lyo?’" 
Matthew7:23 Nze ndibaatulira nti: ‘Sibamanyangako mmwe. Muve we ndi mmwe abajeemu.’ 
Matthew7:24 “Buli muntu awulira ebigambo byange ebyo, n'abikolerako, aliba ng'omusajja ow'amagezi, eyazimba ennyumba ye ku lwazi," 
Matthew7:25 Enkuba n'etonnya, mukoka n'akulukuta, kibuyaga n'akunta, ne bikuba ennyumba eyo, sso n'etegwa, kubanga yazimbibwa ku lwazi." 
Matthew7:26 “Ate buli muntu awulira ebigambo byange ebyo, n'atabikolerako, aliba ng'omusajja omusirusiru, eyazimba ennyumba ye ku musenyu." 
Matthew7:27 Enkuba n'etonnya, mukoka n'akulukuta, kibuyaga n'akunta, ne bikuba ennyumba eyo, n'egwa, n'emenyekerawo ddala.”" 
Matthew7:28 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, ekibiina ky'abantu ne kyewuunya engeri gye yayigirizaamu," 
Matthew7:29 kubanga yayigiriza nga nnannyini buyinza, sso si ng'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka." 
Matthew8:1 Yesu bwe yava ku lusozi, ekibiina ky'abantu ne kimu goberera." 
Matthew8:2 Awo omugenge n'ajja gy'ali n'amusinza, n'agamba nti: “Ssebo, singa oyagala, oyinza okumponya.”" 
Matthew8:3 Yesu n'agolola omukono n'amukwatako, n'agamba nti: “Njagala, wona.” Amangwago ebigenge ne bimuwonako." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Laba, tobuulirako muntu n'omu, wabula genda weeyanjule ewa kabona, oweeyo ekirabo nga Musa bwe yalagira, balyoke bakakase nti owonye.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yesu bwe yayingira mu Kibuga Kafarunawumu, Omurooma omukulu w'ekitongole ky'abaserikale, n'ajja gy'ali, n'amwegayirira" 
Matthew8:6 ng'agamba nti: “Ssebo, omuddu wange ali waka, obulwadde bumugongobazizza, alumizibwa nnyo.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Ka njije, mmuwonye.”" 
Matthew8:8 Omurooma omukulu w'ekitongole ky'abaserikale n'addamu nti: “Ssebo, sisaanira, ggwe okuyingira mu nnyumba yange, wabula yogera bwogezi kigambo, omuddu wange anaawona." 
Matthew8:9 Nange ndi muntu mutwalibwa, era nga nnina abaserikale be ntwala. Bwe ŋŋamba ono nti ‘Genda’, agenda; n'omulala nti ‘Jjangu’, ajja; n'omuddu wange nti: ‘Kola kino’, akikola.”" 
Matthew8:10 Yesu bwe yawulira ebyo, ne yeewuunya, n'agamba abaali bamugoberera nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti: sisanganga alina kukkiriza nga kuno wadde mu bantu ba Yisirayeli!" 
Matthew8:11 Mbagamba nti bangi baliva ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba, ne batuula ku mbaga ne Aburahamu, ne Yisaaka, ne Yakobo mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu," 
Matthew8:12 naye abo abandibubaddemu, ne bagoberwa ebweru mu kizikiza, awaliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji.”" 
Matthew8:13 Awo Yesu n'agamba Omurooma omukulu w'ekitongole ky'abaserikale nti: “Genda, kikukolerwe nga bw'okkirizza.” Omuddu n'awona mu kaseera ako." 
Matthew8:14 Yesu bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Peetero, n'alaba nnyina wa muka Peetero ng'ali ku ndiri, omusujja gumuluma." 
Matthew8:15 N'amukwata ku mukono, omusujja ne gumuwonako, n'agolokoka, n'aweereza Yesu." 
Matthew8:16 Obudde nga buwungedde, ne baleetera Yesu abantu bangi abaliko emyoyo emibi, n'agibagobako ng'agiboggolera, era bonna abaali balwadde, n'abawonya." 
Matthew8:17 Ekyo kyali bwe kityo, omulanzi Yisaaya kye yayogera kiryoke kituukirire, ekigamba nti: “Ye yennyini yatwala obuyongobevu bwaffe, n'aggyawo endwadde zaffe.”" 
Matthew8:18 Yesu bwe yalaba ng'abantu bangi nnyo bamwetoolodde, n'alagira nti: “Tuwunguke tugende emitala w'ennyanja.”" 
Matthew8:19 Awo omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka omu n'ajja, n'agamba Yesu nti: “Muyigiriza, nnaayitanga naawe gy'onoogendanga yonna.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Ebibe birina ebinnya, n'ebinyonyi birina ebisu. Naye Omwana w'Omuntu talina w'assa mutwe.”" 
Matthew8:21 Omuntu omulala, omu ku bayigirizwa be, n'amugamba nti: “Ssebo, nzikiriza nsooke ŋŋende nziike kitange.”" 
Matthew8:22 Kyokka Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Yita nange, leka abo abali ng'abafu, baziike abafu baabwe.”" 
Matthew8:23 Awo Yesu n'asaabala mu lyato, abayigirizwa be ne ba genda naye." 
Matthew8:24 Omuyaga ogw'amaanyi ne gukunta ku nnyanja, amayengo ne gabikka eryato. Yesu yali yeebase." 
Matthew8:25 Abayigirizwa be ne basembera w'ali, ne bamuzuukusa nga bagamba nti: “Mukama waffe, tuwonye, tufa!”" 
Matthew8:26 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Lwaki mutidde? Nga mulina okukkiriza kutono!” N'agolokoka, n'alagira omuyaga n'amayengo okukkakkana, ennyanja n'eteekera ddala." 
Matthew8:27 Bonna ne beewuunya, ne bagamba nti: “Ono muntu wa ngeri ki? Olaba n'omuyaga n'amayengo bimuwulira!”" 
Matthew8:28 Awo Yesu bwe yatuuka emitala w'ennyanja, mu nsi y'Abagadara, abantu babiri abaliko emyoyo emibi, ne bamusisinkana nga bava mu mpuku eziziikibwamu abafu. Abasajja bano baali bakambwe nnyo, nga tewali muntu ayinza kuyita mu kkubo eryo." 
Matthew8:29 Ne bawowoggana nga bagamba nti: “Otuvunaana ki, ggwe Omwana wa Katonda? Ozze okutubonyaabonya ng'ekiseera tekinnatuuka?”" 
Matthew8:30 Waaliwo eggana ddene ery'embizzi nga zeesuddeko akabanga okuva we baali, nga zirya." 
Matthew8:31 Emyoyo emibi ne gyegayirira Yesu nti: “Oba ng'otugoba ku bantu bano tusindike mu ggana ly'embizzi.” 
Matthew8:32 Yesu n'agigamba nti: “Mugende.” Ne gibavaako, ne giyingira mu mbizzi. Eggana lyonna ne lifubutuka, ne liwanuka waggulu ku kagulungujjo k'olusozi, ne lyesuula mu nnyanja, embizzi zonna ne zifiira mu mazzi." 
Matthew8:33 Abaali bazirabirira ne badduka, ne balaga mu kibuga, ne bannyonnyola byonna, n'ebikwata ku bali abaabaddeko emyoyo emibi." 
Matthew8:34 Bonna ne bava mu kibuga okusisinkana Yesu. Bwe baamulaba, ne bamwegayirira ave mu kitundu kyabwe." 
Matthew9:1 Awo Yesu n'asaabala mu lyato, n'awunguka, n'atuuka mu kibuga ky'ewaabwe." 
Matthew9:2 Ne bamuleetera omuntu akonvubye. Baamuleeta agalamidde ku katanda. Yesu bwe yalaba nga balina okukkiriza, n'agamba akonvubye nti: “Mwana wange, guma omwoyo, ebibi byo mbikusonyiye.”" 
Matthew9:3 Awo abamu ku bannyonnyozi b'amateeka ne bagambagana nti: “Ono avvoola Katonda.” 
Matthew9:4 Yesu bwe yalaba ebirowoozo byabwe, n'agamba nti: “Lwaki mulowooza obubi mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Matthew9:5 Ekisingako obwangu kye kiruwa, okugamba nti: ‘Ebibi byo mbikusonyiye,’ oba nti: ‘Yimirira otambule?’" 
Matthew9:6 Kaakano ka mbalage nti Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi okusonyiwa ebibi.” Awo n'agamba akonvubye nti: “Yimirira, weetikke akatanda ko, oddeyo ewammwe.”" 
Matthew9:7 N'ayimirira, n'addayo ewaabwe." 
Matthew9:8 Abantu bwe baalaba ekyo, ne batya, ne bagulumiza Katonda eyawa abantu obuyinza obwenkana awo." 
Matthew9:9 Awo Yesu bwe yava mu kifo ekyo, n'alaba omuntu ayitibwa Matayo, ng'atudde we basolooleza omusolo. N'amugamba nti: “Yitanga nange.” Matayo n'asituka, n'amugoberera." 
Matthew9:10 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yali mu nnyumba ng'atudde okulya, abasolooza b'omusolo bangi n'aboonoonyi ne bajja, ne batuula ne Yesu era n'abayigirizwa be okulya." 
Matthew9:11 Abafarisaayo bwe baalaba ekyo, ne bagamba abayigirizwa ba Yesu nti: “Lwaki Omuyigiriza wammwe aliira wamu n'abasolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Yesu bwe yawulira, n'agamba nti: “Abalamu tebeetaaga musawo, wabula abalwadde." 
Matthew9:13 Naye mugende mwetegereze amakulu g'ekigambo kino nti: ‘Ekisa kye njagala sso si kitambiro.’ Abalungi si be najja okuyita, wabula aboonoonyi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Awo abayigirizwa ba Yowanne ne bajja eri Yesu, ne babuuza nti: “Lwaki ffe, n'Abafarisaayo tusiiba emirundi mingi, naye abayigirizwa bo ne batasiiba?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Abayite ku mbaga y'obugole tebayinza kunakuwala ng'awasizza omugole akyali nabo. Naye ekiseera kijja, awasizza omugole abaggyibweko. Olwo nno balisiiba." 
Matthew9:16 “Omuntu tatunga mu lugoye lukadde kiwero kiggya ekitannayozebwamu, kubanga kiyuza olugoye, ekituli ne kyeyongera obunene." 
Matthew9:17 Era omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omusu, tegufukibwa mu nsawo zaagwo ez'amaliba enkadde. Singa kino kikolebwa, guzaabya, omwenge ogwo n'ensawo n'obifiirwa. Naye omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omusu, gufukibwa mu nsawo zaagwo ez'amaliba empya, byombi lwe bikuumibwa obulungi.”" 
Matthew9:18 Yesu yali akyabagamba ebyo, omukungu omu n'ajja n'amufukaamirira, n'agamba nti: “Muwala wange yaakafa, naye jjangu omukwateko, anaalamuka.”" 
Matthew9:19 Awo Yesu n'asituka, n'agenda naye, wamu n'abayigirizwa be." 
Matthew9:20 Omukazi eyali alwadde ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi okumala emyaka kkumi n'ebiri, n'ajja emabega wa Yesu, n'amukwata ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye:" 
Matthew9:21 kubanga yagamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Waakiri ne bwe nnaakwata ku kyambalo kye, nja kuwona.”" 
Matthew9:22 Yesu bwe yakyuka n'amulaba, n'agamba nti: “Omuwala, guma, owonye olw'okukkiriza kwo.” Omukazi n'awona mu kaseera ako." 
Matthew9:23 Yesu bwe yatuuka ku nnyumba y'omukungu, n'alaba abafuuwa endere n'abantu bangi nga baaziirana," 
Matthew9:24 n'agamba nti: “Muveewo. Omuwala tafudde, wabula yeebase.” Ne bamusekerera." 
Matthew9:25 Abantu bwe baamala okugobebwawo, Yesu n'ayingira, n'akwata omuwala ku mukono, omuwala n'ayimirira." 
Matthew9:26 Amawulire ago ne gabuna mu nsi eyo yonna. 
Matthew9:27 Yesu bwe yava eyo, bamuzibe babiri ne bamugoberera nga baleekaana, nga bagamba nti: “Omuzzukulu wa Dawudi, tusaasire!”" 
Matthew9:28 Yesu bwe yatuuka mu nnyumba, bamuzibe abo ne bajja w'ali, n'ababuuza nti: “Mukkiriza nga nnyinza okukola kino?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Weewaawo, Ssebo!”" 
Matthew9:29 Awo n'akwata ku maaso gaabwe, n'agamba nti: “Kibakolerwe nga bwe mukkirizza.”" 
Matthew9:30 Amaaso gaabwe ne gazibuka. Yesu n'abakuutira ng'agamba nti: “Temubuulirako muntu n'omu!” 
Matthew9:31 Naye bo ne bafuluma, ne basaasaanya mu nsi eyo yonna amawulire agafa ku Yesu." 
Matthew9:32 Abo bwe baali bafuluma, ne wabaawo abaamuleetera kasiru, ng'aliko omwoyo omubi." 
Matthew9:33 Yesu bwe yamugobaako omwoyo omubi, kasiru n'ayogera. Abantu ne beewuunya, ne bagamba nti: “Ekiri nga kino tekirabikangako mu Yisirayeli!”" 
Matthew9:34 Naye Abafarisaayo ne bagamba nti: “Emyoyo emibi agigoba ng'akozesa buyinza bwa mukulu waagyo.” 
Matthew9:35 Yesu n'ayitaayita mu bibuga byonna ne mu byalo, ng'ayigiriza mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe, ng'ategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi ag'Obwakabaka, era ng'awonya abantu obulwadde bwonna n'obuyongobevu bwonna." 
Matthew9:36 Bwe yalaba abantu enkumu, n'abakwatirwa ekisa, kubanga baali basobeddwa, nga bali ng'endiga ezitalina musumba." 
Matthew9:37 N'alyoka agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Eby'okukungula bingi, naye abakozi be batono." 
Matthew9:38 Kale musabe nnannyini bya kukungula asindike abakozi mu by'okukungula bye.” 
Matthew10:1 Awo Yesu n'ayita abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri, ne bajja w'ali, n'abawa obuyinza okugobanga emyoyo emibi ku bantu, n'okuwonyanga abantu endwadde zonna n'obuyongobevu bwonna." 
Matthew10:2 Amannya g'abatume ekkumi n'ababiri ge gano: omubereberye, Simooni Peetero, ne Andereya muganda we; ne Yakobo, ne muganda we Yowanne, batabani ba Zebedaayo;" 
Matthew10:3 ne Filipo, ne Barutolomaayo, ne Tomasi, ne Matayo omusolooza w'omusolo; ne Yakobo mutabani wa Alufaayo; ne Taddaayo," 
Matthew10:4 ne Simooni Omulwanirizi w'eggwanga lye, ne Yuda Yisikaryoti, eyalyamu Yesu olukwe." 
Matthew10:5 Abo ekkumi n'ababiri Yesu n'abatuma, n'abakuutira ng'abagamba nti: “Temugenda mu b'amawanga amalala, era temuyingira mu bibuga bya Basamariya." 
Matthew10:6 Naye mugende eri abantu ba Yisirayeli abaabula. 
Matthew10:7 Mugende mutegeeze abantu nti: ‘Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu busembedde.’ 
Matthew10:8 Muwonye abalwadde, muzuukize abafu, muwonye abagenge balongooke, mugobe emyoyo emibi ku bantu. Mwaweebwa buweebwa, nammwe mugabe." 
Matthew10:9 Temutwala zaabu newaakubadde ffeeza, newaakubadde ssente ez'ekikomo mu nsawo zammwe," 
Matthew10:10 newaakubadde ensawo ey'olugendo, newaakubadde ekkanzu eyookubiri, newaakubadde engatto, wadde omuggo: kubanga omukozi asaanira okuweebwa bye yeetaaga." 
Matthew10:11 “Buli kibuga na buli kyalo kye muyingiramu, munoonye omuntu ayagala okubaaniriza, musule ewuwe okutuusa lwe muliva mu kifo ekyo." 
Matthew10:12 Bwe muyingira mu nnyumba, mugambe nti: ‘Emirembe gibe n'abantu b'omu nnyumba eno.’" 
Matthew10:13 Singa abantu ab'omu nnyumba eyo babaaniriza, emirembe gye mubaagalizza girisigala nabo. Naye bwe batalibaaniriza, emirembe gye mubaagalizza giridda gye muli." 
Matthew10:14 Singa bagaana okubaaniriza mu nnyumba oba mu kibuga, bwe mubanga muvaayo, mwekunkumulangako n'enfuufu eba ebakutte ku bigere." 
Matthew10:15 Mazima mbagamba nti ku lunaku olw'okusalirwako emisango, ensi y'e Sodoma ne Gomora eriddirwamu okusinga ekibuga ekyo." 
Matthew10:16 “Mwekkaanye: nze mbatuma nga muli ng'endiga mu misege wakati. Kale nno mube beegendereza ng'emisota, era mube ng'amayiba obutaba na bukuusa." 
Matthew10:17 Mwerinde, kubanga walibaawo abantu abalibakwata ne babawaayo mu mbuga z'amateeka. Era balibakubira mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe." 
Matthew10:18 Mulitwalibwa mu maaso g'abaami n'aga bakabaka ku lwange, mutuuse ku bo ne ku b'amawanga amalala Amawulire Amalungi." 
Matthew10:19 Naye bwe babakwatanga ne babawaayo, temweraliikiriranga nti: Tunaayogera tutya, oba nti: Tunaayogera ki? Muliweebwa mu kaseera ako, kye mulyogera," 
Matthew10:20 kubanga si mmwe mulyogera, wabula Mwoyo wa Kitammwe ye alyogerera mu mmwe." 
Matthew10:21 “Owooluganda aliwaayo muganda we okuttibwa, ne kitaawe w'omwana aliwaayo omwana we. Abaana balijeemera abazadde baabwe, ne babawaayo okuttibwa." 
Matthew10:22 Mmwe, abantu bonna balibakyawa olw'okuba muli bagoberezi bange. Kyokka oyo aligumira ebizibu okutuusa ku nkomerero, alirokolebwa." 
Matthew10:23 Bwe babayigganyanga mu kibuga ekimu, muddukiranga mu kirala. Mazima mbagamba nti: temulimalayo bibuga bya Yisirayeli nga Omwana w'Omuntu tannajja." 
Matthew10:24 “Ayigirizibwa tasinga amuyigiriza, n'omuddu tasinga mukama we." 
Matthew10:25 Ayigirizibwa kimumala okuba ng'amuyigiriza, n'omuddu okuba nga mukama we. Oba nga nnannyinimu bamuyise Beeluzebuli, ab'omu maka ge kiki kye batalibayita!" 
Matthew10:26 “Kale nno temubatyanga, kubanga buli kintu ekikwekeddwa kirikwekulwa, era buli kyama kirimanyibwa mu lwatu." 
Matthew10:27 Kye mbabuulira mu kizikiza, mukyogereranga mu musana. Kye muwulira mu kaama, mukirangiriranga ku ntikko z'ennyumba." 
Matthew10:28 “Era temutyanga abo abatta omubiri, naye nga tebayinza kutta mwoyo. Naye mutyenga Katonda ayinza okuzikiriza omwoyo n'omubiri mu muliro ogutazikira." 
Matthew10:29 “Enkazaluggya bbiri tezigula ssente emu? Naye tewali n'emu ku zo egwa ku ttaka nga Kitammwe tayagadde. 
Matthew10:30 N'enviiri ez'oku mitwe gyammwe zonna mbale. 
Matthew10:31 Kale nno temutya, muli ba muwendo okusinga enkazaluggya ennyingi." 
Matthew10:32 “Buli anjatula mu maaso g'abantu, nange ndimwatula mu maaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew10:33 Kyokka oyo anneegaana mu maaso g'abantu, nange ndimwegaana mu maaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew10:34 “Temulowooza nti najja kuleeta mirembe ku nsi. Sajja kuleeta mirembe, wabula ekitala." 
Matthew10:35 Najja okwawukanya omwana ne kitaawe, omuwala ne nnyina, muka mwana ne nnyazaala we." 
Matthew10:36 Era abalabe b'omuntu banaabanga ba mu nnyumba ye. 
Matthew10:37 “Oyo ayagala kitaawe oba nnyina okusinga bw'ayagala nze, tansaanira. Era oyo ayagala mutabani we oba muwala we okusinga bw'ayagala nze, tansaanira." 
Matthew10:38 N'oyo ateetikka musaalaba gwe n'angoberera, tansaanira." 
Matthew10:39 Agezaako okutaasa obulamu bwe, alibufiirwa. Afiirwa obulamu bwe ku lwange, alibuddizibwa." 
Matthew10:40 “Ayaniriza mmwe ng'ayanirizza nze, ate ayaniriza nze, ng'ayanirizza oyo eyantuma." 
Matthew10:41 Ayaniriza omulanzi olw'okuba nga mulanzi, alifuna empeera ng'ey'omulanzi. Era ayaniriza omuntu akola Katonda by'ayagala, olw'okuba ng'akola Katonda by'ayagala, alifuna empeera ng'ey'omuntu akola Katonda by'ayagala." 
Matthew10:42 Mazima mbagamba nti: buli awa omu ku bano abato eggiraasi y'amazzi obuzzi amannyogovu okunywa, olw'okuba nga muyigirizwa wange, alifuna empeera ye, awatali kubuusabuusa.”" 
Matthew11:1 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamaliriza by'alagira abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri, n'ava mu kifo ekyo, n'agenda okuyigiriza n'okutegeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda mu bibuga byabwe." 
Matthew11:2 Yowanne Omubatiza bwe yali mu kkomera, n'awulira Kristo by'akola, n'atuma abamu ku bayigirizwa be" 
Matthew11:3 okumubuuza nti: “Ggwe wuuyo gwe tulindirira okujja, oba tulindirire mulala?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Mugende mutegeeze Yowanne bye muwulira ne bye mulaba: 
Matthew11:5 ababadde bamuzibe balaba, ababadde abalema batambula, abagenge bawonyezebwa, ababadde bakiggala bawulira, abafu bazuukizibwa, abaavu bategeezebwa Amawulire Amalungi." 
Matthew11:6 Wa mukisa atambuusabuusaamu.” 
Matthew11:7 Abo bwe baagenda, Yesu n'atandika okutegeeza abantu ebifa ku Yowanne nti: “Bwe mwagenda eri Yowanne mu ddungu, mwagenderera kulaba ki? Olumuli olunyeenyezebwa empewo?" 
Matthew11:8 Kale mwagenda kulaba ki? Abo abambala engoye ezinekaaneka? Abo abambala engoye ezinekaaneka, basangibwa mu mbiri za bakabaka." 
Matthew11:9 Kale mwagenda kulaba ki? Mulanzi? Ddala, mbagamba nti asinga n'omulanzi." 
Matthew11:10 Kubanga Yowanne ono, ebyawandiikibwa gwe byogerako nti: ‘Laba, nze ntuma omubaka wange akukulembere, ng'akwerulira ekkubo gy'olaga.’" 
Matthew11:11 “Mazima mbagamba nti Yowanne asinga abantu bonna ekitiibwa abaali bazaaliddwa. Kyokka oyo asembayo okuba oweekitiibwa mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, asinga Yowanne ono ekitiibwa." 
Matthew11:12 “Okuva Yowanne Omubatiza lwe yajja, okutuusa kati, Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bulwanyisibwa n'amaanyi, era ab'amaanyi babunyaga." 
Matthew11:13 Amateeka n'abalanzi bonna, okutuusa Yowanne lwe yajja, baalanga ebifa ku Bwakabaka." 
Matthew11:14 Era oba nga mwagala okumanya, Yowanne ye Eliya ateekwa okujja." 
Matthew11:15 Alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire." 
Matthew11:16 “Abantu ab'omulembe guno nnaabageraageranya na ki? Bafaanana ng'abaana abato abatuula mu katale, ne bakoowoola bannaabwe," 
Matthew11:17 ne bagamba nti: ‘Twabafuuyira endere, ne mutazina! Twakuba ebiwoobe, ne mutakaaba!’" 
Matthew11:18 “Yowanne Omubatiza bwe yajja ng'asiiba era nga tanywa, ne bagamba nti: ‘Aliko omwoyo omubi.’" 
Matthew11:19 Omwana w'Omuntu bwe yajja ng'alya era ng'anywa, ne bagamba nti: ‘Omuntu ono wa mululu, mutamiivu, era mukwano gwa basolooza ba musolo n'aboonoonyi.’ Wabula abo bonna abakolera ku magezi ga Katonda, bakakasa nti matuufu.”" 
Matthew11:20 Awo Yesu n'atandika okunenya ebibuga mwe yakolera ebyamagero ebisinga obungi, kubanga abantu baamu tebeenenya. N'agamba nti:" 
Matthew11:21 “Oli wa kubonaabona ggwe Koraziini! Ennaku za kukulaba ggwe Betusayida! Ebyamagero ebyakolerwa mu mmwe, singa byali bikoleddwa mu Tiiro ne Sidoni, abantu baayo bandibadde baayambala dda ebikutiya, ne beesiiga n'evvu, okulaga nti beenenyezza" 
Matthew11:22 Naye mbagamba nti ku lunaku olw'okusalirwako emisango, Tiiro ne Sidoni biribonerezebwa katono okusinga mmwe." 
Matthew11:23 “Ate ggwe Kafarunawumu, oligulumira okutuuka mu bire? Nedda, ogenda kussibwa wansi emagombe: kubanga ebyamagero ebyakolerwa mu ggwe, singa byali bikoleddwa mu Sodoma, singa weekiri ne kaakano." 
Matthew11:24 Naye mbagamba nti ku lunaku olw'okusalirwako emisango, Sodoma kiribonerezebwa katono okusinga ggwe.”" 
Matthew11:25 Mu kiseera ekyo, Yesu n'agamba nti: “Nkutendereza, Kitange, Mukama w'eggulu n'ensi, kubanga bino wabikweka abagezi n'abategeera, n'obimanyisa abaana abato." 
Matthew11:26 Weewaawo Kitange, kubanga bw'otyo bwe wayagala." 
Matthew11:27 “Kitange byonna yabimpa, ate nze Mwana tewali ammanyi okuggyako Kitange, era tewali amanyi Kitange okuggyako nze Mwana, n'oyo gwe mba njagadde amanye Kitange." 
Matthew11:28 “Mujje gye ndi, mmwe mwenna abakoze ne mukoowa n'abazitoowereddwa, nze nnaabawummuza." 
Matthew11:29 Mwetikke ekikoligo kyange era muyigire ku nze, kubanga ndi muteefu era mwetoowaze mu mwoyo, mulizuulira emyoyo gyammwe ekiwummulo." 
Matthew11:30 Kubanga ekikoligo kye mbawa kyangu, n'omugugu gwe mbatikka si muzito.”" 
Matthew12:1 Mu biseera ebyo, Yesu n'ayita mu nnimiro z'eŋŋaano ku lunaku olwa Sabbaato. Abayigirizwa be baali balumwa enjala, ne batandika okunoga ku birimba, ne balya." 
Matthew12:2 Abafarisaayo abamu bwe baalaba ekyo, ne bagamba Yesu nti: “Laba, abayigirizwa bo bakola ekitakkirizibwa ku Sabbaato!”" 
Matthew12:3 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Temusomangako Dawudi kye yakola, ye ne be yali nabo bwe baalumwa enjala?" 
Matthew12:4 Yayingira mu Ssinzizo, n'alya ku migaati egyali giweereddwayo eri Katonda, sso nga gyali tegimukkirizibwa, wadde abo be yali nabo, okugirya, wabula nga gikkirizibwa bakabona bokka." 
Matthew12:5 Oba temusomangako mu Mateeka nti: ku Sabbaato, mu Ssinzizo, bakabona bamenya etteeka lya Sabbaato ne bataba na musango?" 
Matthew12:6 Naye mbagamba nti asinga Essinzizo ekitiibwa ali wano. 
Matthew12:7 Era singa mumanyi amakulu g'ekigambo kino nti: ‘Ekisa kye njagala naye si kitambiro,’ temwandinenyezza batalina musango." 
Matthew12:8 Kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza okusalawo ekisaanye okukolebwa ku Sabbaato.” 
Matthew12:9 Awo Yesu n'ava mu kifo ekyo, n'ajja mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyabwe." 
Matthew12:10 Mwalimu omuntu ow'omukono ogukaze. Waaliwo abantu abamu abaali baagala okuwawaabira Yesu. Ne bamubuuza nti: “Kikkirizibwa okuwonya ku Sabbaato?” 
Matthew12:11 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Ani ku mmwe aliba n'endiga ye emu, n'egwa mu bunnya ku Sabbaato, ataligikwata n'agiggyamu?" 
Matthew12:12 Omuntu tasinga nnyo endiga omuwendo? N'olwekyo kikkirizibwa okukolera omuntu obulungi ku Sabbaato.” 
Matthew12:13 Awo n'agamba omuntu oyo nti: “Omukono gwo gugolole.” N'agugolola, ne guwonera ddala, ne guba ng'omulala." 
Matthew12:14 Abafarisaayo bwe baafuluma, ne bakuba olukiiko bateese nga bwe banaazikiriza Yesu." 
Matthew12:15 Yesu bwe yamanya olukwe olw'okumutta, n'ava mu kifo ekyo. Abantu bangi ne bamugoberera, n'awonya abalwadde bonna." 
Matthew12:16 N'abagaana okumwatuukiriza," 
Matthew12:17 ekyo omulanzi Yisaaya kye yayogera kiryoke kituukirire, ekigamba nti:" 
Matthew12:18 “Ono ye muweereza wange gwe nalondamu, gwe njagala, asanyusa omutima gwange. Ndimuteekako Mwoyo wange, n'ategeeza amawanga eby'amazima." 
Matthew12:19 Taliyomba, talireekaana, era tewaliba awulira ddoboozi lye mu nguudo." 
Matthew12:20 Olumuli olumenyese talirukutula, n'enfuuzi enyooka taligizikiza. Alituusa amazima ku buwanguzi." 
Matthew12:21 Amawanga gonna galisuubira mu linnya lye.” 
Matthew12:22 Awo ne baleetera Yesu omuntu aliko omwoyo omubi, nga muzibe era nga kasiru, n'amuwonya. N'asobola okwogera n'okulaba." 
Matthew12:23 Abantu bonna ne beewuunya, ne bagamba nti: “Ono ye Muzzukulu wa Dawudi?”" 
Matthew12:24 Naye Abafarisaayo bwe baawulira, ne bagamba nti: “Ono agoba emyoyo emibi ku bantu, nga takozesa buyinza bwa mulala, wabula obwa Beeluzebuli, omukulu waagyo.”" 
Matthew12:25 Yesu bwe yamanya ebirowoozo byabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Abantu ab'obwakabaka obumu bwe beesalamu ne balwanagana, obwakabaka obwo buzikirira. Era ne bwe kiba kibuga oba maka, abantu baamu bwe beesalamu ne balwanagana, bisasika." 
Matthew12:26 “Ne Sitaani bw'agoba Sitaani ku bantu, aba yeesazeemu. Kale obwakabaka bwe bunaasigalawo butya?" 
Matthew12:27 Era oba nga nze ngoba emyoyo emibi ku bantu nga nkozesa buyinza bwa Beeluzebuli, abagoberezi bammwe bo bagigoba nga bakozesa buyinza bw'ani? Kale nno bo be bajja okubasalira mmwe omusango." 
Matthew12:28 Naye oba nga emyoyo emibi ngigoba ku bantu nga nkozesa buyinza bwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, kino kitegeeza nti Obwakabaka bwa Katonda butuuse mu mmwe." 
Matthew12:29 “Omuntu ayinza atya okuyingira mu nnyumba y'omuntu ow'amaanyi n'okunyaga ebintu bye, okuggyako ng'asoose kusiba ow'amaanyi oyo? Olwo lw'asobola okunyaga eby'omu nnyumba ye." 
Matthew12:30 “Ataba ku ludda lwange, mulabe wange. Era atannyamba kukuŋŋaanya, asaasaanya." 
Matthew12:31 Kyenva mbagamba nti abantu bayinza okusonyiyibwa ebibi byonna, n'okusonyiyibwa okwogera obubi mu ngeri yonna. Kyokka buli avuma Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, talisonyiyibwa." 
Matthew12:32 Era buli ayogera ekigambo ekibi ku Mwana w'Omuntu, alisonyiyibwa. Kyokka oyo ayogera obubi ku Mwoyo Mutuukirivu talisonyiyibwa newaakubadde mu mulembe guno, wadde mu mulembe ogugenda okujja." 
Matthew12:33 “Omuti muguyite mulungi, ng'ebibala byagwo birungi, muguyite mubi, ng'ebibala byagwo bibi: kubanga omuti gutegeererwa ku bibala byagwo." 
Matthew12:34 Mmwe abaana b'emisota egy'obusagwa, muyinza mutya okwogera ebirungi nga muli babi? Kubanga ebijjula mu mutima, akamwa bye koogera." 
Matthew12:35 Omuntu omulungi, aggya ku birungi ebiri mu mutima gwe okukola ebirungi; n'omuntu omubi, aggya ku bibi ebiri mu mutima gwe okukola ebibi." 
Matthew12:36 “Era mbagamba nti buli kigambo ekitaliimu mugaso abantu kye boogera, balikiwoza ku lunaku olulisalirwako emisango." 
Matthew12:37 Kubanga ku bigambo byo kw'olisalirwa omusango: n'osinga, oba ne gukusalirwa okukusinga.”" 
Matthew12:38 Awo abamu ku bannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo ne bagamba Yesu nti: “Muyigiriza, twagala okulaba akabonero k'otuwa, akakakasa obuyinza bwo.”" 
Matthew12:39 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Abantu b'omulembe guno ababi, abava ku Katonda, basaba akabonero. Naye tewali kabonero kajja kubaweebwa, okuggyako akabonero ka Yona omulanzi." 
Matthew12:40 Kuba nga Yona bwe yabeera mu lubuto lw'ekyennyanja ennaku essatu, ekiro n'emisana, bw'atyo n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aliba mu ttaka munda ennaku ssatu, ekiro n'emisana." 
Matthew12:41 “Abantu b'e Nineeve balisituka ng'abantu b'omulembe guno basalirwa omusango, ne babalumiriza omusango okubasinga. Kubanga bo beenenya nga Yona abategeezezza ekigambo kya Katonda. Naye laba, asinga Yona ali wano." 
Matthew12:42 “Kabaka omukazi ow'omu bukiikaddyo alisituka ng'abantu b'omulembe guno basalirwa omusango, n'abalumiriza omusango okubasinga. Kubanga yava ku nkomerero y'ensi, n'ajja okuwuliriza ebigambo bya Solomooni eby'amagezi. Naye laba, asinga Solomooni ali wano." 
Matthew12:43 “Omwoyo omubi bwe guva ku muntu, guyitaayita mu bifo ebitaliimu mazzi, nga gunoonya we gunaawummulira, ne gutazuulawo." 
Matthew12:44 Ne gugamba nti: ‘Nja kudda mu nnyumba yange mwe nava.’ Bwe gudda, gugisanga ng'eyereddwa era ng'etegekeddwa bulungi." 
Matthew12:45 Olwo ne gugenda ne guleeta emyoyo emibi emirala musanvu egigusinga obubi, ne giyingira ne gibeera omwo. Embeera y'omuntu oyo ey'oluvannyuma n'eba mbi okusinga eyasooka. Bwe kityo bwe kiriba ne ku bantu ab'omulembe guno omubi.”" 
Matthew12:46 Yesu yali akyayogera n'ekibiina ky'abantu, baganda be ne nnyina ne bajja, ne bayimirira wabweru, nga baagala okwogera naye." 
Matthew12:47 Omuntu omu n'amugamba nti: “Laba, nnyoko ne baganda bo bayimiridde wabweru, baagala okwogera naawe.”" 
Matthew12:48 Yesu n'addamu oyo amubuulidde, n'agamba nti: “Aba muntu wa ngeri ki gwe mpita mmange, era baba bantu ba ngeri ki be mpita baganda bange?”" 
Matthew12:49 N'agolola omukono eri abayigirizwa be n'agamba nti: “Mmange ne baganda bange be bano. 
Matthew12:50 Buli akola Kitange ali mu ggulu by'ayagala, ye aba muganda wange, ye aba mwannyinaze, ye aba mmange.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ku lunaku olwo Yesu bwe yava mu nnyumba, n'alaga ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja, n'atuula." 
Matthew13:2 Abantu bangi nnyo ne bakuŋŋaanira w'ali. Kyeyava asaabala mu lyato, n'atuula mu lyo, ekibiina ky'abantu kyonna ne kiyimirira ku lubalama." 
Matthew13:3 N'ayogera nabo bingi mu ngero, n'agamba nti: “Omusizi yagenda okusiga ensigo." 
Matthew13:4 Bwe yali ng'asiga, ensigo ezimu ne zigwa ku mabbali g'ekkubo, ebinyonyi ne bijja ne bizirya." 
Matthew13:5 Endala ne zigwa ku ttaka ery'oku lwazi, amangwago ne zimera, kubanga ettaka lyabuguumirira mangu olw'obutaba ggwanvu. Omusana bwe gwayaka ennyo, ne ziwotookerera;" 
Matthew13:6 era olw'okuba ng'emirandira gyazo gyali tegisse nnyo wansi mu ttaka, ne zikala." 
Matthew13:7 Endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eryameramu amaggwa. Bwe gaakula, ne gazitta." 
Matthew13:8 N'endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eddungi, ne zimera, ne zikula, ne zibala ebirimba. Ebimu ne bibaamu ensigo kikumi; ebirala, ensigo nkaaga, n'ebirala, ensigo amakumi asatu." 
Matthew13:9 Alina amatu, awulire.”" 
Matthew13:10 Awo abayigirizwa ne bajja awali Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti: “Lwaki oyogera nabo mu ngero?”" 
Matthew13:11 N'abaddamu nti: “Mmwe muweereddwa okumanya ebyama ebifa ku Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, naye bo tebaweereddwa." 
Matthew13:12 Kubanga buli alina aliweebwa, n'aba na bingi nnyo. Ate buli atalina, aliggyibwako n'akatono k'ali nako." 
Matthew13:13 Kyenva njogera nabo mu ngero, kubanga batunula, naye tebalaba. Bawuliriza, naye tebawulira, era tebategeera." 
Matthew13:14 Era omulanzi Yisaaya kye yalanga, kituukirira ku bo, ekigamba nti: ‘Weewaawo muliwulira, naye temulitegeera. Weewaawo muliraba, naye temulyetegereza." 
Matthew13:15 Omutima gw'abantu bano gugubye, n'amatu gaabwe gazibikidde, n'amaaso gaabwe bagazibirizza. Sikulwa nga balaba n'amaaso, nga bategeera n'omutima, era nga bakyuka ne mbawonya.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Naye mmwe muli ba mukisa, kubanga amaaso gammwe galaba, n'amatu gammwe gawulira." 
Matthew13:17 Mazima mbagamba nti abalanzi bangi n'abantu abalungi beegomba okulaba bye mulaba ne batabiraba, n'okuwulira bye muwulira, ne batabiwulira." 
Matthew13:18 “Kale nno mmwe muwulire amakulu g'olugero lw'omusizi. 
Matthew13:19 Abo abawulira ekigambo ekifa ku Bwakabaka ne batakitegeera, ze nsigo ezaagwa ku mabbali g'ekkubo. Omubi ajja n'anyaga ekisigiddwa mu mitima gyabwe." 
Matthew13:20 Ensigo ezaagwa ku ttaka ery'oku lwazi, be bantu abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda, ne bakyaniriza n'essanyu." 
Matthew13:21 Naye olw'okuba bafaanana ng'ebimera ebitalina mirandira gisse nnyo wansi mu ttaka, balwawo akaseera katono. Okubonyaabonyezebwa oba okuyigganyizibwa olw'ekigambo kya Katonda bwe kujja, amangwago nga baterebuka." 
Matthew13:22 Ensigo ezaagwa mu ttaka eryameramu amaggwa, be bantu abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda, naye okweraliikirira ebintu eby'ensi, n'okulimbibwalimbibwa ebyobugagga, biziyiza ekigambo okubayamba okukola ebikolwa ebirungi." 
Matthew13:23 Ate ezo ezaagwa mu ttaka eddungi, be bantu abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda ne bakitegeera, ne bakola ebikolwa ebirungi: mu bamu ne byeyongera emirundi kikumi, mu balala emirundi nkaaga, ate mu balala, emirundi amakumi asatu.”" 
Matthew13:24 Yesu n'abaleetera olugero olulala, n'agamba nti: “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanaanyirizibwa n'omuntu eyasiga ensigo ennungi mu nnimiro ye." 
Matthew13:25 Kyokka abantu bwe baali nga beebase, omulabe we n'ajja, n'asiga mu ŋŋaano omuddo ogufaanana nga yo, n'agenda." 
Matthew13:26 Ebimera bwe byakula, ne bibala ebirimba, olwo omuddo ogufaanana ng'eŋŋaano ne gulabika." 
Matthew13:27 Abaddu ba nnannyini nnimiro ne bajja ne bamugamba nti: ‘Ssebo, ensigo ennungi si gye wasiga mu nnimiro yo? Kale omuddo ogufaanana ng'eŋŋaano gwava wa?’" 
Matthew13:28 N'abaddamu nti: ‘Omulabe ye yakola ekyo.’ Abaddu ne bamugamba nti: ‘Oyagala tugende tugukoolemu?’ 
Matthew13:29 N'agamba nti: ‘Nedda, kubanga bwe munaaba mukoolamu omuddo ogufaanana ng'eŋŋaano, muyinza okukuuliramu n'eŋŋaano yennyini." 
Matthew13:30 Muleke byombi bikulire wamu okutuuka amakungula. Mu kiseera eky'amakungula, ndigamba abakunguzi nti: Musooke mukuŋŋaanye omuddo, mugusibe ebinywa gwokebwe, naye eŋŋaano mugikuŋŋaanyize mu ggwanika lyange.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Yesu n'abaleetera n'olugero olulala, n'agamba nti: “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanaanyirizibwa n'akasigo ka kaladaali, omuntu ke yatwala n'akasiga mu nnimiro ye." 
Matthew13:32 Kano ke kasigo akasingira ddala obutono mu nsigo zonna. Naye bwe kamera ne kakula, kaba kanene okusinga ebimera eby'enva ebirala byonna. Ne kavaamu omuti, ebinyonyi ne bijja, ne bizimba ebisu mu matabi gaagwo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Yesu n'abaleetera olugero olulala nti: “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanaanyirizibwa n'ekizimbulukusa, omukazi kye yaddira n'akitabula mu bibbo bisatu eby'obutta, bwonna ne buzimbulukuka.”" 
Matthew13:34 Yesu ebyo byonna abantu yabibabuulira mu ngero. Teyayogeranga nabo nga takozesezza ngero. 
Matthew13:35 Yakolanga ekyo okutuukiriza omulanzi kye yayogera, ekigamba nti: “Ndyogera mu ngero; ndyatula ebyakwekebwa okuva ku kutondebwa kw'ensi.”" 
Matthew13:36 Awo Yesu n'asiibula ekibiina ky'abantu, n'ayingira mu nnyumba. Abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali, ne bagamba nti: “Tutegeeze amakulu g'olugero lw'omuddo ogufaanana ng'eŋŋaano ogwali mu nnimiro.”" 
Matthew13:37 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Asiga ensigo ennungi, ye Mwana w'Omuntu." 
Matthew13:38 Ennimiro, ye nsi. Ensigo ennungi, be bantu ab'omu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda. Omuddo ogufaanana ng'eŋŋaano, be bantu ab'Omubi." 
Matthew13:39 Ate omulabe eyagusiga, ye Sitaani. Amakungula, ye nkomerero y'ensi. Abakunguzi, be bamalayika." 
Matthew13:40 Kale nno ng'omuddo ogufaanana ng'eŋŋaano bwe gukuŋŋaanyizibwa ne gwokebwa mu nnimiro, bwe kityo bwe kiriba ku nkomerero y'ensi." 
Matthew13:41 Omwana w'Omuntu alituma bamalayika be, ne baggya mu Bwakabaka bwe abo bonna abasuula abantu mu kibi, n'abamenyi b'amateeka," 
Matthew13:42 ne babasuula mu kabiga ak'omuliro, omuliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji." 
Matthew13:43 Olwo abantu abalungi balyakaayakana ng'enjuba mu Bwakabaka bwa Kitange. ‘Alina amatu, awulire.’" 
Matthew13:44 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanaanyirizibwa n'ekyobugagga ekyakwekebwa mu nnimiro. Omuntu bw'akizuula, n'akikweka, era olw'essanyu erimukutte, n'agenda n'atunda ebibye byonna by'alina, n'agula ennimiro eyo." 
Matthew13:45 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu era bufaanaanyirizibwa n'omuntu omusuubuzi, anoonya amayinja ag'omuwendo." 
Matthew13:46 Bw'azuula ejjinja erimu ery'omuwendo ennyo, n'agenda n'atunda ebibye byonna by'alina, n'aligula." 
Matthew13:47 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu era bufaanaanyirizibwa n'akatimba akategebwa mu nnyanja ne kakuŋŋaanya ebyennyanja ebya buli ngeri. 
Matthew13:48 Bwe kajjula, ne bakasika okukatuusa ku lubalama. Ne batuula, ne balondamu ebirungi, ne babiteeka mu bisero, ebibi ne babisuula." 
Matthew13:49 Bwe kityo bwe kiriba ku nkomerero y'ensi. Bamalayika balijja ne baawula abantu ababi mu balungi," 
Matthew13:50 ne babasuula mu kabiga ak'omuliro, omuliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji." 
Matthew13:51 “Ebyo byonna mubitegedde?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Weewaawo.” 
Matthew13:52 N'abagamba nti: “Kale nno buli munnyonnyozi w'amateeka afuuse omuyigirizwa mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, afaanaanyirizibwa n'omuntu alina ennyumba ye: aggya mu kisenge mw'atereka, ebintu ebiggya n'ebikadde.”" 
Matthew13:53 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamaliriza engero ezo, n'ava mu kifo ekyo," 
Matthew13:54 n'ajja mu nsi y'ewaabwe n'abayigiriza mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyabwe. Ne bawuniikirira, ne bagamba nti: “Ono amagezi gano yagaggya wa, n'eby'amaanyi by'akola?" 
Matthew13:55 Ono si ye mwana w'omubazzi? Nnyina si ye ayitibwa Mariya? Ne baganda be si Yakobo ne Yosefu, ne Simooni ne Yuda?" 
Matthew13:56 Ne bannyina bonna tebabeera kwaffe? Kale ebyo byonna abiggya wa?” 
Matthew13:57 Awo ne bamukwatirwa obuggya. Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Omulanzi assibwamu ekitiibwa wonna wonna, okuggyako mu kitundu ky'ewaabwe, ne mu nnyumba y'ewaabwe.”" 
Matthew13:58 Era teyakolerayo byamagero bingi, kubanga tebaalina kukkiriza." 
Matthew14:1 Mu kiseera ekyo, Herode omufuzi n'awulira ettutumu lya Yesu." 
Matthew14:2 N'agamba basajja be nti: “Ono ye Yowanne Omubatiza azuukidde, kyava aba n'obuyinza okukola ebyamagero.”" 
Matthew14:3 Herode yali akutte Yowanne n'amusiba, n'amuteeka mu kkomera, ng'agenderedde okusanyusa Herodiya, muka Filipo, muganda wa Herode." 
Matthew14:4 Kubanga Yowanne yagambanga Herode nti: “Tokkirizibwa kumusigula n'omufuula owuwo.” 
Matthew14:5 Herode n'ayagala okutta Yowanne, kyokka n'atya abantu, kubanga baali bamanyi nti Yowanne mulanzi." 
Matthew14:6 Ku lunaku lw'amazaalibwa ga Herode, muwala wa Herodiya n'azina mu maaso ga bonna. Herode n'asanyuka" 
Matthew14:7 N'alayira n'okulayira, n'amusuubiza okumuwa kyonna kyonna ky'anaamusaba." 
Matthew14:8 Omuwala n'akolera ku magezi nnyina ge yamuwa, n'agamba nti: “Mpa omutwe gwa Yowanne Omubatiza nga guteekeddwa wano ku ssowaani.”" 
Matthew14:9 Kabaka n'anakuwala nnyo, kyokka olw'okubanga yali alayidde, ate nga n'abagenyi be bawulidde, n'alagira gumuweebwe." 
Matthew14:10 N'atuma mu kkomera ne batemako Yowanne omutwe. 
Matthew14:11 Ne baguleetera ku ssowaani, ne baguwa omuwala, ye n'agutwalira nnyina." 
Matthew14:12 Abayigirizwa ba Yowanne ne bajja, ne batwala omulambo gwe, ne baguziika. Ne bagenda ne babuulira Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Awo Yesu bwe yawulira ebyo, n'ava mu kifo ekyo, n'asaabala mu lyato, n'alaga mu kifo eky'eddungu, asobole okuba yekka. Abantu bangi bwe baamanya, ne bava mu bibuga ne bamugoberera, nga bayita ku lukalu." 
Matthew14:14 Yesu bwe yava mu lyato, n'alaba abantu bangi abakuŋŋaanye, n'abakwatirwa ekisa, n'awonya abalwadde baabwe." 
Matthew14:15 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali, ne bamugamba nti: “Ekifo kino kya ddungu, ate n'obudde buwungedde. Abantu basiibule, bagende beegulire emmere mu bubuga.”" 
Matthew14:16 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Tewali kibeetaagisa kugenda, mmwe muba mubawa emmere balye.”" 
Matthew14:17 Ne bamugamba nti: “Tetulina kantu wano, okuggyako emigaati etaano, n'ebyennyanja bibiri.”" 
Matthew14:18 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Mubindeetere wano.” 
Matthew14:19 N'alagira abantu okutuula ku muddo, n'atoola emigaati etaano, n'ebyennyanja ebibiri, n'ayimusa amaaso eri eggulu, ne yeebaza Katonda. N'amenyaamenya mu migaati, n'agiwa abayigirizwa be, abayigirizwa ne bagigabira abantu." 
Matthew14:20 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. Abayigirizwa ne bakuŋŋaanya obutundutundu obwalemerawo, ne bujjuza ebibbo kkumi na bibiri." 
Matthew14:21 Abo abaalya, baali abasajja ng'enkumi ttaano, awatali kubala bakazi na baana." 
Matthew14:22 Amangwago Yesu n'alagira abayigirizwa be basaabale mu lyato bamukulembere, bagende emitala w'ennyanja, nga ye akyasiibula abantu." 
Matthew14:23 Bwe yamala okusiibula abantu, n'ayambuka ku lusozi yekka okusinza Katonda. Obudde ne buwungeera nga Yesu ali eyo yekka." 
Matthew14:24 Abayigirizwa baali mu lyato ku nnyanja, eryato nga lisundibwa amayengo, kubanga omuyaga gwali gubafuluma mu maaso." 
Matthew14:25 Obudde bwali bunaatera okukya, Yesu n'ajja gye bali ng'atambula ku mazzi." 
Matthew14:26 Bwe baamulaba ng'atambula ku mazzi, ne bakwatibwa ensisi, ne bagamba nti: “Omuzimu!” Ne baleekaana olw'okutya." 
Matthew14:27 Amangwago Yesu n'ayogera nabo, n'agamba nti: “Mugume omwoyo, ye Nze, temutya!”" 
Matthew14:28 Awo Peetero n'amuddamu nti: “Mukama wange, oba nga ggwe wuuyo, ndagira nzije gy'oli nga ntambula ku mazzi.”" 
Matthew14:29 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Jjangu.” Peetero n'ava mu lyato, n'atambula ku mazzi okugenda eri Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Kyokka bwe yalaba omuyaga, n'atya. N'atandika okukka mu mazzi, n'aleekaana nti: “Mukama wange, mponya!”" 
Matthew14:31 Amangwago Yesu n'agolola omukono, n'amukwata, n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe alina okukkiriza okutono! Lwaki obuusizzabuusizza?”" 
Matthew14:32 Bombi bwe baasaabala mu lyato, omuyaga ne guggwaawo." 
Matthew14:33 Abaali mu lyato ne basinza Yesu nga bwe bagamba nti: “Ddala, oli Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Matthew14:34 Bwe baava ku nnyanja, ne batuuka mu kitundu eky'e Gennesareeti." 
Matthew14:35 Abantu baayo Yesu bwe baamutegeera, ne batuma mu kitundu ekyo kyonna, ne bamuleetera abalwadde bonna," 
Matthew14:36 ne bamwegayirira akkirize waakiri bakwate ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye. Era bonna abaakwatako, ne bawona." 
Matthew15:1 Awo Abafarisaayo n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka ne bava e Yerusaalemu, ne bajja awali Yesu, ne bagamba nti:" 
Matthew15:2 “Lwaki abayigirizwa bo tebafa ku bulombolombo bwa bajjajjaffe? Bwe baba bagenda okulya emmere, tebanaaba mu ngalo, ng'obulombolombo bwe bulagira?”" 
Matthew15:3 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Lwaki nammwe temufa ku kiragiro kya Katonda olw'obulombolombo bwammwe? 
Matthew15:4 Kubanga Katonda yagamba nti: ‘Kitaawo ne nnyoko obassangamu ekitiibwa,’ era nti: ‘Anaavumanga kitaawe oba nnyina, ateekwa kuttibwa.’" 
Matthew15:5 Naye mmwe mugamba nti: ‘Buli ategeeza kitaawe oba nnyina nti kye nandikuwadde okukuyamba, kiweereddwayo eri Katonda,’" 
Matthew15:6 aba takyawalirizibwa kuyamba kitaawe. Bwe mutyo mwadibya ekiragiro kya Katonda olw'obulombolombo bwammwe. 
Matthew15:7 Bakuusa mmwe, Yisaaya omulanzi bye yaboogerako bituufu, bwe yagamba nti:" 
Matthew15:8 ‘Abantu bano banzisaamu ekitiibwa mu bigambo bugambo, naye emitima gyabwe, tegindiiko." 
Matthew15:9 N'engeri gye bansinzaamu si ntuufu, kubanga ebigambo by'abantu obuntu bye bayigiriza ng'amateeka ga Katonda.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Awo Yesu n'ayita ekibiina ky'abantu, ne bajja w'ali, n'abagamba nti: “Muwulirize era mwetegereze:" 
Matthew15:11 ebyo omuntu by'alya si bye byonoona empisa ze, wabula ebyo by'ayogera bye bizoonoona.”" 
Matthew15:12 Awo abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali, ne bamugamba nti: “Omanyi ng'Abafarisaayo banyiize bwe bawulidde ekigambo ekyo?”" 
Matthew15:13 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Buli kimera ekitaasimbibwa Kitange ow'omu ggulu, kirisimbulwa." 
Matthew15:14 Mubaleke abo bakulembeze bamuzibe. Muzibe bw'akulembera muzibe munne, bombi bagwa mu bunnya.”" 
Matthew15:15 Awo Peetero n'amuddamu nti: “Tutegeeze amakulu g'olugero olwo.” 
Matthew15:16 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Nammwe temutegedde? 
Matthew15:17 Temulaba nti buli kintu ekiriibwa kigenda mu lubuto, mwe kiva ne kifuluma?" 
Matthew15:18 Naye ebyogerwa biva mu mutima, era ebyo bye byonoona empisa z'omuntu." 
Matthew15:19 Kubanga mu mutima mwe muva ebirowoozo ebibi, obutemu, obwenzi, obukaba, obubbi, okuwaayiriza, okwogera obubi ku balala." 
Matthew15:20 Bino bye byonoona empisa z'omuntu. Naye omuntu okulya nga tanaabye mu ngalo ng'obulombolombo bwe bulagira, tekizoonoona.”" 
Matthew15:21 Yesu bwe yava mu kifo ekyo, n'alaga mu kitundu ky'e Tiiro ne Sidoni." 
Matthew15:22 Omukazi Omukanaani, munnansi w'ekitundu ekyo, n'ajja gy'ali, n'aleekaana ng'agamba nti: “Nkwatirwa ekisa, Ssebo, Omuzzukulu wa Dawudi! Muwala wange aliko omwoyo omubi, gumubonyaabonya!”" 
Matthew15:23 Kyokka Yesu n'atamuddamu kigambo. Abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali ne bamwegayirira nti: “Mugobe, kubanga ajja atuleekaanira!”" 
Matthew15:24 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Saatumibwa walala okuggyako eri abantu ba Yisirayeli abaabula.” 
Matthew15:25 Awo omukazi n'ajja n'asinza Yesu nga bw'agamba nti: “Ssebo, nnyamba!”" 
Matthew15:26 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Si kirungi okuddira emmere y'abaana n'esuulirwa obubwa.” 
Matthew15:27 Omukazi n'agamba nti: “Weewaawo Ssebo, naye n'obubwa, bulya ku bukunkumuka obuva ku mmeeza ya bakama baabwo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Mukazi wattu, olina okukkiriza kunene! Kikukolerwe nga bw'oyagala.” Muwala we n'awona mu kiseera ekyo." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu bwe yava mu kifo ekyo, n'ajja ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja y'e Galilaaya, n'ayambuka ku lusozi n'atuula." 
Matthew15:30 Abantu bangi nnyo ne bajja w'ali nga baleese abalema, bamuzibe, abakonzibye, ne bakasiru, n'abalwadde abalala bangi. Ne babassa kumpi n'ebigere bye, n'abawonya." 
Matthew15:31 Abantu ne bawuniikirira nga balaba ababadde bakasiru boogera, ababadde bakonzibye balamu, ababadde abalema batambula, ababadde bamuzibe balaba. Ne bagulumiza Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Matthew15:32 Awo Yesu n'ayita abayigirizwa be, ne bajja w'ali, n'abagamba nti: “Abantu bano mbakwatirwa ekisa, kubanga babadde nange ennaku ssatu nnamba, ate tebakyalina kye balya. Saagala kubasiibula ng'enjala ebaluma, sikulwa nga bazirikira mu kkubo.”" 
Matthew15:33 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti: “Mu ddungu tunaggya wa emmere emala okukkusa abantu abangi bwe batyo?” 
Matthew15:34 Yesu n'ababuuza nti: “Mulinawo emigaati emeka?” Ne baddamu nti: “Musanvu, n'obwennyanja mpa we buzira.”" 
Matthew15:35 Awo n'alagira abantu batuule wansi. 
Matthew15:36 N'atoola emigaati omusanvu n'ebyennyanja, ne yeebaza Katonda, n'abimenyaamenyamu, n'abikwasa abayigirizwa be, abayigirizwa ne babigabira abantu." 
Matthew15:37 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. Abayigirizwa ne bakuŋŋaanya obutundutundu obwalemerawo, ne bujjuza ebibbo musanvu." 
Matthew15:38 Abo abaalya, baali abasajja enkumi nnya, awatali kubala bakazi na baana." 
Matthew15:39 Awo Yesu n'asiibula abantu, n'asaabala mu lyato, n'alaga mu kitundu ky'e Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Awo Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo ne bajja eri Yesu okumukema. Ne bamusaba abawe akabonero akabalaga nti obuyinza bwe bwava wa Katonda. 
Matthew16:2 Kyokka Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Obudde bwe buba buwungeera, mugamba nti: ‘Bunaaba bulungi, kubanga eggulu limyuse.’" 
Matthew16:3 Ku makya, mugamba nti: ‘Olwaleero wanaabaayo omuyaga, kubanga eggulu limyuse, era lizimbagadde.’ Mumanyi okuvvuunula amakulu g'endabika y'eggulu, naye temusobola kutegeera bye mulaba mu kiseera kino!" 
Matthew16:4 Abantu ab'omulembe guno ababi, era abaava ku Katonda, basaba akabonero, naye tebaliweebwa kabonero kalala, wabula akabonero ka Yona.” Awo n'abavaako n'agenda." 
Matthew16:5 Abayigirizwa bwe baatuuka emitala w'ennyanja, ne bajjukira nti tebaaleese migaati." 
Matthew16:6 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mulabuke, mwekuume ekizimbulukusa ky'Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo.”" 
Matthew16:7 Bo ne bagambagana nti: “Tetuleese migaati.” 
Matthew16:8 Yesu bwe yamanya kye bagamba, n'ababuuza nti: “Mmwe abalina okukkiriza okutono, lwaki mugambagana nti temulina migaati?" 
Matthew16:9 Temunnaba kutegeera, era temujjukira emigaati etaano, egyakkusa abantu enkumi ettaano, n'ebibbo bye mwakuŋŋaanya?" 
Matthew16:10 Ate emigaati omusanvu egyakkusa abantu enkumi ennya? 
Matthew16:11 Kale lwaki temutegedde nti soogedde ku migaati, bwe mbagambye nti: Mwekuume ekizimbulukusa ky'Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo!”" 
Matthew16:12 Olwo ne bategeera nti tagambye kwekuuma kizimbulukusa kya migaati, wabula kwekuuma Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo bye bayigiriza." 
Matthew16:13 Awo Yesu n'atuuka mu kitundu ekiyitibwa Kayisaariya ekya Filipo, n'abuuza abayigirizwa be nti: “Abantu bwe baba boogera ku Mwana w'Omuntu, bamuyita ani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Ne baddamu nti: “Abamu bamuyita Yowanne Omubatiza, abalala bagamba nti: ye Eliya, ate abalala nti: Yeremiya, oba omu ku balanzi.”" 
Matthew16:15 Awo ye n'ababuuza nti: “Naye mmwe mumpita ani?” 
Matthew16:16 Simooni Peetero n'amuddamu nti: “Ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda Nnannyinibulamu.”" 
Matthew16:17 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Simooni, omwana wa Yona, oli wa mukisa! Kubanga omuntu si ye yakumanyisa ekyo, wabula Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew16:18 Nange nkugamba nti: ggwe oli Peetero (ekitegeeza nti Lwazi), era ku lwazi luno, kwe ndizimbira ekibiina kyange eky'abakkiriza; n'amaanyi ag'emagombe tegalikisobola." 
Matthew16:19 Ndikuwa ebisumuluzo by'Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu: kyonna kyonna ky'olisiba ku nsi, kirisibibwa mu ggulu; kyonna kyonna ky'olisumulula ku nsi, kirisumululwa mu ggulu.”" 
Matthew16:20 Awo n'akuutira abayigirizwa obutabuulirako muntu nti Ye, ye Kristo." 
Matthew16:21 Okuva olwo, Yesu n'atandika okutegeeza abayigirizwa be nti ateekwa okugenda e Yerusaalemu, n'okubonyaabonyezebwa ennyo abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne bakabona abakulu, n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka, n'okuttibwa, era n'okuzuukira ku lunaku olwokusatu." 
Matthew16:22 Awo Peetero n'azza Yesu ku bbali n'amunenya, n'agamba nti: “Nedda, Mukama wange, ekyo tekirikutuukako n'akatono!”" 
Matthew16:23 Yesu n'akyuka n'atunula emabega, n'agamba Peetero nti: “Nva mu maaso, Sitaani! Oli nkonge mu kkubo lyange, kubanga ebya Katonda si by'ofaako, wabula ofa ku bya bantu!”" 
Matthew16:24 Awo Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Buli muntu ayagala okuba omugoberezi wange, ateekwa okwefeebya, ne yeetikka omusaalaba gwe, n'angoberera." 
Matthew16:25 Kubanga buli eyeemalira ku bulamu bwe, alibufiirwa, naye buli alifiirwa obulamu bwe ku lwange, alibuddizibwa." 
Matthew16:26 Kale omuntu kimugasa ki okufuna obugagga bwonna obw'oku nsi, ate n'afiirwa obulamu bwe? Tewali kintu na kimu muntu ky'ayinza kuwaayo okuzzaawo obulamu bwe." 
Matthew16:27 Omwana w'Omuntu agenda kujjira mu kitiibwa kya Kitaawe, ng'ali ne bamalayika be, awe buli muntu empeera ye, ng'asinziira ku ebyo buli muntu bye yakola." 
Matthew16:28 Mazima mbagamba nti abamu ku bantu abali wano, balifa bamaze okulaba Omwana w'Omuntu ng'ajja mu Bwakabaka bwe.”" 
Matthew17:1 Ennaku mukaaga bwe zaayitawo, Yesu n'atwala Peetero, n'abooluganda Yakobo ne Yowanne bokka, n'abakulembera, ne balinnya olusozi oluwanvu." 
Matthew17:2 Awo endabika ye n'efuuka nga balaba. Amaaso ge ne gaakaayakana ng'enjuba, ebyambalo bye ne bitukula ng'omuzira." 
Matthew17:3 Musa ne Eliya ne balabika nga boogera naye. 
Matthew17:4 Peetero n'agamba nti: “Mukama waffe, kirungi okuba nga tuli wano. Bw'oyagala, nnaazimba wano ensiisira ssatu: emu yiyo, eyookubiri ya Musa, n'eyookusatu ya Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Bwe yali ng'akyayogera, ekire ekitangalijja ne kijja, ne kibabikka n'ekisiikirize kyakyo. Eddoboozi ne lyogerera mu kire ekyo, ne ligamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa, era gwe nsiimira ddala, mumuwulirize.”" 
Matthew17:6 Abayigirizwa bwe baawulira, ne batya nnyo, ne bagwa wansi nga beevuunise." 
Matthew17:7 Awo Yesu n'ajja we bali, n'abakwatako, n'agamba nti: “Muyimuke, muleke kutya!”" 
Matthew17:8 Bwe baayimusa amaaso, ne batalaba muntu mulala, wabula Yesu yekka." 
Matthew17:9 Awo bwe baali baserengeta okuva ku lusozi, Yesu n'abakuutira nti: “Kye mulabye temukibuulirako muntu mulala, okutuusa Omwana w'Omuntu lw'alimala okuzuukira.”" 
Matthew17:10 Abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza nti: “Lwaki abannyonnyozi b'amateeka bagamba nti Eliya y'ateekwa okusooka okujja?” 
Matthew17:11 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Kituufu, Eliya y'ateekwa okusooka okujja, era alitereeza byonna." 
Matthew17:12 Naye mbagamba nti Eliya yajja dda, abantu ne batamutegeera, era ne bamukolako byonna bye baayagala. Bw'atyo n'Omwana w'Omuntu balimubonyaabonya.”" 
Matthew17:13 Olwo abayigirizwa ne bategeera nti yali ayogera ku Yowanne Omubatiza. 
Matthew17:14 Bwe baatuuka awali ekibiina ky'abantu, omuntu omu n'ajja eri Yesu n'amufukaamirira," 
Matthew17:15 nga bw'agamba nti: “Ssebo, kwatirwa mutabani wange ekisa, kubanga mulwadde wa nsimbu, ali bubi nnyo. Emirundi mingi agwa mu muliro, era emirundi mingi agwa mu mazzi." 
Matthew17:16 Namuleetedde abayigirizwa bo, ne batayinza kumuwonya.”" 
Matthew17:17 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Bantu mmwe, ab'omulembe guno ogutalina kukkiriza, era omubi, ndimala nammwe kiseera kyenkana wa nga mbagumiikiriza? Omulenzi mumundeetere wano.”" 
Matthew17:18 Awo Yesu n'aboggolera omwoyo omubi, ne guva ku mulenzi, n'awona mu kaseera ako." 
Matthew17:19 Abayigirizwa ne bajja eri Yesu mu kyama, ne bamubuuza nti: “Lwaki ffe tetwasobodde kugumugobako?”" 
Matthew17:20 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Kubanga temulina kukkiriza kumala. Mazima mbagamba nti: singa muba n'okukkiriza wadde okutono ng'akasigo ka kaladaali, muyinza okugamba olusozi luno nti: ‘Va wano, genda wali,’ ne lugenda, era tewali kiribalema. [" 
Matthew17:21 Naye omwoyo omubi ogw'engeri eno, tegugobeka ku muntu awatali kusaba Katonda era n'okusiba.”]" 
Matthew17:22 Abayigirizwa bwe baakuŋŋaanira mu Galilaaya, Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu ajja kuweebwayo mu bantu," 
Matthew17:23 era bajja kumutta. Kyokka ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukira.” Abayigirizwa ne banakuwala nnyo. 
Matthew17:24 Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe batuuka e Kafarunawumu, abasolooza omusolo ogw'Essinzizo ne bajja eri Peetero, ne bamubuuza nti: “Mukama wammwe tawa musolo gwa Ssinzizo?”" 
Matthew17:25 N'addamu nti: “Awa.” Peetero bwe yayingira mu nnyumba, Yesu n'amwesooka, n'agamba nti: “Olowooza otya, Simooni? Bakabaka b'ensi, empooza oba omusolo babiggya ku bantu ki? Ku baana baabwe, oba ku bantu balala?”" 
Matthew17:26 Peetero n'addamu nti: “Ku balala.” Yesu n'amugamba nti: “N'olwekyo abaana tebateekwa kuwa. 
Matthew17:27 Naye obutabeesittaza, genda osuule eddobo mu nnyanja, ekyennyanja ky'onoosooka okukwasa, bw'onooyasamya akamwa kaakyo, onoosangamu ssente, ogitwale ogibawe, esasulire nze naawe.”" 
Matthew18:1 Mu kaseera ako, abayigirizwa ne bajja eri Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti: “Kale ani asinga okuba oweekitiibwa mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu?”" 
Matthew18:2 Awo Yesu n'ayita omwana omuto, n'amuyimiriza mu makkati gaabwe," 
Matthew18:3 n'agamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti: bwe mutakyuka ne muba ng'abaana abato, temuliyingira Bwakabaka bwa mu ggulu." 
Matthew18:4 Kale nno buli eyeetoowaza ng'omwana ono omuto, ye asinga okuba oweekitiibwa mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu." 
Matthew18:5 Era buli ayaniriza omwana ng'ono ku lwange, aba ayanirizza nze." 
Matthew18:6 “Buli alikozesa ekibi omu ku bato bano abanzikiriza, asaanye okusibibwa ejjinja mu bulago, asuulibwe mu nnyanja ebuziba." 
Matthew18:7 Ensi ya kubonaabona olw'ebyo ebisuula abantu mu kibi. Bino tebirema kubaawo, kyokka omuntu abireeta, wa kubonaabona!" 
Matthew18:8 “Singa omukono gwo oba okugulu kwo kukukozesa ekibi, kutemeko. Kirungi ofune obulamu, ng'oli wa mukono gumu oba wa kugulu kumu, okusinga lw'osigaza emikono gyombi oba amagulu gombi, naye n'osuulibwa mu muliro ogutazikira." 
Matthew18:9 Era singa eriiso lyo likukozesa ekibi, liggyeemu olisuule. Kirungi okufuna obulamu, ng'oli wa liiso limu, okusinga lw'osigaza amaaso gombi, naye n'osuulibwa mu kifo eky'okuzikirira, omuli omuliro ogutazikira." 
Matthew18:10 “Mwekkaanye: temunyoomanga n'omu ku bato bano, kubanga mbagamba nti mu ggulu bamalayika baabwe, baba bulijjo mu maaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu. [" 
Matthew18:11 Omwana w'Omuntu yaija okulokola abaabula.] 
Matthew18:12 “Mulowooza mutya? Omuntu bw'aba n'endiga ze ekikumi, emu ku zo n'ebula, taleka ekyenda mu omwenda ku nsozi, n'agenda anoonya eyo ebuze?" 
Matthew18:13 Mazima mbagamba nti: ng'agizudde, asanyuka nnyo olw'eyo emu, okusinga olwa ziri ekyenda mu omwenda ezitaabuze." 
Matthew18:14 Bwe kityo, Kitammwe ali mu ggulu tayagala wadde omu ku bato bano azikirire." 
Matthew18:15 “Muganda wo bw'akola ebikulumya, genda gy'ali omubuulire nga muli mwekka, ggwe naye. Singa akuwulira, olwo ng'okomezzaawo muganda wo oyo." 
Matthew18:16 Kyokka bw'atakuwulira, ddayo gy'ali ne munno omu oba babiri, olwo buli kigambo kiryoke kikakasibwe nga waliwo abajulirwa babiri oba basatu." 
Matthew18:17 Kyokka bw'agaana okubawulira, olwo tegeeza ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo. Singa agaana okuwulira ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, omuyisanga ng'atalina kukkiriza, era ng'omusolooza w'omusolo." 
Matthew18:18 “Mazima mbagamba nti: kyonna kye mulisiba ku nsi, kirisibibwa mu ggulu. Era kyonna kye mulisumulula ku nsi, kirisumululwa mu ggulu." 
Matthew18:19 “Era mbagamba nti: ababiri ku mmwe bwe baneetabanga ku nsi, ne babaako kye basaba Kitange ali mu ggulu, alikibakolera," 
Matthew18:20 kubanga ababiri oba abasatu we baba nga bakuŋŋaanye ku lwange, nange mbaawo wamu nabo.”" 
Matthew18:21 Awo Peetero n'ajja awali Yesu, n'amubuuza nti: “Mukama wange, emirundi emeka muganda wange gy'anaakolanga ebinnumya ne mmusonyiwa? Emirundi musanvu?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Sikugamba nti emirundi musanvu, naye nti nsanvu emirundi musanvu." 
Matthew18:23 Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu kyebuva bufaanaanyirizibwa ne kabaka, eyayagala okuwozesa abaddu be ku bintu bye, bye baalina." 
Matthew18:24 Bwe yali ng'atandise okubawozesa, ne bamuleetera omu gw'abanja talanta omutwalo gumu." 
Matthew18:25 Kyokka teyalina nsimbi z'anaasasuza bbanja. N'olwekyo mukama we n'alagira okumutunda, ne mukazi we, n'abaana be, n'e bintu bye byonna, ebbanja lisasulwe." 
Matthew18:26 Awo omuddu n'afukamira, n'amwegayirira ng'agamba nti: ‘Ŋŋumiikiriza, ndikusasula byonna.’" 
Matthew18:27 Mukama w'omuddu oyo n'amukwatirwa ekisa, n'amusonyiwa ebbanja, n'amuta."
