Matthew18:28 “Kyokka omuddu oyo bwe yafuluma, n'asanga muddu munne gw'abanja denaari kikumi. N'amugwamu bulago nga bw'agamba nti: ‘Sasula ebbanja lyange!’" 
Matthew18:29 Awo muddu munne n'agwa wansi, n'amwegayirira ng'agamba nti: ‘Ŋŋumiikiriza, ndikusasula.’" 
Matthew18:30 Ye n'atakkiriza, wabula n'agenda n'amuggalira mu kkomera, okutuusa lw'alimala okumusasula ebbanja." 
Matthew18:31 “Baddu banne bwe baalaba ebikoleddwa, ne banakuwala nnyo, ne bagenda ne babuulira mukama waabwe byonna ebibaddewo." 
Matthew18:32 Awo mukama we n'amuyita, n'amugamba nti: ‘Muddu ggwe omubi, nakusonyiye ebbanja lyonna kubanga wanneegayiridde." 
Matthew18:33 Kale naawe obadde togwanira kukwatirwa muddu munno kisa, nga nze bwe nakukwatiddwa ekisa?’" 
Matthew18:34 Mukama we n'asunguwala, n'amukwasa abaserikale bamubonyeebonye, okutuusa lw'alimala okusasula ebbanja lyonna.”" 
Matthew18:35 Bw'atyo ne Kitange ali mu ggulu bw'alibakola mmwe, singa buli muntu tasonyiwa muganda we, mu mutima gwe." 
Matthew19:1 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo, n'ava e Galilaaya, n'alaga mu kitundu ky'e Buyudaaya, emitala w'omugga Yorudaani." 
Matthew19:2 Abantu bangi nnyo ne bamugoberera, n'abawonyeza eyo." 
Matthew19:3 Abamu ku Bafarisaayo ne bagamba nti: “Omusajja akkirizibwa okugoba mukazi we, ng'amulanga buli nsonga yonna?”" 
Matthew19:4 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Temusomangako nti olubereberye Katonda yatonda omusajja n'omukazi," 
Matthew19:5 Katonda n'agamba nti: ‘N'olwekyo omusajja anaalekanga kitaawe ne nnyina n'abeera ne mukazi we, bombi ne baba omuntu omu?’" 
Matthew19:6 Olwo nga tebakyali babiri, wabula omuntu omu. Kale Katonda kye yagatta awamu, omuntu takyawukanyanga.”" 
Matthew19:7 Abafarisaayo ne bamubuuza nti: “Kale lwaki Musa yalagira nti omusajja awe mukazi we ebbaluwa ekakasa bw'amugobye, olwo alyoke amweggyireko ddala?”" 
Matthew19:8 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Olw'obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyammwe, Musa kyeyava abakkiriza okugoba bakazi bammwe. Naye olubereberye, tekyali bwe kityo." 
Matthew19:9 Era mbagamba nti buli agoba mukazi we okuggyako ng'amugobye lwa bwenzi, ate n'awasa omukazi omulala, aba ayenze.”" 
Matthew19:10 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti: “Oba nga bwe biri bwe bityo wakati w'omusajja ne mukazi we, ekisinga butawasa.”" 
Matthew19:11 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Si bonna abasiima ekigambo ekyo, wabula abo Katonda b'akiwa." 
Matthew19:12 Kubanga waliwo abalaawe, abaazaalibwa bwe batyo, waliwo abalaawe, abalaayibwa abantu, era waliwo abalaawe abeeraawa bokka olw'Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu. Ayinza okukisiima akisiime.”" 
Matthew19:13 Awo ne baleeta abaana abato eri Yesu abakwateko era abasabire eri Katonda. Kyokka abayigirizwa ne babaziyiza nga bababoggolera. 
Matthew19:14 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Muleke abaana abato bajje gye ndi, temubaziyiza, kubanga abali nga bano, be baba mu Bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu.”" 
Matthew19:15 N'abakwatako, n'ava mu kifo ekyo." 
Matthew19:16 Awo omuntu omu n'ajja eri Yesu, n'amubuuza nti: “Muyigiriza, kirungi ki kye nteekwa okukola, okufuna obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Lwaki ombuuza ku kirungi? Omulungi ali Omu. Naye oba nga oyagala okuyingira mu bulamu, kwata ebiragiro bya Katonda.”" 
Matthew19:18 N'amubuuza nti: “Biruwa?” Yesu n'addamu nti: “Tottanga muntu, tobbanga, toyogeranga bya bulimba ku muntu." 
Matthew19:19 Kitaawo ne nnyoko obassangamu ekitiibwa. Era yagalanga muntu munno, nga bwe weeyagala ggwe wennyini.”" 
Matthew19:20 Omuvubuka n'agamba Yesu nti: “Ebyo byonna nabituukiriza. Kiki ekikyambulako okukola?” 
Matthew19:21 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Oba ng'oyagala okuba atuukiridde, genda otunde ebibyo byonna, ensimbi ezinaavaamu ozigabire abaavu, ojje oyitenga nange, olifuna obugagga mu ggulu.”" 
Matthew19:22 Omuvubuka ono bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo, n'agenda nga munakuwavu, kubanga yalina ebyobugagga bingi." 
Matthew19:23 Awo Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti: omugagga kirimubeerera kizibu okuyingira Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu. 
Matthew19:24 Era mbagamba nti: kyangu eŋŋamiya okuyita mu katuli k'empiso, okusinga omugagga okuyingira Obwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Matthew19:25 Abayigirizwa bwe baawulira, ne bawuniikirira nnyo, ne bagamba nti: “Kale olwo ani ayinza okulokolebwa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu n'abatunuulira n'agamba nti: “Kino abantu tebakiyinza, wabula Katonda ayinza byonna.”" 
Matthew19:27 Awo Peetero n'agamba Yesu nti: “Laba, ffe twaleka ebyaffe byonna tulyoke tuyitenga naawe. Kale tulifuna ki?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti: Omwana w'Omuntu bw'alituula ku ntebe ye eyeekitiibwa, nga byonna bizzibwa obuggya, nammwe abayita nange, mulituula ku ntebe ekkumi n'ebbiri, ne musalira omusango ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri ebya Yisirayeli." 
Matthew19:29 Era buli muntu eyaleka ennyumba oba baganda be, oba abaana, oba ebibanja ku lwange, alifuna ebisingawo obungi emirundi kikumi, n'aweebwa n'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Matthew19:30 Naye bangi ab'olubereberye, abaliba ab'oluvannyuma, era bangi ab'oluvannyuma, abaliba ab'olubereberye." 
Matthew20:1 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanaanyirizibwa n'omuntu nnannyini nnimiro y'emizabbibu, eyakeera ku makya ennyo okunoonya abakozi ab'okukola mu nnimiro ye ey'emizabbibu." 
Matthew20:2 “Bwe yamala okukkiriziganya nabo okubasasula denaari emu olunaku, n'abasindika okukola mu nnimiro ye ey'emizabbibu." 
Matthew20:3 Era n'afuluma ku ssaawa nga ssatu, n'alaba abalala nga bayimiridde awo mu katale, nga tebalina kye bakola." 
Matthew20:4 N'abagamba nti: ‘Nammwe mugende mu nnimiro yange ey'emizabbibu mukole, nnaabasasula ekibasaanira.’" 
Matthew20:5 Ne bagenda. N'afuluma nate ku ssaawa nga mukaaga, ne ku ssaawa nga mwenda, n'akola ekintu kye kimu." 
Matthew20:6 Era ne ku ssaawa nga kkumi n'emu n'afuluma, n'asanga abalala nga bayimiridde, n'ababuuza nti: ‘Lwaki muyimiridde wano olunaku lwonna nga temulina kye mukola?’" 
Matthew20:7 “Ne bamuddamu nti: ‘Kubanga tewali yatututte kumukolera.’ N'abagamba nti: ‘Nammwe mugende mukole mu nnimiro yange ey'emizabbibu.’ 
Matthew20:8 “Obudde bwe bwawungeera, nnannyini nnimiro y'emizabbibu n'agamba musajja we alabirira abakozi, nti: ‘Yita abakozi, obasasule empeera yaabwe, ng'otandikira ku baasembyeyo okujja okukola, osembyeyo abaasoose ku mulimu.’" 
Matthew20:9 “Abo abaatandika okukola ku ssaawa ekkumi n'emu bwe bajja, ne basasulwa denaari emu buli omu." 
Matthew20:10 Ababereberye ku mulimu bwe bajja okusasulwa, ne balowooza nti banaafuna kinene okusinga ku kya bali kye bafunye. Naye nabo ne bafuna denaari emu buli omu." 
Matthew20:11 “Bwe baazifuna, ne beemulugunyiza nnannyini nnimiro," 
Matthew20:12 nga bagamba nti: ‘Bano abazze oluvannyuma bakoledde essaawa emu yokka, naye n'obasasula kye kimu nga ffe abaakoze omulimu olunaku lwonna, nga n'essana litwokya?’" 
Matthew20:13 Kyokka ye n'addamu omu ku bo nti: ‘Munnange, sikulyazaamaanyizza. Tewalagaanye nange denaari emu?" 
Matthew20:14 Twala eyiyo, ogende. Njagadde okuwa ono eyazze oluvannyuma nga bwe mpadde ggwe." 
Matthew20:15 Sikkirizibwa kukozesa byange nga bwe njagala? Oba okwatiddwa obuggya kubanga ndi mulungi?’ 
Matthew20:16 “Bwe batyo ab'oluvannyuma, baliba ab'olubereberye, n'ab'olubereberye, baliba ab'oluvannyuma.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yesu bwe yali ng'ayambuka e Yerusaalemu, n'azza ku bbali abayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri, n'abagamba nti:" 
Matthew20:18 “Laba twambuka e Yerusaalemu, era eyo Omwana w'Omuntu ajja kuweebwayo mu bakabona abakulu, ne mu bannyonnyozi b'amateeka. Bajja kumusalira ogw'okufa," 
Matthew20:19 era bamuweeyo mu b'amawanga amalala okumusekerera, n'okumukubisa embooko eriko amalobo agasuna, n'okumukomerera ku musaalaba. Kyokka ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukira.”" 
Matthew20:20 Awo nnyina w'abatabani ba Zebedaayo n'ajja ne batabani be eri Yesu, n'amufukaamirira, n'abaako ky'amusaba." 
Matthew20:21 Yesu n'amubuuza nti: “Oyagala ki?” N'amuddamu nti: “Suubiza nti mu Bwakabaka bwo, batabani bange bano bombi, balituula nga bakuliraanye, omu ku ludda lwo olwa ddyo, ate omulala ku lwa kkono.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Kye musaba temukitegeera. Musobola okunywa ku kikopo eky'okubonaabona kye ŋŋenda okunywako?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Tusobola.” 
Matthew20:23 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Ddala ekikopo kyange eky'okubonaabona mulikinywako. Naye eky'okutuula nga munninaanye ku ludda olwa ddyo oba olwa kkono, si nze nkigaba, wabula kiweebwa abo be kyateekerwateekerwa Kitange.”" 
Matthew20:24 Abayigirizwa abalala ekkumi bwe baakiwulira, ne banyiigira abooluganda bombi." 
Matthew20:25 Awo Yesu n'abayita bonna wamu, ne bajja w'ali. N'abagamba nti “Mumanyi ng'abafuzi b'abantu ab'ensi baagala kuweerezebwa. Era ababa n'obuyinza, bafugisa bukambwe." 
Matthew20:26 Naye mu mmwe, si bwe kiteekwa okuba. Wabula mu mmwe, buli ayagala okuba omukulembeze, ateekwa okuba omuweereza wa banne." 
Matthew20:27 Era buli ayagala okuba ow'olubereberye mu mmwe, ateekwa okuba omuddu wa bonna," 
Matthew20:28 okufaanana ng'Omwana w'Omuntu, atajjirira kuweerezebwa, wabula okuweereza, era n'okuwaayo obulamu bwe, ng'omutango okununula abangi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe baali nga bava e Yeriko, ekibiina ky'abantu kinene ne kimugoberera." 
Matthew20:30 Bamuzibe babiri abaali batudde ku mabbali g'ekkubo, ne bawulira nti Yesu ayitawo, ne batandika okuleekaana nti: “Ssebo, Omuzzukulu wa Dawudi, tukwatirwe ekisa!”" 
Matthew20:31 Abantu ne bababoggolera basirike. Naye bo ne beeyongera bweyongezi okuleekaana nti: “Ssebo, Omuzzukulu wa Dawudi, tukwatirwe ekisa!”" 
Matthew20:32 Awo Yesu n'ayimirira n'abayita, n'ababuuza nti: “Mwagala mbakolere ki?”" 
Matthew20:33 Ne baddamu nti: “Ssebo tuzibule amaaso.” 
Matthew20:34 Yesu n'abakwatirwa ekisa, n'akwata ku maaso gaabwe. Amangwago ne basobola okulaba, ne bagenda naye." 
Matthew21:1 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe baali basemberedde ekibuga Yerusaalemu, nga batuuse e Betufaage, okumpi n'Olusozi olw'emiti Emizayiti, Yesu n'atuma abayigirizwa babiri," 
Matthew21:2 n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mu kabuga kali ke mulengera, era amangwago, mujja kulaba endogoyi esibiddwa nga eri n'omwana gwayo. Muzisumulule, muzindeetere." 
Matthew21:3 Singa wabaawo abavunaana, mugamba nti: ‘Mukama waffe azeetaaga’, olwo ye ajja kuziweereza mangu.”" 
Matthew21:4 Kino kyabaawo okutuukiriza ekyo omulanzi kye yayogera nti: 
Matthew21:5 “Mubuulire abantu b'e Siyooni nti: Laba, Kabaka wammwe ajja gye muli. Muteefu, era yeebagadde endogoyi, yeebagadde omwana gw'endogoyi.”" 
Matthew21:6 Awo abayigirizwa ne bagenda, ne bakola nga Yesu bwe yabalagira." 
Matthew21:7 Ne baleeta endogoyi n'omwana gwayo, ne bazissaako ekkooti zaabwe, ne bazeebagazaako Yesu." 
Matthew21:8 Abantu ne baaliira mu kkubo ekkooti zaabwe, abalala ne batema obutabi ku miti, ne babwaliira mu kkubo." 
Matthew21:9 Abantu abangi abaali bamukulembedde, era n'abo abaali bava emabega, ne baleekaana nti: “Omuzzukulu wa Dawudi, atenderezebwe! Ajja mu linnya lya Mukama aweereddwa omukisa! Mukama ali mu ggulu atenderezebwe!”" 
Matthew21:10 Awo Yesu bwe yayingira mu Yerusaalemu, ekibuga kyonna ne kiyuuguuma. Abakirimu ne babuuza nti: “Oyo ani?”" 
Matthew21:11 Ekibiina ky'abantu ne kiddamu nti: “Ono ye mulanzi, Yesu ow'e Nazaareeti eky'e Galilaaya.”" 
Matthew21:12 Awo Yesu n'ayingira mu Ssinzizo, n'agobamu abo bonna abaali batundiramu, n'abaali baguliramu. N'avuunika emmeeza z'abawaanyisa ensimbi, n'entebe z'abaali batundiramu enjiibwa." 
Matthew21:13 N'abagamba nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Ennyumba yange eneebanga nnyumba ya kunsinzizaamu.’ Naye mmwe mugifudde mpuku eyeekwekebwamu abanyazi.” 
Matthew21:14 Awo bamuzibe n'abalema ne bajja awali Yesu mu Ssinzizo, n'abawonya." 
Matthew21:15 Bakabona abakulu n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka bwe baalaba ebyamagero bye yakola, era ne balaba abaana nga baleekaana mu Ssinzizo, nga bagamba nti: “Omuzzukulu wa Dawudi atenderezebwe,” ne banyiiga." 
Matthew21:16 Ne bagamba nti: “Owulira abo bye bagamba?” Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Weewaawo. Temusomangako ekyawandiikibwa ekigamba nti: ‘Wagunjula abaana abawere n'abayonka okuwa ettendo ettuufu?’ ” 
Matthew21:17 N'abaawukanako, n'afuluma ekibuga, n'alaga e Betaniya, n'asula eyo." 
Matthew21:18 Enkeera ku makya, Yesu bwe yali addayo mu kibuga, n'alumwa enjala." 
Matthew21:19 N'alengera omuti gumu omutiini ku mabbali g'ekkubo. N'agutuukako, n'atagusangako kibala na kimu, wabula amakoola gokka. N'agugamba nti: “Toddangayo okubala ebibala emirembe gyonna!” Amangwago omutiini ne gukala." 
Matthew21:20 Abayigirizwa bwe baalaba ekyo, ne beewuunya! Ne bagamba nti: “Omutiini gukaze gutya amangu?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti singa muba n'okukkiriza nga temubuusabuusa, munaayinzanga okukola kye nkoze ku mutiini ogwo. Era si ekyo kyokka, naye munaayinzanga n'okugamba olusozi luno nti: ‘Siguukulukuka weesuule mu nnyanja,’ ne kituukirira." 
Matthew21:22 Era singa muba n'okukkiriza, byonna bye munaasabanga Katonda nga mumusinza, munaabifunanga.”" 
Matthew21:23 Awo Yesu bwe yakomawo mu Ssinzizo, bakabona abakulu, n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne bajja w'ali ng'ayigiriza, ne bamubuuza nti: “Olina buyinza ki okukola bino? Era ani yakuwa obuyinza buno?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Nange ka mbabuuze ekibuuzo kimu. Bwe munaakinziramu, olwo nange nnaababuulira obuyinza bwe nnina okukola bino." 
Matthew21:25 Ani yatuma Yowanne okubatiza: Katonda, oba bantu?” Awo ne bakubaganya ebirowoozo nti: “Singa tuddamu nti: ‘Katonda ye yamutuma’, ajja kutubuuza nti: ‘Kale lwaki Yowanne ono temwamukkiriza?’" 
Matthew21:26 Ate singa tuddamu nti: ‘Abantu be baamutuma,’ tutya abantu: kubanga bonna bakkiriza nti Yowanne mulanzi ddala.”" 
Matthew21:27 Awo Yesu ne bamuddamu nti: “Tetumanyi.” Ne Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Nange sijja kubabuulira buyinza bwe nnina kukola bino. 
Matthew21:28 “Kale mulowooza mutya? Waaliwo omuntu eyalina abaana be babiri, n'agenda eri omubereberye, n'amugamba nti: ‘Mwana wange, olwaleero genda okole mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu.’" 
Matthew21:29 Ye n'addamu nti: ‘Ŋŋaanye.’ Kyokka oluvannyuma ne yeenenya, n'agenda n'akola." 
Matthew21:30 Kitaabwe era n'agenda eri owookubiri n'amulagira ekintu kye kimu. Ye n'addamu nti: ‘Ka ŋŋende, ssebo.’ Kyokka n'atagenda." 
Matthew21:31 Kale ani ku bombi eyakola ekyo kitaawe kye yayagala?” Ne baddamu nti: “Omubereberye.” Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti abasolooza b'omusolo ne bamalaaya babasooka mmwe okuyingira Obwakabaka bwa Katonda," 
Matthew21:32 kubanga Yowanne Omubatiza yajja gye muli, n'abalaga ekkubo ettuufu, ne mutamukkiriza. Naye abasolooza b'omusolo ne bamalaaya, bo baamukkiriza. Ekyo mwakiraba, naye n'oluvannyuma temwenenya mulyoke mumukkirize.”" 
Matthew21:33 “Muwulire olugero olulala. Waaliwo omuntu ssemaka, eyasimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu, n'agyetoolooza olukomera, n'asimamu essogolero, n'azimbamu omunaala, n'agissaamu abapangisa, n'alaga mu nsi ey'ewala." 
Matthew21:34 Ekiseera eky'amakungula bwe kyatuuka, n'atuma abaddu be eri abapangisa, bamuwe ebibala ebibye." 
Matthew21:35 Kyokka abapangisa ne bakwata abaddu be, omu ne bamukuba, omulala ne bamutta, n'omulala ne bamukasuukirira amayinja." 
Matthew21:36 N'ayongera okutuma abaddu abalala bangi okusinga ab'olubereberye. Era ne babakola ekintu kye kimu. 
Matthew21:37 Oluvannyuma n'abatumira omwana we ng'agamba nti: ‘Omwana wange banaamussaamu ekitiibwa.’ 
Matthew21:38 Naye abapangisa bwe baalaba omwana oyo, ne bagambagana nti: ‘Ono ye musika! Mujje tumutte, obusika buliba bwaffe.’" 
Matthew21:39 Ne bamukwata, ne bamusuula ebweru w'ennimiro y'emizabbibu, ne bamutta." 
Matthew21:40 “Kale nnannyini nnimiro y'emizabbibu bw'alijja, alikola atya abapangisa abo?”" 
Matthew21:41 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Ababi abo alibazikiririza ddala, era ennimiro y'emizabbibu aligissaamu abapangisa abalala, abanaamuwanga ebibala mu kiseera ekituufu.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Temusomangako ekyo ebyawandiikibwa kye bigamba? ‘Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, lye lyafuuka ekkulu ery'entabiro. Ekyo Mukama ye yakikola, ne tukiraba, ne tukyewuunya.’" 
Matthew21:43 “N'olwekyo mbagamba nti Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bulibaggyibwako mmwe, ne buweebwa abantu abalikola ebikolwa ebibusaanira. [" 
Matthew21:44 Buli agwa ku jinja eryo, alimenyekamenyaka, era oyo gwe ligwako, lirimubetenta.”]" 
Matthew21:45 Bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo bwe baawulira engero za Yesu, ne bategeera nti ayogedde ku bo." 
Matthew21:46 Ne bagezaako okumukwata, naye ne batya ekibiina ky'abantu, kubanga kyali kimanyi nti Yesu mulanzi." 
Matthew22:1 Awo Yesu n'addamu okwogera n'abantu ng'akozesa engero, n'agamba nti:" 
Matthew22:2 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanaanyirizibwa ne kabaka, eyateekerateekera omwana we embaga ey'obugole." 
Matthew22:3 N'atuma abaddu be okutegeeza abaayitibwa ku mbaga, nti: ‘Mujje.’ Naye bo ne bagaana okujja." 
Matthew22:4 “N'atuma nate abaddu abalala ng'agamba nti: ‘Mugambe abaayitibwa nti: Embaga yange ewedde okuteekateeka. Ente zange n'ebyassava ebirala bittiddwa. Era buli kintu kiwedde okutegeka. Mujje ku mbaga ey'obugole.’ 
Matthew22:5 “Naye abaayitibwa ne batafaayo. Omu n'alaga mu kyalo kye, omulala mu by'amaguzi bye." 
Matthew22:6 Ate abalala ne bakwata abaddu be ne babayisa bubi, era ne babatta." 
Matthew22:7 Kabaka n'asunguwala, n'asindika eggye lye, n'azikiriza abassi abo, era n'ayokya ekibuga kyabwe." 
Matthew22:8 Awo n'agamba abaddu be nti: ‘Embaga ey'obugole ewedde okuteekateeka. Naye abo abaayitibwa tebasaanira. 
Matthew22:9 Kale mulage mu masaŋŋanzira, bonna be munaalaba mubayite ku mbaga ey'obugole.’" 
Matthew22:10 Abaddu ne balaga mu nguudo, ne bakuŋŋaanya bonna be baasanga, ababi n'abalungi. Ekisenge eky'embaga ey'obugole ne kijjula abagenyi." 
Matthew22:11 “Awo kabaka bwe yayingira okulaba abagenyi, n'alabamu omuntu atayambadde kyambalo kya mbaga ya bugole." 
Matthew22:12 Kabaka n'amugamba nti: ‘Munnange, oyingidde otya muno nga toyambadde kyambalo kya mbaga ya bugole?’ Ye n'asirika." 
Matthew22:13 Awo kabaka n'agamba abaweereza nti: ‘Mumusibe emikono n'amagulu, mumusuule ebweru mu kizikiza, awaliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji.’ ”" 
Matthew22:14 Awo Yesu n'amaliriza ng'agamba nti: “Bangi abayitibwa, naye abalondemu batono.”" 
Matthew22:15 Awo Abafarisaayo ne bagenda, ne bateesa nga bwe banaatega Yesu mu bigambo." 
Matthew22:16 Ne bamutumira abayigirizwa baabwe, wamu n'abawagizi ba Herode, ne bagamba nti: “Muyigiriza, tumanyi nga ggwe oli wa mazima, era abantu obayigiriza mu mazima ebyo Katonda by'ayagala bakole. Era tokolerera kusiimibwa bantu, kubanga bonna obayisa mu ngeri ye emu." 
Matthew22:17 Kale nno ssebo, tubuulire, olowooza otya? Kikkirizibwa okuwa Kayisaari omusolo, oba tekikkirizibwa?”" 
Matthew22:18 Kyokka Yesu n'ategeera enkwe zaabwe, n'agamba nti: “Bakuusa mmwe, lwaki munkema?" 
Matthew22:19 Mundage essente ey'omusolo.” Ne bamuleetera essente. 
Matthew22:20 N'ababuuza nti: “Ekifaananyi n'amannya ebiriko by'ani?” 
Matthew22:21 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Bya Kayisaari.” Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Kale nno ebya Kayisaari mubiwe Kayisaari, n'ebya Katonda mubiwe Katonda.”" 
Matthew22:22 Bwe baawulira ebyo, ne beewuunya nnyo, ne bamuleka, ne bagenda." 
Matthew22:23 Ku lunaku olwo, Abasaddukaayo, abagamba nti tewali kuzuukira, ne bajja eri Yesu." 
Matthew22:24 Ne bagamba nti: “Muyigiriza, Musa yagamba nti: ‘Singa omuntu afa, n'ataleka mwana, muganda w'omufu ateekwa okuwasa nnamwandu oyo, alyoke azaalire muganda we abaana.’" 
Matthew22:25 “Kale ewaffe waaliyo abooluganda musanvu. Omubereberye n'awasa. N'afa nga tazadde mwana. Mukazi we n'amulekera muganda we. 
Matthew22:26 Ekintu kye kimu ekyatuuka ku wookubiri ne ku wookusatu, okutuusa ku w'omusanvu." 
Matthew22:27 Oluvannyuma, bonna nga bamaze okufa, omukazi naye n'afa." 
Matthew22:28 Kale ku lunaku olw'amazuukira, omukazi oyo aliba muk'ani ku abo omusanvu? Kubanga bonna baamuwasa.”" 
Matthew22:29 Awo Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Muwubwa olw'obutamanya ebyawandiikibwa, wadde obuyinza bwa Katonda." 
Matthew22:30 Kubanga abantu bwe balizuukira, baliba nga bamalayika mu ggulu: nga tebakyawasa, era nga tebakyafumbirwa." 
Matthew22:31 “Ate ebifa ku kuzuukira kw'abafu, temusomangako ekyo Katonda kye yabagamba? Yagamba nti:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Nze Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Yisaaka, era Katonda wa Yakobo.’ Katonda si wa bafu, wabula wa balamu.”" 
Matthew22:33 Abantu bwe baawulira ebyo, ne beewuunya okuyigiriza kwe." 
Matthew22:34 Awo Abafarisaayo bwe baawulira nti Yesu asirisizza Abasaddukaayo, ne bakuŋŋaana." 
Matthew22:35 Omu ku bo, omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka, n'amubuuza ng'amukema nti:" 
Matthew22:36 “Muyigiriza, kiragiro ki ekisinga byonna obukulu?”" 
Matthew22:37 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Yagalanga Mukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna, n'amagezi go gonna." 
Matthew22:38 Ekyo kye kiragiro ekikulembera byonna, era ekisinga obukulu." 
Matthew22:39 Ekiragiro ekiddirira ekyo mu bukulu, era ekikifaanana, kye kino: ‘Yagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala ggwe wennyini.’" 
Matthew22:40 Ku biragiro bino byombi, Amateeka gonna n'ebyawandiikibwa abalanzi kwe byesigamye.”" 
Matthew22:41 Awo Abafarisaayo bwe baakuŋŋaana, Yesu n'ababuuza nti:" 
Matthew22:42 “Mulowooza mutya ku Kristo? Muzzukulu w'ani?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Muzzukulu wa Dawudi.” 
Matthew22:43 Yesu n'ababuuza nti: “Kale lwaki Dawudi yennyini, ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, amuyita Mukama we? Agamba nti:" 
Matthew22:44 ‘Katonda yagamba Mukama wange nti: Tuula ng'onninaanye ku ludda lwange olwa ddyo, okutuusa lwe ndifuula abalabe bo ekirinnyibwako ebigere byo.’" 
Matthew22:45 “Kale oba nga Dawudi yennyini amuyita Mukama we, ate olwo ayinza atya okuba muzzukulu we?”" 
Matthew22:46 Ne watabaawo ayinza kumuddamu kigambo. Era okuva olwo tewaaliwo muntu yaguma kwongera kumubuuza kibuuzo. 
Matthew23:1 Awo Yesu n'ayogera n'ekibiina ky'abantu awamu n'abayigirizwa be," 
Matthew23:2 n'agamba nti: “Abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo be bali mu kifo kya Musa. 
Matthew23:3 Kale byonna bye babagamba mubikwate, era mubikole. Naye temugoberera bikolwa byabwe, kubanga bye bategeeza abantu, bo si bye bakola." 
Matthew23:4 Basiba emigugu emizito, era egiteetikkika, ne balagira abantu okugyetikka ku bibegabega, sso nga bo bennyini tebaagala wadde okuginyeenyaako n'engalo zaabwe." 
Matthew23:5 Byonna bye bakola, bagenderera kulabibwa bantu. Kyebava bagaziya obusawo obw'amaliba, omuba ebigambo by'omu byawandiikibwa, bwe beesiba mu kyenyi ne ku mikono. Era bagaziya amatanvuwa g'ebyambalo byabwe." 
Matthew23:6 Baagala ebifo ebyekitiibwa ku mbaga, n'ebifo eby'oku manjo mu makuŋŋaaniro." 
Matthew23:7 Era baagala okulamusibwa mu butale, n'okuyitibwa nti: ‘Muyigiriza.’" 
Matthew23:8 Naye mmwe temuyitibwanga nti: ‘Muyigiriza,’ kubanga omuyigiriza wammwe ali omu. Mmwe mwenna muli baaluganda." 
Matthew23:9 Ku nsi temubangako gwe muyita ‘Kitammwe,’ kubanga Kitammwe ali omu, ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew23:10 Era temuyitibwanga bagunjuzi, kubanga omugunjuzi wammwe ali omu, ye Kristo." 
Matthew23:11 Asinga ekitiibwa mu mmwe, anaabanga muweereza wammwe." 
Matthew23:12 Buli eyeegulumiza, alitoowazibwa. Era buli eyeetoowaza, aligulumizibwa." 
Matthew23:13 “Bakuusa mmwe, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo! Muli ba kubonaabona! Muggalirawo abantu ababa bayingira Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, mmwe mwennyini ne mutayingira, era ne muziyiza n'abo abagezaako okuyingira. [" 
Matthew23:14 Bakuusa mmwe, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona, kubanga munyaga ebintu byonna mu mayumba ga bannamwandu, ne musinza Katonda mu bigambo ebingi olw'okweraga. N'olwekyo muliweebwa ekibonerezo ekisinga obunene.]" 
Matthew23:15 “Bakuusa mmwe, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona! Kubanga mutambula ennyanja n'olukalu okukyusa omuntu omu, abe omugoberezi wammwe. Kyokka bwe mumala okumukyusa, ne mumufuula asaanira omuliro ogutazikira, n'okusinga mmwe bwe mugusaanira." 
Matthew23:16 “Muli ba kubonaabona mmwe, abakulembeze bamuzibe! Mugamba nti: ‘Buli alayira Essinzizo, taba na musango bw'atatuukiriza ky'alayidde. Naye buli alayira zaabu ow'omu Ssinzizo, ateekwa okutuukiriza ky'alayidde.’" 
Matthew23:17 Mmwe abasirusiru, era bamuzibe, ekisinga obukulu kiruwa: zaabu, oba Essinzizo erifuula zaabu oyo okuba ekintu ekitukuvu?" 
Matthew23:18 Era mugamba nti: ‘Buli alayira alutaari, taba na musango bw'atatuukiriza ky'alayidde. Naye buli alayira ekirabo ekiri ku alutaari, ateekwa okutuukiriza ky'alayidde’." 
Matthew23:19 “Mmwe bamuzibe, ekisinga obukulu kiruwa: ekirabo, oba alutaari efuula ekirabo ekyo okuba ekintu ekitukuvu?" 
Matthew23:20 Kale nno oyo alayira alutaari, aba alayidde ne byonna ebigiriko." 
Matthew23:21 Era oyo alayira Essinzizo, aba alayidde ne Katonda alibeeramu." 
Matthew23:22 Oyo alayira eggulu, aba alayidde ntebe ya Katonda, ne Katonda agituulako." 
Matthew23:23 “Bakuusa mmwe, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona! Kubanga muwa ekimu eky'ekkumi ku buli kika kya muddo oguwunyisa obulungi enva, ne mulekayo okutuukiriza obwenkanya, ekisa, n'okukkiriza, ng'ate bye bisinga obukulu mu mateeka ga Katonda. Bino biteekwa okukolebwa, na biri nga tebiragajjalirwa." 
Matthew23:24 Mmwe abakulembeze bamuzibe, muggya akabu mu mazzi ge munywa, naye ne mumiriramu eŋŋamiya!" 
Matthew23:25 “Bakuusa mmwe, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona! Kubanga ebikopo n'ebibya mubinyiriza kungulu, sso nga munda bijjudde ebyo bye mwafuna mu bunyazi ne mu kwefaako mwekka." 
Matthew23:26 Mufarisaayo ggwe, muzibe, sooka oyoze mu kikopo ne mu kibya, olyoke obinyirize ne kungulu." 
Matthew23:27 “Bakuusa mmwe, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona! Kubanga muli ng'amalaalo agaasiigibwako langi enjeru gatukula, agalabika nga mayonjo kungulu, naye nga munda gajjudde amagumba g'abafu, n'okuwunya obubi kwonna." 
Matthew23:28 Bwe mutyo nammwe, kungulu mulabika mu bantu nga muli batuukirivu, sso nga munda mujjudde obukuusa n'obumenyi bw'amateeka." 
Matthew23:29 “Bakuusa mmwe, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona! Kubanga muzimba amalaalo g'abalanzi, era munyiriza ebiggya by'abatuukirivu," 
Matthew23:30 ne mugamba nti: ‘Singa twaliwo mu biro bya bajjajjaffe, tetwandyetabye wamu nabo okutta abalanzi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Bwe mutyo ne mukakasa nti muli bazzukulu b'abo abatta abalanzi. 
Matthew23:32 Kale mumalirize ekyo bajjajjammwe kye baatandika. 
Matthew23:33 Mmwe emisota, abaana b'emisota egy'obusagwa! Muliwona mutya okusalirwa omusango okusuulibwa mu muliro ogutazikira?" 
Matthew23:34 Kyenva mbatumira abalanzi n'abantu abagezi era n'abayigiriza: abamu ku bo mulibatta, abalala mulibakomerera ku misaalaba, n'abalala mulibakubira mu makuŋŋaaniro gammwe. Mulibagobaganya okubaggya mu kibuga ekimu okubazza mu kirala," 
Matthew23:35 mulyoke mubuuzibwe omusaayi gw'abatuukirivu bonna ogwayiibwa ku nsi, okuva ku musaayi gwa Abeeli omutuukirivu, okutuuka ku gwa Zakariya, omwana wa Balakiya, gwe mwattira wakati w'ekifo ekitukuvu ne alutaari, mu Ssinzizo." 
Matthew23:36 Mazima mbagamba nti: ekibonerezo olw'abo bonna kiriweebwa abantu ab'omulembe guno. 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusaalemu, Yerusaalemu, ggwe atta abalanzi, era akuba amayinja abatumibwa gy'oli! Emirundi emeka gye nayagala okukuŋŋaanya abantu bo, ng'enkoko bw'ekuŋŋaanya obwana bwayo mu biwaawaatiro byayo, ne mutakkiriza?" 
Matthew23:38 Kale ennyumba yammwe ebalekerwa nga kifulukwa. 
Matthew23:39 Kubanga mbagamba nti: temulindaba okutuusa lwe muligamba nti: ‘Atenderezebwe oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama.’ ” 
Matthew24:1 Awo Yesu n'ava mu Ssinzizo. Bwe yali ng'agenda, abayigirizwa be ne bajja w'ali, okumulaga enzimba y'Essinzizo." 
Matthew24:2 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Bino byonna mubiraba? Mazima mbagamba nti: mu kifo kino tewaliba jjinja na limu lirisigala nga lizimbiddwa ku linnaalyo. Gonna gagenda kusuulibwa wansi.” 
Matthew24:3 Yesu bwe yali ng'atudde ku Lusozi olw'emiti Emizayiti, abayigirizwa ne bajja w'ali mu kyama, ne bagamba nti: “Tubuulire, ebyo biribaawo ddi? Era kabonero ki akaliraga okujja kwo, n'enkomerero y'ensi?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Mwerinde, waleme kubaawo ababuzaabuza." 
Matthew24:5 Kubanga bangi balijja nga beeyita nze, Kristo, era balibuzaabuza bangi." 
Matthew24:6 Muliwulira entalo wano ne wali. Mwerinde muleme kweraliikirira. Ebyo biteekwa okubaawo, naye enkomerero eriba tennatuuka." 
Matthew24:7 Eggwanga erimu lirirumba eggwanga eddala, n'obwakabaka bulirumba obwakabaka obulala. Walibaawo enjala n'okukankana kw'ensi mu bitundu bingi." 
Matthew24:8 Naye olwo okubonaabona kuliba kutandika butandisi. 
Matthew24:9 “Mmwe balibakwata, ne babawaayo mubonyaabonyezebwe, era mulittibwa. Abantu bonna balibakyawa mmwe olw'okuba muli bagoberezi bange." 
Matthew24:10 Olwo bangi baliterebuka, baliryaŋŋanamu olukwe, era balikyawagana." 
Matthew24:11 N'abalanzi ab'obulimba balirabika, ne babuzaabuza bangi." 
Matthew24:12 Olw'obujeemu okuyinga obungi, okwagala kw'abangi kuliwola." 
Matthew24:13 Naye oyo aligumira ebizibu okutuusa ku nkomerero, alirokolebwa." 
Matthew24:14 Era Amawulire Amalungi agafa ku Bwakabaka galitegeezebwa abantu mu nsi zonna, okuba obujulirwa eri amawanga gonna, olwo enkomerero n'eryoka etuuka." 
Matthew24:15 “Kale bwe muliraba eky'omuzizo ekyenyinyalwa, Daniyeli omulanzi kye yayogerako, nga kiri mu kifo ekitukuvu, (oyo asoma bino ategeere)," 
Matthew24:16 olwo abaliba mu Buyudaaya, baddukiranga mu bitundu eby'ensozi." 
Matthew24:17 Aliba waggulu ku nnyumba ye, bw'akkanga, tayingiranga mu nnyumba kuggyamu ky'anaatwala." 
Matthew24:18 Aliba mu nnimiro, taddanga ka kunona kkooti ye." 
Matthew24:19 Abali embuto n'abayonsa mu nnaku ezo, nga balibonaabona nnyo!" 
Matthew24:20 Mwegayirire Katonda, ekiseera kye muteekwa okuddukiramu kireme kubaawo mu biseera eby'obutiti oba ku Sabbaato." 
Matthew24:21 Kubanga mu nnaku ezo, walibaawo okubonaabona kungi, nga kusinga okulala kwonna okwali kubaddewo, okuviira ddala Katonda lwe yatonda ensi, okutuusa kati. Era tewagenda kuddawo kubonaabona kulala kwenkana awo." 
Matthew24:22 Era singa ennaku ezo ez'okubonaabona tezaakendeezebwako, tewandiwonyeewo muntu n'omu. Naye olw'abalondemu, ennaku ezo zirikendeezebwako." 
Matthew24:23 “Mu biro ebyo, singa omuntu abagambanga nti: ‘Kristo ali wano’, oba nti: ‘Ali wali’, temukkirizanga." 
Matthew24:24 Kubanga abalimba nga beeyita Kristo, oba nga beeyita abalanzi, balirabika, ne bakola ebyamagero era ebyewuunyisa, nga bagenderera okukyamya abalondemu ba Katonda, singa kisoboka." 
Matthew24:25 Mwerinde, mbabuulidde nga bukyali." 
Matthew24:26 “Kale bwe babagambanga nti: ‘Kristo ali mu ddungu’, temugendangayo; oba nti: ‘Ali mu nnyumba’, temukkirizanga." 
Matthew24:27 Kubanga ng'okumyansa okw'eggulu bwe kumyansiza ebuvanjuba ne kulabikira n'ebugwanjuba, n'okujja kw'Omwana w'Omuntu bwe kutyo bwe kuliba." 
Matthew24:28 “Awaba ekifudde, awo n'ensega we zikuŋŋaanira." 
Matthew24:29 “Mu nnaku ezo, ekiseera eky'okubonaabona nga kyakaggwa, enjuba erijjako ekizikiza, n'omwezi gulirekayo okwaka, n'emmunyeenye ziriwanuka waggulu ne zigwa, n'amaanyi agali waggulu mu bbanga galinyeenyezebwa." 
Matthew24:30 Olwo akabonero k'Omwana w'Omuntu kalirabika ku ggulu, ebika byonna eby'oku nsi ne bikuba ebiwoobe. Era ne balaba Omwana w'Omuntu ng'ajjira mu bire eby'oku ggulu, ng'alina obuyinza bungi, n'ekitiibwa kinene." 
Matthew24:31 Eŋŋombe ey'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka erivuga, Omwana w'Omuntu n'atuma bamalayika be mu njuyi zonna ennya ez'ensi. Era balikuŋŋaanya abantu be abalondemu, okuva mu buli kasonda konna ak'ensi." 
Matthew24:32 “Mulabire ku muti omutiini muyige: amatabi gaagwo bwe gatandika okutojjera ne gaddako ebikoola, mumanya nti obudde obw'ekyeya bunaatera okutuuka." 
Matthew24:33 Mu ngeri y'emu bwe mulabanga ebyo byonna, mumanyanga nti enkomerero eri kumpi nnyo." 
Matthew24:34 Mazima mbagamba nti: ebintu bino byonna bigenda kubaawo ng'abantu ab'omulembe guno tebannafa kuggwaawo. 
Matthew24:35 Ensi n'ebiri waggulu mu bbanga biriggwaawo, naye ebigambo byange tebiriggwaawo." 
Matthew24:36 “Naye tewali amanyi lunaku lwennyini na ssaawa, ebyo we biribeererawo, newaakubadde bamalayika mu ggulu, wadde nze Omwana, wabula Kitange yekka ye amanyi." 
Matthew24:37 “Nga bwe kyali mu mulembe gwa Noowa, bwe kityo bwe kiriba ne mu kujja kw'Omwana w'Omuntu." 
Matthew24:38 Mu nnaku ezaakulembera omujjuzo, abantu baali balya era nga banywa. Baali bawasa era nga bafumbirwa, okutuusa ku lunaku Noowa lwe yayingira mu lyato." 
Matthew24:39 Ne batamanya, okutuusa omujjuzo lwe gwajja, ne gubasaanyaawo bonna. Bwe kityo bwe kiriba, Omwana w'Omuntu lw'alijja." 
Matthew24:40 “Mu nnaku ezo, abantu abaliba ababiri mu nnimiro, omu alitwalibwa, ate omulala n'alekebwa." 
Matthew24:41 Abakazi babiri abaliba awamu nga basa ku lubengo, omu alitwalibwa, ate omulala n'alekebwa." 
Matthew24:42 “Kale mwerinde, kubanga temumanyi lunaku, Mukama wammwe lw'alijjirako." 
Matthew24:43 Mumanye kino nti singa nnannyini nnyumba amanya ekiseera omubbi ky'anajjiramu, yanditunudde, n'ataleka nnyumba ye kumenyebwa na kuyingirwa." 
Matthew24:44 Kale nno nammwe mubenga beetegefu, kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu alijjira mu kiseera kye mutamusuubiriramu." 
Matthew24:45 “Kale ani omuwanika omwesigwa era omwegendereza, mukama we gw'aliteekawo okulabirira abaweereza be, abawe omugabo gwabwe ogw'emmere mu kiseera kyayo?" 
Matthew24:46 Wa mukisa omuddu oyo, mukama we bw'alijja, gw'alisanga ng'akola bw'atyo." 
Matthew24:47 Mazima mbagamba nti: alimuteekawo okulabirira ebintu bye byonna. 
Matthew24:48 “Naye singa omuddu oyo aba omubi, n'agamba mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Mukama wange aluddewo okudda’," 
Matthew24:49 n'atandika okukuba baddu banne, era n'atandika okulya n'okunywa awamu n'abatamiivu," 
Matthew24:50 mukama w'omuddu oyo alijjira ku lunaku lw'atamusuubirirako, ne mu ssaawa gy'atamanyi." 
Matthew24:51 Alimutemamu wabiri, n'amuteeka wamu n'abakuusa, awaliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji." 
Matthew25:1 “Mu nnaku ezo, Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bulifaanaanyirizibwa n'abawala ekkumi, abaakwata ettaala zaabwe, ne bagenda okwaniriza awasa omugole." 
Matthew25:2 Abataano ku bo baali basiru, naye abalala abataano nga bagezi." 
Matthew25:3 Abasiru baatwala ettaala zaabwe, naye ne batatwala mafuta mu ccupa." 
Matthew25:4 Abagezi ne batwala amafuta mu ccupa, awamu n'ettaala zaabwe." 
Matthew25:5 Awasa omugole bwe yalwawo okujja, bonna ne bakwatibwa otulo, ne beebaka." 
Matthew25:6 “Ekiro mu ttumbi, ne wabaawo oluyoogaano nti: ‘Awasa omugole wuuno ajja, mujje mumwanirize.’" 
Matthew25:7 Abawala ekkumi ne bagolokoka, ne bategeka ettaala zaabwe." 
Matthew25:8 Olwo abasiru ne bagamba bannaabwe abagezi nti: ‘Mutuwe ku mafuta gammwe, kubanga ettaala zaffe ziggweerera’." 
Matthew25:9 Abawala abagezi ne baddamu nti: ‘Gayinza obutatumala ffe nammwe. Ekisinga obulungi, mugende gye bagatunda, mwegulireyo.’" 
Matthew25:10 “Abawala abasiru nga bagenze okugula amafuta, awasa omugole n'atuuka. Abaali beetegese ne bayingira wamu naye mu mbaga ey'obugole, oluggi ne luggalwawo." 
Matthew25:11 “Oluvannyuma, abawala bali abasiru ne batuuka, ne bagamba nti: ‘Ssebo, ssebo, tuggulirewo.’" 
Matthew25:12 Ye n'addamu nti: ‘Mazima sibamanyi.’ 
Matthew25:13 “Kale mwerinde, kubanga olunaku n'essaawa temubimanyi." 
Matthew25:14 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bulifaananako ng'omuntu eyali agenda mu nsi ey'ewala, n'ayita abaddu be, n'abalekera ebintu bye okubirabirira." 
Matthew25:15 Omu n'amulekera talanta ttaano, omulala bbiri, ate omulala talanta emu, ng'alabira ku kusobola kwa buli omu, n'agenda." 
Matthew25:16 Amangwago, oyo eyafuna talanta ettaano, n'agenda n'azisuubuza, n'afunamu amagoba ga talanta endala ttaano." 
Matthew25:17 N'oyo eyafuna talanta ebbiri, n'akola bw'atyo, n'afunamu amagoba ga talanta endala bbiri." 
Matthew25:18 Kyokka oyo eyafuna talanta emu, n'agenda, n'asima ekinnya mu ttaka, n'akwekamu ensimbi za mukama we." 
Matthew25:19 “Nga wayiseewo ebbanga ggwanvu, mukama w'abaddu abo n'akomawo, n'ababuuza bannyonnyole ebifa ku nsimbi ze." 
Matthew25:20 Omuddu eyafuna talanta ettaano, n'ajja, n'aleeta talanta endala ttano, n'agamba nti: ‘Mukama wange, wandekera talanta ettaano. Laba, nafunamu amagoba ga talanta endala ttaano.’" 
Matthew25:21 Mukama we n'amugamba nti: ‘Weebale, omuddu omulungi era omwesigwa. Wali mwesigwa mu bintu ebitono, nja kukuwa okulabirira ebingi. Yingira mu ssanyu lya mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:22 N'oyo eyafuna talanta ebbiri n'ajja, n'agamba nti: ‘Mukama wange, wandekera talanta bbiri. Laba, nafunamu amagoba ga talanta endala bbiri.’" 
Matthew25:23 Mukama we n'amugamba nti: ‘Weebale, omuddu omulungi era omwesigwa. Wali mwesigwa mu bintu ebitono, nja kukuwa okulabirira ebingi. Yingira mu ssanyu lya mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:24 Era n'oyo eyafuna talanta emu n'ajja, n'agamba nti: ‘Mukama wange, namanya nti oli muntu mukakanyavu, ng'okungulira gy'otaasimbira, ng'okuŋŋaanyiza gy'otaasigira," 
Matthew25:25 ne ntya, kyennava ŋŋenda, ensimbi zo ne nzikweka mu ttaka. Laba, ziizino.’" 
Matthew25:26 Mukama we n'amugamba nti: ‘Muddu ggwe omubi era omugayaavu! Wamanya nti nkungulira gye saasimbira, nkuŋŋaanyiza gye saasigira." 
Matthew25:27 N'olwekyo ensimbi zange wandiziterese mu bbanka: nze nga nkomyewo, ne nzifuna n'amagoba gaazo." 
Matthew25:28 Kale ensimbi muzimuggyeeko, muziwe oyo alina talanta ekkumi." 
Matthew25:29 Kubanga buli alina aliweebwa n'aba na bingi nnyo. Ate atalina, aliggyibwako n'akatono k'ali nako." 
Matthew25:30 Omuddu oyo atalina ky'agasa, mumusuule ebweru mu kizikiza, awaliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Omwana w'Omuntu bw'alijjira mu kitiibwa kye, eky'obwakabaka, bamalayika bonna nga bali wamu naye, olwo alituula ku ntebe ye eyeekitiibwa." 
Matthew25:32 Abantu bonna balikuŋŋaanyizibwa mu maaso ge, n'abaawulamu, ng'omusumba bw'ayawula endiga n'embuzi." 
Matthew25:33 Endiga aliziteeka ku ludda lwe olwa ddyo, ate embuzi ku lwa kkono." 
Matthew25:34 “Awo Kabaka aligamba abo abali ku ludda lwe olwa ddyo nti: ‘Mmwe Kitange be yawa omukisa, mujje mubeere mu Bwakabaka obwabateekerwateekerwa okuva ensi lwe yatondebwa." 
Matthew25:35 Kubanga nali nnumwa enjala, ne mumpa ekyokulya. Nali nnumwa ennyonta, ne mumpa ekyokunywa. Nali mugenyi, ne munsuza." 
Matthew25:36 Nali sirina kya kwambala, ne munnyambaza. Nali mulwadde ne munnambula. Nali musibe mu kkomera, ne mujja okundaba.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Awo abaakola ebituufu balimuddamu nti: ‘Mukama waffe, twakulaba ddi ng'olumwa enjala, ne tukuwa ekyokulya, ng'olumwa ennyonta, ne tukuwa ekyokunywa?" 
Matthew25:38 Era twakulaba ddi ng'oli mugenyi, ne tukusuza, oba nga tolina kya kwambala, ne tukwambaza?" 
Matthew25:39 Era twakulaba ddi ng'oli mulwadde, oba ng'oli mu kkomera, ne tukulambula?’" 
Matthew25:40 “Kabaka alibaddamu nti: ‘Mazima mbagamba nti: buli lwe mwakikolera omu ku baganda bange bano abato, mwakikolera nze.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Awo aligamba abo abali ku ludda lwe olwa kkono nti: ‘Muve we ndi, mmwe abakolimire! Mugende mu muliro ogutazikira, ogwategekerwa Sitaani ne bamalayika be." 
Matthew25:42 Kubanga nali nnumwa enjala, ne mutampa kyakulya. Nali nnumwa ennyonta, ne mutampa kyakunywa." 
Matthew25:43 Nali mugenyi, ne mutansuza. Nali sirina kya kwambala, ne mutannyambaza. Nali mulwadde, era nali mu kkomera, ne mutannambula.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Awo nabo balimuddamu nti: ‘Mukama waffe, twakulaba ddi ng'olumwa enjala, oba ng'olumwa ennyonta, oba ng'oli mugenyi, oba nga tolina ky'oyambala, oba ng'oli mulwadde, oba ng'oli mu kkomera, ne tutakuyamba?’" 
Matthew25:45 Awo Kabaka alibaddamu nti: ‘Mazima mbagamba nti: buli lwe mwagaana okuyamba omu ku bano abasinga obuto, mwagaana kuyamba nze.’" 
Matthew25:46 “Olwo abo baligenda ne baweebwa ekibonerezo ekitaggwaawo. Naye abaakola ebituufu baligenda mu bulamu obutaggwaawo.” 
Matthew26:1 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo byonna, n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti:" 
Matthew26:2 “Mumanyi nti wabulayo ennaku bbiri, Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako etuuke. Era Omwana w'Omuntu ajja kuweebwayo, akomererwe ku musaalaba.”" 
Matthew26:3 Awo bakabona abakulu, n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne bakuŋŋaanira mu luggya lwa Ssaabakabona, ayitibwa Kayaafa." 
Matthew26:4 Ne bakola olukwe okukwata Yesu, bamutte." 
Matthew26:5 Naye ne bagamba nti: “Tuleme kumukwata mu biseera bya nnaku nkulu, sikulwa ng'abantu beegugunga.”" 
Matthew26:6 Awo Yesu bwe yali e Betaniya, mu nnyumba ya Simooni omugenge," 
Matthew26:7 omukazi n'ajja, ng'alina eccupa erimu omuzigo omulungi, oguwunya akawoowo, era ogw'omuwendo ennyo, n'agufuka ku mutwe gwa Yesu, ng'atudde alya." 
Matthew26:8 Abayigirizwa bwe baalaba ekyo, ne basunguwala, ne bagamba nti: “Lwaki omuzigo ogwo gwonooneddwa?" 
Matthew26:9 Gubadde guyinza okutundibwa ensimbi nnyingi, ne zigabirwa abaavu.”" 
Matthew26:10 Yesu bwe yategeera kye bagamba, n'abaddamu nti: “Lwaki omukazi mumutawaanya? Ekikolwa ky'ankoledde kirungi." 
Matthew26:11 Abaavu ba kuba nammwe bulijjo, naye nze sijja kuba nammwe bulijjo." 
Matthew26:12 Bw'afuse omuzigo guno ogw'akawoowo ku mubiri gwange, anteekeddeteekedde okuziikibwa." 
Matthew26:13 Mazima mbagamba nti: wonna mu nsi Amawulire Amalungi gye galitegeezebwa abantu, na kino omukazi ono ky'akoze, kiryogerwako okumujjukira.”" 
Matthew26:14 Awo omu ku bayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri, ayitibwa Yuda Yisikaryoti, n'agenda eri bakabona abakulu," 
Matthew26:15 n'agamba nti: “Munampa ki, nze mmubawe?” Bo ne bamuwa ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu." 
Matthew26:16 Okuva olwo Yuda n'anoonya akaseera ak'okuwaayo Yesu. 
Matthew26:17 Ku lunaku olusooka, olw'Embaga eriirwako Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiddwa, abayigirizwa ne bajja awali Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti: “Oyagala tukutegekere wa gy'onooliira Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mu kibuga ewa gundi, mumugambe nti: ‘Omuyigiriza agambye nti: Ekiseera kyange kinaatera okutuuka. Ewuwo gye nnaaliira awamu n'abayigirizwa bange, Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Abayigirizwa ne bakola nga Yesu bwe yabalagira, ne bategeka Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako." 
Matthew26:20 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, Yesu n'abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri ne batuula okulya." 
Matthew26:21 Bwe baali balya, Yesu n'agamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti: omu ku mmwe ajja kundyamu olukwe.”" 
Matthew26:22 Abayigirizwa ne banakuwala nnyo, era kinnoomu, ne babuuza Yesu nti: “Mukama wange, omuntu oyo ye nze?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Oyo akoza nange mu kibya, ye anandyamu olukwe." 
Matthew26:24 Ddala Omwana w'Omuntu agenda kuttibwa, ng'ebyawandiikibwa bwe bimwogerako. Naye omuntu oyo anaalyamu Omwana w'Omuntu olukwe, nga zimusanze! Omuntu oyo kyandimubeeredde kirungi obutazaalibwa!”" 
Matthew26:25 Yuda, eyalyamu Yesu olukwe, n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, omuntu oyo ye nze?” Yesu n'addamu nti: “Nga bw'oyogedde.”" 
Matthew26:26 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe baali balya, Yesu n'atoola omugaati, ne yeebaza Katonda, n'agumenyaamenyamu, n'aguwa abayigirizwa be, n'agamba nti: “Mutoole mulye, kino mubiri gwange.”" 
Matthew26:27 Ate n'akwata ekikopo, ne yeebaza Katonda, n'agamba nti: “Munywe kuno mwenna," 
Matthew26:28 kubanga kino musaayi gwange, ogukakasa endagaano empya ekoleddwa Katonda, era oguyiibwa ku lw'abangi okusonyiyisa ebibi." 
Matthew26:29 Naye mbagamba nti okuva kati sirinywa mwenge gwa mizabbibu, okutuusa lwe ndigunywa wamu nammwe nga muggya, mu Bwakabaka bwa Kitange.”" 
Matthew26:30 Awo bwe baamala okuyimba oluyimba olw'okutendereza Katonda, ne bafuluma, ne balaga ku Lusozi olw'emiti Emizayiti." 
Matthew26:31 Awo Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mwenna munadduka ne munjabulira ekiro kino, kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Nditta omusumba, endiga ez'omu kisibo ne zisaasaana.’" 
Matthew26:32 Naye bwe ndimala okuzuukira, ndibakulemberamu okugenda e Galilaaya.”" 
Matthew26:33 Awo Peetero n'amuddamu nti: “Abalala bonna ne bwe banadduka ne bakwabulira, nze siikwabulire n'akatono.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Mazima nkugamba nti: mu kiro kino kyennyini, enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, ononneegaana emirundi esatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Peetero n'amuddamu nti: “Ne bwe mba nga nteekwa okuttibwa naawe, siikwegaane.” N'abalala ne boogera bwe batyo." 
Matthew26:36 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be ne batuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Getesemaane. Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mutuule wano, nze ŋŋende eri neegayirire Katonda.”" 
Matthew26:37 Awo n'atwalako Peetero ne batabani ba Zebedaayo bombi. N'atandika okutya n'okweraliikirira ennyo. 
Matthew26:38 N'agamba nti: “Omwoyo gwange gujjudde obuyinike obuyinza n'okunzita! Mubeere wano, mutunule wamu nange.”" 
Matthew26:39 Bwe yeeyongerayo katono mu maaso, n'afukamira, ne yeegayirira Katonda nti: “Kitange, singa kiyinzika, nzigyaako ekikopo kino eky'okubonaabona! Naye ggwe ky'oyagala kye kiba kikolebwa, sso si nze kye njagala.”" 
Matthew26:40 Awo n'adda eri abayigirizwa, n'abasanga nga beebase, n'agamba Peetero nti: “Temusobodde kutunula nange wadde essaawa emu bw'eti?" 
Matthew26:41 Mutunule era mwegayirire Katonda, muleme kukemebwa. Kubanga omwoyo gwo gwagala, naye omubiri gwe munafu.”" 
Matthew26:42 Era n'agenda omulundi ogwokubiri, ne yeegayirira Katonda ng'agamba nti: “Kitange, oba nga ekikopo kino eky'okubonaabona tekiyinza kunzigyibwako, wabula nga nkinywedde, kale ky'oyagala kikolebwe.”" 
Matthew26:43 Awo n'ajja nate, n'asanga abayigirizwa nga beebase, kubanga amaaso gaabwe gaali gajjudde otulo." 
Matthew26:44 Yesu n'abaleka nate, n'agenda, ne yeegayirira Katonda omulundi ogwokusatu, mu ngeri y'emu nga bwe yeegayirira mu kusooka." 
Matthew26:45 Awo n'addayo eri abayigirizwa, n'abagamba nti: “Mukyebase, mukyawummudde? Essaawa etuuse Omwana w'Omuntu okuweebwayo mu buyinza bw'aboonoonyi." 
Matthew26:46 Musituke tugende. Omuntu andiddemu olukwe ali kumpi okutuuka.” 
Matthew26:47 Awo Yesu yali akyayogera, Yuda, omu ku bayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri, n'ajja n'ekibiina ky'abantu abaalina ebitala n'emiggo, nga batumiddwa bakabona abakulu, n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga." 
Matthew26:48 Oyo eyalyamu Yesu olukwe yali amaze okuwa ekibiina ky'abantu akabonero ng'agamba nti: “Omuntu gwe nnaalamusa nga mmunywegera, ye wuuyo, mumukwate.”" 
Matthew26:49 Awo Yuda bwe yajja, amangwago n'agenda awali Yesu, n'agamba nti: “Mirembe, Muyigiriza!” Era n'amunywegera." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Munnange, kola ky'ojjiridde.” Awo ne bajja, ne bavumbagira Yesu, ne bamukwata, ne bamunyweza." 
Matthew26:51 Omu ku abo abaali ne Yesu n'aggyayo ekitala, n'atema omuddu wa Ssaabakabona, n'amukutulako okutu." 
Matthew26:52 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Ekitala kyo kizze mu kifo kyakyo, kubanga abo bonna abakwata ekitala, balifa kitala." 
Matthew26:53 Olowooza nti siyinza kusaba Kitange n'ampeereza ebibinja by'eggye lya bamalayika ebisoba mu kkumi n'ebibiri? 
Matthew26:54 Kale olwo ebyawandiikibwa ebigamba nti kiteekwa okuba bwe kiti, binaatuukirira bitya?”" 
Matthew26:55 Mu kaseera ako Yesu n'agamba ekibiina ky'abantu nti: “Muzze okunkwata nga mulina ebitala n'emiggo ng'abajjiridde omunyazi? Buli lunaku natuulanga mu Ssinzizo ne njigiriza, ne mutankwata." 
Matthew26:56 Naye bino byonna bikoleddwa, ebyo ebyawandiikibwa abalanzi biryoke bituukirire.” Awo abayigirizwa be bonna ne bamwabulira ne badduka." 
Matthew26:57 Awo abo abaakwata Yesu ne bamutwala ewa Kayaafa, Ssaabakabona, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'abantu abalala abakulu mu ggwanga, gye baali bakuŋŋaanidde." 
Matthew26:58 Peetero yagoberera Yesu okutuukira ddala mu luggya lwa Ssaabakabona, kyokka ng'amwesuddeko ebbanga. N'ayingira mu luggya, n'atuula n'abakuumi, alabe ebinaafaayo." 
Matthew26:59 Bakabona abakulu n'ab'olukiiko abalala bonna, ne banoonya obujulizi obw'obulimba bwe banaasinziirako okutta Yesu." 
Matthew26:60 Kyokka ne batabuzuula, newaakubadde abajulirwa ab'obulimba bangi bajja ne bamuwaayiriza. Oluvannyuma ne wajjawo babiri," 
Matthew26:61 ne bagamba nti: “Ono yagamba nti: ‘Nnyinza okumenyawo Essinzizo ate ne ndizimba mu nnaku ssatu.’ ” 
Matthew26:62 Awo Ssaabakabona n'ayimirira, n'abuuza Yesu nti: “Tolina ky'oddamu mu ebyo bye bakulumiriza?”" 
Matthew26:63 Kyokka Yesu n'asirika. Ssaabakabona n'amugamba nti: “Nkulayiza Katonda Nnannyibulamu, tutegeeze oba nga ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Nga bw'oyogedde. Naye mbagamba nti okuva kati muli ba kulaba Omwana w'Omuntu ng'atudde ku ludda olwa ddyo olwa Katonda Nnannyinibuyinza, era ng'ajjira ku bire eby'eggulu.”" 
Matthew26:65 Awo Ssaabakabona n'ayuza ebyambalo bye, era n'agamba nti: “Avvodde Katonda! Ate tukyetaagira ki abajulirwa? Kaakati muwulidde ebigambo ebibi by'ayogedde." 
Matthew26:66 Mmwe mulowooza mutya?” Ne baddamu nti: “Asaanidde okuttibwa.” 
Matthew26:67 Awo ne bamuwandira amalusu mu maaso, era ne bamukuba empi," 
Matthew26:68 nga bwe bagamba nti: “Kristo, tubuulire, ani akukubye?”" 
Matthew26:69 Awo Peetero bwe yali ng'atudde ebweru mu luggya, omuwala omu omuweereza n'ajja w'ali, n'agamba nti: “Naawe wali ne Yesu Omugalilaaya.”" 
Matthew26:70 Kyokka Peetero ne yeegaana mu maaso ga bonna, ng'agamba nti: “Ky'ogamba sikimanyi.”" 
Matthew26:71 Ate bwe yali ng'ayita mu lukuubo olufuluma ebweru, omuwala omulala omuweereza n'amulaba, n'agamba abantu abaali awo nti: “N'ono yali wamu ne Yesu Omunazaareeti.”" 
Matthew26:72 Peetero n'addamu okwegaana ng'agamba nti: “Ndayira, omuntu oyo simumanyi.”" 
Matthew26:73 Nga wayiseewo akaseera katono, abaali bayimiridde awo ne bajja, ne bagamba Peetero nti: “Ddala naawe oli omu ku bagoberezi ba Yesu, kubanga n'enjogera yo ekuloopa.”" 
Matthew26:74 Awo Peetero n'agamba nti: “Oba bye njogera si bya mazima, kale nkolimirwe.” Era n'alayira nti: “Katonda alaba nti nze simanyi musajja oyo.” Amangwago enkoko n'ekookolima." 
Matthew26:75 Peetero n'ajjukira ebyo Yesu bye yali amugambye nti: “Enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, ononneegaana emirundi esatu.” Awo Peetero n'afuluma wabweru, n'akaaba nnyo amaziga." 
Matthew27:1 Obudde bwe bwakya, bakabona abakulu n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne bateesa ku kutta Yesu." 
Matthew27:2 Ne bamusiba, ne bamutwala ne bamuwaayo eri Pilaato omufuzi Omurooma." 
Matthew27:3 Awo Yuda eyalyamu Yesu olukwe, bwe yalaba nga Yesu asaliddwa ogw'okufa, ne yejjusa. Era ebitundu bya ffeeza n'abiddiza bakabona abakulu, n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga," 
Matthew27:4 nga bw'agamba nti: “Nayonoona okuwaayo omuntu okuttibwa sso nga talina musango!” Naye bo ne bamuddamu nti: “Ekyo tukifaako ki? Ezo nsonga zo.” 
Matthew27:5 Yuda n'asuula ebitundu bya ffeeza mu Ssinzizo, n'afuluma, n'agenda yeetuga." 
Matthew27:6 Bakabona abakulu bwe baggyayo ebitundu bya ffeeza ebyo, ne bagamba nti: “Tekikkirizibwa okuteeka ensimbi zino mu kifo omuteekebwa ebirabo, kubanga ziguze omusaayi gw'omuntu.”" 
Matthew27:7 Bwe baamala okukkaanya, ne bazigulamu ennimiro y'omubumbi, okuziikangamu abagenyi." 
Matthew27:8 Ennimiro eyo kyeyava eyitibwa Ennimiro y'Omusaayi n'okutuusa kati. 
Matthew27:9 Olwo ekyayogerwa omulanzi Yeremiya ne kituukirira nti: “Ne batwala ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu, omuwendo abamu ku bantu ba Yisirayeli gwe baalamula mu oyo," 
Matthew27:10 ne bagulamu ennimiro y'omubumbi, nga Mukama bwe yandagira.”" 
Matthew27:11 Awo Yesu n'ayimirira mu maaso g'omufuzi Omurooma. Omufuzi oyo n'amubuuza nti: “Ggwe Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?” Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Nga bw'oyogedde.” 
Matthew27:12 Ate bakabona abakulu bwe baamuwawaabira, n'ataddamu n'akatono." 
Matthew27:13 Awo Pilaato n'amugamba nti: “Towulira ebyo byonna bye bakulumiriza?” 
Matthew27:14 Kyokka Yesu n'atamuddamu kigambo na kimu. Omufuzi ne yewuunya nnyo. 
Matthew27:15 Ku buli Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, omufuzi Omurooma yali amanyidde okuta omusibe, ekibiina ky'abantu gwe kyamusabanga." 
Matthew27:16 Ku mulundi guno, waaliwo omusibe amanyiddwa ennyo, ayitibwa Barabba." 
Matthew27:17 Awo abantu bwe baakuŋŋaana, Pilaato n'ababuuza nti: “Mwagala mbateere aluwa: Barabba, oba Yesu ayitibwa Kristo?”" 
Matthew27:18 Kubanga yamanya nti baali bawaddeyo Yesu lwa buggya. 
Matthew27:19 Awo Pilaato bwe yali atudde ku ntebe ey'obulamuzi, mukazi we n'amutumira ng'agamba nti: “Omuntu oyo atalina musango tomukolako kabi n'akatono, muleke, kubanga olwaleero, nalumiddwa nnyo mu kirooto ku lulwe.”" 
Matthew27:20 Awo bakabona abakulu, n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne bafukuutirira ekibiina ky'abantu okusaba Barabba ateebwe, Yesu azikirizibwe." 
Matthew27:21 Naye omufuzi n'ababuuza nti: “Ku bano bombi mwagala mbateere aluwa?” Ne baddamu nti: “Barabba.” 
Matthew27:22 Pilaato n'ababuuza nti: “Kale Yesu ayitibwa Kristo nnaamukola ntya?” Bonna ne baddamu nti: “Akomererwe ku musaalaba!” 
Matthew27:23 Pilaato n'ababuuza nti: “Lwaki, kibi ki ky'akoze?” Naye bo ne beeyongera bweyongezi okuleekaana nti: “Akomererwe ku musaalaba!”" 
Matthew27:24 Pilaato bwe yalaba nga byonna bya bwereere, era nga beeyongera bweyongezi okusasamala, n'addira amazzi, n'anaaba mu ngalo, mu maaso g'abantu bonna nga bw'agamba nti: “Nze sirina kye nvunaanibwa ku kuttibwa kwa muntu ono. Byonna biri ku mmwe.”" 
Matthew27:25 Abantu bonna ne baddamu nti: “Ekibonerezo olw'okuttibwa kwe kibe ku ffe, ne ku baana baffe.”" 
Matthew27:26 Awo Pilaato n'abateera Barabba. Ate Yesu bwe yamala okukubibwa n'embooko eriko amalobo agasuna, Pilaato n'amuwaayo okukomererwa ku musaalaba." 
Matthew27:27 Awo abaserikale ba Pilaato ne batwala Yesu mu lubiri lwa Pilaato, oluyitibwa Purayitoriyo. Ekibiina kyonna ne kimukuŋŋaanirako." 
Matthew27:28 Ne bamwambulamu engoye ze, ne bamwambaza olugoye olumyufu." 
Matthew27:29 Ne bawetaaweta amaggwa, ne bakolamu engule, ne bagimuteeka ku mutwe. Ne bamukwasa olumuli mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, ne bafukamira mu maaso ge, ne bamukudaalira nga bagamba nti: “Wangaala, Kabaka w'Abayudaaya!”" 
Matthew27:30 Ne bamufujjira amalusu, ne bakwata olumuli, ne bamukuba mu mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Bwe baamala okumukudaalira, ne bamwambulamu olugoye luli, ne bamwambaza engoye ezize, ne bamutwala okumukomerera ku musaalaba." 
Matthew27:32 Bwe baali bafuluma, ne basisinkana omusajja Omukireene, ayitibwa Simooni, ne bamuwaliriza okwetikka omusaalaba gwa Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Golugoota, ekitegeeza Ekifo ky'Ekiwanga," 
Matthew27:34 ne bawa Yesu omwenge gw'emizabbibu, nga gutabuddwamu ekintu ekikaawa. Kyokka bwe yakombako, n'atayagala kunywa." 
Matthew27:35 Bwe baamala okumukomerera ku musaalaba, ne bagabana engoye ze, nga bazikubira akalulu." 
Matthew27:36 Ne batuula awo ne bamukuuma. 
Matthew27:37 Waggulu w'omutwe gwe ne bateekawo omusango ogumuvunaanibwa, nga guwandiikiddwa nti: “ONO YE YESU, KABAKA W'ABAYUDAAYA.”" 
Matthew27:38 Era ne bakomerera abanyazi babiri ku misaalaba okumpi ne Yesu: omu ku ludda lwa Yesu olwa ddyo, omulala ku lwa kkono." 
Matthew27:39 Abantu abaali bayitawo ne bavuma Yesu," 
Matthew27:40 ne banyeenya emitwe, era ne bagamba nti: “Ggwe amenya Essinzizo, ate n'olizimba mu nnaku essatu, weewonye. Oba nga oli Mwana wa Katonda, va ku musaalaba okke!”" 
Matthew27:41 Bakabona abakulu n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka, n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, nabo ne bamukudaalira nga bagamba nti:" 
Matthew27:42 “Yawonyanga balala, tayinza kwewonya ye yennyini. Ye Kabaka wa Yisirayeli, kaakano ave ku musaalaba akke, tulyoke tumukkirize." 
Matthew27:43 Yeesiga Katonda, era yagamba nti Mwana wa Katonda. Kale Katonda amuwonye kaakano oba ng'amwagala.”" 
Matthew27:44 Abanyazi abaakomererwa ku misaalaba okumpi naye, nabo ne bamuvuma mu ngeri ye emu." 
Matthew27:45 Okuva ku ssaawa mukaaga ez'emisana, okutuusa ku ssaawa mwenda ez'olweggulo, ekizikiza ne kibikka ensi yonna." 
Matthew27:46 Awo nga ku ssaawa ey'omwenda, Yesu n'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Eli, Eli, lama sabakutaani?” Ekitegeeza nti: “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki onjabulidde?”" 
Matthew27:47 Abamu abaali bayimiridde awo bwe baawulira, ne bagamba nti: “Ayita Eliya!”" 
Matthew27:48 Amangwago omu ku bo n'adduka, n'akwata ekyangwe, n'akinnyinka mu mwenge ogw'emizabbibu omukaatuufu, n'akissa ku lumuli, n'awa Yesu okunywa." 
Matthew27:49 Naye abalala ne bagamba nti: “Leka, tulabe oba nga Eliya anajja okumuwonya!”" 
Matthew27:50 Awo Yesu n'akoowoola nate n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, n'afa." 
Matthew27:51 Awo olutimbe olw'omu Ssinzizo ne luyulikamu wabiri, okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi. Ensi n'ekankana, enjazi ne zaatika." 
Matthew27:52 Entaana ne zibikkuka, abatuukirivu bangi abaali bafudde ne bazuukira," 
Matthew27:53 ne bava mu ntaana. Era Yesu bwe yamala okuzuukira, ne bayingira mu Kibuga Ekitukuvu, abantu bangi ne babalaba." 
Matthew27:54 Omurooma omukulu w'ekibinja ky'abaserikale era n'abaserikale abaali naye nga bakuuma Yesu, bwe baalaba ensi bw'ekankana, era ne byonna ebibaddewo, ne batya nnyo, ne bagamba nti: “Ddala ono abadde Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Matthew27:55 Waaliwo n'abakazi bangi abaayitanga ne Yesu okuva e Galilaaya, nga bamuweereza, abaali ewalako nga balengera." 
Matthew27:56 Mu abo mwalimu Mariya Magudaleena, ne Mariya nnyina Yakobo ne Yose, era ne nnyina w'abatabani ba Zebedaayo." 
Matthew27:57 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, omusajja omugagga ow'e Arimataya, ayitibwa Yosefu, n'ajja. Era naye yali muyigirizwa wa Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 N'agenda eri Pilaato, n'amusaba omulambo gwa Yesu. Awo Pilaato n'alagira okugumuwa." 
Matthew27:59 Yosefu n'atwala omulambo, n'aguzinga mu lugoye olweru olulungi." 
Matthew27:60 N'aguteeka mu ntaana eyiye empya ey'empuku, gye yali asimye mu lwazi. N'ayiringisa ejjinja eddene, n'aliggaza omulyango gw'entaana, n'agenda." 
Matthew27:61 Mariya Magudaleena ne Mariya omulala baali batudde awo mu maaso g'entaana. 
Matthew27:62 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, kwe kugamba oluddirira olw'Okweteekateeka, bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo, ne bakuŋŋaana, Ne bagenda eri Pilaato," 
Matthew27:63 ne bagamba nti: “Ssebo, tujjukidde: omulimba oyo bwe yali ng'akyali mulamu, yagamba nti: ‘Ennaku bwe ziriyitawo essatu, ndizuukira.’ 9:22; 18:31-33" 
Matthew27:64 Kale nno lagira bakuumire ddala entaana, okutuusa ku lunaku olwokusatu, abayigirizwa be baleme kugenda kumubbamu, bagambe abantu nti: ‘Azuukidde!’ Olwo obulimba obwo obw'oluvannyuma ne buba bubi okusinga obwo obwasooka.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilaato n'abagamba nti: “Mulina abakuumi. Mugende mukuumire ddala entaana nga bwe muyinza.” 
Matthew27:66 Awo ne bagenda, ne banywereza ddala entaana, ejjinja ne balissaako akabonero, ne balekawo abakuumi." 
Matthew28:1 Sabbaato bwe yali ng'eggwaako, olunaku olusooka mu wiiki nga lunaatera okukya, Mariya Magudaleena ne Mariya omulala ne bagenda okulaba entaana." 
Matthew28:2 Ne wabaawo okukankana kw'ensi okw'amaanyi, kubanga malayika wa Mukama yava mu ggulu n'ajja, n'ayiringisa ejjinja, n'aliggyawo, era n'alituulako." 
Matthew28:3 Yali afaanana ng'okumyansa, n'ekyambalo kye nga kitukula ng'omuzira." 
Matthew28:4 Abakuumi, olw'okumutya ennyo, ne bakankana, era ne baba ng'abafudde." 
Matthew28:5 Awo malayika n'agamba abakazi nti: “Mmwe temutya. Mmanyi nga munoonya Yesu, eyakomererwa ku musaalaba." 
Matthew28:6 Wano taliiwo. Azuukidde nga bwe yagamba. Mujje mulabe ekifo w'abadde agalamidde. 
Matthew28:7 Mugende mangu, mubuulire abayigirizwa be nti: ‘Azuukidde, era abakulembeddemu okugenda e Galilaaya. Eyo gye mulimulabira.’ Kaakano mbabuulidde.”" 
Matthew28:8 Awo ne bafuluma, ne bava mangu ku ntaana nga batidde, naye nga bajjudde essanyu, ne badduka okubuulira abayigirizwa be." 
Matthew28:9 Awo Yesu n'abasisinkana, n'agamba nti: “Mirembe!” Ne bamusemberera, ne bakwata ku bigere bye, ne bamusinza." 
Matthew28:10 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Muleke kutya. Mugende mubuulire baganda bange bagende e Galilaaya. Eyo gye balindabira.” 
Matthew28:11 Abakazi bwe baali bagenda, abamu ku baserikale abaakuuma entaana, ne bajja mu kibuga, ne bategeeza bakabona abakulu byonna ebibaddewo." 
Matthew28:12 Bakabona abakulu ne bakuŋŋaana wamu n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne bateesa. Ne bawa abaserikale ensimbi nnyingi," 
Matthew28:13 ne bagamba nti: “Mugambe nti: ‘Abayigirizwa be bazze ekiro nga twebase, ne babba omulambo gwe.’" 
Matthew28:14 Ekyo omufuzi bw'alikiwulira, ffe tulimuwooyawooya, ne tubawonya omusango.”" 
Matthew28:15 Abakuumi ne batwala ensimbi, ne bakola nga bwe baabagamba. Ekigambo ekyo ne kibuna mu Buyudaaya n'okutuusa kati." 
Matthew28:16 Awo abayigirizwa ekkumi n'omu ne balaga e Galilaaya, ku lusozi Yesu gye yabalagira okugenda." 
Matthew28:17 Bwe baamulaba, ne bamusinza. Naye abamu ku bo ne babuusabuusa." 
Matthew28:18 Yesu n'abasemberera, n'ayogera nabo, n'agamba nti: “Mpeereddwa obuyinza bwonna mu ggulu ne ku nsi." 
Matthew28:19 Kale mugende, abantu b'amawanga gonna mubafuule abayigirizwa bange, nga mubabatiza mu linnya lya Kitaffe, ne lya Mwana, ne lya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Matthew28:20 nga mubayigiriza okukwata byonna bye nabalagira mmwe. Nange ndi wamu nammwe okutuusa ensi lw'eriggwaawo.” 
Mark1:1 Gano ge Mawulire Amalungi aga Yesu Kristo Omwana wa Katonda. 
Mark1:2 Gaatandika ng'omulanzi Yisaaya bwe yawandiika nti: “Laba, ntuma omubaka wange akukulembere okukwerulira ekkubo." 
Mark1:3 Waliwo ayogerera mu ddungu n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: ‘Mulongoose oluguudo lwa Mukama, mutereeze amakubo ge.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Bw'atyo ne Yowanne Omubatiza yajja mu ddungu, n'abatiza abantu, nga bw'abategeeza nti: “Mwenenye, mubatizibwe, Katonda abasonyiwe ebibi byammwe.”" 
Mark1:5 Abantu baavanga mu byalo by'omu Buyudaaya bwonna, ne mu kibuga Yerusaalemu, ne bagenda eri Yowanne, ne baatula ebibi byabwe. Olwo Yowanne n'ababatiza mu Mugga Yorudaani." 
Mark1:6 Yowanne ono yayambalanga ekyambalo ekyakolebwa mu byoya by'eŋŋamiya, nga yeesiba olukoba olw'eddiba mu kiwato. Yalyanga nzige n'omubisi gw'enjuki ez'omu ttale." 
Mark1:7 Abantu yabategeezanga nti: “Waliwo ansinga obuyinza ajja okujja. Sisaanira na kukutama kusumulula buguwa bwa ngatto ze. 
Mark1:8 Nze mbatiza na mazzi kyokka ye, alibabatiza na Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.”" 
Mark1:9 Mu nnaku ezo, Yesu n'ava e Nazaareeti eky'omu Galilaaya, n'agenda okubatizibwa Yowanne mu Mugga Yorudaani." 
Mark1:10 Yesu bwe yali yaakava mu mazzi, amangwago n'alaba eggulu nga libikkuse, ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ng'afaanana ng'ejjiba, ng'akka ku ye." 
Mark1:11 Eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti: “Ggwe Mwana wange omwagalwa, era gwe nsiimira ddala.” Mak 9:7; Luk 3:22" 
Mark1:12 Amangwago Yesu n'asindikibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu mu ddungu," 
Mark1:13 n'amalayo ennaku amakumi ana, ng'akemebwa Sitaani, kyokka nga bamalayika bamuweereza." 
Mark1:14 Awo Yowanne bwe yamala okuggalirwa mu kkomera, Yesu n'ajja e Galilaaya, n'ategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi agava eri Katonda," 
Mark1:15 n'agamba nti: “Ekiseera ekyali kirindirirwa kituuse. Obwakabaka bwa Katonda busembedde. Mwenenye, era mukkirize Amawulire Amalungi.”" 
Mark1:16 Awo Yesu bwe yali ng'atambula ku lubalama lw'ennyanja ey'e Galilaaya, n'alaba abavubi Simooni ne Andereya abooluganda, nga batega obutimba mu nnyanja." 
Mark1:17 Awo n'abayita nti: “Mujje muyitenga nange, ndibafuula abavubi b'abantu.”" 
Mark1:18 Amangwago ne baleka awo obutimba bwabwe, ne bagenda naye." 
Mark1:19 Ate bwe yasemberayo mu maaso katono, n'alaba Yakobo ne Yowanne, batabani ba Zebedaayo. Baali mu lyato nga baddaabiriza obutimba bwabwe." 
Mark1:20 Amangwago nabo n'abayita. Ne baleka awo kitaabwe Zebedaayo n'abapakasi be mu lyato, bo ne bagenda ne Yesu." 
Mark1:21 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be, ne batuuka mu kibuga Kafarunawumu. Amangwago, ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato, Yesu n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro, n'ayigiriza." 
Mark1:22 Abantu abaamuwulira, ne beewuunya nnyo engeri gye yayigirizaamu. Kuba yayigiriza nga nnannyinibuyinza, sso si ng'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka." 
Mark1:23 Amangwago, omuntu aliko omwoyo omubi, n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyabwe, n'aleekaana nnyo nti:" 
Mark1:24 “Otulanga ki ggwe Yesu Omunazaareeti? Ozze okutuzikiriza? Nkumanyi! Ggwe Mutuukirivu wa Katonda.” 
Mark1:25 Yesu n'aboggolera omwoyo ogwo omubi nti: “Sirika mangu, n'omuntu oyo muveeko!”" 
Mark1:26 Omwoyo omubi ne gujugumiza omuntu oyo, ne gumuvaako nga guwowoggana." 
Mark1:27 Bonna abaaliwo ne bawuniikirira, nga bwe beebuuzaganya nti: “Ono wa ngeri ki? Enjigiriza ye mpya, ate ejjudde obuyinza! Era alagira emyoyo emibi ne gimuwulira”" 
Mark1:28 Okuva olwo, ettutumu lye ne libuna mu nsi ey'e Galilaaya yonna n'emiriraano." 
Mark1:29 Olwava mu kkuŋŋaaniro, Yesu n'agenda negi." 
Mark1:30 Yali yaakatuuka, ne bamubuulira nti nnyina wa muka Peetero omusujja gumuluma." 
Mark1:31 Yesu n'agenda w'ali, n'amukwata ku mukono, n'amugolokosa. Amangwago, omusujja ne gumuwonako, n'atandika okubaweereza." 
Mark1:32 Akawungeezi, ng'enjuba egudde, ne bamuleetera abalwadde bonna, n'abaliko emyoyo emibi." 
Mark1:33 Era abantu ab'omu kibuga ekyo bonna ne beeyiwa wabweru ku mulyango. 
Mark1:34 N'awonya bangi abalina endwadde eza buli ngeri. N'abaliko emyoyo emibi, n'agibagobako, nga tagikkiriza kumwatuukiriza, kubanga gyali gimumanyi." 
Mark1:35 Awo Yesu n'azuukuka ku makya nnyo, obudde nga tebunnalaba, n'alaga mu kifo ekitaalimu bantu, n'abeera eyo ng'asinza Katonda." 
Mark1:36 Simooni ne banne, ne bagenda nga bamunoonyereza." 
Mark1:37 Bwe baamulaba, ne bamugamba nti: “Abantu bonna bakunoonya.”" 
Mark1:38 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Tugende mu bubuga obulala obuliraanye wano, nayo njigirizeeyo, kubanga ekyo kye najjirira.”" 
Mark1:39 Bw'atyo n'atambula Galilaaya yonna, ng'ayigiriza mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe, era abantu abaliko emyoyo emibi ng'agibagobako." 
Mark1:40 Awo omugenge n'ajja eri Yesu, n'afukamira, n'amwegayirira nti: “Ssebo, singa oyagala, oyinza okumponya.”" 
Mark1:41 Yesu n'amukwatirwa ekisa, n'agolola omukono n'amukwatako, n'amugamba nti: “Njagala, wona.”" 
Mark1:42 Amangwago, ebigenge ne bimuwonako, n'alongooka." 
Mark1:43 Yesu n'amukuutira nnyo era n'amusiibula amangwago," 
Mark1:44 nga bw'amugamba nti: “Kino tokibuulirako muntu n'omu, wabula genda weeyanjule ewa kabona, oweeyo ekirabo nga Musa bwe yalagira, balyoke bakakase nti owonye.”" 
Mark1:45 Naye omusajja ono bwe yagenda, n'atandika okulaalaasa wonna, nga Yesu bwe yali amuwonyezza. Olw'ekyo nga Yesu takyasobola kuyingira mu kibuga mu lwatu, wabula okubeera ebbali, mu bifo ebitaalimu bantu. Eyo abantu gye baamusanganga, nga bava wonna." 
Mark2:1 Nga wayiseewo ennaku, Yesu n'akomawo mu kibuga Kafarunawumu. Abantu bwe baawulira ng'azze mu maka agamu," 
Mark2:2 ne bakuŋŋaana bangi, nga ne mu luggya tebakyagyamu. Yesu bwe yali ng'abategeeza ekigambo kya Katonda," 
Mark2:3 ne wajjawo abaamuleetera omulwadde akonvubye, nga yeetikkiddwa abantu bana." 
Mark2:4 Bwe baalemwa okumutuusa awali Yesu, olw'obungi bw'abantu, ne basereekulula ekitundu ky'akasolya k'ennyumba Yesu mwe yali, ne bayisa omulwadde mu mwagaanya ogwo, ng'agalamidde ku katanda kwe baamuleetera." 
Mark2:5 Yesu bwe yalaba nga balina okukkiriza, n'agamba akonvubye nti: “Mwana wange, ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Olwo abannyonnyozi b'amateeka abaali batudde awo, ne balowooza mu mitima gyabwe nti:" 
Mark2:7 “Ono ayinza atya okwogera bw'atyo? Yeeyita Katonda? Ggwe kale ani alina obuyinza okusonyiwa ebibi, okuggyako Katonda?”" 
Mark2:8 Amangwago Yesu n'ategeera mu mwoyo gwe, ebyali mu birowoozo byabwe. Kyeyava abagamba nti: “Lwaki mulowooza mutyo mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Mark2:9 Ekisingako obwangu kye kiruwa, okugamba akonvubye nti: ‘Ebibi byo mbikusonyiye,’ oba nti: ‘Yimirira, weetikke akatanda ko, otambule?’" 
Mark2:10 Kaakano ka mbalage nti Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi okusonyiwa ebibi.” Awo n'agamba akonvubye nti: 
Mark2:11 “Yimirira. Weetikke akatanda ko, oddeyo ewammwe.”" 
Mark2:12 Amangwago, omusajja n'ayimirira, bonna nga balaba, n'asitula akatanda ke, n'atambula. Bonna ne bawuniikirira, ne batendereza Katonda, ne bagamba nti: “Kino tetukirabangako!”" 
Mark2:13 Awo Yesu n'addayo nate ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja ey'e Galilaaya. Abantu ne bajja bangi nnyo, n'abayigiriza." 
Mark2:14 Bwe yali ng'atambula, n'alaba Leevi, omusolooza w'omusolo. Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Jjangu oyitenga nange.” Ne Leevi n'asituka n'amugoberera." 
Mark2:15 Oluvannyumako, Yesu n'agenda n'abayigirizwa be ewa Leevi ku kijjulo. Abasolooza b'omusolo bangi n'aboonoonyi, nabo ne bagenda naye. Bonna ne batuula ne Yesu okulya." 
Mark2:16 Abamu ku bannyonnyozi b'amateeka ab'omu kibiina ky'Abafarisaayo, bwe baalaba Yesu ng'aliira wamu n'aboonoonyi n'abasolooza b'omusolo, ne bagamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Lwaki aliira wamu n'abasolooza b'omusolo era n'aboonoonyi?”" 
Mark2:17 Yesu bwe yawulira kye babuuza, ye yennyini n'abaddamu nti: “Abalamu tebeetaaga musawo, wabula abalwadde. Abalungi si be najja okuyita, wabula aboonoonyi.”" 
Mark2:18 Mu kiseera ekyo, abayigirizwa ba Yowanne Omubatiza n'Abafarisaayo baali basiiba. Awo abantu abamu ne bajja eri Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti: “Lwaki abayigirizwa ba Yowanne Omubatiza n'abayigirizwa b'Abafarisaayo basiiba, naye ababo ne batasiiba?”" 
Mark2:19 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Abayite ku mbaga y'obugole tebayinza butalya, ng'awasizza omugole akyali nabo. Ekiseera kyonna ky'amala nabo, tebasiiba." 
Mark2:20 Naye ekiseera kirituuka, awasizza omugole abaggyibweko. Olwo balitandika okusiiba." 
Mark2:21 “Omuntu tatunga mu lugoye, lukadde kiwero kiggya ekitannayozebwamu, kubanga bwe kyetugga, kyekutula ku lugoye olukadde, ne kitwalirako n'ekitundu kyalwo, olwo ekituli ne kyeyongera obunene." 
Mark2:22 Era omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omusu tegufukibwa mu nsawo zaagwo ez'amaliba enkadde. Singa kino kikolebwa, guzaabya, omwenge ogwo n'ensawo n'obifiirwa. Naye omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omusu, gufukibwa mu nsawo zaagwo ez'amaliba empya.”" 
Mark2:23 Olumu Yesu yali ayita mu nnimiro y'eŋŋaano ku lunaku olwa Sabbaato, abayigirizwa be abaali bayise naye, ne bagenda nga banoga ku birimba." 
Mark2:24 Abafarisaayo ne bagamba Yesu nti: “Lwaki abayigirizwa bo bakola ekitakkirizibwa kukolebwa ku Sabbaato?” 
Mark2:25 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Temusomangako ekyo Dawudi kye yakola, bwe yali nga talina kyakulya? Ye ne be yali nabo, bwe baalumwa enjala," 
Mark2:26 yayingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda, n'alya ku migaati egyali giweereddwayo eri Katonda. Kino yakikola, Abiyataari bwe yali nga ye Ssaabakabona, sso ng'emigaati egyo gyali tegikkirizibwa kuliibwako bantu balala, wabula bakabona bokka. Kyokka Dawudi yagiryako, era n'awaako n'abaali naye.”" 
Mark2:27 Awo Yesu n'agamba Abafarisaayo nti: “Olunaku lwa Sabbaato lwassibwawo lwa bulungi bwa muntu, sso omuntu teyatonderwa Sabbaato." 
Mark2:28 N'olwekyo Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza okusalawo ekisaanye okukolebwa ku Sabbaato.” 
Mark3:1 Awo Yesu n'ayingira nate mu kkuŋŋaaniro. Era omwo mwalimu omuntu ow'omukono ogukaze. 
Mark3:2 Waaliwo abantu abamu abaali baagala okuwawaabira Yesu. Ne bamwekaliriza amaaso, balabe oba anaawonya omuntu oyo ku Sabbaato, balyoke bagende bawaabe." 
Mark3:3 Yesu n'agamba ow'omukono ogukaze nti: “Situka, oyimirire wano, bonna we bayinza okukulabira.”" 
Mark3:4 Awo n'abuuza abaaliwo nti: “Kiki ekikkirizibwa ku Sabbaato? Kukola bulungi, oba kukola bubi? Kuwonya bulamu, oba kubuzikiriza?” Naye bo ne ba sirika busirisi." 
Mark3:5 Yesu n'abeebunguluza amaaso ng'abasunguwalidde, era nga munakuwavu olw'obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyabwe, n'agamba omuntu oyo nti: “Wamma golola omukono gwo.” N'agugolola, ne guwonera ddala." 
Mark3:6 Amangwago, Abafarisaayo ne bafuluma, ne beetaba wamu n'abawagizi ba Herode, bateese nga bwe banaazikiriza Yesu." 
Mark3:7 Awo Yesu n'alaga ku lubalama lw'ennyanja wamu n'abayigirizwa be. Abantu bangi ne bamugoberera, nga bava mu Galilaaya ne mu Buyudaaya," 
Mark3:8 ne mu kibuga Yerusaalemu, ne mu kitundu ky'e Yidumeya, n'emitala w'Omugga Yorudaani, ne mu kitundu ekiriraanye ebibuga Tiiro ne Sidoni. Bano bonna bajja gy'ali, kubanga baali bawulidde by'akola." 
Mark3:9 Olw'abantu okuyitirira obungi, Yesu n'alagira abayigirizwa be bategekewo eryato limubeere kumpi, sikulwa ng'ekibiina ky'abantu kimunyigiriza." 
Mark3:10 Yabalagira okukola kino kuba, nga bwe yali awonyezza abantu abangi, abalwadde bonna baali beenyigiriza, basobole okumutuukirira, bamukwateko." 
Mark3:11 Abantu abaliko emyoyo emibi bwe baamulabangako, ne bagwa wansi mu maaso ge, ne baleekaana nti: “Ggwe Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Mark3:12 Kyokka Yesu n'agaanira ddala emyoyo emibi okumwatuukiriza. 
Mark3:13 Awo Yesu n'alaga mu kitundu eky'ensozi, n'ayita abo be yalondamu. Ne bajja w'ali," 
Mark3:14 n'ayawulako kkumi na babiri, babeerenga wamu naye, era abatumenga okubunyisa obubaka bwe." 
Mark3:15 N'abawa n'obuyinza okugobanga emyoyo emibi ku bantu. 
Mark3:16 Ekkumi n'ababiri be yayawulako be bano: Simooni, gwe yayongerako erya Peetero;" 
Mark3:17 batabani ba Zebedaayo: Yakobo ne Yowanne, be yayongerako erya “Bowaneruge” (ekitegeeza nti: “Ababwatuka nga laddu”)," 
Mark3:18 ne Andereya, ne Filipo, ne Barutolomaayo, ne Matayo, ne Tomasi, ne Yakobo mutabani wa Alufaayo, ne Taddaayo, ne Simooni Omulwanirizi w'eggwanga lye," 
Mark3:19 ne Yuda Yisikaryoti, eyalyamu Yesu olukwe." 
Mark3:20 Awo Yesu n'ayingira mu nnyumba. Abantu bangi ne baddamu okukuŋŋaanira w'ali. Ye n'abayigirizwa be ne babulwawo n'akaseera okulya emmere. 
Mark3:21 Ababe bwe baawulira, ne bagenda okumukwata, kubanga baali bagamba nti: “Alaluse?”" 
Mark3:22 Abannyonnyozi b'amateeka abaali bavudde e Yerusaalemu, ne bagamba nti: “Aliko Beeluzebuli omukulu w'emyoyo emibi, era akozesa buyinza bwa Beeluzebuli oyo okugigoba ku bantu.”" 
Mark3:23 Awo Yesu n'ayita abantu, n'abagamba mu ngero nti: “Sitaani ayinza atya okugoba Sitaani ku bantu?" 
Mark3:24 Abantu ab'obwakabaka obumu bwe beesalamu, ne balwanagana, obwakabaka obwo buzikirira." 
Mark3:25 Ne mu maka, abantu baamu bwe batategeeragana, baawukana, amaka ago ne gasasika." 
Mark3:26 Ne Sitaani singa yeerwanyisa yennyini, obuyinza bwe ne bwawukanamu, aba takyaliwo, ng'azikiridde." 
Mark3:27 “Tewali ayinza kuyingira mu nnyumba ya muntu wa maanyi n'anyaga ebintu bye, okuggyako ng'asoose kumusiba, olwo n'alyoka anyaga eby'omu nnyumba ye." 
Mark3:28 “Mazima mbagamba nti: abantu bayinza okusonyiyibwa ebibi byonna, era bayinza okusonyiyibwa okwogera obubi mu ngeri yonna." 
Mark3:29 Naye buli avuma Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, talisonyiyibwa, wabula aba akoze ekibi ky'asigala nakyo emirembe gyonna.”" 
Mark3:30 Kino Yesu yakyogera okuddamu abo abaali bagambye nti aliko omwoyo omubi. 
Mark3:31 Awo baganda ba Yesu ne nnyina, ne bajja gy'ali, ne bayimirira wabweru, ne bamutumira nga bamuyita." 
Mark3:32 Ekibiina ky'abantu kyali kitudde nga kimwetoolodde, ne bamugamba nti: “Laba, nnyoko ne baganda bo bali wabweru, baagala okukulaba.”" 
Mark3:33 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Baba bantu ba ngeri ki be mpita mmange ne baganda bange?” 
Mark3:34 Awo ne yeebunguluza amaaso abantu abaali batudde awo nga bamwetoolodde, n'agamba nti: “Mmange ne baganda bange be bano." 
Mark3:35 Buli akola Katonda by'ayagala, ye aba muganda wange, ye aba mwannyinaze, ye aba mmange.”" 
Mark4:1 Awo Yesu n'atandika nate okuyigiriza ng'ali ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja ey'e Galilaaya. Ekibiina ky'abantu abaamukuŋŋaanirako ne kiyitirira obunene. Kyeyava asaabala mu lyato n'atuula mu lyo, ku nnyanja. Kyo ekibiina ky'abantu ne kisigala ku lubalama." 
Mark4:2 N'abayigiriza ebintu bingi ng'akozesa engero. Era mu kuyigiriza kwe, n'abagamba nti:" 
Mark4:3 “Muwulirize. Omusizi yagenda n'asiga ensigo. 
Mark4:4 Bwe yali ng'asiga, ensigo ezimu ne zigwa ku mabbali g'ekkubo, ebinyonyi ne bijja ne bizirya." 
Mark4:5 Ensigo endala ne zigwa mu ttaka ery'oku lwazi. Amangwago ne zimera, kubanga ettaka lyabuguumirira mangu olw'obutaba ggwanvu." 
Mark4:6 Omusana bwe gwayaka ennyo, ne ziwotookerera. Era olw'okuba ng'emirandira gyazo gyali tegisse nnyo wansi mu ttaka, ne zikala." 
Mark4:7 Endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eryameramu amaggwa. Bwe gaamera, ne gakulira wamu nazo, ne gaziziyiza okubala." 
Mark4:8 N'endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eddungi. Ne zimera, ne zikula, ne zibala ebirimba. Ebimu ne bibaamu ensigo amakumi asatu; ebirala, ensigo nkaaga; n'ebirala, ensigo kikumi.”" 
Mark4:9 Awo Yesu n'agamba nti: “Alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Mark4:10 Awo abasinga obungi bwe baali nga bamaze okugenda, abayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri, n'abalala, abaali basigadde ne Yesu, ne bamusaba abannyonnyole engero." 
Mark4:11 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe muweereddwa okumanya ekyama ekifa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda. Naye abantu abalala, buli kintu kibabuulirwa mu ngero:" 
Mark4:12 ‘Balyoke balabe, naye nga tebeetegereza; bawulire, naye nga tebategeera, sikulwa nga beenenya ne basonyiyibwa ebibi byabwe.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Awo Yesu n'ababuuza nti: “Amakulu g'olugero luno temugategedde? Kale olwo muliyinza mutya okubaako n'olugero lwonna lwe mutegeera? 
Mark4:14 Omusizi, ye muntu asiga ekigambo kya Katonda mu bantu." 
Mark4:15 Abantu abamu bafaanana ng'ensigo ezaagwa ku mabbali g'ekkubo. Ekigambo bwe kibasigibwamu, bakiwulira, naye amangwago Sitaani ajja n'akibaggyamu." 
Mark4:16 Abalala bafaanana ng'ensigo ezaagwa mu ttaka ery'oku lwazi. Bwe bawulira ekigambo, amangwago bakyaniriza n'essanyu." 
Mark4:17 Naye olw'okuba bafaanana ng'ebimera ebitalina mirandira gisse nnyo wansi mu ttaka, bamalawo akaseera katono. Okubonyaabonyezebwa oba okuyigganyizibwa olw'ekigambo kya Katonda bwe kujja, amangwago nga baterebuka." 
Mark4:18 Abalala bafaanana ng'ensigo ezaagwa mu ttaka eryameramu amaggwa. Ekigambo bakiwulira," 
Mark4:19 naye okweraliikirira ebintu eby'ensi, n'okulimbibwalimbibwa ebyobugagga, n'okululunkanira ebyokufuna ebirala, bwe bifuga emitima gyabwe, biziyiza ekigambo okubayamba okukola ebikolwa ebirungi." 
Mark4:20 Ate abalala bafaanana ng'ensigo ezaagwa mu ttaka eddungi. Mu bamu ne byeyongera emirundi amakumi asatu; mu balala emirundi nkaaga, ate mu balala emirundi kikumi.”" 
Mark4:21 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Ettaala tereetebwa kukwekebwa mu kibbo, oba kuteekebwa wansi wa kitanda, wabula kuwanikibwa ku kikondo kyayo." 
Mark4:22 Kale nno buli kintu ekikwekeddwa, kirikwekulwa. Era buli kyama kirimanyibwa mu lwatu." 
Mark4:23 Oba nga waliwo alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Mark4:24 Era n'abagamba nti: “Mwekkaanye bye muwulira. Ekipimo kye mukozesa okupimira abalala, kye kirikozesebwa okupimira mmwe, era mulyongerwako." 
Mark4:25 Oyo alina ebingi alyongerwako n'ebirala. Ate oyo atalina, aliggyibwako n'akatono k'ali nako.”" 
Mark4:26 Yesu n'ayongera okubagamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bufaanaanyirizibwa n'engeri omuntu gy'asigamu ensigo mu ttaka. 
Mark4:27 Omuntu ono ekiro yeebaka, emisana n'atunula. Zo ensigo ne zimera, ne zikula, nga ye omuntu tamanyi ngeri gye zimeramu, na gye zikulamu." 
Mark4:28 Ettaka lye likuza ebimera ne bibala. Ebimera bino bisooka kuleeta bukoola, ne bizzaako ebirimba ebito. Ate oluvannyuma mu birimba ebyo, ne mubaamu empeke ezikuze." 
Mark4:29 Empeke nga zengedde, olwo omuntu n'akwata akambe, kubanga amakungula gatuuse.”" 
Mark4:30 Yesu n'agamba nate nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda tuyinza kubugeraageranya na ki? Oba lugero ki lwe tuyinza okukozesa okubunnyonnyola? 
Mark4:31 Bufaanaanyirizibwa n'akasigo ka kaladaali. Kano ke kasigo akasingira ddala obutono mu nsigo zonna ku nsi. 
Mark4:32 Naye bwe kasigibwa mu ttaka, kamera ne kavaamu ekimera ky'enva ekisingira ddala ebimera eby'enva ebirala byonna obunene. Ne kyawula amatabi manene, ebinyonyi ne bisobola okuzimbamu ebisu, n'okwewogoma mu kisiikirize kyago.”" 
Mark4:33 Yesu yategeezanga abantu ekigambo kya Katonda ng'akozesa engero nnyingi ezifaananako na zino, okusinziira ku kye baasobolanga okutegeera." 
Mark4:34 Yakozesanga ngero mu byonna bye yabategeezanga. Ate bwe yasigalanga n'abayigirizwa be bokka, bo ng'abannyonnyola byonna." 
Mark4:35 Awo ku lunaku olwo lwennyini, obudde nga buwungedde, Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Tuwunguke, tugende emitala w'ennyanja.”" 
Mark4:36 Awo abayigirizwa be ne bava mu kibiina ky'abantu, ne basaabala mu lyato Yesu mwe yali, ne bagenda naye. N'abantu abalala ne basaabala amaato, ne bagenda naye." 
Mark4:37 Awo omuyaga ne gukunta, amayengo ne geeyiwa mu lyato, ne liba kumpi okujjula amazzi." 
Mark4:38 Yesu yali mu kifo eky'emabega mu lyato nga yeebase, nga yeezizise omutto. Abayigirizwa be ne bamuzuukusa, ne bamugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, ggwe tofaayo ng'ennyanja etutta?”" 
Mark4:39 Yesu n'azuukuka, n'aboggolera omuyaga, era n'alagira ennyanja nti: “Kkakkana, teeka!” Omuyaga ne gukoma, ennyanja n'eteekera ddala!" 
Mark4:40 Awo Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Lwaki mutidde? Temunnaba kufuna kukkiriza?” 
Mark4:41 Naye bo ne bakwatibwa ensisi, ne bagambagana nti: “Ono muntu wa ngeri ki? Olaba n'omuyaga era n'amayengo bimuwulira!”" 
Mark5:1 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be ne batuuka emitala w'ennyanja mu nsi y'Abagerasa. 
Mark5:2 Yesu bwe yali yaakava mu lyato, omuntu aliko omwoyo omubi n'ava mu kifo omuli empuku eziziikibwamu abafu, n'amusisinkana." 
Mark5:3 Omuntu oyo yasulanga mu mpuku ezo. Waali tewakyali muntu asobola kumukuuma nga musibe na kintu kyonna, wadde olujegere."
