Luke1:77 n'okumanyisa abantu be nti alibalokola, ng'abasonyiwa ebibi byabwe," 
Luke1:78 kubanga Katonda waffe ajjudde ekisa. Oyo alinga enjuba evaayo, alitukyalira ng'ava mu ggulu," 
Luke1:79 okwakira abo abali mu kizikiza ne mu kisiikirize eky'olumbe, n'okuluŋŋamya ebigere byaffe mu kkubo ery'emirembe.”" 
Luke1:80 Omwana n'agenda ng'akula, era nga yeeyongera amaanyi mu mwoyo, n'abanga mu malungu okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yeeraga abantu ba Yisirayeli." 
Luke2:1 Awo olwatuuka, mu nnaku ezo, Kayisaari Agusto n'afulumya ekirangiriro nti abantu bonna ab'omu matwale ge beewandiise, babalibwe." 
Luke2:2 Okwewandiisa kuno okubereberye, kwabaawo nga Kiriniyo ye afuga ekitundu eky'e Siriya." 
Luke2:3 Awo buli omu n'agenda okwewandiisa gy'asibuka. 
Luke2:4 Ne Yosefu n'ava mu kibuga Nazaareeti, eky'omu Galilaaya, n'agenda mu Buyudaaya, mu kibuga Dawudi kye yazaalibwamu, ekiyitibwa Betilehemu, kubanga Yosefu yali muzzukulu wa Dawudi." 
Luke2:5 Yagenda okwewandiisa awamu ne Mariya gwe yali ayogereza. Mariya yali lubuto," 
Luke2:6 era bwe baali bali eyo, ennaku ze ez'okuzaala ne zituuka." 
Luke2:7 N'azaala omwana we omuggulanda, wa bulenzi, n'amubikka mu bugoye, n'amuzazika mu mmanvu ebisolo mwe biriira, kubanga mu nnyumba y'abagenyi tebaafunamu kifo." 
Luke2:8 Mu kitundu ky'ensi ekyo, mwalimu abasumba abaasulanga ku ttale, nga bakuuma amagana gaabwe ekiro, mu mpalo." 
Luke2:9 Awo malayika wa Mukama n'abalabikira, n'ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kyakaayakana okubeetooloola. Ne batya nnyo!" 
Luke2:10 Naye malayika n'abagamba nti: “Temutya, kubanga mbaleetera amawulire amalungi, ag'essanyu eringi eri abantu bonna." 
Luke2:11 Olwaleero, mu kibuga kya Dawudi, Omulokozi abazaaliddwa. Ye Kristo, Mukama." 
Luke2:12 Kano ke kabonero ke munaamutegeererako: mujja kusanga omwana omuwere abikkiddwa mu bugoye, ng'azazikiddwa mu mmanvu ebisolo mwe biriira.”" 
Luke2:13 Amangwago awaali malayika oyo, ne wajjawo ne bamalayika abalala bangi ab'omu ggye ery'omu ggulu. Ne batendereza Katonda nga bayimba nti:" 
Luke2:14 “Ekitiibwa kibe eri Katonda mu ggulu! Ne ku nsi, emirembe gibe mu bantu Katonda b'asiima!”" 
Luke2:15 Bamalayika bwe baamala okwawukana ku basumba, ne baddayo mu ggulu. Awo abasumba ne bagambagana nti: “Tugende e Betilehemu, tulabe ekintu kino ekibaddewo, Mukama ky'atutegeezezza.”" 
Luke2:16 Ne bagendayo mangu, ne basanga Mariya ne Yosefu, n'omwana omuwere ng'azazikiddwa mu mmanvu ebisolo mwe biriira." 
Luke2:17 Bwe baamala okulaba omwana, ne bategeeza bonna ebyo ebyali bibabuuliddwa ku mwana oyo." 
Luke2:18 Bonna abaabiwulira ne beewuunya abasumba bye baayogera. 
Luke2:19 Naye Mariya ebigambo ebyo byonna n'abikuuma mu mutima gwe, era n'abirowoozangako nnyo." 
Luke2:20 Awo abasumba ne baddayo nga bagulumiza era nga batendereza Katonda, olw'ebyo bye bawulidde, ne bye balabye. Byonna byali ddala nga malayika bwe yali abibabuulidde." 
Luke2:21 Awo ennaku omunaana bwe zaatuuka omwana okukomolebwa, n'atuumibwa erinnya Yesu, malayika lye yayita omwana ono nga tannaba mu lubuto." 
Luke2:22 Awo Yosefu ne Mariya bwe baatuusa ennaku ez'okutukuzibwa kwabwe, eziragirwa mu Mateeka ga Musa, ne batwala omwana Yesu e Yerusaalemu okumwanjula eri Mukama," 
Luke2:23 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu tteeka lya Mukama nti: “Buli mwana ow'obulenzi omuggulanda, anaawongerwanga Mukama.”" 
Luke2:24 Era baagenda okuwaayo eky'okutambira, ng'etteeka lya Mukama bwe liragira: enjiibwa bbiri oba amayiba amato abiri." 
Luke2:25 Mu Yerusaalemu mwalimu omuntu erinnya lye Simyoni. Yali muntu mulungi, ng'assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, era ng'alindirira okununulwa kwa Yisirayeli. Era yali ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Luke2:26 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu yali amumanyisizza nti tagenda kufa nga tannalaba ku Kristo wa Mukama. 
Luke2:27 Awo Simyoni n'ajja mu Ssinzizo, nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ye amugambye. Abazadde bwe baatuusa omwana Yesu mu Ssinzizo okutuukiriza etteeka," 
Luke2:28 Simyoni n'asitula omwana mu mikono gye, n'atendereza Katonda ng'agamba nti:" 
Luke2:29 “Kaakano Mukama wange, kye wasuubiza okituukirizza. Leka omuddu wo ŋŋende mirembe," 
Luke2:30 kubanga amaaso gange galabye Omulokozi wo 
Luke2:31 gwe wategekera abantu bonna," 
Luke2:32 abe ekitangaala ekimulisa amawanga, era abe ekitiibwa ky'abantu bo, Abayisirayeli.”" 
Luke2:33 Kitaawe ne nnyina w'omwana ne bawuniikirira olw'ebigambo ebimufaako, Simyoni bye yayogera." 
Luke2:34 Awo Simyoni n'abaagaliza emikisa, ate n'agamba Mariya, nnyina w'omwana nti: “Omwana ono ateekeddwawo, bangi mu Yisirayeli bagwe, ate bangi bayimuke. Era ajja kuba akabonero ke bajja okuwakanya," 
Luke2:35 bwe batyo balage ebirowoozo by'emitima gyabwe. Era naawe ennaku eri ng'ekitala ekyogi, erikufumita omutima.”" 
Luke2:36 Era waaliwo omulanzi, omukazi erinnya lye Anna, muwala wa Fanuweli, ow'omu Kika kya Aseeri. Yali mukazi mukadde. Yafumbirwa nga muwala muto, n'amala emyaka musanvu mu bufumbo." 
Luke2:37 Okuva olwo yali yaakamala emyaka kinaana mu ena nga nnamwandu. Teyavanga mu Ssinzizo. Emisana n'ekiro yabeeranga mu kuweereza Katonda na mu kumwegayirira, era ng'asiiba." 
Luke2:38 Awo n'atuuka mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini, n'atendereza Katonda. Era abo bonna abaali balindirira okununulwa kwa Yerusaalemu, n'ababuulira ebifa ku mwana ono." 
Luke2:39 Bwe baamala okutuukiriza byonna ebiragirwa mu tteeka lya Mukama, ne baddayo e Galilaaya mu kibuga ky'ewaabwe, e Nazaareeti." 
Luke2:40 Awo omwana ne yeeyongera okukula, n'aba wa maanyi, ng'ajjudde amagezi n'emikisa gya Katonda." 
Luke2:41 Abazadde ba Yesu baagendanga buli mwaka e Yerusaalemu, ku Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako." 
Luke2:42 Yesu bwe yaweza emyaka ekkumi n'ebiri, ne bambuka e Yerusaalemu nga bwe baakolanga mu kiseera eky'Embaga." 
Luke2:43 Bwe baali baddayo ewaabwe, ng'ennaku ez'Embaga ziweddeko, omwana Yesu n'asigala mu Yerusaalemu, bazadde be nga tebategedde." 
Luke2:44 Bwe baamala okutambula olugendo lwa lunaku lulamba, nga balowooza nti ali mu kibiina ky'abantu be baali batambula nabo, olwo ne bamunoonya mu baganda baabwe ne mu mikwano gyabwe." 
Luke2:45 Bwe bataamuzuula, ne baddayo e Yerusaalemu nga bamunoonya." 
Luke2:46 Waayitawo ennaku ssatu, ne bamuzuula mu Ssinzizo, ng'atudde n'abayigiriza, ng'abawuliriza era ng'ababuuza ebibuuzo." 
Luke2:47 Bonna abaamuwuliriza, beewuunya olw'amagezi ge n'okuddamu kwe." 
Luke2:48 Bazadde be bwe baamulaba, ne bawuniikirira. Nnyina n'amugamba nti: “Mwana wange, lwaki otukoze bw'oti? Kitaawo nange tubadde tukunoonya nga tweraliikirira.”" 
Luke2:49 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Lwaki mubadde munnoonya? Temumanyi nti nteekwa okukola ku bya Kitange?” 
Luke2:50 Naye bo ne batategeera ky'abagambye. 
Luke2:51 Awo n'aserengeta nabo e Nazaareeti, era n'abawuliranga. Nnyina n'akuumanga bino byonna mu mutima gwe." 
Luke2:52 Awo Yesu ne yeeyongera okukula, era ne yeeyongera mu magezi n'okusiimibwa Katonda n'abantu." 
Luke3:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'etaano ogw'obufuzi bwa Kayisaari Tiberiyo, nga Pontiyo Pilaato ye afuga Buyudaaya, nga Herode ye afuga Galilaaya, nga muganda we Filipo ye afuga ekitundu eky'e Yituraya ne Trakoniti; nga Lisaniya ye afuga Abileene," 
Luke3:2 nga Anna ne Kayaafa be bassaabakabona, Yowanne mutabani wa Zakariya yali mu ddungu, n'afuna ekigambo kya Katonda." 
Luke3:3 Olwo n'atambula okubuna ekitundu kyonna ekiriraanye Omugga Yorudaani, ng'agamba abantu nti: “Mwenenye, mubatizibwe, Katonda abasonyiwe ebibi byammwe.”" 
Luke3:4 Bino byabaawo nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'ebigambo bya Yisaaya omulanzi nti: “Waliwo eddoboozi ly'oyo ayogerera mu ddungu n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: ‘Mulongoose oluguudo lwa Mukama, mutereeze amakubo ge." 
Luke3:5 Buli kiwonvu kijjuzibwe; buli lusozi na buli kasozi biseeteezebwe. Amakubo amakyamu gagololwe, n'agalimu ebisirikko gatereezebwe." 
Luke3:6 Olwo abantu bonna bajja kulaba nga Katonda bw'abalokola.’ ” 
Luke3:7 Abantu bangi nnyo baagendanga eri Yowanne ababatize, ye n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe abaana b'emisota egy'obusagwa, ani abalabudde nti eno y'engeri ey'okudduka obusungu bwa Katonda obugenda okujja?" 
Luke3:8 Mukole nno ebikolwa ebiraga nti mwenenyezza ebibi byammwe. Mulekere awo okweyinula nti tulina kitaffe Aburahamu, kubanga mbagamba nti Katonda asobola okufunira Aburahamu abazzukulu, ng'abaggya mu mayinja gano." 
Luke3:9 Mufaanaanyirizibwa n'emiti. Kati embazzi eteekeddwa ku kikolo kya buli muti. Ogwo ogutabala bibala birungi gujja kutemebwa, era gusuulibwe mu muliro.”" 
Luke3:10 Awo abantu ne bamubuuza nti: “Kale tukole ki?” 
Luke3:11 N'abaddamu nti: “Alina engoye ebbiri aweeko atalina, era alina emmere naye akole bw'atyo.”" 
Luke3:12 Abasolooza b'omusolo nabo ne bajja okubatizibwa, ne bamubuuza nti: “Omuyigiriza, ffe tukole ki?”" 
Luke3:13 N'abaddamu nti: “Temusoloozanga kinene okusinga ekibalagirwa.” 
Luke3:14 Abaserikale nabo ne bamubuuza nti: “Ate ffe tukole ki?” N'abagamba nti: “Abantu temubanyagangako byabwe, era temubawaayirizanga misango gye batazzizza. Mukomenga ku kufuna misaala gyammwe gyokka.”" 
Luke3:15 Awo abantu bonna ne batandika okulowooza mu mitima gyabwe nti Yowanne, oba oli awo ye Kristo." 
Luke3:16 Yowanne n'ategeeza bonna nti: “Nze mbabatiza na mazzi, naye waliwo ansinga obuyinza ajja okujja, gwe sisaanira na kusumulula buguwa bwa ngatto ze. Ye, alibabatiza na Mwoyo Mutuukirivu era na muliro." 
Luke3:17 Akutte mu ngalo ekibbo ekiwewa, ayawule empeke n'ebisusunku, empeke azikuŋŋaanyize mu tterekero lye, ate byo ebisusunku abyokye omuliro ogutazikira.”" 
Luke3:18 Bw'atyo Yowanne, yayigirizanga abantu mu ngeri nnyingi, ng'abategeeza Amawulire Amalungi." 
Luke3:19 Era yanenya omufuzi Herode, olwa Herodiya muka muganda we, n'olw'ebibi ebirala byonna Herode bye yakola." 
Luke3:20 Ate ku ebyo byonna, Herode n'ayongerako n'eky'okuggalira Yowanne mu kkomera." 
Luke3:21 Awo olwatuuka, abantu abalala bonna bwe baali nga bamaze okubatizibwa, Yesu naye ng'abatiziddwa, era bwe yali ng'asinza Katonda, eggulu ne libikkuka," 
Luke3:22 era Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, ng'afaananira ddala ejjiba, n'akka ku ye. Era eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu, ne ligamba nti: “Ggwe Mwana wange omwagalwa, era gwe nsiimira ddala.” 9:35" 
Luke3:23 Yesu yatandika omulimu gwe ogw'okuyigiriza, ng'aweza emyaka ng'amakumi asatu, abantu nga bamuyita mutabani wa Yosefu. Yosefu ono yali mutabani wa Eli," 
Luke3:24 Eli mutabani wa Mattati, Mattati mutabani wa Leevi, Leevi mutabani wa Meleki, Meleki mutabani wa Yannayi, Yannayi mutabani wa Yosefu," 
Luke3:25 Yosefu mutabani wa Mattatiya, Mattatiya mutabani wa Amosi, Amosi mutabani wa Nawumu, Nawumu mutabani wa Esili, Esili mutabani wa Nangayi." 
Luke3:26 Nangayi yali mutabani wa Maati, Maati mutabani wa Mattatiya, Mattatiya mutabani wa Semeeyi, Semeeyi mutabani wa Yoseki, Yoseki mutabani wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 Yoda mutabani wa Yowanani, Yowanani mutabani wa Resa, Resa mutabani wa Zerubabbeeli, Zerubabbeeli mutabani wa Seyalutiyeli, Seyalutiyeli mutabani wa Neri," 
Luke3:28 Neri mutabani wa Meleki, Meleki mutabani wa Addi, Addi mutabani wa Kosamu, Kosamu mutabani wa Elimadamu, Elimadamu mutabani wa Eri." 
Luke3:29 Eri yali mutabani wa Yeswa, Yeswa mutabani wa Eliyezeeri, Eliyezeeri mutabani wa Yorimu, Yorimu mutabani wa Mattati, Mattati mutabani wa Leevi," 
Luke3:30 Leevi mutabani wa Simyoni, Simyoni mutabani wa Yuda, Yuda mutabani wa Yosefu, Yosefu mutabani wa Yonamu, Yonamu mutabani wa Eliyakimu," 
Luke3:31 Eliyakimu mutabani wa Meleya, Meleya mutabani wa Menna, Menna mutabani wa Mattata, Mattata mutabani wa Natani, Natani mutabani wa Dawudi," 
Luke3:32 Dawudi mutabani wa Yesse, Yesse mutabani wa Yobedi, Yobedi mutabani wa Bowaazi, Bowaazi mutabani wa Salumooni, Salumooni mutabani wa Nasoni." 
Luke3:33 Nasoni yali mutabani wa Amminadabu, Amminadabu mutabani wa Adimiini, Adimiini mutabani wa Aruni, Aruni mutabani wa Hezirooni, Hezirooni mutabani wa Pereezi, Pereezi mutabani wa Yuda," 
Luke3:34 Yuda mutabani wa Yakobo, Yakobo mutabani wa Yisaaka, Yisaaka mutabani wa Aburahamu, Aburahamu mutabani wa Teera, Teera mutabani wa Nahori," 
Luke3:35 Nahori mutabani wa Serugi, Serugi mutabani wa Rewu, Rewu mutabani wa Pelegi, Pelegi mutabani wa Eberi, Eberi mutabani wa Seela." 
Luke3:36 Seela yali mutabani wa Kayinaani, Kayinaani mutabani wa Arupakusaadi, Arupakusaadi mutabani wa Seemu, Seemu mutabani wa Noowa, Noowa mutabani wa Lameka." 
Luke3:37 Lameka mutabani wa Metuseela, Metuseela mutabani wa Enoka, Enoka mutabani wa Yaredi, Yaredi, mutabani wa Malaleeli, Malaleeli mutabani wa Kayinaani," 
Luke3:38 Kayinaani mutabani wa Enosi, Enosi mutabani wa Seeti, Seeti mutabani wa Adamu, Adamu mutabani wa Katonda." 
Luke4:1 Awo Yesu ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'avaayo ku Mugga Yorudaani, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'amutwala mu ddungu," 
Luke4:2 n'amalayo ennaku amakumi ana ng'akemebwa Sitaani. Mu nnaku ezo teyalyanga n'akatono. Awo bwe zaggwaako, enjala n'emuluma." 
Luke4:3 Sitaani n'amugamba nti: “Oba nga ddala oli Mwana wa Katonda, lagira ejjinja lino lifuuke emmere.”" 
Luke4:4 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Omuntu taba mulamu na mmere yokka.’ ” 
Luke4:5 Awo Sitaani n'alinnyisa Yesu waggulu, era mu kaseera buseera n'amulaga obwakabaka bwonna obw'oku nsi." 
Luke4:6 N'amugamba nti: “Nja kukuwa obuyinza okufuga amawanga gano gonna era nkuwe n'ebirungi byonna ebigalimu. Byonna byampeebwa, era gwe njagala gwe mbigabira." 
Luke4:7 Kale nno ggwe singa ofukamira mu maaso gange n'onsinza, byonna bijja kuba bibyo.”" 
Luke4:8 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Osinzanga Mukama Katonda wo, era gw'oweerezanga yekka.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Awo Sitaani n'atwala Yesu e Yerusaalemu, n'amuteeka ku kitikkiro ky'Essinzizo, n'amugamba nti: “Oba nga ddala oli Mwana wa Katonda, sinziira wano, weesuule wansi eri," 
Luke4:10 kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Katonda aliragira bamalayika be bakulabirire;’ 
Luke4:11 era nti: ‘Balikuwanirira mu mikono gyabwe, oleme okwekoona ekigere ku jjinja.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Tokemanga Mukama Katonda wo.’ ” 
Luke4:13 Sitaani ng'amaze okukema Yesu mu buli ngeri, n'amuleka okumala ekiseera." 
Luke4:14 Awo Yesu n'addayo mu Galilaaya ng'amaanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu gali naye. Ettutumu lye ne libuna mu kitundu ekyo kyonna. 
Luke4:15 N'ayigirizanga mu makuŋŋaaniro gaabwe, bonna ne bamutendereza." 
Luke4:16 Awo Yesu n'ajja e Nazaareeti gye yakulira. Ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato, n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro, nga bwe yali amanyidde okukola. N'asituka okusoma ebyawandiikibwa." 
Luke4:17 Ne bamukwasa ekitabo kya Yisaaya omulanzi. Bwe yakibikkula, n'atuuka awawandiikiddwa nti:" 
Luke4:18 “Omwoyo gwa Mukama guli ku nze, kubanga yanjawula okutegeeza abaavu Amawulire Amalungi. Yantuma okutegeeza abasibe nti bajja kuteebwa, ne bamuzibe nti bajja kulaba. Era yantuma okuwonya abanyigirizibwa," 
Luke4:19 n'okulangirira ekiseera kya Mukama eky'okukwatirwamu abantu ekisa.” 
Luke4:20 Awo Yesu bwe yabikkako ekitabo, n'akiddiza omuweereza, era n'atuula. Abantu bonna mu kkuŋŋaaniro ne bamusimba amaaso." 
Luke4:21 Awo n'atandika okubagamba nti: “Olwaleero kino ekyawandiikibwa kye muwulidde, kituukiridde.”" 
Luke4:22 Bonna ne bamusemba, era ne beewuunya olw'ebigambo ebirungi bye yayogera, ne bagamba nti: “Ono si ye mutabani wa Yosefu?”" 
Luke4:23 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Ddala mujja kundeetera olugero olugamba nti: ‘Omusawo, weewonye.’ Era mujja kuŋŋamba nti: ‘Bye wakolera e Kafarunawumu, bye twawulira, bikolere na wano mu kibuga ky'ewammwe.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Era n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti tewali mulanzi ayanirizibwa mu kitundu ky'ewaabwe. 
Luke4:25 Naye ge mbagamba ge mazima nti mu mirembe gya Eliya waaliwo bannamwandu bangi mu Yisirayeli. Mu biseera ebyo, eggulu lyesiba, enkuba n'etetonnya okumala emyaka esatu n'emyezi mukaaga, enjala n'egwa nnyingi mu nsi yonna." 
Luke4:26 Kyokka Eliya teyatumibwa wadde ew'omu ku bo, wabula yatumibwa wa nnamwandu e Sareputa mu nsi y'e Sidoni." 
Luke4:27 Era mu mirembe gya Elisa omulanzi waaliwo abagenge bangi mu Yisirayeli, kyokka tewaali n'omu ku bo yawonyezebwa, wabula Naamani yekka Omusiriya.”" 
Luke4:28 Abantu bonna abaali mu kkuŋŋaaniro bwe baawulira ebyo, ne bajjula obusungu," 
Luke4:29 ne basituka, ne bamuggya mu kibuga nga bamusindiikiriza, ne bamutwala ku kagulungujjo k'olusozi olwazimbibwako ekibuga kyabwe, balyoke bamukasuke wansi." 
Luke4:30 Kyokka Yesu n'abayitamu wakati, n'agenda." 
Luke4:31 Awo Yesu n'agenda e Kafarunawumu, ekibuga eky'omu Galilaaya. Ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato n'abayigiriza." 
Luke4:32 Ne beewuunya nnyo engeri gye yayigirizaamu: yayigiriza nga nnannyinibuyinza. 
Luke4:33 Mu kkuŋŋaaniro mwalimu omuntu eyaliko omwoyo omubi, n'aleekaana nnyo nti:" 
Luke4:34 “Otulanga ki ggwe Yesu Omunazaareeti? Ozze okutuzikiriza? Nkumanyi. Ggwe Mutuukirivu wa Katonda.” 
Luke4:35 Yesu n'aboggolera omwoyo omubi nti: “Sirika mangu, n'omuntu ono muveeko.” Omwoyo omubi bwe gwamala okusuula omuntu oyo wakati waabwe, ne gumuvaako nga tegulina kabi konna ke gumukoze." 
Luke4:36 Bonna ne batya, ne beebuuzaganya nti: “Ekigambo kye kya ngeri ki? Olaba emyoyo emibi agiragiza maanyi na buyinza ne giva ku bantu!”" 
Luke4:37 Ettutumu lye ne libuna wonna wonna mu kitundu ekyo. 
Luke4:38 Awo Yesu n'ava mu kkuŋŋaaniro, n'ayingira mu nnyumba ya Simooni. Nnyina muka Simooni yali alwadde omusujja mungi. Ne beegayirira Yesu amuwonye." 
Luke4:39 Yesu n'agenda n'ayimirira awali omulwadde, n'alagira omusujja ne guwona. Amangwago abadde omulwadde n'ayimuka, n'atandika okubaweereza." 
Luke4:40 Enjuba ng'egudde, bonna abaalina abalwadde ab'endwadde eza buli ngeri, ne babaleeta awali Yesu, n'akwata ku buli mulwadde n'amuwonya." 
Luke4:41 Emyoyo emibi nagyo ne giva ku bantu bangi, nga gireekaana nti: “Ggwe Mwana wa Katonda!” Yesu n'agiboggolera, n'atagikkiriza kwogera, kubanga gyali gimumanyi nti ye Kristo." 
Luke4:42 Obudde bwe bwakya, Yesu n'alaga mu kifo ekitaalimu bantu. Abantu bangi ne bamunoonya okutuusa lwe baamulaba, era ne bagezaako okumuziyiza aleme okubavaako." 
Luke4:43 Kyokka ye n'abagamba nti: “Ebibuga ebirala nabyo nteekwa okubitegeeza Amawulire Amalungi agafa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda, kubanga natumibwa lwa nsonga eyo.”" 
Luke4:44 Awo n'ategeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda mu makuŋŋaaniro g'omu Buyudaaya. 
Luke5:1 Lwali lumu, Yesu bwe yali ayimiridde ku lubalama lw'ennyanja Gennesareeti, abantu bangi ne bajja nga basindikagana, batuuke w'ali okuwulira ekigambo kya Katonda." 
Luke5:2 Yesu n'alaba amaato abiri nga gali awo ku lubalama, ng'abavubi bagavuddemu era nga booza obutimba bwabwe." 
Luke5:3 Awo n'asaabala mu limu ku maato ago, eryali erya Simooni, n'asaba Simooni alisembezeeyo katono okuva ku lukalu, n'ayigiriza abantu ng'atudde mu lyo." 
Luke5:4 Bwe yamaliriza okwogera, n'agamba Simooni nti: “Eryato lyongereyo ebuziba, mutege obutimba bwammwe, mukwase ebyennyanja.”" 
Luke5:5 Simooni n'amugamba nti: “Mukama wange, ekiro kyonna twateganye ne tutakwasa kantu. Naye olw'okubanga olagidde, obutimba ka mbutege.”" 
Luke5:6 Awo bwe baabutega, ne bakwasa ebyennyanja bingi nnyo, era obutimba bwabwe ne buba kumpi okukutuka." 
Luke5:7 Ne bawenya ku bannaabwe abaali mu lyato eddala, bajje babayambe. Ne bajja, ne bajjuza amaato gombi ebyennyanja, ne gaba kumpi okusaanawo." 
Luke5:8 Simooni Peetero bwe yalaba kino, n'afukamira kumpi n'ebigere bya Yesu, n'agamba nti: “Ndeka Mukama wange, kubanga nze ndi muntu mwonoonyi!”" 
Luke5:9 Peetero yayogera bw'atyo kubanga ye ne bonna be yali nabo, baali bakwatiddwa entiisa olw'obungi bw'ebyennyanja bye baakwasa." 
Luke5:10 Mu ngeri ye emu Yakobo ne Yowanne, batabani ba Zebedaayo, era banne ba Simooni, ne bakwatibwa entiisa. Awo Yesu n'agamba Simooni nti: “Totya, okuva kati, ojja kuba muvubi wa bantu.”" 
Luke5:11 Bwe baakomyawo amaato gaabwe ku lukalu, ne baleka byonna, ne bagenda ne Yesu." 
Luke5:12 Lwali lumu, Yesu bwe yali mu kibuga ekimu, ne wajjawo omusajja ajjudde ebigenge. Bwe yalaba Yesu, n'afukamira, n'amwegayirira nti: “Ssebo, singa oyagala, oyinza okumponya.”" 
Luke5:13 Yesu n'agolola omukono n'amukwatako, n'agamba nti: “Njagala, wona.” Amangwago ebigenge ne bimuwonako." 
Luke5:14 Yesu n'amugaana okubuulirako omuntu n'omu, wabula n'amulagira nti: “Genda weeyanjule ewa kabona, oweeyo ekirabo nga Musa bwe yalagira, balyoke bakakase nti owonye.”" 
Luke5:15 Kyokka ettutumu lya Yesu ne lyeyongera bweyongezi okubuna, era abantu bangi nnyo ne bakuŋŋaananga okumuwuliriza, era n'okuwonyezebwa endwadde zaabwe." 
Luke5:16 Wabula emirundi egimu Yesu yavangawo, n'alaga mu bifo ebitaalimu bantu, n'asinza Katonda." 
Luke5:17 Awo, ku lunaku olumu, Yesu bwe yali ng'ayigiriza, waaliwo Abafarisaayo n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka nga batudde awo. Baali bavudde mu byalo byonna eby'e Galilaaya n'eby'e Buyudaaya era ne mu kibuga Yerusaalemu. Amaanyi ga Katonda gaali ne Yesu, ne gamusobozesa okuwonya abalwadde." 
Luke5:18 Awo ne wajjawo abasajja abaaleeta omuntu akonvubye. Baamuleetera ku katanda, ne bagezaako okumuyingiza n'okumuteeka awali Yesu." 
Luke5:19 Olw'obungi bw'abantu, ne balemwa okuzuula we bamuyisa okumuyingiza. Ne balinnya waggulu ku kasolya k'ennyumba, ne bakasereekululako ekitundu, ne bamuyisa mu mwagaanya ogwo ng'ali ku katanda, ne bamussa mu bantu wakati awali Yesu." 
Luke5:20 Yesu bwe yalaba nga balina okukkiriza, n'agamba nti: “Mwana wange, ebibi byo mbikusonyiye.”" 
Luke5:21 Awo abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo ne batandika okwebuuzaganya nti: “Ono ye ani? Yeeyita Katonda? Ggwe kale ani alina obuyinza okusonyiwa ebibi, okuggyako Katonda yekka?”" 
Luke5:22 Yesu bwe yamanya ebirowoozo byabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Mwebuuza ki mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Luke5:23 Ekisingako obwangu kye kiruwa: okugamba nti ‘Ebibi byo mbikusonyiye,’ oba nti: ‘Yimirira, otambule?’" 
Luke5:24 Kaakano ka mbalage nti Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi okusonyiwa ebibi.” Awo n'agamba akonvubye nti: “Yimirira, weetikke akatanda ko, oddeyo ewammwe.”" 
Luke5:25 Amangwago omusajja n'ayimirira, bonna nga balaba, n'asitula akatanda kw'abadde agalamidde, n'addayo ewuwe ng'agulumiza Katonda." 
Luke5:26 Bonna ne beewuunya, ne bagulumiza Katonda, era entiisa n'ebakwata, ne bagamba nti: “Olwaleero tulabye ebyewuunyisa!”" 
Luke5:27 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yesu n'ava mu kifo ekyo, n'alaba omusolooza w'omusolo ayitibwa Leevi, ng'atudde we basolooleza omusolo. Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Jjangu, oyitenga nange.”" 
Luke5:28 Leevi n'asituka, n'aleka awo byonna, n'amugoberera." 
Luke5:29 Era mu maka ge, n'afumbira Yesu embaga nnene. Abasolooza b'omusolo bangi nnyo era n'abantu abalala ne batuula ne balya wamu nabo." 
Luke5:30 Abafarisaayo n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka ne beemulugunya nga bagamba abayigirizwa ba Yesu nti: “Lwaki muliira era ne munywera wamu n'abasolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi?” 
Luke5:31 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Abalamu tebeetaaga musawo, wabula abalwadde." 
Luke5:32 Abalungi si be najja okuyita beenenye, wabula aboonoonyi.”" 
Luke5:33 Awo abantu abamu ne bagamba Yesu nti: “Abayigirizwa ba Yowanne basiiba emirundi mingi era ne beegayirira Katonda, n'abayigirizwa b'Abafarisaayo nabo bwe bakola, naye ababo balya era banywa.”" 
Luke5:34 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Abayite ku mbaga y'obugole temuyinza kubagaana kulya, ng'awasizza omugole akyali nabo." 
Luke5:35 Naye ekiseera kijja kutuuka, awasizza omugole abaggyibweko. Olwo nno balitandika okusiiba.”" 
Luke5:36 Era n'abagerera olugero nti: “Omuntu tayuza kiwero mu lugoye luggya n'akitunga mu lugoye lukadde. Singa akola kino, olugoye oluggya alussaamu ekituli, ate olugoye olukadde ne lutasaaniramu kiwero kiggya." 
Luke5:37 Era omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omusu tegufukibwa mu nsawo zaagwo ez'amaliba enkadde. Singa kino kikolebwa, guzaabya, omwenge ogwo n'ensawo n'obifiirwa." 
Luke5:38 Wabula omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omusu, gufukibwa mu nsawo zaagwo ez'amaliba empya." 
Luke5:39 N'ekirala, omuntu amanyidde okunywa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omukulu, tayagala musu, kubanga agamba nti: ‘Omukulu gwe gusinga okuwooma.’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Awo olwatuuka, ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato, Yesu bwe yali ng'ayita mu nnimiro z'eŋŋaano, abayigirizwa be ne banoga ku birimba, ne babikunya mu bibatu byabwe, ne balya." 
Luke6:2 Abafarisaayo abamu ne bagamba nti: “Lwaki mukola ekitakkirizibwa okukolebwa ku Sabbaato?” 
Luke6:3 Awo Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Temusomangako Dawudi kye yakola, ye ne be yali nabo bwe baalumwa enjala?" 
Luke6:4 Yayingira mu Nnyumba ya Katonda, n'atoola n'alya ku migaati egyali giweereddwayo eri Katonda, era n'awaako n'abaali naye, sso nga kyali tekikkirizibwa emigaati egyo okuliibwako abantu abalala, wabula bakabona bokka.”" 
Luke6:5 Awo Yesu n'agamba Abafarisaayo nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza okusalawo ekisaanye okukolebwa ku Sabbaato.” 
Luke6:6 Ku Sabbaato endala, Yesu n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro, n'ayigiriza. Mu kkuŋŋaaniro mwalimu omuntu ow'omukono ogwa ddyo ogukaze." 
Luke6:7 Abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo ne beekaliriza Yesu amaaso, balabe oba ng'era anaawonya ku Sabbaato, balyoke bafune ensonga kwe banaasinziira okumuwawaabira." 
Luke6:8 Yesu yamanya ebirowoozo byabwe, n'agamba omuntu ow'omukono ogukaze nti: “Situka oyimirire bonna we bayinza okukulabira.” N'asituka n'ayimirira awo." 
Luke6:9 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mbabuuza mmwe: kiki ekikkirizibwa ku Sabbaato? Kukola bulungi, oba bubi? Kuwonya bulamu, oba kubuzikiriza?”" 
Luke6:10 Awo bonna n'abeebunguluza amaaso, n'agamba omuntu oyo nti: “Omukono gwo gugolole.” N'agugolola, ne guwonera ddala." 
Luke6:11 Naye abalabe ba Yesu ne bajjula obusungu, ne beebuuzaganya kye banaakola Yesu." 
Luke6:12 Awo mu nnaku ezo, Yesu n'alaga ku lusozi okusinza Katonda, n'amala ekiro kyonna ng'asinza." 
Luke6:13 Obudde bwe bwakya, n'ayita abayigirizwa be. Mu bo n'alondamu kkumi na babiri, n'abafuula abatume," 
Luke6:14 be bano: Simooni, gwe yatuuma Peetero, ne Andereya muganda wa Simooni oyo, ne Yakobo, ne Yowanne, ne Filipo, ne Barutolomaayo," 
Luke6:15 ne Matayo, ne Tomasi, ne Yakobo mutabani wa Alufaayo, ne Simooni ayitibwa Omulwanirizi w'eddembe ly'eggwanga lye," 
Luke6:16 ne Yuda muganda wa Yakobo, ne Yuda Yisikaryoti, eyamulyamu olukwe." 
Luke6:17 Awo Yesu n'aserengeta nabo, n'ayimirira mu kifo eky'omuseetwe, awaali wakuŋŋaanidde abayigirizwa be abangi n'abantu abalala bangi nnyo, abaava mu Buyudaaya bwonna ne mu kibuga Yerusaalemu, era ne mu kitundu eky'olubalama lw'ennyanja, ekirimu ebibuga Tiiro ne Sidoni." 
Luke6:18 Abantu bano bonna bajja okumuwuliriza era n'okuwonyezebwa endwadde zaabwe. Era abo abaali bateganyizibwa emyoyo emibi, ne bawonyezebwa." 
Luke6:19 Abantu bonna baagezangako okumukwatako, kubanga obuyinza bwavanga mu ye ne buwonya bonna." 
Luke6:20 Awo Yesu n'atunuulira abayigirizwa be, n'agamba nti: “Muli ba mukisa abaavu, kubanga Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bwammwe." 
Luke6:21 “Muli ba mukisa abalumwa enjala kaakano, kubanga mulikkusibwa. “Muli ba mukisa abakaaba kaakano, kubanga mulisanyuka." 
Luke6:22 “Muli ba mukisa abantu bwe banaabakyawanga, bwe banaabagobaganyanga, bwe banaabavumanga era bwe banaabayitanga ababi, nga babalanga Omwana w'Omuntu." 
Luke6:23 Musanyuke nga babayisizza bwe batyo, era mubuuke olw'essanyu, kubanga empeera yammwe mu ggulu nnene. Bwe batyo ne bajjajjaabwe bwe baayisa abalanzi." 
Luke6:24 “Naye mmwe abagagga, muli ba kubonaabona, kubanga essanyu lyammwe mumaze okulifuna." 
Luke6:25 “Mmwe kaakano abakkuse, muli ba kubonaabona, kubanga mulirumwa enjala. Mwe kaakano abaseka, muli ba kubonaabona kubanga mulinakuwala era mulikaaba." 
Luke6:26 “Muli ba kubonaabona mmwe, abantu bwe banaabatendanga, kubanga ne bajjajjaabwe bwe batyo bwe baatendanga abalanzi ab'obulimba." 
Luke6:27 “Naye abampuliriza mbagamba nti: mwagalenga abalabe bammwe, mukolerenga bulungi ababakyawa." 
Luke6:28 Musabirenga omukisa abo ababakolimira. Ababavuma mubasabirenga eri Katonda. 
Luke6:29 Omuntu bw'akukubanga ku ttama, omukyusizanga n'eddala. Era omuntu bw'akuggyangako ekkooti yo, omulekeranga n'ekkanzu." 
Luke6:30 Buli abangako ky'akusaba omuwanga, n'oyo akuggyangako ebibyo, tomusabanga kubikuddiza." 
Luke6:31 Mukolerenga abalala ebyo nammwe bye mwagala babakolere. 
Luke6:32 “Singa mwagala abo bokka ababaagala mmwe, muba mukoze ki ekibasiimisa? Aboonoonyi nabo baagala abo ababaagala!" 
Luke6:33 Era singa mukolera bulungi abo bokka ababakolera mmwe ebirungi, muba mukoze ki ekibasiimisa? Aboonoonyi nabo kye bakola!" 
Luke6:34 Era singa muwola abo bokka be musuubira okubasasula, muba mukoze ki ekibasiimisa? Aboonoonyi nabo bawola boonoonyi bannaabwe, nga ba kusasulwa kyonna kye bawoze." 
Luke6:35 Naye mmwe mwagalenga abalabe bammwe, era mubakolerenga ebirungi. Muwolenga nga temusuubira kusasulwa. Olwo empeera yammwe eriba nnene, era muliba baana ba Katonda Atenkanika, kubanga ye wa kisa eri abatasiima n'ababi." 
Luke6:36 Mube ba kisa nga Kitammwe bw'ali ow'ekisa. 
Luke6:37 “Temusalanga musango, nammwe tegulibasalirwa. Temusaliranga balala musango kubasinga, nammwe tegulibasalirwa kubasinga. Musonyiwenga, nammwe mulisonyiyibwa." 
Luke6:38 Mugabenga, nammwe muligabirwa. Bye mulifuna biribapimirwa mu kipimo ekituufu ekikkatiddwa, ne kisuukundibwa, ne kijjulira ddala ne kibooga. Ekipimo kye mukozesa okupimira abalala, era kye kirikozesebwa okupimira mmwe.”" 
Luke6:39 Awo Yesu n'abagerera olugero, nti: “Muzibe takulembera muzibe munne. Singa amukulembera, bombi bagwa mu bunnya." 
Luke6:40 Ayigirizibwa tasinga amuyigiriza, wabula buli ayigirizibwa bw'amala okuyigirizibwa obulungi, aba ng'oyo amuyigirizza." 
Luke6:41 “Lwaki otunuulira akasubi akali ku liiso lya muganda wo, kyokka n'otofa ku kisiki ekiri ku liryo?" 
Luke6:42 Oyinza otya okugamba muganda wo nti: ‘Muganda wange, leka nzigye akasubi ku liiso lyo’, sso nga ggwe wennyini tofa ku kisiki ekiri ku liryo? Mukuusa ggwe, sooka oggye ekisiki ku liiso eriryo, olwo olyoke osobole okulaba obulungi, n'okuggya akasubi ku liiso lya muganda wo." 
Luke6:43 “Omuti omulungi tegubala bibala bibi, n'omuti omubi tegubala bibala birungi." 
Luke6:44 Buli muti gumanyirwa ku bibala byagwo. Ebibala by'omutiini tebabinoga ku busaana, n'ebibala by'emizabbibu tebabinoga ku kawule." 
Luke6:45 “Omuntu omulungi, aggya ku birungi ebiri mu mutima gwe okukola ebirungi, n'omuntu omubi, aggya ku bibi ebiri mu mutima gwe, okukola ebibi. Ebijjula mu mutima gw'omuntu, akamwa ke bye koogera." 
Luke6:46 “Lwaki mumpita nti: ‘Mukama waffe, Mukama waffe’, ate ne mutakola bye mbagamba?" 
Luke6:47 Buli ajja gye ndi, n'awuliriza ebigambo byange, era n'abikolerako, ka mbalage nga bw'afaanana." 
Luke6:48 Afaanana ng'omuntu eyazimba ennyumba ng'asimye omusingi, ne gukka nnyo wansi okutuuka ku lwazi. Omugga bwe gwajjula ne gwalaala, ne gukuluggukira awali ennyumba eyo, kyokka ne gutasobola kuginyeenya, kubanga yazimbibwa bulungi." 
Luke6:49 Wabula omuntu awulira ebigambo byange n'atabikolerako, afaanana ng'omuntu eyazimba ku ttaka eryokungulu nga tasimye musingi. Omugga bwe gwakuluggukira w'eri, n'egwa amangwago, n'emenyekerawo ddala.”" 
Luke7:1 Yesu bwe yamaliriza ebigambo byonna bye yayagala okutegeeza abamuwuliriza, n'ayingira mu kibuga Kafarunawumu." 
Luke7:2 Waaliwo Omurooma omukulu w'ekitongole ky'abaserikale, eyalina omuddu we gwe yali ayagala ennyo. Omuddu oyo yali mulwadde, ng'ali kumpi okufa." 
Luke7:3 Omukulu w'ekitongole ky'abaserikale bwe yawulira ebifa ku Yesu, n'amutumira abamu ku Bayudaaya abakulu, ng'amusaba ajje awonye omuddu we." 
Luke7:4 Nabo bwe baatuuka awali Yesu, ne bamwegayirira nnyo nga bagamba nti: “Omusajja oyo asaanira omukolere ky'akusaba," 
Luke7:5 kubanga ayagala abantu b'eggwanga lyaffe, era yatuzimbira ekkuŋŋaaniro.”" 
Luke7:6 Awo Yesu n'agenda nabo. Bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okutuuka ku nnyumba, omukulu w'ekitongole oyo n'atuma banne okumugamba nti: “Ssebo, leka kweteganya, kubanga sisaanira ggwe okuyingira mu nnyumba yange," 
Luke7:7 era kye navudde ndowooza nti sisaanira kujja gy'oli nze nzennyini. Wabula yogera bwogezi kigambo, omuddu wange anaawona." 
Luke7:8 Nange ndi muntu alina bakama bange abanfuga, era nga nnina abaserikale be ntwala. Bwe ŋŋamba ono nti: ‘Genda,’ agenda; n'omulala nti: ‘Jjangu,’ ajja; n'omuddu wange nti: ‘Kola kino,’ akikola.”" 
Luke7:9 Yesu bwe yawulira ebyo, n'amwewuunya. N'akyukira ekibiina ky'abantu ekyali kimugoberera, n'agamba nti: “Mbagamba nti sisanganga alina kukkiriza nga kuno, wadde mu Bayisirayeli!”" 
Luke7:10 Abaali batumiddwa bwe batuuka mu maka ge, ne basanga ng'omuddu we awonye." 
Luke7:11 Awo olwatuuka, nga wayiseewo ekiseera kitono, Yesu n'alaga mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Nayini, abayigirizwa be n'abantu abalala bangi ne bagenda naye." 
Luke7:12 Bwe yali ng'atuuka ku mulyango gw'ekibuga, ne wavaayo abantu abaali bafulumya omulambo gw'omuvubuka, eyali omwana omu yekka ow'omukazi nnamwandu. Abantu bangi nnyo ab'omu kibuga baali ne nnamwandu oyo." 
Luke7:13 Mukama waffe bwe yamulaba, n'amukwatirwa ekisa, n'amugamba nti: “Tokaaba.”" 
Luke7:14 Olwo n'asembera n'akwata ku katanda akasituliddwako omulambo. Abaali bagusitudde ne bayimirira. Yesu n'agamba nti: “Omuvubuka, nkulagira, golokoka.”" 
Luke7:15 Eyali afudde n'atuula, n'atandika okwogera. Yesu n'amuddiza nnyina." 
Luke7:16 Bonna ne bakwatibwa entiisa era ne bagulumiza Katonda nga bagamba nti: “Omulanzi omukulu alabise mu ffe, era Katonda azze okulokola abantu be.”" 
Luke7:17 Awo ettutumu lya Yesu ne libuna mu Buyudaaya bwonna ne mu kitundu ekiriraanyeewo. 
Luke7:18 Awo abayigirizwa ba Yowanne ne bamubuulira ebyo byonna. Yowanne n'ayita babiri ku bo," 
Luke7:19 n'abatuma eri Mukama waffe, okumubuuza nti: “Ggwe wuuyo gwe tulindirira okujja, oba tulindirire mulala?”" 
Luke7:20 Abasajja abo bwe baatuuka awali Yesu, ne bagamba nti: “Yowanne Omubatiza atutumye gy'oli ng'abuuza nti: ‘Ggwe wuuyo gwe tulindirira okujja, oba tulindirire mulala?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini, Yesu n'awonya bangi endwadde n'okulumizibwa okwa buli ngeri, n'emyoyo emibi, era n'azibula amaaso ga bamuzibe bangi." 
Luke7:22 Awo n'addamu ababaka ba Yowanne nti: “Mugende mutegeeze Yowanne bye mulabye ne bye muwulidde: ababadde bamuzibe balaba; ababadde abalema, batambula; abagenge bawonyezebwa, ababadde bakiggala bawulira; abafu bazuukira, abaavu bategeezebwa Amawulire Amalungi." 
Luke7:23 Wa mukisa oyo atambuusabuusaamu.” 
Luke7:24 Ababaka ba Yowanne bwe bavaawo, Yesu n'atandika okutegeeza ekibiina ky'abantu ebifa ku Yowanne nti: “Bwe mwagenda eri Yowanne mu ddungu, mwagenderera kulaba ki? Olumuli olunyeenyezebwa empewo?" 
Luke7:25 Kale mwagenda kulaba ki? Omuntu ayambadde engoye ezinekaaneka? Abo abambala engoye ez'omuwendo era ababa mu bulamu obw'okwejalabya basangibwa mu mbiri za bakabaka. 
Luke7:26 Kale mwagenda kulaba ki? Mulanzi? Ddala mbagamba nti asinga n'omulanzi. 
Luke7:27 Yowanne oyo, ebyawandiikibwa gwe byogerako nti: ‘Laba, ntuma omubaka wange akukulembere, ng'akwerulira ekkubo gy'ogenda.’" 
Luke7:28 Mbagamba nti Yowanne asinga abantu bonna ekitiibwa, abaali bazaaliddwa. Kyokka oyo asembayo okuba oweekitiibwa ekitono mu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda, asinga Yowanne oyo ekitiibwa.”" 
Luke7:29 Abasolooza b'omusolo n'abantu abalala bonna bwe baawuliriza ebigambo ebyo, ne batendereza Katonda, kubanga bali babatizibwa Yowanne." 
Luke7:30 Kyokka Abafarisaayo n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka beggya ku nteekateeka ya Katonda, ne bagaana okubatizibwa." 
Luke7:31 Yesu n'ayongera okugamba abaali bamuwuliriza nti: “Abantu ab'omulembe guno nnaabageraageranya na ki? Kiki kye bafaanana? 
Luke7:32 Bafaanana ng'abaana abato, abatuula mu katale ne bakoowoolagana ne bagamba nti: ‘Twabafuuyidde endere, ne mutazina; twakubye ebiwoobe, ne mutakaaba.’" 
Luke7:33 Yowanne Omubatiza bwe yajja ng'asiiba era nga tanywa mwenge, mwagamba nti: ‘Aliko omwoyo omubi!’" 
Luke7:34 Omwana w'Omuntu bwe yajja ng'alya era ng'anywa, ne mugamba nti: ‘Omuntu oyo wa mululu, mutamiivu, era mukwano gwa basolooza ba musolo n'aboonoonyi.’" 
Luke7:35 Wabula abo bonna abakolera ku magezi ga Katonda, bakakasa nti matuufu.”" 
Luke7:36 Awo Omufarisaayo omu n'ayita Yesu okulya naye. Yesu n'agenda n'ayingira mu nnyumba y'Omufarisaayo oyo, n'atuula okulya." 
Luke7:37 Mu kibuga ekyo mwalimu omukazi omwonoonyi. Omukazi oyo bwe yamanya nti Yesu atudde okulya mu nnyumba y'Omufarisaayo, n'aleeta eccupa erimu omuzigo oguwunya akawoowo," 
Luke7:38 n'abeera emabega, kumpi n'ebigere bya Yesu. N'akaaba era n'atandika okutobya ebigere bya Yesu n'amaziga, era n'abisiimuuza enviiri ez'oku mutwe gwe. N'abinywegera, era n'abisiiga omuzigo oguwunya akawoowo." 
Luke7:39 Omufarisaayo eyayita Yesu bwe yalaba kino, n'agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Singa omusajja ono abadde mulanzi, yanditegedde omukazi amwekwatako bw'atyo bw'ali omwonoonyi.”" 
Luke7:40 Awo Yesu n'amwatulira, n'agamba nti: “Simooni, nnina kye nkugamba.” Ye n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, yogera.”" 
Luke7:41 Yesu n'atandika nti: “Waaliwo abantu babiri, abaali babanjibwa omuwozi w'ensimbi. Omu yali abanjibwa denaari ebikumi bitaano, ate omulala denaari amakumi ataano." 
Luke7:42 Bwe baalemwa okusasula, bombi n'abasonyiwa. Kale ani ku bo anaasinga okumwagala?”" 
Luke7:43 Simooni n'addamu nti: “Ndowooza nti oyo gwe yasonyiwa ebbanja erisinga obunene.” Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Osaze bulungi.” 
Luke7:44 Awo n'akyukira omukazi, n'agamba Simooni nti: “Omukazi ono omulaba? Bwe nayingidde mu nnyumba yo, tewampadde mazzi ga kunaaba bigere, naye ono atobezza ebigere byange n'amaziga ge, era n'abisiimuuza enviiri ze." 
Luke7:45 Tewannywegedde, naye ono okuviira ddala lwe nayingidde, tannalekayo kunywegera bigere byange." 
Luke7:46 Tewansiize muzigo mu mutwe, naye ono ebigere byange abisiize omuzigo oguwunya akawoowo." 
Luke7:47 N'olwekyo nkugamba nti asonyiyiddwa ebibi bye ebingi, kubanga alina okwagala kungi. Kyokka asonyiyibwa ebitono, aba n'okwagala kutono.”" 
Luke7:48 Awo Yesu n'agamba omukazi nti: “Ebibi byo mbikusonyiye.” 
Luke7:49 Abaali batudde ne Yesu nga balya ne batandika okwebuuzaganya nti: “Ono ani asobola n'okusonyiwa abantu ebibi?” 
Luke7:50 Awo Yesu n'agamba omukazi nti: “Owonye olw'okukkiriza kwo, genda mirembe.”" 
Luke8:1 Oluvannyumako, Yesu n'atambula olugendo ng'ayita mu bibuga ne mu byalo, ng'ategeeza abantu era ng'abunyisa Amawulire Amalungi agafa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda. Abayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri," 
Luke8:2 era n'abakazi bangi, baali naye. Abakazi bano bonna baatoolanga ku bintu byabwe, ne bayamba Yesu n'abayigirizwa be. Abamu ku bakazi bano, Yesu yali amaze okubawonya emyoyo emibi n'endwadde, be bano: Mariya ayitibwa Magudaleena, eyagobwako emyoyo emibi omusanvu, ne Yowanna muka Kuuza omuwanika wa Herode, era ne Susanna." 
Luke8:3  
Luke8:4 Awo abantu bangi nnyo ne bakuŋŋaanira awali Yesu, nga bava mu buli kibuga, n'abagamba mu lugero nti:" 
Luke8:5 “Omusizi yagenda okusiga ensigo. Bwe yali ng'asiga, ezimu ne zigwa mu kkubo, ne zirinnyirirwa, era ebinyonyi ne bizirya." 
Luke8:6 Ensigo endala ne zigwa ku ttaka ery'oku lwazi. Bwe zaamera, ne zikala, kubanga ettaka teryalimu mazzi." 
Luke8:7 Endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eryameramu amaggwa, ne gakulira wamu nazo, ne gazitta." 
Luke8:8 N'endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eddungi, ne zikula, buli emu n'ebala ensigo kikumi.” Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'akangula ku ddoboozi, n'agamba nti: “Alina amatu ag'okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Luke8:9 Awo abayigirizwa ba Yesu ne bamubuuza amakulu g'olugero olwo. 
Luke8:10 Ye n'addamu nti: “Mmwe muweereddwa okumanya ebyama ebifa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda, naye abantu abalala babibuulirwa mu ngero, balyoke balabe naye nga tebeetegereza, bawulirize naye nga tebategeera." 
Luke8:11 “Amakulu g'olugero olwo gaagano: ensigo, kye kigambo kya Katonda." 
Luke8:12 Ensigo ezaagwa mu kkubo, be bantu abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda, naye Sitaani n'ajja n'akiggya mu mitima gyabwe, baleme okukkiriza ne balokolebwa." 
Luke8:13 “Ate ensigo ezaagwa ku ttaka ery'oku lwazi, be bantu abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda, ne bakyaniriza n'essanyu, naye ne baba ng'ebimera ebitalina mirandira gisse nnyo wansi mu ttaka. Bakkiriza okumala ekiseera kitono, mu kiseera eky'okukemebwa ne baterebuka." 
Luke8:14 “Ezo ezaagwa mu ttaka eryameramu amaggwa, be bantu abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda, naye emitawaana, n'obugagga n'amasanyu eby'omu bulamu buno, ne bigenda nga bibamalamu amaanyi, ne batakola bikolwa birungi." 
Luke8:15 “Ate ezo ezaagwa mu ttaka eddungi, be bantu abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda n'omutima omulungi ddala, ne bakikuuma era ne bakola ebikolwa ebirungi nga bagumiikiriza." 
Luke8:16 “Omuntu takoleeza ttaala n'agibikkako ekibbo, oba n'agiteeka wansi wa kitanda, wabula agiteeka ku kikondo kyayo, abantu abayingira balyoke balabe ekitangaala." 
Luke8:17 “Buli kintu ekikwekeddwa kirikwekulwa, era buli kyama kirimanyibwa mu lwatu." 
Luke8:18 “Kale nno muwulirize n'obwegendereza: buli alina aliweebwa; ate buli atalina, n'ekyo ky'alowooza okuba nakyo, kirimuggyibwako.”" 
Luke8:19 Awo baganda ba Yesu ne nnyina ne bajja gy'ali, kyokka ne batasobola kumutuukako olw'obungi bw'abantu." 
Luke8:20 Awo abantu abamu ne bamugamba nti: “Nnyoko ne baganda bo bali wabweru, baagala okukulaba.”" 
Luke8:21 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Mmange ne baganda bange be bo abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda ne bakikolerako.” 
Luke8:22 Awo ku lunaku olumu, Yesu n'asaabala mu lyato wamu n'abayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti: “Tuwunguke tugende emitala w'ennyanja.” Ne bagenda." 
Luke8:23 Bwe baali mu lyato nga bagenda, Yesu ne yeebaka. Awo omuyaga ogw'amaanyi ne gukunta ku nnyanja, eryato ne liba kumpi okujjula amazzi, bonna ne baba mu kabi." 
Luke8:24 Awo abayigirizwa ne basembera awali Yesu ne bamuzuukusa nga bagamba nti: “Muyigiriza, Muyigiriza, tufa!” Yesu n'azuukuka, n'aboggolera omuyaga n'amayengo g'ennyanja. Omuyaga ne gukoma, ennyanja n'eteeka." 
Luke8:25 Awo n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Lwaki temulina kukkiriza?” Bo nga batidde, era nga beewuunya, ne bagambagana nti: “Kale ono ye ani? Olaba n'omuyaga era n'amayengo abiragira ne bimuwulira!”" 
Luke8:26 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be ne bagoba ku lukalu lw'ensi y'Abagerasa, etunuulidde Galilaaya." 
Luke8:27 Yesu bwe yali nga ky'ajje atuuke ku lukalu, omusajja eyava mu kibuga, era aliko emyoyo emibi, n'amusisinkana. Omusajja oyo yali amaze ekiseera kiwanvu nga tayambala, era nga taba mu nnyumba, wabula mu mpuku eziziikibwamu abafu." 
Luke8:28 Bwe yalaba Yesu, n'awowoggana nnyo, n'afukamira mu maaso ge, era n'aleekaana nnyo nti: “Onvunaana ki, ggwe Yesu Omwana wa Katonda Atenkanika? Nkwegayiridde tombonyaabonya!”" 
Luke8:29 Yagamba bw'atyo kubanga Yesu yali alagidde omwoyo omubi guve ku muntu oyo. Emirundi mingi gwamukwatanga, ne bamukuuma nga musibe n'enjegere, kyokka n'azikutulanga, ne gumutwala mu malungu." 
Luke8:30 Yesu n'agubuuza nti: “Erinnya lyo ggwe ani?” Ne guddamu nti: “Nze Ggye,” kubanga emyoyo emibi gyali mingi ku muntu oyo." 
Luke8:31 Awo ne gyegayirira Yesu aleme kugiragira kugenda magombe. 
Luke8:32 Ku lusozi awo waaliwo eggana ly'embizzi ddene, nga zirya. Emyoyo emibi ne gyegayirira Yesu agikkirize giyingire mu mbizzi ezo. N'agikkiriza." 
Luke8:33 Awo ne giva ku muntu, ne giyingira mu mbizzi. Eggana ne lifubutuka, ne liwanuka waggulu ku kagulungujjo k'olusozi, ne lyesuula mu nnyanja, embizzi zonna ne zifa amazzi." 
Luke8:34 Abaali bazirabirira bwe baalaba ekiguddewo, ne badduka, ne bagenda bategeeza ab'omu kibuga n'ab'omu byalo." 
Luke8:35 Abantu ne bajja okulaba ekiguddewo. Ne batuuka awali Yesu, ne basanga omuntu ng'emyoyo emibi gimuvuddeko. Baamusanga atudde kumpi n'ebigere bya Yesu, era ng'ayambadde, era ng'ategeera bulungi, ne batya." 
Luke8:36 Abo abaaliwo ng'emyoyo emibi giva ku muntu oyo, ne banyumiza abantu nga bwe yawonyezeddwa." 
Luke8:37 Olwo abantu bonna ab'omu nsi y'Abagerasa ne basaba Yesu ave ewaabwe, kubanga baali batidde nnyo. Awo Yesu n'asaabala mu lyato, agende." 
Luke8:38 Omuntu eyagobwako emyoyo emibi ne yeegayirira Yesu amukkirize ayitenga naye. Kyokka Yesu n'amusiibula ng'agamba nti: 
Luke8:39 “Ddayo ewammwe, onyumize abantu byonna Mukama by'akukoledde.” Awo omuntu oyo n'atambula ekibuga kyonna ng'ategeeza abantu byonna ebyamukolerwa Yesu." 
Luke8:40 Yesu bwe yakomawo, abantu bangi ne bamwaniriza, kubanga bonna baali bamulindirira." 
Luke8:41 Awo omusajja ayitibwa Yayiro, omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro, n'ajja n'afukamira kumpi n'ebigere bya Yesu, n'amwegayirira agende ayingire mu nnyumba ye," 
Luke8:42 kubanga muwala we ow'emyaka ekkumi n'ebiri, ate nga ye mwana gwe yalina yekka, yali kumpi okufa. Yesu bwe yali ng'agenda, ebibiina by'abantu ne bimunyigiriza." 
Luke8:43 Waaliwo omukazi eyali alwadde ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi okumala emyaka kkumi n'ebiri, era ng'awaddeyo ebintu bye byonna mu basawo, kyokka nga tewali asobola kumuwonya." 
Luke8:44 Awo n'ajja emabega wa Yesu, n'amukwata ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye. Amangwago ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi gwe ne kikalira." 
Luke8:45 Yesu n'abuuza nti: “Ani ankutteko?” Bonna ne beegaana. Peetero n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, abantu bangi abakwekuusaako, era abakunyigiriza!”" 
Luke8:46 Kyokka Yesu n'agamba nti: “Waliwo ankutteko, kubanga mpulidde ng'obuyinza bwange obuwonya bukoze.”" 
Luke8:47 Omukazi bwe yalaba nga tasobodde kwekweka, n'ajja ng'akankana, n'afukamira awali Yesu, n'amutegeeza ng'abantu bonna bawulira, ensonga kye yavudde amukwatako, era nga bwe yawonye amangwago." 
Luke8:48 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Muwala, owonye olw'okukkiriza kwo. Genda mirembe.”" 
Luke8:49 Yesu yali akyayogera, omubaka eyava mu maka g'omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro, n'ajja, n'ategeeza omukulu oyo nti: “Muwala wo afudde. Leka kuteganya Muyigiriza.”" 
Luke8:50 Kyokka Yesu bwe yawulira, n'agamba omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro nti: “Totya, kkiriza bukkiriza, muwala wo ajja kulamuka.”" 
Luke8:51 Yesu bwe yatuuka ku nnyumba, n'agaana abalala bonna okuyingira naye, okuggyako Peetero, ne Yowanne, ne Yakobo, n'abazadde b'omwana." 
Luke8:52 Abantu bonna abaaliwo, baali bakaaba era nga bakuba ebiwoobe olw'omwana oyo. Kyokka Yesu n'agamba nti: “Temukaaba, kubanga tafudde, wabula yeebase.”" 
Luke8:53 Bonna ne bamusekerera, kubanga baali bamanyi nti omwana afudde." 
Luke8:54 Kyokka Yesu n'amukwata ku mukono, n'amuyita nti: “Omwana, golokoka!”" 
Luke8:55 Awo omwana n'alamuka, era n'ayimirira amangwago. Yesu n'alagira nti: “Mumuwe emmere alye.”" 
Luke8:56 Abazadde b'omwana ono ne beewuunya. Kyokka Yesu n'abakuutira obutabuulirako muntu n'omu ekibaddewo. 
Luke9:1 Awo Yesu n'ayita abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri ne bakuŋŋaanira w'ali, n'abawa amaanyi n'obuyinza okugoba emyoyo emibi gyonna ku bantu n'okuwonya endwadde." 
Luke9:2 N'abatuma bagende bategeeze abantu ebifa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda, era bawonye abalwadde." 
Luke9:3 N'abagamba nti: “Mu lugendo luno, temugenda na kantu konna, newaakubadde omuggo, newaakubadde ensawo ng'ez'abasabiriza, newaakubadde emmere, wadde ensimbi, era temuba na kkanzu yaakubiri." 
Luke9:4 Ennyumba gye muyingiramu ne babaaniriza, mwe mubanga musula okutuusa lwe muliva mu kibuga ekyo." 
Luke9:5 Mu kibuga gye bagaana okubaaniriza, muveeyo era bwe muba nga muvaayo, mwekunkumuleko n'enfuufu eba ebakutte ku bigere, olw'okulabula abantu abo.”" 
Luke9:6 Awo abayigirizwa ne bagenda, ne batambula wonna wonna mu byalo, nga bategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi era nga bawonya abalwadde buli wantu." 
Luke9:7 Awo Herode, omufuzi wa Galilaaya, n'awulira byonna ebyaliwo, n'asoberwa nnyo, kubanga abantu abamu baagambanga nti: “Yowanne Omubatiza azuukidde!”" 
Luke9:8 Abalala nga bagamba nti: “Eliya alabise”, n'abalala nti: “Omu ku balanzi ab'edda azuukidde.”" 
Luke9:9 Herode n'agamba nti: “Yowanne nze nalagira n'atemwako omutwe, ate oyo ani gwe mpulirako ebyenkana awo?” N'agezaako okumulaba." 
Luke9:10 Abatume ne bakomawo, ne bategeeza Yesu byonna bye baakola. N'abatwala, ne bagenda naye bokka mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Betusayida." 
Luke9:11 Abantu bangi nnyo bwe baakimanya, ne bamugoberera. Bwe yamala okubaaniriza, n'ababuulira ebifa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda, era n'awonya abaali beetaaga okuwonyezebwa." 
Luke9:12 Obudde bwe bwali butandika okuwungeera, abayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri ne batuukirira Yesu, ne bamugamba nti: “Abantu basiibule bagende mu bubuga ne mu byalo ebiriraanye wano, bafune emmere ne we banaasula, kubanga wano tuli mu kifo kya ddungu.”" 
Luke9:13 Kyokka Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe muba mubawa emmere balye.” Ne baddamu nti: “Tulinawo emigaati etaano gyokka, n'ebyennyanja bibiri. Mpozzi okuggyako nga tugenda ne tugulira abantu bano bonna emmere!”" 
Luke9:14 Abasajja baali bawera ng'enkumi ttaano. Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mubatuuze mu bibinja nga buli kimu kirimu ng'amakumi ataano.” 
Luke9:15 Ne bakola bwe batyo, bonna ne babatuuza." 
Luke9:16 Yesu n'atoola emigaati etaano n'ebyennyanja ebibiri, n'ayimusa amaaso ge eri eggulu, ne yeebaza Katonda, n'abimenyaamenyamu, n'abiwa abayigirizwa be babigabire abantu." 
Luke9:17 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. Obutundutundu obwalemerawo, ne bukuŋŋaanyizibwa, ne bujjuza ebibbo kkumi na bibiri." 
Luke9:18 Lwali lumu, Yesu yali asinza Katonda, nga n'abayigirizwa be weebali, n'ababuuza nti: “Abantu bwe baba banjogerako bampita ani?”" 
Luke9:19 Ne baddamu nti: “Abamu bakuyita Yowanne Omubatiza, abalala Eliya, n'abalala bagamba nti omu ku balanzi ab'edda azuukidde.”" 
Luke9:20 Awo Yesu n'ababuuza nti: “Naye mmwe, mumpita ani?” Peetero n'addamu nti: “Ggwe Kristo wa Katonda.”" 
Luke9:21 Awo Yesu n'abakuutira nnyo ekyo obutakibuulirako muntu n'omu. 
Luke9:22 Era n'agamba nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu ateekwa okubonaabona ennyo, n'okwegaanibwa abantu abakulu mu ggwanga ne bakabona abakulu, n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka, n'okuttibwa, era n'okuzuukira ku lunaku olwokusatu.”" 
Luke9:23 Awo n'agamba bonna nti: “Buli muntu ayagala okuba omugoberezi wange, ateekwa okwefeebya, ne yeetikka omusaalaba gwe buli lunaku, n'angoberera." 
Luke9:24 Buli eyeemalira ku bulamu bwe, alibufiirwa. Wabula buli afiirwa obulamu bwe ku lwange, alibulokola." 
Luke9:25 Kale omuntu kimugasa ki okufuna obugagga bwonna obw'oku nsi, ate ne yeezikiriza, oba ne yeeretera okufiirwa obulamu bwe?" 
Luke9:26 “Buli muntu akwatirwa nze n'ebigambo byange ensonyi, n'Omwana w'Omuntu alimukwatirwa ensonyi bw'alijjira mu kitiibwa kye, ne mu kitiibwa kya Kitaawe, ne mu kya bamalayika abatukuvu." 
Luke9:27 Mazima mbagamba nti abamu ku bantu abali wano, balifa bamaze okulaba Obwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Luke9:28 Bwe waayitawo ennaku nga munaana nga Yesu amaze okwogera ebyo, n'atwala Peetero ne Yowanne ne Yakobo, n'alinnya ku lusozi okusinza Katonda." 
Luke9:29 Bwe yali ng'akyasinza, endabika y'amaaso ge n'efuuka, era ebyambalo bye ne bitukula, ne byakaayakana." 
Luke9:30 Awo abasajja babiri, Musa ne Eliya, ne balabika nga boogera naye." 
Luke9:31 Baalabikira mu kitiibwa, era ne boogera ku ngeri y'okufa kwe, kwe yali agenda okutuukiriza mu Yerusaalemu." 
Luke9:32 Peetero ne banne be yali nabo, baali bakwatiddwa otulo, kyokka bwe baazuukuka, ne balaba ekitiibwa kya Yesu, n'abasajja ababiri abaali bayimiridde naye." 
Luke9:33 Abasajja bano bwe baali bava awali Yesu, Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Mukama waffe, kirungi tubeere wano. Leka tuzimbewo ensiisira ssatu, emu yiyo, eyookubiri ya Musa, n'eyookusatu ya Eliya.” Yali tamanyi ky'agamba." 
Luke9:34 Bwe yali ng'akyayogera ebyo, ekire ne kijja ne kibabikka n'ekisiikirize kyakyo, awo abayigirizwa ne batya nga kibabikka." 
Luke9:35 Eddoboozi ne lyogerera mu kire ekyo, ne ligamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange, Omulonde wange, mumuwulirize.”" 
Luke9:36 Eddoboozi bwe lyamala okwogera, abayigirizwa ne balaba Yesu ng'asigaddewo yekka. Kye baalaba ne bakisirikira, ne batakibuulirako muntu mulala mu nnaku ezo." 
Luke9:37 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, Yesu n'abayigirizwa be abasatu bwe baava ku lusozi, ekibiina ky'abantu kinene ne kijja okusisinkana Yesu." 
Luke9:38 Awo omusajja eyali mu kibiina ky'abantu n'aleekaana nti: “Muyigiriza, nkwegayiridde, kwatirwa mutabani wange ekisa, ye mwana wange yekka!" 
Luke9:39 Omwoyo omubi gumukwata, amangwago n'awowoggana, ne gumujugumiza, n'abimba ejjovu, era okumuvaako, gumala kumumaliramu ddala maanyi." 
Luke9:40 Neegayiridde abayigirizwa bo okugumugobako, ne balemwa.”" 
Luke9:41 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Bantu mmwe ab'omulembe guno ogutalina kukkiriza era omubi, ndimala nammwe kiseera kyenkana wa nga mbagumiikiriza?” Awo n'agamba kitaawe w'omulenzi nti: “Mutabani wo muleete wano.”" 
Luke9:42 Omulenzi bwe yali ng'ajja, omwoyo omubi ne gumukuba ekigwo, era ne gumujugumiza. Yesu n'aguboggolera, n'awonya omulenzi era n'amuddiza kitaawe." 
Luke9:43 Bonna ne bawuniikirira olw'obuyinza bwa Katonda. Abantu baali bakyewuunya byonna Yesu by'akoze, ye n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti:" 
Luke9:44 “Muwulirize n'obwegendereza ebigambo byange bino: Omwana w'Omuntu ajja kuweebwayo mu bantu.” 
Luke9:45 Kyokka bo ne batategeera ky'agambye. Kyali kibakwekeddwa baleme kukitegeera, ate ne batya okumubuuza amakulu gaakyo." 
Luke9:46 Awo abayigirizwa ne bawakana nga beebuuzaganya nti ani asinga okuba oweekitiibwa mu bo. 
Luke9:47 Yesu n'amanya kye balowooza, n'aleeta omwana omuto, n'amuyimiriza kumpi naye." 
Luke9:48 N'abagamba nti: “Buli ayaniriza omwana ng'ono ku lwange, aba ayanirizza nze. Ate buli annyaniriza, aba ayanirizza Katonda eyantuma, kubanga oyo asinga okuba omwetoowaze mu mmwe mwenna, ye asinga okuba oweekitiibwa.”" 
Luke9:49 Yowanne n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, twalaba omuntu ng'agoba emyoyo emibi ku bantu ng'akozesa erinnya lyo, ffe ne tumuziyiza, kubanga takugoberera wamu naffe.”" 
Luke9:50 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Temumuziyiza, kubanga atabalwanyisa taba mulabe wammwe.”" 
Luke9:51 Awo olwatuuka, ennaku za Yesu ez'okutwalibwa mu ggulu bwe zaali nga ziri kumpi okutuuka, n'amalirira okugenda e Yerusaalemu." 
Luke9:52 N'atuma ababaka bamukulemberemu, ne bagenda ne bayingira mu kabuga k'Abasamariya akamu, okumutegekera byonna." 
Luke9:53 Kyokka abantu baayo ne bagaana okumwaniriza, kubanga yali alabikira ddala nti agenda Yerusaalemu." 
Luke9:54 Abayigirizwa be, Yakobo ne Yowanne, bwe baalaba ekyo, ne bagamba nti: “Mukama waffe, oyagala tulagire omuliro guve mu ggulu gubazikirize?”" 
Luke9:55 Yesu n'abakyukira n'abanenya. 
Luke9:56 Awo ne bagenda mu kabuga akalala. 
Luke9:57 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe baali nga batambula, omuntu omu n'agamba Yesu nti: “Nnaayitanga naawe gy'onoogendanga yonna.”" 
Luke9:58 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Ebibe birina ebinnya, n'ebinyonyi birina ebisu, naye Omwana w'Omuntu talina w'assa mutwe.”" 
Luke9:59 Ate n'agamba omulala nti: “Yitanga nange.” Kyokka oyo n'addamu nti: “Ssebo, nzikiriza nsooke ŋŋende nziike kitange.”" 
Luke9:60 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Leka abo abali ng'abafu baziike abafu baabwe, naye ggwe genda otegeeze abantu ebifa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Luke9:61 Omuntu omulala n'agamba nti: “Ssebo, nja kuyitanga naawe, naye nzikiriza mmale okusiibula ab'ewaffe.”" 
Luke9:62 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Buli akwata enkumbi okulima ate n'aba ng'akyatunula emabega, tayinza kuba wa mugaso mu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Luke10:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Mukama waffe n'alonda abalala nsanvu mu babiri, n'abatuma babiri babiri okumukulemberamu mu buli kibuga ne mu buli kifo ye yennyini gye yali anaatera okugenda." 
Luke10:2 N'abagamba nti: “Eby'okukungula bingi, naye abakozi batono. Kale musabe nnannyini byakukungula, asindike abakozi mu nnimiro ye." 
Luke10:3 Mugende. Mbatuma nga muli ng'endiga ento mu misege. 
Luke10:4 Temugenda na nsawo eterekebwamu nsimbi, newaakubadde ensawo ng'ey'abasabiriza, newaakubadde engatto. Era temulwa mu kkubo nga mulamusa abantu." 
Luke10:5 Buli nnyumba gye muyingirangamu, musookenga kugamba nti: ‘Emirembe gibe n'abantu b'omu nnyumba eno.’" 
Luke10:6 Singa eribaamu omuntu asaanira okufuna emirembe, emirembe gye mubaagalizza girisigala naye. Bw'atalibaamu, giridda gye muli." 
Luke10:7 Mu nnyumba eyo, mwe mubanga musula. Mulyenga era munywenga bye babawa, kubanga omukozi asaanira empeera ye. Temukyusanga kisulo." 
Luke10:8 Bwe muyingiranga mu kibuga ne babaaniriza, mulyenga emmere gye babawa." 
Luke10:9 Muwonyanga abalwadde abali mu kibuga ekyo, era mugambanga abantu baamu nti: ‘Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bubasemberedde.’" 
Luke10:10 Naye bwe muyingiranga mu kibuga ne batabaaniriza, muyimiriranga mu nguudo zaakyo ne mugamba nti:" 
Luke10:11 ‘N'enfuufu ey'omu kibuga kyammwe etukutte ku bigere, tugibakunkumulira mmwe. Naye mumanye kino nti Obwakabaka bwa Katonda busembedde.’" 
Luke10:12 Mbagamba mmwe nti: ku lunaku olw'okusalirwako emisango, Sodoma kiriddirwamu okusinga ekibuga ekyo." 
Luke10:13 “Oli wa kubonaabona ggwe Koraziini! Ennaku za kukulaba ggwe Betusayida! Ebyamagero ebyakolerwa mu mmwe singa byali bikoleddwa mu Tiiro ne mu Sidoni, abantu baayo bandibadde baayambala dda ebikutiya, ne beesiiga n'evvu, okulaga nti beenenyezza. Zek 9:2-4" 
Luke10:14 Ku lunaku olw'okusalirwako emisango, Tiiro ne Sidoni biribonerezebwa katono okusinga mmwe." 
Luke10:15 Ate ggwe Kafarunawumu, oligulumira okutuuka mu bire? Nedda, ogenda kussibwa wansi emagombe." 
Luke10:16 “Awulira mmwe, ng'awulidde nze. Era anyooma mmwe, ng'anyoomye nze. Ate anyooma nze, ng'anyoomye oyo eyantuma.”" 
Luke10:17 Awo abayigirizwa ensanvu mu ababiri ne bakomawo nga basanyuka, ne bagamba nti: “Mukama waffe, n'emyoyo emibi gyatuwuliranga nga tukozesezza erinnya lyo.”" 
Luke10:18 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Nalaba Sitaani bw'agwa, ng'ali ng'okumyansa okuva mu ggulu." 
Luke10:19 Laba mbawadde obuyinza okulinnya ku misota ne ku njaba ez'obusagwa, era mbawadde okuwangula amaanyi gonna ag'omulabe. Tewali kintu na kimu kiribakolako kabi." 
Luke10:20 Naye muleme kusanyuka lwa kuba nti emyoyo emibi gibawulira, wabula musanyuke kubanga amannya gammwe gawandiikiddwa mu ggulu.”" 
Luke10:21 Mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'ajjuza Yesu essanyu, Yesu n'agamba nti: “Nkutendereza, Kitange, Mukama w'eggulu n'ensi, kubanga bino wabikweka abagezi n'abategeera, n'obimanyisa abaana abato. Weewaawo Kitange, kubanga bw'otyo bwe wayagala." 
Luke10:22 “Kitange byonna yabimpa. Ate nze Mwana tewali ammanyi okuggyako Kitange. Era tewali amanyi Kitange okuggyako nze Mwana, n'oyo gwe mba njagadde amanye Kitange.”" 
Luke10:23 Awo Yesu bwe yasigala n'abayigirizwa be bokka, n'abakyukira n'agamba nti: “Muli ba mukisa okulaba bino bye mulaba!" 
Luke10:24 Mbagamba nti abalanzi bangi ne bakabaka beegomba okulaba bye mulaba, ne batabiraba. n'okuwulira bye muwulira, ne batabiwulira.”" 
Luke10:25 Awo omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka n'asituka, n'agamba Yesu, ng'amukema, nti: “Muyigiriza, nkole ki okufuna obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Luke10:26 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Kiki ekyawandiikibwa mu mateeka ga Katonda? Osoma otya?” 
Luke10:27 N'addamu nti: “Yagalanga Mukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna, n'amaanyi go gonna, n'amagezi go gonna. Era yagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala ggwe wennyini.”" 
Luke10:28 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Ozzeemu bulungi. Kolanga bw'otyo, olifuna obulamu.”" 
Luke10:29 Kyokka omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka olw'okwagala okulaga nti ky'abuuzizza kisaanidde, n'agamba Yesu nti: “Muntu munnange oyo, ye ani?”" 
Luke10:30 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Waaliwo omuntu eyali ava e Yerusaalemu, ng'aserengeta e Yeriko, n'agwa mu batemu, ne bamwambulamu engoye, ne bamukuba, ne bamuleka ng'abulako katono okufa, ne bagenda." 
Luke10:31 Ne wabaawo kabona, era naye eyaserengeta mu kkubo eryo, n'amulaba, n'amwebalama, n'ayitawo." 
Luke10:32 N'Omuleevi yakola bw'atyo. Bwe yatuuka mu kifo ekyo n'amulaba, n'amwebalama, n'ayitawo." 
Luke10:33 Naye Omusamariya eyali ku lugendo lwe, n'atuuka w'ali. Bwe yamulaba, n'amukwatirwa ekisa," 
Luke10:34 n'amusemberera, n'amusiba ebiwundu, ng'amaze okubifukamu omuzigo n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'amussa ku nsolo ye eyeebagalwa, n'amutwala mu nnyumba y'abagenyi, n'amujjanjaba." 
Luke10:35 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, n'aggyayo denaari bbiri, n'aziwa nnannyini nnyumba, n'amugamba nti: ‘Mujjanjabe. Ssente zonna z'olikozesa nga zisukka ku zino, ndizikusasula amadda.’" 
Luke10:36 “Ani ku abo abasatu, gw'olowooza nti ye yali munne w'oyo eyagwa mu batemu?”" 
Luke10:37 Omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka n'addamu nti: “Oyo eyamukwatirwa ekisa.” Awo Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Naawe genda okolenga bw'otyo.” 
Luke10:38 Awo Yesu n'abayigirizwa be bwe baali mu lugendo lwabwe, Yesu n'atuuka mu kyalo ekimu. Omukazi erinnya lye Marita n'amukyaza mu nnyumba ye." 
Luke10:39 Marita yalina muganda we ayitibwa Mariya. Mariya oyo n'atuula kumpi n'ebigere bya Mukama waffe, ng'awuliriza ekigambo kye." 
Luke10:40 Marita yali atawuka mu mirimu mingi, ng'aweereza. Marita n'agenda awali Yesu n'agamba nti: “Mukama wange, tofaayo nga muganda wange andese okuweereza nzekka? Kale mugambeko annyambe.”" 
Luke10:41 Mukama waffe n'amuddamu nti: “Marita, Marita, weeraliikirira era otawaana mu bingi," 
Luke10:42 naye ekyetaagibwa kiri kimu. Mariya nno ye alonze omugabo omulungi ogutalimuggyibwako.” 
Luke11:1 Lwali lumu, Yesu yali mu kifo ekimu ng'asinza Katonda. Bwe yamaliriza, omu ku bayigirizwa be n'amugamba nti: “Mukama waffe, naawe tuyigirize okusinza Katonda, nga Yowanne bwe yayigiriza abayigirizwa be.”" 
Luke11:2 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Bwe mubanga musinza Katonda, mugambanga nti: ‘Kitaffe, erinnya lyo lyatulwe nga bwe liri ettukuvu, Obwakabaka bwo bujje." 
Luke11:3 Otuwe buli lunaku emmere gye twetaaga. 
Luke11:4 Era otusonyiwe ebibi byaffe, kubanga naffe tusonyiwa buli akola ebitulumya. Era totuleka kukemebwa.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Awo n'abagamba nti: “Singa omu ku mmwe aba ne mukwano gwe, n'agenda gy'ali ettumbi n'amugamba nti: ‘Munnange, mpola emigaati esatu," 
Luke11:6 kubanga mukwano gwange atuuse ng'ava lugendo, ate sirina kye mmuwa’;" 
Luke11:7 kyokka oli, ng'ali mu nnyumba, n'addamu nti: ‘Tonteganya, oluggi nalusibye dda, era abaana bange nange tuli mu buliri. Siyinza kugolokoka kukuwa.’" 
Luke11:8 Mbagamba nti newaakubadde taagolokoke kumuwa olw'okuba mukwano gwe, kyokka olw'okumuteganya, anaagolokoka n'amuwa kyonna kye yeetaaga." 
Luke11:9 Kale mbagamba nti musabe, muliweebwa; munoonye, mulizuula; mukonkone ku luggi, muliggulirwawo," 
Luke11:10 kubanga buli asaba afuna, anoonya azuula, n'akonkona ku luggi aggulirwawo." 
Luke11:11 Era ani ku mmwe kitaawe w'omwana, awa omwana we omusota mu kifo ky'ekyennyanja ky'amusabye," 
Luke11:12 oba amuwa enjaba ey'obusagwa ng'asabye eggi? 
Luke11:13 Kale oba nga mmwe ababi mumanyi okuwa abaana bammwe ebirabo ebirungi, Kitammwe ow'omu ggulu talisingawo nnyo okuwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abamumusaba?”" 
Luke11:14 Yesu yali agoba ku muntu omwoyo omubi era gukasiru. Awo omuntu oyo kasiru, omwoyo omubi bwe gwamuvaako, n'atandika okwogera. Abantu ne beewuunya." 
Luke11:15 Kyokka abamu ku bo ne bagamba nti: “Emyoyo emibi agigoba ng'akozesa buyinza bwa Beeluzebuli omukulu waagyo.” 
Luke11:16 N'abalala ne bamusaba nga bamukema, abawe akabonero akalaga nti obuyinza bwe bwava wa Katonda." 
Luke11:17 Kyokka bwe yamanya ebirowoozo byabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Abantu ab'obwakabaka obumu bwe beesalamu ne balwanagana, obwakabaka obwo buzikirira. Era ne bwe gaba maka, gasasika." 
Luke11:18 Ne Sitaani singa yeerwanyisa yennyini, obwakabaka bwe bunaasigalawo butya? Mmwe mugamba nti ngoba emyoyo emibi ku bantu, nga nkozesa buyinza bwa Beeluzebuli." 
Luke11:19 Kale oba nga nze ngoba emyoyo emibi nga nkozesa buyinza bwa Beeluzebuli, abagoberezi bammwe bo bagigoba nga bakozesa buyinza bw'ani? Kyebaliva babasalira mmwe omusango." 
Luke11:20 Naye oba ng'emyoyo emibi ngigoba ku bantu nga nkozesa buyinza bwa Katonda, kale Obwakabaka bwa Katonda butuuse mu mmwe." 
Luke11:21 “Omuntu ow'amaanyi, alina ebyokulwanyisa, bw'akuuma ennyumba ye, ebintu bye biba mirembe." 
Luke11:22 Kyokka amusinga amaanyi bw'amulumba n'amuwangula, atwala ebyokulwanyisa bye by'abadde yeesiga, n'ebintu bye ebinyage n'abigaba." 
Luke11:23 “Ataba ku ludda lwange, mulabe wange, era atannyamba kukuŋŋaanya, asaasaanya." 
Luke11:24 “Omwoyo omubi bwe guva ku muntu, guyitaayita mu bifo ebitaliimu mazzi, nga gunoonya we gunaawummulira. Bwe gutazuulawo, gugamba nti: ‘Nja kudda mu nnyumba yange mwe nava.’" 
Luke11:25 Bwe gudda, gugisanga ng'eyereddwa, era ng'etegekeddwa bulungi." 
Luke11:26 Olwo ne gugenda ne guleeta emirala musanvu egigusinga obubi, ne giyingira ne gibeera omwo. Embeera y'omuntu oyo ey'oluvannyuma, n'eba mbi okusinga eyasooka.”" 
Luke11:27 Awo olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yali akyayogera ebyo, omukazi eyali mu kibiina ky'abantu, n'ayimusa eddoboozi n'amugamba nti: “Olubuto mwe wakulira lwa mukisa, n'amabeere agaakuyonsa ga mukisa!”" 
Luke11:28 Kyokka Yesu n'agamba nti: “Abasinga okuba ab'omukisa beebo abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda ne bakikolerako.” 
Luke11:29 Awo Yesu, abantu bangi bwe baakuŋŋaanira w'ali, n'atandika okugamba nti: “Abantu b'omulembe guno bantu babi! Basaba akabonero, naye tewali kabonero kajja kubaweebwa okuggyako akabonero ka Yona." 
Luke11:30 Kale nga Yona bwe yali akabonero eri abantu b'e Nineeve, bw'atyo n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'ajja okuba eri abantu b'omulembe guno." 
Luke11:31 Kabaka omukazi ow'omu bukiikaddyo alisituka ng'abantu b'omulembe guno basalirwa omusango, n'abalumiriza omusango okubasinga, kubanga yava ku nkomerero y'ensi n'ajja okuwuliriza ebigambo bya Solomooni eby'amagezi. Naye laba asinga Solomooni ali wano." 
Luke11:32 Abantu b'e Nineeve balisituka ng'abantu b'omulembe guno basalirwa omusango, ne babalumiriza omusango okubasinga, kubanga bo beenenya nga Yona abategeezezza ekigambo kya Katonda, naye laba asinga Yona ali wano." 
Luke11:33 “Omuntu takoleeza ttaala n'agikweka mu kinnya oba mu kibbo, wabula agiteeka ku kikondo, abantu abayingira balyoke balabe ekitangaala." 
Luke11:34 Ettaala y'omubiri gwo lye liiso lyo. Eriiso lyo bwe liba eddamu, omubiri gwo gwonna gujjula obutangaavu. Naye bwe litaba ddamu, omubiri gwo gujjula ekizikiza." 
Luke11:35 Kale nno weetegereze oba ng'obutangaavu mu ggwe, si kizikiza." 
Luke11:36 Kale singa omubiri gwo gwonna gujjula obutangaavu, era nga tegulina kitundu na kimu kya kizikiza, gulitangaalira ddala, ng'ettaala bw'ekumulisa n'ekitangaala kyayo.”" 
Luke11:37 Yesu bwe yamaliriza okwogera ebyo, Omufarisaayo n'amusaba okulya naye ekyemisana. Awo Yesu n'ayingira n'atuula okulya." 
Luke11:38 Omufarisaayo ne yeewuunya okulaba nga Yesu tasoose kunaaba nga tannalya. 
Luke11:39 Awo Mukama waffe n'amugamba nti: “Mmwe Abafarisaayo mwoza kungulu wa bikopo, na kungulu wa bibya. Naye mu mitima gyammwe mujjudde obunyazi n'ebibi." 
Luke11:40 Basirusiru mmwe! Oyo eyatonda ebyokungulu, si ye yatonda n'ebyomunda?" 
Luke11:41 Naye ebiri mu ndeku n'ebiri mu bibya mubigabire abaavu, olwo ebintu byonna bijja kubabeerera birongoofu." 
Luke11:42 “Naye mmwe Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona! Muwa ekimu eky'ekkumi ku buli kika kya muddo oguwunyisa obulungi era oguwoomesa enva, naye ne mulagajjalira obwenkanya n'okwagala Katonda. Bino biteekwa okukolebwa, na biri nga tebiragajjalirwa." 
Luke11:43 “Mmwe Abafarisaayo, muli ba kubonaabona! Mwagala ebifo ebisinga obulungi mu makuŋŋaaniro, n'okulamusibwa mu butale." 
Luke11:44 Muli ba kubonaabona mmwe! Muli ng'amalaalo agatalabika, abantu ge batambulirako ne batagamanya nti malaalo.”" 
Luke11:45 Awo omu ku bannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'amugamba nti “Muyigiriza, bw'oyogera bw'otyo, nga naffe otuvumye.”" 
Luke11:46 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Nammwe abannyonnyozi b'amateeka, muli ba kubonaabona! Mulagira abantu okwetikka emigugu egiteetikkika, mmwe mwennyini ne mutagikwatako wadde n'olugalo lwammwe olumu." 
Luke11:47 Muli ba kubonaabona mmwe! Muzimba amalaalo g'abalanzi, sso nga battibwa bajjajjammwe." 
Luke11:48 Bwe mutyo mulaga nti musiima bajjajjammwe bye baakola. Bo batta abalanzi, ate mmwe ne muzimba amalaalo g'abalanzi abo." 
Luke11:49 N'olwekyo Amagezi ga Katonda kyegava gagamba nti: ‘Ndibatumira abalanzi n'abatume, abamu ku bo balibatta, n'abalala balibayigganya.’" 
Luke11:50 Omusaayi gw'abalanzi bonna ogwayiibwa okuva ku kutondebwa kw'ensi, kyeguliva guvunaanibwa abantu b'omulembe guno," 
Luke11:51 okuva ku musaayi gwa Abeeli, okutuuka ku gwa Zakariya eyattirwa wakati wa alutaari, n'ekifo ekitukuvu mu Ssinzizo. Weewaawo, mbagamba nti gulivunaanibwa abantu b'omulembe guno." 
Luke11:52 “Muli ba kubonaabona mmwe abannyonnyozi b'amateeka! Mwaggyawo ekisumuluzo ekisumulula oluggi olw'okumanya, mmwe mwennyini ne mutayingira, ate ne muziyiza abo abaali bayingira.”" 
Luke11:53 Yesu bwe yava mu kifo ekyo, abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo ne batandika okumuketta ennyo n'okumukemereza okwogera ku bintu bingi," 
Luke11:54 nga bamutega okumukwasa mu bigambo by'ayogera. 
Luke12:1 Mu kiseera ekyo, abantu nkumi na nkumi bwe baakuŋŋaana ne batuuka n'okulinnyaganako, Yesu n'asookera ku bayigirizwa be n'abagamba nti: “Mwekuume ekizimbulukusa ky'Abafarisaayo, bwe bukuusa." 
Luke12:2 Buli kintu ekikwekeddwa kirikwekulwa, era buli ekikisiddwa, kirimanyibwa." 
Luke12:3 Byonna bye mwali mwogedde mu nzikiza, birirangirirwa mu musana, ne kye mwali mwogedde mu kaama mu bisenge, kirirangirirwa ku ntikko z'ennyumba." 
Luke12:4 “Mbagamba mmwe mikwano gyange nti temutyanga abo abatta omubiri, oluvannyuma nga tebalina kisingawo kye bayinza kukola." 
Luke12:5 Naye ka mbalage gwe muteekwa okutya: mutyenga Katonda alina obuyinza ng'amaze okutta, okusuula mu muliro ogutazikira. Weewaawo mbagamba nti: mumutyenga!" 
Luke12:6 “Enkazaluggya ttaano tezigula busente mpa we buzira? Naye tewali wadde emu ku zo eyeerabirwa mu maaso ga Katonda. 
Luke12:7 Era n'enviiri ez'oku mitwe gyammwe zonna mbale. Temutya, muli ba muwendo okusinga enkazaluggya ennyingi." 
Luke12:8 “Era mbagamba nti buli anjatula mu maaso g'abantu, n'Omwana w'Omuntu alimwatula mu maaso ga bamalayika ba Katonda." 
Luke12:9 Naye oyo anneegaana mu maaso g'abantu, alyegaanibwa mu maaso ga bamalayika ba Katonda." 
Luke12:10 “Era buli ayogera obubi ku Mwana w'Omuntu, alisonyiyibwa; naye oyo avuma Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, talisonyiyibwa." 
Luke12:11 Bwe babatwalanga mu makuŋŋaaniro, oba mu maaso g'abalamuzi oba ag'ab'obuyinza, temweraliikiriranga bwe munaddamu oba kye munaayanukula, oba kye munaayogera." 
Luke12:12 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu alibategeeza mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini, bye musaanidde okwogera.”" 
Luke12:13 Awo omu mu kibiina ky'abantu, n'agamba Yesu nti: “Muyigiriza, gamba muganda wange angabanyize ku by'obusika bwaffe.”" 
Luke12:14 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Owange, ani yanteekawo okubalamula oba okubagabanyizaamu ebyammwe?”" 
Luke12:15 Awo n'agamba abaaliwo nti: “Mutunule era mwekuume okululunkanira ebintu, kubanga obulamu bw'omuntu tebuba mu bya kufuna ne bw'aba na bingi bitya.”" 
Luke12:16 Awo n'abagerera olugero ng'agamba nti: “Waaliwo omuntu omugagga eyalina ennimiro, n'eyeza ebibala." 
Luke12:17 Ne yeebuuza mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Kiki kye nnaakola? Sirina we nnaateeka bibala byange!’ 
Luke12:18 N'agamba nti: ‘Kiikino kye nnaakola. Nja kumenyawo ennyumba zange mwe ntereka, nzimbe ezisingawo obunene. Omwo mwe nnaatereka ebirime byonna eby'empeke, n'ebintu byange ebirala." 
Luke12:19 Olwo ndigamba omwoyo gwange nti mwoyo gwange, olina ebintu bingi ebiterekeddwa okumala emyaka mingi. Wummula, olye, onywe, osanyuke!’" 
Luke12:20 Kyokka Katonda n'amugamba nti: ‘Musirusiru ggwe! Mu kiro kino obulamu bwo bwa kukuggyibwako. Kale by'otegese binaaba by'ani?’ 
Luke12:21 Bw'atyo bw'aba eyeeterekera ebyobugagga, sso nga si mugagga mu bya Katonda.”" 
Luke12:22 Awo Yesu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Kyenva mbagamba nti temweraliikiriranga bulamu bwammwe, kye munaalya, newaakubadde emibiri gyammwe, kye munaayambala." 
Luke12:23 Obulamu bwa muwendo okusinga emmere, n'omubiri gwa muwendo okusinga ebyokwambala." 
Luke12:24 Mutunuulire nnamuŋŋoona. Tasiga, takungula, era talina kisenge wadde ennyumba mw'atereka, naye Katonda amuwa emmere. Mmwe temusinga nnyo ebinyonyi?" 
Luke12:25 Era ani ku mmwe bwe yeeraliikirira, ayinza okwongera wadde ekiseera ekitono ku buwanvu bw'obulamu bwe?" 
Luke12:26 Kale oba nga temuyinza kukola wadde ekintu ekitono ng'ekyo, lwaki mweraliikirira ebirala?" 
Luke12:27 Mutunuulire amalanga. Tegakola mulimu, wadde okuluka engoye, naye mbagamba nti newaakubadde Solomooni mu kitiibwa kye kyonna, teyayambalanga ng'erimu ku go." 
Luke12:28 Oba nga Katonda ayambaza bw'atyo omuddo oguliwo mu nnimiro olwaleero, ate enkeera ne gusuulibwa ku kikoomi, talisingawo nnyo okwambaza mmwe, abalina okukkiriza okutono?" 
Luke12:29 “Mmwe temwemaliranga ku kunoonya kye munaalya, oba kye munaanywa, era temweraliikiriranga." 
Luke12:30 Ebyo byonna abantu ab'ensi bye beemalirako. Mmwe Kitammwe amanyi nti bino mubyetaaga. 
Luke12:31 Naye mwemalirenga ku Bwakabaka bwe, ebyo nabyo biribaweebwa." 
Luke12:32 “Temutya, mmwe ekibiina ekitono, kubanga Kitammwe yasiima okubawa Obwakabaka." 
Luke12:33 Mutunde ebintu byammwe, mugabire abaavu, mwekolere ensawo ezitaggwaamu nsimbi, mweterekere obugagga obutaggwaawo mu ggulu, omubbi gy'atatuuka, era eteri nnyenje kubwonoona," 
Luke12:34 kubanga obugagga bwammwe gye buba n'omutima gwammwe gye guba. 
Luke12:35 “Mube beetegefu nga mwesibye ebimyu byammwe, era n'ettaala zammwe nga zaaka." 
Luke12:36 Era mube ng'abantu abalindirira mukama waabwe okudda ng'ava ku mbaga ey'obugole, balyoke bamuggulirewo amangwago nga yaakakonkona." 
Luke12:37 Ba mukisa abaddu abo, mukama waabwe bw'alijja, b'alisanga nga batunula. Mazima mbagamba nti alyesiba ekimyu n'abatuuza okulya, n'agenda ng'abaweereza." 
Luke12:38 Singa ajja ekiro mu luwalo olwokubiri oba olwokusatu olw'okukuuma, n'abasanga bwe batyo, abaddu abo ba mukisa." 
Luke12:39 Era mumanye kino nti singa nnannyini nnyumba amanya essaawa omubbi gy'anajjiramu, yanditunudde, n'ataleka nnyumba ye kumenyebwa na kuyingirwa." 
Luke12:40 Nammwe mubenga beetegefu, kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu alijjira mu kiseera kye mutamusuubiriramu.”" 
Luke12:41 Peetero n'agamba nti: “Mukama waffe, olugero luno olugeredde ffe oba olugeredde bonna?”" 
Luke12:42 Mukama waffe n'agamba nti: “Kale ani omuwanika omwesigwa omwegendereza, mukama we gw'aliteekawo okulabirira abaweereza be, abawe omugabo gwabwe ogw'emmere mu kiseera kyayo?" 
Luke12:43 Wa mukisa omuddu oyo, mukama we bw'alijja gw'alisanga ng'akola bw'atyo." 
Luke12:44 Mazima mbagamba nti alimuteekawo okulabirira ebintu bye byonna. 
Luke12:45 Naye omuddu oyo singa agamba mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Mukama wange aluddewo okujja,’ n'atandika okukuba abaddu n'abazaana, era n'atandika okulya n'okunywa, n'okutamiira," 
Luke12:46 kale mukama w'omuddu oyo alijjira ku lunaku lw'atamulindirira, ne mu ssaawa gy'atamanyi. Alimutemamu wabiri, n'amuteeka wamu n'abatakkiriza." 
Luke12:47 “Ate omuddu eyamanya mukama we ky'ayagala, kyokka n'atategeka oba n'atakola nga mukama we bw'ayagala, alikubibwa emiggo mingi." 
Luke12:48 Wabula oyo ataamanya, n'akola ekimusaanyiza okukubibwa, alikubwa mitono. Buli eyaweebwa ebingi, alisabibwa bingi; n'oyo gwe baateresa ebingi, balimubuuza ebisingawo ku bye yateresebwa." 
Luke12:49 “Najja kukoleeza muliro ku nsi. Singa nno gwase! 
Luke12:50 Nnina okubatizibwa kwe ŋŋenda okubatizibwamu, era neeraliikirira nnyo okutuusa lwe kulituukirizibwa." 
Luke12:51 Mulowooza nti najja kuleeta mirembe ku nsi? Mbagamba nti si bwe kiri, wabula okwawukana." 
Luke12:52 Okuva kati, abataano mu nnyumba emu balyesalamu, abasatu ne bawakanya ababiri, n'ababiri ne bawakanya abasatu." 
Luke12:53 Bano balyesalamu: nnyina w'omwana ne muwala we; omuwala ne nnyina; nnyazaala ne muka mwana we; muka mwana ne nnyazaala we.” 
Luke12:54 Ate n'agamba n'ebibiina by'abantu nti: “Bwe mulaba ekire nga kiva ebugwanjuba, amangwago mugamba nti: ‘Enkuba eneetonnya.’ Era bwe kityo bwe kiba." 
Luke12:55 Era empewo ey'omu bukiikaddyo bw'efuuwa, mugamba nti: ‘Omusana gujja kwaka nnyo.’ Era bwe kiba." 
Luke12:56 Bakuusa mmwe! Mumanyi okunnyonnyola amakulu g'endabika y'ensi n'ey'eggulu. Kale lwaki temumanyi makulu ga kiseera kino? 
Luke12:57 “Lwaki mmwe mwennyini temwesalirawo kituufu? 
Luke12:58 Bw'oba ng'ogenda ew'omulamuzi n'omuntu akuwawaabira, fuba okutabagana naye nga mukyali mu kkubo, aleme okukutwala ew'omulamuzi, n'omulamuzi okukuwa omuserikale, n'omuserikale n'akusuula mu kkomera." 
Luke12:59 Nkugamba nti omwo tolivaamu okutuusa lw'olisasula ssente esembayo.” 
Luke13:1 Awo mu kiseera ekyo, ne wabaawo abaabuulira Yesu ku Bagalilaaya Pilaato be yatta, n'atabula omusaayi gwabwe wamu n'ogw'ebitambiro byabwe." 
Luke13:2 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Olw'okubanga Abagalilaaya bano baabonyaabonyezebwa batyo, mulowooza nti baali boonoonyi okusinga Abagalilaaya abalala bonna?" 
Luke13:3 Mbagamba nti si bwe kiri. Naye bwe muteenenya, nammwe mwenna mulizikirira." 
Luke13:4 Oba bali ekkumi n'omunaana, omunaala be gwagwako e Silowaamu ne gubatta mulowooza nti bo baali boonoonyi okusinga abantu bonna abaali mu Yerusaalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Mbagamba nti si bwe kiri. Naye bwe muteenenya, nammwe mwenna mulizikirira.”" 
Luke13:6 Awo Yesu n'agera olugero luno nti: “Waaliwo omuntu eyalina omuti omutiini, ogwali gusimbiddwa mu nnimiro ye ey'emizabbibu. N'ajja okugunoonyaako ebibala, n'atasangako na kimu." 
Luke13:7 N'agamba omulimi w'ennimiro nti: ‘Laba, kati emyaka esatu nga nzija okunoonya ebibala ku mutiini guno, ne sibisangako. Gutemewo, ate gwonoonera ki ettaka?’" 
Luke13:8 Kyokka omulimi w'ennimiro n'amuddamu nti: ‘Mukama wange, guleke ne mu mwaka guno, mmale okugutemeratemera n'okuguteekako ebigimusa." 
Luke13:9 Singa gulibala ebibala omwaka ogujja, kirungi; bwe gutalibala, oligutemawo.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato, Yesu yali ayigiriza mu limu ku makuŋŋaaniro." 
Luke13:11 Waaliwo omukazi eyaliko omwoyo omubi, ogwali gumumazeemu amaanyi okumala emyaka kkumi na munaana. Yali yeewese, era nga tayinza kwegolola n'akatono." 
Luke13:12 Yesu bwe yamulaba, n'amuyita n'amugamba nti: “Mukazi wattu, oggyiddwako obulwadde bwo.”" 
Luke13:13 N'amukwatako, amangwago omukazi n'aba mugolokofu, n'atendereza Katonda." 
Luke13:14 Kyokka omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro n'anyiiga, kubanga Yesu awonyezza ku Sabbaato. N'agamba ekibiina ky'abantu nti: “Ennaku ziri mukaaga eziteekwa okukolerwako emirimu. Kale mujjenga ku ezo muwonyezebwe, naye si ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato.”" 
Luke13:15 Mukama waffe n'amuddamu nti: “Bakuusa mmwe! Buli omu ku mmwe tayimbula nte ye, oba ndogoyi ye mu kisibo ku Sabbaato, n'agitwala okunywa?" 
Luke13:16 Kale omukazi ono, muzzukulu wa Aburahamu, Sitaani gw'abadde asibye okumala emyaka ekkumi n'omunaana, abadde tasaanidde kuggyibwa mu busibe buno ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato?”" 
Luke13:17 Bwe yali ng'ayogera bino, abalabe be ne bakwatibwa ensonyi, ate ekibiina ky'abantu kyonna ne kisanyuka olwa byonna eby'ettendo bye yali akola." 
Luke13:18 Yesu ate n'agamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bufaanaanyirizibwa na ki, era nnaabugeraageranya na ki?" 
Luke13:19 Bufaanaanyirizibwa n'akasigo ka kaladaali, omuntu ke yatwala n'akasuula mu nnimiro ye, ne kamera, ne kavaamu omuti, era ebinyonyi ne bizimba ebisu mu matabi gaagwo.”" 
Luke13:20 Yesu era n'agamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda nnaabugeraageranya na ki? 
Luke13:21 Bufaanaanyirizibwa n'ekizimbulukusa, omukazi kye yaddira, n'akitabula mu bibbo bisatu eby'obutta, bwonna ne buzimbulukuka.”" 
Luke13:22 Awo Yesu n'ayitaayita mu bibuga ne mu byalo ng'ayigiriza, ng'agenda e Yerusaalemu." 
Luke13:23 Omu n'amubuuza nti: “Mukama wange, abalokolebwa be batono?” Yesu n'abagamba nti:" 
Luke13:24 “Mufube okuyingirira mu mulyango omufunda. Mbagamba nti bangi baligezaako okuyingira, ne batasobola." 
Luke13:25 Nnannyini nnyumba bw'aliba amaze okusituka n'aggalawo oluggi, muliyimirira wabweru, ne mutandika okukonkona ku luggi nga mugamba nti: ‘Ssebo, tuggulirewo!’ Alibaddamu nti: ‘Sibamanyi gye muva.’" 
Luke13:26 Olwo mulitandika okugamba nti: ‘Twaliiranga era twanyweranga mu maaso go, era wayigirizanga mu nguudo zaffe.’" 
Luke13:27 Aliddamu ng'agamba nti: ‘Simanyi gye muva. Muve we ndi, mwenna abakozi b'ebibi.’" 
Luke13:28 Walibaawo okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji, bwe muliraba Aburahamu ne Yisaaka ne Yakobo, n'abalanzi bonna, mu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda, naye mmwe nga musuuliddwa ebweru." 
Luke13:29 Era abantu baliva ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba, ne mu bukiikakkono ne ddyo, ne batuula ku mbaga mu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Luke13:30 Era laba, waliwo ab'oluvannyuma abaliba ab'olubereberye, era waliwo ab'olubereberye abaliba ab'oluvannyuma.”" 
Luke13:31 Mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini, Abafarisaayo abamu ne bajja, ne bagamba Yesu nti: “Va wano ogende, kubanga Herode ayagala kukutta.”" 
Luke13:32 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mugambe ekibe ekyo nti: ‘Laba, ngoba emyoyo emibi ku bantu, era mponya abalwadde leero ne jjo, ate luli mmaliriza.’" 
Luke13:33 Naye leero ne jjo ne luli, nteekwa okwongera okutambula, kubanga tekiyinzika omulanzi okuttirwa awantu awalala okuggyako mu Yerusaalemu." 
Luke13:34 “Yerusaalemu, Yerusaalemu, ggwe atta abalanzi era akuba amayinja abatumibwa gy'oli! Emirundi emeka gye nayagala okukuŋŋaanya abaana bo ng'enkoko bw'ekuŋŋaanya obwana bwayo mu biwaawaatiro byayo, ne mutakkiriza?" 
Luke13:35 Laba ennyumba yammwe ebalekerwa nga kifulukwa. Era mbagamba nti temulindaba, okutuusa lwe muligamba nti: ‘Atenderezebwe oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama.’ ”"
