John5:11 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Oli amponyezza, ye yaŋŋambye nti: ‘Weetikke akatanda ko, otambule.’ ”" 
John5:12 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Omuntu oyo ye ani eyakugambye nti: ‘Weetikke akatanda ko, otambule?’ ”" 
John5:13 Kyokka eyawonyezebwa yali tamumanyi, kubanga Yesu yali abulidde mu bantu abangi abaali mu kifo ekyo." 
John5:14 Oluvannyuma, Yesu n'asanga omuntu oyo mu Ssinzizo, n'amugamba nti: “Laba, kati owonyezeddwa, toddangayo okwonoona, akabi akasinga kaleme kukubaako.”" 
John5:15 Omuntu oyo n'agenda n'abuulira Abayudaaya nti Yesu ye yamuwonya. 
John5:16 Abayudaaya kyebaava bayigganya Yesu, kubanga yakola ebintu ebiri ng'ekyo ku Sabbaato." 
John5:17 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Kitange bulijjo akola, nange nteekwa okukola.”" 
John5:18 Abayudaaya kyebaava beeyongera okusala amagezi okumutta, kubanga teyakoma ku kya kumenya Sabbaato kyokka, naye yeeyita n'Omwana wa Katonda, ne yeefuula eyenkanankana ne Katonda." 
John5:19 Awo Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti Omwana talina ky'ayinza kukola ku bubwe, wabula ekyo ky'alaba nga Kitaawe akikola, kubanga ye by'akola, n'Omwana by'akola." 
John5:20 Kitaawe w'Omwana oyo, amwagala, amulaga byonna ye yennyini by'akola. Era alimulaga n'ebisinga ku ebyo, mulyoke mwewuunye." 
John5:21 “Nga Kitaawe bw'azuukiza abafu n'abazzaamu obulamu, bw'atyo n'Omwana awa obulamu abo b'ayagala okubuwa." 
John5:22 Era Kitaawe talina n'omu gw'asalira musango, wabula Omwana gwe yawa okusala emisango gyonna," 
John5:23 bonna balyoke bassengamu Omwana ekitiibwa, nga bwe bakissa mu Kitaawe. Atassaamu Mwana kitiibwa, nga ne Kitaawe eyamutuma, tamutaddeemu kitiibwa." 
John5:24 “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti awulira ebigambo byange, n'akkiriza oyo eyantuma, aba n'obulamu obutaggwaawo, era tasalirwa musango. Aba avudde mu kufa, ng'atuuse mu bulamu." 
John5:25 Mazima ddala mbagamba nti ekiseera kijja, era kituuse, abafu lwe baliwulira eddoboozi ly'Omwana wa Katonda. Era abo abaliwulira, baliba balamu." 
John5:26 “Nga Katonda bw'ali ensibuko y'obulamu, bw'atyo bwe yawa Omwana we okuba ensibuko y'obulamu." 
John5:27 Era yamuwa obuyinza okusala emisango, kubanga ye Mwana w'Omuntu." 
John5:28 Ekyo temukyewuunya, kubanga ekiseera kijja, bonna abali mu ntaana lwe baliwulira eddoboozi lye," 
John5:29 ne bazivaamu. Abo abaakolanga ebirungi, barizuukira ne baba balamu. Abo abaakolanga ebibi, balizuukira ne basingibwa omusango." 
John5:30 “Nze siyinza kubaako kye nkola ku bwange. Nsala omusango, nga Katonda bw'andagira okugusala. N'olwekyo ensala yange eba ntuufu, kubanga sikolera ku kye njagala, wabula ku ekyo eyantuma ky'ayagala." 
John5:31 “Singa nneewaako obujulirwa, obujulirwa bwange tebuba bwa mazima." 
John5:32 Waliwo omulala ampaako obujulirwa, era mmanyi nti obujulirwa bw'ampaako bwa mazima." 
John5:33 Mmwe mwatuma ababaka eri Yowanne, n'ayogera eky'amazima." 
John5:34 Si lwa kuba nti njagala okujulirwa omuntu obuntu, naye njogera ebyo mulyoke mulokolebwe." 
John5:35 Yowanne yali ttaala eyaka era emulisa. Naye mmwe mwayagala kumala kaseera buseera, nga musanyukira mu kitangaala kye." 
John5:36 “Naye nnina obujulirwa obusinga n'obwa Yowanne bwe yawa. Ebyo byennyini bye nkola, Kitange bye yandagira okutuukiriza, bye biraga nti Kitange ye yantuma." 
John5:37 Ne Kitange eyantuma, naye yennyini anjulira. Mmwe temuwuliranga ku ddoboozi lye n'akatono, wadde okulaba bw'afaanana." 
John5:38 Era ekigambo kye temukikuuma mu mitima gyammwe, kubanga temukkiriza oyo gwe yatuma." 
John5:39 “Mwekenneenya ebyawandiikibwa, kubanga mulowooza nti mu byo, mwe muli obulamu obutaggwaawo. Sso nabyo byennyini binjogerako," 
John5:40 era mmwe ne musigala nga temwagala kujja gye ndi, okufuna obulamu." 
John5:41 “Sinoonya kusiimibwa bantu. 
John5:42 Naye mmwe mbamanyi nga temuliimu kwagala Katonda. 
John5:43 Nze najja mu linnya lya Kitange, naye mmwe temunnyaniriza. Omulala bw'ajja ku bubwe, oyo mujja kumwaniriza." 
John5:44 Kale muyinza mutya okukkiriza, nga munoonya kutendebwa bantu bannammwe, sso nga temufa ku kutendebwa Katonda Omu yekka?" 
John5:45 “Temulowooza nti nze ndibawawaabira eri Kitange. Alibawawaabira ye Musa, mmwe gwe mulinamu essuubi." 
John5:46 Singa mukkiriza Musa, nange mwandinzikirizza, kubanga yawandiika ebinjogerako." 
John5:47 Kale oba nga temukkiriza bye yawandiika, munakkiriza mutya ebigambo byange?”" 
John6:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yesu n'alaga emitala w'ennyanja ey'e Galilaaya, ey'e Tiberiya." 
John6:2 Abantu bangi nnyo ne bamugoberera, kubanga baalaba ebyewuunyo bye yakola, mu kuwonya abalwadde." 
John6:3 Yesu n'alinnya ku lusozi, n'atuula eyo wamu n'abayigirizwa be." 
John6:4 Embaga y'Abayudaaya Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, yali kumpi okutuuka." 
John6:5 Yesu bwe yasitula amaaso, n'alaba abantu bangi nnyo nga bajja gy'ali, n'agamba Filipo nti: “Tunaagula wa emmere, abantu bano gye banaalya?”" 
John6:6 Ekyo yakyogera kumugeza, ye ng'amanyi ky'agenda okukola." 
John6:7 Filipo n'amuddamu nti: “Emmere egula denaari ebikumi ebibiri teyinza kubabuna, buli muntu okulyako wadde akatono.”" 
John6:8 Omulala ku bayigirizwa be, Andereya muganda wa Simooni Peetero, n'amugamba nti:" 
John6:9 “Wano waliwo omulenzi alina emigaati etaano egya bbaale, n'ebyennyanja bibiri. Naye bino binaagasa ki, ku bantu abangi bwe bati?”" 
John6:10 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Mutuuze abantu.” Waaliwo essubi lingi mu kifo ekyo. Awo abantu bonna ne batuula. Abasajja baali ng'enkumi ttaano. 
John6:11 Awo Yesu n'atoola emigaati, ne yeebaza Katonda, n'agigabira abantu abatudde. Ne ku byennyanja n'akola bw'atyo. Bonna ne bafuna nga bwe baagala." 
John6:12 Bwe baamala okukkuta, n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mukuŋŋaanye obutundutundu obusigaddewo, buleme kwonooneka.”" 
John6:13 Ne babukuŋŋaanya, ne bajjuza ebibbo kkumi na bibiri eby'obutundutundu obw'emigaati etaano egya bbaale, obwasigalawo nga bamaze okulya." 
John6:14 Abantu bwe baalaba ekyewuunyo Yesu kye yakola, ne bagamba nti: “Ddala ono ye mulanzi alindirirwa okujja mu nsi!”" 
John6:15 Yesu bwe yategeera nga baali banaatera okujja okumukwata bamufuule kabaka, n'addayo ku lusozi, n'abeera eyo yekka." 
John6:16 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, abayigirizwa be ne baserengeta ku nnyanja," 
John6:17 ne basaabala mu lyato, ne bawunguka okugenda e Kafarunawumu. Obudde bwali nga buzibye, ate nga ne Yesu tannajja gye bali." 
John6:18 Awo omuyaga ne gukunta mungi, ennyanja n'esiikuuka." 
John6:19 Bwe baamala okuvugako kilomita nga nnya oba ttaano, ne balaba Yesu ng'atambula ku mazzi, ng'asemberera eryato, ne batya." 
John6:20 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Ye Nze, temutya!”" 
John6:21 Baali baagala okumuyingiza mu lyato, amangwago eryato ne ligoba ku ttale gye baali bagenda." 
John6:22 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, abantu bangi abaali basigadde emitala w'ennyanja, ne balaba nga waliwo eryato limu, era ne bamanya nga Yesu yali tasaabadde mu lyato wamu n'abayigirizwa be, wabula abayigirizwa be nga baagenze bokka." 
John6:23 Awo amaato amalala ne gava e Tiberiya, ne gagoba okumpi n'ekifo abantu we baaliira emigaati, nga Mukama waffe amaze okwebaza Katonda." 
John6:24 Abantu bwe baalaba nga Yesu taliiwo, wadde abayigirizwa be, nabo ne basaabala mu maato, ne bajja e Kafarunawumu nga bamunoonya." 
John6:25 Abantu bwe baasanga Yesu emitala w'ennyanja, ne bamubuuza nti: “Muyigiriza, wazze ddi wano?”" 
John6:26 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti munnoonya si lwa kubanga mwalaba ebyewuunyo bye nkola, naye lwa kubanga mwalya emigaati ne mukkuta." 
John6:27 Muleme kuteganira mmere eggwaawo, naye muteganire emmere ey'olubeerera, ewa abantu obulamu obutaggwaawo, Omwana w'Omuntu gy'alibawa. Katonda Kitaawe yamussaako akabonero akalaga obuyinza bwe.”" 
John6:28 Awo ne bamubuuza nti: “Tukole ki okutuukiriza ebyo Katonda by'ayagala?” 
John6:29 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Katonda ky'ayagala mukole, kwe kukkiriza oyo gwe yatuma.”" 
John6:30 Ne bamugamba nti: “Kyewuunyo ki ggwe ky'okola, tukirabe tulyoke tukkirize? Kiruwa ky'okola?" 
John6:31 Bajjajjaffe baalya mannu mu ddungu, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Yabawa omugaati oguva mu ggulu balye.’ ”" 
John6:32 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti Musa si ye yabawa omugaati oguva mu ggulu, wabula Kitange ye abawa omugaati ddala oguva mu ggulu," 
John6:33 kubanga omugaati Katonda gw'agaba, gwe gwo oguva mu ggulu, era oguleetera abantu obulamu.”" 
John6:34 Awo bo ne bamugamba nti: “Ssebo, tuwenga bulijjo omugaati ogwo.”" 
John6:35 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Nze mugaati ogw'obulamu. Ajja gye ndi talumwa njala. Anzikiriza talumwa nnyonta n'akatono. 
John6:36 “Nabagamba dda nti mundabye ne mutakkiriza. 
John6:37 Buli muntu Kitange gw'ampa, alijja we ndi, era buli ajja gye ndi, sirimugobera bweru n'akatono," 
John6:38 kubanga nava mu ggulu okukola eyantuma ky'ayagala, sso si nze kye njagala." 
John6:39 Kino eyantuma ky'ayagala, ku bonna be yampa, nneme kufiirwako n'omu, wabula bonna mbazuukize ku lunaku olw'enkomerero." 
John6:40 Kitange ky'ayagala kye kino: buli alaba nze Omwana we n'anzikiriza, abe n'obulamu obutaggwaawo, era ndimuzuukiza ku lunaku olw'enkomerero.”" 
John6:41 Awo Abayudaaya ne beemulugunyiza Yesu kubanga yagamba nti: “Nze mugaati ogwava mu ggulu.” 
John6:42 Ne bagamba nti: “Ono si ye Yesu omwana wa Yosefu? Kitaawe ne nnyina tubamanyi. Kale ayinza atya okugamba nti: ‘Nava mu ggulu?’ ” 
John6:43 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Muleke kwemulugunya. 
John6:44 Tewali ayinza kujja gye ndi wabula nga Kitange eyantuma ye amusise, ate nze ndimuzuukiza ku lunaku olw'enkomerero." 
John6:45 Kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'abalanzi nti: ‘Bonna Katonda alibayigiriza.’ Buli eyawulira Kitange n'ayiga, ajja gye ndi." 
John6:46 Si kwe kugamba nti waliwo eyali alabye Kitange. Oyo eyava ewa Katonda ye yekka eyalaba Kitange. 
John6:47 “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti oyo akkiriza, aba n'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
John6:48 Nze mugaati ogw'obulamu. 
John6:49 Bajjajjammwe baalya mannu mu ddungu, ne bafa." 
John6:50 Guno gwe mugaati oguva mu ggulu, buli agulyako aleme kufa." 
John6:51 Nze mugaati oguwa obulamu ogwava mu ggulu. Omuntu bw'alya ku mugaati guno, aliba mulamu emirembe n'emirembe. Era omugaati gwe ndigaba okuwa abantu obulamu, gwe mubiri gwange.”" 
John6:52 Awo Abayudaaya ne bawakana bokka na bokka nga bagamba nti: “Ono ayinza atya okutuwa omubiri gwe okugulya?” 
John6:53 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti bwe mutalya mubiri gwa Mwana wa Muntu, era bwe mutanywa musaayi gwe, mu mmwe temuba na bulamu." 
John6:54 Oyo alya omubiri gwange, era anywa omusaayi gwange, aba n'obulamu obutaggwaawo. Era ndimuzuukiza ku lunaku olw'enkomerero." 
John6:55 Omubiri gwange kyakulya ddala, n'omusaayi gwange kyakunywa ddala." 
John6:56 “Alya omubiri gwange, era anywa omusaayi gwange, aba mu nze, nange ne mba mu ye." 
John6:57 Nga nze eyatumibwa Kitange bwe ndi omulamu ku bwa Kitange, n'oyo andya aliba mulamu ku bwange." 
John6:58 Guno gwe mugaati ogwava mu ggulu. Teguli ng'ogwo bajjajjammwe gwe baalya ne bafa. Alya omugaati guno, aliba mulamu emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
John6:59 Ebyo Yesu yabyogera ng'ayigiriza mu kuŋŋaaniro e Kafarunawumu. 
John6:60 Awo bangi ku bayigirizwa be bwe baawulira, ne bagamba nti: “Ekigambo ekyo nga kizibu! Ani ayinza okukiwuliriza?”" 
John6:61 Yesu bwe yategeera ng'abayigirizwa be beemulugunya olw'ekyo, n'abagamba nti: “Ekyo kibeesittaza?" 
John6:62 Kale ate bwe muliraba Omwana w'Omuntu ng'alinnya gye yali olubereberye? 
John6:63 Omwoyo gwe guwa obulamu, omubiri teguliiko kye gugasa. Ebigambo bye mbagambye gwe mwoyo era bwe bulamu." 
John6:64 Naye waliwo ku mmwe abatakkiriza.” (Okuviira ddala mu kusooka, Yesu yamanya abo abatakkiriza, era yamanya agenda okumulyamu olukwe)." 
John6:65 Awo n'agamba nti: “Kyenvudde mbagamba nti: ‘Tewali ayinza kujja gye ndi, wabula nga Kitange ye amusobozesezza okujja.’ ”" 
John6:66 Okuva olwo bangi ku bayigirizwa be ne bamuvaako, ne bataddayo kuyitanga naye." 
John6:67 Awo Yesu n'abuuza abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri nti: “Nammwe mwagala kugenda?” 
John6:68 Simooni Peetero n'amuddamu nti: “Mukama waffe, tunaagenda eri ani? Ggwe olina ebigambo eby'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
John6:69 Ffe tukkiriza, era tumanyi nga ggwe Mutuukirivu wa Katonda.”" 
John6:70 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Si nze nabalonda mmwe ekkumi n'ababiri? Naye omu ku mmwe Sitaani!” 
John6:71 Yayogera ku Yuda, omwana wa Simooni Yisikaryoti, kubanga ye yali agenda okumulyamu olukwe, newaakubadde nga yali omu ku bayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri." 
John7:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yesu n'atambula mu Galilaaya. Teyayagala kutambula mu Buyudaaya, kubanga Abayudaaya baali basala amagezi okumutta." 
John7:2 Embaga y'Abayudaaya ey'Ensiisira yali eneetera okutuuka. 
John7:3 Baganda ba Yesu ne bamugamba nti: “Va wano ogende e Buyudaaya, abayigirizwa bo nabo balabe ku ebyo by'okola," 
John7:4 kubanga tewali akweka ekyo ky'akola, bw'aba ng'ayagala amanyike mu lwatu. Ggwe nga bw'okola bino, leka ensi yonna ekumanye.” (" 
John7:5 Ne baganda be bennyini tebaamukkiriza). 
John7:6 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Ekiseera ekyange tekinnatuuka, naye ekiseera ekyammwe bulijjo kibaawo." 
John7:7 Mmwe ensi teyinza kubakyawa, naye nze enkyawa, kubanga ngitegeeza nti ebikolwa by'ekola bibi." 
John7:8 Mmwe mwambuke ku mbaga. Nze sinnatuusa kwambuka ku mbaga eyo, kubanga ekiseera kyange tekinnatuuka.”" 
John7:9 Bwe yamala okubagamba ebyo, n'asigala mu Galilaaya." 
John7:10 Baganda be bwe baamala okwambuka ku mbaga, naye n'ayambuka, si mu lwatu, wabula mu kyama." 
John7:11 Awo Abayudaaya ne bamunoonya ku mbaga, nga beebuuza nti: “Ali ludda wa?”" 
John7:12 Ne wabaawo oluvuuvuumo lungi ku ye mu bantu. Abamu nga bagamba nti: “Mulungi.” Abamu nga bagamba nti: “Nedda, akyamya abantu.”" 
John7:13 Kyokka olw'okutya Abayudaaya, ne wataba amwogerako mu lwatu." 
John7:14 Awo mu makkati g'ekiseera eky'embaga, Yesu n'ayambuka mu Ssinzizo, n'ayigiriza." 
John7:15 Abayudaaya ne beewuunya, ne bagamba nti: “Ono amanyi atya ebingi bwe bityo, sso nga tayigangako?”" 
John7:16 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Bye njigiriza si byange, wabula by'oyo eyantuma." 
John7:17 Buli ayagala okukola Katonda by'ayagala, alitegeera oba nga bye njigiriza biva wa Katonda, oba nga byange ku bwange." 
John7:18 Ayogera ku bubwe anoonya kitiibwa kye, wabula anoonya ekitiibwa ky'oyo eyamutuma, aba wa mazima, era tabaamu bukuusa." 
John7:19 Musa teyabawa Amateeka? Naye ku mmwe tewali akwata Mateeka ago. Lwaki musala amagezi okunzita?” 
John7:20 Ekibiina ky'abantu ne kiddamu nti: “Oliko omwoyo omubi! Ani asala amagezi okukutta?” 
John7:21 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Nakola ekikolwa kimu, mwenna ne mwewuunya." 
John7:22 Kale Musa yabalagira okukomolebwa (newaakubadde tekwatandikira ku Musa, wabula ku bajjajjammwe). Ne ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato mukomola omuntu." 
John7:23 Oba ng'omuntu akomolebwa ku Sabbaato, etteeka lya Musa lireme kumenyebwa, lwaki nze munsunguwalira olw'okuwonya omuntu ku Sabbaato, n'aba mulamu ddala?" 
John7:24 Mulekenga kusala musango nga musinziira ku bya kungulu, naye musalenga omusango, nga mugoba ensonga.”" 
John7:25 Awo abamu ku bantu ab'omu Yerusaalemu ne bagamba nti: “Ono si gwe banoonya okutta? 
John7:26 Ate wuuno ayogera mu lwatu, era tebaliiko kye bamugamba. Ab'obuyinza bandiba nga bategeeredde ddala ng'ono ye Kristo?" 
John7:27 Naye ono tumanyi gy'ava, sso nga Kristo bw'alijja, tewali alimanya gy'ava.”" 
John7:28 Awo Yesu n'akangula ku ddoboozi ng'ayigiriza mu Ssinzizo, n'agamba nti: “Nze mummanyi, era ne gye nva mumanyiiyo, sso sajja ku bwange, wabula oyo eyantuma ddala gyali, kyokka mmwe temumumanyi." 
John7:29 Nze mmumanyi, kubanga nava gy'ali, era ye yantuma.”" 
John7:30 Awo ne basala amagezi okumukwata, kyokka tewaali amukwatako, kubanga ekiseera kye kyali tekinnatuuka." 
John7:31 Era bangi mu kibiina ky'abantu ne bamukkiriza, ne bagamba nti: “Kristo bw'alijja, alikola ebyewuunyo bingi okusinga ono by'akola?”" 
John7:32 Abafarisaayo ne bawulira abantu nga boogera ku Yesu mu bwama. Awo bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo ne batuma abaserikale okumukwata. 
John7:33 Awo Yesu n'agamba nti: “Nja kumala nammwe ebbanga ttono, ndyoke ŋŋende eri oyo eyantuma." 
John7:34 Mulinnoonya, naye temulindaba, nga gye ndi mmwe temuyinza kutuukayo.”" 
John7:35 Awo Abayudaaya ne bagambagana nti: “Ono ayagala kugenda wa gye tutalimulabira? Ayagala kugenda eri abo abaasaasaanira mu Buyonaani, ayigirize Abayonaani?" 
John7:36 Ategeeza ki bw'agamba nti: ‘Mulinnoonya, naye temulindaba,’ era nti: ‘Gye ndibeera temuyinza kutuukayo?’ ”" 
John7:37 Ku lunaku olw'embaga olusembayo era olusingira ddala obukulu, Yesu n'ayimirira, n'ayogera n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, n'agamba nti: “Buli alumwa ennyonta, ajje gye ndi anywe." 
John7:38 Akkiriza nze, ng'ekyawandiikibwa bwe kigamba, ‘Emigga gy'amazzi amalamu girifuluma mu mutima gwe.’ ”" 
John7:39 Ekyo Yesu yakyogera ku Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, abamukkiriza gwe baali bagenda okufuna, kubanga Mwoyo oyo yali tannagabibwa, olw'okubanga Yesu yali tannaba kugulumizibwa." 
John7:40 Abamu mu kibiina ky'abantu ekyo bwe baawulira ebigambo ebyo, ne bagamba nti: “Ddala ono ye mulanzi oli.”" 
John7:41 Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Ono ye Kristo.” Naye abalala ne bagamba nti: “Kristo asibuka mu Galilaaya? 
John7:42 Ekyawandiikibwa tekigamba nti Kristo wa kuva mu zzadde lya Dawudi, era wa kuzaalibwa mu Betilehemu, ekibuga Dawudi mwe yali?”" 
John7:43 Awo ekibiina ky'abantu ne kyawukanamu olwa Yesu. 
John7:44 Abamu ku bo ne baagala okumukwata, kyokka ne wataba amukwatako." 
John7:45 Awo abaserikale ne baddayo eri bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo. Bo ne bababuuza nti: “Lwaki temumuleese?” 
John7:46 Abaserikale ne baddamu nti: “Tewali muntu yali ayogedde ng'oyo bw'ayogera!” 
John7:47 Abafarisaayo ne babaddamu nti: “Era nammwe abakyamizza? 
John7:48 Mu bakulembeze, wadde mu Bafarisaayo, ani yali amukkiriza?" 
John7:49 Ekibiina ky'abantu kino tekitamanyi mateeka, era kikolimiddwa!”" 
John7:50 Nikodemo, omu ku bo, eddako eyagenda eri Yesu, n'abagamba nti:" 
John7:51 “Amateeka gaffe gakkiriza okusalira omuntu omusango nga tebannaba kumuwozesa, n'okutegeera ky'akoze?”" 
John7:52 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Kazzi naawe wava Galilaaya? Weetegereze ebyawandiikibwa, ojja kulaba nti e Galilaaya tesibuka mulanzi.” [" 
John7:53 Buli muntu n'addayo ewuwe. 
John8:1 Awo Yesu n'alaga ku Lusozi olw'emiti Emizayiti. 
John8:2 Ku makya ennyo n'akomawo mu Ssinzizo, abantu bonna ne bajja gy'ali, n'atuula n'abayigiriza." 
John8:3 Awo abannyonnyozi b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, ne baleeta omukazi gwe baakwata ng'ayenda, ne bamuteeka bonna we bayinza okumulabira." 
John8:4 Ne bagamba Yesu nti: “Muyigiriza, omukazi ono asangiddwa ng'ayenda ne bamukwata." 
John8:5 Mu mateeka, Musa yatulagira, ow'engeri eyo okumukuba amayinja afe. Ggwe ogamba ki?”" 
John8:6 Ekyo baakyogera nga bamukema, bafune kye banaasinziirako okumuwawaabira. Naye Yesu n'akutama, n'awandiika ku ttaka n'olunwe lwe." 
John8:7 Bwe beeyongera okumubuuza, n'akutaamulukuka, n'agamba nti: “Mu mmwe atayonoonangako, ye aba asooka okumukuba ejjinja.”" 
John8:8 N'addamu okukutama, n'awandiika ku ttaka n'olunwe lwe." 
John8:9 Bo bwe baawulira ebyo, ne bavaawo kinnoomu, abasinga obukulu nga be basooka. Yesu n'omukazi eyali ayimiridde awo, ne basigalawo bokka." 
John8:10 Yesu n'akutaamulukuka, n'amugamba nti: “Mukazi wattu, baluwa? Tewali akusalidde musango kukusinga?”" 
John8:11 Omukazi n'addamu nti: “Tewali, Ssebo.” Yesu n'agamba nti: “Nange sikusalira musango kukusinga. Genda, naye toddangayo okwonoona.”]" 
John8:12 Awo Yesu n'ayongera okwogera nabo, n'agamba nti: “Nze kitangaala ky'ensi. Angoberera, taatambulirenga mu kizikiza, wabula anaabeeranga n'ekitangaala eky'obulamu.”" 
John8:13 Abafarisaayo ne bamugamba nti: “Weeyogerako, by'oyogera si bya mazima.”" 
John8:14 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Newaakubadde nga neeyogerako, bye njogera bya mazima, kubanga mmanyi gye nava ne gye ndaga. Naye mmwe temumanyi gye nva, wadde gye ndaga." 
John8:15 Mmwe musala omusango ng'abantu obuntu. Nze sisalira muntu musango. 
John8:16 Naye mba kusala musango, ensala yange yandibadde ya mazima, kubanga siri bw'omu, ndi wamu ne Kitange eyantuma." 
John8:17 Ne mu Mateeka gammwe kyawandiikibwa nti obujulizi bw'ababiri kye bukakasa, kiba kya mazima." 
John8:18 Nze neeyogerako, ne Kitange eyantuma akakasa bye njogera.”" 
John8:19 Awo ne bamubuuza nti: “Kitaawo ali ludda wa?” Yesu n'addamu nti: “Nze temummanyi, ne Kitange temumumanyi. Singa nze mummanyi, ne Kitange mwandimumanye.”" 
John8:20 Ebigambo ebyo Yesu yabyogerera mu kifo omuteekebwa ebirabo, bwe yali ng'ayigiriza mu Ssinzizo. Ne wataba n'omu amukwata, kubanga ekiseera kye kyali tekinnatuuka." 
John8:21 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nate nti: “Nze ŋŋenda. Mulinnoonya, naye mulifiira mu bibi byammwe. Nze gye ndaga, mmwe temuyinza kujjayo.”" 
John8:22 Awo Abayudaaya ne bagamba nti: “Agenda kwetta, kyava agamba nti: ‘Nze gye ndaga, mmwe temuyinza kujjayo’?”" 
John8:23 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe muli ba ku nsi, nze ndi wa mu ggulu. Mmwe muli ba ku nsi kuno, nze siri wa ku nsi kuno." 
John8:24 Kyenvudde mbagamba nti mulifiira mu bibi byammwe, kubanga bwe mutakkiriza nti Ye Nze, mulifiira mu bibi byammwe.”" 
John8:25 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Ggwe ani?” Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Nga bwe mbagambye olubereberye. 
John8:26 Nnina bingi eby'okuboogerako, n'okubasalira omusango okubasinga, kyokka oyo eyantuma ddala gyali era ebyo bye nawulira gy'ali, bye ntegeeza abantu.”" 
John8:27 Tebaategeera nti Yesu yali abagamba ku Kitaawe. 
John8:28 Awo n'abagamba nti: “Bwe mulimala okuwanika Omwana w'Omuntu, ne mulyoka mutegeera nga Ye Nze, era nga Nze siriiko kye nkola ku bwange, wabula nga njogera ebyo, Kitange bye yanjigiriza." 
John8:29 Era oyo eyantuma ali nange, tandekanga bw'omu, kubanga bulijjo nkola by'ayagala.”" 
John8:30 Yesu bwe yayogera ebigambo ebyo, bangi ne bamukkiriza." 
John8:31 Awo Yesu, Abayudaaya abaamukkiriza, n'abagamba nti: “Bwe munywerera ku bye mbayigiriza, muba bayigirizwa bange ddala," 
John8:32 era mulitegeera amazima, n'amazima galibafuula ba ddembe.”" 
John8:33 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Ffe tuli bazzukulu ba Aburahamu. Tetubangako baddu ba muntu n'omu. Oyinza otya okugamba nti: ‘Mulifuuka ba ddembe?’ ” 
John8:34 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti buli akola ekibi, aba muddu wa kibi." 
John8:35 Omuddu taba wa lubeerera mu maka, naye omwana aba waamu ennaku zonna." 
John8:36 Kale Omwana bw'alibafuula ab'eddembe, mulibeera ddala ba ddembe." 
John8:37 Mmanyi nga muli bazzukulu ba Aburahamu, naye musala amagezi okunzita, kubanga bye njigiriza temubikkiriza." 
John8:38 Nze njogera ebyo Kitange bye yandaga, nammwe mukola ebyo kitammwe bye yababuulira.”" 
John8:39 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Kitaffe ye Aburahamu.” Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Singa mubadde baana ba Aburahamu, mwandikoze ebyo Aburahamu bye yakola." 
John8:40 Naye kaakano, nze omuntu ababuulidde amazima ge nawulira okuva eri Katonda, musala amagezi okunzita. Aburahamu ekyo takikolanga." 
John8:41 Mmwe mukola ebyo kitammwe bye yakola.” Ne bamugamba nti: “Ffe tetwazaalibwa mu bwenzi. Kitaffe tulina omu, ye Katonda.”" 
John8:42 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Singa Katonda ye Kitammwe, mwandinjagadde, kubanga nava eri Katonda ne njija, era sajja ku bwange, wabula ye ye yantuma." 
John8:43 Lwaki temutegeera bye njogera? Kyemuva mutabitegeera, kubanga temwagala kuwulira bigambo byange." 
John8:44 “Kitammwe ye Sitaani, era mwagala okukola ebyo kitammwe bye yeegomba. Ye okuviira ddala olubereberye mutemu, tanywereranga ku mazima, kubanga mu ye temuli mazima. Bw'ayogera eky'obulimba, aba ayogera ekikye ddala, kubanga ye mulimba, era ye nsibuko y'obulimba." 
John8:45 Naye nze kubanga njogera amazima, temunzikiriza." 
John8:46 “Ani ku mmwe annumiriza ekibi? Bwe njogera amazima lwaki temunzikiriza? 
John8:47 Omuntu wa Katonda, awulira ebigambo bya Katonda. Mmwe kyemuva mulema okubiwulira, kubanga temuli ba Katonda.”" 
John8:48 Abayudaaya ne baddamu Yesu nti: “Tetuli batuufu okugamba nti oli Musamariya, era oliko omwoyo omubi?”" 
John8:49 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Nze siriiko mwoyo mubi, wabula nzisaamu Kitange ekitiibwa, naye mmwe temunzisaamu kitiibwa." 
John8:50 Nze sinoonya kitiibwa kyange. Akinoonya, era alisala omusango waali." 
John8:51 Mazima ddala mbagamba nti buli akwata ekigambo kyange talifa emirembe n'emirembe.” 
John8:52 Abayudaaya ne bamugamba nti: “Kaakano tutegeeredde ddala ng'oliko omwoyo omubi. Aburahamu yafa, n'abalanzi baafa. Ate ggwe ogamba nti: ‘Buli akwata ekigambo kyange, talifa emirembe n'emirembe.’" 
John8:53 Ggwe mukulu okusinga jjajjaffe Aburahamu eyafa? Abalanzi nabo baafa. Ggwe weeyita ani?” 
John8:54 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Singa nze neegulumiza, ekitiibwa kyange tekyandibaddemu kantu. Angulumiza ye Kitange, mmwe gwe mugamba nti ye Katonda wammwe." 
John8:55 Sso temumumanyi, kyokka nze mmumanyi bulungi. Era singa ŋŋamba nti: ‘Simumanyi,’ nandibadde mulimba nga mmwe. Nze mmumanyi, era nkwata ekigambo kye." 
John8:56 Kitammwe Aburahamu yajjula essanyu olw'okusuubira okulaba olunaku lwange. Yalulaba, n'asanyuka.”" 
John8:57 Awo Abayudaaya ne bamugamba nti: “Ggwe atannaweza myaka makumi ataano, ggwe walaba Aburahamu?”" 
John8:58 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti Aburahamu yali tannabaawo, nga Nze wendi." 
John8:59 Awo ne bakwata amayinja okumukuba, kyokka Yesu ne yeekweka, n'afuluma mu Ssinzizo." 
John9:1 Yesu bwe yali ng'ayitawo, n'alaba omuntu eyazaalibwa nga muzibe." 
John9:2 Abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza nti: “Muyigiriza, ono okuzaalibwa nga muzibe, ani yayonoona, ono yennyini, oba bazadde be?”" 
John9:3 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Ono teyayonoona, wadde abazadde be, wabula yazaalibwa nga muzibe, eby'amaanyi Katonda by'akola biryoke biragibwe ku ye." 
John9:4 Ffe tuteekwa okukola emirimu gy'oyo eyantuma, ng'obudde bukyali misana. Ekiro kijja, omuntu ky'atayinza kukoleramu." 
John9:5 Nga nkyali ku nsi, ndi kitangaala ekigyakira.”" 
John9:6 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'awanda amalusu ku ttaka, n'atabula ettaka n'amalusu, n'asiiga muzibe ettaka eryo ku maaso," 
John9:7 n'amugamba nti: “Genda onaabe mu kidiba ky'e Silowaamu” (ekitegeeza “Eyatumibwa”). Awo omuntu oyo n'agenda, n'anaaba, n'adda ng'alaba." 
John9:8 Ab'omuliraano n'abalala abaamulabanga ng'asabiriza, ne bagamba nti: “Ono si ye wuuyo eyatuulanga n'asabiriza?”" 
John9:9 Abamu ne bagamba nti: “Ye wuuyo.” Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Nedda, amufaanana bufaananyi.” Ye n'agamba nti: “Ye nze.”" 
John9:10 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Kale amaaso go gaazibuka gatya?” 
John9:11 Ye n'addamu nti: “Omuntu ayitibwa Yesu yatabula ettaka, n'alinsiiga ku maaso, n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Genda ku Silowaamu onaabe.’ Ne ŋŋenda, ne nnaaba, ne nsobola okulaba.”" 
John9:12 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Ali ludda wa oyo?” N'addamu nti: “Simanyi.” 
John9:13 Awo eyali muzibe ne bamutwala eri Abafarisaayo. 
John9:14 Olunaku olwo, Yesu lwe yatabulirako ettaka, n'azibula omuntu oyo amaaso, lwali lwa Sabbaato." 
John9:15 Awo Abafarisaayo nabo ne babuuza omuntu oyo nga bwe yazibuka amaaso. N'abagamba nti: “Yansiiga ttaka ku maaso, ne nnaaba, ne nsobola okulaba.”" 
John9:16 Abafarisaayo abamu ne bagamba nti: “Omuntu oyo eyakola ekyo tayinza kuba nga yava wa Katonda, kubanga takwata tteeka lya Sabbaato.” Naye abalala ne bagamba nti: “Omuntu omwonoonyi ayinza atya okukola ebyewuunyo ebyenkanidde awo?” Ne wabaawo obutakkiriziganya mu bo." 
John9:17 Awo eyali muzibe ne baddamu okumubuuza nti: “Oyo nga bwe yakuzibula amaaso, ggwe omuyita otya?” Ye n'addamu nti: “Mulanzi.”" 
John9:18 Naye Abayudaaya ne batakkiriza ng'omuntu oyo yali muzibe, oluvannyuma n'asobola okulaba, okutuusa lwe baayita bazadde be," 
John9:19 ne bababuuza nti: “Ono ye mwana wammwe, gwe mugamba nti yazaalibwa nga muzibe? Kale kaakano kiki ekimusobozesezza okulaba?”" 
John9:20 Abazadde be ne baddamu nti: “Tumanyi ng'ono ye mwana waffe, era nga yazaalibwa nga muzibe." 
John9:21 Naye tetumanyi kimusobozesezza kulaba kaakano, era eyamuzibula amaaso, ffe tetumumanyi. Mumubuuze, muntu mukulu, aneeyogerera.”" 
John9:22 Bazadde be baayogera bwe batyo lwa kutya Bayudaaya, kubanga Abayudaaya baali bamaze okukkaanya nti buli muntu ayatula nti Yesu ye Kristo, wa kugobebwa mu kkuŋŋaaniro." 
John9:23 Bazadde be kyebaava bagamba nti: “Muntu mukulu, mubuuze ye.”" 
John9:24 Omulundi ogwokubiri ne bayita oyo eyali muzibe, ne bamugamba nti: “Gulumiza Katonda, oyogere amazima. Ffe tumanyi ng'omuntu oyo mwonoonyi.”" 
John9:25 Ye n'addamu nti: “Oba mwonoonyi, simanyi. Kye mmanyi, nali muzibe, naye kaakano ndaba.”" 
John9:26 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Kiki kye yakukolako? Yakuzibula atya amaaso?” 
John9:27 N'abaddamu nti: “Nababuulidde dda ne mutawuliriza. Kiki ate ekibaagaza okuwulira omulundi ogwokubiri? Nammwe mwagala kufuuka bayigirizwa be?” 
John9:28 Ne bamuvuma, era ne bagamba nti: “Ggwe muyigirizwa we. Naye ffe tuli bayigirizwa ba Musa." 
John9:29 Ffe tumanyi nga Katonda yayogera ne Musa. Naye oyo tetumanyi gy'ava.” 
John9:30 Omuntu ono n'abaddamu nti: “Kino kitalo, mmwe obutamanya gy'ava, sso nga yanzibula amaaso!" 
John9:31 Tumanyi nga Katonda aboonoonyi tabawulira, wabula awulira abo abamussaamu ekitiibwa, era abakola by'ayagala." 
John9:32 Okuva edda n'edda tewawulirwanga yali azibudde maaso ga muntu yazaalibwa nga muzibe. 
John9:33 Omuntu oyo singa teyava wa Katonda, teyandiyinzizza kukola kintu na kimu.”" 
John9:34 Ne bamugamba nti: “Ggwe eyazaalibwa era eyakulira mu bibi, ggwe oyigiriza ffe?” Ne bamusindiikiriza ebweru." 
John9:35 Yesu n'awulira nga bamusindiikirizza ebweru. Bwe yamusanga n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe okkiriza Omwana w'Omuntu?” 
John9:36 Ye n'amuddamu nti: “Ssebo, ye ani mmukkirize?”" 
John9:37 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Omulabye! Ye wuuyo ayogera naawe.” 
John9:38 Ye n'agamba nti: “Mukama wange, nzikiriza.” N'asinza Yesu." 
John9:39 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Najja ku nsi okusala omusango, ababadde batalaba balabe, ate ababadde balaba, babe bamuzibe.”" 
John9:40 Abafarisaayo abamu abaali awo ne Yesu, ne bawulira ng'ayogera bw'atyo, ne bamubuuza nti: “Kwe kugamba naffe tuli bamuzibe?”" 
John9:41 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Singa mubadde bamuzibe, temwandibadde na kibi. Naye kaakano nga bwe mugamba nti: ‘Tulaba’, ekibi kyammwe kibasigalako.”" 
John10:1 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti atayita mu mulyango ng'ayingira mu kisibo ky'endiga, naye n'alinnyira awalala, oyo aba mubbi era munyazi." 
John10:2 Oyo ayita mu mulyango ye musumba w'endiga. 
John10:3 Omuggazi amuggulirawo, n'endiga ziwulira eddoboozi lye. Endiga ze aziyita amannya, n'azifulumya ebweru." 
John10:4 Bw'amala okuzifulumya, azikulembera, ne zimugoberera, kubanga zimanyi eddoboozi lye." 
John10:5 Omulala tezimugoberera, wabula zidduka mudduke, kubanga tezimanyi ddoboozi lye.”" 
John10:6 Yesu yabagerera olugero olwo, naye bo ne batategeera ky'agambye." 
John10:7 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti nze mulyango gw'endiga. 
John10:8 Abalala bonna abansooka okujja babbi era banyazi, naye endiga tezaabawuliriza." 
John10:9 Nze mulyango. Buli ayingirira mu Nze aliba bulungi. Aliyingira, n'afuluma, n'aliisibwa mu ddundiro." 
John10:10 Omubbi ajjirira kubba, na kutta, na kuzikiriza. Nze najja, abantu balyoke babe n'obulamu, era babe nabwo nga bujjuvu." 
John10:11 “Nze musumba omulungi. Omusumba omulungi awaayo obulamu bwe olw'endiga. 
John10:12 Oyo alundira empeera, atali musumba era atali nnannyini ndiga, bw'alaba omusege nga gujja, endiga azireka n'adduka, omusege ne guzirumba, ne guzisaasaanya." 
John10:13 Adduka, kubanga alundira mpeera. Endiga tazifaako." 
John10:14 “Nze musumba omulungi. Ntegeera endiga zange, era n'endiga zange zintegeera." 
John10:15 Nga Kitange bw'antegeera, era nange bwe ntyo bwe ntegeera Kitange, era mpaayo obulamu bwange okukuuma endiga zange." 
John10:16 Nnina n'endiga endala ezitali za mu kisibo kino. Nteekwa nazo okuzireeta. Ziriwulira eddoboozi lyange, era waliba ekisibo kimu n'omusumba omu." 
John10:17 “Kitange kyava anjagala, kubanga mpaayo obulamu bwange ndyoke mbweddize." 
John10:18 Tewali abunzigyako, nze mbuwaayo nzennyini. Nnina obuyinza okubuwaayo, era nnina obuyinza okubweddiza. Ekyo Kitange kye yandagira okukola.”" 
John10:19 Empaka ne zisituka nate mu Bayudaaya olw'ebigambo ebyo. 
John10:20 Bangi ku bo ne bagamba nti: “Aliko omwoyo omubi, era alaluse. Lwaki mumuwuliriza?”" 
John10:21 Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Ebigambo bino si bya muntu aliko mwoyo mubi. Omwoyo omubi guyinza okuzibula amaaso ga muzibe?” 
John10:22 Mu Yerusaalemu, yali mbaga ey'Okutukuza Essinzizo, era bwali budde bwa butiti." 
John10:23 Yesu yali atambulatambula mu kisasi kya Solomooni mu Ssinzizo. 
John10:24 Awo Abayudaaya ne bamwetooloola, ne bamugamba nti: “Olituusa ddi okutuleka mu kubuusabuusa? Tubuulire oba nga ggwe Kristo.”" 
John10:25 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Nababuulira dda, naye temukkiriza. Ebyo bye nkola mu buyinza bwa Kitange, bye binjogerera." 
John10:26 Naye mmwe temukkiriza, kubanga temuli ndiga zange." 
John10:27 Endiga zange ziwuliriza eddoboozi lyange. Nze nzitegeera, era zingoberera." 
John10:28 Nziwa obulamu obutaggwaawo, era tezirizikirira emirembe n'emirembe. Tewali n'omu ayinza kuzinnyagako." 
John10:29 Kitange eyazimpa, ye asinga bonna obuyinza, era tewali ayinza kuzimunyagako." 
John10:30 Nze ne Kitange tuli omu.” 
John10:31 Awo Abayudaaya ne bakwata amayinja okukuba Yesu. 
John10:32 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mwalaba ebirungi bingi Kitange bye yansobozesa okukola. Kiruwa ku byo kye musinziirako okunkuba amayinja?” 
John10:33 Abayudaaya ne bamuddamu nti: “Tetukukuba mayinja lwa birungi by'okola, naye lwa kuvvoola Katonda, era kubanga ggwe omuntu obuntu, weefuula Katonda.”" 
John10:34 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Tekyawandiikibwa mu mateeka gammwe nti Katonda yagamba nti: ‘Muli balubaale?’ 
John10:35 Katonda, abo abaaweebwa ekigambo kye, yabayita balubaale, ate ng'ebyawandiikibwa bisigala nga bya mazima bulijjo." 
John10:36 Nze, Kitange yantukuza, n'antuma mu nsi. Kale lwaki mugamba nti nzivoola Katonda, kubanga ŋŋambye nti ndi Mwana wa Katonda?" 
John10:37 Oba nga sikola ebyo Kitange by'ayagala nkole, temunzikiriza." 
John10:38 Naye oba nga mbikola, newaakubadde Nze temunzikiriza, waakiri mukkirize ebyo bye nkola, mulyoke mumanye era mutegeere nga Kitange ali mu Nze, nga nange ndi mu Kitange.”" 
John10:39 Ne bagezaako nate okumukwata, kyokka n'abasumattuka." 
John10:40 N'agenda nate emitala w'Omugga Yorudaani, mu kifo Yowanne gye yali olubereberye ng'abatiza. N'abeera eyo." 
John10:41 Abantu bangi ne bajja gy'ali, ne bagamba nti: “Yowanne teyakola byewuunyo, kyokka byonna Yowanne bye yayogera ku ono bya mazima.”" 
John10:42 Bangi abaali eyo ne bamukkiriza 
John11:1 Awo omuntu ayitibwa Laazaro, eyali e Betaniya, n'alwala. Betaniya kye kibuga Mariya ne muganda we Marita mwe baali." 
John11:2 Mariya oyo, ye yasiiga Mukama waffe omuzigo ogw'akawoowo ku bigere, n'abisiimuuza enviiri ze, era ye yali mwannyina wa Laazaro omulwadde." 
John11:3 Bannyina ba Laazaro abo, ne batumira Yesu nga bagamba nti: “Ssebo, mukwano gwo alwadde.”" 
John11:4 Kyokka Yesu bwe yawulira, n'agamba nti: “Ekigendereddwa mu bulwadde buno, si kufa, wabula kitiibwa kya Katonda, era Omwana wa Katonda bujja kumuweesa ekitiibwa.”" 
John11:5 Yesu yali mukwano gwa Laazaro ne Marita era ne Mariya. 
John11:6 Bwe yawulira nga Laazaro alwadde, gye yali n'asigalayo ate ennaku endala ssatu." 
John11:7 Oluvannyuma n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Tuddeyo mu Buyudaaya.” 
John11:8 Abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, Abayudaaya baali baagala kukukuba mayinja, ate eyo gy'oyagala okudda?”" 
John11:9 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Essaawa ez'emisana teziba kkumi na bbiri? Omuntu bw'atambula emisana teyeesittala, kubanga alaba ekitangaala ky'ensi eno." 
John11:10 Naye omuntu bw'atambula ekiro, yeesittala, kubanga taba na kitangaala.”" 
John11:11 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'abagamba nti: “Mukwano gwaffe Laazaro yeebase, wabula ŋŋenda okumuzuukusa.”" 
John11:12 Abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti: “Mukama waffe, oba yeebase, anaazuukuka.”" 
John11:13 Naye Yesu yayogera ku kufa kwa Laazaro, naye bo ne balowooza nti ayogera ku kwebaka tulo." 
John11:14 Awo Yesu n'alyoka ababuulira lwatu nti: 
John11:15 “Laazaro afudde. Ku lw'obulungi bwammwe nsanyuse kubanga saaliyo, n'olwekyo mujja kukkiriza. Kale tugende gy'ali.”" 
John11:16 Awo Tomasi ayitibwa Omulongo, n'agamba bayigirizwa banne nti: “Naffe ka tugende tufiire wamu naye.”" 
John11:17 Yesu bwe yatuukayo, n'asanga nga Laazaro amaze ennaku nnya mu ntaana." 
John11:18 Betaniya kyali kumpi ne Yerusaalemu, kilomita nga ssatu." 
John11:19 Abayudaaya bangi, baali bazze ewa Marita ne Mariya okubakubagiza olw'okufiirwa mwannyinaabwe." 
John11:20 Marita bwe yawulira nti Yesu ajja, n'agenda okumusisinkana, Mariya ye ng'ali mu nnyumba." 
John11:21 Marita n'agamba Yesu nti: “Ssebo, singa wali wano, mwannyinaze teyandifudde!" 
John11:22 Naye mmanyi nti ne kaakano, byonna Katonda by'onoomusaba, anaabikuwa.”" 
John11:23 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Mwannyoko ajja kuzuukira.” 
John11:24 Marita n'amugamba nti: “Mmanyi nti alizuukira mu kuzuukira okw'olunaku olw'enkomerero.” 
John11:25 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Nze kuzuukira, era nze bulamu. Anzikiriza, ne bw'afa, aliba mulamu." 
John11:26 Era buli mulamu anzikiriza, talifa emirembe n'emirembe. Ekyo okikkiriza?”" 
John11:27 Ye n'amuddamu nti: “Weewaawo Ssebo, nze nzikiriza nga ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda, ow'okujja mu nsi.”" 
John11:28 Marita bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'agenda n'ayita muganda we Mariya, n'amugamba mu kyama nti: “Omuyigiriza azze, akuyita.”" 
John11:29 Mariya bwe yawulira, n'asituka mangu, n'agenda okusisinkana Yesu." 
John11:30 Yesu yali tannatuuka mu kibuga, ng'akyali mu kifo Marita kye yamusangamu." 
John11:31 Awo Abayudaaya abaali ne Mariya mu nnyumba nga bamukubagiza, bwe baalaba ng'asituse mangu n'afuluma, ne bamugoberera, nga balowooza nti alaga ku ntaana, akaabire eyo." 
John11:32 Awo Mariya bwe yatuuka awali Yesu, n'amulaba, n'agwa kumpi n'ebigere bye, n'amugamba nti: “Ssebo, singa wali wano, mwannyinaze teyandifudde!”" 
John11:33 Yesu bwe yalaba Mariya ng'akaaba, n'Abayudaaya abazze naye nabo nga bakaaba, n'anyolwa mu mutima, n'ajjula obuyinike," 
John11:34 n'ababuuza nti: “Mwamuteeka wa?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Ssebo, jjangu olabeyo.”" 
John11:35 Yesu n'akaaba amaziga. 
John11:36 Awo Abayudaaya ne bagamba nti: “Mulabe nga bw'abadde amwagala!” 
John11:37 Naye abamu ku bo ne bagamba nti: “Ono eyazibula amaaso ga muzibe, teyandiyinzizza kubaako ky'akola, Laazaro n'atafa?”" 
John11:38 Awo Yesu n'addamu okujjula obuyinike, n'atuuka ku ntaana. Yali mpuku, ng'eggaliddwawo n'ejjinja." 
John11:39 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Muggyeewo ejjinja.” Marita mwannyina w'omufu, n'agamba Yesu nti: “Ssebo, kaakano awunya, kubanga amaze ennaku nnya!”" 
John11:40 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Sikugambye nti bw'onokkiriza, onoolaba ekitiibwa kya Katonda?”" 
John11:41 Ne baggyawo ejjinja. Yesu n'ayimusa amaaso waggulu, n'agamba nti: “Kitange, nkwebaza kubanga ompulidde." 
John11:42 Nze mmanyi ng'ompulira bulijjo, naye njogedde olw'abantu abali wano, balyoke bakkirize nga ggwe wantuma.”" 
John11:43 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Laazaro, fuluma ojje!”" 
John11:44 Eyali afudde n'avaayo ng'amagulu ge n'emikono bizingiddwa mu ngoye eziziikibwamu abafu, nga n'ekiremba kisibiddwa ku maaso ge. Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mumusumulule, mumuleke agende.”" 
John11:45 Awo bangi mu Bayudaaya abaali bazze ewa Mariya, bwe baalaba Yesu ky'akoze, ne bamukkiriza." 
John11:46 Naye abamu ku bo ne bagenda eri Abafarisaayo, ne bababuulira Yesu ky'akoze." 
John11:47 Awo bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo ne batuuza olukiiko, ne bagamba nti: “Tukole ki? Omuntu ono akola ebyamagero bingi." 
John11:48 Bwe tumuleka bwe tutyo, bonna bajja kumukkiriza, n'Abarooma balijja ne bazikiriza ekibuga kyaffe n'eggwanga lyaffe!”" 
John11:49 Awo omu ku bo, Kayaafa, eyali Ssaabakabona mu mwaka ogwo, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe temuliiko kye mumanyi." 
John11:50 Temulaba nti kibagasa omuntu omu okufiirira abantu, eggwanga lyonna lireme kuzikirira?”" 
John11:51 Ekyo teyakyogera ku bubwe, wabula nga bwe yali Ssaabakabona omwaka ogwo, yalanga nti Yesu agenda okufiirira eggwanga eryo," 
John11:52 sso si ggwanga eryo lyokka, naye n'okukuŋŋaanya abaana ba Katonda abaasaasaana." 
John11:53 Okuva ku lunaku olwo, ne bakola olukwe okutta Yesu." 
John11:54 N'olwekyo Yesu n'atatambula mu Buyudaaya mu lwatu, wabula n'avaayo, n'alaga mu kifo ekiriraanye eddungu, mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Efurayimu, n'abeera eyo n'abayigirizwa." 
John11:55 Embaga y'Abayudaaya Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako yali eneetera okutuuka, bangi ne bava mu byalo, ne bambuka e Yerusaalemu, okukola omukolo ogw'okwetukuza, ng'Embaga tennatuuka." 
John11:56 Ne banoonya Yesu. Era nga bakuŋŋaanidde mu Ssinzizo, ne beebuuzaganya nti: “Mulowooza mutya? Tajje ku Mbaga?”" 
John11:57 Bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo baali balagidde nti bwe wabaawo amanyi Yesu w'ali, ababuulire, balyoke bamukwate." 
John12:1 Bwe waali nga wakyabulayo ennaku mukaaga, Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako etuuke, Yesu n'ajja e Betaniya, awaali Laazaro, gwe yazuukiza." 
John12:2 Ne bamufumbirayo ekyeggulo, Marita n'aweereza. Laazaro yali omu ku baali batudde ne Yesu okulya." 
John12:3 Awo Mariya n'addira eccupa erimu omuzigo omulungi oguyitibwa narudo, oguwunya akawoowo, era ogw'omuwendo ennyo, n'agusiiga ku bigere bya Yesu, n'abisiimuuza enviiri ze. Ennyumba n'ejjula akawoowo ak'omuzigo ogwo." 
John12:4 Naye Yuda Yisikaryoti, omu ku bayigirizwa ba Yesu, eyali agenda okumulyamu olukwe, n'agamba nti:" 
John12:5 “Lwaki omuzigo guno tegutundiddwa denaari ebikumi bisatu, ne zigabirwa abaavu?”" 
John12:6 Yayogera ekyo, si lwa kulumirwa baavu, wabula kubanga yali mubbi. Ye yakwatanga ensawo, era bye baateekangamu, ng'abitwala." 
John12:7 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Omukazi mumuleke, omuzigo aguterekere olunaku lw'okuziikibwa kwange." 
John12:8 Abaavu ba kuba nammwe bulijjo, naye nze sijja kuba nammwe bulijjo.”" 
John12:9 Awo ekibiina kinene eky'Abayudaaya, ne kitegeera nti Yesu ali Betaniya. Ne kijja, si lwa Yesu yekka, naye n'okulaba Laazaro, Yesu gwe yazuukiza." 
John12:10 Bakabona abakulu ne basala amagezi okutta ne Laazaro," 
John12:11 kubanga ku lulwe, Abayudaaya bangi baabavangako, ne bakkiriza Yesu." 
John12:12 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, abantu abangi abaali bazze ku Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, bwe baawulira nti Yesu ajja e Yerusaalemu," 
John12:13 ne bakwata amatabi g'enkindu, ne bagenda okumusisinkana, ne baleekaana nti: “Mukama atenderezebwe! Ajja mu linnya lya Mukama, aweereddwa omukisa. Ye Kabaka wa Yisirayeli.”" 
John12:14 Awo Yesu n'asanga endogoyi, n'agyebagalako, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti:" 
John12:15 “Mmwe abantu b'e Siyooni, temutya. Laba, Kabaka wammwe ajja, nga yeebagadde omwana gw'endogoyi.”" 
John12:16 Ebyo abayigirizwa tebaabitegeererawo, naye Yesu bwe yamala okugulumizibwa, ne balyoka bajjukira, ng'ebyo byawandiikibwa nga bifa ku ye, era nga baabimukolera." 
John12:17 Ekibiina ky'abantu ekyaliwo nga Yesu ayita Laazaro okuva mu ntaana n'amuzuukiza, kyanyumya ebibaddewo." 
John12:18 Abantu bangi kyebaava bajja okumusisinkana, kubanga baali bawulidde nga yakola ekyewuunyo ekyo." 
John12:19 Awo Abafarisaayo ne bagambagana nti: “Mulabe bwe tulemeddwa! Ensi yonna emusenze!” 
John12:20 Mu abo abaayambuka e Yerusaalemu, mu budde obw'Embaga okusinza Katonda, mwalimu Abayonaani abamu." 
John12:21 Bano ne bajja eri Filipo, eyava e Betusayida eky'omu Galilaaya, ne bamusaba nti: “Ssebo, twagala okulaba Yesu.”" 
John12:22 Filipo n'agenda n'abuulira Andereya, bombi ne bategeeza Yesu." 
John12:23 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Ekiseera kituuse Omwana w'Omuntu agulumizibwe. 
John12:24 Mazima ddala mbagamba nti empeke y'eŋŋaano bw'etegwa mu ttaka n'efa, ebeerera awo yokka. Naye bw'efa, ebala ebibala bingi." 
John12:25 Buli ayagala obulamu bwe, alibufiirwa. Naye akyawa obulamu bwe mu nsi muno, alibusigaza okutuuka ku bulamu obutaggwaawo." 
John12:26 Oyo ampeereza, angoberere. Nze we ndi, n'omuweereza wange w'anaabeeranga. Kitange aliwa ekitiibwa oyo ampeereza." 
John12:27 “Kaakano omutima gwange gweraliikiridde, era njogere ki? Ŋŋambe nti: ‘Kitange, mponya akaseera kano?’ Naye ate ekyandeeta, kwe kuyita mu kaseera kano ak'okubonaabona!" 
John12:28 Kitange gulumiza erinnya lyo.” Awo eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu, nti: “Naligulumiza, era ndirigulumiza nate.”" 
John12:29 Ekibiina ky'abantu, ekyali kiyimiridde awo bwe kyawulira, ne kigamba nti: “Laddu ye bwatuse!” Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Malayika ayogedde naye.”" 
John12:30 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Eddoboozi lino terizze ku lwange, wabula ku lwammwe." 
John12:31 Kaakano ensi ejja kusalirwa omusango, kaakano omufuzi w'ensi eno, ajja kugoberwa ebweru." 
John12:32 Ate nze bwe ndisitulibwa ku nsi, ndisika bonna ne mbazza gye ndi.”" 
John12:33 Ekyo yakyogera, ng'ategeeza enfa gy'alifaamu." 
John12:34 Awo ekibiina ky'abantu ne kimuddamu nti: “Ffe mu Mateeka twawulira nti Kristo wa kubeerawo emirembe n'emirembe. Ate ggwe lwaki ogamba nti Omwana w'Omuntu ateekwa okusitulibwa? Omwana w'Omuntu oyo ye ani?” 
John12:35 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Ekitangaala kinaabeera nammwe okumala ekiseera kitono. Mutambule nga mukyalina ekitangaala, ekizikiza kireme kubakwatira mu kkubo, kubanga atambulira mu kizikiza tamanya gy'agenda." 
John12:36 Mukkirize ekitangaala nga mukyakirina, mulyoke mube abaana b'ekitangaala.” Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'agenda n'abeekweka." 
John12:37 Newaakubadde yakola ebyewuunyo ebyenkanidde awo mu maaso gaabwe, era tebaamukkiriza." 
John12:38 Ekigambo kya Yisaaya omulanzi ne kituukirira, ekigamba nti: “Mukama, ani yakkiriza bye tugamba? Era Mukama yalaga ani obuyinza bwe?”" 
John12:39 Kyebaava balema okukkiriza, kubanga Yisaaya yagamba era nti:" 
John12:40 “Katonda yabaziba amaaso, n'abakakanyaza emitima, amaaso gaabwe galeme okulaba, n'emitima gyabwe gireme okutegeera, era baleme kukyuka mbawonye.”" 
John12:41 Ebyo Yisaaya yabyogera, kubanga yalaba ekitiibwa kya Yesu, n'amwogerako." 
John12:42 Sso era bangi mu bakungu Abayudaaya abaamukkiriza. Naye olw'okutya Abafarisaayo, tebaakyatula, baleme okugobwa mu kkuŋŋaaniro." 
John12:43 Baayagala ekitiibwa ekibaweebwa abantu, okusinga ekitiibwa ekibaweebwa Katonda." 
John12:44 Awo Yesu n'ayogera mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka, n'agamba nti: “Anzikiriza, takkiriza Nze, wabula akkiriza oli eyantuma." 
John12:45 Era alaba nze, ng'alabye oli eyantuma." 
John12:46 Nze najja mu nsi nga ndi kitangaala, buli anzikiriza, aleme kubeera mu kizikiza." 
John12:47 Awulira ebigambo byange n'atabikolerako, Nze simusalira musango, kubanga sajja kusalira nsi musango, wabula okugirokola." 
John12:48 Agaana Nze, n'atakkiriza bigambo byange, alina amusalira omusango. Ebigambo bye nayogera bye birimusalira omusango ku lunaku olw'enkomerero," 
John12:49 kubanga Nze saayogeranga ku bwange, wabula Kitange eyantuma, ye yandagira bye nteekwa okugamba, n'okwogera." 
John12:50 Era mmanyi ng'ekiragiro kye, bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo. Kale Nze bye njogera, mbyogera nga Kitange bwe yabiŋŋamba.”" 
John13:1 Lwali lunaku olukulembera Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako. Yesu yamanya ng'ekiseera kye kituuse ave mu nsi muno, agende eri Kitaawe. Yayagala ababe abaali mu nsi, era yabaagala okutuusiza ddala ku nkomerero." 
John13:2 Baali balya kyaggulo. Sitaani yali yamaze dda okuteeka mu mutima gwa Yuda omwana wa Simooni Yisikaryoti, ekirowoozo eky'okulyamu Yesu olukwe." 
John13:3 Yesu yamanya nga Kitaawe amuwadde obuyinza obujjuvu. Era yamanya nga yava wa Katonda, ate ng'adda wa Katonda." 
John13:4 Awo n'ava we yali atudde ng'alya, ne yeeggyako omunagiro gwe, n'akwata ekiremba, ne yeesiba ekimyu." 
John13:5 N'ateeka amazzi mu bbenseni, n'atandika okunaaza abayigirizwa ebigere, n'okubisiimuuza ekiremba kye yali yeesibye." 
John13:6 Awo n'atuuka ku Simooni Peetero, Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Mukama wange, ggwe onaaza nze ebigere?”" 
John13:7 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Kye nkola, ggwe kaakano tokitegeera, naye olikitegeera oluvannyuma.”" 
John13:8 Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Tolinnaaza bigere mulundi na gumu!” Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Bwe siikunaaze bigere, nga tossa kimu nange.”" 
John13:9 Simooni Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Mukama wange, tonnaaza bigere byokka, naye n'emikono n'omutwe!”" 
John13:10 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Anaabye omubiri, aba mulongoofu yenna, era teyeetaaga kunaaba, okuggyako okunaaba ebigere. Nammwe muli balongoofu, naye si mwenna.”" 
John13:11 Kyeyava agamba nti: “Muli balongoofu, naye si mwenna,” kubanga yamanya oyo eyali agenda okumulyamu olukwe." 
John13:12 Yesu bwe yamala okubanaaza ebigere, ne yezzaako omunagiro gwe, n'addayo n'atuula, n'abagamba nti: “Kye mbakoze mukitegedde?" 
John13:13 Mmwe mumpita Muyigiriza era Mukama wammwe. Mwogera kituufu, kubanga ddala bwe ndi." 
John13:14 Kale oba nga nze Mukama wammwe, era Omuyigiriza wammwe mbanaazizza ebigere, nammwe kibagwanidde buli omu okunaazanga munne ebigere," 
John13:15 kubanga mbawadde ekyokulabirako. Nga bwe nkoze ku mmwe, nammwe bwe mubanga mukola." 
John13:16 Mazima ddala mbagamba nti omuddu takira mukama we, n'omutume tasinga yamutuma." 
John13:17 Oba nga ebyo mubimanyi, muli ba mukisa bwe mubituukiriza." 
John13:18 “Soogera ku mmwe mwenna. Nze mmanyi be nalondamu. Naye ekyawandiikibwa kiteekwa okutuukirira nti: ‘Alya ku mmere yange, anneefuukidde.’" 
John13:19 Kino nkibabuulira kaakano nga tekinnabaawo, bwe kinaamala okubaawo, mulyoke mukkirize nti Ye Nze." 
John13:20 Mazima ddala mbagamba nti ayaniriza buli gwe ntuma, aba ayanirizza nze, ate ayaniriza nze, aba ayanirizza oli eyantuma.”" 
John13:21 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'anyolwa mu mwoyo, n'ayatula, n'agamba nti: “Mazima ddala mbagamba nti omu ku mmwe anandyamu olukwe.”" 
John13:22 Abayigirizwa ne batunulaganako, nga tebamanyi gw'ayogerako." 
John13:23 Omu ku bayigirizwa, Yesu gwe yayagalanga, yali agalamidde ng'aliraanye ekifuba kya Yesu." 
John13:24 Simooni Peetero n'amuwenya, n'amugamba nti: “Tubuulire gw'ayogerako.”" 
John13:25 Ye bwe yaddayo okugalamira ng'aliraanye ekifuba kya Yesu, n'amubuuza nti: “Mukama wange, gw'oyogerako ye ani?”" 
John13:26 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Gwe nnaakoleza ekitole ne nkimuwa, nga ye wuuyo.” Awo n'akwata ekitole, n'akikoza, n'akiwa Yuda, omwana wa Simooni Yisikaryoti." 
John13:27 Yuda bwe yamala okufuna ekitole ekyo, Sitaani n'amuyingiramu. Awo Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Ky'okola, kikole mangu!”" 
John13:28 Ku baali balya, tewali n'omu yategeera kyeyava amugamba bw'atyo." 
John13:29 Abamu baalowooza nti nga Yuda bwe yali atereka ensawo, Yesu amugambye nti: “Genda ogule bye twetaaga ku Mbaga”, oba nti: “Baako ky'ogabira abaavu.”" 
John13:30 Yuda bwe yamala okufuna ekitole, amangwago n'afuluma ebweru. Obudde bwali bwa kiro." 
John13:31 Yuda bwe yamala okufuluma, Yesu n'agamba nti: “Kaakano Omwana w'Omuntu agulumiziddwa, ne Katonda agulumiziddwa mu ye." 
John13:32 Era oba nga Katonda agulumiziddwa mu ye, ne Katonda anaagulumiza Omwana w'Omuntu mu ye yennyini, era anaamugulumiza amangwago." 
John13:33 Baana bange, akaseera katono ke nkyali awamu nammwe. Mulinnoonya, naye nga bwe nagamba Abayudaaya nti: ‘Nze gye ŋŋenda, mmwe temuyinza kujjayo,’ era nammwe bwe mbagamba kaakano." 
John13:34 “Mbawa ekiragiro ekiggya, mwagalanenga. Nga nze bwe nabaagala mmwe, nammwe bwe muba mwagalananga." 
John13:35 Bwe munaayagalananga, bonna kwe banaategeereranga, nga muli bayigirizwa bange.”" 
John13:36 Simooni Peetero n'amubuuza nti: “Mukama wange, ogenda wa?” Yesu n'addamu nti: “Gye ŋŋenda, toyinza kungoberera kaakano, naye olingoberera gye bujja.”" 
John13:37 Peetero n'amubuuza nti: “Mukama wange, lwaki siyinza kukugoberera kaakano? Nnaawaayo obulamu bwange ku lulwo.”" 
John13:38 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Onoowaayo obulamu bwo ku lwange? Mazima ddala nkugamba nti enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, ononneegaana emirundi esatu.”" 
John14:1 Yesu n'agamba nti: “Omutima gwammwe tegweraliikiriranga. Mukkirize Katonda, era nange munzikirize." 
John14:2 Mu nnyumba ya Kitange mulimu ebifo bingi, era ŋŋenda okubategekera ekifo. Singa si bwe kiri, sandibagambye bwe ntyo." 
John14:3 Bwe ndimala okugenda ne mbategekera ekifo, ndikomawo ne mbatwala gye ndi, nammwe mubeere eyo, nze gye mbeera." 
John14:4 Era gye ŋŋenda, ekkubo mulimanyi.”" 
John14:5 Tomasi n'amugamba nti: “Mukama waffe, tetumanyi gy'ogenda. Tuyinza tutya okumanya ekkubo erigendayo?”" 
John14:6 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Nze kkubo, nze mazima, era nze bulamu. Tewali atuuka eri Kitange, wabula ng'ayita mu nze." 
John14:7 Singa nze mummanyi, ne Kitange mwandimumanye. Era okuva kati mumumanyi, era mumulabye.”" 
John14:8 Filipo n'amugamba nti: “Mukama waffe, tulage ku Kitaawo, kinaatumala.”" 
John14:9 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Kasookedde mbeera nammwe ebbanga lino lyonna, tontegeeranga, Filipo? Alabye ku nze, ng'alabye ku Kitange. Ate lwaki ogamba nti: ‘Tulage ku Kitaawo’?" 
John14:10 Tokkiriza nga nze ndi mu Kitange, era nga Kitange ali mu nze? Ebigambo bye mbagamba mmwe, sibyogera ku bwange. Kitange ali mu nze, ye akola yennyini." 
John14:11 “Munzikirize nti nze ndi mu Kitange, era nti ne Kitange ali mu nze. Oba si ekyo, munzikirize olw'ebikolwa byennyini bye nkola." 
John14:12 Mazima ddala mbagamba nti anzikiriza, alikola bye nkola, era alikola n'ebisingawo, kubanga nze ŋŋenda eri Kitange." 
John14:13 Era buli kye munaasabanga mu linnya lyange, nnaakikolanga, Kitange alyoke agulumizibwe mu Mwana." 
John14:14 Bwe munaasabanga ekintu mu linnya lyange, nnaakikolanga." 
John14:15 “Oba nga munjagala, munaakwatanga ebiragiro byange." 
John14:16 Era ndisaba Kitange, n'abawa Omubeezi omulala, abeerenga nammwe emirembe n'emirembe." 
John14:17 Oyo ye Mwoyo amanyisa abantu amazima, ensi gw'eteyinza kukkiriza kufuna, kubanga temulaba, era temumanyi. Mmwe mumumanyi, kubanga abeera nammwe, era anaabeeranga mu mmwe." 
John14:18 “Siribaleka nga bamulekwa. Ndikomawo gye muli. 
John14:19 Mu bbanga ttono, ensi eneeba tekyandaba, naye mmwe nga mundaba. Kubanga nze ndi mulamu, nammwe muliba balamu." 
John14:20 Ku lunaku olwo mulitegeera nga nze ndi mu Kitange, era nga nammwe muli mu nze, ate nga nange ndi mu mmwe." 
John14:21 “Awulira ebiragiro byange n'abikwata, oyo ye anjagala. Kitange anaayagalanga oyo anjagala, nange nnaamwagalanga, era nnaamulabikiranga.”" 
John14:22 Yuda, atali oli Yisikaryoti, n'amugamba nti: “Mukama waffe, ekyo kiri kitya, ggwe okulabikira ffe, n'otolabikira nsi?”" 
John14:23 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Buli anjagala, anaakwatanga ekigambo kyange, era anaayagalibwanga Kitange. Tulijja gy'ali ne tubeera mu ye." 
John14:24 Atanjagala, takwata bigambo byange. Ate ekigambo kye muwulira, si kyange, wabula kya Kitange eyantuma." 
John14:25 “Ebyo mbibabuulidde nga nkyali nammwe. 
John14:26 Naye Omubeezi, ye Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, Kitange gw'alituma mu linnya lyange, alibayigiriza byonna era alibajjukiza byonna bye nabagamba." 
John14:27 “Mbalekera emirembe. Mbawa emirembe gyange. Sigibawadde ng'ensi bw'ewa. Temweraliikiriranga era temutyanga. 
John14:28 Muwulidde bwe mbagambye nti ŋŋenda, era ndikomawo gye muli. Singa munjagala, mwandisanyuse nga ŋŋenda eri Kitange, kubanga Kitange ansinga ekitiibwa." 
John14:29 Ekyo nkibabuulidde kaakano nga tekinnabaawo, bwe kiribaawo mulyoke mukkirize." 
John14:30 Sikyayogedde bingi nammwe, kubanga omufuzi w'ensi eno ajja, kyokka tanninaako buyinza." 
John14:31 Naye nkola nga Kitange bwe yandagira, ensi eryoke emanye nti Kitange mmwagala. “Musituke, tuve wano." 
John15:1 “Nze muzabbibu gwennyini, ate Kitange ye mulimi." 
John15:2 Buli ttabi eriri mu Nze eritabala bibala aliggyawo, ate buli ttabi eribala ebibala, alisalira liryoke lyeyongere okubala ebibala." 
John15:3 Kaakano mmwe muli balongoofu olw'ebigambo bye mbagambye. 
John15:4 Mubeere mu nze nange mbeere mu mmwe. Ng'ettabi bwe litayinza kubala bibala ku bwalyo nga teriri ku muzabbibu, bwe kityo nammwe, temuyinza kubala bibala, bwe mutabeera mu nze." 
John15:5 “Nze muzabbibu, mmwe matabi. Abeera mu nze, nange ne mbeera mu ye, abala ebibala bingi. Nze we ssiri, temuliiko kye muyinza kukola." 
John15:6 Atabeera mu nze, asuulibwa ebweru ng'ettabi, era akala. Amatabi ng'ago, bagakuŋŋaanya ne bagasuula mu muliro, ne gookebwa." 
John15:7 “Bwe mubeera mu nze, n'ebigambo byange ne bibeera mu mmwe, musabenga kyonna kye mwagala, kinaabakolerwanga." 
John15:8 Bwe mubala ebibala ebingi, ne mufuukira ddala bayigirizwa bange, Kitange aweebwa ekitiibwa." 
John15:9 Nga Kitange bw'anjagala, nange bwe mbaagala mmwe. Mubeerenga mu kwagala kwange." 
John15:10 Bwe mukwata ebiragiro byange, munaabeeranga mu kwagala kwange, nga nze bwe nkwata ebiragiro bya Kitange, ne mbeera mu kwagala kwe." 
John15:11 “Ebyo mbibagambye, essanyu lye nnina liryoke libeere ne mu mmwe, era essanyu lyammwe liryoke lituukirire." 
John15:12 Ekiragiro kyange kye kino, mwagalanenga, nga nze bwe nabaagala mmwe." 
John15:13 Tewali alina kwagala okusinga okw'oyo awaayo obulamu bwe olw'abo b'ayagala. 
John15:14 “Mmwe muli mikwano gyange, bwe mukola bye mbalagira." 
John15:15 Sikyabayita baddu, kubanga omuddu tamanya mukama we by'akola. Naye mbayita mikwano gyange, kubanga byonna bye nawulira eri Kitange, mbibategeezezza mmwe." 
John15:16 “Si mmwe mwannonda nze, wabula nze nabalonda mmwe, ne mbateekawo, mugende mubalenga ebibala, era ebibala byammwe biremenga kuggwaawo. Era buli kye munaasabanga Kitange mu linnya lyange, anaakibawanga." 
John15:17 Kye mbalagira kye kino, mwagalanenga." 
John15:18 “Ensi bw'ebakyawanga mmwe, mumanye nga yasooka kukyawa nze." 
John15:19 Singa mubadde ba nsi, ensi yandibaagadde mmwe ng'abaayo. Naye kubanga nze nabalonda, temukyali ba nsi. Ensi kyeva ebakyawa." 
John15:20 Mujjukire ekigambo kye nabagamba nti omuddu tasinga mukama we. Oba nga nze banjigganya, nammwe banaabayigganyanga. Oba nga baakwata ebigambo byange, n'ebyammwe banaabikwatanga." 
John15:21 Naye ebyo byonna banaabibakolanga olw'okubeera nze, kubanga eyantuma tebamumanyi." 
John15:22 “Singa sajja ne njogera nabo, tebandibadde na kibi. Naye kaakano tewali kibaggyako musango gwa kibi kyabwe." 
John15:23 Ankyawa, akyawa ne Kitange." 
John15:24 Singa saabakoleramu bikolwa ebitakolebwanga mulala, tebandibadde na kibi. Naye kaakano babirabye, ne bankyawa nze, ne Kitange." 
John15:25 Naye ekyawandiikibwa mu Mateeka gaabwe nti: ‘Bankyayira bwereere’, kiteekwa okutuukirira." 
John15:26 “Bwe ndigenda eri Kitange, ndibatumira mmwe Omubeezi, ye Mwoyo amanyisa abantu amazima, ava mu Kitange. Ye bw'alijja, aliba mujulirwa wange." 
John15:27 Era nammwe muli bajulirwa bange, kubanga mubadde nange okuva olubereberye." 
John16:1 “Ebyo mbibabuulidde, muleme kuterebuka." 
John16:2 Banaabagobanga mu makuŋŋaaniro. Era ekiseera kirituuka, buli abatta n'alowooza nti aweereza Katonda." 
John16:3 Ebyo banaabikolanga, kubanga Kitange tebamumanyi, era nange tebammanyi." 
John16:4 Naye ebyo mbibabuulidde, ekiseera kyabyo bwe kirituuka, mulyoke mujjukire nga nze nabibabuulira. “Mu kusooka, ebyo saabibabuulira, kubanga nali nkyali wamu nammwe." 
John16:5 Naye kaakano ŋŋenda eri oyo eyantuma, era ku mmwe tewali ambuuza nti: ‘Ogenda wa?’" 
John16:6 Naye kubanga mbabuulidde ebyo, emitima gyammwe gijjudde ennaku." 
John16:7 Naye mbategeeza amazima nti kibagasa nze okugenda, kubanga bwe sigenda, Omubeezi talijja gye muli. Kyokka bwe ŋŋenda, ndimubatumira." 
John16:8 Ye bw'alijja, alirumiriza abantu b'ensi nti bawubwa ku bikwata ku kibi, ne ku butuukirivu, ne ku kusala omusango;" 
John16:9 ku bikwata ku kibi, kubanga tebanzikiriza," 
John16:10 ku bikwata ku butuukirivu, kubanga ŋŋenda eri Kitange, era munaaba temukyandaba;" 
John16:11 ku bikwata ku kusala omusango, kubanga omufuzi w'ensi eno asaliddwa omusango." 
John16:12 “Nkyalina bingi eby'okubabuulira, naye kaakano temubisobola." 
John16:13 Naye Mwoyo amanyisa abantu amazima bw'alijja, anaabaluŋŋamyanga mu by'amazima byonna, kubanga taayogerenga ku bubwe, wabula anaayogeranga by'awulira, era anaababuuliranga ebigenda okujja." 
John16:14 Oyo anangulumizanga, kubanga anaatoolanga ku byange n'ababuulira mmwe." 
John16:15 Byonna byonna Kitange by'alina byange, kyenvudde ŋŋamba nti Mwoyo anaatoolanga ku byange n'ababuulira mmwe." 
John16:16 “Mu bbanga ttono munaaba nga temukyandaba, ate wanaayita ebbanga ttono, ne mundaba.”" 
John16:17 Abamu ku bayigirizwa be ne bagambagana nti: “Kiki ekyo ky'atugamba nti: ‘Mu bbanga ttono munaaba nga temukyandaba, ate wanaayita ebbanga ttono ne mundaba,’ era nti: ‘Ŋŋenda eri Kitange?’ ”" 
John16:18 Ne beebuuza nti: “Kiki ekyo ky'agamba nti ‘Ebbanga ttono?’ Tetumanyi ky'agamba.” 
John16:19 Yesu n'amanya nga baagala okumubuuza, n'abagamba nti: “Kino kye mwebuuzaganyaako, kye ŋŋambye nti mu bbanga ttono munaaba temukyandaba, ate wanaayita ebbanga ttono ne mundaba?" 
John16:20 Mazima ddala mbagamba nti mmwe mulikaaba, mulikuba ebiwoobe, naye ensi erisanyuka. Mmwe mulinakuwala, naye okunakuwala kwammwe kulifuuka essanyu." 
John16:21 “Omukazi ng'azaala, aba mu bulumi bungi, kubanga ekiseera kye kituuse. Naye omwana bw'amala okuzaalibwa, omukazi nga takyajjukira bulumi olw'essanyu ery'okuzaala omuntu ku nsi." 
John16:22 Kale nammwe kaakano munakuwadde, naye ndibalaba, nate emitima gyammwe ne gisanyuka, era essanyu lyammwe tewaliba alibaggyako." 
John16:23 “Ku lunaku luli temulibaako kye munsaba. Mazima ddala mbagamba nti Kitange alibawa buli kye mulisaba mu linnya lyange. 
John16:24 Okutuusa kati mubadde temusaba mu linnya lyange. Musabe, muliweebwa, essanyu lyammwe lituukirire." 
John16:25 “Ebyo mbibabuulidde mu ngero. Naye ekiseera kijja kutuuka, nga sikyayogera nammwe mu ngero, wabula nga mbabuulira lwatu ebifa ku Kitange." 
John16:26 Ku lunaku luli mulisaba mu linnya lyange. Sso sibagamba nti ndibasabira eri Kitange. 
John16:27 Kitange yennyini abaagala, kubanga munjagala era mukkirizza nga nava eri Katonda." 
John16:28 Nava eri Kitange ne nzija ku nsi. Kaakano ndeka ensi, ŋŋenda eri Kitange.”" 
John16:29 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti: “Kaakano oyogera lwatu, toyogera mu ngero." 
John16:30 Kaakano tumanyi ng'omanyi byonna, era nga tekyetaagisa muntu n'omu kukubuuza kibuuzo. Kyetuva tukkiriza nga wava wa Katonda.”" 
John16:31 Yesu n'abaddamu nti: “Kaakano mukkiriza? 
John16:32 Laba, ekiseera kijja, era kimaze n'okutuuka, musaasaane, buli muntu adde ewuwe, mundeke bwomu. Sso siri bwomu, kubanga Kitange ali wamu nange." 
John16:33 Ebyo mbibabuulidde, mulyoke mube n'emirembe mu nze. Ku nsi mujja kubonaabona, naye mugume, nze mpangudde ensi.”" 
John17:1 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'ayimusa amaaso eri eggulu, n'agamba nti: “Kitange, ekiseera kituuse. Gulumiza Omwana wo, Omwana wo alyoke akugulumize," 
John17:2 kubanga wamuwa obuyinza ku bantu bonna, alyoke abawe obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
John17:3 Obulamu obutaggwaawo bwe buno, abantu bonna okukumanya ggwe Katonda omu wekka ow'amazima, n'okumanya Yesu Kristo, gwe watuma." 
John17:4 Nze nkugulumizza ku nsi. Mmalirizza omulimu gwe wampa okukola. 
John17:5 Kitange, kaakano mpa ekitiibwa mu maaso go, kye nalina ng'ensi tennabaawo." 
John17:6 “Nkumanyisizza mu bantu be wampa ng'obaggya mu nsi. Baali babo, n'obampa. Bakutte ekigambo kyo." 
John17:7 Kaakano bamanyi nga byonna bye wampa byava gy'oli," 
John17:8 kubanga ebigambo bye wampa mbibawadde, ne babikkiriza, ne bamanyira ddala nga nava gy'oli, ne bakkiriza nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:9 “Nze mbasabira abo. Sisabira nsi, wabula abo be wampa, kubanga babo." 
John17:10 Byonna bye nnina bibyo, n'ebibyo byange, era ngulumizibwa mu bo." 
John17:11 Kaakano nzija gy'oli. Sikyali mu nsi, naye bo bali mu nsi. Kitange omutuukirivu, bakuumenga mu buyinza bwo bwe wampa, babeerenga bumu nga ffe." 
John17:12 “Bwe nali nabo, nabakuuma mu buyinza bwo bwe wampa, ne kutabula n'omu ku bo, wabula oyo eyali ateekwa okubula, ekyawandiikibwa kiryoke kituukirire." 
John17:13 Naye kaakano nzija gy'oli, era ebyo mbyogerera mu nsi, essanyu lyange liryoke libajjule." 
John17:14 “Nabawa ekigambo kyo, ensi n'ebakyawa, kubanga si ba nsi, nga nze bwe siri wa nsi." 
John17:15 Sikusaba kubaggya mu nsi, wabula bakuumenga, obawonye Omubi." 
John17:16 Si ba nsi nga nze bwe siri wa nsi. 
John17:17 Batukuze mu mazima. Ekigambo kyo ge mazima. 
John17:18 Nga bwe wantuma mu nsi, nange bwe mbatuma mu nsi." 
John17:19 Nze nneewaayo gy'oli ku lwabwe, nabo bennyini balyoke beeweereyo ddala gy'oli." 
John17:20 “Sisabira bano bokka, naye n'abo abanzikiriza olw'obubaka bwa bano." 
John17:21 Bonna babeerenga bumu. Kitange, nga ggwe bw'oli mu nze, nange bwe ndi mu ggwe, nabo babeerenga mu ffe, ensi eryoke ekkirize nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:22 Era ekitiibwa kye wampa nkibawadde, balyoke babeerenga bumu, nga ffe bwe tuli obumu," 
John17:23 nze mu bo, naawe mu nze, balyoke babeerere ddala bumu, ensi etegeere nga ggwe wantuma, era ng'obaagala nga bw'onjagala." 
John17:24 “Kitange, be wampa, njagala we ndi, nabo we baba babeeranga, balabe ekitiibwa kyange kye wampa. Wanjagala ng'ensi tennatondebwa." 
John17:25 Kitange omutuukirivu, ensi teyakumanya, naye nze nkumanyi, na bano bamanyi nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:26 Era nabamanyisa erinnya lyo, era nja kwongera okulimanyisa, okwagala kwe wanjagala, kubeere mu bo, nange mbeere mu bo.”" 
John18:1 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'afuluma n'abayigirizwa be, ne balaga emitala w'akagga Kedurooni awaali ennimiro, n'agiyingiramu awamu n'abayigirizwa be." 
John18:2 Ne Yuda, eyamulyamu olukwe, yali amanyi ekifo ekyo, kubanga emirundi mingi, Yesu yagendangayo n'abayigirizwa be." 
John18:3 Awo Yuda n'ajja mu nnimiro ng'ali n'ekibinja ky'abaserikale, n'abakuumi b'Essinzizo, abaatumibwa bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo. Baalina ettaala n'emimuli, n'ebyokulwanyisa." 
John18:4 Awo Yesu ng'amanyi byonna ebigenda okumujjira, n'avaayo, n'abagamba nti: “Munoonya ani?”" 
John18:5 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Yesu Omunazaareeti.” Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Ye Nze.” Yuda eyamulyamu olukwe, yali ayimiridde nabo." 
John18:6 Yesu bwe yabagamba nti: “Ye Nze”, ne badda emabega ne bagwa wansi." 
John18:7 Yesu n'ababuuza omulundi ogwokubiri nti: “Munoonya ani?” Ne bagamba nti: “Yesu Omunazaareeti.” 
John18:8 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Mbabuulidde nti Ye Nze. Kale oba nga munoonya Nze, bano mubaleke bagende.”" 
John18:9 Ekigambo kye yayogera nti: “Ku abo be wampa saabuzaako n'omu,” ne kituukirira." 
John18:10 Simooni Peetero yalina ekitala. N'akisowolayo, n'atema omuddu wa Ssaabakabona, n'amukutulako okutu okwa ddyo. Erinnya ly'omuddu oyo nga ye Maluko." 
John18:11 Yesu n'agamba Peetero nti: “Ekitala kizze mu kiraato kyakyo. Ekikopo eky'okubonaabona. Kitange ky'ampadde siikinywe?” 
John18:12 Awo ekibinja ky'abaserikale n'omuduumizi waabwe, n'abaweereza b'Abayudaaya, ne bakwata Yesu, ne bamusiba." 
John18:13 Ne bamutwala eri Anna okusooka, kubanga ye yali kitaawe wa muka Kayaafa, eyali Ssaabakabona mu mwaka ogwo." 
John18:14 Kayaafa oyo ye yali awadde Abayudaaya amagezi nti kisaana omuntu omu okufiirira bonna. 
John18:15 Simooni Peetero n'omuyigirizwa omulala ne bagoberera Yesu. Omuyigirizwa oyo yali amanyiddwa ssaabakabona, n'ayingira ne Yesu mu luggya lwa Ssaabakabona." 
John18:16 Peetero n'asigala wabweru ku luggi. Omuyigirizwa oli omulala eyali amanyiddwa ssaabakabona, n'afuluma, n'ayogera n'omuwala omuggazi w'oluggi, n'ayingiza Peetero." 
John18:17 Awo omuwala omuggazi w'oluggi, n'agamba Peetero nti: “Naawe oli omu ku bayigirizwa b'omuntu oyo?” Peetero n'addamu nti: “Nedda.”" 
John18:18 Abaddu n'abaweereza baali bakumye ekyoto ky'omuliro, nga bayimiridde awo boota, kubanga obudde bwali bunnyogovu. Ne Peetero yali ayimiridde nabo ng'ayota omuliro." 
John18:19 Awo Ssaabakabona n'abuuza Yesu ku bayigirizwa be, ne ku by'ayigiriza." 
John18:20 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Nze nayogeranga lwatu mu bantu, bulijjo nayigirizanga mu makuŋŋaaniro ne mu Ssinzizo, Abayudaaya bonna mwe bakuŋŋaanira. Soogeranga kintu na kimu mu kyama." 
John18:21 Lwaki obuuza nze? Buuza abo abaawulira bye nabagambanga. Bamanyi bye nayogeranga.” 
John18:22 Yesu bwe yayogera ebyo, omu ku baweereza eyali ayimiridde okumpi naye, n'amukuba oluyi nga bw'agamba nti: “Bw'otyo bw'oddamu Ssaabakabona?”" 
John18:23 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Oba njogedde bubi, laga ekibi kye njogedde. Naye oba njogedde bulungi, onkubira ki?”" 
John18:24 Awo Anna n'aweereza Yesu nga musibe eri Kayaafa, Ssaabakabona." 
John18:25 Simooni Peetero yali ayimiridde ng'ayota omuliro. Ne bamugamba nti: “Naawe oli omu ku bayigirizwa be?” Ye ne yeegaana n'agamba nti: “Nedda.” 
John18:26 Omu ku baddu ba ssaabakabona, era muganda w'oyo, Peetero gwe yakutulako okutu, n'agamba nti: “Nze saakulabye naye mu nnimiro?”" 
John18:27 Peetero n'addamu okwegaana. Amangwago enkoko n'ekookolima. 
John18:28 Awo Yesu ne bamuggya ewa Kayaafa, ne bamutwala mu lubiri lw'omufuzi Omurooma. Obudde bwali bwakakya. Abayudaaya ne batayingira mu lubiri, baleme kusobya mukolo gwa kwetukuza, naye basobole okulya Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako." 
John18:29 Awo Pilaato n'afuluma n'agenda gye bali, n'ababuuza nti: “Musango ki gwe muwawaabira omuntu ono?”" 
John18:30 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Singa abadde talina musango gwe yazza, tetwandimuleese gy'oli.”" 
John18:31 Pilaato n'abagamba nti: “Kale nno mmwe mumutwale, mumusalire omusango ng'amateeka gammwe bwe gali.” Abayudaaya ne bamugamba nti: “Ffe tetukkirizibwa kutta muntu n'omu.”" 
John18:32 Ekyo Yesu kye yayogera, ng'alanga engeri gye yali agenda okufaamu, ne kituukirira." 
John18:33 Awo Pilaato n'addayo mu lubiri, n'ayita Yesu, n'amubuuza nti: “Ggwe Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
John18:34 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Ekyo okyogedde ku bubwo, oba balala be bakubuulidde ebifa ku nze?”" 
John18:35 Pilaato n'addamu nti: “Nze ndi Muyudaaya? Abantu b'eggwanga lyo, ne bakabona baabwe abakulu, be bakuleese gye ndi. Okoze ki?”" 
John18:36 Yesu n'addamu nti: “Obwakabaka bwange si bwa ku nsi kuno. Singa obwakabaka bwange bubadde bwa ku nsi kuno, abantu bange bandirwanye, ne siweebwayo mu Bayudaaya. Naye obwakabaka bwange si bwa ku nsi kuno.”" 
John18:37 Awo Pilaato n'amubuuza nti: “Kwe kugamba oli Kabaka?” Yesu n'addamu nti: “Nga bw'oyogedde. Ndi kabaka. Nze nazaalibwa ne nzija ku nsi, nga nzijiridde kino: okumanyisa amazima. Buli ayagala amazima, awulira eddoboozi lyange.”" 
John18:38 Pilaato n'amugamba nti: “Amazima kye ki?” Pilaato bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'afuluma nate, n'agenda awali Abayudaaya, n'abagamba nti: “Siraba musango ku ye." 
John18:39 Naye mwamanyiira, nze okubateeranga omusibe omu ku Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako. Kale mwagala mbateere Kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
John18:40 Awo ne baleekaana nti: “Si oyo, wabula Barabba!” Barabba oyo yali munyazi." 
John19:1 Awo Pilaato n'atwala Yesu, n'amukuba n'embooko eriko amalobo agasuna." 
John19:2 Abaserikale ne bawetaaweta amaggwa, ne bakolamu engule, ne bagimuteeka ku mutwe, ne bamwambaza olugoye olwa kakobe," 
John19:3 ne bajja w'ali, ne bagamba nti: “Wangaala, Kabaka w'Abayudaaya!” Ne bamukuba empi." 
John19:4 Pilaato era n'afuluma ebweru, n'agamba abantu nti: “Laba, mmubaleetera ebweru, mutegeere nga siraba musango ku ye.”" 
John19:5 Awo Yesu n'afuluma ng'atikkiddwa engule ey'amaggwa, era ng'ayambadde olugoye olwa kakobe. Pilaato n'abagamba nti: “Mulabe, omuntu wuuno!”" 
John19:6 Bakabona abakulu n'abaweereza bwe baamulaba, ne baleekaana nti “Mukomerere ku musaalaba, mukomerere ku musaalaba!” Pilaato n'abagamba nti: “Mumutwale mmwe, mumukomerere ku musaalaba. Nze siraba musango ku ye.”" 
John19:7 Abayudaaya ne bamuddamu nti: “Ffe tulina etteeka, era okusinziira ku tteeka eryo, ateekwa okuttibwa, kubanga yeefuula Omwana wa Katonda.”" 
John19:8 Pilaato bwe yawulira ekyo, ne yeeyongera okutya." 
John19:9 N'ayingira mu lubiri, n'abuuza Yesu nti: “Oli wa wa?” Kyokka Yesu n'atamuddamu." 
John19:10 Awo Pilaato n'amugamba nti: “Tonziramu? Tomanyi nga nnina obuyinza okukuta, era nga nnina obuyinza okukukomerera ku musaalaba?”" 
John19:11 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Tewandibadde na buyinza ku nze n'akatono, singa tebwakuweebwa Katonda. N'olwekyo ampaddeyo gy'oli ye alina ekibi ekisinga.”" 
John19:12 Okuva mu kaseera ako Pilaato n'asala amagezi okuta Yesu. Naye Abayudaaya ne baleekaana nga bagamba nti: “Oyo bw'omuta, nga toli mukwano gwa Kayisaari. Buli muntu eyeefuula kabaka, awakanya Kayisaari.”" 
John19:13 Pilaato bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo, n'afulumya Yesu ebweru, n'atuula ku ntebe ey'obulamuzi, mu kifo ekiyitibwa Amayinja Amaaliire, naye mu Lwebureeyi, Gabbata." 
John19:14 Lwali lunaku lwa kuteekateeka Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako. Essaawa zaali nga mukaaga ez'omu ttuntu. Pilaato n'agamba Abayudaaya nti: “Kabaka wammwe wuuno!” 
John19:15 Bo ne baleekaana nti: “Muggyeewo, muggyeewo, mukomerere ku musaalaba!” Pilaato n'ababuuza nti: “Kabaka wammwe gwe mba nkomerera ku musaalaba?” Bakabona abakulu ne baddamu nti: “Tetulina kabaka mulala, wabula Kayisaari.”" 
John19:16 Awo Pilaato n'abawa Yesu okumukomerera ku musaalaba. Awo ne bakwata Yesu, ne bamutwala," 
John19:17 n'afuluma nga yeetisse omusaalaba gwe, n'atuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa eky'Ekiwanga, mu Lwebureeyi ekiyitibwa Golugoota." 
John19:18 Ne bamukomerera ku musaalaba, mu kifo ekyo. Era ne bakomerera n'abalala babiri ku misaalaba, eruuyi n'eruuyi, Yesu nga ye ali wakati." 
John19:19 Pilaato n'awandiika ekiwandiiko, n'akiteeka ku musaalaba, nga kiwandiikiddwa nti: “YESU OMUNAZAAREETI, KABAKA W'ABAYUDAAYA.”" 
John19:20 Ekifo kye baakomereramu Yesu ku musaalaba, kyali kumpi n'ekibuga. N'olwekyo Abayudaaya bangi ne basoma ekiwandiiko ekyo. Kyali kiwandiikiddwa mu Lwebureeyi, ne mu Lulattini, ne mu Luyonaani." 
John19:21 Awo bakabona abakulu ab'Abayudaaya ne bagamba nti: “Towandiika nti: ‘Kabaka w'Abayudaaya,’ naye nti: ‘Oyo yagamba nti: Nze Kabaka w'Abayudaaya.’ ”" 
John19:22 Pilaato n'addamu nti: “Ekyo kye mpandiise, kye mpandiise.”" 
John19:23 Abaserikale bwe baamala okukomerera Yesu ku musaalaba, ne batwala engoye ze, ne baziteeka emiteeko ena, buli muserikale n'afunako gumu. Ne batwala n'ekkanzu ye, eyali tetungiddwa, naye ng'erukiddwa bulukibwa yonna." 
John19:24 Abaserikale ne bagambagana nti: “Tuleme kugiyuzaamu, naye tugikubire akalulu, tulabe anaaba nnyiniyo.” Kino kyabaawo, okutuukiriza ekyawandiikibwa, ekigamba nti: “Baagabana engoye zange, ekkanzu yange ne bagikubira akalulu.” Abaserikale ekyo kyennyini kye baakola." 
John19:25 Okumpi n'omusaalaba gwa Yesu, waali wayimiriddewo nnyina, ne muganda wa nnyina, Mariya muka Kuloopaasi, ne Mariya Magudaleena." 
John19:26 Yesu bwe yalaba nnyina, era n'omuyigirizwa, ye Yesu gwe yayagalanga, ng'ayimiridde awo, n'agamba nnyina nti: “Maama, laba, omwana wo wuuyo.”" 
John19:27 Ate n'agamba omuyigirizwa nti: “Laba, nnyoko wuuyo.” Okuva olwo omuyigirizwa oyo n'amutwala eka ewuwe." 
John19:28 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yesu ng'amanyi nti kaakano byonna biwedde, olw'okwagala okutuukiriza ekyawandiikibwa, n'agamba nti: “Ennyonta ennuma.”" 
John19:29 Waali wateekeddwawo ekibya ekijjudde omwenge omukaatuufu. Ne bannyika ekyangwe mu mwenge ogwo, ne bakiteeka ku kati akayitibwa yisopu, ne bakituusa ku mumwa gwe." 
John19:30 Yesu bwe yamala okuweebwa omwenge omukaatuufu, n'agamba nti: “Kiwedde.” N'akutamya omutwe, n'afa." 
John19:31 Olunaku nga bwe lwali olw'okweteekateeka, Abayudaaya ne batayagala mirambo kusigala ku misaalaba ku lwa Sabbaato, kubanga olunaku lwa Sabbaato eyo, lwali lukulu nnyo. Kyebaava basaba Pilaato, abaakomererwa ku misaalaba bamenyebwe amagulu, era bawanulweyo." 
John19:32 Awo abaserikale ne bajja, ne bamenya amagulu ag'omubereberye, n'ag'omulala eyakomererwa ne Yesu." 
John19:33 Bwe baatuuka ku Yesu, ne balaba nga yafudde dda, ne batamumenya magulu," 
John19:34 naye omu ku baserikale n'amufumita effumu mu mbiriizi, amangwago ne muvaamu omusaayi n'amazzi." 
John19:35 Kino eyakiraba nga kibaawo ye yakyogera, nammwe mulyoke mukkirize. Ky'ayogera kya mazima, era amanyi ng'ayogera mazima." 
John19:36 Ebyo byabaawo, ekyawandiikibwa kituukirire nti: “Talimenyebwa ggumba na limu.”" 
John19:37 Era ekyawandiikibwa ekirala kigamba nti: “Balimulaba gwe baafumita.” 
John19:38 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yosefu ow'e Arimataya, eyali omuyigirizwa wa Yesu, naye mu kyama olw'okutya Abayudaaya, ne yeegayirira Pilaato, amukkirize okutwala omulambo gwa Yesu. Pilaato n'akkiriza. Awo Yosefu n'ajja n'agutwala." 
John19:39 Nikodemo, olumu eyagenda eri Yesu ekiro, naye n'ajja, ng'aleese kilo ng'amakumi asatu mu ssatu ez'ebyakawoowo ebitabule, ebya mirra ne alowe." 
John19:40 Ne batwala omulambo gwa Yesu, ne baguzinga mu ngoye enjeru wamu n'ebyakawoowo, ng'empisa y'Abayudaaya ey'okuziika bwe yali." 
John19:41 Mu kifo, Yesu we yakomererwa ku musaalaba, waaliwo ennimiro omwali entaana empya ey'empuku, eyali teziikibwangamu muntu." 
John19:42 Nga bwe lwali olunaku olw'okweteekateeka kw'Abayudaaya, ate entaana eno nga eri kumpi, Yesu ne bamuteeka omwo." 
John20:1 Mu makya g'olunaku olusooka mu wiiki, Mariya Magudaleena n'alaga ku ntaana, ng'obudde tebunnalaba bulungi, n'alaba ejjinja nga liggyiddwa ku mulyango, gw'entaana." 
John20:2 N'olwekyo n'adduka, n'agenda eri Simooni Peetero, n'eri omuyigirizwa oli omulala, Yesu gwe yayagalanga, n'abagamba nti: “Mukama waffe bamuggyeemu mu ntaana, era tetumanyi gye bamutadde!”" 
John20:3 Awo Peetero n'omuyigirizwa oli omulala ne bafuluma ne balaga ku ntaana. 
John20:4 Bombi baagenda badduka nga bali wamu, wabula omuyigirizwa oli omulala n'asinga Peetero okudduka, n'amusooka ku ntaana." 
John20:5 N'akutama, n'alaba engoye enjeru, nga ziteekeddwa awo, kyokka n'atayingira." 
John20:6 Olwo ne Simooni Peetero n'atuuka ng'amugoberera. N'ayingira mu ntaana, n'alaba engoye enjeru, nga ziteekeddwa awo." 
John20:7 N'alaba n'ekitambaala ekyali ku mutwe gwa Yesu. Kyali tekiteekeddwa wamu na ngoye, wabula kyali kizingiddwa, era nga kiteekeddwa waakyo." 
John20:8 Olwo omuyigirizwa oli eyasooka okutuuka ku ntaana, naye n'ayingira. N'alaba, era n'akkiriza." 
John20:9 Ddala baali tebannategeera ekyawandiikibwa nti: Yesu ateekwa okuzuukira. 
John20:10 Awo abayigirizwa ne baddayo ewaabwe. 
John20:11 Mariya Magudaleena yali ayimiridde wabweru w'entaana, ng'akaaba. Yali akyakaaba, n'akutama n'alingiza mu ntaana," 
John20:12 n'alaba bamalayika babiri, nga bali mu ngoye njeru, nga batudde, omu emitwetwe, n'omulala emirannamiro w'ekifo, omulambo gwa Yesu we gwali guteekeddwa." 
John20:13 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Owange omukyala, okaabira ki?” Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Mukama wange bamuggyeemu, era simanyi gye bamutadde!”" 
John20:14 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'akyuka n'atunula emabega, n'alaba Yesu ng'ayimiridde awo, kyokka n'atamanya nti ye Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu n'amubuuza nti: “Owange omukyala, okaabira ki? Onoonya ani?” Mariya n'alowooza nti omuntu oyo, ye mukuumi w'ennimiro, era n'amugamba nti: “Ssebo, oba nga ggwe wamuggyeemu, mbuulira gye wamutadde, ŋŋende mmuggyeyo.”" 
John20:16 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Mariya!” Mariya n'akyukira Yesu, n'amugamba mu Lwebureeyi nti: “Rabbooni!” (ekitegeeza nti: “Omuyigiriza”)." 
John20:17 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Tonneekwatako, kubanga sinnalinnya mu ggulu eri Kitange. Naye genda eri baganda bange, obategeeze nti: ‘Nninnya mu ggulu eri Kitange era Kitammwe, eri Katonda wange era Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
John20:18 Mariya Magudaleena n'agenda, n'abuulira abayigirizwa nti alabye Mukama, era n'abategeeza Mukama by'amugambye." 
John20:19 Ku lunaku olwo olusooka mu wiiki, obudde bwe bwali buwungedde, abayigirizwa we baali, enzigi zaali nsibe, olw'okutya Abayudaaya. Yesu n'ajja, n'ayimirira wakati mu bo, n'abagamba nti: “Emirembe gibe na mmwe.”" 
John20:20 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'abalaga ebibatu bye n'embiriizi ze. Abayigirizwa ne basanyuka okulaba Mukama waabwe." 
John20:21 N'abagamba nate nti: “Emirembe gibe na mmwe. Nga Kitange bwe yantuma, nange bwe mbatuma mmwe.”" 
John20:22 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'abafuuwako omukka, n'abagamba nti: “Mufune Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
John20:23 ebibi by'abantu bye munaasonyiwanga, nga bisonyiyiddwa. Eby'abo bye munaagaananga okusonyiwa, abo nga tebibasonyiyiddwa.”" 
John20:24 Tomasi, omu ku bayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri, ayitibwa Didimo (Omulongo), teyali na banne, Yesu bwe yajja." 
John20:25 Abayigirizwa banne ne bamugamba nti: “Tulabye Mukama waffe.” Kyokka ye n'abagamba nti: “Okuggyako nga ndabye enkovu ez'emisumaali mu bibatu bye, ne nteeka olunwe lwange mu nkovu ezo, era ne nteeka ekibatu kyange mu mbiriizi ze, sigenda kukkiriza.”" 
John20:26 Bwe waayitawo ennaku munaana, abayigirizwa ba Yesu ng'era bali mu nnyumba, Tomasi naye ng'ali nabo, Yesu n'ajja, enzigi nga nsibe, n'ayimirira wakati mu bo, n'agamba nti: “Emirembe gibe na mmwe.”" 
John20:27 Awo n'agamba Tomasi nti: “Leeta wano olunwe lwo, era laba ebibatu byange. Era leeta ekibatu kyo, okiteeke mu mbiriizi zange. Leka kuba atakkiriza, naye akkiriza.”" 
John20:28 Tomasi n'amuddamu nti: “Mukama wange, era Katonda wange!”" 
John20:29 Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Olw'okuba ng'ondabye, kyovudde okkiriza? Ba mukisa abakkiriza nga tebalabye.”"
