John20:30 Yesu yakola ebyamagero ebirala bingi ng'abayigirizwa be balaba, ebitawandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
John20:31 Naye bino biwandiikiddwa, mulyoke mukkirize nti Yesu ye Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda, era olw'okukkiriza okwo, mulyoke mufune obulamu mu ye." 
John21:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yesu n'alabikira nate abayigirizwa be, ku nnyanja ey'e Tiberiya. Yabalabikira bw'ati:" 
John21:2 Simooni Peetero, ne Tomasi, ayitibwa Omulongo, ne Natanayili ow'e Kaana eky'e Galilaaya, ne batabani ba Zebedaayo, n'abayigirizwa ba Yesu abalala babiri, bonna baali wamu." 
John21:3 Simooni Peetero n'abagamba nti: “Ŋŋenda kuvuba.” Ne bamugamba nti: “Naffe tugenda naawe.” Ne bagenda, ne basaabala mu lyato. Naye ekiro ekyo kyonna ne batakwasa kantu." 
John21:4 Obudde bwali bwakakya, Yesu n'ayimirira ku lubalama, kyokka abayigirizwa, ne batamanya nti ye Yesu." 
John21:5 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Abalenzi, mukutteyo akookulya?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Nedda.”" 
John21:6 N'abagamba nti: “Musuule akatimba ku ludda olwa ddyo olw'eryato, munaakwasa.” Awo ne basuula, era ne batayinza kukannyulula, olw'ebyennyanja ebingi bye baakwasa." 
John21:7 Awo omuyigirizwa oyo Yesu gwe yayagalanga, n'agamba Peetero nti: “Oyo ye Mukama waffe.” Simooni Peetero bwe yawulira nti oyo ye Mukama, ne yeesiba olugoye, (kubanga yali bwereere), ne yeesuula mu mazzi." 
John21:8 Abayigirizwa abalala ne bajjira mu lyato, nga basika akatimba akalimu ebyennyanja. Tebaali wala n'olukalu, naye nga balwesudde mita nga kikumi." 
John21:9 Awo bwe baavaamu, ne batuuka ku lukalu, ne balaba omuliro ogw'amanda, nga guteekeddwako ebyennyanja, n'omugaati." 
John21:10 Awo Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Muleete ku byennyanja bye mukwasizza kaakano.” 
John21:11 Simooni Peetero n'agenda, n'asaabala, n'awalula akatimba, n'akatuusa ku lukalu, nga kajjudde ebyennyanja ebinene kikumi mu ataano mu bisatu. Newaakubadde nga byali bingi bwe bityo, akatimba tekaakutuka." 
John21:12 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Mujje mulye.” Naye ku bayigirizwa, tewali yategana kumubuuza nti: “Ggwe ani,” kubanga baamanya nti ye Mukama." 
John21:13 Yesu n'ajja, n'atoola omugaati, n'abawa, n'ebyennyanja bw'atyo." 
John21:14 Guno gwe mulundi ogwokusatu, Yesu gwe yalabikira abayigirizwa be, ng'amaze okuzuukira." 
John21:15 Bwe baamala okulya, Yesu n'agamba Simooni Peetero nti: “Simooni, omwana wa Yona, onjagala okusinga bano bwe banjagala?” N'amuddamu nti: “Weewaawo, Mukama wange, omanyi nga nkwagala.” Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Liisanga abaana b'endiga zange.”" 
John21:16 Era n'amugamba omulundi ogwokubiri nti: “Simooni, omwana wa Yona, onjagala?” N'amuddamu nti: “Weewaawo, Mukama wange, omanyi nga nkwagala.” Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Lundanga endiga zange.”" 
John21:17 N'amugamba omulundi ogwokusatu nti: “Simooni, omwana wa Yona, onjagala?” Peetero n'anakuwala, kubanga Yesu yamubuuza omulundi ogwokusatu nti: “Onjagala?” N'amuddamu nti: “Mukama wange, omanyi byonna, omanyi nga nkwagala.” Yesu n'amugamba nti: “Liisanga endiga zange." 
John21:18 Mazima ddala nkugamba nti bwe wali omuvubuka, weesibanga, n'ogenda gy'oyagala. Naye bw'olikaddiwa, oligolola emikono gyo, omulala n'akusiba, n'akutwala gy'otoyagala.”" 
John21:19 Ekyo Yesu yakyogera, ng'alaga enfa, Peetero gy'alifaamu, okugulumiza Katonda. Bwe yamala okwogera ekyo, n'agamba Peetero nti: “Ngoberera.”" 
John21:20 Peetero bwe yakyuka n'atunula emabega, n'alaba omuyigirizwa oyo omulala, ng'agoberera. Omuyigirizwa oyo, ye oli Yesu gwe yayagalanga, era eyagalamira okumpi n'ekifuba kya Yesu nga balya, n'amubuuza nti: “Mukama wange, ani anaakulyamu olukwe?”" 
John21:21 Awo Peetero bwe yalaba oyo, n'agamba Yesu nti: “Mukama wange, ate ono aliba atya?”" 
John21:22 Yesu n'amuddamu nti: “Bwe njagala abeerewo okutuusa we ndijjira, ofaayo ki? Ggwe goberera nze.”" 
John21:23 Awo ekigambo ekyo ne kibuna mu booluganda nti omuyigirizwa oyo talifa. Sso Yesu teyamugamba nti talifa, wabula nti: “Bwe njagala abeerewo okutuusa we ndijjira, ofaayo ki?”" 
John21:24 Oyo ye muyigirizwa akakasa bino, era ye yabiwandiika. Tumanyi nga by'ayogera bya mazima." 
John21:25 Waliwo n'ebirala bingi Yesu bye yakola. Nabyo singa biwandiikibwa kinnakimu, ndowooza nti n'ensi zonna tezandigiddemu bitabo ebyandiwandiikiddwa." 
Acts1:1 Munnange Tewofilo, mu kitabo kyange ekisooka nawandiika ku ebyo Yesu bye yakola ne bye yayigiriza, okuva lwe yatandika okukola omulimu gwe," 
Acts1:2 okutuusiza ddala ku lunaku lwe yatwalirwako mu ggulu. Bwe yali nga tannatwalibwa mu ggulu, yamala kukuutira ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, abatume be, be yalondamu." 
Acts1:3 Mu nnaku amakumi ana ng'amaze okubonyaabonyezebwa era n'okuttibwa, yabalabikira emirundi mingi, mu ngeri ezaabakakasiza ddala nti mulamu. Baamulaba, era n'ayogera nabo ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Acts1:4 Era bwe baakuŋŋaana awamu, n'abalagira nti: “Temuva mu Yerusaalemu, wabula mulinde ekirabo Kitange kye yasuubiza, era kye nabagambako.”" 
Acts1:5 Yowanne yabatiza na mazzi, kyokka mmwe mu nnaku ntono, mulibatizibwa na Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Acts1:6 Abatume bwe baakuŋŋaana, ne babuuza Yesu nti: “Mukama waffe, mu kiseera kino mw'onoddizaawo obwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli?”" 
Acts1:7 Yesu n'abagamba nti: “Okumanya ebbanga n'ekiseera si kwammwe. Kitange yakuleka mu buyinza bwe. 
Acts1:8 Kyokka Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bw'alijja ku mmwe, muliweebwa amaanyi. Era mulimmanyisa mu Yerusaalemu, ne mu Buyudaaya bwonna, ne mu Samariya, n'okutuusiza ddala ensi yonna gy'ekoma.”" 
Acts1:9 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'atwalibwa mu ggulu nga balaba, ekire ne kimubikka, ne bataddayo kumulaba." 
Acts1:10 Awo bwe baali nga batunuulira waggulu balabe bw'agenda, abasajja babiri abambadde engoye enjeru, ne bajja ne bayimirira kumpi nabo." 
Acts1:11 Abasajja abo ne babuuza abatume nti: “Abasajja ab'e Galilaaya, lwaki muyimiridde nga mutunuulira waggulu? Oyo Yesu abaggyiddwako n'atwalibwa mu ggulu, alikomawo bw'atyo nga bwe mumulabye ng'agenda mu ggulu.”" 
Acts1:12 Awo abatume ne baddayo e Yerusaalemu nga bava ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emizayiti, oluli okumpi ne Yerusaalemu, ebbanga nga lya kilomita emu." 
Acts1:13 Bwe baayingira mu kibuga, ne bambuka mu kisenge ekya waggulu kye baabeerangamu. Baali: Peetero ne Yowanne, ne Yakobo ne Andereya, Filipo ne Tomasi, Barutolomaayo ne Matayo, Yakobo omwana wa Alufaayo, Simooni Omulwanirizi w'eddembe ly'eggwanga lye, ne Yuda muganda wa Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Abo bonna, era n'abakazi omwali Mariya nnyina Yesu ne baganda ba Yesu, ne beemaliranga ku kusinza Katonda." 
Acts1:15 Mu nnaku ezo abooluganda ne bakuŋŋaana, nga bawera nga kikumi mu abiri. Peetero n'ayimirira wakati mu bo n'agamba nti:" 
Acts1:16 “Abooluganda, ekyawandiikibwa, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu kye yayogeza Dawudi ku Yuda eyakulembera abo abaakwata Yesu, kyali kiteekwa okutuukirizibwa." 
Acts1:17 Yuda oyo yali omu ku ffe, kubanga yalondebwa okukola omulimu awamu naffe.”" 
Acts1:18 (Omusajja oyo Yuda, ensimbi ze yaweebwa olw'ekikolwa kye ekibi, yazigulamu ennimiro mwe yagwa n'afa. Yayabikamu wabiri, ebyenda bye ne biyiika." 
Acts1:19 Abantu bonna ab'e Yerusaalemu kino bakimanyi, era mu lulimi lwabwe, kyebava bagiyita Akeludama, ekitegeeza nti: “Ennimiro y'Omusaayi”)." 
Acts1:20 “Mu kitabo kya Zabbuli kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Ennyumba ye ebeere kifulukwa, ekibanja kye kibeere matongo.’ Era nti: ‘Obukulu bwe buweebwe omulala.’" 
Acts1:21 “Kale twetaaga omuntu omu okuba awamu naffe mu kukakasa okuzuukira kwa Mukama waffe Yesu. Omuntu oyo ateekwa okuba omu ku basajja abaayitanga naffe, mu kiseera kyonna Mukama waffe kye yatambulanga naffe, okuva ku lunaku lwe yabatizibwa Yowanne, okutuusiza ddala lwe yatuggyibwako n'atwalibwa mu ggulu.”" 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Ne bassaawo abantu babiri: Yosefu ayitibwa Barusabba, era eyatuumibwa erya Yusto, n'omulala Matiya." 
Acts1:24 Ne basaba Katonda nga bagamba nti: “Ggwe Mukama omanyi ebiri mu mitima gy'abantu bonna. Tulage gw'olonze ku bano ababiri," 
Acts1:25 aweebwe ekifo mu mulimu gw'obutume, Yuda kye yaleka.”" 
Acts1:26 Ne bakuba akalulu, ne kalonda Matiya, n'abalirwa ku batume ekkumi n'omu." 
Acts2:1 Awo olunaku olwa Pentekoote ne lutuuka. Ku olwo, abakkiriza bonna baali bakuŋŋaanidde mu kifo kimu." 
Acts2:2 Amangwago ne wabaawo okuwuuma okwava mu ggulu, nga kuli ng'okuwuuma kw'empewo ey'amaanyi ennyo, ne kujjula ennyumba yonna mwe baali batudde." 
Acts2:3 Awo ne balaba ennimi eziri ng'ez'omuliro, nga zeeyawuddemu, buli lulimi ne lubeera ku buli omu ku bo." 
Acts2:4 Bonna ne bajjuzibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, era ne batandika okwogera mu nnimi eza buli ngeri, nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bwe yaziboogeza." 
Acts2:5 Mu Yerusaalemu mwalimu Abayudaaya, abasajja abajjumbira eddiini, abaali bavudde mu buli kitundu kya nsi." 
Acts2:6 Bwe baawulira okuwuuma okwo, ne bakuŋŋaana bangi, ne basamaalirira, kubanga buli omu yawulira abakkiriza Kristo nga boogera mu lulimi lwe." 
Acts2:7 Ne bawuniikirira, ne beewuunya nga bagamba nti: “Abantu bano bonna aboogera si Bayudaaya?" 
Acts2:8 Kale lwaki ffe ffenna tubawulira nga boogera mu nnimi z'ewaffe gye twazaalirwa? 
Acts2:9 Tuva mu Paruti, Mediya ne Elamu; mu Mesopotaamiya, Buyudaaya, ne mu Kapadookiya; mu Ponto ne mu Asiya;" 
Acts2:10 mu Furigiya ne mu Panfiliya; mu Misiri ne mu bitundu ebya Libiya okumpi ne Kireene. Abamu tuva Rooma," 
Acts2:11 nga tuli Bayudaaya, awamu n'ab'amawanga amalala abasoma Ekiyudaaya. Era abalala bava mu Kureete ne mu Buwarabu. Kyokka ffenna tubawulira nga boogera mu nnimi zaffe, eby'amaanyi Katonda by'akoze!”" 
Acts2:12 Bonna nga basamaaliridde era nga basobeddwa, ne beebuuzaganya nga bagamba nti: “Kiki kino?”" 
Acts2:13 Naye abamu ne beesekera, ne bagamba nti: “Batamidde mwenge musu!”" 
Acts2:14 Awo Peetero ng'ali n'abatume abalala ekkumi n'omu, n'ayimirira, n'akangula ku ddoboozi, n'agamba nti: “Bayudaaya bannange, nammwe mwenna ababeera mu Yerusaalemu, muwulirize, mutegeere bye ŋŋenda okwogera." 
Acts2:15 Abantu bano tebatamidde, nga mmwe bwe mulowooza, kubanga kati essaawa zikyali ssatu ez'oku makya." 
Acts2:16 Wabula kino ky'ekyo omulanzi Yoweeli kye yayogera nti: 
Acts2:17 ‘Katonda agamba nti: Mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma, ndigabira abantu bonna Mwoyo wange. Batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe baliranga ebirijja. Abavubuka bammwe balirabikirwa, n'abakadde mu mmwe baliroota ebirooto." 
Acts2:18 Kya mazima, mu nnaku ezo, abaddu bange n'abazaana bange ndibagabira Mwoyo wange, ne balanga ebirijja." 
Acts2:19 Ndikola ebyamagero ku ggulu, n'ebyewuunyisa ku nsi. Walibaawo omusaayi n'omuliro, n'omukka ogukutte." 
Acts2:20 Enjuba eribikkibwa ekizikiza, n'omwezi gulimyuka ng'omusaayi. Ebyo bye birikulembera olunaku lwa Mukama olukulu era olwekitiibwa." 
Acts2:21 Era buli alikoowoola Mukama, alirokolebwa.’" 
Acts2:22 “Abayisirayeli, muwulire ebigambo bino. Yesu Omunazaareeti ye musajja Katonda gwe yakakasa nti ye yamutuma. Kino kyalabikira mu by'amaanyi n'ebyamagero n'ebyewuunyo, Katonda bye yamukozesa mu mmwe, nga nammwe bwe mumanyi." 
Acts2:23 Yesu oyo yaweebwayo, nga Katonda bwe yali amaze okuteesa n'okumanya, ne mumukwasa abantu ababi okumukomerera ku musaalaba, ne mumutta." 
Acts2:24 Kyokka Katonda yamuzuukiza, n'amuggya mu bulumi bw'okufa, kubanga okufa kwali nga tekuyinza kumunywereza ddala." 
Acts2:25 Dawudi yamwogerako nti: ‘Nalaba Mukama ng'ali nange bulijjo; ng'ali kumpi nange nneme okusagaasagana. 
Acts2:26 Omutima gwange kyeguva gusanyuka, n'ebigambo byange ne bijjula essanyu. Era nze wadde ndi wa kufa, nja kusigala nga nnina essuubi:" 
Acts2:27 kubanga tolireka mwoyo gwange magombe, era toliganya mutukuvu wo kuvunda." 
Acts2:28 Wandaga amakubo agatuuka mu bulamu. Olinzijuza essanyu kubanga oli nange.’ 
Acts2:29 “Abooluganda, nnyinza okubategeeza ebifa ku jjajjaffe omukulu Dawudi nga sirina kutya. Dawudi oyo yafa n'aziikibwa, n'amasiro ge gali wano ewaffe n'okutuusa kati." 
Acts2:30 Dawudi yali mulanzi, era yamanya Katonda kye yamusuubiza ng'alayira n'okulayira nti omu ku bazzukulu be, alisikira entebe ey'obwakabaka bwe." 
Acts2:31 Era yamanya ebiribaawo, n'ayogera ku kuzuukira kwa Kristo, ng'agamba nti: ‘Teyalekebwa magombe, era n'omubiri gwe tegwavunda.’" 
Acts2:32 “Yesu oyo, Katonda yamuzuukiza, era ffe tukakasa okuzuukira kwe." 
Acts2:33 Bwe yamala okulinnyisibwa n'aliraana Katonda ku ludda lwe olwa ddyo, era n'afuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu eyamusuubizibwa Katonda Kitaawe, n'alyoka agaba ekirabo kye kino, kye mulabye era kye muwulira." 
Acts2:34 Dawudi teyalinnya mu ggulu, sso ye yennyini yagamba nti: ‘Katonda yagamba Mukama wange nti: Tuula ng'onninaanye ku ludda lwange olwa ddyo," 
Acts2:35 okutuusa lwe ndifuula abalabe bo ekirinnyibwako ebigere byo.’ 
Acts2:36 “Kale nno, abantu ba Yisirayeli bonna bamanye awatali kubuusabuusa, nti Yesu oyo gwe mwakomerera ku musaalaba, Katonda yamufuula Mukama era Kristo.”" 
Acts2:37 Awo bwe baawulira ebyo, ne beeraliikirira nnyo, ne bagamba Peetero n'abatume abalala nti: “Abooluganda, tukole ki?”" 
Acts2:38 Peetero n'abagamba nti: “Mwenenye, era buli omu mu mmwe abatizibwe mu linnya lya Yesu Kristo, mulyoke musonyiyibwe ebibi byammwe, era munaafuna ekirabo, ye Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Acts2:39 kubanga kino Katonda yakibasuubiza mmwe, n'abaana bammwe, era n'abo bonna abali ewala, bonna Mukama Katonda waffe b'aliyita.”" 
Acts2:40 Era Peetero n'ayongera okubategeeza mu bigambo ebirala bingi, n'abagamba nti: “Mulokolebwe, mwewonye ekibonerezo ekigenda okuweebwa ab'omulembe guno omubi.”" 
Acts2:41 Awo abakkiriza ebigambo bye, ne babatizibwa. Ku lunaku olwo, omuwendo gw'abakkiriza ne gweyongerako abantu ng'enkumi ssatu." 
Acts2:42 Ne banyiikiriranga okuyigirizibwa abatume, n'okwetaba mu nkuŋŋaana ez'okutabagana, n'okuliira awamu ng'abooluganda, era n'okusinza Katonda." 
Acts2:43 Ebyamagero bingi n'ebyewuunyo ne bikolebwanga abatume, abantu bonna ne beewuunya." 
Acts2:44 Bonna abakkiriza baabanga wamu, era nga bassa kimu mu byonna." 
Acts2:45 Baatundanga ebyabwe, ensimbi ze baggyangamu ne bazigabiranga bonna, nga buli muntu bwe yeetaaganga." 
Acts2:46 Baanyiikiranga okukuŋŋaanira mu Ssinzizo buli lunaku. Era mu maka gaabwe baaliirangamu emmere yaabwe nga bajjudde essanyu n'okukkaanya," 
Acts2:47 nga batendereza Katonda, era nga basiimibwa abantu bonna. Buli lunaku Mukama yabongerangako abo abaalokolebwanga." 
Acts3:1 Awo Peetero ne Yowanne ne bambuka mu Ssinzizo ku ssaawa ey'omwenda ey'olweggulo, mu ssaawa ey'okusinzizaamu Katonda." 
Acts3:2 Ku luggi olw'Essinzizo oluyitibwa Olulungi, waaliwo omusajja eyali omulema okuviira ddala lwe yazaalibwa. Buli lunaku baamuteekanga awo ku luggi asabirize ensimbi ku bantu abaayingiranga mu Ssinzizo." 
Acts3:3 Bwe yalaba Peetero ne Yowanne nga bagenda okuyingira mu Ssinzizo, n'abasaba ensimbi." 
Acts3:4 Ne bamusimba amaaso. Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Tutunuulire.” 
Acts3:5 Awo n'abatunuulira, ng'asuubira nti banaabaako kye bamuwa." 
Acts3:6 Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Ensimbi sirina n'akatono, naye kye nnina kye nnaakuwa. Mu linnya lya Yesu Omunazaareeti nkulagira, tambula.”" 
Acts3:7 Awo n'amukwata ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, n'amuyimusa. Amangwago ebigere bye n'obukongovvule ne bifuna amaanyi." 
Acts3:8 N'agolokoka mangu, n'ayimirira, n'atambula, n'ayingira nabo mu Ssinzizo, ng'atambula, ng'abuuka, era ng'atendereza Katonda." 
Acts3:9 Abantu bonna ne bamulaba ng'atambula era ng'atendereza Katonda. 
Acts3:10 Ne bamutegeera nga ye wuuyo eyatuulanga ku Luggi Olulungi olw'Essinzizo ng'asabiriza. Bonna ne bawuniikirira nnyo, era ne beewuunya olw'ekyo ekikoleddwa." 
Acts3:11 Bwe yali akyekutte ku Peetero ne Yowanne, abantu bonna ne basamaalirira, ne badduka ne bagenda awali Peetero ne Yowanne ku kifugi ekiyitibwa ekya Solomooni." 
Acts3:12 Peetero bwe yabalaba, n'abagamba nti: “Abasajja Abayisirayeli, lwaki kino kibeewuunyisa? Lwaki mututunuulira bwe mutyo? Mulowooza nti buyinza bwaffe, oba bulungi bwaffe mu maaso ga Katonda bye bisobozesezza ono okutambula?" 
Acts3:13 Katonda wa Aburahamu, era owa Yisaaka, era owa Yakobo, Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, ye agulumizizza omuweereza we Yesu, mmwe gwe mwawaayo era ne mumwegaanira mu maaso ga Pilaato, eyali asazeewo okumuta." 
Acts3:14 Naye mmwe mwegaana omutuukirivu era atuukiriza byonna Katonda by'alagira, ne musaba okubateera omutemu." 
Acts3:15 Mwatta oyo awa bonna obulamu, kyokka Katonda n'amuzuukiza. Era ffe kino tukikakasa." 
Acts3:16 Obuyinza bwa Yesu oyo bwe buwadde amaanyi omuntu ono gwe mulaba era gwe mumanyi, era okwesiga Yesu kwe kuleetedde omuntu ono okuwonera ddala nga mwenna bwe mulaba." 
Acts3:17 “Kale nno abooluganda, mmanyi nga mmwe, awamu n'abafuzi bammwe, bye mwakola Yesu, mwabikola mu butamanya." 
Acts3:18 Mu byo Katonda n'atuukiriza ebyo bye yayogeza abalanzi be bonna ab'edda, abaalanga ku Kristo we nti alibonyaabonyezebwa." 
Acts3:19 Kale nno mwenenye, mudde eri Katonda, ebibi byammwe bisonyiyibwe," 
Acts3:20 Katonda alyoke awenga emitima gyammwe okuwummula, era abatumire Kristo gwe yabategekera edda, ye Yesu." 
Acts3:21 Kristo oyo ateekwa okubeera mu ggulu okutuusa ebintu byonna lwe birizzibwa obuggya, nga Katonda bwe yayogerera mu balanzi be abatukuvu abaaliwo edda." 
Acts3:22 Musa yagamba nti: ‘Mukama Katonda alibatumira omulanzi aliva mu baganda bammwe, nga bwe yabatumira nze. Mumuwuliranga mu byonna by'alibagamba." 
Acts3:23 Kyokka buli muntu ataliwulira mulanzi oyo, aliggyibwa mu bantu ba Katonda, n'azikirizibwa.’" 
Acts3:24 Era abalanzi bonna abaayogera, okuva ku Samweli n'abaamuddirira, ennaku zino baaziranga." 
Acts3:25 Ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza ng'ayita mu balanzi, byammwe. Era n'endagaano gye yalagaana ne bajjajjammwe, yakolerwa mmwe. Yagamba Aburahamu nti: ‘Mu bazzukulu bo, amawanga gonna mwe galiweerwa omukisa.’" 
Acts3:26 Kale Katonda bwe yalonda omuweereza we, yasooka kumutumira mmwe, abawe omukisa ng'abakyusa mwenna okuva mu bibi byammwe.”" 
Acts4:1 Peetero ne Yowanne bwe baali bakyayogera n'ekibiina ky'abantu, bakabona n'omukulu w'abakuumi b'Essinzizo, wamu n'Abasaddukaayo, ne bajja gye bali." 
Acts4:2 Baali banyiivu, kubanga abo bombi baali bayigiriza abantu nti Yesu yazuukira, kino nga kikakasa nti abafu bagenda kuzuukira." 
Acts4:3 Ne bakwata Peetero ne Yowanne ne babateeka mu kkomera okutuusa ku lunaku olwaddirira, kubanga obudde bwali buwungedde." 
Acts4:4 Kyokka bangi ku abo abaawulira ebigambo Peetero bye yababuulira, ne bakkiriza. Omuwendo gwabwe gwali abasajja ng'enkumi ttaano." 
Acts4:5 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, abakulembeze b'Abayudaaya n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, awamu n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka, ne bakuŋŋaanira mu Yerusaalemu." 
Acts4:6 Baali ne Anna ne Kayaafa Ssaabakabona, ne Yowanne ne Alekizanda, wamu n'abalala ab'olulyo lwa Ssaabakabona." 
Acts4:7 Ne balagira abatume okuyimirira mu maaso g'olukiiko, ne bababuuza nti: “Mwakozesa buyinza bw'ani, oba ani eyabasobozesa okuwonya omuntu ono?”" 
Acts4:8 Awo Peetero ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe abafuzi, era nammwe abantu abakulu mu ggwanga," 
Acts4:9 oba nga tubuuzibwa olw'ekikolwa ekirungi ekikoleddwa ku muntu abadde omulema, era ne ku ngeri gy'awonyezeddwamu," 
Acts4:10 kale abantu ba Yisirayeli bonna, era nammwe mwenna musaana mumanye nti obuyinza bwa Yesu Kristo Omunazaareeti, mmwe gwe mwakomerera ku musaalaba, ate Katonda n'amuzuukiza, bwe buyimirizza omuntu ono wakati mu mmwe nga mulamu." 
Acts4:11 Yesu ye oyo ebyawandiikibwa gwe byogerako nti: ‘Ejjinja mmwe abazimbi lye mwagaana, lye lyafuuka ekkulu ery'entabiro.’" 
Acts4:12 Ye yekka ye ayinza okulokola abantu, kubanga mu nsi yonna tewali mulala Katonda gwe yawa linnya liyinza kutulokola.”" 
Acts4:13 Bwe baalaba obuvumu bwa Peetero ne Yowanne, era bwe baategeera nti be bantu abaabulijjo era abatali bayigirize, ne beewuunya. Era ne bakizuula nga baali wamu ne Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Ate bwe baalaba omuntu awonyezeddwa ng'ayimiridde wamu ne Peetero ne Yowanne, ne babulwa kye bagamba." 
Acts4:15 Bwe baamala okubafulumya mu lukiiko, ne bateesa nga bagamba nti:" 
Acts4:16 “Tunaakola tutya abantu bano? Ekyewuunyo kye bakoze kimaze okumanyibwa abantu bonna ababeera mu Yerusaalemu, era tetuyinza kukigaana!" 
Acts4:17 Naye okukiziyiza okubuna, ka tuyite abasajja bano, tubakangise, baleme kweyongera kwogera na muntu n'omu mu linnya eryo.”" 
Acts4:18 Awo ne babayita ne babalagira obutaddayo kwogera, wadde okuyigiriza omuntu n'omu mu linnya lya Yesu." 
Acts4:19 Peetero ne Yowanne ne babaddamu nti: “Mmwe muba musalawo ekisinga obulungi mu maaso ga Katonda, kuwulira Ye oba mmwe?" 
Acts4:20 Ffe tetuyinza butayogera ekyo kye twalaba era kye twawulira.” 
Acts4:21 Awo ne beeyongera okubatiisatiisa ne babata, nga tebalaba bwe banaababonereza olw'okutya abantu, kubanga bonna baali nga batendereza Katonda olw'ekyo ekyakolebwa." 
Acts4:22 Omusajja eyakolerwa ekyewuunyo ekyo eky'okuwonyezebwa, yali asussizza mu myaka amakumi ana." 
Acts4:23 Peetero ne Yowanne bwe baateebwa, ne baddayo eri bannaabwe, ne bababuulira byonna bakabona abakulu, awamu n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga bye babagambye." 
Acts4:24 Bwe baabiwulira, ne beegatta wamu bonna, ne beegayirira Katonda nga bagamba nti: “Mukama, ggwe eyakola eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja, ne byonna ebibirimu," 
Acts4:25 ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu wayogerera mu jjajjaffe Dawudi omuddu wo, n'ogamba nti: ‘Lwaki ab'amawanga amalala banyiize? Era lwaki abantu balowooza ebitaliimu?" 
Acts4:26 Bakabaka b'ensi beeteekateeka, n'abafuzi baakuŋŋaana wamu, okulwanyisa Mukama Katonda ne Kristo we.’" 
Acts4:27 “Ddala Herode ne Pontiyo Pilaato awamu n'abantu ba Yisirayeli n'ab'amawanga amalala baakuŋŋaanira mu kibuga muno, okulwanyisa Yesu Omuweereza wo omutuukirivu, gwe wafuula Kristo." 
Acts4:28 Ne batuukiriza ekyo, ggwe kye wateekateeka mu buyinza bwo, nga bwe wayagala." 
Acts4:29 “Kale kaakano Mukama, laba okutiisatiisa kwabwe. Wa abaweereza bo, boogere ekigambo kyo n'obuvumu." 
Acts4:30 Golola omukono gwo owonye, era n'ebyamagero bikolebwe mu linnya ly'Omuweereza wo omutuukirivu Yesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Bwe baamala okwegayirira Katonda, ekifo kyonna mwe baali bakuŋŋaanidde, ne kikankana. Bonna ne bajjuzibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, era ne batandika okwogera ekigambo kya Katonda n'obuvumu." 
Acts4:32 Ekibiina kyonna eky'abakkiriza Kristo, kyalina omutima gumu n'emmeeme emu. Tewaali n'omu yagambanga nti ekintu ky'alina kikye yekka, wabula byonna bye baalina byabanga byabwe wamu." 
Acts4:33 Abatume ne bakakasa n'amaanyi mangi okuzuukira kwa Mukama waffe Yesu, era bonna Katonda n'abayambanga nnyo." 
Acts4:34 Bonna baafunanga bye beetaaganga, kubanga abaabanga n'ennimiro oba ennyumba baazitundanga, ensimbi ezaavangamu" 
Acts4:35 ne bazireetera abatume, ne bagabira buli muntu nga bwe yeetaaganga." 
Acts4:36 Ne Yosefu Omuleevi eyazaalibwa e Kipuro, abatume gwe baakazaako erya Barunaba (amakulu gaalyo nti “Azzaamu abantu amaanyi”)," 
Acts4:37 n'atunda ennimiro ye, ensimbi ezaavaamu n'azitwala n'azikwasa abatume." 
Acts5:1 Naye waaliwo omusajja erinnya lye Ananiya, nga mukazi we ye Safira, n'atunda ennimiro ye." 
Acts5:2 Ekitundu ky'ensimbi ezaavaamu n'akitereka, nga ne mukazi we amanyi. Ezaasigalawo n'azitwalira abatume." 
Acts5:3 Peetero n'amubuuza nti: “Ananiya, lwaki wakkirizza Sitaani okufuga omutima gwo, n'olimba Mwoyo Mutuukirivu nga weeterekera ezimu ku nsimbi ze wafuna mu nnimiro?" 
Acts5:4 Bwe wali tonnagitunda teyali yiyo? Era n'ensimbi ze wafunamu tezaali mu buyinza bwo? Kale lwaki wateesezza mu mutima gwo okukola ekintu ekifaanana bwe kityo? Tolimbye bantu, wabula olimbye Katonda.”" 
Acts5:5 Ananiya olwawulira ebyo, n'agwa n'afiirawo. Bonna abaakiwulira ne bajjula entiisa." 
Acts5:6 Abavubuka ne bajja ne bazinga omulambo gwe, ne bagutwala ne baguziika." 
Acts5:7 Bwe waayitawo ebbanga lya ssaawa nga ssatu, mukazi we naye n'ayingira. Yali nga tamanyi bibaddewo." 
Acts5:8 Peetero n'amubuuza nti: “Mbuulira, mwatunda ennimiro omuwendo bwe guti?” N'addamu nti: “Ddala gwe guugwo.”" 
Acts5:9 Awo Peetero n'amubuuza nti: “Lwaki mwakkiriziganyizza okukema Mwoyo wa Mukama? Laba, abaziise balo baabo bayingira, naawe banaakutwala.”" 
Acts5:10 Amangwago n'agwa kumpi n'ebigere bya Peetero, n'afiirawo. Abavubuka bwe baayingira, ne bamusanga ng'afudde, ne bamutwala ne bamuziika okuliraana bba." 
Acts5:11 Awo ekibiina kyonna eky'abakkiriza Kristo era n'abalala bonna abaawulira ebyo, ne bajjula entiisa nnene." 
Acts5:12 Awo abatume ne bakolanga ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero bingi mu bantu. Abakkiriza bonna nga bali bumu, baakuŋŋaaniranga ku kifugi kya Solomooni." 
Acts5:13 Newaakubadde abantu abalala baabassangamu nnyo ekitiibwa, naye nga tewali aguma kubeetabikamu." 
Acts5:14 Kyokka omuwendo gw'abasajja n'abakazi abakkiriza Mukama, ne gugenda nga gweyongera." 
Acts5:15 N'okuleeta ne baleetanga abalwadde baabwe, ne babagalamiza ku bitanda ne ku mikeeka ku kkubo, Peetero ng'ayitawo waakiri ekisiikirize kye kituuke ku bamu." 
Acts5:16 Era abantu bangi ab'omu bibuga ebiriraanye Yerusaalemu, ne beesomba nga baleeta abalwadde n'abateganyizibwa emyoyo emibi, bonna ne bawonyezebwa." 
Acts5:17 Awo Ssaabakabona ne bonna abaali naye ab'ekibiina ky'Abasaddukaayo, ne bajjula obuggya." 
Acts5:18 Ne bakwata abatume, ne babateeka mu kkomera lya bonna." 
Acts5:19 Naye ekiro, malayika wa Mukama n'aggulawo enzigi z'ekkomera, n'abafulumya ebweru, n'abagamba nti:" 
Acts5:20 “Mugende muyingire mu Ssinzizo, mutegeeze abantu ebigambo byonna eby'obulamu buno obuggya.”" 
Acts5:21 Bwe baawulira ebigambo ebyo, ne bakeera mu matulutulu, ne bayingira mu Ssinzizo, ne bayigiriza. Awo Ssaabakabona n'abaali naye, ne bajja ne bayita olukiiko, wamu n'abantu bonna abakulu mu ggwanga lya Yisirayeli, ne batumya mu kkomera okuleeta abatume." 
Acts5:22 Naye abaatumibwa mu kkomera ne batabasangamu. Ne baddayo ne babategeeza nti: 
Acts5:23 “Ekkomera tusanze lisibiddwa bulungi, n'abakuumi nga bayimiridde ku nzigi, naye bwe tuliggudde, tetusanzeemu muntu n'omu.”" 
Acts5:24 Awo bakabona abakulu n'omukulu w'abakuumi b'Essinzizo, bwe baawulira ebyo, ne basoberwa." 
Acts5:25 Ne wabaawo eyajja n'abategeeza nti: “Abasajja be mwaggalidde mu kkomera, baabali bali mu Ssinzizo bayigiriza.”" 
Acts5:26 Awo omukulu w'abakuumi n'agenda ne basajja be, ne baleeta mpolampola abatume, kubanga baatya abantu okubakuba amayinja." 
Acts5:27 Bwe baabaleeta, ne babayimiriza mu maaso g'olukiiko. Ssaabakabona" 
Acts5:28 n'abagamba nti: “Twabalagira obutayigirizanga mu linnya lya Yesu. Naye kati mujjuzizza Yerusaalemu okuyigiriza kwammwe, ne mwagala okututeekako omusango gw'okutta omuntu oyo.”" 
Acts5:29 Kyokka Peetero n'abatume abalala ne baddamu nti: “Tuteekwa okuwulira Katonda okusinga okuwulira abantu. 
Acts5:30 Katonda wa bajjajjaffe yazuukiza Yesu gwe mwatta mmwe, bwe mwamukomerera ku musaalaba." 
Acts5:31 Oyo Katonda yamugulumiza, n'amutuuza ng'amuliraanye ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, nga ye Mukulembeze era Omulokozi, alyoke awe abantu ba Yisirayeli okwenenya n'okusonyiyibwa ebibi." 
Acts5:32 Era ffe tukakasa ebyo, ffe ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, Katonda gwe yawa abo abamugondera.”" 
Acts5:33 Bwe baawulira ebyo, ne banyiiga nnyo, ne baagala okubatta." 
Acts5:34 Naye Omufarisaayo erinnya lye Gamaliyeeli, omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka, assibwamu ekitiibwa abantu bonna, n'ayimirira mu lukiiko, n'asaba abatume bafulumizibwe mu lukiiko okumala akaseera." 
Acts5:35 N'agamba banne nti: “Abasajja Abayisirayeli, mwegendereze kye mukola abantu bano." 
Acts5:36 Mu nnaku eziyise, waasitukawo Tewuda ng'agamba nti ye muntu omukulu, era abasajja nga bikumi bina ne bamugoberera. Kyokka bwe yattibwa, abagoberezi be ne basaasaana. Ebibye ne bikoma." 
Acts5:37 Oyo bwe yavaawo, ne wasitukawo Yuda Omugalilaaya, mu biseera eby'okubala abantu. N'afuna abagoberezi bangi. Oyo naye yazikirira era abagoberezi be ne basaasaana." 
Acts5:38 Kale nno kaakano mbagamba nti muve ku bantu bano, mubaleke, kubanga ebyo bye bateekateeka ne bye bakola bwe biba nga bya bantu buntu, bijja kuggwaawo." 
Acts5:39 Naye bwe biba nga bya Katonda, temusobola kubizikiriza. Era muyinza okwejjuukiriza nga mulwanagana na Katonda!” Olukiiko ne lugoberera amagezi ga Gamaliyeeli." 
Acts5:40 Ne bayita abatume, ne babakuba. Ne babalagira obutaddamu kwogeranga mu linnya lya Yesu, ne babata." 
Acts5:41 Awo abatume ne bava mu lukiiko nga basanyuka olw'okusaanira okubonyaabonyezebwa olw'erinnya lya Yesu. 
Acts5:42 Era buli lunaku, mu Ssinzizo ne mu maka, tebaayosanga kuyigiriza na kutegeeza bantu nti Yesu ye Kristo." 
Acts6:1 Awo mu nnaku ezo, abayigirizwa bwe beeyongera obungi, Abayudaaya aboogera Oluyonaani ne beemulugunyiza bannaabwe aboogera Olwebureeyi, kubanga bannamwandu baabwe tebaaweebwanga bulungi bintu ebyagabibwanga buli lunaku." 
Acts6:2 Awo abatume ekkumi n'ababiri ne bayita abayigirizwa bonna, ne babagamba nti: “Tekisaana ffe okuleka okuyigiriza ekigambo kya Katonda, ne tudda mu kugabanya ebintu." 
Acts6:3 Kale abooluganda, mulonde mu mmwe abasajja musanvu be musiima, abajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'amagezi, be tuba tukwasa omulimu ogwo." 
Acts6:4 Naye ffe tujja kwemalira ku kusinza Katonda na kuyigiriza kigambo kye.” 
Acts6:5 Kye baayogera ne kisanyusa ekibiina kyonna. Ne balonda Siteefano omusajja ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, ne Filipo, ne Purokoro, ne Nikanori, ne Timoone, ne Parumena, ne Nikolaawo ow'e Antiyookiya, eyali asomye Ekiyudaaya." 
Acts6:6 Ne babaleeta, ne babateeka mu maaso g'abatume, ne beegayirira Katonda, era ne babateekako emikono gyabwe." 
Acts6:7 Awo ekigambo kya Katonda ne kyeyongera okubuna. Mu Yerusaalemu omuwendo gw'abayigirizwa ne gugenda nga gweyongera, ne bakabona bangi ne bafuuka abagoberezi ba Yesu." 
Acts6:8 Awo Siteefano ng'ajjudde amaanyi n'ekisa Katonda kye yamukwatirwa, n'akola ebyamagero n'ebyewuunyo bingi mu bantu." 
Acts6:9 Kyokka abantu abamu ab'ekkuŋŋaaniro eriyitibwa ery'Abanunule, abaava mu Kireene, ne mu Alekisanderiya, n'abalala abaava mu Kilikiya ne mu Asiya, ne bawakana naye." 
Acts6:10 Kyokka ne batamusobola, olw'amagezi ge yayogeza, nga gamuweebwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Acts6:11 Awo ne bafukuutirira abantu bagambe nti: “Twamuwulira ng'ayogera ebigambo eby'okuvuma Musa ne Katonda.” 
Acts6:12 Mu ngeri eyo ne batabangula abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, n'abannyonnyozi b'amateeka era n'abantu abalala. Ne bajja eri Siteefano, ne bamukwata, ne bamuleeta mu lukiiko." 
Acts6:13 Ne baleeta abajulizi ab'obulimba abaagamba nti: “Omuntu ono bulijjo ayogera ebigambo ebivuma ekifo kino ekitukuvu era n'amateeka ga Musa," 
Acts6:14 kubanga twamuwulira ng'agamba nti Yesu Omunazaareeti ajja kuzikiriza ekifo kino, akyuse n'empisa Musa ze yatuwa.”" 
Acts6:15 Bonna abaali mu lukiiko ne bamutunuulira, ne balaba amaaso ge nga gali ng'aga malayika." 
Acts7:1 Awo Ssaabakabona n'abuuza Siteefano nti: “Ebyo bwe biri bwe bityo?” 
Acts7:2 Siteefano n'agamba nti: “Abasajja abooluganda ne bassebo, muwulire: Katonda oweekitiibwa yalabikira jjajjaffe Aburahamu ng'ali e Mesopotaamiya, nga tannabeera mu Karani," 
Acts7:3 n'amugamba nti: ‘Va mu nsi yammwe ne mu bantu bo, ogende mu nsi gye ndikulaga.’" 
Acts7:4 Awo n'aleka ensi y'Abakaludaaya, n'abeera mu Karani. Kitaawe bwe yamala okufa, Katonda n'aggyayo Aburahamu, n'amuleeta mu nsi eno mwe muli kati." 
Acts7:5 N'atagimuwaamu ttaka, wadde akatundu akaweza ekigere ekimu. Kyokka n'amusuubiza okugimuwa ebe yiye ne bazzukulu be abaliddawo, sso nga yali talina mwana." 
Acts7:6 “Katonda yagamba Aburahamu nti: ‘Ab'ezzadde lyo balibeera mu nsi ey'eggwanga eddala, eriribafuga obuddu. Balibayisa bubi okumala ebbanga lya myaka ebikumi bina." 
Acts7:7 Naye nze ndisala omusango ne gusinga eggwanga eriribafuula abaddu, era oluvannyuma balivaayo ne bansinziza mu kifo kino.’" 
Acts7:8 Awo n'akola endagaano eyakakasibwa n'okukomola. Bw'atyo Aburahamu bwe yazaala Yisaaka, n'amukomola ku lunaku olw'omunaana. Yisaaka n'azaala Yakobo, Yakobo n'azaala bajjajjaffe abakulu ekkumi n'ababiri, era bonna baakomolebwa." 
Acts7:9 “Bajjajjaffe abakulu baakwatirwa Yosefu obuggya, ne bamutunda mu Misiri. Kyokka Katonda yali naye," 
Acts7:10 n'amuwonya mu kubonaabona kwe kwonna, n'amuwa amagezi n'okuganja eri Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri, eyamufuula omufuzi mu Misiri ne mu lubiri lwe lwonna." 
Acts7:11 Awo enjala nnyingi n'egwa mu Misiri yonna ne mu Kanaani, okubonaabona ne kuba kungi. Bajjajjaffe ne balumwa enjala." 
Acts7:12 Kyokka Yakobo bwe yawulira nga mu Misiri eriyo emmere, n'atuma bajjajjaffe omulundi ogwasooka." 
Acts7:13 Ku mulundi ogwokubiri, Yosefu n'amanyibwa baganda be, n'olulyo lwe ne lumanyibwa Faraawo." 
Acts7:14 Awo Yosefu n'atuma, n'ayita baganda be bonna ne kitaawe, Yakobo. Bonna awamu baali abantu nsanvu." 
Acts7:15 Yakobo n'aserengeta e Misiri. Ye ne bajjajjaffe gye baafiira. 
Acts7:16 Emirambo gyabwe ne gitwalibwa e Sekemu ne gigalamizibwa mu ntaana Aburahamu gye yagula ku bazzukulu ba Hamori mu Sekemu. 
Acts7:17 “Naye ekiseera Katonda kye yasuubiza Aburahamu bwe kyali kisembedde, bajjajjaffe ne baala, ne babeera bangi mu Misiri," 
Acts7:18 okutuusa lwe waabaawo kabaka omulala ataamanya Yosefu. 
Acts7:19 Oyo n'asalira eggwanga lyaffe enkwe, n'abonyaabonya nnyo bajjajjaffe, n'abasuuzanga abaana baabwe abawere, bafe." 
Acts7:20 Mu kiseera ekyo Musa n'azaalibwa, nga mwana mulungi nnyo. Ne bamuyonseza emyezi esatu mu nnyumba ya kitaawe." 
Acts7:21 Bwe yasuulibwa, muwala wa Faraawo n'amutwala, n'amukuza ng'omwana we." 
Acts7:22 Musa n'ayigirizibwa amagezi gonna ag'Abamisiri, n'aba wa maanyi mu bigambo bye ne mu bikolwa bye." 
Acts7:23 “Musa bwe yaweza emyaka amakumi ana, n'ajjirwa ekirowoozo eky'okukyalira baganda be Abayisirayeli." 
Acts7:24 Bwe yalaba omu ku bo ng'ayisibwa bubi, n'amulwanirira n'amutaasa, n'atta Omumisiri." 
Acts7:25 Ye yalowooza nti baganda be bategedde nga Katonda agenda kuyita mu ye okubanunula, kyokka bo tebaakitegeera." 
Acts7:26 Olunaku olwaddirira, n'asanga Abayisirayeli babiri nga balwana, n'agezaako okubatabaganya ng'agamba nti: ‘Basajja mmwe, muli baaluganda, lwaki mulwanagana?’" 
Acts7:27 Naye oli eyali akuba munne, n'asindika eri Musa, ng'agamba nti: ‘Ani yakufuula omufuzi era omulamuzi waffe?" 
Acts7:28 Oyagala kunzita nga bwe watta Omumisiri jjo?’ 
Acts7:29 “Musa bwe yawulira ebyo n'adduka, n'awaŋŋangukira mu nsi y'e Midiyaani, n'azaalirayo abaana ab'obulenzi babiri." 
Acts7:30 Bwe waayitawo emyaka amakumi ana, malayika wa Mukama n'alabikira Musa mu nnimi ez'omuliro ogwali gwakira mu kisaka mu ddungu, okumpi n'olusozi Sinaayi." 
Acts7:31 Musa bwe yakiraba, ne yeewuunya ky'alabye. Bwe yali ng'asembera okwetegereza, eddoboozi lya Mukama ne limugamba nti:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Nze Katonda wa bajjajjaabo, Katonda wa Aburahamu, era owa Yisaaka, era owa Yakobo.’ Musa n'akankana, n'atya okutunuulira nate." 
Acts7:33 Mukama n'amugamba nti: ‘Ggyamu engatto mu bigere byo, kubanga ekifo ky'oyimiriddemu kitukuvu." 
Acts7:34 Ntunudde ne ndaba abantu bange abali mu Misiri bwe babonyaabonyezebwa, mpulidde okusinda kwabwe, ne nzika okubawonya. Kale jjangu nkutume e Misiri.’" 
Acts7:35 “Musa oyo gwe baagaana nga bagamba nti: ‘Ani yakufuula omufuzi era omulamuzi waffe?’ Katonda gwe yatuma ng'ayita mu malayika eyamulabikira mu kisaka, abe omufuzi era omununuzi." 
Acts7:36 Ye yabakulembera ng'akola ebyamagero n'ebyewuunyo mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne mu nnyanja emmyufu ne mu ddungu, emyaka amakumi ana." 
Acts7:37 Era Musa oyo ye yagamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Katonda alibatumira omulanzi aliva mu baganda bammwe, nga bwe yabatumira nze.’" 
Acts7:38 Musa ye wuuyo eyaliwo Abayisirayeli bonna bwe baakuŋŋaanira mu ddungu. Yali ne malayika eyayogera naye ku Lusozi Sinaayi, era eyali ne bajjajjaffe. Ye wuuyo eyaweebwa ebigambo by'obulamu okubituwa." 
Acts7:39 “Bajjajjaffe baagaana okumuwulira ne bamwesammulako, emitima gyabwe ne giddayo e Misiri." 
Acts7:40 Ne bagamba Arooni nti: ‘Tukolere balubaale abanaatukulembera, kubanga Musa oyo eyatuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri tetumanyi ky'abadde.’" 
Acts7:41 Awo ne bakola ekifaananyi ky'ennyana, ne bawaayo ebitambiro eri ekifaananyi ekyo, ne basanyukira ekintu ekyo kye beekoledde." 
Acts7:42 Kyokka Katonda n'abavaako, n'abawaayo okusinzanga emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu, nga bwe kisangibwa mu byawandiikibwa abalanzi nti: ‘Mmwe Abayisirayeli, ensolo ezattibwanga era n'ebitambiro mwabiwanga nze mu myaka amakumi ana gye mwamala mu ddungu?" 
Acts7:43 Nedda, mwasitula weema ya lubaale Moleki, n'emmunyeenye ya lubaale Refani. Ebyo bye bifaananyi bye mwakola, mulyoke mubisinze. N'olwekyo ndibawaŋŋangusiza emitala wa Babilooni.’" 
Acts7:44 “Bajjajjaffe bwe baali mu ddungu, baalina eweema eraga nti Katonda ali nabo. Eweema eyo yakolebwa nga Katonda bwe yagamba Musa okugikola, n'agikola mu ngeri Katonda gye yagimulagamu." 
Acts7:45 Bajjajjaffe nabo ne bagifuna, ne bajja nayo. Bwe baayingira mu nsi muno nga bali ne Yoswa, ne beefuga ensi y'ab'amawanga amalala, Katonda be yagobamu nga bajjajjaffe balaba. Eweema eyo yabeera mu nsi muno okutuusiza ddala mu biseera bya Dawudi" 
Acts7:46 eyasiimibwa Katonda, era eyasaba azimbire Katonda wa Yakobo ennyumba." 
Acts7:47 Wabula Solomooni ye yagimuzimbira. 
Acts7:48 Kyokka Katonda Atenkanika tasula mu nnyumba zizimbibwa bantu, ng'omulanzi bw'agamba nti Mukama Katonda agamba nti:" 
Acts7:49 ‘Eggulu y'entebe yange, n'ensi kwe nzisa ebigere byange. Mulinzimbira nnyumba ki? Oba kifo ki mwe ndiwummulira?" 
Acts7:50 Si nze nakola ebyo byonna?’ 
Acts7:51 “Mmwe abajeemu, ab'emitima emikakanyavu, era abagaana okuwulira ebigambo bya Katonda! Muli nga bajjajjammwe, kubanga bulijjo mulwanyisa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu!" 
Acts7:52 Mulanzi ki bajjajjammwe gwe bataayigganya? Batta ababaka ba Katonda abaalanga okujja kw'Omutuukirivu, mmwe gwe mwalyamu olukwe ne mumutta." 
Acts7:53 Mmwe abaafuna amateeka nga bwe gaalangirirwa bamalayika, mwagaana okugakwata.”" 
Acts7:54 Bwe baawulira ebyo, ne bajjula obusungu, ne bamulumira obujiji." 
Acts7:55 Naye Siteefano ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'atunuulira eggulu, n'alaba ekitiibwa kya Katonda, ne Yesu ng'ayimiridde okuliraana Katonda ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo." 
Acts7:56 Siteefano n'agamba nti: “Laba, ndaba eggulu nga libikkuse, n'Omwana w'Omuntu ng'ayimiridde okuliraana Katonda ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo.”" 
Acts7:57 Naye bo ne baleekaana n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, nga baggadde amatu gaabwe, ne bamufubutukira bonna wamu." 
Acts7:58 Ne bamufulumya ebweru w'ekibuga, ne bamukuba amayinja. Abo abaamukuba amayinja, engoye zaabwe ne baziteresa omuvubuka erinnya lye Sawulo, azikuume." 
Acts7:59 Bwe baali bamukuba, ye n'akoowoola ng'agamba nti: “Mukama wange Yesu, twala omwoyo gwange.”" 
Acts7:60 N'afukamira, n'akoowola n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Ayi Mukama, basonyiwe ekibi kino.” Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo n'afa." 
Acts8:1 Ne Sawulo yasiima okuttibwa kwe. Ku lunaku olwo ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ekyali e Yerusaalemu ne kitandika okuyigganyizibwa ennyo. Bonna okuggyako abatume, ne basaasaanira mu kitundu ky'e Buyudaaya ne Samariya." 
Acts8:2 Abasajja abajjumbizi b'eddiini ne baziika Siteefano, era ne bamukungubagira nnyo." 
Acts8:3 Kyokka Sawulo n'agezaako okuzikiriza ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ng'ayingira mu buli nnyumba, n'akwata abasajja n'abakazi, n'abateeka mu kkomera." 
Acts8:4 Awo abo abaasaasaana, ne bagenda nga bategeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda." 
Acts8:5 Filipo n'aserengeta mu kibuga eky'e Samariya, n'ategeeza abantu baayo ku Kristo." 
Acts8:6 Abantu bwe baawulira Filipo by'ayogera, ne balaba n'ebyewuunyo by'akola, bonna ne bassa nnyo omwoyo ku ebyo by'ayigiriza." 
Acts8:7 Emyoyo emibi gyavanga ku bantu nga gikaaba n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka. Era bangi abakoozimbye n'abalema, ne bawonyezebwa." 
Acts8:8 Ne wabaawo essanyu lingi mu kibuga ekyo. 
Acts8:9 Naye waaliwo omusajja erinnya lye Simooni, eyakolanga eby'obulogo mu kibuga ekyo, n'asamaaliriza Abasamariya. Yagambanga nti ye, muntu wa kitalo." 
Acts8:10 Bonna okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu baamuwuliranga, ne bagamba nti: “Omuntu ono ge maanyi ga Katonda agayitibwa ‘Amangi.’ ”" 
Acts8:11 Baamuwuliranga, kubanga okumala ebbanga ddene, yabeewuunyisanga n'eby'obulogo bye." 
Acts8:12 Kyokka Filipo bwe yategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi agafa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda ne ku linnya lya Yesu Kristo, abasajja n'abakazi ne bakkiriza, ne babatizibwa." 
Acts8:13 Ne Simooni yennyini n'akkiriza. Era bwe yamala okubatizibwa, n'abeera wamu ne Filipo. Bwe yalaba ebyamagero ebisuffu Filipo bye yakola, n'awuniikirira." 
Acts8:14 Awo abatume abaali mu Yerusaalemu bwe baawulira nga mu Samariya abaayo bakkirizza ekigambo kya Katonda, ne babatumira Peetero ne Yowanne." 
Acts8:15 Bano bwe baatuukayo, ne basabira abakkiriza bafune Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Acts8:16 kubanga mu bo temwali wadde omu eyali amufunye. Baali babatiziddwa bubatizibwa mu linnya lya Mukama Yesu. 
Acts8:17 Awo Peetero ne Yowanne bwe baabassaako emikono, ne bafuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Acts8:18 Naye Simooni bwe yalaba ng'abatume bassa emikono ku bantu, abantu abo ne bafuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'aleetera abatume ensimbi," 
Acts8:19 n'agamba nti: “Nange mumpe obuyinza obwo, buli gwe nnassangako emikono, afune Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.”" 
Acts8:20 Kyokka Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Ensimbi zo zizikirire wamu naawe, kubanga olowoozezza okufuna ekirabo kya Katonda ng'okiguza ensimbi!" 
Acts8:21 Ekyo tokirinaamu mugabo, era toli wa kukigabanako, kubanga omutima gwo si mulongoofu mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Acts8:22 Kale weenenye ekibi kyo, weegayirire Katonda, akyayinza okukusonyiwa ekirowoozo ekyo ekiri mu mutima gwo," 
Acts8:23 kubanga ndaba ng'ojjudde obuggya, era ng'oli mu nvuba ya kibi.”" 
Acts8:24 Simooni n'addamu Peetero nti: “Munsabire eri Mukama, ebigambo ebyo bye mwogedde waleme kubaawo na kimu ekintuukako.”" 
Acts8:25 Awo Peetero ne Yowanne bwe baamala okwogera ekigambo kya Katonda n'okukinyweza mu bantu, ne baddayo e Yerusaalemu, nga bagenda bategeeza abantu ab'omu byalo by'e Samariya Amawulire Amalungi." 
Acts8:26 Awo malayika wa Mukama n'agamba Filipo nti: “Golokoka ogende mu bukiikaddyo, okwate ekkubo eriyita mu ddungu, era eriva e Yerusaalemu okulaga e Gaaza.”" 
Acts8:27 N'agolokoka n'agenda. Mu kiseera ekyo, waaliwo omusajja Omwetiyopiya, omulaawe, omukungu wa kabaka omukazi Kandake owa Etiyopiya, era omuwanika we omukulu. Yali azze e Yerusaalemu okusinza Katonda." 
Acts8:28 Bwe yali ng'addayo, ng'atudde mu ggaali ye, era ng'asoma ekitabo ky'omulanzi Yisaaya," 
Acts8:29 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'agamba Filipo nti: “Genda otuuke ku gaali eyo.” 
Acts8:30 Awo Filipo bwe yadduka n'agituukako, n'amuwulira ng'asoma ekitabo ky'omulanzi Yisaaya, n'amubuuza nti: “By'osoma obitegeera?”" 
Acts8:31 Ye n'amuddamu nti: “Nnyinza ntya okubitegeera nga tewali abinnyinyonnyola?” Awo n'ayita Filipo alinnye, atuule wamu naye." 
Acts8:32 Ekitundu ky'ebyawandiikibwa kye yali asoma kigamba nti: “Yali ng'endiga etwalibwa okuttibwa; yali ng'omwana gw'endiga ogutakaaba nga bagusalako ebyoya; teyayogera kigambo na kimu. 
Acts8:33 Yafeebezebwa, n'omusango gwe ne gusalirizibwa. Tewali alinnyonnyola lulyo lwe, kubanga obulamu bwe buggyiddwa mu nsi.”" 
Acts8:34 Omulaawe n'agamba Filipo nti: “Mbuulira, Omulanzi ayogera ku ani? Yeeyogerako yennyini oba ayogera ku mulala?”" 
Acts8:35 Filipo n'atandikira ku kyawandiikibwa ekyo, n'amutegeeza Amawulire Amalungi aga Yesu." 
Acts8:36 Bwe beeyongera mu maaso, ne batuuka awali amazzi, omulaawe n'agamba Filipo nti: “Laba amazzi gaagano! Ekiŋŋaana okubatizibwa kiki? [" 
Acts8:37 Filipo n'agamba nti: ‘Oba ng'okkiriza n'omutima gwo gwonna, oyinza okubatizibwa.’ Ye n'addamu nti: ‘Nzikiriza nga Yesu Kristo ye Mwana wa Katonda.’ ”]" 
Acts8:38 Awo n'alagira eggaali okuyimirira. Bombi, Filipo n'omulaawe, ne bakka mu mazzi, Filipo n'amubatiza." 
Acts8:39 Bwe baava mu mazzi, Mwoyo wa Mukama n'atwala Filipo, omulaawe n'ataddayo kumulaba, kyokka n'akwata ekkubo lye ng'ajjudde essanyu." 
Acts8:40 Awo Filipo n'atuuka mu Azooto, n'ayitaayita mu bibuga byonna okutuuka e Kayisaariya, ng'agenda ategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi." 
Acts9:1 Sawulo bwe yali ng'akyewerera okutta abayigirizwa ba Mukama, n'agenda eri Ssaabakabona," 
Acts9:2 n'amusaba ebbaluwa emuwa obuyinza okugenda mu makuŋŋaaniro ag'e Damasiko, akwate abasajja n'abakazi abatambulira mu Kkubo lya Mukama, abaleete e Yerusaalemu basibibwe." 
Acts9:3 Awo bwe yali ng'anaatera okutuuka e Damasiko, amangwago okwakaayakana okwava mu ggulu ne kumwetooloola." 
Acts9:4 N'agwa wansi, n'awulira eddoboozi nga limugamba nti: “Sawulo, Sawulo, onjigganyiza ki?”" 
Acts9:5 N'agamba nti: “Ggwe ani Mukama wange?” N'addamu nti: “Nze Yesu gw'oyigganya. 
Acts9:6 Naye golokoka, oyingire mu kibuga. Eyo gy'onootegeerezebwa ky'onookola.”" 
Acts9:7 Abasajja abaali batambula ne Sawulo ne bayimirira nga basamaaliridde, kubanga baawulira eddoboozi, naye nga tebalaba muntu." 
Acts9:8 Sawulo n'agolokoka. Bwe yazibula amaaso ge, n'atasobola kulaba. Ne bamukwata ku mukono, ne bamuyingiza mu Damasiko." 
Acts9:9 N'amalira ddala ennaku ssatu nga talaba, era nga talya wadde okunywa." 
Acts9:10 Waaliwo omuyigirizwa mu Damasiko, erinnya lye Ananiya. Mukama n'amulabikira n'amugamba nti. “Ananiya!” N'addamu nti: “Nzuuno Mukama wange.”" 
Acts9:11 Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Golokoka okwate ekkubo eriyitibwa Eggolokofu, obuuze mu nnyumba ya Yuda, omuntu ow'e Taruso, erinnya lye Sawulo. Mu kiseera kino asinza Katonda," 
Acts9:12 era alabikiddwa omuntu, erinnya lye Ananiya, ng'ayingira era ng'amussaako emikono addemu okulaba.”" 
Acts9:13 Ananiya n'amuddamu nti: “Mukama wange, mpulidde bangi nga boogera ku musajja oyo, nga bw'abonyaabonyezza abantu bo abali mu Yerusaalemu." 
Acts9:14 Era ne wano alina obuyinza obumuweereddwa bakabona abakulu, asibe abo bonna abakoowoola erinnya lyo.”" 
Acts9:15 Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Genda, kubanga oyo nze mwerondedde ammanyise mu b'amawanga amalala, ne mu bakabaka, ne mu bantu ba Yisirayeli." 
Acts9:16 Era ndimulaga nga bw'ateekwa okubonaabona ennyo ku lwange.” 
Acts9:17 Awo Ananiya n'agenda, n'ayingira mu nnyumba, n'amussaako emikono, n'amugamba nti: “Owooluganda Sawulo, Mukama Yesu yennyini eyakulabikira bwe wali mu kkubo ng'ojja, antumye oddemu okulaba, era ojjuzibwe Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.”" 
Acts9:18 Amangwago, ku maaso ge ne kuvaako ebintu ebiri ng'amagamba g'ebyennyanja, n'asobola okuddamu okulaba. N'agolokoka n'abatizibwa." 
Acts9:19 Bwe yamala okulya emmere, n'addamu amaanyi. Awo Sawulo n'amala ennaku ntonotono ng'ali n'abayigirizwa mu Damasiko." 
Acts9:20 Teyalwa, n'ayingira mu makuŋŋaaniro, ng'agenda ategeeza abantu nti Yesu ye Mwana wa Katonda." 
Acts9:21 Bonna abaamuwulira ne bawuniikirira, ne bagamba nti: “Ono si ye wuuyo eyayigganyanga ab'omu Yerusaalemu abakowoola erinnya eryo? Era si kye kyamuleeta ne wano abasibe, abatwale eri bakabona abakulu?”" 
Acts9:22 Kyokka Sawulo ne yeeyongera okuba n'amaanyi mu kuyigiriza kwe, n'asirisa Abayudaaya abaali mu Damasiko, ng'akakasa nti Yesu ye Kristo." 
Acts9:23 Ennaku nnyingi bwe zaayitawo, Abayudaaya ne bateesa okutta Sawulo." 
Acts9:24 Kyokka Sawulo n'ategeera olukwe lwabwe. Baamukuumanga ku nzigi emisana n'ekiro bamutte. 
Acts9:25 Naye ekiro abayigirizwa be ne bamutwala ne bamussiza ku kisenge nga bamutadde mu kisero. 
Acts9:26 Sawulo bwe yatuuka mu Yerusaalemu, n'agezaako okwetaba n'abayigirizwa, kyokka bo ne bamutya, kubanga tebakkiriza nti naye muyigirizwa." 
Acts9:27 Kyokka Barunaba n'amutwala n'amwanjula eri abatume, n'abategeeza nga Sawulo bwe yali mu kkubo n'alaba Mukama, era nga Mukama bwe yayogera naye. Era n'abategeeza nga Sawulo bwe yali mu Damasiko n'ayogera n'obuvumu mu linnya lya Yesu." 
Acts9:28 Sawulo n'abeera nabo mu Yerusaalemu nga yeetaaya, ng'agenda ayogera n'obuvumu mu linnya lya Mukama." 
Acts9:29 N'ayogera era n'awaanyisaganyanga ebirowoozo n'Abayudaaya aboogera Oluyonaani, naye bo ne bagezaako okumutta." 
Acts9:30 Abooluganda bwe baakimanya, ne bamutwala e Kayisaariya, ne bamuweereza e Taruso." 
Acts9:31 Awo ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Buyudaaya bwonna ne Galilaaya ne Samariya ne kiba mirembe, era ne kinywezebwa, ne kyeyongera obunene, nga kissaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, nga ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu akijjuza essanyu." 
Acts9:32 Awo Peetero n'atambula wonna wonna, n'atuuka eri abakkiriza ab'e Lida." 
Acts9:33 N'asangayo omuntu erinnya lye Ayineeya, eyali akoozimbye, nga tava ku kitanda okumala emyaka munaana." 
Acts9:34 Peetero n'amugamba nti: “Ayineeya, Yesu Kristo akuwonya. Situka weeyalire.” Awo Ayineeya n'asituka." 
Acts9:35 Abantu bonna abaali mu Lida ne mu Saroni ne bamulaba, ne bakkiriza Mukama." 
Acts9:36 Mu Yoppa mwalimu omukazi erinnya lye Tabbiita, mu Luyonaani Doruka, ekitegeeza engabi. Tabbiita oyo yakolanga ebikolwa ebirungi bulijjo, era ng'agabira abaavu." 
Acts9:37 Mu nnaku ezo n'alwala n'afa. Omulambo gwe ne bagunaaza ne baguteeka mu kisenge ekya waggulu. 
Acts9:38 Yoppa kyali kumpi ne Lida. Awo abayigirizwa abaali e Yoppa bwe baawulira nti Peetero ali mu Lida, ne bamutumira abasajja babiri, ne bamugamba nti: “Tukwegayiridde, jjangu mangu gye tuli.”" 
Acts9:39 Awo Peetero n'asitula, n'agenda nabo. Bwe yatuukayo n'atwalibwa mu kisenge ekya waggulu. Bannamwandu bonna ne bamwetooloola nga bakaaba era nga bamulaga amakooti n'engoye endala Doruka bye yakola ng'akyali mulamu." 
Acts9:40 Peetero n'abafulumya ebweru bonna, n'afukamira ne yeegayirira Katonda. N'akyukira omulambo, n'agamba nti: “Tabbiita, golokoka.” Awo Tabbiita n'azibula amaaso ge. Bwe yalaba Peetero, n'atuula." 
Acts9:41 Peetero n'amukwata ku mukono, n'amuyimusa. Awo n'ayita bannamwandu n'abakkiriza abalala, n'amubalaga nga mulamu." 
Acts9:42 Ne kimanyibwa mu Yoppa yenna. Bangi ne bakkiriza Mukama. 
Acts9:43 Peetero n'amala ennaku nnyingi mu Yoppa ewa Simooni, omuwazi w'amaliba." 
Acts10:1 Mu Kayisaariya mwalimu omusajja erinnya lye Koruneeliyo, eyali omuduumizi w'ekibinja ky'eggye ly'Abarooma, ekyali kiyitibwa eky'Abayitale," 
Acts10:2 Yali mujjumbizi wa ddiini, ye n'abantu be bonna, nga bassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa. Abayudaaya yabagabiranga ku bintu bye, era yasinzanga Katonda bulijjo." 
Acts10:3 Lumu ku ssaawa nga mwenda ez'emisana n'alabikirwa, n'alabira ddala bulungi malayika wa Mukama ng'ajja gy'ali, era ng'amuyita nti: “Koruneeliyo!”" 
Acts10:4 Koruneeliyo n'amusimba amaaso ng'atya, n'amugamba nti: “Kiki Mukama wange?” Malayika n'amuddamu nti: “Katonda asanyukidde okwegayirira kwo n'okugaba kwo, era akusiimye ggwe." 
Acts10:5 Kale kaakano tuma abasajja e Yoppa, baleete omuntu ayitibwa Simooni Peetero," 
Acts10:6 asula ewa Simooni omuwazi w'amaliba, nnannyini nnyumba eri okumpi n'ennyanja.”" 
Acts10:7 Malayika wa Mukama eyamugamba ebyo bwe yagenda, Koruneeliyo n'ayita babiri ku baweereza be, n'omuserikale omu assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, era nga ye omu ku abo abaamukuumanga." 
Acts10:8 Bwe yamala okubategeeza byonna ebibaddewo, n'abatuma e Yoppa." 
Acts10:9 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, bwe baali nga bakyali mu kkubo, nga banaatera okutuuka e Yoppa, Peetero n'alinnya waggulu ku nnyumba, ku ssaawa nga mukaaga ez'omu ttuntu, okusinza Katonda." 
Acts10:10 Enjala n'emuluma n'ayagala okubaako ky'alya. Baali bakyakitegeka, n'aba ng'avudde ku nsi, n'alabikirwa." 
Acts10:11 N'alaba eggulu nga libikkuse, era ekintu ne kissibwa wansi nga kifaanana ng'essuuka ennene, ng'ekwatiddwa ku nsonda zaayo ennya." 
Acts10:12 Mu yo nga mulimu buli ngeri yonna ey'ensolo, n'ey'ebyewalula, n'ey'ebinyonyi." 
Acts10:13 Ne wabaawo eddoboozi erimugamba nti: “Peetero, golokoka otte, olye.”" 
Acts10:14 Peetero n'addamu nti: “Nedda, Mukama wange, sisobola, kubanga siryanga kintu kya muzizo, wadde ekitali kirongoofu.”" 
Acts10:15 Eddoboozi ne limugamba nate nti: “Katonda kye yalongoosa, tokiyitanga kya muzizo.”" 
Acts10:16 Ekyo kyaddibwamu emirundi esatu, amangwago ekintu ekyo ne kizzibwayo mu ggulu." 
Acts10:17 Awo mu kiseera ekyo, Peetero bwe yali ng'akyasobeddwa, nga yeewuunya ky'alabye, abasajja abaatumibwa Koruneeliyo, bwe baamala okubuuza ennyumba ya Simooni gy'eri, ne batuuka, ne bayimirira ku mulyango." 
Acts10:18 Ne babuuza nti: “Wano we wali omugenyi ayitibwa Simooni Peetero?” 
Acts10:19 Awo Peetero bwe yali ng'akyalowooza ku ekyo ky'alabye, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'amugamba nti: “Laba abasajja basatu bakunoonya." 
Acts10:20 Situka okke, ogende nabo nga tobuusabuusa, kubanga nze mbatumye.”" 
Acts10:21 Awo Peetero n'agenda eri abasajja, n'abagamba nti: “Nze nzuuno gwe munoonya. Nsonga ki ebaleese?”" 
Acts10:22 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Koruneeliyo, omukulu w'ekibinja ky'abaserikale, omusajja omwegendereza assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, era asiimibwa eggwanga lyonna ery'Abayudaaya, malayika omutuukirivu yamugamba akuyite, ogende ewuwe, awulire by'ogamba.”" 
Acts10:23 Awo n'abayingiza n'abasuza. Bwe bwakya enkya, Peetero n'asitula n'agenda nabo. N'abamu ku booluganda abaali e Yoppa ne bamuwerekerako." 
Acts10:24 Olunaku olwaddirira ne batuuka e Kayisaariya. Koruneeliyo yali abalindiridde, era ng'akuŋŋaanyizza baganda be ne mikwano gye ennyo." 
Acts10:25 Awo Peetero bwe yali anaatera okuyingira, Koruneeliyo n'amusisinkana, n'afukamira kumpi n'ebigere bye, n'amusinza." 
Acts10:26 Kyokka Peetero n'amuyimusa nga bw'agamba nti: “Situka, nange ndi muntu buntu.”" 
Acts10:27 Peetero n'ayingira ng'agenda anyumya naye. N'asanga abantu bangi nga bakuŋŋaanye. 
Acts10:28 N'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mwennyini mumanyi bulungi nga bwe kiri eky'omuzizo, Omuyudaaya okutabagana n'ow'eggwanga eddala, wadde okumukyalira. Kyokka Katonda andaze nga sisaana kuyita muntu n'omu nti si mulongoofu, oba nti mubi." 
Acts10:29 Kale bwe nayitibwa, kyennava nzikiriza okujja. Kati mbabuuza, nsonga ki gye mumpitidde?”" 
Acts10:30 Koruneeliyo n'addamu nti: “Ennaku bbiri eziyise, mu kiseera nga kino, ku ssaawa mwenda ez'olweggulo, nali mu nnyumba yange nga nsinza Katonda. Mu kiseera ekyo ne ndaba omuntu ayambadde engoye ezimasamasa, ng'ayimiridde mu maaso gange." 
Acts10:31 N'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Koruneeliyo, Katonda awulidde okwegayirira kwo, era asiimye okugaba kwo." 
Acts10:32 Kale tuma e Yoppa, oyite omuntu ayitibwa Simooni Peetero, asula mu nnyumba ya Simooni omuwazi w'amaliba aliraanye ku nnyanja.’" 
Acts10:33 Amangwago nze kwe kukutumira, era okoze bulungi okujja. Kale kaakano tukuŋŋaanye wano mu maaso ga Katonda, okuwulira byonna Mukama by'akulagidde.”" 
Acts10:34 Awo Peetero n'atandika okwogera, n'agamba nti: “Kaakano ntegeeredde ddala nga Katonda tasosola mu bantu," 
Acts10:35 era nga mu buli ggwanga ayaniriza buli muntu amussaamu ekitiibwa, n'akola eby'obutuukirivu." 
Acts10:36 “Katonda yawa Abayisirayeli ekigambo kye, ng'abategeeza Amawulire Amalungi agaleeta emirembe, ng'ayita mu Yesu Kristo, Mukama wa byonna." 
Acts10:37 Mumanyi ebyabaawo mu Buyudaaya bwonna, ebyatandikira e Galilaaya, nga Yowanne amaze okutegeeza abantu babatizibwe." 
Acts10:38 Katonda yajjuza Yesu Omunazaareeti Mwoyo Mutuukirivu era n'amaanyi. Yesu oyo, olw'okuba nga Katonda yali naye, yatambulanga wonna, ng'agenda akola ebirungi, era ng'awonya bonna abaajoogebwanga Sitaani." 
Acts10:39 Era ffe tukakasa ebyo byonna bye yakola mu nsi y'Abayudaaya ne mu Yerusaalemu. Baamukomerera ku musaalaba, ne bamutta." 
Acts10:40 Kyokka Katonda n'amuzuukiza ku lunaku olwokusatu, era n'amusobozesa okulabibwa," 
Acts10:41 si mu bantu bonna, wabula mu ffe, Katonda be yali amaze okulonda okukikakasa. Ye ffe abaalya naye era ne tunywa naye ng'amaze okuzuukira." 
Acts10:42 “Yatulagira okutegeeza abantu be, era n'okubakakasa nti ye wuuyo, Katonda gwe yateekawo, okuba omulamuzi w'abalamu n'abafu." 
Acts10:43 Abalanzi bonna gwe boogerako, nga bagamba nti: ‘Buli amukkiriza, asonyiyibwa ebibi bye olw'obuyinza bw'erinnya lye.’ ”" 
Acts10:44 Awo Peetero yali akyayogera ebyo, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'akka ku bonna abaali bamuwuliriza." 
Acts10:45 Abayudaaya abakkiriza, abajja ne Peetero okuva e Yoppa, ne basamaalirira, bwe baalaba nga n'ab'amawanga amalala Katonda abawadde ekirabo ekya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Acts10:46 kubanga baabawulira nga boogera ennimi, era nga batendereza Katonda. Peetero n'agamba nti:" 
Acts10:47 “Abantu bano bafunye Mwoyo Mutuukirivu nga ffe bwe twamufuna. Kale waliwo ayinza okubagaana okubatizibwa n'amazzi?” 
Acts10:48 Awo n'alagira babatizibwe mu linnya lya Yesu Kristo. Oluvannyuma ne bamusaba agira abeera nabo ennaku ntonotono. 
Acts11:1 Awo abatume n'abooluganda abaali mu Buyudaaya, ne bawulira nga n'ab'amawanga amalala bakkirizza ekigambo kya Katonda." 
Acts11:2 Peetero bwe yayambuka e Yerusaalemu, abo abaali baagala ab'amawanga amalala bakomolebwe, ne bamunenya nga bagamba nti:" 
Acts11:3 “Wakyalira ab'amawanga amalala abatali bakomole, n'okulya n'olya nabo!”" 
Acts11:4 Awo Peetero n'abannyonnyola byonna ebyabaawo nga bwe byaddiriŋŋana, n'agamba nti:" 
Acts11:5 “Nali mu kibuga Yoppa nga nsinza Katonda, ne mba ng'avudde ku nsi, ne ndabikirwa ekintu ekiri ng'essuuka ennene, ng'ekwatiddwa ku nsonda zaayo ennya, nga kikka okuva mu ggulu, ne kijja gye ndi." 
Acts11:6 Bwe nakyetegereza, ne ndabamu ensolo enfuge n'ez'omu nsiko, n'ebyewalula, n'ebinyonyi." 
Acts11:7 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eriŋŋamba nti: ‘Peetero, situka otte, olye.’" 
Acts11:8 Ne nziramu nti: ‘Nedda, Mukama wange! Siryanga kintu kitali kirongoofu, wadde eky'omuzizo.’" 
Acts11:9 “Eddoboozi ne liddamu nate nga liva mu ggulu nti: ‘Katonda kye yalongoosa, tokiyitanga kya muzizo.’" 
Acts11:10 Ekyo kyabaawo emirundi esatu, oluvannyuma ne kizzibwayo kyonna mu ggulu." 
Acts11:11 Mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini, abasajja basatu abaava e Kayisaariya, abaatumibwa gye ndi, ne batuuka mu nnyumba mwe twali." 
Acts11:12 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Genda nabo nga tobuusabuusa.’ Abooluganda bano omukaaga, nabo baagenda nange e Kayisaariya, era twayingira ffenna mu nnyumba ya Koruneeliyo." 
Acts11:13 Koruneeliyo oyo n'atubuulira nga bwe yalaba malayika ng'ayimiridde mu nnyumba ye, era ng'amugamba nti: ‘Tuma e Yoppa, oyite Simooni Peetero," 
Acts11:14 akutegeeze ebigambo ebinaakulokola ggwe, n'ab'ennyumba yo bonna.’" 
Acts11:15 “Awo bwe natandika okwogera, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'abakkako nga bwe yakka ku ffe ku ntandikwa." 
Acts11:16 Awo ne njijukira Mukama kye yagamba nti: ‘Yowanne yabatiza na mazzi, naye mmwe mulibatizibwa na Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.’" 
Acts11:17 Kale oba nga Katonda yawa ab'amawanga amalala abo ekirabo ekyo, nga bwe yakiwa ffe bwe twakkiriza Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, nze ani eyandisobodde okuziyiza Katonda?”" 
Acts11:18 Bwe baawulira ebyo, ne bakkakkana, ne batendereza Katonda nga bagamba nti: “Ddala n'ab'amawanga amalala Katonda abawadde okwenenya bafune obulamu.”" 
Acts11:19 Abakkiriza bwe baasaasaana mu kuyigganyizibwa okwaliwo Siteefano mwe yattirwa, ne batambula, ne batuuka mu Foyinikiya, ne mu Kipuro ne mu Antiyookiya, nga tebayigiriza muntu mulala, wabula Abayudaaya bokka." 
Acts11:20 Kyokka waaliwo abamu ku bo, ab'e Kipuro ne Kireene, bwe baali nga bagenda mu Antiyookiya, ne bayigiriza n'abatali Bayudaaya, ne babategeeza Amawulire Amalungi aga Mukama Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Amaanyi ga Mukama gaali nabo, era abantu bangi ne bakkiriza, ne badda eri Mukama." 
Acts11:22 Ebyo bwe byawulirwa abakkiriza Kristo ab'omu Yerusaalemu, bo ne batuma Barunaba mu Antiyookiya." 
Acts11:23 Bwe yatuukayo, n'alaba nga Katonda bw'akwatiddwa abantu abo ekisa, n'asanyuka. N'abakubiriza bonna bamalirire mu mitima gyabwe okunywerera ku Mukama." 
Acts11:24 Barunaba oyo, yali muntu mulungi, ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'okukkiriza. Abantu bangi ne bakkiriza, ne basenga Mukama." 
Acts11:25 Oluvannyuma Barunaba n'agenda e Taruso okunoonya Sawulo. 
Acts11:26 Bwe yamulaba, n'amuleeta mu Antiyookiya. Ne bamala omwaka mulamba nga bali n'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo. Ne bayigiriza abantu bangi nnyo. Mu Antiyookiya abayigirizwa mwe baasookera okuyitibwa Abakristo." 
Acts11:27 Mu kiseera ekyo, abalanzi abamu ne bava e Yerusaalemu, ne baserengeta mu Antiyookiya." 
Acts11:28 Omu ku bo, erinnya lye Agabo, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'amwogeza, n'alanga nti: “Wajja kubaawo enjala mu nsi yonna.” Enjala eyo yabaawo mu bufuzi bwa Kulawudiyo." 
Acts11:29 Abayigirizwa ne basalawo, buli omu aweeyo nga bw'asobola, baweereze obuyambi eri abooluganda abali mu Buyudaaya." 
Acts11:30 Ekyo ne bakikola, ne batuma Barunaba ne Sawulo batwale obuyambi obwo, babukwase abakulembeze b'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo." 
Acts12:1 Mu kiseera ekyo, kabaka Herode n'atandika okuyigganya abamu ku b'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo." 
Acts12:2 N'atta n'ekitala Yakobo muganda wa Yowanne. 
Acts12:3 Bwe yalaba ng'Abayudaaya bakisiimye, ne yeeyongera n'akwata ne Peetero. Ekyo kyabaawo mu biseera by'Embaga Eriirwako Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiddwa." 
Acts12:4 Bwe yamala okumukwata n'amuteeka mu kkomera, n'amukwasa abaserikale kkumi na mukaaga, bamukuume bana bana, ng'ayagala okumuleeta mu maaso g'abantu, ng'Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako ewedde." 
Acts12:5 Bw'atyo Peetero n'akuumirwa mu kkomera. Ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ne kinyiikira okumusabira eri Katonda. 
Acts12:6 Mu kiro ekyakeesa olunaku Herode lwe yali ateeseteese okutwalirako Peetero eri ekibiina ky'abantu, Peetero yali yeebase wakati w'abaserikale babiri, ng'asibiddwa n'enjegere bbiri, era nga n'abakuumi bali ku luggi bakuuma ekkomera," 
Acts12:7 malayika wa Mukama n'ayimirira w'ali, ekitangaala ne kibuna akasenge konna. Malayika n'akuba ku Peetero mu mbiriizi, n'amuzuukusa ng'agamba nti: “Golokoka mangu!” Awo enjegere ne ziva ku mikono gya Peetero ne zigwa." 
Acts12:8 Malayika n'amugamba nti: “Weesibe olukoba lwo era oyambale engatto zo.” N'akola bw'atyo. Era n'amugamba nti: “Suulira omunagiro gwo, ongoberere.”" 
Acts12:9 Peetero n'afuluma, n'agoberera malayika. Kyokka n'atamanya nti malayika by'akola by'ebyo ddala. Yalowooza nti aloota buloosi." 
Acts12:10 Bwe baayita ku bakuumi abasooka, ne ku bookubiri, ne batuuka ku luggi olw'ekyuma, oluyingira mu kibuga. Ne lubeggulirawo lwokka, ne bafuluma, ne batuuka mu luguudo. Ne batambulako akabanga, malayika n'amulekawo." 
Acts12:11 Awo Peetero bwe yategeera ebibaddewo, n'agamba nti: “Kaakano ntegedde nga Mukama atumye malayika we, n'anzigya mu mikono gya Herode, era n'amponya ebyo byonna Abayudaaya bye babadde basuubira okunkolako.”" 
Acts12:12 Peetero ng'akyalowooza ku ekyo, n'agenda ku nnyumba ya Mariya, nnyina wa Yowanne Mariko, abantu bangi gye baali bakuŋŋaanidde nga beegayirira Katonda." 
Acts12:13 Peetero bwe yakonkona ku luggi olw'emiryango, omuwala omuweereza erinnya lye Rooda, n'ajja alabe akonkona." 
Acts12:14 Olwategeera ng'eddoboozi lya Peetero, yenna n'ajjula essanyu, n'adduka n'addayo nga n'oluggi taluggudde, n'agamba nti: “Peetero ayimiridde wabweru ku luggi.”" 
Acts12:15 Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Olaluse?” Ye n'akakasa nti ky'agamba kya mazima. Ne bagamba nti: “Oyo malayika we.” 
Acts12:16 Kyokka Peetero ne yeeyongera okukonkona. Bwe baggulawo ne bamulaba, ne basamaalirira." 
Acts12:17 Ye n'abawenya n'omukono basirike, n'ababuulira nga Mukama bw'amuggye mu kkomera. Era n'abagamba nti: “Bino mubibuulire Yakobo n'abooluganda abalala.” N'avaayo, n'agenda awantu awalala." 
Acts12:18 Awo bwe bwakya enkya, ne wabaawo akeetalo ka maanyi mu baserikale, nga beebuuzaganya Peetero gy'alaze." 
Acts12:19 Herode bwe yamunoonya n'atamulaba, n'awozesa abakuumi, n'alagira battibwe. Awo n'ava mu Buyudaaya, n'aserengeta e Kayisaariya n'abeera eyo." 
Acts12:20 Awo Herode n'asunguwalira abantu ab'e Tiiro ne Sidoni. Naye bo ne beetaba wamu ne bajja bamulabe. Ne bawooyawooya Bulasto eyakuumanga olubiri lwe, ne basaba Kabaka Herode emirembe, kubanga ensi ye, ye yaliisanga eyaabwe." 
Acts12:21 Awo ku lunaku olwali olulagaanye, Herode n'ayambala ebyambalo bye eby'obwakabaka, n'atuula ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka, n'ayogera gye bali." 
Acts12:22 Abantu ne bamuwaana nga bagamba nti: “Si muntu ye ayogera wabula Katonda ye ayogera!” 
Acts12:23 Amangwago malayika wa Mukama n'akuba Herode, kubanga tawadde Katonda kitiibwa. N'aliibwa envunyu, n'afa." 
Acts12:24 Naye ekigambo kya Katonda ne kyeyongera okunywera n'okubuna mu bantu. 
Acts12:25 Awo Barunaba ne Sawulo bwe baamaliriza omulimu gwabwe, ne bava e Yerusaalemu, ne baddayo nga bali ne Yowanne Mariko." 
Acts13:1 Mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ekyali mu Antiyookiya, mwalimu abalanzi n'abayigiriza: Barunaba ne Simyoni eyayitibwanga Omuddugavu, ne Lukiyo ow'e Kireene, ne Manayeni eyakulira awamu n'omufuzi Herode, ne Sawulo." 
Acts13:2 Bwe baali nga baweereza Mukama era nga basiiba, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'abagamba nti: “Munjawulire Barunaba ne Sawulo, bakole omulimu gwe mbayitidde.”" 
Acts13:3 Awo bwe baamala okusiiba n'okwegayirira Katonda, ne babassaako emikono, ne babatuma." 
Acts13:4 Awo Barunaba ne Sawulo bwe baamala okutumibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, ne baserengeta e Selewukiya, ne basaabala, ne bagenda e Kipuro." 
Acts13:5 Bwe baatuuka e Salamisi, ne bayigiriza ekigambo kya Katonda mu makuŋŋaaniro g'Abayudaaya. Baali ne Yowanne Mariko ng'abaweereza." 
Acts13:6 Bwe baayitaayita mu kizinga kyonna okutuuka e Paafo, ne basanga Omuyudaaya omulaguzi, omulanzi ow'obulimba, erinnya lye Bari-Yesu." 
Acts13:7 Yali wamu n'omufuzi ow'ekizinga ekyo, omusajja omugezi, erinnya lye Serugiyo Pawulo. Omufuzi oyo n'ayita Barunaba ne Sawulo, ng'ayagala okuwulira ekigambo kya Katonda." 
Acts13:8 Kyokka Eluma, amakulu nti omulaguzi, n'abawakanya ng'ayagala omufuzi aleme kukkiriza." 
Acts13:9 Awo Sawulo, era amanyiddwa nga Pawulo, n'ajjula Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'asimba Eluma amaaso," 
Acts13:10 n'agamba nti: “Ggwe omwana wa Sitaani! Ggwe omulabe w'obutuukirivu bwonna, ojjudde obukuusa bwonna. Tolirekayo kuggya bantu mu makubo ga Mukama amagolokofu?" 
Acts13:11 Kaakano Mukama ajja kukubonereza: ojja kuba muzibe, nga tolaba njuba okumala akaseera.” Amangwago ekifu n'ekizikiza ne bibikka amaaso ge, ne gaziba. N'awammanta ng'anoonya ow'okumukwata ku mukono." 
Acts13:12 Awo omufuzi bwe yalaba ebibaddewo, n'akkiriza, nga yeewuunya nnyo okuyigiriza okufa ku Mukama." 
Acts13:13 Awo Pawulo ne banne ne basaabala okuva e Paafo, ne batuuka e Peruga eky'omu Panfiliya. Yowanne ye n'abaawukanako, n'addayo e Yerusaalemu." 
Acts13:14 Kyokka bo ne bava e Peruga, ne batuuka mu Antiyookiya eky'omu Pisidiya. Ku lunaku olwa Sabbaato ne bayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro, ne batuula." 
Acts13:15 Ebitundu ebiggyibwa mu mateeka ga Musa ne mu byawandiikibwa abalanzi bwe byaggwa okusoma, abakulu b'ekkuŋŋaaniro, ne batumira ba Pawulo nga bagamba nti: “Abooluganda, oba nga mulina ekigambo eky'okubuulira abantu, mukibabuulire.”" 
Acts13:16 Pawulo bwe yasituka n'abawenya n'omukono, n'agamba nti: “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, nammwe abalala abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, muwulire." 
Acts13:17 Katonda w'Abayisirayeli yalonda bajjajjaffe, n'abafuula eggwanga eddene bwe baali mu nsi y'e Misiri. Oluvannyuma n'abaggyayo n'obuyinza bwe obungi." 
Acts13:18 N'abeera nabo mu ddungu, okumala emyaka ng'amakumi ana, ng'abagumiikiriza." 
Acts13:19 Bwe yamala okuzikiriza amawanga omusanvu agaali mu nsi y'e Kanaani, n'abawa ensi eyo okuba obutaka bwabwe." 
Acts13:20 Emyaka ng'ebikumi bina mu ataano bwe gyayitawo, n'abawa abalamuzi, okutuusa mu biseera bya Samweli omulanzi." 
Acts13:21 Awo bwe baasaba okuweebwa kabaka, Katonda n'abawa Sawulo, omwana wa Kiisi, ow'omu Kika kya Benyamiini, n'abafugira emyaka amakumi ana." 
Acts13:22 “Bwe yamuggyaawo, n'abateerawo Dawudi okuba kabaka waabwe, Katonda gwe yayogerako nti: ‘Nzudde Dawudi omwana wa Yesse, ye musajja gwe nsiima, anaakolanga byonna bye njagala.’" 
Acts13:23 “Katonda ng'atuukiriza ekyo kye yasuubiza, aleetedde Yisirayeli Omulokozi Yesu, ng'amuggya mu zzadde lya Dawudi." 
Acts13:24 Yesu bwe yali nga tannatandika mulimu gwe, Yowanne yategeeza abantu ba Yisirayeli bonna beenenye babatizibwe." 
Acts13:25 Era Yowanne bwe yali ng'amaliriza omulimu gwe, n'agamba abantu nti: ‘Mundowooza kuba ani? Nze siri oyo gwe mulindirira, wabula ye anvaako mabega, era sisaanira na kusumulula buguwa bwa ngatto ze.’" 
Acts13:26 “Mmwe abooluganda, bazzukulu ba Aburahamu, nammwe abalala abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, ebigambo bino eby'obulokozi byaweerezebwa ffe." 
Acts13:27 Abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, awamu n'abakulu baabwe, Yesu tebaamumanya nti ye mulokozi, wadde okutegeera ebigambo by'abalanzi ebisomebwa buli Sabbaato. Kyokka baabituukiriza, bwe baasalira Yesu omusango attibwe." 
Acts13:28 Newaakubadde tebaazuula nsonga emussa, baasaba Pilaato, Yesu attibwe." 
Acts13:29 “Bwe baamala okutuukiriza ebyawandiikibwa byonna ebimwogerako, ne bamuwanula ku musaalaba, ne bamuteeka mu ntaana." 
Acts13:30 Kyokka Katonda n'amuzuukiza. 
Acts13:31 N'amala ennaku nnyingi ng'alabikira abo abaayambuka naye e Yerusaalemu nga bava e Galilaaya. Abo kaakano be bamumanyisa mu bantu. 
Acts13:32 “Kale Amawulire Amalungi ge tubaleetera gaagano nti: Katonda bwe yazuukiza Yesu, yatuukiriza ekyo kye yasuubiza bajjajjaffe, ku lwaffe bazzukulu baabwe," 
Acts13:33 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Zabbuli eyookubiri nti: ‘Oli Mwana wange, olwa leero nkuzadde.’" 
Acts13:34 Okukakasa nti Katonda yamuzuukiza, takyaddamu kufa, Katonda kyava agamba nti: ‘Ndibawa emikisa emitukuvu era egy'enkalakkalira, gye nawa Dawudi.’" 
Acts13:35 Ne mu Zabbuli endala agamba nti: ‘Tolireka mutukuvu wo kuvunda.’ 
Acts13:36 Dawudi bwe yamala okukola emirimu Katonda gye yamuteekerateekera mu bulamu bwe, n'afa, n'aziikibwa awali bajjajjaabe, n'avunda." 
Acts13:37 Kyokka oyo Katonda gwe yazuukiza teyavunda. 
Acts13:38 N'olwekyo mmwe mwenna abooluganda, mutegeere nti ku bw'oyo, tubategeeza nga bwe muyinza okusonyiyibwa ebibi byammwe." 
Acts13:39 Era byonna bye mutaayinza kuggyibwako mu mateeka ga Musa, buli akkiriza Yesu bimuggyibwako." 
Acts13:40 “Kale mwekuume, ekyo kireme kubabaako, ekyayogerwa abalanzi nti:" 
Acts13:41 ‘Kale mmwe abanyooma, mwewuunye, muzikirire, kubanga nkola omulimu mu biseera byammwe, omulimu gwe mutalikkiriza, newaakubadde nga waliwo agubannyonnyola.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Pawulo ne Barunaba bwe baali bafuluma mu kkuŋŋaaniro, abantu ne babasaba beeyongere okubategeeza ebigambo ebyo ku Sabbaato eddirira." 
Acts13:43 Bonna bwe baava mu kkuŋŋaaniro, bangi ku Bayudaaya ne ku b'amawanga amalala abasoma Ekiyudaaya ne bagoberera Pawulo ne Barunaba. Mu kunyumya nabo, Pawulo ne Barunaba ne babakuutira banywerere mu kwesiga ekisa kya Katonda." 
Acts13:44 Ku Sabbaato eyaddirira, kumpi buli muntu eyali mu kibuga n'ajja okuwulira ekigambo kya Katonda." 
Acts13:45 Abayudaaya bwe baalaba abantu abangi bwe batyo, ne bajjula obuggya, ne bawakanya ebyayogerwa Pawulo, era ne bamuvuma." 
Acts13:46 Awo Pawulo ne Barunaba ne boogera n'obuvumu, ne bagamba nti: “Mmwe mubadde muteekwa okusooka okubuulirwa ekigambo kya Katonda. Naye nga bwe mukigaanyi, ne mulaga mmwe mwennyini nga temusaanira kufuna bulamu obutaggwaawo, kale ka tubaleke, tugende eri ab'amawanga amalala," 
Acts13:47 kubanga ekyo Mukama kye yatulagira okukola bwe yagamba nti: ‘Nkutaddewo obe ekitangaala mu b'amawanga amalala, obe omulokozi w'ensi zonna.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Ab'amawanga amalala bwe baawulira ebyo, ne basanyuka, ekigambo kya Katonda ne bakissaamu ekitiibwa. Abo Katonda be yateekerateekera obulamu obutaggwaawo, ne bakkiriza." 
Acts13:49 Ekigambo kya Katonda ne kibuna mu kitundu ekyo kyonna. 
Acts13:50 Naye Abayudaaya ne bafukuutirira abakulu b'ekibuga n'abakazi abeekitiibwa era abajjumbizi b'eddiini, ne bayigganya Pawulo ne Barunaba, ne babagoba mu kitundu ekyo." 
Acts13:51 Kyokka Pawulo ne Barunaba ne bakunkumulira abantu abo enfuufu ey'oku bigere byabwe, ne balaga mu Yikoniyo." 
Acts13:52 Abayigirizwa ne bajjula essanyu ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu. 
Acts14:1 Awo Pawulo ne Barunaba bwe baatuuka mu Yikoniyo, era ne bayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro ly'Abayudaaya, ne bayigiriza. Abantu bangi nnyo, Abayudaaya n'Abayonaani, ne bakkiriza." 
Acts14:2 Naye Abayudaaya abamu abaagaana okukkiriza, ne bassa omutima omubi mu b'amawanga amalala okukyawa abakkiriza." 
Acts14:3 Pawulo ne Barunaba ne bamalayo ebbanga ddene nga bayigiriza n'obuvumu ebya Mukama. Era Mukama n'akakasanga bye bayigiriza ku kisa kye, ng'abakozesa ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero." 
Acts14:4 Abantu b'omu kibuga ne beesalamu, abamu ne babeera ku ludda lw'Abayudaaya, abalala ne babeera ku ludda lw'abatume." 
Acts14:5 Awo ab'amawanga amalala n'Abayudaaya awamu n'abakulu baabwe, ne beekoba okulumba abatume, n'okubakuba amayinja." 
Acts14:6 Bo bwe baakitegeera, ne baddukira mu Lisitura ne Derube, ebibuga by'e Likawooniya, ne mu bitundu ebibiriraanye." 
Acts14:7 Ne babeera eyo nga bategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi. 
Acts14:8 Mu Lisitura mwalimu omusajja omugongobavu w'ebigere, nga mulema okuva lwe yazaalibwa, era nga tatambulangako. Yali atudde awo," 
Acts14:9 n'awulira Pawulo by'ayogera. Pawulo bwe yamutunuulira n'alaba ng'akkiriza ng'ayinza okuwonyezebwa. 
Acts14:10 Pawulo n'akangula ku ddoboozi n'agamba nti: “Situka oyimirire.” N'asituka mangu, n'atambula." 
Acts14:11 Awo ekibiina ky'abantu bwe kyalaba Pawulo ky'akoze, ne kireekaana n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka mu lulimi Olulikoniyo nga kigamba nti: “Balubaale basse gye tuli nga bafaanana ng'abantu!”" 
Acts14:12 Barunaba ne bamuyita Zeewo, Pawulo ne bamuyita Erume, kubanga ye yayogera." 
Acts14:13 Awo kabona wa Zeewo, eyalina essabo mu maaso g'ekibuga, n'aleeta ku nzigi z'ekibuga ente n'ebimuli eby'okubambika, ng'ayagala abantu bonna bamwegatteko okutambira." 
Acts14:14 Kyokka abatume Barunaba ne Pawulo bwe baawulira ekyo, ne bayuza ebyambalo byabwe olw'okukiwakanya, ne bafubutuka nga balaga mu bantu, nga bwe baleekaana nti:" 
Acts14:15 “Bannaffe, lwaki mukola ebyo? Naffe tuli bantu buntu nga mmwe, ababaleetedde Amawulire Amalungi, mulyoke muleke ebyo ebitagasa, mudde eri Katonda Nnannyinibulamu, eyakola eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja, ne byonna ebibirimu." 
Acts14:16 “Mu mirembe egyayita, Katonda yaleka abantu bonna ne bayisa nga bwe baayagalanga." 
Acts14:17 Kyokka teyeekweka. Bulijjo yeeyolekeranga mu birungi by'akola, gamba abatonnyeseza enkuba, abaza ebibala byammwe mu biseera byabyo, abawa emmere, era ajjuza emitima gyammwe essanyu.”" 
Acts14:18 Newaakubadde baayogera ebyo, era kata balemwe okuziyiza abantu okubatambirira." 
Acts14:19 Awo Abayudaaya abamu ne bava e Lisitura ne Yikoniyo, ne bafukuutirira abantu, ne bakuba Pawulo amayinja. Ne bamuwalula, ne bamufulumya ebweru w'ekibuga, nga balowooza nti afudde." 
Acts14:20 Kyokka abayigirizwa bwe baamwetooloola, n'asituka, n'ayingira mu kibuga. Olunaku olwaddirira, Pawulo ne Barunaba ne balaga e Derube." 
Acts14:21 Pawulo ne Barunaba ne bategeeza abantu mu Derube Amawulire Amalungi, ne bafuna abayigirizwa bangi. Olwo ne baddayo mu Lisitura ne mu Yikoniyo, ne mu Antiyookiya eky'e Pisidiya," 
Acts14:22 nga banyweza emyoyo gy'abayigirizwa, era nga babakuutira banyweze okukkiriza kwabwe. Ne babagamba nti: “Tuteekwa okuyita mu bizibu bingi okuyingira Obwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Acts14:23 Bwe baamala okuteeka abakulembeze mu buli kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, n'okusinza Katonda era nga bwe basiiba, ne babakwasa Mukama gwe bakkiriza." 
Acts14:24 Ne bayita mu Pisidiya, ne batuuka mu Panfiliya." 
Acts14:25 Ne bategeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda mu Peruga, ne baserengeta mu Ataliya." 
Acts14:26 Bwe baavaayo, ne basaabala ne baddayo mu Antiyookiya, mu kusooka bannaabwe gye baabakwasiza Katonda abayambe, bwe baali nga bagenda okutandika omulimu guno, gwe baali baakamaliriza." 
Acts14:27 Bwe baatuukayo, ne bakuŋŋaanya ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, ne babategeeza byonna Katonda bye yabakozesa, era nga bw'asobozesezza ab'amawanga amalala okukkiriza." 
Acts14:28 Ne bamalayo ebbanga ddene nga bali n'abayigirizwa. 
Acts15:1 Awo abantu abamu ne bava e Buyudaaya, ne bajja mu Antiyookiya, ne bayigiriza abooluganda nti: “Bwe mutakomolebwa ng'etteeka lya Musa bwe liragira, temuyinza kulokolebwa.”" 
Acts15:2 Pawulo ne Barunaba bwe baawakana ennyo nabo, ne kisalibwawo nti Pawulo ne Barunaba n'abamu ku bakkiriza ab'omu Antiyookiya, bagende e Yerusaalemu eri abatume n'abakulembeze b'abakkiriza, babalabe ku nsonga eyo." 
Acts15:3 Awo bwe baamala okusibirirwa ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, ne bagenda. Ne bayita mu Foyinikiya ne mu Samariya, nga bagenda bannyonnyola ng'ab'amawanga amalala bwe bakyuse ne bakkiriza Katonda. Abooluganda bwe baawulira ebyo, ne basanyuka nnyo." 
Acts15:4 Bwe baatuuka e Yerusaalemu, ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, awamu n'abatume n'abakulembeze b'abakkiriza, ne babaaniriza. Pawulo ne Barunaba ne babategeeza Katonda bye yabakozesa." 
Acts15:5 Naye abamu ku bakkiriza ab'omu kibiina ky'Abafarisaayo, ne basituka ne bagamba nti: “Ab'amawanga amalala bateekwa okukomolebwa n'okulagirwa okukwata Amateeka ga Musa.”" 
Acts15:6 Awo abatume n'abakulu b'abakkiriza ne bakuŋŋaana okwekkaanya ensonga eyo. 
Acts15:7 Empaka bwe zaakalambira ennyo, Peetero n'asituka n'agamba nti: “Abooluganda, mumanyi nti mu nnaku ezaayita, Katonda yannonda mu mmwe, ntegeeze ab'amawanga amalala Amawulire Amalungi, balyoke bakkirize." 
Acts15:8 Katonda amanyi ebiri mu mitima gy'abantu, yakakasa nga bw'abasiima, bwe yabawa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu nga bwe yamutuwa ffe." 
Acts15:9 Yalaga nti ffe nabo, tewali njawulo, kubanga yabasonyiwa ebibi byabwe olw'okukkiriza." 
Acts15:10 Kale kaakano lwaki mukema Katonda ng'abakkiriza mubatikka emigugu, bajjajjaffe wadde ffe gye tutaasobola kwetikka?" 
Acts15:11 Wabula tukkiriza nti tulokolebwa lwa kisa kya Mukama Yesu, era nabo bwe batyo.”" 
Acts15:12 Awo bonna abaali bakuŋŋaanye, ne basirika, ne bawuliriza Pawulo ne Barunaba nga babategeeza ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero Katonda bye yabakozesa mu b'amawanga amalala." 
Acts15:13 Bwe baamala okwogera, Yakobo n'agamba nti: “Abooluganda, mumpulirize." 
Acts15:14 Simooni annyonnyodde nga Katonda bwe yasooka okulaga nti alumirwa ab'amawanga amalala ng'abalondamu okuba ababe ddala. 
Acts15:15 Ekyo kitabagana bulungi n'eby'abalanzi, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti:" 
Acts15:16 ‘Ebyo bwe biriggwa, ndidda, ne nzimba ennyumba ya Dawudi eyagwa. Ndigizimba mu kifo we yali, ngizzeewo." 
Acts15:17 Abantu abalala n'ab'amawanga amalala bonna, be nayita okuba abantu bange balyoke banoonye Mukama." 
Acts15:18 Mukama eyamanyisa ekyo okuva edda n'edda, bw'atyo bw'agamba.’" 
Acts15:19 “Kyenva ŋŋamba nti tuleme kuteganya ba mawanga malala abakyuka ne badda eri Katonda. 
Acts15:20 Wabula tubawandiikire, tubategeeze baleme kulya kintu na kimu ekiweereddwayo eri balubaale, beewale obwenzi, era baleme kulya nsolo zitugiddwa, wadde okulya omusaayi." 
Acts15:21 Okuva edda ebyo ebyawandiikibwa Musa birina ababiyigiriza mu buli kibuga, era bisomebwa mu makuŋŋaaniro buli Sabbaato.”" 
Acts15:22 Awo abatume n'abantu abakulu, awamu n'ekibiina kyonna eky'abakkiriza Kristo, ne basalawo okwerondamu ababaka babatume mu Antiyookiya, bagende wamu ne Pawulo ne Barunaba. Ne balonda Yuda ayitibwa Barusabba, ne Siila, abasajja abakulu mu booluganda." 
Acts15:23 Ne babakwasa ebbaluwa egamba nti: “Ffe baganda bammwe abatume n'abantu abakulu, tubalamusizza mmwe abooluganda abatali Bayudaaya, ab'omu Antiyookiya ne Siriya ne Kilikiya." 
Acts15:24 Tuwulidde nti waliwo abamu mu ffe abajja ne babateganya olw'ebigambo bye baabagamba, sso nga ffe tetubatumanga." 
Acts15:25 Kyetuvudde tukuŋŋaana, ne tusalawo okulonda n'okubatumira ababaka, bajje gye muli, nga bali n'abaagalwa baffe Barunaba ne Pawulo," 
Acts15:26 abantu abaawaayo obulamu bwabwe olw'okuweereza Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. 
Acts15:27 Kale tutumye Yuda ne Siila, bo bennyini bababuulire n'akamwa." 
Acts15:28 “Mwoyo Mutuukirivu naffe, tusazeewo obutabatikka mugugu mulala, wabula bino ebitalekeka:" 
Acts15:29 mwewale okulya bye batambiridde balubaale, era mwewale okulya omusaayi wadde ensolo etugiddwa, era mwewale obwenzi. Bwe muneewala ebintu ebyo, munaaba mukoze bulungi. Mweraba.”" 
Acts15:30 Awo abaatumibwa ne bagenda mu Antiyookiya, ne bakuŋŋaanya ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, ne babakwasa ebbaluwa." 
Acts15:31 Bwe baagisoma, ne basanyuka olw'ebyagirimu ebyabagumya." 
Acts15:32 Yuda ne Siila nga nabo bwe baali abalanzi, ne boogera n'abooluganda ebigambo bingi nga babagumya." 
Acts15:33 Bwe baamalayo ebbanga, abooluganda ne babasiibula mirembe, ne baddayo eri abaabatuma. [" 
Acts15:34 Kyokka Siila ye n'asalawo okusigalayo.] 
Acts15:35 Pawulo ne Barunaba ne bamala ekiseera mu Antiyookiya ne bannaabwe abalala, nga bategeeza era nga bayigiriza abantu ekigambo kya Mukama." 
Acts15:36 Ennaku bwe zaayitawo, Pawulo n'agamba Barunaba nti: “Tuddeyo tulambule abooluganda abali mu buli bibuga gye twategeeza abantu ekigambo kya Mukama, tulabe nga bwe bali.”" 
Acts15:37 Barunaba n'ayagala batwale ne Yowanne Mariko. 
Acts15:38 Kyokka Pawulo n'atasiima kugenda na muntu eyabaleka mu Panfiliya, n'atagenda nabo ku mulimu." 
Acts15:39 Ne bawakana nnyo. Bwe baalemwa okukkiriziganya, kwe kwawukana, Barunaba n'agenda ne Mariko, ne basaabala ne balaga e Kipuro." 
Acts15:40 Pawulo ye n'alonda Siila, ne bagenda, ng'abooluganda bamaze okubasabira Katonda abayambe." 
Acts15:41 N'ayita mu Siriya ne mu Kilikiya, ng'agumya ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo."
