Acts16:1 Awo Pawulo n'atuuka e Derube n'e Lisitura. Eyo waaliyo omuyigirizwa erinnya lye Timoteewo, nga nnyina Muyudaaya omukkiriza mu Kristo, kyokka kitaawe nga Muyonaani." 
Acts16:2 Abooluganda bonna, ab'omu Derube ne Yikoniyo, nga basiima nnyo Timoteewo oyo." 
Acts16:3 Pawulo n'ayagala okugenda naye. Kyeyava amukomola, kubanga Abayudaaya abaali mu kitundu ekyo bonna, baali bamanyi nga kitaawe yali Muyonaani." 
Acts16:4 Awo ne bayita mu bibuga, nga bakuutira abakkiriza, okukwata ebyasalibwawo abatume n'abantu abakulu abaali mu Yerusaalemu." 
Acts16:5 Olwo ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo ne binywezebwa mu kukkiriza, era abantu ne babyegattangako buli lunaku." 
Acts16:6 Ne bayita mu kitundu ky'e Furigiya n'e Galatiya, nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abagaanyi okutegeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda mu Asiya." 
Acts16:7 Bwe baatuuka okumpi ne Musiya, ne bagezaako okugenda mu kitundu eky'e Bitiniya, kyokka Mwoyo wa Yesu n'atabakkiriza." 
Acts16:8 Bwe baayita ku Musiya, ne baserengeta e Turoowa." 
Acts16:9 Ekiro Pawulo n'alabikirwa, n'alaba omuntu ow'omu Makedooniya ng'ayimiridde amwegayirira nti: “Jjangu e Makedooniya otuyambe.”" 
Acts16:10 Bwe yamala okulabikirwa, amangwago ne tusala amagezi tugende e Makedooniya, nga tutegedde nti Katonda atuyise okutegeeza abaayo Amawulire Amalungi." 
Acts16:11 Ne tusaabala okuva e Turoowa, ne tugoba e Samoturakiya. Olunaku olwaddirira ne tutuuka e Neyapoli." 
Acts16:12 Bwe twavaayo, ne tutuuka e Filippi, ekibuga ekikulu eky'e Makedooniya; ettwale ly'Abarooma. Ne tumalayo ennaku ntonotono." 
Acts16:13 Ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato ne tufuluma mu kibuga, ne tugenda ku mabbali g'omugga, gye twalowooza nti eriyo ekifo gye basinziza Katonda. Ne tutuula ne twogera n'abakazi abaali bakuŋŋaanye." 
Acts16:14 Omu ku bo, erinnya lye Lidiya, eyava mu kibuga Tiyatira, n'atuwuliriza. Yali mutunzi wa ngoye eza kakobe, era ng'assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa. Mukama n'aggula omutima gwe, n'akkiriza ebyo Pawulo bye yayogera." 
Acts16:15 Ye n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bwe baamala okubatizibwa, n'atwegayirira ng'agamba nti: “Oba nga mulabye nti nzikiriza Mukama mu mazima, mujje mubeere ewange.” N'atukkirizisa." 
Acts16:16 Awo olwatuuka, bwe twali tugenda mu kifo eky'okusinzizaamu Katonda, omuwala omuzaana eyalagulanga, era eyafuniranga bakama be ebintu ebingi olw'okulagula kwe, n'atusisinkana." 
Acts16:17 Omuwala oyo n'atugoberera nga bw'awowoggana nti: “Abantu bano baweereza ba Katonda Atenkanika, ababategeeza nga bwe muyinza okulokolebwa.”" 
Acts16:18 Ekyo n'akiddiŋŋananga okumala ennaku nnyingi. Naye Pawulo bwe yanakuwala, n'akyuka n'agamba lubaale nti: “Mu linnya lya Yesu nkulagira, muveeko.” Amangwago lubaale n'amuvaako." 
Acts16:19 Bakama b'omuwala bwe baalaba ng'essuubi ery'okufuna ebintu liweddewo, ne bakwata Pawulo ne Siila, ne babawalaawala ne babatwala mu mbuga eri ab'obuyinza." 
Acts16:20 Bwe baabatuusa eri abalamuzi, ne bagamba nti: “Abantu bano Bayudaaya era basasamaza ekibuga kyaffe." 
Acts16:21 Bayigiriza empisa ffe Abarooma ze tutayinza kukkiriza wadde okugoberera.” 
Acts16:22 Ekibiina ky'abantu nakyo ne kyegatta mu kubakuba. Abalamuzi ne bayuza engoye za Pawulo ne Siila, era ne balagira bakubwe emiggo." 
Acts16:23 Bwe baamala okubakuba ennyo, ne babateeka mu kkomera, ne balagira omukuumi okubakuuma ennyo." 
Acts16:24 Omukuumi w'ekkomera bwe yamala okulagirwa, n'abateeka mu kkomera eryomunda, amagulu gaabwe n'agassa mu nvuba." 
Acts16:25 Ekiro nga mu ttumbi, Pawulo ne Siila ne beegayirira Katonda era ne bamutendereza mu nnyimba, n'abasibe abalala ne bawulira." 
Acts16:26 Amangwago ne wabaawo okukankana kw'ensi okw'amaanyi, ne kuyuuguumya ekkomera n'emisingi gyalyo. Awo enzigi z'ekkomera zonna ne zeggula, n'enjegere ezaali zisibye abasibe ne zisumulukuka." 
Acts16:27 Omukuumi w'ekkomera bwe yazuukuka, n'alaba ng'enzigi z'ekkomera nzigule, n'asowola ekitala kye yette, ng'alowooza nti abasibe babombye." 
Acts16:28 Kyokka Pawulo n'aleekaana nnyo nti: “Teweekolako kabi! Ffenna weetuli wano.” 
Acts16:29 Awo omukuumi w'ekkomera n'atumya ettaala, n'ayingira mangu, n'agwa kumpi n'ebigere bya Pawulo ne Siila nga bw'akankana." 
Acts16:30 N'abafulumya ebweru n'ababuuza nti: “Bassebo, kiki kye ŋŋwanira okukola ndyoke ndokolebwe?”" 
Acts16:31 Ne bamugamba nti: “Kkiriza Mukama Yesu, onoolokolebwa ggwe, n'ab'omu nnyumba yo bonna.”" 
Acts16:32 Awo ne bamutegeeza awamu n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna ekigambo kya Mukama. 
Acts16:33 Mu kiro ekyo kyennyini, omukuumi w'ekkomera n'abatwala, n'abanaaza ebiwundu. Amangwago n'abatizibwa awamu n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna." 
Acts16:34 Olwo n'atwala Pawulo ne Siila mu nnyumba ye, n'abawa ebyokulya. N'asanyuka nnyo awamu n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna, olw'okukkiriza Katonda." 
Acts16:35 Obudde bwe bwakya, abalamuzi ne batuma abaserikale baabwe mu kkomera, nga bagamba nti: “Abantu abo mubate.”" 
Acts16:36 Awo omukuumi w'ekkomera n'agamba Pawulo nti: “Abalamuzi balagidde muteebwe. Kale kaakano mufulume, mugende mirembe.”" 
Acts16:37 Kyokka Pawulo n'abagamba nti: “Baatukubidde mu lujjudde nga tetuwozezza na kuwoza, sso nga tuli Barooma. Ate kaakano batuta batya mu kyama? Nedda. Bo bennyini be baba bajja batute.”" 
Acts16:38 Abaserikale ebigambo ebyo ne babibuulira abalamuzi. Abalamuzi bwe baawulira nga Pawulo ne Siila Barooma, ne batya." 
Acts16:39 Ne bajja ne babeetondera, ne babafulumya ebweru w'ekkomera ne babeegayirira bave mu kibuga." 
Acts16:40 Awo Pawulo ne Siila ne bava mu kkomera, ne bagenda ewa Lidiya. Bwe baamala okulaba abooluganda n'okubagumya, ne bavaayo." 
Acts17:1 Ne batambula, ne bayita mu Anfipoli ne mu Apolooniya, ne batuuka e Tessalonika, eyali ekkuŋŋaaniro ly'Abayudaaya." 
Acts17:2 Pawulo n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro, nga bwe yakolanga bulijjo. Ku Sabbaato essatu ezaddiriŋŋana n'awaanyisaganyanga ebirowoozo n'abantu, nga bw'ajuliza mu byawandiikibwa." 
Acts17:3 N'annyonnyola era n'alaga nti: “Kristo yali ateekwa okubonaabona n'okuzuukira.” Era nti: “Yesu oyo gwe mbategeeza, ye Kristo.”" 
Acts17:4 Abamu ku bo ne bakkiriza, ne beegatta ku Pawulo ne Siila. N'Abayonaani bangi abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, n'abakazi abeekitiibwa bangi, nabo ne babeegattako." 
Acts17:5 Kyokka Abayudaaya ne bakwatibwa obuggya, ne bafuna abantu ababi abaali mu katale, ne beekuŋŋaanya, ne basasamaza ekibuga. Ne balumba ennyumba ya Yasoni nga banoonya Pawulo ne Siila, babaleete mu lukiiko lw'ekibuga." 
Acts17:6 Bwe bataabasangamu, kwe kuwalaawala Yasoni n'abamu ku booluganda, ne babatwala eri abalamuzi, nga bwe baleekaana nti: “Abantu bano abaleeta emitawaana buli wantu, bazze ne wano," 
Acts17:7 era Yasoni ye abasuza. Bonna bajeemera amateeka ga Kayisaari nga bagamba nti: ‘Waliwo kabaka omulala ayitibwa Yesu.’ ” 
Acts17:8 Ekibiina ky'abantu kyonna awamu n'abakulu b'ekibuga bwe baawulira ebyo, ne basasamala." 
Acts17:9 Yasoni ne banne bwe baamala okweyimirirwa, ne bateebwa." 
Acts17:10 Obudde bwe bwaziba, abooluganda ne basindika Pawulo ne Siila e Beroya. Bwe baatuuka eyo, ne bayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro ly'Abayudaaya." 
Acts17:11 Abantu baayo baali balungi okusinga ab'e Tessalonika, kubanga baayanguwa okukkiriza ekigambo kya Katonda, nga buli lunaku beekenneenya ebyawandiikibwa, okulaba oba nga Pawulo ne Siila bye boogera bituufu." 
Acts17:12 N'olwekyo bangi ku bo ne bakkiriza, n'Abayonaani bangi abakazi abeekitiibwa n'abasajja, nabo ne bakkiriza." 
Acts17:13 Awo Abayudaaya ab'e Tessalonika bwe baawulira nga Pawulo ategeezezza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda ne mu Beroya, ne bajjayo, ne bajagalaza era ne basasamaza abantu baayo." 
Acts17:14 Amangwago abooluganda kwe kuweereza Pawulo ku lubalama, kyokka Siila ne Timoteewo bo ne basigala mu Beroya." 
Acts17:15 Abo abaawerekera Pawulo ne bamutuusa mu Ateene. Pawulo bwe yamala okubalagira nga Siila ne Timoteewo bwe basaana okujja gy'ali amangu, ne baddayo." 
Acts17:16 Awo Pawulo bwe yali mu Ateene ng'alindirira Siila ne Timoteewo, n'alaba ng'ekibuga kijjudde ebifaananyi bya balubaale, n'alumwa mu myoyo." 
Acts17:17 N'awaanyisaganyanga ebirowoozo mu kkuŋŋaaniro n'Abayudaaya n'ab'amawanga amalala abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa. Era buli lunaku n'akolanga bw'atyo n'abantu abaabanga mu katale. 
Acts17:18 Awo bakalimagezi abamu, abayitibwa Abeepikuro n'Abasitoyiki ne bawakananga naye. Abamu ne bagamba nti: “Ayagala kwogera ki ono ataliiko ky'amanyi?” Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Afaanana ng'ayigiriza ku balubaale abaggya.” Kyebaava boogera batyo, kubanga yali ayigiriza ku Yesu ne ku kuzuukira." 
Acts17:19 Awo ne bamuyita n'ajja mu Arewopaago olukiiko olukulu, ne bagamba nti: “Oyinza okutubuulira ku kuyigiriza kuno okuggya kw'oyogerako?" 
Acts17:20 Ebimu ku ebyo by'oyogera, tetubiwulirangako. Twagala tubitegeere.”" 
Acts17:21 (Ab'e Ateene n'abagenyi abaabangamu, tebaakolanga kintu kirala, wabula okwogera oba okuwuliriza ebirowoozo ebiggya.)" 
Acts17:22 Awo Pawulo n'ayimirira mu Arewopaago, n'agamba nti: “Mmwe abasajja ab'e Ateene, ndaba nti mujjumbira nnyo eddiini," 
Acts17:23 kubanga bwe mbadde mpitaayita mu kibuga kyammwe, ne ndaba bye musinza era ne nsanga ekifo ky'ebitambiro awawandiikiddwako nti: ‘KYA LUBAALE ATAMANYIDDWA.’ Oyo gwe musinza nga temumumanyi, ye wuuyo nze gwe mbabuulira." 
Acts17:24 “Ye Katonda eyakola ensi ne byonna ebigirimu, ye Mukama w'eggulu n'ensi, era tabeera mu masabo gazimbiddwa bantu." 
Acts17:25 Era taliiko kye yeetaaga bantu kumuweereza, kubanga ye, ye abawa obulamu, n'okussa omukka, era ye abawa buli kintu." 
Acts17:26 Yasooka kutonda muntu omu, mu oyo ne muvaamu abantu bonna ababunye ensi. Yamala kubateerawo biseera na nsalo ez'ebifo mwe banaabeeranga," 
Acts17:27 balyoke bamunoonyenga, bawammante, nga basuubira okumulaba. Sso nno tali wala wa buli omu ku ffe," 
Acts17:28 kubanga ‘Ku bubwe tuba balamu, tutambula, tubeerawo.’ Era ng'abamu ku bayiiya bammwe bwe bagamba: ‘Tuli zzadde lye.’" 
Acts17:29 Kale nga bwe tuli ezzadde lya Katonda, tetusaanye kulowooza nti Katonda afaanana ebintu ebikolebwa mu zaabu oba ffeeza oba mu mayinja, abantu bye bakola mu magezi gaabwe." 
Acts17:30 “Kyokka Katonda teyafa ku ebyo abantu bye baakolanga olw'obutamanya bwabwe. Naye kaakano alagira abantu bonna wonna we bali, beenenye," 
Acts17:31 kubanga yateekawo olunaku, omuntu gwe yalonda, lw'agenda okusalirako ensi yonna omusango mu bwenkanya. Yakakasa abantu bonna, bwe yazuukiza omuntu oyo.”" 
Acts17:32 Bwe baawulira Pawulo ng'ayogera ku kuzuukira, abamu ne baŋŋoola, abalala ne bagamba nti: “Ekyo alikitubuulira olulala.”" 
Acts17:33 Awo Pawulo n'ava we bali n'agenda. 
Acts17:34 Naye abasajja abamu ne bamwegattako, ne bakkiriza Yesu. Mu abo mwalimu Diyoniziyo ow'omu lukiiko olukulu Arewopaago, n'omukazi erinnya lye Damari, awamu n'abalala." 
Acts18:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Pawulo n'ava mu Ateene, n'agenda e Korinto." 
Acts18:2 N'asangayo Omuyudaaya erinnya lye Akwila, enzaalwa y'omu Ponto, ne mukazi we Prisikila. Baali kye bajje bave mu Yitaliya, kubanga Kulawudiyo yali alagidde Abayudaaya bonna bave mu Rooma. Pawulo n'agenda gye bali," 
Acts18:3 n'abeera nabo, era n'akola nabo, kubanga bonna baalina omulimu gwe gumu, ogw'okukola eweema." 
Acts18:4 Buli Sabbaato Pawulo n'awaanyisaganyizanga ebirowoozo mu kkuŋŋaaniro, ng'agezaako okukkirizisa Abayudaaya n'Abayonaani." 
Acts18:5 Siila ne Timoteewo bwe baatuuka nga bava mu Makedooniya, Pawulo ne yeemalira ku kutegeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda, ng'ategeeza Abayudaaya nti Yesu ye Kristo." 
Acts18:6 Bwe baamukaayanya era ne bamuvuma, n'akunkumula engoye ze n'abagamba nti: “Bwe mulizikirira, musango gwammwe. Nze siriiko musango. Okuva kati nja kugenda eri ab'amawanga amalala.”" 
Acts18:7 N'avaayo, n'alaga mu nnyumba y'omuntu erinnya lye Tito Yusto, assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa. Ennyumba ye yali eriraanye ekkuŋŋaaniro." 
Acts18:8 Krispo omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna ne bakkiriza Mukama. Era ab'e Korinto bangi abaawulira, ne bakkiriza ne babatizibwa." 
Acts18:9 Awo Mukama n'alabikira Pawulo ekiro, n'amugamba nti: “Totya, weeyongere okwogera, tosirika." 
Acts18:10 Nze ndi wamu naawe. Tewali ajja kukukola kabi, kubanga nnina abantu bangi mu kibuga muno.”" 
Acts18:11 Awo Pawulo n'amalayo omwaka mulamba n'ekitundu ng'ayigiriza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda. 
Acts18:12 Galiyo bwe yali nga ye afuga Akaya, Abayudaaya ne beekoba, ne bakwata Pawulo ne bamutwala mu mbuga," 
Acts18:13 ne bagamba nti: “Omusajja ono asendasenda abantu okusinza Katonda mu ngeri emenya amateeka.” 
Acts18:14 Kyokka Pawulo yali agenda okwogera, Galiyo n'agamba Abayudaaya nti: “Singa wabaddewo ekisobyo oba omusango omunene, nandisobodde okubawuliriza mmwe Abayudaaya," 
Acts18:15 naye oba ng'ebyebuuzibwa bifa ku bigambo, ne ku mannya, ne ku mateeka gammwe, mmwe mubikoleko, nze sijja kubiyingiramu.”" 
Acts18:16 N'abagoba awasalirwa emisango. 
Acts18:17 Awo bonna ne bakwata Sositene, omukulu w'ekkuŋŋaaniro, ne bamukubira awasalirwa emisango. Era Galiyo n'atafaayo." 
Acts18:18 Pawulo n'amala ennaku nnyingi mu Korinto. Oluvannyuma n'asiibula abooluganda, n'asaabala ne Prisikila ne Akwila, ne bagenda e Siriya. Bwe yali mu Kenkereya, n'amwako enviiri ze, nga bwe yali yeeyamye." 
Acts18:19 Bwe baatuuka mu Efeso, bo n'abalekayo, ye n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro, n'akubaganya ebirowoozo n'Abayudaaya." 
Acts18:20 Bwe baamusaba ayongere okubeera nabo, n'atakkiriza." 
Acts18:21 N'abasiibula, n'abagamba nti: “Katonda bw'alyagala, ndikomawo gye muli.” N'asaabala, n'ava mu Efeso." 
Acts18:22 Bwe yatuuka e Kayisaariya, n'ayambuka n'alamusa ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, n'alyoka aserengeta mu Antiyookiya." 
Acts18:23 Bwe yamalayo akabanga, n'avaayo n'agenda ng'ayitaayita mu Galatiya ne mu Furigiya, ng'anyweza abakkiriza bonna." 
Acts18:24 Awo Omuyudaaya, erinnya lye Apollo, enzaalwa y'omu Alekisanderiya, n'ajja mu Efeso. Yali mwogezi mulungi, era ng'amanyi nnyo ebyawandiikibwa." 
Acts18:25 Yali ayigiriziddwa Ekkubo lya Mukama, era yeewangayo nnyo okwogera n'okuyigiriza obulungi ebifa ku Yesu, wabula ng'amanyi kubatiza kwa Yowanne kwokka." 
Acts18:26 Awo Prisikila ne Akwila bwe baamuwulira ng'ayogera n'obuvumu mu kkuŋŋaaniro, ne bamutwala ne bongera okumunnyonnyola obulungi Ekkubo lya Katonda." 
Acts18:27 Apollo bwe yayagala okugenda mu Akaya, Abooluganda ne bamugumya, ne bawandiikira abayigirizwa baayo bamwanirize. Bwe yatuukayo, n'ayamba nnyo abo Katonda be yakwatirwa ekisa ne bafuna okukkiriza," 
Acts18:28 kubanga yawakanyanga nnyo Abayudaaya, n'abasingira mu maaso g'abantu, ng'ajuliza mu byawandiikibwa, okukakasa nti Yesu ye Kristo." 
Acts19:1 Awo Apollo bwe yali mu Korinto, Pawulo n'ayita mu bitundu eby'engulu, n'atuuka mu Efeso, n'asangayo abamu ku bakkiriza." 
Acts19:2 N'ababuuza nti: “Bwe mwakkiriza mwafuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Tetuwuliranganako nti waliwo ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.” 
Acts19:3 Ye n'ababuuza nti: “Kale okubatizibwa kwammwe kwali kwa ngeri ki?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Okwo Yowanne kwe yaleeta.” 
Acts19:4 Pawulo n'abagamba nti: “Yowanne yabatiza abantu nga ke kabonero akalaga nti beenenyezza, ng'abagamba bakkirize oyo amuvaako emabega, ye Yesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Bwe baawulira ebyo, ne babatizibwa mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Pawulo bwe yabassaako emikono gye, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'abakkako, ne boogera ennimi, ne balanga." 
Acts19:7 Bonna awamu baali abasajja nga kkumi na babiri. 
Acts19:8 Awo Pawulo n'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro, n'ayogera n'obuvumu, ng'awaanyisaganya nabo ebirowoozo, ng'agezaako okubakkirizisa ebifa ku Bwakabaka bwa Katonda. N'amala emyezi esatu ng'akola bw'atyo." 
Acts19:9 Naye abamu bwe bafuuka abakakanyavu ne bagaana okukkiriza, era ne bavumanga Ekkubo lya Mukama mu maaso g'abantu, n'abavaako, n'agenda n'abayigirizwa, n'ayogereranga mu ssomero lya Turaano buli lunaku." 
Acts19:10 N'akolanga bw'atyo okumala emyaka ebiri. Abantu bonna ab'omu Asiya, Abayudaaya n'Abayonaani, ne bawulira ekigambo kya Mukama." 
Acts19:11 Katonda n'akozesanga Pawulo ebyamagero bingi. 
Acts19:12 Ebitambaala n'engoye ebyavanga ku mubiri gwe byatwalirwanga abalwadde ne bawonyezebwa, n'emyoyo emibi ne gibavaako." 
Acts19:13 Awo Abayudaaya abamu abaatambulatambulanga nga bagoba emyoyo emibi ku bantu, ne beetulinkiriza okukozesa erinnya lya Mukama Yesu okugigoba, nga bagigamba nti: “Nkulagira mu linnya lya Yesu, Pawulo gw'ategeeza abantu.”" 
Acts19:14 Waaliwo abaana musanvu aba kabona omukulu Omuyudaaya, erinnya lye Sukeva, abaakola ekyo." 
Acts19:15 Naye omwoyo omubi ne gubaddamu nti: “Yesu mmumanyi, ne Pawulo mmumanyi, naye mmwe be ani?”" 
Acts19:16 Awo omuntu eyaliko omwoyo omubi n'ababuukira, n'abasinza amaanyi n'abawangula, ne badduka nga bali bwereere, nga baliko ebiwundu." 
Acts19:17 Ekyo ne kimanyibwa abantu bonna, Abayudaaya n'Abayonaani ab'omu Efeso. Bonna ne bajjula entiisa, erinnya lya Mukama Yesu ne liweebwa ekitiibwa." 
Acts19:18 Bangi ku bakkiriza ne bajja, ne beenenya ebibi byabwe mu lwatu." 
Acts19:19 Era bangi ku abo abaakolanga eby'obulogo ne bakuŋŋaanya wamu ebitabo byabwe, ne babyokya ng'abantu bonna balaba. Omuwendo gw'ensimbi ezibigula bwe gwabalirirwa, ne guweza ebitundu bya ffeeza emitwalo etaano." 
Acts19:20 Bwe kityo ekigambo kya Mukama ne kigenda nga kyeyongera okubuna n'okunywera. 
Acts19:21 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Pawulo n'ateesa okuyita mu Makedooniya ne mu Akaya, alyoke agende e Yerusaalemu. N'agamba nti: “Bwe ndimala okutuukayo, nteekwa okugenda n'e Rooma.”" 
Acts19:22 N'atuma e Makedooniya babiri ku abo abaamuyambanga, Timoteewo ne Erasto, kyokka ye n'agira ng'akyasigadde mu Asiya." 
Acts19:23 Mu kiseera ekyo ne wabaawo akeegugungo ak'amaanyi mu Efeso, olw'Ekkubo lya Mukama." 
Acts19:24 Omusajja ayitibwa Demetiriyo omuweesi, eyakolanga obusabo obwa ffeeza obwa lubaale omukazi Arutemi, omulimu gwe gwaleeteranga abaweesi obugagga bungi." 
Acts19:25 Oyo n'akuŋŋaanya abaweesi bonna abaakolanga omulimu ogwo, n'agamba nti: “Bannange, mumanyi ng'obugagga bwaffe buva mu mulimu guno." 
Acts19:26 Naye mulaba era muwulira nga Pawulo asenzesenze, era akyusizza abantu bangi, si mu Efeso mwokka naye ne mu Asiya yonna, ng'agamba nti: ‘Abakolebwa abantu si Katonda.’" 
Acts19:27 Tuli mu kabi, si lwa mulimu gwaffe kunyoomebwa kyokka, naye abantu bajja kunyoomoola essabo lya lubaale omukazi Arutemi oweekitiibwa, asinzibwa Asiya yonna n'ensi endala zonna, era ekitiibwa kye kijja kuggwaawo.”" 
Acts19:28 Bwe baawulira ebyo ne bajjula obusungu, ne baleekaana nti: “Arutemi w'Abeefeso mukulu!”" 
Acts19:29 Awo ekibuga kyonna ne kibuna akatabanguko. Abantu ne bakwata Gaayo ne Arisitaruuko ab'e Makedooniya abaatambulanga ne Pawulo. Abantu bonna ne bafubutuka, ne beeyiwa mu kifo ky'emizannyo." 
Acts19:30 Pawulo n'ayagala okugenda eri ekibiina ky'abantu, kyokka abayigirizwa ne bamugaana." 
Acts19:31 N'abamu ku bakungu ab'omu Asiya, abaali mikwano gye, ne bamutumira nga bamusaba aleme kugezaako kugenda mu kifo ky'emizannyo," 
Acts19:32 kubanga abantu baali mu kajagalalo, nga baleekaana, abamu nga boogera kino, abalala nga boogera kiri, era bangi baali tebamanyi na nsonga ebakuŋŋaanyizza." 
Acts19:33 Ne baggya Alekizanda mu kibiina ky'abantu, Abayudaaya nga bamusindiikiriza. Awo Alekizanda n'abawenya n'omukono, yennyonnyoleko eri abantu." 
Acts19:34 Naye bwe baamanya nga Muyudaaya ne baleekaanira wamu okumala essaawa nga bbiri, nga bagamba nti: “Arutemi w'Abeefeso mukulu!”" 
Acts19:35 Omuwandiisi w'ekibuga bwe yasirisa abantu, n'agamba nti: “Abasajja Abeefeso, ani atamanyi ng'ekibuga ky'Abeefeso kye kikuuma essabo lya Arutemi Oweekitiibwa, awamu n'ekifaananyi kye ekyava mu ggulu?" 
Acts19:36 Kale ekyo nga bwe watali ayinza kukiwakanya, musaanidde okukkakkana, muleme kukola kintu kyonna mu kwanguyiriza," 
Acts19:37 kubanga muleese abantu bano abatanyaze bya mu ssabo, era abatavumye lubaale waffe omukazi." 
Acts19:38 Kale oba nga Demetiriyo ne baweesi banne balina gwe bavunaana, enkiiko weeziri n'abalamuzi weebali, eyo gye baba bawoleza." 
Acts19:39 Naye oba nga mulina ekirala kye muvunaana, kinaatereezebwa mu lukuŋŋaana olubaawo bulijjo," 
Acts19:40 kubanga tuyinza okuvunaanibwa olw'akeegugungo kano aka leero. Tetulina nsonga gye tuyinza kuwa olw'olukuŋŋaana luno.” 
Acts19:41 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'agumbulula abantu." 
Acts20:1 Akeegugungo bwe kakkakkana, Pawulo n'atumya abakkiriza n'abagumya, n'abasiibula, n'avaayo n'agenda e Makedooniya." 
Acts20:2 Bwe yamala okuyita mu bitundu ebyo, ng'agenda ababuulira ebigambo eby'okubagumya, n'atuuka e Buyonaani," 
Acts20:3 n'amalayo emyezi esatu. Bwe yali ng'anaatera okusaabala okugenda e Siriya, Abayudaaya ne bamusalira olukwe, kyeyava asalawo okuyita e Makedooniya." 
Acts20:4 N'awerekerwako Sopateri mutabani wa Puuro ow'e Beroya, ne Arisitaruuko ne Sekundo ab'e Tessalonika, ne Gaayo ow'e Derube, ne Timoteewo, ne Tukiko ne Turofimo ab'omu Asiya." 
Acts20:5 Abo ne batukulembera ne batulinda mu Turoowa. 
Acts20:6 Ennaku ez'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa bwe zaggwa, ne tusaabala okuva e Filippi. Bwe waayitawo ennaku ttaano, ne tubasisinkana mu Turoowa, gye twamala ennaku omusanvu." 
Acts20:7 Awo ku lunaku olwaddirira Sabbaato, bwe twakuŋŋaana okuliira awamu ng'abooluganda Pawulo nga bwe yali ow'okusitula enkeera, n'alwawo ng'ayogera nabo okutuusa ettumbi." 
Acts20:8 Mu kisenge mwe twakuŋŋaanira mwalimu ettaala nnyingi. 
Acts20:9 Pawulo bwe yalwawo ng'ayogera, omulenzi erinnya lye Ewutuuko, eyali atudde mu ddirisa, n'akwatibwa otulo tungi, n'awanuka mu kalina eyookusatu n'agwa wansi, ne bamuggyawo ng'afudde." 
Acts20:10 Pawulo n'akka, n'akutama w'ali n'amuwambaatira, n'agamba nti: “Temweraliikirira, akyalimu obulamu.”" 
Acts20:11 Awo n'addayo waggulu, n'amenyaamenyamu omugaati n'alyako, n'ayogera nabo okutuusiza ddala obudde okukya, n'alyoka avaayo." 
Acts20:12 Omulenzi ne bamuggyawo nga mulamu, ne basanyuka nnyo." 
Acts20:13 Ffe ne tusaabala mu lyato, ne tulaga mu Asso gye twali ab'okuggya Pawulo nga bwe yatulagira, kubanga ye yali wa kutuukayo ng'ayita ku lukalu." 
Acts20:14 Bwe yatusisinkana mu Asso, n'asaabala mu lyato ne tugenda e Mituleene." 
Acts20:15 Ne tusaabala ne tuvaayo. Ku lunaku olwaddirira ne tutuuka mu maaso ga Kiyo. Ate olwaddako ne tutuuka e Samo, enkeera ne tutuuka e Mileeto." 
Acts20:16 Pawulo yali ateesezza okuyita mu Efeso, aleme kulwa mu Asiya. Yayagala ayanguwe, Pentekoote bwe kiba kisobose, emusange mu Yerusaalemu." 
Acts20:17 Awo Pawulo bwe yali mu Mileeto, n'atumya mu Efeso, n'ayita abakulu b'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo bamusisinkane." 
Acts20:18 Bwe bajja, n'abagamba nti: “Mumanyi bulungi nga bwe nabeera nammwe okuviira ddala ku lunaku lwe natuukirako mu Asiya." 
Acts20:19 Naweereza Mukama n'obwetoowaze bwonna, era mumanyi nga bwe nabonaabona ennyo olw'enkwe Abayudaaya ze bansaliranga." 
Acts20:20 Mumanyi nga tewali kya mugaso na kimu kye saababuulira, era kye saabayigiriza mu maaso g'abantu bonna ne mu maka gammwe." 
Acts20:21 Nalabulanga Abayudaaya n'Abayonaani bakyuke okuva mu bibi byabwe, badde eri Katonda, era bakkirize Mukama waffe Yesu." 
Acts20:22 Kaakano ŋŋenda e Yerusaalemu, nga mpalirizibwa mu mwoyo, nga simanyi birimbaako." 
Acts20:23 Wabula Mwoyo Mutuukirivu antegeeza mu buli kibuga nti okusibibwa n'okubonyaabonyezebwa binnindiridde. 
Acts20:24 Naye sifaayo oba mba mulamu oba nfa, ekikulu kwe kutuukiriza omulimu Mukama Yesu gwe yankwasa, ogw'okutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi ag'ekisa kya Katonda." 
Acts20:25 “Kaakano nze mmanyi nga mmwe mwenna, be nayitaayitangamu nga mbategeeza Obwakabaka bwa Katonda, temukyaddayo kundaba." 
Acts20:26 Kyenva mbalumiriza, olwaleero nti bwe walibaawo azikirira, teguliba musango gwange," 
Acts20:27 kubanga saagayaala. Nabategeeza byonna Katonda by'abaagaza. 
Acts20:28 Mwekuume mmwe mwennyini, mukuume n'abantu bonna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu be yabakwasa. Mulabirirenga ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, Katonda kye yeefunira n'omusaayi ogugwe yennyini." 
Acts20:29 “Mmanyi nti bwe ndivaawo, abantu abali ng'emisege emikambwe baliyingira mu mmwe, ne batasaasira kibiina ky'abakkiriza." 
Acts20:30 Ne mu mmwe mulivaamu abantu abaliyigiriza eby'obulimba, basikirize abayigirizwa okubagoberera." 
Acts20:31 Kale mwekuume, era mujjukire nga bwe namala emyaka esatu, nga siyosa ekiro n'emisana okubuulirira buli omu mu mmwe, nga bwe nkaaba n'amaziga." 
Acts20:32 “Kaakano mbakwasa Katonda abakuume, n'ekigambo ekifa ku kisa kye kibayambenga kibazimbe, era kibafunyise omugabo awamu n'abo bonna abatukuzibwa." 
Acts20:33 Seegombanga ffeeza oba zaabu, wadde kyambalo kya muntu n'omu." 
Acts20:34 Mmwe mumanyi ng'emikono gyange gino, gye gyakolanga ebyo nze n'abo abaabanga nange bye twetaaganga." 
Acts20:35 Ebyo byonna nabikola okubalaga nti bwe tutyo bwe tusaana okukolanga emirimu, tulyoke tuyambenga abateeyinza, nga tujjukira ebigambo bya Mukama Yesu, eyagamba nti: ‘Okugaba kwa mukisa okusinga okuweebwa.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Pawulo bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'afukamira nabo bonna, ne beegayirira Katonda." 
Acts20:37 Bonna ne bakaaba nnyo amaziga, ne bawambaatira Pawulo, ne bamunywegera." 
Acts20:38 Ekyasinga okubanakuwaza kwe kubagamba nti tebakyaddayo kumulaba. Ne bamuwerekerako okumutuusa ku lyato. 
Acts21:1 Bwe twamala okwawukana nabo, ne tusaabala, ne tuseeyeeya butereevu okutuuka e Koosi. Ku lunaku olwaddirira ne tutuuka e Roodesi. Bwe twava eyo, ne tutuuka e Patara." 
Acts21:2 Eyo gye twasanga eryato eryali liraga e Foyinikiya, ne tulisaabala ne tugenda." 
Acts21:3 Bwe twalengera Kipuro, ne tukireka ku luuyi olwa kkono, ne tulaga e Siriya, ne tugoba e Tiiro, kubanga eyo gye baali baagala okutikkulira ebintu." 
Acts21:4 Eyo twasangayo abayigirizwa, ne tumalayo ennaku musanvu. Ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, abo ne bagamba Pawulo aleme kugenda Yerusaalemu." 
Acts21:5 Ennaku ezo bwe zaggwaako, ne tuvaayo. Bonna awamu n'abakazi n'abaana ne batuwerekerako okututuusa ebweru w'ekibuga. Ffenna ne tufukamira ku lubalama lw'ennyanja ne twegayirira Katonda." 
Acts21:6 Ne tusiibulagana, ffe ne tusaabala mu lyato, bo ne baddayo ewaabwe." 
Acts21:7 Bwe twamaliriza olugendo olw'oku nnyanja lwe twatandikira e Tiiro, ne tutuuka e Putolemaayi, ne tulamusa abooluganda, ne tumala nabo olunaku lumu." 
Acts21:8 Ku lunaku olwaddirira ne tuvaayo, ne tutuuka e Kayisaariya. Ne tuyingira mu nnyumba ya Filipo, eyategeezanga abantu Amawulire Amalungi, ne tubeera naye. Yali omu ku abo omusanvu abaalonderwa mu Yerusaalemu." 
Acts21:9 Yalina bawala be bana embeerera abaalanganga. 
Acts21:10 Bwe twamalayo ennaku eziwerako, Agabo omulanzi n'atuuka ng'ava e Buyudaaya." 
Acts21:11 N'ajja gye tuli, n'akwata olukoba lwa Pawulo, n'alwesiba amagulu n'emikono, n'agamba nti: “Mwoyo Mutuukirivu agamba nti: ‘Bwe batyo Abayudaaya abali e Yerusaalemu bwe balisiba nnannyini lukoba luno, era balimuwaayo eri ab'amawanga amalala.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Bwe twawulira ekyo, ffe n'abalala bonna abaaliwo, ne twegayirira Pawulo aleme kugenda Yerusaalemu." 
Acts21:13 Kyokka ye n'addamu nti: “Lwaki mukaaba okunafuya omutima gwange? Nze neetegese si kusibibwa kwokka, wabula n'okufiira mu Yerusaalemu, olw'erinnya lya Mukama Yesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Bwe twalemwa okumukkirizisa, ne tumuleka ne tugamba nti: “Mukama ky'ayagala kikolebwe.”" 
Acts21:15 Bwe waayitawo ennaku, ne twetegeka ne twambuka e Yerusaalemu." 
Acts21:16 Abamu ku bayigirizwa ab'omu Kayisaariya ne batuwerekera, ne batutuusa ew'omusajja ayitibwa Munasoni, ow'e Kipuro, omu ku bayigirizwa abaasooka, eyali ow'okutusuza." 
Acts21:17 Bwe twatuuka e Yerusaalemu, abayigirizwa ne batwaniriza n'essanyu." 
Acts21:18 Olunaku olwaddirira, Pawulo n'agenda wamu naffe ewa Yakobo. Abakulu bonna ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo baali bakuŋŋaanye." 
Acts21:19 Pawulo bwe yamala okubalamusa, n'abategeeza byonna Katonda bye yamukozesa mu b'amawanga amalala." 
Acts21:20 Bo bwe baabiwulira, ne bagulumiza Katonda. Kyokka ne bagamba Pawulo nti: “Owooluganda, naawe olaba nti waliwo Abayudaaya nkumi na nkumi abaakyuka ne bakkiriza era nga bonna bakyakuuma butiribiri amateeka ga Musa." 
Acts21:21 Bawulidde nti oyigiriza Abayudaaya bonna abali mu mawanga amalala okuleka amateeka ga Musa, era nti obagamba baleme okukomola abaana baabwe, wadde okugoberera empisa z'Ekiyudaaya." 
Acts21:22 Kale bibe bitya? Tebaaleme kuwulira ng'ozze. 
Acts21:23 N'olwekyo kola kino kye tukugamba. Tulina wano abasajja bana abeeyama obweyamo. 
Acts21:24 Batwale weetabe wamu nabo mu mukolo ogw'okutukuzibwa, era obasasulire, balyoke bamwebwe enviiri. Olwo abantu bonna banaamanya nti bye baawulira ku ggwe si bituufu, wabula nti okwata amateeka ga Musa." 
Acts21:25 Naye ab'amawanga amalala abakkiriza, twabawandiikira ne tubategeeza kye twasalawo nti baleme kulyanga biweereddwayo eri balubaale, wadde okulya omusaayi, oba ensolo etugiddwa, era beewale obwenzi.”" 
Acts21:26 Awo Pawulo n'atwala abasajja abo. Ku lunaku olwaddirira ne yeetaba wamu nabo mu mukolo ogw'okutukuzibwa. N'ayingira mu Ssinzizo okumanyisa ennaku ze banaamala mu kutukuzibwa, era n'ekiseera we banaaweerayo ekirabo ku lwa buli omu ku bo." 
Acts21:27 Awo ennaku omusanvu bwe zaali zinaatera okuggwaako, Abayudaaya abamu abaava mu Asiya, ne balaba Pawulo ng'ali mu Ssinzizo. Ne basasamaza abantu bonna, ne bakwata Pawulo" 
Acts21:28 nga bwe baleekaana nti: “Abasajja Abayisirayeli, mutuyambe! Ono ye muntu agenda ng'ayigiriza abantu mu buli kifo, banyoomoole eggwanga lyaffe, n'amateeka ga Musa, era n'ekifo kino. Ate kaakano aleese n'Abayonaani mu Ssinzizo, n'ayonoona ekifo kino ekitukuvu.”" 
Acts21:29 Ekyo baakyogera kubanga baali balabye Turofimo ow'e Efeso ng'ali ne Pawulo mu kibuga, ne bateerera nti Pawulo amuyingizizza mu Ssinzizo." 
Acts21:30 Ekibuga kyonna ne kitabanguka, abantu ne bagugumuka ne bakwata Pawulo ne bamuwalaawala, ne bamufulumya ebweru w'Essinzizo. Amangwago enzigi ne ziggalwawo." 
Acts21:31 Bwe baali basala amagezi okumutta, ebigambo ne bituuka eri omukulu w'abaserikale nti Yerusaalemu kyonna kijagaladde." 
Acts21:32 Teyalwa, n'atwala abaserikale n'abakulu baabwe, n'aserengeta eri ekibiina ky'abantu. Bo bwe baamulaba ng'ali n'abaserikale, ne balekera awo okukuba Pawulo." 
Acts21:33 Omukulu w'abaserikale n'agenda eri Pawulo n'amukwata, n'alagira asibibwe n'enjegere bbiri. N'abuuza nti: “Ono ye ani, era akoze ki?”" 
Acts21:34 Abamu mu kibiina ky'abantu ne baleekaana nga bagamba kino, abalala nga bagamba kirala. Olw'okuleekaana okwo, n'atasobola kumanya kituufu. N'alagira okutwala Pawulo mu kigo." 
Acts21:35 Pawulo bwe yatuusibwa ku madaala, abaserikale ne bamusitula, kubanga abantu baali beetabangudde." 
Acts21:36 Bonna baali bamugoberera nga bwe baleekaana nti: “Mutte!” 
Acts21:37 Pawulo bwe yali anaatera okuyingizibwa mu kigo, n'agamba omukulu w'abaserikale nti: “Onzikiriza mbeeko kye nkutegeeza?” Omukulu w'abaserikale n'amubuuza nti: “Omanyi Oluyonaani?" 
Acts21:38 Si ggwe Mumisiri oli eyaleeta akajagalalo mu nnaku ezo, n'atwala abantu abatemu enkumi ennya mu ddungu?”" 
Acts21:39 Pawulo n'addamu nti: “Nze ndi Muyudaaya, enzaalwa y'omu Taruso eky'omu Kilikiya, ekimanyiddwa obulungi. Nkwegayiridde, nzikiriza mbeeko kye ŋŋamba abantu.”" 
Acts21:40 Bwe yamukkiriza, Pawulo n'ayimirira ku madaala, n'abawenya n'omukono. Bwe baasiriikirira, n'ayogera nabo mu lulimi Olwebureeyi, n'agamba nti:" 
Acts22:1 “Abasajja abooluganda era bassebo, muwulire ensonga gye mbawoleza kaakano.”" 
Acts22:2 Bwe baawulira ng'ayogera Lwebureeyi, ne beeyongera okusirika. N'agamba nti:" 
Acts22:3 “Nze ndi Muyudaaya, enzaalwa y'omu Taruso eky'omu Kilikiya. Nakulira mu kibuga kino, ne njigirizibwa omusomesa Gamaliyeeli okukwata amateeka ga bajjajjaffe, ne njijumbira nnyo ebya Katonda, nga nammwe mwenna bwe mukola kati." 
Acts22:4 Ne njigganya ab'Ekkubo eryo okutuuka ne ku kubatta. Ne nkwata abasajja n'abakazi, ne mbateeka mu kkomera." 
Acts22:5 Ssaabakabona n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga bayinza okunjulira mu ekyo. Bo bampa n'ebbaluwa nzitwalire bannaabwe ab'omu Damasiko. Ne ŋŋenda okukwata abantu abo, mbaleete e Yerusaalemu nga basibe, babonerezebwe." 
Acts22:6 “Awo olwatuuka, bwe nali nga ntambula, nga nnaatera okutuuka e Damasiko nga mu ttuntu, amangwago okwakaayakana okw'amaanyi okwava mu ggulu ne kunneetooloola." 
Acts22:7 Ne ngwa wansi, ne mpulira eddoboozi eriŋŋamba nti: ‘Sawulo, Sawulo! Lwaki onjigganya?’" 
Acts22:8 Ne nziramu nti: ‘Ggwe ani Mukama wange?’ N'aŋŋamba nti ‘Nze Yesu Omunazaareeti gw'oyigganya.’ 
Acts22:9 Abantu abaali nange ne balaba okwakaayakana okw'amaanyi kyokka ne batawulira ddoboozi ly'oyo eyayogera nange. 
Acts22:10 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Nkole ki Mukama wange?’ Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Golokoka ogende e Damasiko, eyo gy'onootegeerezebwa byonna by'olagiddwa okukola.’" 
Acts22:11 Okwakaayakana okw'amaanyi ne kunziba amaaso. Abaali nange ne bankwata ku mukono, ne bantuusa mu Damasiko." 
Acts22:12 “Mu Damasiko mwalimu omusajja erinnya lye Ananiya, omwegendereza mu kukwata amateeka, era assibwamu ekitiibwa Abayudaaya baayo bonna." 
Acts22:13 N'ajja n'ayimirira we ndi, n'agamba nti: ‘Owooluganda Sawulo, zibuka amaaso.’ Mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini amaaso gange ne gazibuka, ne mmulaba." 
Acts22:14 N'agamba nti: ‘Katonda wa bajjajjaffe akulonze otegeere ky'ayagala, olabe Omutuukirivu we, era owulire eddoboozi lye," 
Acts22:15 kubanga ojja kumumanyisa mu bantu bonna ng'obategeeza ebyo by'owulidde era ne by'olabye. 
Acts22:16 Kale kaakano lwaki olwa? Situka obatizibwe, onaazibweko ebibi byo nga weegayirira Katonda.’" 
Acts22:17 “Bwe nali nga nkomyewo e Yerusaalemu era nga ndi mu Ssinzizo nsinza ne ndabikirwa nga ndi ng'aloota," 
Acts22:18 ne ndaba Mukama ng'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Yanguwa ove mangu mu Yerusaalemu, kubanga abaamu tebajja kukkiriza by'obategeeza ku lwange.’" 
Acts22:19 Ne nziramu nti: ‘Mukama wange, bo bennyini bamanyi nti abakukkiriza nabateekanga mu kkomera era nga nabakubiranga mu makuŋŋaaniro." 
Acts22:20 N'omujulirwa wo Siteefano bwe yattibwa, nange kennyini naliwo, era nassa kimu n'abo abaamutta, ne nkuuma n'engoye zaabwe.’" 
Acts22:21 Ye n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Genda, kubanga njija kukutuma wala mu b'amawanga amalala.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Abantu baamuwuliriza okutuusa lwe yayogera ekigambo ekyo. Olwo ne bayimusa amaloboozi gaabwe nga bagamba nti: “Muggyeewo, kubanga omuntu ow'engeri eyo tasaanidde kuba mulamu!”" 
Acts22:23 Bwe beeyongera okuleekaana nga bwe bakasuka n'engoye zaabwe waggulu, era nga bwe bafuumuula enfuufu mu bbanga," 
Acts22:24 omukulu w'abaserikale n'alagira batwale Pawulo mu kigo bamukubise embooko eriko amalobo agasuna, bazuule kye bamuvunaana, nga baleekaana bwe batyo." 
Acts22:25 Pawulo bwe baamala okumusiba n'enkoba, n'abuuza omukulu w'ekibinja ky'abaserikale eyali ayimiridde awo nti: “Mukkirizibwa okukuba omuntu Omurooma nga tannasalirwa musango kumusinga?”" 
Acts22:26 Omukulu w'ekibinja ky'abaserikale olwawulira ekyo, n'agenda eri omukulu w'abaserikale n'amugamba nti: “Ogenda kukola ki? Omusajja ono Murooma.”" 
Acts22:27 Awo omukulu w'abaserikale n'agenda eri Pawulo n'amugamba nti: “Mbuulira, oli Murooma?” Pawulo n'addamu nti: “Weewaawo.”" 
Acts22:28 Omukulu w'abaserikale n'addamu nti: “Nze okufuna Oburooma kyantwalako ebintu bingi.” Pawulo n'amugamba nti: “Nze nazaalibwa ndi Murooma.” 
Acts22:29 Amangwago, abo abaali bagenda okumubonyaabonya ne bamuleka, n'omukulu w'abaserikale bwe yamala okutegeera nti asibye Omurooma, n'atya." 
Acts22:30 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, omukulu w'abaserikale n'ayagala okumanya ensonga Abayudaaya gye bavunaana Pawulo. Kwe kumusumulula, era n'alagira bakabona abakulu n'ab'Olukiiko bonna okukuŋŋaana. N'aserengesa Pawulo n'amuteeka mu maaso gaabwe." 
Acts23:1 Pawulo ne yeekaliriza amaaso ab'Olukiiko, n'agamba nti: “Abasajja abooluganda, neegendereza okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero nga sirina kinnumya mutima mu maaso ga Katonda.”" 
Acts23:2 Awo Ssaabakabona Ananiya n'alagira abo abaali okumpi ne Pawulo bamukube emimwa. 
Acts23:3 Pawulo n'agamba nti: “Ggwe ekisenge ekyasiigibwa erangi enjeru, Katonda alikukuba. Otudde okunnamula ng'osinziira mu mateeka, ate n'olagira okunkuba sso ng'amateeka gakigaana.”" 
Acts23:4 Abo abaali bayimiridde okumpi ne bagamba nti: “Ovuma Ssaabakabona wa Katonda!” 
Acts23:5 Pawulo n'agamba nti: “Abooluganda, mbadde simanyi nga ye Ssaabakabona, kubanga ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: ‘Toyogeranga bubi ku mukulu wa ggwanga lyo.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Pawulo bwe yamanya ng'abali mu lukiiko, abamu Basaddukaayo, abalala nga Bafarisaayo, n'akangula ku ddoboozi, n'agamba nti: “Abooluganda, nze ndi Mufarisaayo, mwana w'Abafarisaayo. Mpozesebwa lwa kubanga nnina essuubi ery'okuzuukira kw'abafu.”" 
Acts23:7 Bwe yayogera ekyo, ne wasitukawo empaka wakati w'Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo. Olukiiko ne lwesalamu," 
Acts23:8 kubanga Abasaddukaayo bagamba nti tewali kuzuukira, tewali bamalayika, wadde emyoyo. Naye Abafarisaayo byonna ebyo babikkiriza." 
Acts23:9 Ne wabaawo okuyoogaana kungi, era abamu ku bannyonnyozi b'amateeka ab'omu kibiina ky'Abafarisaayo ne bayimirira, ne bawakana n'amaanyi nga bagamba nti: “Tetulaba kibi ku muntu ono. Kyandiba nga malayika oba omwoyo, gwe gwogedde naye.”" 
Acts23:10 Empaka bwe zaakalambira, omukulu w'abaserikale n'atya nti sikulwa nga Pawulo bamukutulamu. N'alagira abaserikale baserengete mu kibiina ky'abantu, bamubaggyeko lwa maanyi, bamutwale mu kigo." 
Acts23:11 Mu kiro ekyaddirira, Mukama n'ayimirira awali Pawulo n'amugamba nti: “Guma omwoyo, kubanga nga bwe wammanyisa mu Yerusaalemu, era bw'otyo bw'oteekwa okummanyisa ne mu Rooma.”" 
Acts23:12 Bwe bwakya enkya, Abayudaaya ne bakuŋŋaana ne bateesa ne beerayirira nga bwe bagamba nti tebajja kulya kantu konna wadde okunywa, nga tebanatta Pawulo." 
Acts23:13 Abaakola olukwe olwo bwe batyo, baali basukka mu makumi ana." 
Acts23:14 Awo ne bagenda eri bakabona abakulu n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne bagamba nti: “Twerayiridde obutakomba ku kantu nga tetunnaba kutta Pawulo." 
Acts23:15 Kale nno kaakano mmwe n'olukiiko, mutume eri omukulu w'abaserikale aserengese Pawulo gye muli, nga muli ng'abaagala okwongera okwetegereza ebimufaako. Ffe twetegese okumutta nga tannatuuka gye muli.”" 
Acts23:16 Kyokka mutabani wa mwannyina Pawulo n'ategeera olukwe lwabwe. N'agenda n'ayingira mu kigo, n'alabula Pawulo." 
Acts23:17 Pawulo n'ayita omu ku bakulu b'ebibinja by'abaserikale, n'amugamba nti: “Twala omuvubuka ono eri omukulu w'abaserikale, alina ky'ayagala okumubuulira.”" 
Acts23:18 N'amutwala, n'amutuusa eri omukulu w'abaserikale, n'agamba nti: “Omusibe Pawulo ampise, n'ansaba ndeete omuvubuka ono gy'oli, mbu alina ky'ayagala okukugamba.”" 
Acts23:19 Omukulu w'abaserikale n'akwata omuvubuka ku mukono, n'amuzza ku bbali, n'amubuuza nti: “Kiki ky'oyagala okuŋŋamba?”" 
Acts23:20 Ye n'agamba nti: “Abakulu b'Abayudaaya bateesezza okukusaba oserengese Pawulo mu lukiiko enkya, nga bali ng'abaagala okwongera okwetegereza ebimufaako." 
Acts23:21 Kyokka ggwe tobakkiriza, kubanga waliwo abasajja abasoba mu makumi ana, abajja okumuteega. Beerayiridde obutalya kantu konna wadde okunywa, nga tebannamutta. Era kaakano beeteeseteese, balindirira ky'onoogamba.”" 
Acts23:22 Omukulu w'abaserikale n'amusiibula, nga bw'amukuutira nti: “Tobaako omuntu n'omu gw'otegeeza nti ombuulidde ebigambo bino.”" 
Acts23:23 Awo omukulu w'abaserikale n'ayita babiri ku bakulu b'ebibinja n'agamba nti: “Mutegeke abaserikale ebikumi bibiri wamu n'ab'embalaasi nsanvu, n'ab'amafumu ebikumi bibiri, bagende e Kayisaariya ku ssaawa ssatu ez'ekiro." 
Acts23:24 Era mutegeke embalaasi ze banaatwalirako Pawulo, bamutuuse eri omufuzi Felikisi.”" 
Acts23:25 Olwo n'awandiika ebbaluwa egamba nti: 
Acts23:26 “Kulawudiyo Lusiya alamusa omufuzi oweekitiibwa ennyo Felikisi. 
Acts23:27 Abayudaaya baakwata omusajja oyo, era baali bagenda kumutta. Bwe nategeera nga Murooma, ne ŋŋenda n'abaserikale, ne mmubaggyako." 
Acts23:28 Olw'okwagala okumanya kye bamuvunaana ne mmutwala mu lukiiko lwabwe. 
Acts23:29 Ne nzuula nti talina kye yakola kimusaanyiza kufa, wadde okusibibwa mu kkomera." 
Acts23:30 Bwe nategeezebwa nti Abayudaaya baali bategese olukwe okumutta, ne nsalawo okumuweereza gy'oli. Ne ndagira abamuvunaana bajje bamuvunaanire mu maaso go.”" 
Acts23:31 Abaserikale ne bakola nga bwe baalagirwa. Ne batwala Pawulo ekiro ekyo, ne bamutuusa mu Antipatiri." 
Acts23:32 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, ne baleka ab'oku mbalaasi okugenda naye, bo ne baddayo mu kigo." 
Acts23:33 Bwe baamutuusa e Kayisaariya, ne bawa omufuzi ebbaluwa, ne bamukwasa ne Pawulo." 
Acts23:34 Bwe yagisoma, n'abuuza ekitundu Pawulo gy'asibuka. Bwe yamanya nga w'e Kilikiya," 
Acts23:35 n'amugamba nti: “Omusango gwo ndiguwulira abakuvunaana nga bazze.” N'alagira, Pawulo akuumirwe mu lubiri lwa Herode." 
Acts24:1 Bwe waayitawo ennaku ttaano, Ssaabakabona Ananiya n'agenda n'abamu ku bantu abakulu mu ggwanga, ne munnamateeka omu ayitibwa Terutuulo, ne bawawaabira Pawulo eri omufuzi." 
Acts24:2 Bwe yayitibwa, Terutuulo n'atandika okumulumiriza bw'ati: “Oweekitiibwa ennyo Felikisi, obukulembeze bwo obw'amagezi butuleetedde obutebenkevu, era buluŋŋamizza ebintu bingi." 
Acts24:3 Ekyo tukisiima bulijjo era mu buli kifo, nga tukwebaliza ddala nnyo." 
Acts24:4 Naye obutakulwisa nnyo, nkusaba otuwulirize katono olw'ekisa kyo." 
Acts24:5 “Omusajja ono twamuzuula nga muntu wa mutawaana. Ajeemesa Abayudaaya abali mu buli kifo, era ye mukulembeze w'ekibiina kya Banazaareeti." 
Acts24:6 Yagezaako n'okwonoona Essinzizo ne tumukwata, [tumusalire omusango ng'amateeka gaffe bwe gali." 
Acts24:7 Kyokka omukulu w'abaserikale Lusiya n'ajja n'amutuggyako lwa maanyi, n'alagira abamuvunaana okujja gy'oli.]" 
Acts24:8 Naawe wennyini bw'onoomubuuza ojja kumanya ebifa ku ebyo byonna bye tumuvunaana.” 
Acts24:9 Abayudaaya nabo ne bamuwagira nti bwe bityo bwe biri. 
Acts24:10 Pawulo, omufuzi bwe yamuwenya okwogera, n'agamba nti: “Ssebo mmanyi ng'omaze emyaka mingi ng'olamula abantu b'eggwanga lino. Njija kuwoza n'obuvumu." 
Acts24:11 “Ggwe wennyini bw'onoobuuza, ojja kuzuula nti ennaku tezinnayita kkumi na bbiri kasookedde nnyambuka e Yerusaalemu okusinza." 
Acts24:12 Tebansanga nga mpakana na muntu n'omu mu Ssinzizo, oba mu kkuŋŋaaniro oba mu kifo ekirala kyonna mu kibuga, nga nsasamaza abantu." 
Acts24:13 Era tebayinza kukuwa bukakafu bw'ebyo bye bannumiriza kaakano. 
Acts24:14 Wabula njatula kino mu maaso go nti nsinza Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, nga ngoberera Ekkubo bo lye bayita ekkyamu. Era nzikiriza ebyo byonna ebiri mu Mateeka ga Musa, n'ebyawandiikibwa abalanzi." 
Acts24:15 Nnina essuubi mu Katonda nabo bennyini lye balina nti abalungi n'ababi balizuukira," 
Acts24:16 kyenva nnyiikira bulijjo okuba n'omwoyo ogutalina musango eri Katonda n'eri abantu. 
Acts24:17 “Bwe waayitawo emyaka mingi, ne ŋŋenda mu Yerusaalemu okutwalira abaavu ab'omu ggwanga lyange eby'okubayamba, n'okuwaayo ebirabo." 
Acts24:18 Bwe nali nga nkola ebyo ne bansanga mu Ssinzizo, nga mmaze okukola omukolo ogw'okutukuzibwa. Saalina kibiina kya bantu, era tewaaliwo luyoogaano. Kyokka waaliwo Abayudaaya abamu abaava mu Asiya," 
Acts24:19 be bandisaanye okuba wano mu maaso go, bannumirize oba nga balina kye banvunaana." 
Acts24:20 Oba bano bennyini abali wano boogere oba nga balina omusango gwe baazuula ku nze bwe nawozesebwa mu lukiiko lwabwe," 
Acts24:21 okuggyako kino ekimu kyokka kye nayogera nga nnyimiridde mu bo nti: ‘Mumpozesa olwaleero, olw'okwogera ku kuzuukira kw'abafu.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Naye kubanga Felikisi yali amanyi eby'Ekkubo eryo, n'ayimiriza omusango ng'agamba nti: “Lukiya omukulu w'abaserikale bw'alijja, ne ndyoka nsala omusango gwammwe.”" 
Acts24:23 N'alagira omukulu w'ekibinja ky'abaserikale okukuuma Pawulo nga musibe, wabula ng'alekerwa eddembe era nga tewali mukwano gwe n'omu aziyizibwa kumuweereza." 
Acts24:24 Bwe waayitawo ennaku, Felikisi n'ajja ne Durusila mukazi we Omuyudaaya. N'atumya Pawulo n'amuwuliriza ng'ayogera ku bigambo by'okukkiriza Kristo Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Kyokka Pawulo bwe yali ng'annyonnyola ku butuukirivu ne ku muntu okwefuga, ne ku lunaku Katonda lw'agenda okusalirako omusango, Felikisi n'atya, n'agamba nti: “Kaakano genda, bwe ndifuna ebbanga ndikuyita.”" 
Acts24:26 Era muli yali asuubira nti Pawulo anaabaako ky'amuwa. Kyeyavanga amuyita emirundi emingi anyumye naye. 
Acts24:27 Bwe waayitawo emyaka ebiri, Porukiyo Festo n'atwala obukulu bwa Felikisi. Felikisi oyo olw'okwagala asiimibwe Abayudaaya, n'aleka Pawulo nga musibe." 
Acts25:1 Festo bwe yatuuka mu kitundu kye, n'amala ennaku ssatu, n'ava e Kayisaariya n'ayambuka e Yerusaalemu." 
Acts25:2 Bakabona abakulu n'abakungu b'Abayudaaya ne bamutegeeza bye bavunaana Pawulo. Ne basaba Festo ono 
Acts25:3 abakwatirwe ekisa, Pawulo aleetebwe e Yerusaalemu. Baali bategese olukwe okuttira Pawulo mu kkubo." 
Acts25:4 Festo n'addamu nti: “Pawulo akuumirwa mu Kayisaariya, era nze njija kuddayo mangu." 
Acts25:5 Kale abakulembeze mu mmwe bagende nange, oba ng'omusajja oyo yakola ekintu ekitasaana, bamulumirize.”" 
Acts25:6 Festo bwe yamala nabo ennaku nga munaana oba kkumi, n'aserengeta e Kayisaariya. Olunaku olwaddirira, n'atuula ku ntebe ey'obulamuzi, n'alagira baleete Pawulo." 
Acts25:7 Bwe yaleetebwa, Abayudaaya abaava e Yerusaalemu ne bayimirira nga bamwetoolodde, ne bamulumiriza emisango mingi era eminene, gye bataasobola kukakasa." 
Acts25:8 Pawulo ne yeerwanako n'agamba nti: “Sikolanga kintu na kimu ekimenya amateeka g'Abayudaaya, oba ekyonoona Essinzizo, wadde okujeemera Kayisaari.”" 
Acts25:9 Festo olw'okwagala okusiimibwa Abayudaaya, n'agamba Pawulo nti: “Oyagala okugenda e Yerusaalemu owozesebwe eyo emisango gino mu maaso gange?”" 
Acts25:10 Pawulo n'agamba nti: “Nnyimiridde mu maaso g'entebe ya Kayisaari ey'obulamuzi, era we nteekwa okuwozesebwa. Sirina kintu na kimu kye nasobya ku Bayudaaya, nga naawe bw'omanyidde ddala obulungi." 
Acts25:11 Oba nga namenya etteeka, ne nkola ekintu ekinsaanyiza okuweebwa ekibonerezo eky'okuttibwa, sigaana kufa. Naye oba nga bye bannumiriza si bya mazima, tewali ayinza kumpaayo gye bali. Njulidde Kayisaari.”" 
Acts25:12 Awo Festo bwe yamala okuteesaamu n'ab'olukiiko n'addamu nti: “Ojulidde Kayisaari, kale eri Kayisaari gy'oligenda.”" 
Acts25:13 Bwe waayitawo ennaku ntonotono, Kabaka Agripa ne mukazi we Berunike ne bajja e Kayisaariya okwaniriza Festo." 
Acts25:14 Bwe baamalayo ennaku eziwera, Festo n'ayogera ku Pawulo, n'agamba nti: “Wano waliwo omusajja, Felikisi gwe yaleka nga musibe." 
Acts25:15 Bwe nagenda e Yerusaalemu, bakabona abakulu n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga ly'Abayudaaya ne bamulumiriza, ne basaba mmusalire omusango okumusinga." 
Acts25:16 Nze ne mbaddamu nti: ‘Si mpisa y'Abarooma okusalira omuntu omusango okumusinga, nga tannasisinkana na bamuwawaabira, n'asobola okwerwanako mu musango gwe bamuvunaana.’" 
Acts25:17 “N'olwekyo bwe bajja wano, ssaalwa. Ku lunaku olwaddirira, ne ntuula mu ntebe ey'obulamuzi, ne ndagira baleete omusajja oyo." 
Acts25:18 Abamuvunaana bwe baayimirira ne batamuvunaana musango na gumu omubi, nga nze bwe nali ndowooza." 
Acts25:19 Wabula baawakana naye ku bintu ebimu ebifa ku ddiini yaabwe, ne ku muntu Yesu eyafa, Pawulo ye gw'ategeeza abantu mulamu." 
Acts25:20 “Bwe nasoberwa ku bigambo ebyo, ne mmubuuza oba ng'ayagala okugenda e Yerusaalemu awoleze eyo emisango egyo." 
Acts25:21 Kyokka Pawulo n'ajulira, n'asaba akuumibwe okutuusa Kayisaari lw'alimusalira omusango. Nze kwe kulagira akuumibwe okutuusa lwe ndimuweereza ewa Kayisaari.”" 
Acts25:22 Agripa n'agamba Festo nti: “Nange nandyagadde okuwulira omuntu oyo.” Festo n'addamu nti: “Onoomuwulira enkya.” 
Acts25:23 Enkeera Agripa ne Berunike ne bajjira mu kitiibwa kinene, ne bayingira mu kifo awasalirwa emisango, nga bali wamu n'abakulu b'abaserikale n'abantu abeekitiibwa mu kibuga ekyo. Festo n'alagira, Pawulo n'aleetebwa." 
Acts25:24 Awo Festo n'agamba nti: “Kabaka Agripa, era nammwe mwenna abali naffe wano, mulaba omusajja ono, Abayudaaya bonna gwe bansaba mu Yerusaalemu ne wano, nga baleekaana nti: ‘Tasaana kuba mulamu!’" 
Acts25:25 Naye nze nalaba nti talina kye yakola kimusaanyiza kuttibwa. Kyokka bwe yajulira Kayisaari, ne nsalawo okumuweerezaayo." 
Acts25:26 Wabula sirina kikakafu kye nnaawandiikira mukama wange. Kyenvudde mmuleeta mu maaso gammwe, naddala mu maaso go Kabaka Agripa. Bw'anaamala okubuuzibwa, ndyoke nfune kye mpandiika," 
Acts25:27 kubanga ndaba nga si kituufu okuweereza omusibe n'otolaga bimuvunaanibwa.” 
Acts26:1 Agripa n'agamba Pawulo nti: “Okkiriziddwa okuwoza.” Awo Pawulo n'agolola omukono, n'atandika okuwoza nti:" 
Acts26:2 “Kabaka Agripa, neesiimye nnyo okuwoleza mu maaso go olwaleero ebyo byonna Abayudaaya bye banvunaana," 
Acts26:3 n'okusingira ddala kubanga omanyi bulungi empisa z'Abayudaaya, n'ebyo bye bawakanamu, n'enjawukana zaabwe. Kyenva nkwegayirira ompulirize n'obugumiikiriza." 
Acts26:4 “Abayudaaya bonna bamanyi obulamu bwange okuva mu buto. Bamanyi nga bwe nabeera okuva olubereberye nga ndi mu bantu bange, era ne bwe nali mu Yerusaalemu." 
Acts26:5 Okuva edda bamanyi, era singa baagala, bayinza okukakasa nga okuva olubereberye nali mu kibiina ekisingira ddala okukwata eddiini yaffe, nali Mufarisaayo." 
Acts26:6 Kaakano nnyimiridde wano okusalirwa omusango kubanga nsuubira ekyo Katonda kye yasuubiza bajjajjaffe," 
Acts26:7 era ebika byaffe ekkumi n'ebibiri kye birindirira nga bisinza Katonda emisana n'ekiro. Olw'okusuubira bwe ntyo, Abayudaaya kyebavudde bampawaabira, ayi kabaka." 
Acts26:8 Lwaki mugamba nti Katonda okuzuukiza abafu kye kintu kye mutayinza kukkiriza? 
Acts26:9 “Nze nzennyini nalowoozanga nti nteekwa okukola kyonna kye nsobola okuyigganya erinnya lya Yesu Omunazaareeti. 
Acts26:10 Era ekyo kye nakola mu Yerusaalemu. Nafuna obuyinza okuva eri bakabona abakulu, ne nteeka abakkiriza bangi mu kkomera, era bwe baasalirwanga emisango egy'okuttibwa, nange nasiimanga." 
Acts26:11 Emirundi mingi nababonerezanga mu makuŋŋaaniro gonna, nga mbawaliriza beegaane enzikiriza yaabwe. Ate bwe neeyongera okubasunguwalira, ne mbayigganyanga ne mu bibuga eby'ebweru." 
Acts26:12 “Bwe nali ku ekyo, nga ŋŋenda e Damasiko, nga mmaze okufuna obuyinza n'ebiragiro okuva eri bakabona abakulu, ayi kabaka, nga ndi mu kkubo" 
Acts26:13 mu budde obw'ettuntu, ne ndaba okwakaayakana okwava mu ggulu nga kusinga okwaka kw'enjuba, ne kunneetooloola nze n'abaali nange mu lugendo." 
Acts26:14 Ffenna ne tugwa wansi. Ne mpulira eddoboozi eriŋŋamba mu lulimi Olwebureeyi nti: ‘Sawulo, Sawulo! Lwaki onjigganya? Kirumya ggwe okusamba ku miwunda.’" 
Acts26:15 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ggwe ani Mukama wange?’ Mukama n'addamu nti: ‘Nze Yesu gw'oyigganya. 
Acts26:16 Kyokka golokoka oyimirire. Nkulabikidde ndyoke nkufuule omuweereza wange, akakasa ebyo mw'ondabidde, n'ebyo mwe nnaakulabikiranga." 
Acts26:17 Ndikuwonya abantu b'eggwanga lyo n'ab'amawanga amalala gye ndikutuma 
Acts26:18 okubazibula amaaso, balyoke bave mu kizikiza, badde mu kitangaala, era bave mu buyinza bwa Sitaani, badde eri Katonda, balyoke basonyiyibwe ebibi byabwe, era bafunire wamu omugabo n'abo abatukuzibwa olw'okukkiriza.’" 
Acts26:19 “N'olwekyo, Kabaka Agripa, saawakanya kulabikirwa okwava mu ggulu." 
Acts26:20 Nasookera ku b'omu Damasiko, nzuuyo ku b'omu Yerusaalemu, ne ku b'omu Buyudaaya bwonna ne ku b'amawanga amalala, ne mbategeeza beenenye, badde eri Katonda, era bakole ebikolwa ebiraga nti beenenyezza." 
Acts26:21 Abayudaaya kyebaava bankwata nga ndi mu Ssinzizo, ne bagezaako okunzita." 
Acts26:22 Kyokka Katonda ankuumye okutuusa ku lunaku lwaleero, era nnyimiridde nga ntegeeza abakulu n'abato ebyo byennyini abalanzi ne Musa bye baayogera nti bigenda kubaawo." 
Acts26:23 Baagamba nti Kristo ateekwa okubonyaabonyezebwa abe omubereberye mu kuzuukira, atuuse ku Bayudaaya ne ku b'amawanga amalala ekitangaala eky'obulokozi.”" 
Acts26:24 Pawulo bwe yawoza bw'atyo, Festo n'agamba n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Pawulo olaluse! Ebingi bye wayiga bikulalusizza.”" 
Acts26:25 Pawulo n'agamba nti: “Oweekitiibwa Festo, siraluse. Ebigambo bye njogera bya mazima era bya magezi." 
Acts26:26 Kabaka bino abimanyi era mbimubuulira nga sitya, kubanga nkakasa nti tewali na kimu ku byo ky'atamanyi, kubanga tebyakolebwa mu nkiso." 
Acts26:27 Kabaka Agripa, okkiriza abalanzi? Mmanyi ng'obakkiriza.”" 
Acts26:28 Agripa n'agamba Pawulo nti: “Mu kaseera akatono oyagala okunsendasenda onfuule omugoberezi wa Kristo!” 
Acts26:29 Pawulo n'agamba nti: “Akaseera ne bwe kaba katono oba kanene, nze kye nsaba Katonda, si ggwe wekka naye n'abo bonna abampuliriza olwaleero, bafuuke nga nze, okuggyako okusibibwa kuno.”" 
Acts26:30 Awo kabaka, n'omufuzi, ne Berunike, n'abalala bonna, ne basituka." 
Acts26:31 Bwe baafuluma ne bagambagana nti: “Omuntu oyo takolanga kintu na kimu kimusaanyiza kufa oba kusibibwa.” 
Acts26:32 Agripa n'agamba nti: “Omuntu oyo yanditeereddwa singa teyajulira wa Kayisaari.” 
Acts27:1 Awo bwe kyamala okusalibwawo tuyite ku nnyanja okugenda mu Yitaliya, Pawulo n'abasibe abalala ne baweebwayo eri Yuliyo omukulu w'ekibinja ky'abaserikale, ekiyitibwa ekya Agusto." 
Acts27:2 Ne tusaabala mu lyato ery'e Aduramitiyo eryali ligenda okuyita ku lubalama lw'Asiya. Ne tuseeyeeya nga tuli ne Arisitaruuko Omumakedooniya ow'e Tessalonika. 
Acts27:3 Olunaku olwaddirira ne tugoba e Sidoni. Yuliyo n'ayisa bulungi Pawulo, n'amukkiriza okugenda eri mikwano gye okumulabirira." 
Acts27:4 Bwe twavaayo ne tuyita ku mabbali ga Kipuro olw'okwebalama omuyaga ogwali gutuva mu maaso. 
Acts27:5 Ne tusala ennyanja ey'e Kilikiya ne Panfiliya, ne tugoba e Miira eky'omu Lukiya." 
Acts27:6 Eyo omukulu w'ekibinja ky'abaserikale gye yasanga eryato ery'e Alekisanderiya nga liraga mu Yitaliya, n'atusaabaza omwo." 
Acts27:7 Ne tumala ennaku nnyingi nga tugenda tuseeyeeya mpola, okutuusa lwe twatuuka okumpi ne Kuniido nga tuyise mu buzibu. Omuyaga bwe gwatuziyiza okutuukayo, ne tuyita ku mabbali ga Kureete, mu maaso ga Salumooni." 
Acts27:8 Ne tuyitira ddala kumpi nakyo nga tutegana, okutuusa lwe twatuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Emyalo Emirungi, ekiri okumpi n'ekibuga Lasaya." 
Acts27:9 Ennaku nnyingi bwe zaayitawo nga n'olugendo lw'ennyanja lufuuse lwa kabi, kubanga n'ennaku ez'okusiiba zaali ziyise, Pawulo n'abalabula" 
Acts27:10 ng'agamba nti: “Bassebo, ndaba nti olugendo luno lujja kuba lwa kabi era lujja kuba lwa kufiirwa, si bintu byokka na lyato, wabula n'obulamu bw'abantu.”" 
Acts27:11 Kyokka omukulu w'abaserikale n'akkiriza omugoba ne nnannyini lyato bye baateesa, okusinga ebyo Pawulo bye yayogera." 
Acts27:12 Ate omwalo nga bwe gutaali mulungi kwewogomamu obudde obw'obutiti, ne basiima beeyongereyo, oba kisoboka batuuke e Foyiniiki, omwalo gw'e Kureete ogutunuulira wakati w'ebukiikakkono n'ebuvanjuba, ne wakati w'ebukiikaddyo n'ebuvanjuba." 
Acts27:13 Empewo eziva mu bukiikaddyo bwe zaatandika okukunta, ne balowooza nti bafunye kye babadde beetaaga, ne basimbula eryato, ne baseeyeeya nga bagenda bayita kumpi ddala n'olubalama lwa Kureete." 
Acts27:14 Kyokka waayitawo ebbanga ttono, omuyaga ogw'amaanyi oguva mu bukiikakkono ne gukunta nga guva ku kizinga." 
Acts27:15 Eryato ne liremwa okugenda mu maaso gye guva. Bwe lyalemwa, ne tulireka ne litwalibwa omuyaga." 
Acts27:16 Ne tutwalibwa ku mabbali g'ekizinga ekiyitibwa Kawuda, ne tuwonya akaato akaali kasibiddwa ku lyato, naye nga tumaze kutegana nnyo." 
Acts27:17 Bwe baamala okukalinnyisa, ne bakwata emiguwa ne bagyetoolooza eryato, ne balisiba. Bwe baatya okulemera mu musenyu ogw'e Suriti ne bassa amatanga, ne baleka eryato litwalibwe omuyaga." 
Acts27:18 Bwe twategana ennyo n'omuyaga, ku lunaku olwaddirira ne batandika okusuula ebintu ebimu mu nnyanja." 
Acts27:19 Ate ku lwaddako ne basuula n'emikono gyabwe ebimu ku bye bavugisa eryato. 
Acts27:20 Bwe waayitawo ennaku nnyingi ng'enjuba wadde emmunyeenye tebirabikako era nga n'omuyaga gwe tulimu muyitirivu, essuubi lyonna ery'okuwona ne lituggwaamu." 
Acts27:21 Bwe baamala ebbanga eddene nga tebalya, Pawulo n'ayimirira wakati mu bo n'agamba nti: “Bassebo, singa mwampuliriza ne mutava Kureete, okwonoonekerwa kuno n'okufiirwa tekwandibaddewo." 
Acts27:22 Kaakano mbasaba mugume omwoyo, kubanga tewali n'omu mu mmwe anaafa, wabula eryato lye lijja okuzikirira," 
Acts27:23 kubanga ekiro ekyayise malayika wa Katonda wange gwe mpeereza 
Acts27:24 yayimiridde we ndi n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Pawulo, totya, oteekwa okuyimirira mu maaso ga Kayisaari. Era ku lulwo Katonda ajja kukuuma n'abo bonna abali naawe mu lyato.’" 
Acts27:25 Kale bannange mugume emyoyo kubanga neesiga Katonda nga kinaaba bwe kityo nga bw'akiŋŋambye. 
Acts27:26 Wabula tujja kusuulibwa ku kizinga.” 
Acts27:27 Nga mu ttumbi mu kiro eky'ekkumi n'ebina bwe twali nga tusuukundibwa omuyaga mu nnyanja Adiriya, abavuga eryato ne bateebereza nti tunaatera okusemberera olukalu." 
Acts27:28 Bwe baasuula ekipima, ne balaba ng'obuwanvu bw'amazzi buli mita amakumi ana. Ate bwe tweyongerayo mu maaso, ne bapima, ne balaba nga ziri mita amakumi asatu." 
Acts27:29 Bwe baatya okutomera olwazi, ne bassa ennanga nnya ku luuyi olw'ekitundu eky'emabega, ne balindirira obudde bukye." 
Acts27:30 Abavuga eryato bwe baali bagezaako okudduka bave mu lyato, nga bamaze okussa akaato mu nnyanja nga beefuula ng'abagenda okusuula ennanga ku luuyi olw'ekitundu eky'omu maaso," 
Acts27:31 Pawulo n'agamba abaserikale n'omukulu waabwe nti: “Abantu abo bwe bataasigale mu lyato, mmwe temuli ba kuwona.”" 
Acts27:32 Awo abaserikale ne basala emiguwa gy'akaato, ne bakaleka ne kagenda." 
Acts27:33 Bwe bwali bunaatera okukya, Pawulo n'abeegayirira bonna balye ku mmere, ng'agamba nti: “Luno olunaku lwa kkumi na nnya nga mweraliikirira ne mutalya kantu." 
Acts27:34 Mbeegayirira mulye, muleme okufa enjala. Era tewali kabi kanaabatuukako.”" 
Acts27:35 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'atoola omugaati ne yeebaza Katonda nga bonna balaba, n'agumenyaamenyamu, n'atandika okulya." 
Acts27:36 Olwo bonna ne baguma omwoyo, nabo ne balya emmere." 
Acts27:37 Ffenna abaali mu lyato, twali abantu ebikumi bibiri mu nsanvu mu mukaaga." 
Acts27:38 Bwe baamala okukkuta emmere, ne bateewuluza ku lyato nga basuula eŋŋaano mu nnyanja." 
Acts27:39 Obudde bwe bwakya enkya, ne batamanya nsi gye batuuseeko, naye ne balaba ekikono ky'ennyanja awali omwalo oguliko omusenyu, ne bateesa bagobye okwo eryato singa kisoboka." 
Acts27:40 Ne bakutula ennanga, ne bazireka mu nnyanja, era mu kiseera ekyo, ne basumulula emiguwa gy'enkasi. Era ne bawanika ettanga ery'omu maaso, empewo eryoke eseeyeeyese eryato, ne boolekera olukalu." 
Acts27:41 Kyokka bwe baatuuka mu kifo engezi we zisisinkanira, eryato ne litubira mu musenyu. Ekitundu eky'omu maaso ne kiyingira muli ne kinywera, ne kitasobola kunyeenya. Ekitundu eky'emabega ne kitandika okwabika olw'amaanyi g'amayengo." 
Acts27:42 Abaserikale ne bateesa okutta abasibe, sikulwa ng'abamu bawuga ne babomba." 
Acts27:43 Kyokka omukulu w'abaserikale n'abaziyiza olw'okwagala okuwonya Pawulo. Awo n'alagira abasobola okuwuga be baba basooka okwesuula mu mazzi bawuge batuuke ku lukalu," 
Acts27:44 abalala bagoberere nga batwalirwa ku mbaawo ne ku bitundutundu by'eryato. Bwe batyo bonna ne batuuka ku lukalu nga balamu. 
Acts28:1 Bwe twamala okuwona, ne tutegeera ng'ekizinga ekyo kiyitibwa Malita." 
Acts28:2 Bannansi baakwo baatukwatirwa ekisa ekitali kya bulijjo, kubanga enkuba yali etandise okutonnya, nga n'obudde bwa butiti, ne batukumira omuliro, ne batwaniriza ffenna." 
Acts28:3 Pawulo bwe yakuŋŋaanya omuganda gw'obuku n'agussa mu muliro, omusota ogw'obusagwa ne guvaamu olw'ebbugumu, ne gumwerippa ku mukono." 
Acts28:4 Bannansi bwe baalaba ng'omusota guleebeetera ku mukono gwe, ne bagambagana nti: “Mazima omuntu ono mutemu. Newaakubadde awonye ennyanja, omuwoolezi w'eggwanga tamuganya kubeera mulamu.”" 
Acts28:5 Kyokka Pawulo, omusota n'agukunkumulira mu muliro, n'atabaako kabi." 
Acts28:6 Bannansi ne balinda, nga balowooza nti anaazimba oba nti ajja kugwa awo afiirewo. Bwe baalwawo ennyo nga bamutunuulira, ne batalaba kabi kamubaddeko, ne beefukulula, ne bagamba nti: “Ono lubaale.”" 
Acts28:7 Okumpi n'ekifo ekyo, waaliwo ebyalo by'omusajja omwami w'ekizinga ekyo, erinnya lye Pubuliyo, eyatwaniriza n'atukyaza ewuwe okumala ennaku ssatu." 
Acts28:8 Awo olwatuuka, kitaawe n'akwatibwa omusujja n'ekiddukano eky'omusaayi. Pawulo n'ayingira gy'ali n'amusabira. Bwe yamussaako emikono, n'amuwonya." 
Acts28:9 Ekyo bwe kyakolebwa, abantu abalala abaali ku kizinga ekyo nga balwadde, nabo ne bajja ne bawonyezebwa." 
Acts28:10 Ne batuwa ekitiibwa kinene. Bwe twatuusa okusaabala okuvaayo ne batuleetera byonna bye twali twetaaga mu lugendo. 
Acts28:11 Bwe waayitawo emyezi esatu, ne tusaabala mu lyato ery'e Alekisanderiya, eryali limaze ebiseera eby'obutiti ku kizinga ekyo. Eryato eryo lyaliko ekifaananyi ky'Abalongo." 
Acts28:12 Ne tugoba ku Sirakuusa, ne tumalayo ennaku ssatu." 
Acts28:13 Bwe twavaayo, ne tugenda nga tubalama, ne tutuuka e Reegiyo. Bwe twamalayo olunaku lumu, empewo ey'ebukiikakkono n'ejja. Ku lunaku olwokubiri ne tutuuka e Putewoli." 
Acts28:14 Eyo twasangayo abooluganda, ne batuyita ne tumala nabo ennaku musanvu. Oluvannyuma ne tugenda e Rooma." 
Acts28:15 Abooluganda ab'omu Rooma bwe baawulira, ne bajja ku katale ka Apiyo ne ku Bisulo Ebisatu okutusisinkana. Pawulo bwe yabalaba, ne yeebaza Katonda, era n'aguma omwoyo." 
Acts28:16 Bwe twatuuka mu Rooma, Pawulo n'akkirizibwa okubeera yekka, ng'alina omuserikale amukuuma." 
Acts28:17 Bwe waayitawo ennaku ssatu, Pawulo n'ayita abakulu b'Abayudaaya abaali mu Rooma bakuŋŋaane. Bwe baakuŋŋaana, n'abagamba nti. “Abooluganda, newaakubadde nga sirina kibi kye nakola ggwanga lyaffe, wadde okusobya empisa ze twafuna okuva ku bajjajjaffe, nasibibwa ne mpeebwayo mu mikono gy'Abarooma mu Yerusaalemu." 
Acts28:18 Bwe bampozesa, ne baagala okunta, kubanga baazuula nga sikolanga kintu na kimu ekinsaanyiza okuttibwa." 
Acts28:19 Kyokka Abayudaaya bwe baakiwakanya, ne mpalirizibwa okujulira eri Kayisaari, newaakubadde nga saalina kye nvunaana ggwanga lyange." 
Acts28:20 Kale olw'ensonga eyo, mbayise mbalabe era njogereko nammwe, kubanga nsibiddwa mu njegere zino, olw'oyo abantu ba Yisirayeli gwe basuubira.”" 
Acts28:21 Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Tetufunanga bbaluwa n'emu kuva Buyudaaya ekwogerako, wadde omu ku booluganda okujja okutubuulira, oba okwogera ekibi ku ggwe." 
Acts28:22 Naye twandyagadde okumanya ggwe by'olowooza, kubanga tumanyi nti buli wantu ekibiina ekyo bakiwakanya.”" 
Acts28:23 Ne bamulagaanya olunaku olulala, era ku olwo ne bajja bangi mu nnyumba mwe yasulanga. N'abannyonnyola ng'abategeeza eby'Obwakabaka bwa Katonda, era n'anyiikira okubakkirizisa Yesu ng'ajuliza eby'omu Mateeka agaaweebwa Musa, n'ebyawandiikibwa abalanzi. Ekyo yakikola okuva enkya okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Acts28:24 Abamu ne bakkiriza olw'ebyo bye yayogera, kyokka abalala ne batakkiriza." 
Acts28:25 Ne balemwa okukkiriziganya, ne baabuka nga Pawulo amaze okubagamba kino nti: “Mwoyo Mutuukirivu yali mutuufu bwe yagamba bajjajjammwe ng'ayita mu mulanzi Yisaaya eyagamba nti:" 
Acts28:26 ‘Genda eri abantu abo obagambe nti: Weewaawo muliwulira, naye temulitegeera. Weewaawo mulitunula, naye temulyetegereza." 
Acts28:27 Omutima gw'abantu bano gugubye, n'amatu gaabwe gazibikidde, n'amaaso gaabwe bagazibirizza, sikulwa nga balaba n'amaaso, nga bawulira n'amatu, nga bategeera n'omutima, ne bakyuka, ne mbawonya.’" 
Acts28:28 “Kale mutegeere nti obulokozi bwa Katonda buno buweerezeddwa eri ab'amawanga amalala. Bo baliwuliriza.” [ 
Acts28:29 Pawulo bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, Abayudaaya ne bagenda nga bawakana nnyo bokka na bokka.]" 
Acts28:30 Pawulo n'amala emyaka ebiri miramba ng'ali mu nnyumba gye yapangisa, n'ayanirizanga bonna abajjanga gy'ali." 
Acts28:31 N'abategeezanga eby'Obwakabaka bwa Katonda, era n'abayigirizanga ebifa ku Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, ng'ayogera n'obuvumu era nga tewali amuziyiza." 
Romans1:1 Nze Pawulo omuweereza wa Kristo Yesu, nayitibwa okuba omutume, ne nnondebwa okubunyisa Amawulire Amalungi agava eri Katonda." 
Romans1:2 Amawulire Amalungi ago Katonda ge yasuubiriza edda mu byawandiikibwa, ng'ayita mu balanzi be," 
Romans1:3 agafa ku Mwana we. Ng'omuntu, Omwana oyo yazaalibwa nga muzzukulu wa Dawudi." 
Romans1:4 Kyokka olw'obuyinza bwe, obusibuka mu butukuvu bwe yalina mu mwoyo, era n'olw'okuzuukira kwe, yakakasibwa nti Mwana wa Katonda. Ye Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe," 
Romans1:5 eyatukwatirwa ekisa ne tuba abatume, tutuuse amawanga gonna ku buwulize obuva mu kumukkiriza." 
Romans1:6 Nammwe muli mu abo, abaayitibwa okuba aba Yesu Kristo." 
Romans1:7 Mmwe mwenna abaagalwa ba Katonda abali e Rooma, era abaayitibwa okuba abantu be, Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo babakwatirwe mmwe ekisa, era babawe emirembe." 
Romans1:8 Okusooka, neebaza Katonda wange nga mpita mu Yesu Kristo, ku lwammwe mwenna, kubanga okukkiriza kwammwe kwogerwako mu nsi yonna." 
Romans1:9 Katonda gwe mpeereza n'omutima gwange gwonna, nga ntegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi ag'Omwana we, ye alaba bwe mbajjukira bulijjo mu ssaala zange," 
Romans1:10 nga mmwegayirira nti ye bw'asiima, ntambule bulungi, nsobole olumu okutuuka gye muli," 
Romans1:11 kubanga neegomba okubalabako, mbasobozese okufuna ekirabo ekigasa omwoyo." 
Romans1:12 Kwe kugamba: tusanyukire wamu olw'okukkiriza kwaffe, okwammwe n'okwange." 
Romans1:13 Abooluganda, njagala mumanye nti emirundi mingi nayagala okujja gye muli, nkole omulimu ogw'omugaso ne mu mmwe, nga bwe ngukola mu b'amawanga amalala. Naye n'okutuusa kaakano nkyalemeseddwa." 
Romans1:14 Nnina obuvunaanyizibwa okuyamba Abayonaani n'ab'amawanga agatannagunjuka, abayigirize n'abatali bayigirize." 
Romans1:15 Nammwe abali e Rooma, kyenva njagala ennyo okubategeeza Amawulire Amalungi." 
Romans1:16 Amawulire Amalungi tegankwasa nsonyi, kubanga ge maanyi ga Katonda agalokola bonna abakkiriza, ng'Abayudaaya be basooka, ne kuddako ab'amawanga amalala." 
Romans1:17 Mu Mawulire Amalungi, obutuukirivu obuva eri Katonda mwe bulabikira. Obutuukirivu obwo Katonda abutuwa lwa kukkiriza, era bweyongerera mu kukkiriza, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Omutuukirivu anaabeeranga mulamu lwa kukkiriza.”" 
Romans1:18 Katonda ng'asinziira mu ggulu, alaga bw'asunguwalira abantu bonna abatamussaamu kitiibwa era ababi, abaziyiza amazima okumanyibwa olw'empisa zaabwe embi." 
Romans1:19 Ebisoboka okumanyibwa ku Katonda, babiraba bulungi, kubanga Katonda yabibalaga." 
Romans1:20 Okuviira ddala ku kutondebwa kw'ensi, embeera ye eterabika, kwe kugamba obuyinza bwe obutaggwaawo era n'obwakatonda bwe, birabikira ddala bulungi, nga bitegeererwa mu ebyo bye yatonda. N'olwekyo tebalina kyakwewolereza," 
Romans1:21 kubanga newaakubadde nga Katonda baamumanya, kyokka tebaamussaamu kitiibwa nga Katonda, wadde okumwebaza, wabula ebirowoozo byabwe byadda mu bitagasa, emitima gyabwe emisirusiru ne gijjuzibwa ekizikiza." 
Romans1:22 Mu kweyita abagezi, baafuuka basiru." 
Romans1:23 Ekitiibwa kye bandiwadde Katonda ataggwaawo, ne bakiwa ebifaananyi by'abantu obuntu, n'eby'ebinyonyi, n'eby'ensolo, n'eby'ebyewalula." 
Romans1:24 Katonda kyeyava abaleka, emitima gyabwe ne girulunkanira eby'ensonyi, ne bawemula emibiri gyabwe bokka na bokka." 
Romans1:25 Baagaana amazima agafa ku Katonda, ne bakkiriza eby'obulimba, ne basinzanga, era ne baweerezanga ebitonde, mu kifo ky'Omutonzi atenderezebwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Romans1:26 Katonda kyeyava abaleka ne bafugibwa okwegomba kwabwe okubi: abakazi baabwe ne bagaana ebyo emibiri gyabwe bye gyatonderwa, ne bagikozesanga ebyo bye gitaatonderwa." 
Romans1:27 N'abasajja ne bakolanga bwe batyo: ne balekayo okumanyanga abakazi, ne babugujjanga okwegomba basajja bannaabwe, era ne bakolanga nabo eby'ensonyi, bwe batyo ne beereetera ekibonerezo ekigwanira okwonoona kwabwe." 
Romans1:28 Era nga bwe baagaana okumanya Katonda, ne Katonda kyeyava abaleka ne bagwagwawala emitima, ne bakolanga ebitasaana." 
Romans1:29 Bajjudde ebyonoono ebya buli ngeri, obubi, omululu, n'ettima. Bajjudde obuggya, obussi bw'abantu, obuyombi, n'okulowooza obubi ku balala. Bageya," 
Romans1:30 basalaganako ebigambo, bakyawa Katonda, bavuma bannaabwe, beekulumbaza, beewaanawaana, era banoonyereza amakubo ag'okukola ebibi. Tebawulira bazadde baabwe." 
Romans1:31 Basirusiru tebalina mazima, tebaagalana era tebalina kusaasira." 
Romans1:32 Newaakubadde bamanyi nga Katonda asala omusango nti abakola ebyo basaanidde kufa, naye babikola. Ate tebakoma ku kubikola kwokka, naye basiima n'abo ababikola." 
Romans2:1 Kale munnange ggwe asalira abalala omusango, ne bw'obeera ani, tolina kyakwewolereza. Mu kusalira abalala omusango, naawe oba ogwesalidde okukusinga, kubanga bo bye bakola, naawe agusala by'okolera ddala." 
Romans2:2 Tumanyi ng'abakola ebyo, Katonda abasalira omusango okubasinga, nga tasaliriza." 
Romans2:3 Kale ggwe munnange, asalira abakola ebyo omusango okubasinga, ate nga naawe by'okola, olowooza nti oliwona omusango Katonda gw'alisala?" 
Romans2:4 Oba, ekisa kya Katonda ekingi n'obukwatampola, n'okugumiikiriza kwe, by'ogaya? Tomanyi nga Katonda akukwatirwa ekisa olyoke weenenye?" 
Romans2:5 Naye olw'obukakanyavu bw'omutima gwo ogutayagala kwenenya, weeterekedde okusalirwa omusango n'obukambwe, ku lunaku Katonda lw'aliragirako obusungu bwe ng'asala omusango awatali kusaliriza." 
Romans2:6 Aliwa abantu bonna empeera, ng'asinziira ku bye baakola." 
Romans2:7 Abo abanyiikira okukola ebirungi nga baluubirira okufuna ekitiibwa n'ettendo n'obutafa, alibawa obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Romans2:8 Naye abo ab'empaka era abatagoberera mazima, ne bagoberera ekitali kituufu, Katonda alibasunguwalira, n'abakambuwalira." 
Romans2:9 Abantu bonna abakola ebibi balibonyaabonyezebwa ne balumizibwa, ng'Abayudaaya be basooka, ne kuddako ab'amawanga amalala." 
Romans2:10 Naye bonna abakola obulungi, baliweebwa ekitiibwa n'ettendo n'emirembe, ng'Abayudaaya be basooka, ne kuddako ab'amawanga amalala," 
Romans2:11 kubanga Katonda tasosola mu bantu. 
Romans2:12 Bonna aboonoona nga tebamanyi Mateeka, balizikirizibwa nga tebavunaanibwa Mateeka. Ate bonna aboonoona nga bamanyi Amateeka, balisalirwa omusango okusinziira mu Mateeka," 
Romans2:13 kubanga abatuukirivu mu maaso ga Katonda, si be bo abawulira obuwulizi Amateeka, wabula abo abakola bye galagira." 
Romans2:14 Ab'amawanga amalala abatalina Mateeka bwe bakolera ku kutegeera kwabwe, ne batuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, be baba bafuuse amateeka agabafuga, newaakubadde nga tebalina Mateeka gali," 
Romans2:15 kubanga balaga nti Amateeka kye galagira kiwandiikiddwa mu mitima gyabwe. Kino n'eddoboozi ly'omutima gwabwe likikakasa, kubanga ebirowoozo byabwe emirundi egimu bibalumiriza omusango, ate emirundi emirala bibawolereza." 
Romans2:16 Era okusinziira ku Mawulire Amalungi, ge ntegeeza abantu, ku bwa Yesu Kristo bwe kityo bwe kiriba, ku lunaku Katonda lw'alisalirako abantu omusango olw'ebyo bye baakisa." 
Romans2:17 Naye ggwe eyeeyita Omuyudaaya, weesigama ku Mateeka, ne weenyumiririza mu Katonda." 
Romans2:18 Omanyi Katonda by'ayagala okole, era wayigirizibwa mu Mateeka okulondawo ekisinga obulungi." 
Romans2:19 Okakasa nti oli mukulembeze wa bazibe b'amaaso, era amulisa abali mu kizikiza;" 
Romans2:20 aluŋŋamya abatalina magezi, era omuyigiriza w'abaana abato, kubanga mu Mateeka, mw'oggya byonna eby'amagezi n'eby'amazima." 
Romans2:21 Kale ggwe ayigiriza abalala, lwaki ggwe teweeyigiriza? Ggwe ategeeza abantu obutabbanga, ate ggwe obba?" 
Romans2:22 Ogamba abalala nti temwendanga, ate ggwe n'oyenda? Okyawa ebitali Katonda, ate n'obba eby'omu masabo?" 
Romans2:23 Weenyumiririza mu mateeka ga Katonda, ate n'omuswaza ng'ogamenya?" 
Romans2:24 Kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mmwe muleetera erinnya lya Katonda okuvumibwa ab'amawanga amalala.” 
Romans2:25 Okukomolebwa kugasa bw'okwata Amateeka, naye bw'ojeemera Amateeka, oba ng'atali mukomole." 
Romans2:26 Kale atali mukomole bw'akwata ebiragiro ebiri mu Mateeka, talibalibwa ng'eyakomolebwa?" 
Romans2:27 Oyo ataakomolebwa mu mubiri, kyokka n'atuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, talikusalira omusango okukusinga ggwe omumenyi w'Amateeka, newaakubadde ng'olina ebyawandiikibwa mu Mateeka, era nga wakomolebwa?" 
Romans2:28 Omuyudaaya ddala, si y'oyo alabikira ku byokungulu. Era okukomolebwa okw'amazima, si kwe kwo okwokungulu ku mubiri." 
Romans2:29 Naye Omuyudaaya ddala ye Muyudaaya munda, eyafuna okukomolebwa okw'amazima, okutali kwa kungulu ku mubiri, wabula okw'omu mutima. Omuntu ng'oyo tatendebwa bantu, wabula Katonda." 
Romans3:1 Kale Omuyudaaya kiki ky'asinza abalala? Oba okukomolebwa kugasa ki? 
Romans3:2 Kugasa mu ngeri yonna. Okusookera ddala, Abayudaaya be baakwasibwa ekigambo kya Katonda." 
Romans3:3 Kale kiba kitya abamu ku bo bwe bataba beesigwa? Obuteesigwa bwabwe buliggyawo obwesigwa bwa Katonda? 
Romans3:4 Nedda, tekisoboka. Katonda aba wa mazima, buli muntu ne bw'aba omulimba, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Oba mutuufu mu bigambo byo. Bw'osalirwa omusango ggwe osinga.”" 
Romans3:5 Naye oba nga ffe okuba ababi kiragira ddala nga Katonda bw'asala omusango mu bwenkanya, tunaagamba tutya? Tugambe nti Katonda bw'atubonereza aba mubi? Njogera ng'abantu bwe boogera." 
Romans3:6 Nedda, tekisoboka. Katonda bw'ataba mwenkanya, ate olwo ayinza atya okulamula ensi?" 
Romans3:7 Naye obulimba bwange bwe bwongera okulaga nga Katonda bw'ali ow'amazima, n'aweebwa ekitiibwa, nze ate lwaki mba nkyasalirwa omusango okunsinga ng'omwonoonyi?" 
Romans3:8 Era lwaki tetugamba–nga bwe batuwaayiriza era ng'ambamu bwe batulumiriza nti bwe tugamba–nti tukle ebibi mulyoke muveemu ebirungi? – ng'abamu bwe batuwaayiriza nti bwe tugamba. Abo basaanidde okusalirwa omusango okubasinga. 
Romans3:9 Kale olwo ffe Abayudaaya tulina kye tusinza abalala? Nedda, tetukirina, nga bwe nasoose okulaga nti abantu bonna, Abayudaaya n'ab'amawanga amalala, bafugibwa kibi," 
Romans3:10 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Tewali mutuukirivu wadde omu. 
Romans3:11 Tewali ategeera, wadde anoonya Katonda." 
Romans3:12 Bonna baawaba, bonna awamu baakola ebitasaana. Tewali akola kirungi, wadde omu bw'ati." 
Romans3:13 Emimiro gyabwe ye ntaana eyasaamiridde. Ennimi zaabwe bazoogeza bya bukuusa. Bye boogera bya kabi ng'obusagwa bw'enswera. 
Romans3:14 Akamwa kaabwe kajjudde ebikolimo n'ebigambo eby'obukambwe. 
Romans3:15 Banguwa okugenda okutta abantu. 
Romans3:16 Buli gye bayita baleetera abantu okuzikirira era n'okunakuwala. 
Romans3:17 Tebamanyi kuleetera bantu mirembe. 
Romans3:18 Era tebafa ku kussaamu Katonda kitiibwa.” 
Romans3:19 Tumanyi nti byonna ebiri mu Mateeka bikwata ku abo abafugibwa Amateeka ago, waleme kubaawo yeewolereza, wabula ab'oku nsi bonna Katonda abasalire omusango." 
Romans3:20 Mu maaso ge, tewali muntu n'omu alibalwa okuba omutuukirivu olw'okutuukiriza ebiri mu Mateeka. Amateeka kye gakola, kwe kumanyisa omuntu nti akoze kibi." 
Romans3:21 Naye kaakano obutuukirivu obuva eri Katonda nga tebuyita mu Mateeka, bulabise, era bukakasibwa Amateeka n'abalanzi," 
Romans3:22 bwe butuukirivu Katonda bw'awa abantu bonna abakkiriza Yesu Kristo, kubanga bonna tewali njawulo." 
Romans3:23 Bonna baayonoona, ne balemwa okutuuka ku kitiibwa Katonda kye yayagala babeere nakyo." 
Romans3:24 Katonda olw'ekisa kye, yabawa obutuukirivu bwa buwa, kubanga baanunulibwa Yesu Kristo." 
Romans3:25 Yesu oyo mu kufa kwe, yateekebwawo okuba omutango gw'ebibi by'abamukkiriza. Bw'atyo Katonda n'alaga nga bw'ali omutuukirivu, kubanga mu kugumiikiriza kwe, ebibi ebyakolebwa edda yabiyisaako amaaso," 
Romans3:26 alyoke akakase mu kiseera kino, nga bw'ali omutuukirivu, era nga bw'awa obutuukirivu buli muntu akkiriza Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Kale ekitwenyumirizisa kiki? Tekiriiwo. Lwaki tekiriiwo? Olw'ebyo bye tukola? Nedda, naye lwa kukkiriza." 
Romans3:28 Tukakasiza ddala nti omuntu aba mutuukirivu lwa kukkiriza, sso si lwa kutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira." 
Romans3:29 Kazzi Katonda wa Bayudaaya bokka? Ab'amawanga amalala bo si waabwe? Ddala nabo waabwe," 
Romans3:30 kubanga Katonda ali omu, era abakomole alibawa obutuukirivu ng'asinziira ku kukkiriza kwabwe, n'abatali bakomole alibubawa olw'okukkiriza kwabwe." 
Romans3:31 N'olwekyo Amateeka tugaggyawo olw'okukkiriza okwo? Nedda, tekisoboka, naye tuganyweza bunyweza." 
Romans4:1 Kale tunaagamba ki ku jjajjaffe Aburahamu? 
Romans4:2 Singa Aburahamu yali mutuukirivu olw'ebyo bye yakola, yandibadde n'ekimwenyumirizisa, wabula takirina mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Romans4:3 Kale ekyawandiikibwa kigamba kitya? Kigamba nti: “Aburahamu yakkiriza Katonda, n'abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu.”" 
Romans4:4 Omuntu akola omulimu, empeera ye tebalibwa ng'emuweebwa obuweebwa ng'ekirabo, obulabo, wabula aba ateekwa okugiweebwa." 
Romans4:5 Kyokka atakoze mulimu, wabula n'akkiriza bukkiriza Katonda atukuza aboonoonyi n'abafuula abatuukirivu, okukkiriza kwe Katonda kw'asinziirako okumufuula omutuukirivu." 
Romans4:6 Era kino Dawudi kye yategeeza bwe yayogera ku mukisa gw'omuntu, Katonda gw'abala okuba omutuukirivu awatali by'akoze. Agamba nti:" 
Romans4:7 “Ba mukisa abasonyiyibwa ebyonoono byabwe, ne baggyibwako ebibi byabwe." 
Romans4:8 Omuntu oyo wa mukisa Mukama gw'abala nti talina kibi.” 
Romans4:9 Kale omukisa ogwo gwa bakomole bokka, oba n'abatali bakomole nabo gwabwe? Tugamba nti: “Aburahamu yakkiriza Katonda, n'abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu.”" 
Romans4:10 Kino kyabaawo ddi? Ng'amaze okukomolebwa, oba nga tannakomolebwa? Tekyabaawo ng'amaze okukomolebwa, wabula nga tannaba kukomolebwa." 
Romans4:11 Yakomolebwa luvannyuma, okukomolebwa kwe ne kuba akabonero akakasa obutuukirivu bwe yaweebwa olw'okukkiriza kwe, nga tannakomolebwa. Bw'atyo n'aba jjajja wa bonna abakkiriza nga si bakomole, ne babalibwa okuba abatuukirivu." 
Romans4:12 Era ye jjajja w'abakomole, sso si ow'abo abakoma ku kukomolebwa obukomolebwa, naye ow'abo abagoberera obulamu obw'okukkiriza, jjajjaffe Aburahamu bwe yalina nga tannakomolebwa." 
Romans4:13 Aburahamu n'ezzadde lye baasuubizibwa okuweebwa ensi, si lwa kutuukiriza ebiri mu Mateeka g'Ekiyudaaya, wabula lwa butuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza." 
Romans4:14 Singa abo abanywerera ku Mateeka g'Ekiyudaaya be baweebwa ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza, okukkiriza kwandibadde kwa bwereere, n'ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza tebyandibaddewo," 
Romans4:15 kubanga Amateeka gatuleetera okusunguwalirwa Katonda. Naye awatali Mateeka, tewaba kwonoona." 
Romans4:16 Kale ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza byesigamye ku kukkiriza, biryoke birabikire ddala nti byava mu kisa kya Katonda okuweebwa ezzadde lya Aburahamu lyonna, sso si abo bokka abanywerera ku Mateeka, naye n'abo abalina okukkiriza nga Aburahamu kwe yalina, kubanga Aburahamu ye jjajjaffe ffenna;" 
Romans4:17 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Nkutaddewo obeere jjajja w'amawanga amangi.” Ekyo kyamusuubizibwa Katonda gwe yakkiriza, Katonda azuukiza abafu, era alagira ebitaliiwo ne bibaawo." 
Romans4:18 Aburahamu yakkiriza n'asuubira, mu kifo ky'okuggwaamu essuubi. Kyeyava aba jjajja w'amawanga amangi, nga bwe yasuubizibwa nti: “Ezzadde lyo liriba bwe lityo.”" 
Romans4:19 Teyaddirira mu kukkiriza, newaakubadde nga yali awezezza emyaka nga kikumi egy'obukulu, era ng'alaba nti omubiri gwe guli ng'ogufudde, nga ne Saara mugumba." 
Romans4:20 Teyalekayo kukkiriza, era teyabuusabuusa mu ebyo Katonda bye yamusuubiza. Yeeyongera okufuna amaanyi mu kukkiriza kwe, n'agulumiza Katonda," 
Romans4:21 kubanga yakakasiza ddala nti Katonda asobola okukola kye yasuubiza. 
Romans4:22 Olw'okukkiriza kwe, kyeyava abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu." 
Romans4:23 Kyokka ebigambo ebigamba nti: “Yabalibwa okuba omutuukirivu”, tebyawandiikibwa ku lulwe yekka," 
Romans4:24 wabula era ne ku lwaffe. Naffe abakkiriza oyo eyazuukiza Yesu Mukama waffe, tulibalibwa okuba abatuukirivu." 
Romans4:25 Yesu oyo yattibwa olw'ebibi byaffe, n'azuukira tulyoke tuggyibweko omusango." 
Romans5:1 Kale nga bwe tubaliddwa okuba abatuukirivu olw'okukkiriza, tulina emirembe mu maaso ga Katonda ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Romans5:2 Mu ye mwe twayita okutuuka ku kisa kya Katonda kye tulimu, era tusanyuka olw'okusuubira okugabana ku kitiibwa kya Katonda." 
Romans5:3 Si ekyo kyokka, naye twongerako n'okusanyuka mu kubonaabona kwaffe nga tumanyi nti okubonaabona kuvaamu okugumiikiriza," 
Romans5:4 okugumiikiriza ne kuvaamu okusiimibwa Katonda, n'okusiimibwa Katonda ne kuvaamu okusuubira." 
Romans5:5 Ate okusuubira okwo tekutuswaza, kubanga okwagala kwa Katonda kwabunduggulwa mu mitima gyaffe ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu gwe twaweebwa." 
Romans5:6 Bwe twali nga tetweyinza, Kristo yafiirira aboonoonyi, mu kiseera Katonda kye yateesa." 
Romans5:7 Kiba kizibu omuntu okufiirira oyo akola ebituufu. Kale akolera abalala eby'ekisa mpozzi wandibaawo eyeewaayo okumufiirira. 
Romans5:8 Naye Katonda alagira ddala nga bw'atwagala, kubanga Kristo yatufiirira bwe twali nga tukyali boonoonyi."
