Romans5:9 Kaakano nga bwe tubalibwa okuba abatuukirivu olw'okufa kwe, tugenda kusingawo nnyo okulokolebwa ku bubwe, tuwone obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Romans5:10 Kuba oba nga bwe twali nga tukyali balabe ba Katonda, twatabaganyizibwa naye olw'okufa kw'Omwana we, kaakano nga bwe tutabaganye naye, obulamu bw'Omwana we bujja kusingawo okutulokola." 
Romans5:11 Era si ekyo kyokka, wabula twongerako n'okusanyukira mu Katonda ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, atutuusizza kaakano ku kutabagana okwo." 
Romans5:12 Ng'ekibi bwe kyajja mu nsi olw'omuntu omu ne kireeta okufa, n'okufa bwe kutyo bwe kwabuna mu bantu bonna, kubanga bonna baayonoona." 
Romans5:13 Ddala ekibi kyaliwo mu nsi ng'Amateeka tegannateekebwawo. Era awatali tteeka, tewali avunaanibwa kibi." 
Romans5:14 Naye okufa kwafuga abantu okuviira ddala ku Adamu, okutuusa ku Musa, nga kutwaliramu n'abo abataayonoona mu ngeri ya Adamu, eyajeemera ekiragiro kya Katonda. Adamu yali afaananako n'oyo eyali alindirirwa okujja." 
Romans5:15 Kyokka bombi si be bamu, kubanga ekirabo kya Katonda kisukkiridde nnyo okwonoona kw'omuntu. Kuba oba ng'okwonoona kw'omuntu omu kwaleetera abangi okufa, ekisa kya Katonda n'ekirabo kye, kye yaweera mu muntu omu Yesu Kristo, kyasinzaawo nnyo okubuna abangi." 
Romans5:16 Era ekirabo kya Katonda tekiri ng'okufa okwava mu kwonoona kw'omuntu omu oli. Ekibi kye ekimu, kyaleetera abantu okusingibwa omusango. Naye ebibi bingi bwe byakolebwa abantu, ne wabaawo ekirabo kye batasaanidde, eky'okubaggyisaako omusango." 
Romans5:17 Oba ng'omuntu omu bwe yayonoona, okufa kwafuga olw'omuntu oyo omu, abo Katonda be yakwatirwa ekisa ekisukkirivu n'ekirabo eky'obutuukirivu, balisingawo nnyo okufugira mu bulamu, olw'omuntu omu Yesu Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Era ng'okwonoona kw'omuntu omu bwe kwaleetera abantu bonna okusingibwa omusango, bwe kityo n'ekikolwa eky'obutuukirivu ekyakolebwa omuntu omu, kyaleetera abantu bonna okuggyibwako omusango n'okuweebwa obulamu." 
Romans5:19 N'olwekyo, ng'obujeemu bw'omuntu omu bwe bwaleetera abangi okuba aboonoonyi, bwe butyo n'obuwulize bw'omuntu omu, bulireetera bangi okuba abatuukirivu." 
Romans5:20 Amateeka gajja, okwonoona kulyoke kweyongere. Naye okwonoona gye kwakoma okweyongera, n'ekisa kya Katonda gye kyakoma okweyongera ennyo okusingawo." 
Romans5:21 Era ng'ekibi bwe kyafugira mu kufa, n'ekisa kya Katonda bwe kityo bwe kifugira mu butuukirivu, ne kitutuusa mu bulamu obutaggwaawo, ku bwa Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe." 
Romans6:1 Kale tunaagamba tutya? Tubeere mu kibi, ekisa kya Katonda kiryoke kyeyongere?" 
Romans6:2 Nedda, tekisoboka. Ffe abaafa ne twawukanira ddala n'obulamu obw'ekibi, tuyinza tutya okubuddamu?" 
Romans6:3 Temumanyi nti ffe abaabatizibwa ne twegatta wamu ne Kristo Yesu, twabatizibwa ne twegatta wamu naye mu kufa kwe?" 
Romans6:4 Bwe twabatizibwa, twaziikibwa wamu naye, ne tugabana ku kufa kwe, bwe tutyo nga Kristo bwe yazuukizibwa obuyinza bwa Kitaawe obwekitiibwa, naffe tubenga mu bulamu obuggya." 
Romans6:5 Kale oba nga twegatta wamu naye mu kufa kwe, era bwe tutyo tulyegatta wamu naye ne mu kuzuukira kwe." 
Romans6:6 Tumanyi nti embeera yaffe ey'edda yakomererwa ku musaalaba wamu ne Kristo omubiri ogukola ekibi gulyoke guzikirizibwe, tuleme okuddamu okuba abaddu b'ekibi." 
Romans6:7 Omuntu afudde, aba takyafugibwa kibi." 
Romans6:8 Naffe, oba nga twafiira wamu ne Kristo, era tukkiriza nti tuliba balamu wamu naye." 
Romans6:9 Tumanyi nti nga Kristo bwe yazuukira, takyaddamu kufa, okufa tekukyamufuga." 
Romans6:10 Okufa kwe yafa olw'ekibi, yafa omulundi gumu, kyokka kaakano mulamu, nga mulamu eri Katonda." 
Romans6:11 Bwe mutyo nammwe musaanye okwebala nti mufudde ne mwawukana n'ekibi, ne muba balamu eri Katonda, nga muli wamu ne Kristo Yesu." 
Romans6:12 N'olwekyo temukkirizanga ekibi okuddamu okufuga mu mibiri gyammwe egifa, ne mugondera okwegomba kwagyo okubi." 
Romans6:13 Era temuwangayo bitundu bya mibiri gyammwe eri ekibi, okubikozesa mu kwonoona, naye mweweeyo eri Katonda, ng'abantu abavudde mu kufa ne balamuka. Era mweweereyo ddala gy'ali, abakozesenga eby'obutuukirivu." 
Romans6:14 Ekibi tekikyabafuga, kubanga Amateeka si ge gabafuga, wabula ekisa kya Katonda." 
Romans6:15 Kale tukole ki? Tukole ekibi, kubanga Amateeka si ge gatufuga, wabula ekisa kya Katonda? Nedda, tekisoboka." 
Romans6:16 Temumanyi nti ekyo kye mwewa ne mukiwulira ng'abaddu, oba kibi ekireeta okufa, oba obuwulize obuleeta obutuukirivu, muba baddu baakyo?" 
Romans6:17 Kyokka Katonda yeebazibwe, kubanga mmwe abaali abaddu b'ekibi, mwawulira n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, ebyo ebiri mu njigiriza gye mwaweebwa." 
Romans6:18 Kale bwe mwaggyibwa mu kibi, mwafuuka baddu ba Katonda, abagoberera obutuukirivu." 
Romans6:19 Njogera ng'abantu obuntu bwe boogera, olw'obunafu bw'engeri mmwe ng'abantu gye mutegeeramu ebintu. Nga bwe mweweerangayo ddala mu bugwagwa ne mu kwonoona, ne mukola ebibi, bwe mutyo ne kaakano mweweereyo ddala mu butuukirivu, mulyoke mutukuzibwe." 
Romans6:20 Bwe mwali nga mukyali baddu ba kibi, eby'obutuukirivu byali tebibafuga." 
Romans6:21 Kale kalungi ki ke mwaggya mu kukola ebyo ebibakwasa ensonyi kaakano? Ebyo bireeta kufa. 
Romans6:22 Naye kaakano nga bwe mwaggyibwa mu kibi ne mufuuka abaddu ba Katonda, kye mufunyeemu kwe kutukuzibwa okubaleetera obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Romans6:23 Empeera y'ekibi kufa, naye ekirabo kya Katonda bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo, bwe tufuna mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
Romans7:1 Abooluganda, (njogera n'abo abategeera amateeka), temumanyi nti amateeka omuntu gamufuga ng'akyali mulamu?" 
Romans7:2 Ekyokulabirako: omukazi omufumbo etteeka limulagira okubeera ne bba, nga bba oyo akyali mulamu. Bba bw'afa, omukazi oyo aba takyafugibwa tteeka eryo." 
Romans7:3 N'olwekyo omukazi bw'aba n'omusajja omulala, ng'ate bba akyali mulamu, ayitibwa mwenzi. Kyokka bba bw'afa, aba takyasibibwa tteeka eryo. Era bw'afumbirwa omusajja omulala, olwo taba mwenzi." 
Romans7:4 Nammwe bwe mutyo bwe muli, baganda bange. Mwafa ne mwawukanira ddala n'Amateeka, kubanga muli bitundu bya mubiri gwa Kristo. Era kaakano muli ba Kristo oyo eyazuukira tulyoke tube n'obulamu obugasa mu kuweereza Katonda." 
Romans7:5 Bwe twali nga tukyafugibwa omubiri, Amateeka gaayongera amaanyi mu kwegomba kwaffe okubi, ne kukola mu mibiri gyaffe, okufa ne kweyongera." 
Romans7:6 Naye kaakano tetukyafugibwa Mateeka, kubanga twafa ne twawukana n'Amateeka agaatufuula abasibe. N'olwekyo Katonda tumuweereza mu ngeri empya eya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, sso si mu ngeri enkadde ey'okugoberera Amateeka amawandiike." 
Romans7:7 Kale tugambe tutya? Tugambe nti Amateeka kye kibi? Nedda, si bwe kiri. Naye sandimanye kibi, singa tewali Mateeka. Sandimanye kiyitibwa kwegomba kubi, singa Amateeka tegagamba nti: “Teweegombanga.”" 
Romans7:8 Naye ekibi bwe kyayita mu kiragiro, ne kindeetera okwegomba okubi okwa buli ngeri. Awatali mateeka, ekibi kiba kifudde." 
Romans7:9 Nze nali mulamu nga tewali mateeka. Naye ekiragiro bwe kyajja, ekibi ne kiramuka," 
Romans7:10 ne kindeetera okufa. Olwo ekiragiro ekyali eky'okundeetera obulamu, ne kinviiramu okufa." 
Romans7:11 Ekibi bwe kyayita mu kiragiro, ne kinnimbalimba, ne kinzita nga kisinziira mu kiragiro." 
Romans7:12 N'olwekyo Amateeka ku bwago matukuvu, n'ebiragiro bitukuvu, bituufu era birungi." 
Romans7:13 Kale olwo ekirungi kye kyandeetera okufa? Nedda, si bwe kiri. Naye ekibi kye kyandeetera okufa nga kiyita mu kirungi, ekibi kiryoke kyeyoleke nga bwe kiri ekibi, era olw'ekiragiro, ekibi ekyo kiryoke kyeyongere okulagira ddala obubi bwakyo." 
Romans7:14 Tumanyi nti Amateeka galiwo lwa bya mwoyo, naye nze nfugibwa mubiri, ndi muddu wa kibi." 
Romans7:15 Kye nkola sikitegeera, kubanga kye njagala si kye nkola, wabula kye nkyawa ate kye nkola." 
Romans7:16 Bwe nkola kye ssaagala kukola ekyo kiraga nti nzikiriza nti Amateeka malungi. 
Romans7:17 Kubanga si nze nkikola, wabula ekibi ekibeera mu nze kye kikikola." 
Romans7:18 Mmanyi nti mu nze, ng'omuntu obuntu, temuli kalungi n'akamu, kubanga newaakubadde nga njagala okukola ekirungi, naye nnemwa okukikola." 
Romans7:19 Ekirungi kye njagala si kye nkola, wabula ekibi kye ssaagala kye nkola." 
Romans7:20 Kale oba nga nkola ekyo kye ssaagala, kwe kugamba nti si nze nkikola, wabula ekibi ekibeera mu nze kye kikikola." 
Romans7:21 Kale kino kye ndaba mu nze: bwe njagala okukola ekirungi, ate nnondawo kukola kibi." 
Romans7:22 Mu mwoyo gwange nsanyukira etteeka lya Katonda. 
Romans7:23 Naye mu mubiri gwange nsangamu ekirala ekirwanyisa etteeka eryo, amagezi gange lye gasemba, ne kinfuula omuddu w'etteeka ly'ekibi ekiri mu mubiri gwange." 
Romans7:24 Nze nga ndi muntu munaku! Ani alimponya omubiri guno oguntwala mu kufa? 
Romans7:25 Katonda yeebazibwe ankolera ekyo ng'ayita mu Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe. Kale bwe ntyo bwe ndi: mu kutegeera kwange, nze ngoberera mateeka ga Katonda, naye mu kwegomba kwange, ngoberera tteeka lya kibi." 
Romans8:1 Kale kaakano abo abali mu Kristo Yesu tebakyalina musango," 
Romans8:2 kubanga etteeka lya Mwoyo, erituwa obulamu ffe abali mu Kristo, lyamponya etteeka erireeta ekibi era n'okufa." 
Romans8:3 Amateeka kye gataasobola kukola olw'okulemesebwa obunafu bw'omubiri, Katonda yakikola. Yasalira ekibi ekiri mu mubiri omusango okukisinga, bwe yatuma Omwana we yennyini, ng'alina omubiri ogufaananira ddala omubiri ogukola ekibi, alyoke awangule ekibi." 
Romans8:4 Ekyo Katonda yakikola, ffe abatafugibwa mubiri, wabula abafugibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu tulyoke tutuukirize eby'obutuukirivu, Amateeka bye gatulagira okukola." 
Romans8:5 Kubanga abo abafugibwa omubiri, beemalira ku bya mubiri, naye abo abafugibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, beemalira ku bya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Romans8:6 Okwemalira ku by'omubiri kuleeta kufa, naye okwemalira ku bya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu kwe kuleeta obulamu n'emirembe." 
Romans8:7 Okwemalira ku by'omubiri, kuleetera omuntu okuba omulabe wa Katonda, nga tawulira mateeka ga Katonda, era ddala tayinza kugawulira." 
Romans8:8 Era abo abafugibwa omubiri, tebayinza kusanyusa Katonda." 
Romans8:9 Naye mmwe oba nga ddala Mwoyo wa Katonda ali mu mmwe, temufugibwa mubiri, wabula mufugibwa mwoyo. Oyo atalina Mwoyo wa Kristo, si wa Kristo." 
Romans8:10 Naye oba nga Kristo ali mu mmwe, emibiri gyammwe ne bwe gifa olw'ekibi, emyoyo gyammwe giba miramu olw'okutukuzibwa Katonda." 
Romans8:11 Oba nga Mwoyo wa Katonda eyazuukiza Yesu, ali mu mmwe, oyo eyazuukiza Kristo Yesu, n'emibiri gyammwe egifa aligiwa obulamu ku bwa Mwoyo we ali mu mmwe." 
Romans8:12 Kale nno abooluganda, tulina ebbanja. Naye omubiri si gwe gutubanja nti tugobererenga ebyo bye gwagala." 
Romans8:13 Bwe munaagobereranga eby'omubiri, mugenda kufa. Naye Mwoyo bw'anaabayambanga ne mulekerayo ddala ebikolwa byammwe ebibi, muliba balamu." 
Romans8:14 Bonna abaluŋŋamizibwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, be baana ba Katonda." 
Romans8:15 Temwaweebwa mwoyo gwa buddu okudda mu kutya, naye mwaweebwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abafuula abaana ba Katonda, atusobozesa okuyita Katonda nti “Aba”, ekitegeeza nti “Kitaffe”." 
Romans8:16 Mwoyo yennyini akakasiza wamu n'emyoyo gyaffe nti tuli baana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:17 Nga bwe tuli abaana be, tulifuna ebyo bye yasuubiza abantu be, era tulifunira wamu ne Kristo ebyo Katonda bye yamuterekera. Bwe tubonaabonera awamu ne Kristo, era tuliweerwa wamu naye ekitiibwa." 
Romans8:18 Ndaba ng'okubonaabona kwaffe okw'omu kiseera kino ekiriwo, tekuyinza kugeraageranyizibwa na kitiibwa ekiritulagibwa." 
Romans8:19 Ebitonde byonna bitunula nkaliriza, nga birindirira okulagibwa kw'abaana ba Katonda." 
Romans8:20 Ebitonde ebyo byafuuka ebitalina mugaso, si lwa kweyagalira, wabula ku bw'oyo eyayagala bibe bwe bityo. Naye waliwo essuubi" 
Romans8:21 nti ebitonde byennyini biriggyibwa mu buddu obubireetera okuvunda, ne bifuna eddembe ery'ekitiibwa ky'abaana ba Katonda." 
Romans8:22 Tumanyi ng'okutuusa kaakano, ebitonde byonna bisinda era byonna birumwa ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala." 
Romans8:23 Naye si bitonde byokka, wabula naffe abaafuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ng'ekirabo kya Katonda ekisookera ddala, tusinda mu mitima gyaffe, nga tulindirira Katonda okutufuula abaana be, n'okununula emibiri gyaffe." 
Romans8:24 Twalokolebwa lwa kusuubira. Naye singa kye tusuubira tuba tukirabako, okwo tekwandibadde kusuubira. Ani asuubira ekyo ky'alabako?" 
Romans8:25 Naye bwe tusuubira kye tutalabako, tugumiikiriza ne tukirindirira." 
Romans8:26 Ne Mwoyo bw'atyo atuyamba mu bunafu bwaffe, kubanga tetumanyi kusaba Katonda nga bwe kitugwanira. Naye Mwoyo yennyini atwegayiririra n'okusinda okutayogerekeka." 
Romans8:27 Era Katonda akebera emitima gy'abantu, amanyi Mwoyo ky'alowooza, kubanga Mwoyo yeegayiririra abantu ba Katonda, nga Katonda bw'ayagala." 
Romans8:28 Tumanyi nti abaagala Katonda era be yayita nga bwe yayagala, byonna ebibatuukako bibaviiramu ebirungi." 
Romans8:29 Kubanga Katonda yamanya dda abantu be, nga tebannaba na kubaawo, era yabategeka bafaanane Omwana we, Omwana we oyo alyoke abe omubereberye mu booluganda abangi." 
Romans8:30 Abo Katonda be yategeka, be bo be yayita. Era abo be yayita, be bo be yatukuza. Era abo be yatukuza, be bo be yawa ekitiibwa." 
Romans8:31 Kale ebyo tunaabyogerako ki? Katonda bw'abeera ku lwaffe, ani asobola okutulwanyisa?" 
Romans8:32 Oyo ataasaasira na Mwana we yennyini, n'amuwaayo ku lwaffe fenna, alirema atya okutugabira byonna awamu naye?" 
Romans8:33 Ani aliroopa abalondemu ba Katonda, nga Katonda yennyini abaggyako omusango?" 
Romans8:34 Ani alibasalira omusango okubasinga? Kristo eyafa, era eyazuukira, oyo aliraanye Katonda ku ludda lwe olwa ddyo, ye atuwolereza." 
Romans8:35 Kale ani alitwawukanya n'okwagala kwa Kristo? Kubonaabona, oba bulumi, oba kuyigganyizibwa, oba njala, oba kuba bwereere, oba kabi, oba kitala?" 
Romans8:36 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Olunaku lwonna tuli mu kabi ka kuttibwa ku lulwo. Tubalibwa ng'endiga ez'okuttibwa.” 
Romans8:37 Naye mu ebyo byonna, tuwangulira ddala ku bw'oyo eyatwagala." 
Romans8:38 Nkakasiza ddala nti newaakubadde bamalayika, wadde abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza abalala, newaakubadde ebiriwo, wadde ebigenda okubaawo," 
Romans8:39 newaakubadde obugulumivu, wadde okukka wansi, wadde ekitonde ekirala kyonna, tebirisobola kutwawukanya na kwagala kwa Katonda, okuli mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
Romans9:1 Njogerera ddala mazima mu Kristo, sirimba, n'omwoyo gwange nga gufugibwa mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, gukinkakasa" 
Romans9:2 nti ndi munakuwavu nnyo, era nnina obulumi obutakkiriza mutima gwange kuwummula," 
Romans9:3 kubanga nandyagadde nze mwene, nkolimirwe Kristo olwa baganda bange, bwe tuli ab'eggwanga erimu." 
Romans9:4 Be Bayisirayeli, abaaweebwa omukisa okuba abaana ba Katonda, era abaaweebwa ekitiibwa, n'endagaano, n'Amateeka, n'engeri ey'okusinzangamu Katonda, era abaasuubizibwa ebirungi." 
Romans9:5 Bajjajjaabwe, Kristo ng'omuntu be yasibukamu. Katonda afuga byonna, atenderezebwenga emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Romans9:6 Naye si kwe kugamba nti ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza byalema okutuukirizibwa. Abayisirayeli bonna si be Bayisirayeli ddala. 
Romans9:7 Era abazzukulu ba Aburahamu mu mubiri, si be baana ba Katonda. Wabula kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mu Yisaaka mwe muliva abaliyitibwa abazzukulu bo.”" 
Romans9:8 Ekyo kitegeeza nti abo abazaalibwa mu kuzaalibwa okwa bulijjo, si be baana ba Katonda; wabula abo abazaalibwa nga kiva ku kusuubiza kwa Katonda, be babalwa okuba abazzukulu ba Aburahamu abatuufu." 
Romans9:9 Katonda bwe yali asuubiza, yagamba nti: “Ndikomawo mu kiseera ekituufu, era Saara aliba alina omwana ow'obulenzi.”" 
Romans9:10 Era si ekyo kyokka. N'abaana ba Rebbeeka baalina kitaabwe omu, Yisaaka jjajjaffe." 
Romans9:11 Naye bwe baali nga tebannaba na kuzaalibwa, era nga tebannabaako kye bakola ekirungi oba ekibi, Katonda n'agamba Rebbeeka nti: “Omukulu ye aliweereza omuto.” Kino kyali bwe kityo, kiryoke kikakase nti Katonda alonda oyo gw'aba ayise, nga tasinziira ku ebyo abantu bye bakola." 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Yakobo namwagala, kyokka Esawu ne mmukyawa.”" 
Romans9:14 Kale tunaagamba tutya? Tunaagamba nti Katonda si mwenkanya? Nedda si bwe kiri," 
Romans9:15 kubanga yagamba nti: “Ndisaasira oyo gwe nsaasira, era ndikwatirwa ekisa oyo gwe nkwatirwa ekisa.”" 
Romans9:16 N'olwekyo tekiva ku ebyo omuntu by'ayagala wadde by'akola, wabula ku kusaasira kwa Katonda." 
Romans9:17 Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba Faraawo nti: “Nakutuusa ku bukulu, ndyoke njoleseze obuyinza bwange mu ggwe, era mmanyise erinnya lyange mu nsi zonna.”" 
Romans9:18 N'olwekyo Katonda asaasira oyo gw'ayagala okusaasira, era akakanyaza omutima gw'oyo gw'ayagala okukakanyaza omutima." 
Romans9:19 Kale onoŋŋamba nti: “Oba nga bwe kityo bwe kiri, lwaki Katonda anenya omuntu? Ani ayinza okuziyiza Katonda ky'ayagala?”" 
Romans9:20 Naye ggwe omuntu, ddala ggwe ani awakanya Katonda? Ekibumbe kigamba omubumbi nti: “Lwaki wammumba bw'oti?”" 
Romans9:21 Omubumbi tayinza kukola ky'ayagala mu bbumba lye, ekitole ekimu n'akibumbamu ekibya ekyekitiibwa, n'ekirala ekigayibwa?" 
Romans9:22 Ne Katonda si ky'ekyo kye yakola? Yayagala okulaga obusungu bwe, n'okumanyisa obuyinza bwe. Kyeyava agumiikiriza ennyo abo be yasunguwalira, abaateekerwateekerwa okuzikirira." 
Romans9:23 Era yayagala okulaga ekitiibwa kye ekinene ennyo eri abo be yakwatirwa ekisa, era abo okuva edda be yateekerateekera ekitiibwa." 
Romans9:24 Abo ye ffe be yayita, si mu Bayudaaya bokka, wabula ne mu b'amawanga amalala," 
Romans9:25 nga bw'agamba mu Kitabo kya Hoseya nti: “Abataali bantu bange, ndibayita abantu bange. Ne gwe nali ssaagala, ndimuyita mukwano gwange." 
Romans9:26 Mu kifo kyennyini mwe baayitirwa abatali bantu bange, mwe baliyitirwa abaana ba Katonda Nnannyinibulamu.”" 
Romans9:27 Ne Yisaaya ayogera ku Yisirayeli n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Abantu ba Yisirayeli ne bwe balyenkana omusenyu gw'ennyanja obungi, ekitundu ekirisigalawo kye kirirokolebwa." 
Romans9:28 Mukama talirema kusalawo kutuukiriza mangu kye yagamba okukola ku nsi.” 
Romans9:29 Era nga Yisaaya bwe yagamba edda nti: “Singa Mukama Omuyinzawaabyonna teyatulekerawo zzadde, twandibadde nga Gomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Kale tunaagamba tutya? Tunaagamba nti ab'amawanga amalala abataagobereranga butuukirivu, baatuuka ku butuukirivu, kwe kugamba, obutuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza." 
Romans9:31 Naye Abayisirayeli, abaanoonyanga Amateeka ag'okubatuusa ku butuukirivu obwo, tebaagazuula." 
Romans9:32 Lwaki? Kubanga tebaabugoberera nga beesigama ku kukkiriza, naye beesigama ku bye bakola, ne beesittala ku jjinja eryo eryesittalwako." 
Romans9:33 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Laba nteeka mu Siyooni ejjinja eryesittalwako, olwazi olulibasuula. Era buli akkiriza oyo, taliswazibwa.”" 
Romans10:1 Abooluganda, omutima gwange kye gwagala, era kye nsabira Abayisirayeli eri Katonda, kye kino nti balokolebwe." 
Romans10:2 Nkakasa nga banyiikirira okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, naye okunyiikira kwabwe tekwesigamye ku kumanya okutuufu." 
Romans10:3 Tebaamanya ngeri Katonda gy'aweeramu bantu butuukirivu, bwe batyo ne bagezaako okwezuulira ekkubo eryabwe ku bwabwe, ne batagoberera ngeri Katonda gy'aweeramu bantu butuukirivu." 
Romans10:4 Ekigendererwa ky'Amateeka kituukirizibwa mu Kristo, buli akkiriza alyoke abe mutuukirivu." 
Romans10:5 Musa yawandiika ebikwata ku butuukirivu obuva mu kuwulira Amateeka, nti alibugoberera bulimuweesa obulamu." 
Romans10:6 Naye obutuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza bugamba bwe buti nti: “Togambanga mu mutima gwo nti: Ani alirinnya mu ggulu?” - kwe kugamba, okuggyayo Kristo akke ku nsi" 
Romans10:7 oba nti: “Ani alikka emagombe?” - kwe kugamba, aggyeyo Kristo okuva mu bafu." 
Romans10:8 Kale obutuukirivu obwo bugamba butya? Bugamba nti: “Ekigambo kya Katonda kiri kumpi naawe; kiri mu kamwa ko, ne mu mutima gwo” - kwe kugamba, kye kigambo kye tutegeeza abantu, ekifa ku kukkiriza." 
Romans10:9 Bw'oyatula n'akamwa ko nti: Yesu ye Mukama, era n'okkiriza mu mutima gwo nti Katonda yamuzuukiza, olirokolebwa." 
Romans10:10 Omuntu akkiriza na mutima gwe n'aba omutuukirivu, era ayatula na kamwa ke n'alokolebwa." 
Romans10:11 Ekyawandiikibwa bwe kigamba nti “Buli amukkiriza taliswazibwa,”" 
Romans10:12 tekisosola Muyudaaya na wa ggwanga ddala. Bonna Mukama waabwe ye omu, agaggawaza bonna abamukoowoola." 
Romans10:13 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Buli alikoowoola erinnya lya Mukama alirokolebwa.” 
Romans10:14 Naye baliyinza batya okukoowoola gwe batannakkiriza? Era baliyinza batya okukkiriza gwe batawulirangako? Era baliyinza batya okumuwulirako, nga tewali abategeeza?" 
Romans10:15 Era baliyinza batya okutegeezebwa, nga tewali batumiddwa? Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Okujja kw'abo abaleeta Amawulire Amalungi nga kulungi!”" 
Romans10:16 Naye si bonna abakkiriza Amawulire Amalungi. Yisaaya agamba nti: “Mukama, ani yakkiriza bye twayogera?”" 
Romans10:17 N'olwekyo okukkiriza kuva mu ebyo ebiwulirwa, n'ebiwulirwa biva mu kutegeeza bantu ebifa ku Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Naye ka mbuuze: tebabiwuliranga? Ddala baabiwulira, kubanga ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Eddoboozi lyabwe lyabuna mu nsi zonna, n'ebigambo byabwe byatuuka ensi gy'ekoma.”" 
Romans10:19 Era ka mbuuze: abantu ba Yisirayeli tebamanyi? Musa ye yasooka okugamba nti: “Ndibaleetera okukwatirwa obuggya abantu abatali ggwanga, mbaleetere mmwe okusunguwalira eggwanga eritalina magezi.”" 
Romans10:20 Ne Yisaaya aguma n'agamba nti: “Nalabibwa abo abatannoonyanga. Nalabikira abo abatambuulirizanga.” 
Romans10:21 Kyokka eri Yisirayeli agamba nti: “Olunaku lwonna nalumala nga ngololedde emikono gyange abantu abatawulira era abajeemu.” 
Romans11:1 Kale ka mbuuze: Katonda yeegoberako ddala abantu be? Nedda si bwe kiri. Nange ndi Muyisirayeli, muzzukulu wa Aburahamu, era ndi wa mu kika kya Benyamiini." 
Romans11:2 Katonda abantu be, be yamanya edda, teyabeegoberako ddala. Temumanyi ekyawandiikibwa kye kigamba ku Eliya, bwe yasaba Katonda ng'ayogera ku Bayisirayeli? Yagamba nti:" 
Romans11:3 “Mukama, batta abalanzi bo, ne boonoona ebifo byo eby'ebitambiro. Nze nzekka nze nsigaddewo, era nange banoonya okunzita.”" 
Romans11:4 Kyokka Katonda yamuddamu atya? Nti: “Neeterekeddewo abantu kasanvu, abatafukaamiriranga Baali.”" 
Romans11:5 Era bwe kiri ne mu biseera bino. Waliwo abasigaddewo, abaalondebwamu olw'ekisa kya Katonda." 
Romans11:6 Katonda yabalondamu lwa kisa kye, si lw'ebyo bye baakola. Singa yabalondamu lw'ebyo bye baakola, ekisa kye kyandibadde tekikyali kisa." 
Romans11:7 Kale tugambe tutya? Abayisirayeli baalemwa okufuna ekyo kye baali banoonya. Abatono abalondemu be baakifuna. Naye abalala emitima gyabwe gyakakanyazibwa," 
Romans11:8 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Katonda yabawa omwoyo ogutaliimu magezi. Yabawa amaaso agatalaba, n'amatu agatawulira okutuusa ku lunaku lwaleero.”" 
Romans11:9 Ne Dawudi agamba nti: “Ekijjulo kyabwe kibafuukire omutego n'ekigu, enkonge n'ekibonerezo." 
Romans11:10 Amaaso gaabwe gasiikirizibwe baleme okulaba, n'emigongo gyabwe ogikutamye ennaku zonna.”" 
Romans11:11 Kale ka mbuuze: Abayudaaya beesittala balyoke bagwe bazikirire? Nedda, si bwe kiri. Naye okwonoona kwabwe kwaleetera ab'amawanga amalala okulokolebwa, bo Abayudaaya balyoke bakwatibwe obuggya." 
Romans11:12 Naye oba nga okwonoona kwabwe kwaweesa ensi emikisa mingi, kale bonna bwe balidda eri Katonda emikisa tegirisingawo obungi?" 
Romans11:13 Kaakano ŋŋamba mmwe ab'amawanga amalala: nga bwe ndi omutume eri ab'amawanga amalala, nzisaamu omulimu gwange ekitiibwa," 
Romans11:14 nga ngezaako okukwasisa ab'eggwanga lyange obuggya, ndyoke ndokole abamu ku bo." 
Romans11:15 Bwe baagobebwa, ensi yatabagana ne Katonda. Kale bwe balikomezebwawo, kiriba kitya? Buliba bulamu obuliggyawo okufa." 
Romans11:16 Ekitole kyonna kiba kitukuvu, ekitundu kyakyo ekisooka bwe kitukuzibwa. Era ekikolo ky'omuti bwe kiba ekitukuvu, n'amatabi gaba matukuvu." 
Romans11:17 Naye oba ng'amatabi agamu ag'omuti omuzayiti ogw'omu nnimiro gaawogolwako, ggwe eyali ettabi ery'omuti omuzayiti ogw'omu nsiko n'osimbibwa mu kifo kyago, n'ogabana ku bugimu bw'omuti ogwo," 
Romans11:18 leka kwewaana nti amatabi ago ogasinga. Bwe weewaana, jjukira nti si ggwe owaniridde ekikolo, wabula ekikolo kye kikuwaniridde." 
Romans11:19 Naye oyinza okugamba nti: “Amatabi gaawogolwako, nze ndyoke nsimbibweko.”" 
Romans11:20 Weewaawo, gaawogolwako lwa butakkiriza bwago, naye ggwe ekikuyimirizzaawo kwe kukkiriza. N'olwekyo teweewaana, wabula tya weerinde." 
Romans11:21 Kuba oba nga Katonda teyasaasira matabi agaazaalibwa ku muti ogwo, era naawe talikusaasira." 
Romans11:22 Kale manya ekisa n'obukambwe bwa Katonda. Akambuwalira abo abagudde n'akwatirwa ggwe ekisa, kasita onywerera ku kisa kye. Naye bw'otolikinywererako, naawe oliwogolebwako." 
Romans11:23 Era n'Abayudaaya bwe baliba tebalemedde mu butakkiriza bwabwe, balizzibwako ku muti, kubanga Katonda asobolera ddala okubazzaako." 
Romans11:24 Kuba oba nga ggwe, mu nkula yo, eyali ettabi ly'omuti omuzayiti ogw'omu nsiko, wasalibwa n'osimbibwa ku muti omuzayiti ogw'omu nnimiro ogutali gwa nkula yo, amatabi agaazaalibwa ku muti ogwo tegaliba mangu nnyo okuzzibwa ku muti gwago?" 
Romans11:25 Abooluganda, njagala mumanye ekyama kino, mulemenga okwewaanawaana. Abayisirayeli abamu baasigala bakakanyavu, okutuusa ab'amawanga amalala bonna lwe balimala okujja eri Katonda." 
Romans11:26 Olwo n'Abayisirayeli bonna balirokolebwa, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Omulokozi alisibuka mu Siyooni, aliggya bazzukulu ba Yakobo mu byonoono byabwe." 
Romans11:27 Era eyo y'eriba endagaano yange nabo, bwe ndibaggyako ebibi byabwe.”" 
Romans11:28 Bo, mu bikwata ku Mawulire Amalungi, baba balabe ba Katonda, mmwe mulyoke mugasibwe. Naye mu bikwata ku kulondebwamu, baba baagalwa ba Katonda olwa bajjajjaabwe." 
Romans11:29 Katonda bw'agabira abantu oba bw'abayita, teyejjusa." 
Romans11:30 Nammwe edda mwajeemera Katonda, kyokka kaakano mwakwatirwa ekisa olw'obujeemu bw'Abayudaaya." 
Romans11:31 Kaakano nabo bajeemye, balyoke bakwatirwe ekisa ekyakwatirwa mmwe." 
Romans11:32 Katonda yaleka abantu bonna mu bujeemu, alyoke akwatirwe bonna ekisa." 
Romans11:33 Ddala, obugagga bwa Katonda n'amagezi ge, n'okumanya kwe nga tebikoma! By'ateesa nga tebyefumiitirizika! Engeri ze nga tezitegeerekeka!" 
Romans11:34 Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Ani yali amanye Mukama by'alowooza? Ani yali amuwadde amagezi? 
Romans11:35 Oba ani yali amuwadde ekirabo naye alyoke amuddize?” 
Romans11:36 Byonna ye yabitonda, ye abibeezaawo, era bibeerawo ku lulwe. Aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Romans12:1 Kale abooluganda, mbeegayirira olw'okusaasira kwa Katonda, muwengayo emibiri gyammwe eri Katonda, gibe ekitambiro naye nga kiramu, ekitukuvu era ekimusanyusa. Okwo kwe kumusinzanga okw'amazima." 
Romans12:2 Empisa zammwe mulemenga kuzifaananya n'ez'abantu ab'ensi, wabula mukyuke, mufune endowooza empya, mulyoke musobole okumanya ebyo Katonda by'ayagala: ebirungi, ebisanyusa, era ebituufu." 
Romans12:3 Olw'ekisa Katonda kye yankwatirwa, ŋŋamba buli omu mu mmwe nti tasaanidde kwerowoozaako kiyitiridde, wabula yeerowoozengako mu ngeri esaanira, era yeekeberenga okusinziira ku kipimo ky'okukkiriza, Katonda kwe yamuwa." 
Romans12:4 Kuba nga bwe tulina ebitundu ebingi mu mubiri ogumu, nga byonna tebikola mulimu gumu," 
Romans12:5 naffe bwe tutyo bwe tuli. Newaakubadde tuli bangi, naye tuli omubiri gumu mu Kristo, era tugattibwa wamu ng'ebitundu eby'omubiri ogumu." 
Romans12:6 Kale tukozesenga ebirabo bye tulina ebyenjawulo, okusinziira ku kisa Katonda kye yatukwatirwa. Bwe kiba ekirabo eky'okutegeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda, tukibategeezenga ng'okukkiriza kwaffe bwe kuli." 
Romans12:7 Oba twafuna kuweereza, tunyiikirenga okuweereza. Oyo ayigiriza, anyiikirenga okuyigiriza." 
Romans12:8 Abuulirira abalala, anyiikirenga okubabuulirira. Agaba, agabenga n'omutima gumu. Ali mu buyinza, abeerenga munyiikivu. N'oyo akolera abalala eby'ekisa, abikolenga nga musanyufu." 
Romans12:9 Okwagalana kwammwe kubeerenga kwa mazima. Mukyawenga ekibi, munywererenga ku kirungi." 
Romans12:10 Mwagalanenga ng'abooluganda. Buli omu anyiikirirenga okuwa munne ekitiibwa. 
Romans12:11 Mubeerenga banyiikivu, temugayaalanga. Mweweereyo ddala mu kuweereza Mukama." 
Romans12:12 Okusuubira kwammwe kubakuumenga nga muli basanyufu. Mugumiikirizenga mu kubonaabona kwammwe, muyimusenga emitima gyammwe eri Katonda bulijjo." 
Romans12:13 Mutoolenga ku byammwe muwe abantu ba Katonda bye beetaaga. Mwanirizenga abagenyi. 
Romans12:14 Musabenga Katonda awe emikisa abo ababayigganya. Mubasabirenga mikisa, naye mulemenga kubakolimira." 
Romans12:15 Musanyukirenga wamu n'abo abasanyuka; munakuwalirenga wamu n'abo abanakuwala. 
Romans12:16 Mussenga kimu mwenna. Temwekulumbazanga. 
Romans12:17 Omuntu bw'akolanga ekibalumya, mmwe temwesasuzanga. Mukolenga ekyo abantu bonna kye balaba nga kye kirungi." 
Romans12:18 Mukolenga kyonna kye musobola okutabagananga n'abantu bonna. 
Romans12:19 Abaagalwa, temuwooleranga ggwanga, naye mulekenga Katonda ye abanga awoolera eggwanga. Mu byawandiikibwa, Mukama agamba nti: “Okuwoolera eggwanga kwange, nze ndisasula.”" 
Romans12:20 N'olwekyo, era ng'ebyawandiikibwa bwe bigamba: “Omulabe wo bw'alumwanga enjala, omuwanga ekyokulya n'alya, era bw'alumwanga ennyonta omuwanga ekyokunywa n'anywa. Bw'okola bw'otyo, olimuleetera okuwulira ennyo ensonyi." 
Romans12:21 Towangulwanga bibi bikukolebwa balala, naye ggwe biwangulenga ng'okola ebirungi." 
Romans13:1 Buli muntu awulirenga abafuzi, kubanga obuyinza bwonna buva eri Katonda, era abafuzi abaliwo, Katonda ye yabateekawo." 
Romans13:2 N'olwekyo ajeemera abafuzi, aba ajeemedde abo Katonda be yateekawo. Era abajeema, balyereetera omusango," 
Romans13:3 kubanga abafuzi tebaba ba kutiisa abo abakola obulungi, wabula abo abakola obubi. Oyagala obutatiisibwa mufuzi? Kale kola bulungi, olwo ajja kukusiima," 
Romans13:4 kubanga ye muweereza wa Katonda ku lw'obulungi bwo. Naye bw'okola obubi tya, kubanga obuyinza bw'alina si bwa bwereere. Ye muweereza wa Katonda, era ye abonereza abakola obubi." 
Romans13:5 N'olwekyo musaanidde okuba abawulize, si lwa kutya kubonerezebwa kwokka, naye n'olw'obulungi bw'emyoyo gyammwe." 
Romans13:6 Era kyemuva muwa omusolo, kubanga abafuzi baba baweereza ba Katonda, bwe banyiikirira emirimu gyabwe." 
Romans13:7 Kale bonna mubawenga bye muteekwa okubawa: asolooza omusolo mugumuwe, asolooza empooza mugimuwe, ateekwa okutiibwa mumutye, n'oweekitiibwa mukimuwe." 
Romans13:8 Temubeeranga na bbanja eri muntu n'omu, wabula okwagalananga, kubanga ayagala muntu munne aba atuukirizza Amateeka." 
Romans13:9 Ebiragiro bino: “Toyendanga, tottanga muntu, tobbanga, tobeeranga na kwegomba kubi”, n'ebiragiro ebirala, byonna bigattiddwa mu kimu ekigamba nti: “Yagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala ggwe wennyini.”" 
Romans13:10 Alina okwagala, takola muntu munne kabi. N'olwekyo okwagala kyekuva kutuukiriza Amateeka gonna." 
Romans13:11 Ate ebyo nga bikyali awo, mumanyi nti kino kye kiseera, essaawa etuuse, mmwe okuzuukuka mu tulo, kubanga kaakano okulokolebwa kwaffe kuli kumpi okusinga we twatandikira okukkiriza." 
Romans13:12 Ekiro kinaatera okuggwaako, olunaku lusembedde. Kale tuve mu ebyo bye tubadde tukola mu kizikiza, tukwate ebyokulwanyisa bye tunaakozesa emisana." 
Romans13:13 Tube n'empisa ezisaanira abantu abali mu kitangaala, sso si ez'abo abali mu kizikiza. Tuleme kwemalira mu binyumu ne mu kutamiira, newaakubadde mu bwenzi ne mu bukaba, wadde mu kuyombanga ne mu buggya." 
Romans13:14 Naye mwambale Mukama Yesu Kristo, mulemenga kuwa mubiri bbeetu okukolanga bye gwegomba." 
Romans14:1 Atali munywevu mu kukkiriza temumugobaganyanga, naye era temuwakananga naye ku ebyo by'abuusabuusaamu." 
Romans14:2 Waliwo akkiriza nti ayinza okulya buli ekiriibwa. Naye atali munywevu mu kukkiriza, alekerayo ddala okulya ennyama." 
Romans14:3 Oyo alya buli ekiriibwa alemenga kunyooma oyo atakirya. N'oyo atakirya, tanenyanga oyo akirya, kubanga Katonda teyamwegobaako." 
Romans14:4 Ggwe ani anenya omuweereza w'omulala? Mukama we ye asalawo oba akola bulungi oba akola bubi. Era ajja kukola bulungi, kubanga Mukama ye amusobozesa okuyimirirawo." 
Romans14:5 Omu alowooza olunaku olumu okusinga olulala obukulu, omulala alowooza nti ennaku zonna zenkanankana. Buli muntu anywererenga ku ky'alowooza okuba ekituufu." 
Romans14:6 Oyo akuza olunaku, akikola lwa kuwa Mukama kitiibwa. N'oyo alya buli ekiriibwa, akirya lwa kuwa Mukama kitiibwa, kubanga yeebaza Katonda. Era n'oyo atakirya, akireka lwa kuwa Mukama kitiibwa, era yeebaza Katonda." 
Romans14:7 Tewali muntu mu ffe abeera mulamu ku bubwe yekka, era tewali afa ku bubwe yekka." 
Romans14:8 Bwe tubeera abalamu, tuba balamu ku bwa Mukama. Era bwe tufa, tufa ku bwa Mukama. N'olwekyo oba tuba balamu oba tufa, tuba ba Mukama." 
Romans14:9 Kristo kyeyava afa n'azuukira, alyoke abeerenga Mukama w'abafu n'abalamu." 
Romans14:10 Kale ggwe, lwaki onenya muganda wo? Oba ggwe, lwaki onyooma muganda wo? Ffenna tuliyimirira mu maaso g'entebe ya Katonda kw'asalira emisango," 
Romans14:11 kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mukama agamba nti: nga bwe ndi omulamu, buli muntu alinfukaamirira. Era buli muntu alintendereza nze Katonda.”" 
Romans14:12 N'olwekyo buli muntu mu ffe alyennyonnyolerako mu maaso ga Katonda. 
Romans14:13 Kale tulekere awo okunenyagananga, naye mumalirire obutaleetawo kyesittaza wa luganda oba ekimusuula mu kibi." 
Romans14:14 Nga bwe ndi obumu ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mmanyi era nkakasa nga tewali kyakulya kizira ku bwakyo, wabula kiba kya muzizo eri oyo akirowooza nti kya muzizo." 
Romans14:15 Bw'onakuwaza muganda wo olw'emmere gy'olya, oba tokyafugibwa kwagalana. Oyo Kristo gwe yafiirira tomulekanga kuzikirira olw'ekyo ky'olya." 
Romans14:16 Kale ekyo mmwe kye muyita ekirungi, kiremenga kuvumibwa." 
Romans14:17 Obwakabaka bwa Katonda tebuli mu kulya na kunywa, wabula mu butuukirivu na mirembe na ssanyu, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu by'atuwa." 
Romans14:18 Aweereza bw'atyo Kristo, asanyusa nnyo Katonda, era abantu bamusiima." 
Romans14:19 Kale tunyiikirirenga ebireeta emirembe n'ebiyamba buli omu okuzimba munne. 
Romans14:20 Toyonoonanga mulimu gwa Katonda olw'ebyokulya. Ebyokulya byonna birungi, naye ekibi kwe kulya ekyo ekireetera abalala okugwa mu kibi." 
Romans14:21 Kirungi obutalyanga nnyama, newaakubadde okunywanga omwenge, wadde okukolanga ekirala kyonna ekyesittaza muganda wo [oba ekimunyiiza oba ekimunafuya]." 
Romans14:22 Ggwe ky'okkiriza, kikuumenga nga kimanyiddwa ggwe ne Katonda. Wa mukisa ateesalira musango kumusinga mu ebyo by'alowooza okuba ebituufu." 
Romans14:23 Kyokka oyo abuusabuusa, bw'alya azza musango, kubanga akola ekyo omutima gwe kye gutakkiriza. Era buli ekitava mu kukkiriza, kiba kibi." 
Romans15:1 Ffe ab'amaanyi mu kukkiriza tusaana okuyamba abo abanafu, nga tetwefaako ffekka." 
Romans15:2 Buli omu mu ffe alowoozenga ku bulungi bwa muntu munne, alyoke amuzimbenga mu kukkiriza." 
Romans15:3 Ne Kristo teyeerowoozaako yekka, wabula, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa, “Abantu bye baakuvuma byadda ku nze.”" 
Romans15:4 Byonna ebyawandiikibwa edda byawandiikibwa kutuyigiriza, tulyoke tubeerenga n'essuubi olw'okugumiikiriza n'olw'amaanyi ebyawandiikibwa ge bituwa." 
Romans15:5 Era Katonda asibukamu okugumiikiriza era n'amaanyi, abawe okussanga ekimu nga Kristo Yesu bw'ayagala," 
Romans15:6 mulyoke mutenderezenga Katonda, Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'omwoyo gumu n'eddoboozi limu." 
Romans15:7 Mwaniriziganenga nga Kristo bwe yabaaniriza mmwe, Katonda alyoke aweebwenga ekitiibwa." 
Romans15:8 Ŋŋamba nti Kristo yafuuka omuweereza w'abakomole, okulaga nga Katonda bw'ali omwesigwa, n'okutuukiriza ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza bajjajjaffe;" 
Romans15:9 era n'okusobozesa ab'amawanga amalala okutendereza Katonda olw'okusaasira kwe, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Kyennaavanga nkutendereza mu b'amawanga amalala, ne nnyimba nga ntenda erinnya lyo.”" 
Romans15:10 Era ekyawandiikibwa ekirala kigamba nti: “Mmwe ab'amawanga amalala, musanyukirenga wamu n'abantu be.”" 
Romans15:11 Era nti: “Mwenna ab'amawanga amalala mutenderezenga Mukama. Era abantu bonna bamutenderezenga.” 
Romans15:12 Era ne Yisaaya agamba nti: “Omuzzukulu wa Yesse alijja, alisituka okufuga ab'amawanga amalala. Era mu ye mwe muliba essuubi lyabwe.”" 
Romans15:13 Katonda asibukamu okusuubira, abajjuze mmwe essanyu lyonna n'emirembe olw'okumukkiriza, mulyoke mweyongerenga okubeera n'essuubi olw'amaanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Romans15:14 Baganda bange, nange nze nnyini nkakasiza ddala nti mmwe mujjudde empisa ennungi, mulina okumanya okujjuvu, era muyinza okubuuliriragana." 
Romans15:15 Naye mu bitundu ebimu eby'ebbaluwa eno, mbawandiikidde n'obuvumu, nga ndiko bye mbajjukiza. Kino nkikoze, kubanga Katonda yankwatirwa ekisa," 
Romans15:16 n'ampa okuba omuweereza wa Kristo Yesu nga nkolera mu b'amawanga amalala. Nkola omulimu ogw'obwakabona, nga ntegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi agava eri Katonda, ab'amawanga amalala balyoke babe ekirabo Katonda ky'asiima, nga kitukuziddwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Romans15:17 N'olwekyo mu Kristo Yesu nnyinza okwenyumiriza olw'omulimu gwe nkoledde Katonda. 
Romans15:18 Kubanga siguma kwogera ku kintu na kimu, wabula ku ebyo Kristo bye yakolera mu nze, n'afuula ab'amawanga amalala abawulize eri Katonda, ng'ayita mu ebyo bye nayogera ne bye nakola," 
Romans15:19 mu maanyi g'ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero, ne mu maanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu. Bwe ntyo okuviira ddala e Yerusaalemu n'okwetooloola okutuuka mu Yilliriko, nategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi agafa ku Kristo." 
Romans15:20 Kye nduubirira bulijjo, kwe kutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi mu bifo ebyo erinnya lya Kristo gye litawulirwangako, nnemenga okuzimba ku musingi gw'omuntu omulala," 
Romans15:21 wabula nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Abo abatategeezebwanga bimufaako balimulaba, n'abatamuwulirangako balimutegeera.”" 
Romans15:22 Ekyo kye kyanziyiza emirundi emingi okujja gye muli. 
Romans15:23 Naye kaakano nga bwe mmalirizza omulimu gwange mu bitundu bino, era nga bwe mmaze emyaka emingi nga njagala okujja okubalaba," 
Romans15:24 bwe ndiba ŋŋenda mu Sipaniya, nsuubira okuyitirako eyo ewammwe mbalabeko okumala ennaku eziwerako. Bwe ndimala okusanyukirako awamu nammwe, njagala munnyambe okutuuka mu Spaniya." 
Romans15:25 Naye kaakano ŋŋenda Yerusaalemu okutwalira abantu ba Katonda obuyambi. 
Romans15:26 Ab'e Makedooniya n'ab'e Akaya baasiima okuwaayo ku byabwe, okuyamba abantu ba Katonda abaavu, abali e Yerusaalemu." 
Romans15:27 Ekyo be baakyesiimira okukikola. Naye era balina ebbanja okuyamba abaavu abo, kubanga ab'amawanga amalala baagabana ku birungi eby'omwoyo eby'Abayudaaya, n'olwekyo basaana nabo okuyamba Abayudaaya mu by'omubiri." 
Romans15:28 Kale bwe ndimaliriza omulimu ogwo, nga mmaze okubakwasa byonna ebibaweerezeddwa bo, ndivaayo ne mpitira ewammwe, nga ŋŋenda e Sipaniya." 
Romans15:29 Mmanyi nti bwe ndijja gye muli, ndijja n'emikisa gya Kristo emijjuvu." 
Romans15:30 Abooluganda, mbeegayiridde ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'olw'okwagala kwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, munyiikirire wamu nange okunsabira eri Katonda." 
Romans15:31 Munsabire mpone abo abatalina kukkiriza abali mu Buyudaaya, era n'abantu ba Katonda abali mu Yerusaalemu, basiime bye mbatwalira." 
Romans15:32 Olwo nga Katonda ayagadde, ndijja gye muli nga nzijudde essanyu, mpummuleko nga ndi wamu nammwe." 
Romans15:33 Katonda agaba emirembe abeerenga nammwe mwenna. Amiina. 
Romans16:1 Mbanjulira mwannyinaffe Foyibe, omuweereza w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ekiri mu Kenkereya." 
Romans16:2 Mumwanirize ng'abantu ba Katonda bwe baaniriza, kubanga muntu wa Mukama waffe. Era mumuwe kyonna kye yeetaaga ng'ali nammwe, kubanga naye yennyini yayamba bangi, nga nange sibuzeemu." 
Romans16:3 Munnamusize Priska ne Akwila, be nkola nabo mu kuweereza Kristo Yesu," 
Romans16:4 abeewaayo okusalwako obulago okuwonya obulamu bwange. Abo si nze mbeebaza nzekka, wabula n'ebibiina byonna eby'abakkiriza Kristo eby'abamawanga amalala bibeebaza." 
Romans16:5 Munnamusize n'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu nnyumba yaabwe. Munnamusize mukwano gwange Epayineeto, eyali omubereberye mu Asiya okukkiriza Kristo." 
Romans16:6 Munnamusize Mariya eyabateganira mmwe ennyo bw'atyo. 
Romans16:7 Munnamusize Anduroniiko ne Yuniya baganda bange, be nali nabo mu kkomera, abamanyiddwa obulungi mu batume, era abansooka okubeera abagoberezi ba Kristo." 
Romans16:8 Mulamuse Ampuliyaato, mukwano gwange mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:9 Mulamuse Wurubaano akolera awamu naffe mu kuweereza Kristo, mulamuse ne Sutaaku mukwano gwange." 
Romans16:10 Mulamuse Apele Omukristo omutuufu. Mulamuse ab'omu maka ga Arisitobulo. 
Romans16:11 Munnamusize ne Herodiyooni, muganda wange. Mulamuse n'ab'omu nnyumba ya Narukiso, abagoberezi ba Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:12 Munnamusize Turufayina ne Turufoosa abakola omulimu gwa Mukama waffe. Munnamusize ne Perusi omwagalwa, akoledde ennyo Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:13 Mulamuse Ruufo omulondemu wa Mukama waffe. Mulamuse ne nnyina eyafuuka mmange. 
Romans16:14 Mulamuse Asunkurito, Fulegooni, Herume, Paturoba, Heruma, n'abooluganda abali awamu nabo." 
Romans16:15 Mulamuse Filologo ne Yuliya, Nerewo ne mwannyina, ne Olimpa, n'abantu ba Katonda bonna abali nabo." 
Romans16:16 Mulamusagane mu ngeri eraga okwagalana okw'abooluganda. Ebibiina byonna eby'abakkiriza Kristo bibalamusizza. 
Romans16:17 Abooluganda, mbeegayiridde mwerindenga abo abaleeta ebyawukanya n'ebyesittaza abantu, ebirwanyisa okuyigirizibwa kwe mwafuna. Mubeewalenga." 
Romans16:18 Ab'engeri eyo si baweereza ba Kristo Mukama waffe, wabula baweereza ba mbuto zaabwe. Bakozesa ebigambo ebirungi era eby'okuwaanawaana, ne balimbalimba emitima gy'abantu abatalina kabi." 
Romans16:19 Wonna wonna abantu baawulira nga mmwe bwe muli abawulize eri Katonda, kyenva mbeera omusanyufu ku lwammwe. Njagala mubenga bagezi mu kukola ebirungi, naye nga temumanyi kukola bibi." 
Romans16:20 Olwo amangu ddala Katonda atuwa emirembe, ajja kubetentera Sitaani wansi w'ebigere byammwe. Emikisa gya Mukama waffe Yesu gibeerenga nammwe." 
Romans16:21 Timoteewo akolera awamu nange abalamusizza. 
Romans16:22 Era nange Terutiyo, awandiise ebbaluwa eno, mbalamusizza mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:23 Gaayo ansuza, era nga mu nnyumba ye mwe mukuŋŋaanira ekibiina kyonna eky'abakkiriza Kristo, abalamusizza. Erasto omuwanika w'ekibuga era ne muganda waffe Kwanto babalamusizza." 
Romans16:24  
Romans16:25 Tutenderezenga Katonda ayinza okubanyweza mu kukkiriza. Ago ge Mawulire Amalungi ge ntegeeza abantu, ge ga Yesu Kristo, era kye kyama ekyakwekebwa okuva edda n'edda lyonna." 
Romans16:26 Naye kaakano ekyama ekyo kyamanyisibwa mu byawandiikibwa abalanzi. Era Katonda ataggwaawo yalagira kimanyibwe ab'amawanga gonna, abantu balyoke bakkirize Katonda era bamuwulirenga." 
Romans16:27 Kale Katonda oyo omu era omugezi yekka, aweebwenga ekitiibwa ku bwa Yesu Kristo emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
1Corinthians1:1 Nze Pawulo eyayitibwa okuba omutume wa Kristo Yesu, nga Katonda bwe yayagala, nze ne Sotene owooluganda," 
1Corinthians1:2 tuwandiikira ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo eky'omu Korinto. Mwayitibwa okuba abatukuvu, ne mutukuzibwa mu Kristo Yesu, awamu ne bonna abakoowoola mu buli kifo erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, Mukama waabwe era owaffe." 
1Corinthians1:3 Katonda Kitaffe, ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, babakwatirwe mmwe ekisa, era babawe emirembe." 
1Corinthians1:4 Katonda wange eyabakwatirwa mmwe ekisa ng'ayita mu Kristo Yesu, mmwebaza bulijjo olw'ekyo kye yabakolera." 
1Corinthians1:5 Mwagaggawalira mu Kristo, ne mufuna buli kintu, omuli bye mwogera byonna ne bye mumanyi byonna," 
1Corinthians1:6 kubanga ebyo bye twabategeeza ku Kristo, byanywerera ddala mu mmwe." 
1Corinthians1:7 N'olwekyo mulina buli kirabo kyonna, nga mulindirira okulabika kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:8 Era alibanyweza okutuusa ku nkomerero, muleme kuba na kye munenyezebwamu ku lunaku Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo lw'aliddirako." 
1Corinthians1:9 Katonda eyabayita okwegatta n'Omwana we, Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mwesigwa." 
1Corinthians1:10 Abooluganda, mbeegayirira mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mwenna mukkiriziganyenga mu bye mwogera, mulemenga kwawukanamu, naye mubenga ba mwoyo gumu n'emmeeme emu." 
1Corinthians1:11 Ab'omu nnyumba ya Kuloowe bantegeeza ebifa ku mmwe baganda bange, nga mu mmwe mulimu ennyombo." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kye ŋŋamba kye kino nti buli omu mu mmwe agamba nti nze ndi wa Pawulo, oba nti ndi wa Apollo, oba nti ndi wa Keefa, oba nti ndi wa Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:13 Kwe kugamba Kristo ayawuliddwamu? Pawulo yali akomereddwa ku musaalaba ku lwammwe? Oba mwabatizibwa mu linnya lya Pawulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Neebaza Katonda, kubanga nze sibatizanga wadde omu ku mmwe, okuggyako Krispo ne Gaayo." 
1Corinthians1:15 N'olwekyo tewali ayinza kugamba nti yabatizibwa mu linnya lyange. 
1Corinthians1:16 (Era nabatiza n'ab'omu nnyumba ya Siteefano. Okuggyako abo, simanyi oba nga nabatizaayo omulala.)" 
1Corinthians1:17 Kristo teyantuma kubatiza, wabula yantuma okutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi, awatali kwesigama ku magezi ag'abantu obuntu, si kulwa ng'omusaalaba gwa Kristo guggwaamu amaanyi." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ebigambo ebifa ku musaalaba birabika nga bya busirusiru eri abo abali mu kkubo erigenda mu kuzikirira, naye eri ffe abalokolebwa, biba maanyi ga Katonda," 
1Corinthians1:19 kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Ndizikiriza amagezi g'abagezi, ne nzigyawo okutegeera kw'abategeevu.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Omugezi ali ludda wa? Omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka ali ludda wa? Omuwakanyi ow'omulembe guno ali ludda wa? Amagezi g'ensi Katonda tagafudde busirusiru? 
1Corinthians1:21 Katonda mu magezi ge, alaze nti abantu tebasobola kumumanya lwa magezi agaabwe, kyavudde asiima okuyita mu busirusiru bw'ebigambo bye tutegeeza abantu, alyoke alokole abo abamukkiriza." 
1Corinthians1:22 Abayudaaya baagala kulaba byewuunyo. Abayonaani banoonya magezi. 
1Corinthians1:23 Naye ffe tutegeeza abantu Kristo eyakomererwa ku musaalaba. Kristo oyo nkonge eri Abayudaaya, ate busirusiru eri ab'amawanga amalala." 
1Corinthians1:24 Naye Kristo maanyi ga Katonda, era magezi ga Katonda eri abo Abayudaaya n'Abayonaani, Katonda b'ayise," 
1Corinthians1:25 kubanga obusirusiru bwa Katonda, businga abantu amagezi; n'obunafu bwa Katonda, businga abantu amaanyi." 
1Corinthians1:26 Kale abooluganda, mujjukire nga bwe mwali, Katonda bwe yabayita. Batono mu mmwe ensi be yandiyise ab'amagezi, batono abaali ab'obuyinza, era batono abaali abeekitiibwa." 
1Corinthians1:27 Kyokka Katonda yalonda ebyo ensi by'eyita ebisirusiru, alyoke akwase ab'amagezi ensonyi. Era yalonda ebyo ensi by'eyita ebinafu, alyoke akwase eby'amaanyi ensonyi." 
1Corinthians1:28 Katonda yalonda ebyo ensi by'egaya era by'enyooma, era by'eyita ebitaliiwo, alyoke azikirize ebyo ensi by'eyita ebikulu," 
1Corinthians1:29 waleme kubaawo yeenyumiriza mu maaso ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kyokka mmwe Katonda yabagatta ne Kristo, gwe yafuula amagezi gaffe. Mu Kristo ono, Katonda mwe yatufuulira abatuukirivu, mwe yatutukuliza era mwe yatununulira," 
1Corinthians1:31 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Eyeenyumiriza, yeenyumiririzenga mu Mukama.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Abooluganda, bwe najja gye muli, okubategeeza ekyama kya Katonda, saakozesa bigambo bizibu okutegeera, oba eby'amagezi ennyo," 
1Corinthians2:2 kubanga bwe nali nammwe nasalawo okwerabira ebirala byonna, okuggyako Yesu Kristo, eyakomererwa ku musaalaba." 
1Corinthians2:3 Bwe nali mu mmwe, nali munafu era nga nkankana nnyo olw'okutya." 
1Corinthians2:4 Era mu kwogera kwange ne mu kuyigiriza kwange, temwalimu bigambo bya magezi ebisendasenda, wabula mwalimu amaanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
1Corinthians2:5 okukkiriza kwammwe kuleme kunywerera ku magezi ga bantu buntu, wabula ku maanyi ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:6 Naye mu abo abakulu mu mwoyo, twogera eby'amagezi, naye eby'amagezi agatali ga bantu ab'oku nsi kuno, wadde ag'abafuzi b'ensi eno, abaggwaawo," 
1Corinthians2:7 wabula twogera eby'amagezi ga Katonda agatamanyiddwa bantu, era agaakisibwa. Katonda yagateekateeka edda n'edda lyonna, gabe ekitiibwa kyaffe." 
1Corinthians2:8 Tewali n'omu ku bafuzi ku nsi kuno ategeera magezi ago, kubanga singa baagategeera, tebandikomeredde ku musaalaba Mukama oweekitiibwa." 
1Corinthians2:9 Naye nga bwe kyawandiikibwa: “Ebyo eriiso bye litalabangako, n'okutu bye kutawulirangako, era ebitalowoozebwangako muntu n'omu, by'ebyo Katonda bye yategekera abamwagala.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Kyokka ffe, Katonda ng'ayita mu Mwoyo we, yatumanyisa ekyama ekyo, kubanga Mwoyo anoonyereza buli kintu, n'ekyo ekiri mu Katonda yennyini." 
1Corinthians2:11 Tewali amanya birowoozo bya muntu, wabula omwoyo gwe gwe gubimanya. Bwe kityo ne Mwoyo wa Katonda ye yekka amanya ebya Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:12 Tetwaweebwa mwoyo gwa ku nsi kuno, wabula twaweebwa Mwoyo eyava ewa Katonda, tulyoke tutegeerenga ebyo Katonda by'atuwa." 
1Corinthians2:13 N'olwekyo tetwogera bigambo bya magezi ga bantu buntu, wabula twogera ebyo Mwoyo by'ayigiriza, ne tubinnyonnyola abo abategeera ebya Mwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:14 Naye omuntu atafugibwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, tasobola kukkiriza bya Mwoyo wa Katonda, kubanga abiraba ng'eby'obusirusiru. Era tayinza kubitegeera, kubanga byekenneenyezebwa muntu alina Mwoyo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:15 Oyo afugibwa omwoyo yeekenneenya byonna, naye ye tewali n'omu amwekenneenya," 
1Corinthians2:16 kubanga, “ani amanyi Mukama by'alowooza alyoke amuwabule”? Kyokka ffe tumanyi endowooza ya Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:1 Kale abooluganda, ssaasobola kwogera nammwe ng'abafugibwa omwoyo, naye nayogera nammwe ng'abantu abafugibwa omubiri, abakyali abato mu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nabanywesa mata, ssaabaliisa mmere, kubanga mwali temunnagisobola. Era ne kaakano temunnagisobola," 
1Corinthians3:3 kubanga mukyafugibwa mubiri. Kale obuggya n'okuyombagana bwe bibeera mu mmwe, olwo nga temufugibwa mubiri, era nga n'empisa zammwe si za bantu buntu?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Kale omu mu mmwe bw'agamba nti: “Nze ndi wa Pawulo,” n'omulala nti: “Nze ndi wa Apollo,” olwo temuba ng'abantu obuntu?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Kale Apollo ye ani? Ye Pawulo ye ani? Si baweereza buweereza abaabaleetera okukkiriza, nga Mukama bwe yawa buli omu?" 
1Corinthians3:6 Nze nasiga, Apollo n'afukirira, kyokka Katonda ye yakuza." 
1Corinthians3:7 Oyo asiga, n'oyo afukirira si be bakulu, wabula Katonda akuza." 
1Corinthians3:8 Oyo asiga, n'oyo afukirira, bonna benkana, era buli omu aliweebwa empeera ye, okusinziira ku mulimu gwe yakola," 
1Corinthians3:9 kubanga ffe tuli bakozi, abakolera awamu ne Katonda. Mmwe muli nnimiro ya Katonda, muli nnyumba ya Katonda." 
1Corinthians3:10 Nakola omulimu gw'omuzimbi omukugu, nga nsinziira ku kisa Katonda kye yankwatirwa, ne nteekawo omusingi, n'omuzimbi omulala kw'azimbira. Kyokka buli aguzimbirako yeegenderezenga," 
1Corinthians3:11 kubanga Yesu Kristo yateekebwawo, nga gwe musingi gwokka, era tewali ayinza kuteekawo musingi mulala." 
1Corinthians3:12 Kale ku musingi ogwo, omuntu bw'azimbisaako zaabu, ffeeza, amayinja ag'omuwendo, emiti, essubi, ebisasiro –" 
1Corinthians3:13 omulimu gwa buli omu gulirabibwa. Olunaku Mukama lw'alisalirako omusango lwe luligwoleka, kubanga lulikya na muliro. Era omuliro ogwo gwe gulyoleka omulimu gwa buli omu nga bwe gufaanana." 
1Corinthians3:14 Omuntu kye yazimba ku musingi ogwo bwe kirisigalawo, aliweebwa empeera." 
1Corinthians3:15 Naye bwe kiryokebwa, alikifiirwa. Wabula ye yennyini alirokolebwa, kyokka ng'ali ng'ayise mu muliro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Temumanyi nga muli ssinzizo lya Katonda, era nga Mwoyo wa Katonda abeera mu mmwe?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Kale omuntu bw'azikiriza essinzizo lya Katonda, omuntu oyo alizikirizibwa Katonda, kubanga essinzizo lya Katonda ttukuvu, era essinzizo eryo ye mmwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Waleme kubaawo yeerimba. Bwe wabaawo mu mmwe eyeerowooza okuba omugezi mu by'ensi, afuukenga musiru, lw'aliba omugezi," 
1Corinthians3:19 kubanga amagezi g'ensi, buba busirusiru mu maaso ga Katonda. Kyawandiikibwa nti: “Katonda akwatira abagezi mu bugezigezi bwabwe.”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Era kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mukama amanyi nti ebirowoozo by'abagezi tebiriimu nsa.” 
1Corinthians3:21 Kale mulemenga kwenyumiririza mu bantu, kubanga byonna byammwe." 
1Corinthians3:22 Oba Pawulo, oba Apollo, oba Keefa, oba ensi, oba obulamu, oba okufa, oba ebiriwo, oba ebigenda okubaawo, byonna byammwe." 
1Corinthians3:23 Mmwe muli ba Kristo, ate Kristo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:1 Abantu basaana batulabenga nti tuli baweereza ba Kristo, abaakwasibwa ebyama bya Katonda," 
1Corinthians4:2 kubanga omuwanika kimugwanira okuba omwesigwa. 
1Corinthians4:3 Naye nze sifaayo, mmwe oba omuntu omulala yenna okunsalira omusango. Nange nzennyini sigwesalira," 
1Corinthians4:4 kubanga seemanyiiko musango. Naye ekyo tekitegeeza nti sirina musango, wabula agunsalira ye Mukama." 
1Corinthians4:5 N'olwekyo temusaliranga muntu musango ng'ekiseera tekinnatuuka, era nga Mukama tannajja. Bw'alijja, alimulisa buli kintu ekikwekeddwa mu kizikiza; era aliraga ebirowoozo ebiri mu mitima gy'abantu. Olwo n'alyoka awa buli omu ettendo erimusaanira." 
1Corinthians4:6 Abooluganda, ebyo byonna mbyogedde ku Apollo ne ku nze nzennyini, ng'ekyokulabirako, biryoke bibayambe, muyige ekyawandiikibwa ekigamba nti: “Tosukkanga kipimo.” Era mu mmwe temusaana kubaamu agulumiza muntu n'omu, ate n'anyooma omulala." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ani akufudde omukulu wa banno? Kiki ky'olina ky'otaaweebwa buweebwa? Kale oba nga waweebwa, lwaki weenyumiriza ng'ataaweebwa buweebwa?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Mumaze okufuna byonna bye mwetaaga. Mugaggawadde. Mufuuse bakabaka, newaakubadde nga ffe si bwe tuli. Ddala nandyagadde mube bakabaka, naffe tulyoke tubeere bakabaka wamu nammwe." 
1Corinthians4:9 Kubanga ndowooza nti ffe abatume, Katonda yatuwa ekifo ekisemberayo ddala, nga tuli ng'abasaliddwa ogw'okuttibwa, kubanga twafuuka ekyo ensi n'abantu bonna kye beerolera." 
1Corinthians4:10 Ffe tuli banafu, naye mmwe muli ba maanyi. Mmwe muweebwa ekitiibwa, naye ffe tunyoomebwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Era n'okutuusa kati tulumwa enjala n'ennyonta, tetulina kye twambala, tukubibwa, era tubungeeta bubungeesi;" 
1Corinthians4:12 era tutegana nga tukola n'emikono gyaffe. Batukolimira, ffe ne tubasabira mikisa. Bwe tuyigganyizibwa, tugumiikiriza." 
1Corinthians4:13 Bwe tuvumibwa, ffe tuddamu na ggonjebwa. Era okutuusa kaakano, tuli ng'ebisasiro by'ensi era obusa bwa byonna." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ebyo sibiwandiika lwa kubaswaza, wabula lwa kubabuulirira ng'abaana bange abaagalwa." 
1Corinthians4:15 Kubanga newaakubadde nga mu Kristo mulina abayigiriza nkumi na nkumi, naye temulina bakitammwe bangi. Kubanga olw'okubaleetera Amawulire Amalungi, nafuuka kitammwe mu Kristo Yesu." 
1Corinthians4:16 Kale mbegayiridde mulabirenga ku nze. 
1Corinthians4:17 Kyenvudde mbatumira Timoteewo. Ye mwana wange omwagalwa era omwesigwa. Alibajjukiza ebyo bye ngoberera mu bulamu bwange mu Kristo, era bye njigiriza wonna wonna mu buli kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo." 
1Corinthians4:18 Abamu mu mmwe beekulumbaza nga balowooza nti nze sigenda kujja gye muli. 
1Corinthians4:19 Kyokka Mukama bw'alyagala, ndijja mangu gye muli mmanyire ddala ebyo abeekulumbaza bye baasooka okukola, sso si ebyo bye boogera obwogezi." 
1Corinthians4:20 Kubanga Obwakabaka bwa Katonda tebuli mu bigambo bugambo, wabula mu maanyi." 
1Corinthians4:21 Mwagalako ki? Mwagala njije na muggo oba njije nga njijudde okwagala era n'obukkakkamu? 
1Corinthians5:1 Tutegedde nti mu mmwe mulimu obwenzi, obutasangibwa na mu batalina kukkiriza, kubanga omuntu atwala muka kitaawe n'amufuula mukazi we." 
1Corinthians5:2 Ne mwekulumbaza sso nga mwandinakuwadde bunakuwazi, era eyakola ekyo yandibadde aggyibwa mu mmwe." 
1Corinthians5:3 Nze newaakubadde siri eyo nammwe mu mubiri, naye nga bwe ndi nammwe mu mwoyo, omuntu eyakola ekikolwa ekyo, mmaze okumusalira omusango okumusinga." 
1Corinthians5:4 Mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mukuŋŋaane nga nange ndi nammwe mu mwoyo, era nga n'amaanyi ga Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo gali nammwe" 
1Corinthians5:5 muweeyo eri Sitaani omuntu eyakola ekyo, omubiri gwe guzikirizibwe, omwoyo gwe gulyoke gulokolebwe ku lunaku Mukama waffe Yesu lw'addirako." 
1Corinthians5:6 Temusaana kwekulumbaza. Temumanyi nti ekizimbulukusa ekitono kizimbulukusa ekitole kyonna? 
1Corinthians5:7 Muggyeewo ekizimbulukusa ekyo eky'edda, mulyoke mubeerere ddala ekitole ekiggya, nga ddala temuliimu kizimbulukusa, kubanga Kristo, endiga ey'Okuyitako kwaffe, atambiddwa." 
1Corinthians5:8 Kale tulye embaga eteri ya mugaati ogulimu ekizimbulukusa eky'edda, eky'ettima n'obubi, naye ey'omugaati ogutaliimu kizimbulukusa: bwe bulongoofu, obwesimbu, n'amazima." 
1Corinthians5:9 Mu bbaluwa gye nabawandiikira, nabagamba obuteetabanga na benzi." 
1Corinthians5:10 Kyokka sigamba abenzi abatalina kukkiriza, ab'omululu oba abanyazi, oba abasinza ebitali Katonda, kubanga okwewala abo, mpozzi mwandibadde nga muviira ddala ku nsi kuno." 
1Corinthians5:11 Naye kaakano mbawandiikira, mulemenga kwetaba na muntu n'omu eyeeyita owooluganda, bw'aba nga mwenzi oba ow'omululu, oba asinza ebitali Katonda, oba omuvumi w'abantu, oba omutamiivu, oba omunyazi. Ow'engeri eyo n'okulya temulyanga naye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Kale nfaayo ki okusalira omusango abantu ab'ebweru? Katonda ye aligubasalira. Naye abo ab'omu nju yammwe, temusaana kubasalira musango? Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Omubi mumuggye mu mmwe.”" 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Omu mu mmwe bw'abaako ky'avunaana munne, lwaki aguma okutwala ensonga ze mu balamuzi abatalina kukkiriza, n'atazitwala mu bantu ba Katonda?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Temumanyi nti abantu ba Katonda be balisalira ensi omusango? Oba nga mmwe mulisalira ensi omusango, kale temusobola kusala musango mu busonga obwo obutono?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Temumanyi nti ffe tulisalira bamalayika omusango? Kale tuyinza tutya okulemwa okusala emisango egy'omu bulamu buno? 
1Corinthians6:4 Kale bwe muba n'emisango egy'engeri eyo, lwaki mugitwala eri abo ab'ebweru, abanyoomebwa mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Kino nkyogedde kubaswaza. Ddala mu mmwe temuyinza kuzuulamu muntu mugezi asobola okusala omusango gw'abooluganda? 
1Corinthians6:6 Ddala owooluganda awawaabire muganda we eri abo abatalina kukkiriza? 
1Corinthians6:7 Naye n'okuwozaŋŋanya mwekka na mwekka, kiraga nti muli mu kabi. Lwaki temugumiikiriza nga mukoleddwa akabi? Lwaki temugumira bya kulyazaamanyizibwa?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Naye mmwe mwennyini mukola bubi, era mulyazaamaanya. Kino mukikola ne ku baganda bammwe." 
1Corinthians6:9 Temumanyi nti abatali batuukirivu tebalifuna mugabo mu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda? Temulimbibwanga: abo abakola eby'obukaba, abasinza ebitali Katonda, abenzi, abalya ebisiyaga," 
1Corinthians6:10 ababbi, ab'omululu, abatamiivu, abawaayiriza, n'abanyazi, tebalifuna mugabo mu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:11 Era abamu ku mmwe mwali ng'abo. Naye olw'erinnya lya Mukama Yesu Kristo n'olwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, mwanaazibwa era mwatukuzibwa, ne muweebwa obutuukirivu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Omu ayinza okugamba nti: “Byonna nzikirizibwa okubikola.” Weewaawo, naye si byonna ebigasa. Nange nnyinza okugamba nti: “Byonna nzikirizibwa okubikola.” Naye nga byo si bye binfuga." 
1Corinthians6:13 N'omulala ayinza okugamba nti: “Ebyokulya byatonderwa lubuto, n'olubuto lwatonderwa byakulya.” Weewaawo, naye byombi Katonda alibiggyawo. Naye omubiri teguliiwo lwa bwenzi, wabula guliwo lwa Mukama, ne Mukama lwa mubiri." 
1Corinthians6:14 Katonda yazuukiza Mukama, era naffe alituzuukiza olw'amaanyi ge." 
1Corinthians6:15 Temumanyi nti emibiri gyammwe bitundu bya mubiri gwa Kristo? Kale nnyinza okuddira ebitundu by'omubiri gwa Kristo ne mbifuula ebitundu by'omwenzi? Ekyo siyinza kukikola. 
1Corinthians6:16 Temumanyi nti eyeegatta n'omwenzi, bombi baba omubiri gumu? Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Bombi baliba omubiri gumu.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Kyokka oyo eyeegatta ne Mukama, bombi baba omu mu mwoyo." 
1Corinthians6:18 Mwewalenga obwenzi. Buli kibi omuntu ky'akola, kiba bweru wa mubiri gwe. Kyokka oyo ayenda, akola ekibi ku mubiri gwe gwennyini." 
1Corinthians6:19 Temumanyi nti emibiri gyammwe lye ssinzizo lya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abeera mu mmwe, Katonda gwe yabawa? Era temumanyi nti temuliiwo ku lwammwe?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Mwagulwa n'omuwendo munene. N'olwekyo emibiri gyammwe mugikozesenga ebyo ebiweesa Katonda ekitiibwa. 
1Corinthians7:1 Kaakano bino bye bikwata ku ebyo bye mwampandiikira. Kirungi omusajja alemenga kuwasa. 
1Corinthians7:2 Kyokka olw'okwewala obwenzi, kisaana buli musajja afune omukazi owuwe, era na buli mukazi afune bba." 
1Corinthians7:3 Omusajja atuukirizenga ekimubanjibwa mu bufumbo, era n'omukazi akolenga bw'atyo." 
1Corinthians7:4 Omukazi si ye alina obuyinza ku mubiri gwe, wabula bba ye agulinako obuyinza. Bw'atyo n'omusajja si ye alina obuyinza ku mubiri gwe, wabula mukazi we ye agulinako obuyinza." 
1Corinthians7:5 Abafumbo, buli omu alemenga kugaana munne, wabula mpozzi nga mulagaanye ekiseera, mulyoke mubenga n'ebbanga ery'okwegayiririramu Katonda. Naye oluvannyuma muddiŋŋanenga, sikulwa nga Sitaani abakema olw'obuteefuga bwammwe." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ekyo nkyogera nga mbalaga nti muyinza okukikola, sso si tteeka." 
1Corinthians7:7 Nandyagadde abantu bonna babe nga nze bwe ndi. Kyokka buli omu alina ekirabo kye ekyenjawulo, Katonda kye yamuwa: omu kya ngeri eno, n'omulala kya ngeri ndala." 
1Corinthians7:8 Abo abatali bafumbo ne bannamwandu, mbategeeza nti singa basigalira awo nga nze bwe ndi, kyandibadde kirungi." 
1Corinthians7:9 Naye oba nga tebasobola kwefuga, kale bawase oba bafumbirwe, kubanga okufumbiriganwa kusinga okubonyaabonyezebwa okwegomba." 
1Corinthians7:10 Bo abafumbo mbalagira bwe nti, si nze mbalagira, wabula Mukama. Omukazi tanobanga ku bba." 
1Corinthians7:11 Singa anoba, taafumbirwenga nate. Ateekwa kubeerera awo, oba si ekyo, addiŋŋane ne bba." 
1Corinthians7:12 Abalala bo mbagamba, nze sso si Mukama, nti owooluganda bw'abanga n'omukazi atali mukkiriza, ng'ayagala okubeera naye, tamugobanga." 
1Corinthians7:13 Era singa omukazi abeera n'omusajja atali mukkiriza, ng'ayagala okubeera naye, tamunobangako." 
1Corinthians7:14 Kubanga omusajja atali mukkiriza, atukuzibwa olw'okwegatta ne mukazi we, era n'omukazi atali mukkiriza atukuzibwa olw'okwegatta ne bba omukkiriza. Singa tekiri bwe kityo, abaana bammwe tebandibadde balongoofu, naye kaakano batukuvu." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kyokka oyo atali mukkiriza bw'ayagala okwawukana, baawukane. Muganda waffe oba mwannyinaffe tewali kimusiba mu ekyo, kubanga Katonda yatuyitira mirembe." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ggwe omukazi omukkiriza omanyi otya ng'olirokola balo? Oba ggwe omusajja omukkiriza, omanyi otya ng'olirokola mukazi wo?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Buli omu abe mu bulamu Mukama bwe yamuwa, era Katonda bwe yamuyitira. Ekyo kye kiragiro kye mpa mu bibiina byonna eby'abakkiriza Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:18 Eyakkiriza nga mukomole aleme okwegomba okuba ataakomolebwa. N'oyo eyakkiriza nga si mukomole aleme kwegomba kukomolebwa. 
1Corinthians7:19 Kubanga okukomolebwa oba obutakomolebwa si kye kikulu, wabula ekikulu kwe kukwatanga ebiragiro bya Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:20 Buli omu asigalenga mu mbeera gye yayitirwamu. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wayitibwa ng'oli muddu? Kale tofaayo. Naye oba nga ofunye omukisa okufuuka ow'eddembe, togufiirwa." 
1Corinthians7:22 Kubanga eyayitibwa Mukama nga muddu, Mukama yamufuula muntu we wa ddembe. N'oyo Mukama gwe yayita nga wa ddembe, muddu mu Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mmwe yabagula omuwendo munene. N'olwekyo temufuukanga baddu ba bantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Abooluganda, buli omu abeerenga mu mbeera gye yalimu, Katonda bwe yamuyita." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ebikwata ku batali bafumbo, sirina kiragiro kiva eri Mukama, naye mbawa ekirowoozo kyange ng'omuntu eyasaasirwa Mukama, ne nfuuka omwesigwa." 
1Corinthians7:26 Okusinziira ku bizibu ebiriwo kaakano, ndowooza nti omuntu kirungi okusigala nga bw'ali." 
1Corinthians7:27 Bw'oba n'omukazi leka kugezaako kumweggyako. Bw'oba toli mufumbo, leka kugezaako kunoonya mukazi wa kuwasa." 
1Corinthians7:28 Kyokka bw'owasa oba tokoze kibi. Era n'omukazi atali mufumbo bw'afumbirwa, aba takoze kibi. Wabula abo abafumbirwa banaabeeranga n'emitawaana egy'obufumbo. Naye mmwe nandyagadde okugibawonya." 
1Corinthians7:29 Abooluganda, mbagamba nti ekiseera kisigadde kitono, era okuva kaakano abo abalina abakazi babe ng'abatalina," 
1Corinthians7:30 n'abo abakaaba babe ng'abatakaaba, n'abo abasanyuka, babe ng'abatasanyuka. Abo abagula babe ng'abatalina bintu." 
1Corinthians7:31 Era n'abo abakozesa eby'oku nsi kuno, babe ng'abatabikozesa, kubanga ensi eno nga bw'eri, eggwaawo." 
1Corinthians7:32 Njagala mulemenga kweraliikirira. Omusajja atali mufumbo yeemalira ku mulimu gwa Mukama, era Mukama gw'ayagala okusanyusa." 
1Corinthians7:33 Naye omufumbo, yeeraliikirira bya nsi, nga bw'anaasanyusa mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:34 Aba yeesazeemu, alowooza wabiri. Era omukazi atali mufumbo oba omuwala, yeemalira ku bya Mukama, ayagala abe mutukuvu mu mubiri ne mu mwoyo. Naye omukazi omufumbo, yeeraliikirira bya nsi, nga bw'anaasanyusanga bba." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ebyo mbyogera lwa bulungi bwammwe, sibatikka mugugu, wabula mbalaga bulazi ekisinga obulungi, mulyoke mweweere ddala Mukama, nga temutaataaganyizibwa." 
1Corinthians7:36 Naye omusajja bw'alowoozanga nti tayisizza bulungi omuwala gw'abeera naye bw'atamuwasa, ate nga tayinza kwefuga, akole nga bw'ayagala; bafumbiriganwe, ekyo si kibi." 
1Corinthians7:37 Naye oyo omunywevu mu mutima gwe, era nga talina kimuwaliriza, naye nga yeefuga, n'amalirira obutawasa muwala oyo, wabula okumukuuma nga mwannyina, aba akoze bulungi." 
1Corinthians7:38 Kale oyo awasa omukazi gw'ayogereza aba akoze bulungi, kyokka oyo amukuuma nga mwannyina ye asinga." 
1Corinthians7:39 Omukazi omufumbo taba na ddembe okufumbirwa omusajja omulala nga bba akyali mulamu. Kyokka bba bw'afa, olwo aba wa ddembe okufumbirwa omusajja omulala gw'aba ayagadde, wabula ng'agoberera Mukama ky'ayagala." 
1Corinthians7:40 Kyokka bw'asigala nga bw'ali, lw'asinga okuba n'essanyu. Ekyo kye kirowoozo kyange, era ndowooza nti nange nnina Mwoyo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians8:1 Kale ebyo ebikwata ku kulya ebiweereddwayo eri ebitali Katonda, kituufu nti “Ffenna tutegeera.” Naye okutegeera kuleeta okwekulumbaza, wabula okwagala kwe kuzimba." 
1Corinthians8:2 Omuntu bw'alowooza nti alina ky'amanyi, aba tannamanya ngeri gy'asaanira kumanyamu." 
1Corinthians8:3 Naye omuntu bw'ayagala Katonda, omuntu oyo amanyibwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians8:4 Naye bwe twogera ku kulyanga ebiweebwayo eri ebyo ebitali Katonda, tumanyi nti ebyo ebitali Katonda, tebiriimu nsa. Tumanyi nti waliwo Katonda omu yekka." 
1Corinthians8:5 Newaakubadde nga waliwo abayitibwa balubaale mu ggulu oba ku nsi, era newaakubadde nga balubaale abo be “Bakama” abangi," 
1Corinthians8:6 naye tulina Katonda omu, Kitaffe eyatonda ebintu byonna, era nga naffe tubeerawo ku bubwe. Era waliwo Mukama omu yekka Yesu Kristo, byonna mwe byatonderwa, atubeesaawo." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kyokka si bonna abamanyi ekyo. Naye abantu abamu baamanyiira ebitali Katonda, era n'okutuusa kaakano bwe balya emmere eyo, balowooza nti y'ebyo ebitali Katonda. Era olw'okuba ng'omwoyo gwabwe munafu, balowooza nti bakoze kibi okulya emmere eyo." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kyokka emmere si y'etufuula abalungi eri Katonda. Era bwe tutalya tetulina kye tufiirwa, ne bwe tulya, tetulina kye tweyongerako." 
1Corinthians8:9 Naye mwegendereze, eddembe lyammwe lireme okufuuka ekyesittaza abanafu." 
1Corinthians8:10 Kubanga ggwe “Amanyi,” singa omuntu omunafu mu mwoyo akulaba ng'otudde mu ssabo olya, ekyo tekirimugumya okulya ebyo ebiweereddwayo eri ebitali Katonda?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Kale muganda wo oyo omunafu, Kristo gwe yafiirira, alizikirira olw'okumanya kwo?" 
1Corinthians8:12 N'olwekyo bw'okola ekibi ku baganda bo, n'ofumita omwoyo gwabwe omunafu, oba okikoze ku Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:13 Kale oba nga kye ndya kireetera muganda wange okugwa mu kibi, siiryenga nnyama emirembe gyonna, nneme okuleetera muganda wange okugwa mu kibi." 
1Corinthians9:1 Siri wa ddembe? Siri mutume? Saalaba Yesu Mukama waffe? Si mmwe bibala by'omulimu gwe nkolera Mukama? 
1Corinthians9:2 Oba nga siri mutume eri abalala, naye eri mmwe ndi mutume, kubanga mmwe kabonero akakakasa nti Mukama yantuma." 
1Corinthians9:3 Bino bye nnyanukula abo abanvunaana. 
1Corinthians9:4 Tetulina buyinza ku byakulya na byakunywa byaffe? 
1Corinthians9:5 Tetulina buyinza okutambulanga n'omukazi owooluganda, ng'abatume abalala, ne Keefa, ne baganda ba Mukama bwe bakola?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Oba nze nzekka ne Barunaba, ffe tusaana okwekolera?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Muserikale ki eyali yeesasulidde ebimukolako ng'ali ku lutabaalo? Ani asimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu n'atalya ku bibala byamu? Oba ani alunda ente n'atanywa ku mata gaazo? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ebyo mbyogera ku bwange? Etteeka nalyo si bwe ligamba? 
1Corinthians9:9 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musa nti: “Ente togisibanga mumwa ng'ewuula eŋŋaano.” Olowooza nti Katonda ente z'alumirwa? 
1Corinthians9:10 Oba kino akyogera ku lwaffe abantu? Ekyo kyawandiikibwa ku lwaffe, kubanga oyo alima era n'oyo akungula, basaanira okukola omulimu gwabwe nga basuubira okufuna ku bibala." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ffe abaabasigamu ebirungi eby'omwoyo, kiba kinene nnyo bwe tukungula ku byammwe ebigasa omubiri?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Oba nga abalala balina obuyinza okubifunako, obuyinza obwo si ffe tusinga okuba nabwo? Naye obuyinza obwo tetubukozesezza, wabula tugumiikiriza byonna, tuleme kuziyiza Mawulire Amalungi aga Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Temumanyi nti abo abaweereza mu Ssinzizo balya ku bya mu Ssinzizo, era nga n'abo abaweereza ku alutaari bagabana ku biweebwayo mu kifo ekyo?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Era bw'atyo ne Mukama yalagira nti abo abategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi basaana okuliisibwa olw'omulimu ogwo. 
1Corinthians9:15 Naye nze ebyo sibisabye, era bwe mpandiika kino, sigamba nti binkolerwe, kubanga waakiri nfe okusinga omuntu lw'anzigyako ekyo ekinneenyumiririzisa." 
1Corinthians9:16 Bwe ntegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi, ekyo tekinneenyumiririzisa, kubanga nteekwa buteekwa okukikola, era ziba zinsanze bwe sitegeeza bantu Amawulire Amalungi." 
1Corinthians9:17 Singa ekyo nkikola lwa kweyagalira, nandibadde nsaanira okuweebwa empeera. Naye nga bwe sikikola lwa kweyagalira, nkikola lwa kuba nga Katonda yankwasa omulimu ogwo." 
1Corinthians9:18 Kale empeera yange y'eruwa? Empeera yange kwe kutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi nga sisasulwa era nga sirina na kimu kye nsaba olw'omulimu ogwo. 
1Corinthians9:19 Newaakubadde nga siri muddu wa muntu n'omu, nafuuka muddu wa bonna, ndyoke ndeete bangi eri Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:20 Mu Bayudaaya nafuuka ng'Omuyudaaya, ndyoke ndeete Abayudaaya. Mu abo abafugibwa amateeka g'Ekiyudaaya, nafuuka nga bo ndyoke mbaleete." 
1Corinthians9:21 Mu b'amawanga amalala abatalina mateeka ga Kiyudaaya, nafuuka ng'atagalina, ndyoke ndeete abo abatalina mateeka ago. Kino tekitegeeza nti sikwata mateeka ga Katonda, kubanga nfugibwa amateeka ga Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:22 Mu banafu mu kukkiriza nafuuka ng'omunafu, ndyoke mbaleete. Nafuuka byonna eri bonna, ndyoke mbeeko abamu ku bo be ndokola." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ebyo byonna mbikola olw'Amawulire Amalungi, ndyoke ngabane ku birungi ebiva mu go." 
1Corinthians9:24 Temumanyi nti mu mbiro ez'empaka abadduka baba bangi, naye aweebwa ekirabo abeera omu? Kale muddukenga bwe mutyo, mulyoke muweebwe ekirabo." 
1Corinthians9:25 Buli eyeetaba mu mizannyo egy'empaka yeegendereza mu byonna. Kale bo bakola bwe batyo, balyoke baweebwe engule eyonooneka, naye ffe tuliweebwa engule eteyonooneka." 
1Corinthians9:26 N'olwekyo sidduka ng'atalina kye ŋŋenderera. Nnwana naye siri ng'oyo akuba ebbanga. 
1Corinthians9:27 Mbonereza omubiri gwange era ngufuga, si kulwa nga mmala okutegeeza abalala Amawulire Amalungi, ate nze nzennyini ne sisiimibwa." 
1Corinthians10:1 Abooluganda, njagala mumanye ebyatuuka ku bajjajjaffe. Bonna baakulemberwanga ekire, era bonna baayita mu nnyanja emmyufu." 
1Corinthians10:2 Era bonna ng'abagoberezi ba Musa, baabatizibwa mu kire ne mu nnyanja," 
1Corinthians10:3 era bonna emmere baalyanga ku emu ey'omwoyo. 
1Corinthians10:4 Era bonna baanywanga ekyokunywa kimu eky'omwoyo, kubanga baanywanga mu lwazi olw'omwoyo olwabagobereranga, era olwazi olwo yali Kristo." 
1Corinthians10:5 Naye era bangi ku bo, Katonda teyabasiima. Kyebaava bafiira mu ddungu." 
1Corinthians10:6 Ebyo byali bya kutulabula, tulemenga okwegomba ebibi, nga bo bwe baakola." 
1Corinthians10:7 Temusinzanga ebyo ebitali Katonda, ng'abamu ku bo bwe baakola, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Abantu baatuula okulya n'okunywa, ne basituka okuzannya.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Tulemenga okwenda, ng'abamu ku bo bwe baayenda, ne bafa abantu emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ssatu, ku lunaku lumu." 
1Corinthians10:9 Tulemenga kukema Mukama, ng'abamu ku bo bwe baamukema, ne bazikirizibwa emisota." 
1Corinthians10:10 Era tulemenga kwemulugunya, ng'abamu ku bo bwe beemulugunya, malayika n'abatta." 
1Corinthians10:11 Ebyo byonna byabatuukako, biryoke bibe ebyokulabirako, era byawandiikibwa olw'okuyigiriza ffe abaliwo ng'enkomerero eneetera okutuuka." 
1Corinthians10:12 Kale oyo alowooza nti ayimiridde, yeegenderezenga aleme okugwa." 
1Corinthians10:13 Ebikemo ebibatuuseeko, by'ebyo ebituuka ku bantu bonna. Katonda mwesigwa, era taabalekenga kutuukibwako bikemo bibayitiridde. Era mu kukemebwa, anaabawanga amaanyi ag'okugumira ebikemo, n'amagezi ag'okubiwangula." 
1Corinthians10:14 N'olwekyo, mikwano gyange, mwewalenga okusinza ebyo ebitali Katonda." 
1Corinthians10:15 Njogera nammwe nga mmanyi nti mutegeera. Kale mulabe kye ŋŋamba. 
1Corinthians10:16 Bwe twebaza Katonda olw'ekikopo ekiweebwa omukisa, tuba tetussa kimu n'omusaayi gwa Kristo?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Omugaati guli gumu, era ffe abangi tuli omubiri gumu, kubanga tugabana ku mugaati gumu." 
1Corinthians10:18 Kale mulabe ab'eddiini y'Ekiyudaaya kye bakola: abo abalya ebitambiro eby'oku alutaari, tebeetaba wamu ne Katonda aweerezebwa ebitambiro ebyo?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Ddala ŋŋamba nti ekyo ekitali Katonda, oba ekyokulya ekiweebwayo eri ebitali Katonda, biriko kye bigasa?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Nedda temuli mugaso. Kye ŋŋamba kye kino nti ebyo abantu b'ensi bye batambira, babitambirira balubaale, sso si Katonda. Naye saagala mmwe mwetabe na balubaale." 
1Corinthians10:21 Temuyinza kunywa ku kikopo kya Mukama, ne ku kikopo kya balubaale. Temuyinza kuliira ku mmeeza ya Mukama, ne ku mmeeza ya balubaale." 
1Corinthians10:22 Kale twagala kunyiiza Mukama? Ffe tumusinga amaanyi? 
1Corinthians10:23 Byonna bikkirizibwa, weewaawo, naye si byonna ebigasa. Byonna bikkirizibwa, naye si byonna ebizimba." 
1Corinthians10:24 Walemenga kubaawo afa ku bibye byokka, wabula afenga ne ku by'abalala." 
1Corinthians10:25 Buli ekitundibwa mu katale, mukiryanga nga temuliiko kye mubuuza olw'obulungi bw'omwoyo gwammwe." 
1Corinthians10:26 Kubanga ensi ne byonna ebigirimu bya Mukama. 
1Corinthians10:27 Atali mukkiriza bw'abayitanga ku kijjulo, ne mukkiriza okugenda, buli kye babaleeteranga okulya, mukiryanga nga temuliiko kye mubuuza olw'obulungi bw'omwoyo gwammwe." 
1Corinthians10:28 Naye omuntu bw'abagambanga nti: “Kino kyaweereddwayo eri ebitali Katonda,” temukiryanga olw'oyo abagambye, n'olw'obulungi bw'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians10:29 Ŋŋamba lwa bulungi bwa mwoyo gwe, sso si gugwo. Waliwo ayinza okugamba nti: “Lwaki eddembe lyange likugirwa olw'okweraliikirira kw'omuntu omulala?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Bwe ndya nga neebazizza Katonda, lwaki nnenyezebwa olw'ekyo kye ndya nga neebazizza?”" 
1Corinthians10:31 Kale byonna bye munaakolanga, oba kulya oba kunywa, mubikolenga nga mugendereramu kitiibwa kya Katonda." 
1Corinthians10:32 Temwesittazanga Bayudaaya, newaakubadde Abayonaani, wadde ekibiina ky'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo." 
1Corinthians10:33 Mube nga nze agezaako okusanyusa bonna mu buli kye nkola, nga sifa ku bulungi bwange nzekka, wabula ku bwa bangi, balyoke balokolebwe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Mulabire ku nze, nga nze bwe ndabira ku Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:2 Mbatendereza olw'okunjijukira mu byonna n'olw'okugoberera byonna nga bwe nabayigiriza. 
1Corinthians11:3 Naye njagala mutegeere nti Kristo ye akulira buli muntu, era nti omusajja ye akulira mukazi we, era nti Katonda ye akulira Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:4 Kale omusajja bw'aba nga yeegayirira Katonda, oba ng'ategeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda, n'abikka omutwe gwe, aswaza Kristo, Mukama we." 
1Corinthians11:5 Kyokka omukazi bw'aba nga yeegayirira Katonda, oba ng'ategeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda, nga tabisse mutwe gwe, aswaza bba; kubanga omukazi oyo aba ng'amwereddwako enviiri." 
1Corinthians11:6 Kale omukazi bw'atabikka ku mutwe gwe, asalengako enviiri ze. Naye oba nga kya nsonyi omukazi okusalako enviiri ze, oba okumwebwa omutwe, kale ateekwa okubikkanga ku mutwe gwe." 
1Corinthians11:7 Omusajja ye tasaana kubikka ku mutwe gwe, kubanga ye alaga ekifaananyi n'ekitiibwa kya Katonda. Kyokka omukazi ye alaga ekitiibwa ky'omusajja," 
1Corinthians11:8 kubanga omusajja si ye yatondebwa ng'aggyibwa mu mukazi, wabula omukazi ye yatondebwa ng'aggyibwa mu musajja." 
1Corinthians11:9 Era omusajja teyatondebwa lwa mukazi, wabula omukazi ye yatondebwa olw'omusajja." 
1Corinthians11:10 Kale olwa bamalayika, omukazi asaanye okubangako akabonero ku mutwe gwe, akalaga nti afugibwa." 
1Corinthians11:11 Newaakubadde nga kiri bwe kityo, naye mu Mukama, omukazi tabaawo awatali musajja, n'omusajja tabaawo awatali mukazi," 
1Corinthians11:12 kubanga ng'omukazi bwe yatondebwa ng'aggyibwa mu musajja, n'omusajja azaalibwa mukazi; naye byonna biva wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians11:13 Nammwe mwennyini mulabe: kisaana omukazi okwegayirira Katonda nga tabisse ku mutwe gwe? 
1Corinthians11:14 Embeera y'abantu tebayigiriza nti omusajja okukuza enviiri kimuswaza," 
1Corinthians11:15 naye ng'omukazi okuba n'enviiri empanvu kiba kya kitiibwa? Kubanga enviiri ze zaamuweebwa lwa kumubikka. 
1Corinthians11:16 Naye bwe wabaawo ayagala okuleeta empaka ku bino, ategeere nti ffe, wadde ab'ebibiina by'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo tetulinaayo kirala." 
1Corinthians11:17 Mu kino kye mbakubiriza, sibatendereza, kubanga bwe mukuŋŋaana, ebivaamu tebiba birungi, wabula biba bibi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ekisookera ddala, bantegeeza nti bwe mukuŋŋaana mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, mwawukanayawukanamu, era ekyo ku ludda olumu nzikiriza nti bwe kiri," 
1Corinthians11:19 kubanga era okwesalaasalamu kuteekwa okubaawo, ab'amazima mu mmwe balyoke bamanyibwe." 
1Corinthians11:20 Bwe mukuŋŋaana, ekyo kye mulya tekikyali kya kiro kya Mukama waffe," 
1Corinthians11:21 kubanga bwe muba mulya, buli omu alya mmere ye, n'atalinda banne. Abamu baba bakyali bayala, abalala nga batamidde." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kale temulina maka ga kuliirangamu na kunywerangamu? Oba munyooma ekibiina ky'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo, ne muswaza abo abatalina kantu? Mbagambe ki? Mbatendereze olw'ekyo? Nedda, sibatendereza." 
1Corinthians11:23 Mukama ye yampa ekyo kye nabayigiriza mmwe nti: Mukama Yesu, mu kiro kiri kye baamuliiramu olukwe, yakwata omugaati," 
1Corinthians11:24 ne yeebaza Katonda, n'agumenyaamenyamu, n'agamba nti: “Kino gwe mubiri gwange, oguliwo ku lwammwe. Kino mukikolenga olw'okunjijukira.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Era bw'atyo bwe yakola ne ku kikopo. Bwe baamala okulya, n'agamba nti: “Ekikopo kino ye ndagaano empya ekoleddwa Katonda, n'ekakasibwa n'omusaayi gwange. Buli lwe munaakinywangako, mukinywengako olw'okunjijukira.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Buli lwe munaalyanga ku mugaati guno, era buli lwe munaanywanga ku kikopo kino, munaategeezanga abantu okufa kwa Mukama, okutuusa lw'alijja." 
1Corinthians11:27 N'olwekyo buli alya ku mugaati guno, oba anywa ku kikopo kya Mukama nga tasaanidde, azza omusango ku mubiri ne ku musaayi gwa Mukama." 
1Corinthians11:28 Kale nno omuntu amalenga kwekebera, alyoke alye ku mugaati era anywe ku kikopo," 
1Corinthians11:29 kubanga buli alya era anywa nga tasaanidde, aba yeesalidde yekka omusango okumusinga, kubanga aba tategedde makulu ga mubiri gwa Mukama." 
1Corinthians11:30 Mu mmwe kyemuvudde mubeeramu bangi abalwadde n'abanafu, era bangi bafudde." 
1Corinthians11:31 Naye singa tusooka okwekebera, Katonda teyanditusalidde musango." 
1Corinthians11:32 Naye Mukama bw'atusalira omusango, atukangavvula, tuleme okusingibwa omusango awamu n'ensi."
