1Corinthians11:33 Kale baganda bange, bwe mukuŋŋaananga awamu okulya, mulindenga bannammwe." 
1Corinthians11:34 Era singa wabaawo alumwa enjala, amalenga okulya ng'akyali eka, okukuŋŋaana kwammwe kuleme okunenyezebwanga. Ebirala, ndibitereeza nga nzize." 
1Corinthians12:1 Abooluganda, njagala mutegeere ebifa ku birabo ebigasa omwoyo." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mumanyi nti bwe mwali mukyali bantu ab'ensi, mwabuzibwabuzibwanga ne mutwalibwa eri ebyo ebitali Katonda, era ebitayogera." 
1Corinthians12:3 Kyenva njagala mutegeere nti tewali muntu n'omu, Mwoyo wa Katonda gw'ayogeza, n'agamba nti: “Yesu avumirirwe!” Era tewali n'omu agamba nti: “Yesu ye Mukama,” wabula nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ye akimwogezezza." 
1Corinthians12:4 Waliwo ebirabo bya ngeri nnyingi, naye Mwoyo abigaba ye omu." 
1Corinthians12:5 Waliwo engeri nnyingi ez'okuweerezaamu, naye Mukama aweerezebwa ye omu." 
1Corinthians12:6 Waliwo okukola kwa ngeri nnyingi, kyokka Katonda ye omu asobozesa bonna mu buli kye bakola." 
1Corinthians12:7 Mwoyo alabikira mu buli omu olw'okugasa bonna. 
1Corinthians12:8 Omu, Mwoyo amuwa okwogera eby'amagezi, omulala, Mwoyo ye omu n'amuwa okutegeera." 
1Corinthians12:9 Omulala, Mwoyo ye omu amuwa okukkiriza, n'omulala n'amuwa obuyinza obw'okuwonya abalwadde." 
1Corinthians12:10 Omu, Mwoyo amuwa okukolanga ebyamagero, n'omulala n'amuwa okutegeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda; ate omulala n'amuwa okumanya emyoyo emirungi n'emibi. Omulala amuwa okwogera ennimi, n'omulala n'amuwa okuzivvuunula." 
1Corinthians12:11 Naye Mwoyo akola ebyo byonna ye omu, ye agabira bonna nga bw'ayagala." 
1Corinthians12:12 Kristo afaanaanyirizibwa n'omubiri. Newaakubadde nga gulina ebitundu bingi, naye gusigala nga guli gumu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Bwe tutyo naffe ffenna, Abayudaaya n'ab'amawanga amalala, abaddu n'ab'eddembe, twabatizibwa Mwoyo omu, ne tufuuka omubiri gumu, era ffenna twafuna Mwoyo omu." 
1Corinthians12:14 Omubiri teguba na kitundu kimu, naye guba n'ebitundu bingi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Singa ekigere kigamba nti: “Siri mukono, n'olwekyo siri kitundu kya mubiri,” ekyo tekikiggyaako kubeera kitundu kya mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:16 Era singa okutu kugamba nti: “Siri liiso, n'olwekyo siri kitundu kya mubiri,” ekyo tekikuggyaako kubeera kitundu kya mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:17 Singa omubiri gwonna gwali liiso, okuwulira kwandibadde wa? Era singa omubiri gwonna gwali kutu, okuwunyiriza kwandibadde wa?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Naye kaakano Katonda yateeka mu mubiri ebitundu ebyenjawulo, nga bwe yayagala." 
1Corinthians12:19 Singa byonna byali ekitundu kimu, olwo omubiri gwandibadde wa?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Naye kaakano ebitundu bingi, naye omubiri guli gumu." 
1Corinthians12:21 Eriiso teriyinza kugamba mukono nti: “Ggwe sikwetaaga,” wadde omutwe okugamba ebigere nti: “Mmwe sibeetaaga.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Naye mu mazima, ebitundu by'omubiri ebirabika ng'ebisinga obunafu, bye bisinga okwetaagibwa." 
1Corinthians12:23 Era ebitundu ebyo eby'omubiri bye tulowooza okuba ebinyoomebwa, bye tusinga okwambaza ekitiibwa, n'ebyo ebitalabika bulungi, bye tusinga okuwa ekitiibwa ekingi," 
1Corinthians12:24 ebitundu byaffe ebisinga obulungi kye biteetaaga. Bw'atyo Katonda bwe yatereeza omubiri, ebitundu ebinyoomebwa n'abiwa ekitiibwa ekisinga obunene," 
1Corinthians12:25 omubiri guleme kwesalaasalamu, wabula ebitundu byagwo bikolaganirenga wamu." 
1Corinthians12:26 Ekitundu ekimu bwe kirumwa, n'ebirala byonna birumirwa wamu nakyo. Era ekitundu ekimu bwe kiweebwa ekitiibwa, ebitundu byonna bisanyukira wamu nakyo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Kale mwenna muli mubiri gwa Kristo, era buli omu mu mmwe kitundu kyagwo." 
1Corinthians12:28 Era mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, Katonda yateekamu abantu: abasooka be batume, abaddako be balanzi, ne kuddako abayigiriza, ne kuddako abakozi b'ebyamagero, abawonya abalwadde, abayambi b'abantu, abafuzi, era n'aboogera ennimi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Bonna batume? Bonna balanzi? Bonna bayigiriza? Bonna bakola ebyamagero? 
1Corinthians12:30 Bonna balina ebirabo eby'okuwonya abalwadde? Bonna boogera ennimi? Bonna bavvuunula ennimi? 
1Corinthians12:31 Kale mwegombenga ebirabo ebisinga obukulu. Era ka mbalage ekkubo erisingira ddala obulungi. 
1Corinthians13:1 Ne bwe njogera ennimi z'abantu n'eza bamalayika, naye ne siba na kwagala, mba ng'ekide ekimala gavuga, oba ng'ebirebe ebikubagana." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ne bwe mba n'ekirabo eky'obulanzi, ne ntegeera ebyama byonna, era ne mmanya ebintu byonna, era ne bwe mba n'okukkiriza kwonna, okunsobozesa n'okusiguukulula ensozi, naye ne siba na kwagala, mba siriiko kye ngasa." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ne bwe mpaayo ebyange byonna okuliisa abaavu, era ne bwe mpaayo omubiri gwange ne gwokebwa, naye nga sirina kwagala, sibaako kye ngasiddwa." 
1Corinthians13:4 Okwagala kugumiikiriza era kulina ekisa. Okwagala tekuba na buggya. Okwagala tekwenyumiikiriza era okwagala tekwekulumbaza. 
1Corinthians13:5 Tekukola bitasaana, tekunoonya byakwo byokka, tekunyiiga mangu, era tekusiba kibi ku mwoyo." 
1Corinthians13:6 Okwagala tekusanyukira butali bwenkanya, wabula kusanyukira mazima." 
1Corinthians13:7 Okwagala kugumira byonna, kukkiriza byonna, kusuubira byonna, era kugumiikiriza byonna." 
1Corinthians13:8 Ne bwe wabaawo obulanzi, bulivaawo. Ne bwe wabaawo ekirabo eky'okwogera ennimi, kirikoma. Ne bwe wabaawo amagezi, galiggwaawo. Naye okwagala tekuggwaawo." 
1Corinthians13:9 Okumanya kwaffe kwa kitundu, n'obulanzi bwaffe nabwo bwa kitundu." 
1Corinthians13:10 Naye ebituukiridde bwe birijja, eby'ekitundu biriggwaawo." 
1Corinthians13:11 Bwe nali nkyali muto, nayogeranga ng'omuto. Naye bwe nakula, ne ndeka eby'obuto." 
1Corinthians13:12 Kaakano tulaba kifaananyi bufaananyi, ng'abeerabira mu ndabirwamu eteraba bulungi. Naye luli tulirabira ddala bulungi. Kaakano mmanyiiko kitundu butundu. Naye luli ndimanyira ddala byonna, nga kaakano Katonda bw'ammanyidde ddala." 
1Corinthians13:13 Naye kaakano ebiriwo biri bisatu: okukkiriza, okusuubira, era n'okwagala. Naye ekisinga obukulu, kwe kwagala." 
1Corinthians14:1 Kale muluubirirenga okwagalana, era mwegombenga ebirabo ebigasa omwoyo, na ddala ekirabo eky'okutuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians14:2 Kubanga ayogera ennimi, tayogera na bantu, wabula ayogera na Katonda, kubanga by'ayogera, tewali abitegeera. Ebyama by'ayogera Mwoyo ye abimwogeza." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kyokka oyo atuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, abategeeza ebibazimba, ebibakubiriza era ebibagumya." 
1Corinthians14:4 Oyo ayogera ennimi, yeegasa yekka. Naye oyo atuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, agasa ekibiina kyonna eky'abakkiriza Kristo." 
1Corinthians14:5 Nandyagadde mwenna mwogere ennimi. Naye ekisingira ddala, nandyagadde mwenna mutuuse ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, kubanga oyo atuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, agasa nnyo okusinga oyo ayogera ennimi, okuggyako mpozzi nga waliwo avvuunula, ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo kiryoke kiganyulwe." 
1Corinthians14:6 Kale abooluganda, bwe njija gye muli ne njogera ennimi, mbagasa ki nga sibategeezezza ebyo Katonda by'andaze, oba bye mmanyi, oba bye nnanga, oba bye njigiriza?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Era n'ebivuga, ebitalina bulamu, ng'endere oba ennanga, bwe bitavuga maloboozi gategeerekeka, omuntu amanya atya ekifuuyibwa oba ekikubibwa?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Era singa eŋŋombe tevaamu ddoboozi litegeerekeka, ani ayinza okweteekerateekera olutalo?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Ne ku mmwe bwe kiri. Bwe mwogera mu lulimi olutategeerekeka, omuntu ayinza atya okutegeera ebyogeddwa? Muba mwogeredde bwereere." 
1Corinthians14:10 Kya mazima waliwo ennimi nnyingi mu nsi, era tewali na lumu lutalina makulu." 
1Corinthians14:11 Naye bwe mba nga simanyi bigambo kye bitegeeza, mba ng'omugwira eri oyo ayogera, era naye aba ng'omugwira gye ndi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Bwe mutyo nammwe, nga bwe mwegomba okufuna ebirabo ebigasa omwoyo, mufubenga nnyo, mulyoke muzimbe ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo." 
1Corinthians14:13 N'olwekyo ayogera olulimi lw'atamanyi, asabe Katonda, amuwenga okuluvvuunula," 
1Corinthians14:14 kubanga bwe nsinza Katonda mu lulimi lwe sitegeera, omutima gwange gusinza, naye amagezi gange tegabaako kye gakola." 
1Corinthians14:15 Kale nkole ki? Bwe nsinza Katonda, njagala omutima gwange era n'amagezi gange bisinze. Bwe nnyimba, njagala omutima gwange era n'amagezi gange biyimbe." 
1Corinthians14:16 Kale bwe kitaba bwe kityo, bwe weebaza Katonda mu lulimi olutategeerekeka, omuntu atategeera ky'ogamba asobola atya okuddamu nti “Amiina,” ng'omalirizza okwebaza?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Weewaawo oyinza okuba nga weebazizza bulungi nnyo Katonda, naye omulala taganyulwa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Neebaza Katonda, kubanga mwenna nze mbasinga okwogera ennimi." 
1Corinthians14:19 Naye mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, njagala njogere n'amagezi gange ebigambo bitaano ebitegeerekeka, ndyoke njigirize abalala, okusinga lwe njogera ebigambo olukunkumuli, mu lulimi olutategeerekeka." 
1Corinthians14:20 Abooluganda, temulowoozanga ng'abaana abato. Naye mu bye mukola, mube ng'abaana abato abatalina musango, wabula mube bakulu mu kulowooza." 
1Corinthians14:21 Mu Kitabo Ekitukuvu kyawandiikibwa nti: “Ndyogera n'abantu bano, nga njogeza abantu ab'ennimi endala, n'emimwa gy'ab'amawanga amalala, naye era abantu bange tebalimpuliriza. Ekyo Mukama ky'agamba.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 N'olwekyo, ennimi tezireetebwa lw'abo abalina okukkiriza, wabula lw'abo abatalina kukkiriza. Naye okutuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, kuliwo lw'abo abalina okukkiriza, sso si lw'abo abatalina kukkiriza." 
1Corinthians14:23 Kale singa ekibiina kyonna eky'abakkiriza Kristo kikuŋŋaana, ne mwogera ennimi, ab'ebweru, oba abo abatalina kukkiriza ne bayingira, tebagamba nti mulaluse?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Naye singa bonna batuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, atalina kukkiriza oba ow'ebweru n'ayingira, ebyo ebyogerwa bonna, bijja kumuleetera okulumwa olw'ebibi bye, yeesalire omusango," 
1Corinthians14:25 ebyo by'alowooza mu mutima gwe bibikkulwe, afukamire asinze Katonda, nga bw'agamba nti: “Ddala Katonda ali mu mmwe.”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Kale abooluganda, bibe bitya? Bwe mukuŋŋaana, omu aba n'oluyimba, omulala aba n'eky'okuyigiriza, omulala aba n'ekyo Katonda ky'amulaze, omulala okwogera ennimi, n'omulala okuvvuunula. Ebyo byonna bikolebwenga olw'okwezimba." 
1Corinthians14:27 Singa wabaawo aboogera ennimi, abangi bandibadde babiri; bwe basingawo, tebandisusse ku basatu. Era buli omu ayogerenga mu luwalo lwe, nga waliwo n'omulala avvuunula." 
1Corinthians14:28 Naye bwe wataba avvuunula, olwo ayogera ennimi asirikenga busirisi ng'ali mu lukuŋŋaana, wabula ayogerenga yekka ne Katonda." 
1Corinthians14:29 Kyokka abatuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, boogerenga babiri oba basatu, ng'abalala bageraageranya ebyogeddwa." 
1Corinthians14:30 Naye singa omu ku batudde ajjirwa ekigambo kya Katonda, oli abadde ayogera asirikenga," 
1Corinthians14:31 kubanga mwenna, mu mpalo, muyinza okutuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, bonna balyoke bayige, era bonna bongerwemu amaanyi." 
1Corinthians14:32 Abo abafuna ekirabo eky'okutuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, basobola okwefuga," 
1Corinthians14:33 kubanga Katonda taleeta kutabukatabuka, wabula aleeta mirembe. Nga bwe kiri mu bibiina byonna eby'abantu ba Katonda abakkiriza Kristo," 
1Corinthians14:34 abakazi basirikenga busirisi nga mukuŋŋaanye, kubanga tebakkirizibwa kwogeranga, wabula okusirikanga, ng'amateeka g'Ekiyudaaya bwe galagira." 
1Corinthians14:35 Bwe banaabangako ne kye baagala okumanya, bakibuuzenga babbaabwe eka, kubanga kya nsonyi omukazi okwogerera mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abantu." 
1Corinthians14:36 Kale mulowooza nti ekigambo kya Katonda kyava mu mmwe, oba nti kyatuuka ku mmwe mwekka?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Bwe wabeerawo omuntu eyeerowooza nti atuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, oba nti afugibwa mwoyo, ategeere nti bye mbawandiikira mmwe, kye kiragiro kya Mukama." 
1Corinthians14:38 Bwe wabaawo atafa ku kino, naye aleme kufiibwako." 
1Corinthians14:39 Kale baganda bange, mwegombenga nnyo okutuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Katonda, naye temuziyizanga kwogera nnimi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Naye byonna bikolebwenga bulungi era mu butebenkevu. 
1Corinthians15:1 Abooluganda, mbajjukiza Amawulire Amalungi ge nabategeeza ne mugakkiriza era mwe munyweredde," 
1Corinthians15:2 era ag'okubalokola bwe munaagakuumira ddala nga bwe nagabategeeza. Bwe kitaba bwe kityo, mpozzi nga mwakkiririza bwereere." 
1Corinthians15:3 Nabatuusaako ekigambo ekikulu, nange kye naweebwa, ekigamba nti Kristo yafa olw'ebibi byaffe, ng'ebyawandiikibwa bwe bigamba," 
1Corinthians15:4 era nti yaziikibwa, n'azuukira ku lunaku olwokusatu ng'ebyawandiikibwa bwe bigamba;" 
1Corinthians15:5 era nti yalabikira Keefa, ate n'alabikira abatume ekkumi n'ababiri;" 
1Corinthians15:6 n'oluvannyuma n'alabikira baganda baffe abasukka mu bikumi ebitaano, bonna nga bali wamu. Abasinga obungi ku bo bakyali balamu, newaakubadde nga abamu baafa." 
1Corinthians15:7 Awo n'alabikira Yakobo, n'oluvannyuma n'alabikira abatume bonna." 
1Corinthians15:8 Bwe yamala okulabikira abo bonna, n'alyoka alabikira nange, newaakubadde nga ndi ng'omwana omusowole," 
1Corinthians15:9 kubanga nze nsembayo mu batume. Era sisaanira na kuyitibwa mutume, kubanga nayigganya ekibiina ky'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:10 Naye olw'ekisa kya Katonda, kyenva mbeera nga bwe ndi kaakano, era ekisa kye yankwatirwa tekyafa bwereere. Nakola nnyo okusinga abatume abalala bonna, naye si nze nakola, wabula ekisa kya Katonda ekiri nange kye kyakola." 
1Corinthians15:11 Oba yali nze oba bo, bwe tutyo bwe tutegeeza abantu, era bwe mutyo bwe mwakkiriza." 
1Corinthians15:12 Kale oba nga abantu bategeezebwa nti Kristo yazuukira, lwaki abamu mu mmwe bagamba nti tewali kuzuukira?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Kale oba nga tewali kuzuukira, ne Kristo teyazuukira." 
1Corinthians15:14 Era oba nga Kristo teyazuukira, bye twabategeeza tebiriiko kye bigasa, era n'okukkiriza kwammwe tekugasa." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ate era tuba ng'abaayogera eby'obulimba ku Katonda, kubanga twakakasa nti Katonda yazuukiza Kristo, gw'ataazuukiza, bwe kiba nga ddala abafu tebazuukira." 
1Corinthians15:16 Kale oba nga abafu tebazuukira, ne Kristo teyazuukira." 
1Corinthians15:17 Oba nga Kristo teyazuukira, okukkiriza kwammwe tekuliiko kye kugasa, era mukyali mu bibi byammwe." 
1Corinthians15:18 Era n'abo abaafa nga bakkiriza Kristo, baazikirira." 
1Corinthians15:19 Oba nga Kristo tumusuubiramu bya bulamu buno bwokka, tuli ba kusaasirwa okusinga abantu bonna." 
1Corinthians15:20 Naye kya mazima Kristo yazuukira. Ekyo kye kikakasa nti n'abo abaafa balizuukira. 
1Corinthians15:21 Kuba ng'okufa bwe kwaleetebwa omuntu, era n'okuzuukira kwaleetebwa muntu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Kuba ng'abantu bonna bwe bafa olw'Adamu, era bwe batyo bonna balifuuka balamu olwa Kristo," 
1Corinthians15:23 kyokka buli omu mu luwalo lwe. Kristo ye yasooka, era bw'alijja, ababe ne baddako," 
1Corinthians15:24 olwo enkomerero n'eryoka etuuka. Kristo ng'amaze okuggyawo obufuzi bwonna, n'obuyinza bwonna era n'amaanyi gonna, n'akwasa Katonda Kitaawe Obwakabaka," 
1Corinthians15:25 kubanga Kristo ateekwa okufuga okutuusa lw'alirinnyirira abalabe be bonna. 
1Corinthians15:26 Omulabe we alisembayo okuzikirizibwa, ye Kufa," 
1Corinthians15:27 kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Katonda yamuwa okufuga ebintu byonna.” Naye bwe kyogera ku bintu byonna, tekitwaliramu Katonda, eyawa Kristo okufuga ebintu byonna." 
1Corinthians15:28 Ebintu byonna bwe birimala okussibwa mu buyinza bwa Kristo, olwo Kristo yennyini, Mwana, n'alyoka afugibwa Katonda eyamuwa okufuga byonna. Era olwo Katonda n'alyoka afugira ddala byonna." 
1Corinthians15:29 Oba ng'abafu tebazuukira, abo ababatizibwa ku lw'abafu bagenderera ki? Kale lwaki babatizibwa ku lw'abafu?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Era ffe lwaki tweteeka mu kabi buli kaseera? 
1Corinthians15:31 Abooluganda, olw'okwenyumiriza kwe munninamu, era kwe nsanyukiramu mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe, nnyinza okukakasa nti nfa buli lunaku." 
1Corinthians15:32 Kale oba nga nalwana n'ensolo mu Efeso ng'omuntu obuntu, kingasa ki? Oba ng'abafu tebazuukira, “Kale tulye tunywe, kubanga enkya tujja kufa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Temulimbibwalimbibwanga, kubanga “Emikwano emibi gyonoona empisa ennungi.”" 
1Corinthians15:34 Mweddemu, mulekere awo okukola ebibi, kubanga abamu mu mmwe tebamanyi Katonda. Kino nkyogera kubakwasa nsonyi." 
1Corinthians15:35 Naye omuntu ayinza okubuuza nti: “Abafu bazuukira batya?” Era nti: “Mubiri gwa ngeri ki gwe bajja nagwo?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Musirusiru ggwe! Ensigo gy'osiga temeruka nga tennafa. 
1Corinthians15:37 Era eyo gy'osiga eba mpeke buweke: oba ya ŋŋaano, oba ya ngeri ndala, sso tekiba kimera nga bwe kiriba nga kimaze okukula." 
1Corinthians15:38 Naye Katonda agiwa omubiri nga bw'ayagala, era buli ngeri ya nsigo agiwa omubiri gwayo," 
1Corinthians15:39 kubanga emibiri gyonna tegiba gya ngeri emu. Waliwo ogw'abantu, waliwo ogw'ensolo, waliwo ogw'ennyonyi, era waliwo n'ogw'ebyennyanja." 
1Corinthians15:40 Waliwo emibiri egy'omu ggulu, n'emibiri egy'omu nsi. Naye ekitiibwa ky'egy'omu ggulu kirala, era n'eky'egy'omu nsi kirala." 
1Corinthians15:41 Waliwo ekitiibwa eky'enjuba, waliwo ekitiibwa eky'omwezi, era waliwo ekitiibwa eky'emmunyeenye. Naye n'emmunyeenye tezenkanankana kwaka." 
1Corinthians15:42 Era bwe kiri ne mu kuzuukira. Omubiri guziikibwa nga gwa kuvunda, naye guzuukizibwa nga si gwa kuvunda." 
1Corinthians15:43 Guziikibwa nga si gwa kitiibwa, naye guzuukizibwa nga gwa kitiibwa. Guziikibwa nga munafu, naye guzuukizibwa nga gwa maanyi." 
1Corinthians15:44 Guziikibwa nga mubiri bubiri, naye guzuukizibwa nga guli ng'omwoyo. Oba nga waliwo omubiri obubiri, era waliwo n'omubiri oguli ng'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians15:45 Era bwe kityo kyawandiikibwa nti “Adamu, omuntu eyasooka, yatondebwa ng'alina obulamu.” Kyokka Adamu ow'oluvannyuma yafuuka mwoyo oguleeta obulamu." 
1Corinthians15:46 Naye eky'omwoyo si kye kyasooka, wabula eky'omubiri obubiri, n'oluvannyuma eky'omwoyo ne kijja." 
1Corinthians15:47 Omuntu eyasooka yava mu ttaka, yakolebwa mu nfuufu. Omuntu owookubiri yava mu ggulu." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ng'eyakolebwa mu nfuufu bw'ali, n'abo abaakolebwa mu nfuufu bwe bali. Era ng'eyava mu ggulu bw'ali, n'abo ab'omu ggulu bwe bali." 
1Corinthians15:49 Nga bwe twawumbibwa ne tufaanana oyo eyakolebwa mu nfuufu, era bwe tutyo bwe tuliwumbibwa ne tufaanana oyo eyava mu ggulu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Abooluganda, kye ŋŋamba kye kino nti omubiri n'omusaayi tebiyinza kufuna Bwakabaka bwa Katonda, n'okuvunda tekusikira butavunda." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ka mbabuulire ekyama: si ffenna abalifa, naye eŋŋombe ey'enkomerero bw'erivuga, ffenna tulifuukira" 
1Corinthians15:52 mu kaseera katono, ng'ak'okutemya n'okuzibula, kubanga eŋŋombe erivuga, n'abafu balizuukizibwa, nga tebakyaddayo kufa, era ffenna tulifuuka." 
1Corinthians15:53 Kubanga omubiri guno oguvunda, gwa kufuuka ogutavunda, era omubiri ogufa, gwa kufuuka ogutafa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Omubiri guno oguvunda bwe gulifuuka ogutavunda, n'ogufa ne gufuuka ogutafa, olwo ekyawandiikibwa ne kiryoka kituukirira, ekigamba nti:" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Ggwe Kufa, obuwanguzi bwo buluwa? Ggwe Kufa, obuyinza bwo obulumya buluwa?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Obuyinza bw'Okufa obulumya buva mu kibi, n'amaanyi g'ekibi gava mu mateeka." 
1Corinthians15:57 Kyokka Katonda yeebazibwe, atuwanguza ffe ku lwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:58 N'olwekyo baganda bange abaagalwa, mubenga banywevu, era abatasagaasagana, mweyongerenga bulijjo okukola omulimu gwa Mukama waffe, kubanga mumanyi nti okufuba kwammwe nga mukolera Mukama waffe, si kwa kufa bwereere." 
1Corinthians16:1 Kale ebyo ebikwata ku kukuŋŋaanya eby'okuyamba abantu ba Katonda, nammwe mukole nga bwe nalagira ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo eby'omu Galatiya." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ku buli lunaku olusooka mu wiiki, buli omu mu mmwe abeeko ky'atereka, okusinziira ku nfuna ye, ebintu bireme kukuŋŋaanyizibwa nga nzize." 
1Corinthians16:3 Bwe ndituuka, abo be musiima be ndituma, ne bagenda n'ebbaluwa, ne batwala ebirabo byammwe e Yerusaalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Bwe kirirabika nti kisaanye nange ŋŋende, baligenda nange." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ndijja gye muli nga mmaze okuyita e Makedooniya, kubanga e Makedooniya gye ndiyita." 
1Corinthians16:6 Era osanga ndibeera nammwe, mpozzi n'okumalirako ddala n'ebiro eby'obutiti, mulyoke munnyambe okwongera olugendo lwange buli gye ndigenda." 
1Corinthians16:7 Kaakano ssaagala kubalaba nga mpita buyisi, nsuubira okumala nammwe ebbanga eriwerako, Mukama bw'alisiima." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kyokka ndisigala mu Efeso okutuusa ku Pentekoote," 
1Corinthians16:9 kubanga nfunye omukisa munene okukolayo omulimu ogw'omugaso, newaakubadde ng'eriyo abalabe bangi." 
1Corinthians16:10 Timoteewo bw'alijja, mulabe nti tabaako ky'atya ng'ali mu mmwe, kubanga akola omulimu gwa Mukama nga nze." 
1Corinthians16:11 N'olwekyo waleme kubaawo amunyooma. Mumuyambe, olugendo lwe lube lwa mirembe, ajje gye ndi, kubanga nze n'abooluganda tumulindiridde." 
1Corinthians16:12 Naye ebyo ebikwata ku wooluganda Apollo, namwegayirira nnyo ajje gye muli ng'ali n'abooluganda abalala, kyokka ye n'atayagala kujja kaakano, wabula alijja ng'afunye ebbanga." 
1Corinthians16:13 Mutunulenga, munywerere mu kukkiriza, mubeere bazira era ba maanyi." 
1Corinthians16:14 Byonna bye mukola, mubikozesenga kwagala." 
1Corinthians16:15 Abooluganda, mumanyi nti ab'ennyumba ya Siteefano be baasooka okukyuka mu Asiya, era beewaayo okuweereza abantu ba Katonda. Mbeegayirira" 
1Corinthians16:16 muwulirenga abantu ng'abo, era na buli omu afuba okukolera awamu nabo." 
1Corinthians16:17 Siteefano ne Forutunaato ne Akayiko bwe bajja, nasanyuka, kubanga baaliwo mu kifo kyammwe." 
1Corinthians16:18 Era bansanyusa era nga nammwe bwe baabasanyusa. Abantu ng'abo mubassengamu ekitiibwa. 
1Corinthians16:19 Ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo eby'omu Asiya bibalamusizza. Akwila ne Priska, awamu n'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ekiri mu maka gaabwe, babalamusizza nnyo mu Mukama." 
1Corinthians16:20 Abooluganda bonna babalamusizza. Mulamusagane mu ngeri eraga nti mwagalana. 
1Corinthians16:21 Nze Pawulo mbaweerezza okulamusa kuno, kwe mpandiise n'omukono gwange gwennyini." 
1Corinthians16:22 Oba nga waliwo atayagala Mukama, avumirirwe. Mukama ajja." 
1Corinthians16:23 Mukama waffe Yesu abakwatirwenga ekisa. 
1Corinthians16:24 Mwenna mbaagala mu Kristo Yesu. Amiina. 
2Corinthians1:1 Nze Pawulo omutume wa Kristo Yesu, nga Katonda bwe yayagala, era n'owooluganda Timoteewo, tuwandiikira ekibiina ky'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo, ekiri mu Korinto, era n'abantu ba Katonda bonna ab'omu Akaya yonna." 
2Corinthians1:2 Katonda Kitaffe, ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, babakwatirwe ekisa era babawe emirembe." 
2Corinthians1:3 Katonda era Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo era Kitaffe, ajjudde okusaasira, era Katonda asanyusa bonna, atenderezebwenga." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ye oyo atusanyusa mu buzibu bwaffe bwonna, naffe tulyoke tusobole okusanyusanga abo abali mu kubonaabona okwa buli ngeri, nga tubasanyusa n'ebyo ffe ffennyini bye tufunye okuva eri Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:5 Kuba nga bwe tugabana ku kubonaabona kwa Kristo okungi, era bwe tutyo bwe tusanyukira mu Kristo." 
2Corinthians1:6 Bwe tubonyaabonyezebwa, tubonaabona, mmwe mulyoke mufune essanyu, era mulokolebwe. Era bwe tusanyuka, nammwe musanyuka, ne mufuna amaanyi okuyita mu bizibu ng'ebyaffe bye tuyitamu, nga muli bagumiikiriza." 
2Corinthians1:7 Tubalinamu nnyo essuubi, kubanga tumanyi nti nga bwe mubonaabonera awamu naffe, era muligabana ku ssanyu lyaffe." 
2Corinthians1:8 Abooluganda, twagala mumanye okubonyaabonyezebwa okwatutuukako nga tuli mu Asiya. Twabonyaabonyezebwa nnyo ekiyitiridde, n'essuubi ery'okuba abalamu ne lituggwaamu." 
2Corinthians1:9 Twalowooleza ddala nti tusaliddwa gwa kufa. Ekyo kyatutuukako, tuleme kwesiga maanyi gaffe, wabula twesige Katonda yekka azuukiza abafu." 
2Corinthians1:10 Katonda oyo ye yatuwonya mu kabi akanene bwe katyo ak'okufa, era ye alituwonya, era gwe tulinamu essuubi ery'okutuwonyanga." 
2Corinthians1:11 Nammwe mutuyambe nga mutusabira, bangi balyoke beebaze Katonda ku lwaffe, olw'emikisa egituweereddwa olw'okusaba kw'abangi." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ekituleetera okwenyumiriza kye kino nti emmeeme etukakasa nti mu nsi muno, n'okusingira ddala mu mmwe, tubadde ba mpisa nnungi, si lwa magezi ga bantu, naye kubanga ekisa kya Katonda kye kitufuula ab'amazima era abatuukirivu." 
2Corinthians1:13 Tubawandiikira ebyo byokka bye musobola okusoma era n'okutegeera. Era nsuubira nti mulitegeerera ddala 
2Corinthians1:14 ekyo kaakano kye mutegeerako ekitundu, mulyoke mwenyumirize ku lwaffe, nga ffe bwe tulyenyumiriza ku lwammwe, ku lunaku lwa Mukama Yesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Olw'okwekakasa mu ekyo, nayagala nsooke kukyalira mmwe, mulyoke mufune omukisa gwa mirundi ebiri." 
2Corinthians1:16 Nayagala mbakyalire nga ŋŋenda e Makedooniya, era nkomewo gye muli nga nva e Makedooniya, mulyoke munnyambe nga ŋŋenda e Buyudaaya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Bwe nayagala okukola ekyo, mulowooza nti nali munnanfuusi? Bye nkola mbikola ng'omuntu ow'ensi, agamba nti: “Weewaawo,” ate mu kaseera ke kamu n'agamba nti: “Nedda”?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Nga Katonda bw'ali omwesigwa, tetubagambangako nti: “Weewaawo,” ate ne tukyusa nti: “Nedda.”" 
2Corinthians1:19 Yesu Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda eyabategeezebwa Siluvaano ne Timoteewo era nange, teyali nti: “Weewaawo,” ate nti “Nedda,” wabula mu ye bulijjo mulimu “Weewaawo,”" 
2Corinthians1:20 kubanga mu Kristo, byonna Katonda bye yasuubiza, mwe bituukiririra. Ku bwa Kristo, kyetuva tugamba nti: “Amiina,” nga tuwa Katonda ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians1:21 Ffe nammwe, Katonda yatukakasa nti mu Kristo mwe tufunira obulamu, era Katonda yennyini yatufukako omuzigo," 
2Corinthians1:22 n'atuteekako akabonero ke, bwe yatuwa Mwoyo we mu mitima gyaffe, abe omusingo gw'ebyo by'atuterekedde." 
2Corinthians1:23 Katonda ye mujulirwa wange nti olw'okubasaasira mmwe, kyennava sijja Korinto." 
2Corinthians1:24 Tetubalagira bulagizi kye muteekwa okukkiriza, wabula tukolera wamu nammwe, mulyoke musanyuke, kubanga muli banywevu mu kukkiriza." 
2Corinthians2:1 N'olwekyo namalirira obutakomawo eyo, nneme kuddamu kubanakuwaza." 
2Corinthians2:2 Nze bwe mbanakuwaza, ani anansanyusa? Si mmwe be nnakuwaza?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Kyennava mbawandiikira, bwe ndijja, nneme kunakuwazibwa abo abandinsanyusizza. Nkakasa nti bwe nsanyuka, era nammwe musanyuka." 
2Corinthians2:4 Nabawandiikira nga ndi mu kubonaabona kungi, nga n'omutima gujjudde obulumi, era nga nkaaba amaziga mangi. Mu kubawandiikira, saagenderera kubanakuwaza, wabula nayagala kubalaga nga bwe mbaagala ennyo." 
2Corinthians2:5 Bwe wabaawo eyaleetera munne okunakuwala, teyakuleetera nze, wabula ku ludda olumu, bwe mba siyitirizza, yakuleetera mmwe mwenna." 
2Corinthians2:6 Omuntu ng'oyo, ekibonerezo ekyo ky'aweereddwa abangi, kimala." 
2Corinthians2:7 N'olwekyo musaanidde okumusonyiwa, n'okumugumya, aleme okunakuwala ekiyitiridde, n'okuterebukira ddala." 
2Corinthians2:8 Kyenva mbeegayirira, mumulage nti mumwagala." 
2Corinthians2:9 Era kyennava mbawandiikira, ndabe nga muli bawulize mu byonna." 
2Corinthians2:10 Buli gwe musonyiwa, nange mmusonyiwa. Nange kye nasonyiwa, oba nga weekiri, nakisonyiwa ku lwammwe, mu maaso ga Kristo," 
2Corinthians2:11 Sitaani aleme kutuzingiza, kubanga tumanyi enkwe ze." 
2Corinthians2:12 Bwe natuuka mu Turoowa okutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi aga Kristo, newaakubadde nasanga nga Mukama anziguliddewo oluggi," 
2Corinthians2:13 omutima gwange tegwatereera, kubanga saasangayo muganda wange Tito. Kyennava nsiibula abantu baayo, ne ŋŋenda e Makedooniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Kyokka Katonda yeebazibwe, atuwanguza bulijjo olwa Kristo. Katonda ye atukozesa okumanyisa Kristo mu bantu bonna, era Amawulire Amalungi gali ng'akawoowo akasaasaanira wonna." 
2Corinthians2:15 Tuli kawoowo ka Kristo, k'aweereza eri Katonda, akatuuka ku abo abalokolebwa, ne ku abo abazikirira." 
2Corinthians2:16 Mu abo abazikirira, tuli kivundu kya lumbe ekireeta okufa. Naye mu abo abalokolebwa, tuli kawoowo ka bulamu, akaleeta obulamu. Kale ebyo ani abisobola?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Tetuli ng'abangi abo abakozesa ekigambo kya Katonda olw'okwenoonyeza ebyabwe, naye ffe, kubanga twatumibwa Katonda, twogera nga tetuliimu bukuusa mu maaso ga Katonda, nga tuli mu Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Mulowooza nti tutandise ate okwetenda? Oba mulowooza nti twetaaga ebbaluwa ng'abalala, ezitusemba gye muli, oba mmwe ze muwandiise nga zitusemba?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Mmwe mwennyini, mmwe bbaluwa yaffe etusemba, ewandiikiddwa ku mitima gyaffe, emanyibwa era esomebwa abantu bonna." 
2Corinthians3:3 Bonna babalaba nti muli bbaluwa eyava eri Kristo, gye twaleeta. Ebbaluwa eyo, teyawandiikibwa na bwino, wabula yawandiikibwa na Mwoyo wa Katonda Nnannyinibulamu. Era teyawandiikibwa ku bipande bya mayinja, wabula yawandiikibwa ku bipande eby'emitima gy'abantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Obwo bwe bwesige bwe tulina mu Katonda, nga tuyita mu Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:5 Tetugamba nti twemalirira, oba nti tulina kye tukola ku bwaffe, wabula amaanyi gaffe gava eri Katonda." 
2Corinthians3:6 Ye yatusaanyiza okuba abaweereza b'endagaano empya, eteri ya mateeka mawandiike, naye eya Mwoyo. Amateeka amawandiike galeeta kufa, naye Mwoyo aleeta bulamu." 
2Corinthians3:7 Naye oba nga Amateeka agaleeta okufa, agaayolebwa mu nnukuta ku bipande eby'amayinja, gaaweebwa mu kitiibwa ekinene, Abayisirayeli ne batayinza na kutunuulira Musa mu maaso olw'okwakaayakana kwago, okwali okw'okuggwaawo," 
2Corinthians3:8 kale Mwoyo Mutuukirivu taliweebwa mu kitiibwa kinene okusingawo? 
2Corinthians3:9 Oba nga okuweebwa ekyo ekisingisa abantu omusango kwa kitiibwa, okuweebwa ekyo ekireetera abantu obutuukirivu kwa kitiibwa nnyo okusingawo." 
2Corinthians3:10 N'olwekyo, ekyo ekyali kirina ekitiibwa luli, kaakano tekikyakirina, kubanga kyamalibwawo ekitiibwa ekisingirawo ddala." 
2Corinthians3:11 Kuba oba nga ekyo ekiggwaawo kyalina ekitiibwa, ekyo eky'olubeerera kiteekwa okuba n'ekitiibwa ekisingawo." 
2Corinthians3:12 N'olwekyo nga bwe tulina essuubi eryo eryenkana awo, tuli bagumu nnyo." 
2Corinthians3:13 Tetuli nga Musa eyeebikkanga ekitambaala ku maaso, Abayisirayeli baleme kulaba kwakaayakana kw'amaaso ge bwe kuggwaawo." 
2Corinthians3:14 Emitima gyabwe gyaguba n'okutuusiza ddala kaakano. Bwe basoma endagaano enkadde, ekibikka ekyo kyennyini tekibaggyibwangako. Ekibikka ekyo kiggyibwa ku abo abeegatta ne Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:15 Ddala n'okutuusiza ddala kaakano, ebyawandiikibwa Musa buli lwe bisomebwa, emitima gyabwe giba gibikkiddwako." 
2Corinthians3:16 Naye omuntu bw'akyuka n'adda eri Mukama, ekibikka kiggwaawo." 
2Corinthians3:17 Mukama ye Mwoyo, era Mwoyo wa Mukama w'abeera, we waba eddembe." 
2Corinthians3:18 N'olwekyo ffe ffenna bwe tuggyibwako ekibikka ku maaso, ekitiibwa kya Mukama kirabikira mu ffe, nga bwe kyandirabikidde mu ndabirwamu. Ekitiibwa ekyo ekiva eri Mukama, ye Mwoyo, kitufuula ne tufaanana nga ye, mu kitiibwa ekigenda nga kyeyongera." 
2Corinthians4:1 N'olwekyo Katonda nga bwe yatusaasira, n'atuwa omulimu ogwo ogw'obuweereza, tetuterebuka." 
2Corinthians4:2 Twaleka ebyo ebikolebwa mu nkukutu eby'ensonyi, n'empisa ez'obukuusa, era tetukyamya kigambo kya Katonda, wabula tulaga amazima nga bwe gali, ne tuleka buli muntu ow'omutima omulungi atulowoozeeko nga bw'alaba mu maaso ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians4:3 Era oba ng'Amawulire Amalungi ge tutegeeza abantu, makweke, abo ab'okuzikirira be gakwekeddwa." 
2Corinthians4:4 Be bo abatakkiriza, Sitaani omufuzi w'ensi eno be yaziba emitima, n'abaziyiza okukkiriza era n'okulaba ekitangaala ky'Amawulire Amalungi ag'ekitiibwa kya Kristo, alabirwamu ekifaananyi kya Katonda." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ffe tetweyogerako, wabula tutegeeza abantu nti Kristo Yesu ye Mukama, era nti tuli baweereza bammwe olwa Kristo." 
2Corinthians4:6 Katonda eyalagira ekitangaala kyake awabadde ekizikiza, ye yayaka mu mitima gyaffe okuleetera abantu ekitangaala, bamanye ekitiibwa kya Katonda, ekirabikira mu Kristo." 
2Corinthians4:7 Naye ffe abali ng'ebibya eby'ebbumba, ffe tulimu ekyo eky'omuwendo ennyo, okulaga nti obuyinza bwonna bwa Katonda, sso si bwaffe." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tubonaabona mu buli ngeri, naye tetubulwa bwekyusizo. Tusoberwa, naye tetuggwaamu ssuubi." 
2Corinthians4:9 Tuyigganyizibwa, naye tetwabulirwa. Tumeggebwa, naye tetubetentebwa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Bulijjo buli we tulaga, tugenda n'okufa kwa Yesu mu mibiri gyaffe, obulamu bwe bulyoke bulabikire mu mibiri gyaffe." 
2Corinthians4:11 Newaakubadde nga tuli balamu, naye bulijjo tuba mu kabi ak'okufa olwa Yesu, obulamu bwa Yesu bulyoke bulabikire mu mibiri gyaffe egy'okufa." 
2Corinthians4:12 N'olwekyo okufa kukolera mu ffe, naye obulamu bukolera mu mmwe." 
2Corinthians4:13 Nga bwe tulina omutima ogw'okukkiriza ng'ogw'oyo eyawandiika nti: “Nakkiriza, kyennava njogera,” naffe tukkiriza, era kyetuva twogera" 
2Corinthians4:14 nga tumanyi nti oyo eyazuukiza Mukama Yesu, naffe alituzuukiza wamu ne Yesu, n'atuleeta wamu nammwe mu maaso ge." 
2Corinthians4:15 Byonna biriwo ku lwammwe, ekisa kya Katonda kiryoke kyeyongere okubuna mu bantu, nabo beeyongere okwebaza Katonda, n'okumuweesa ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians4:16 Newaakubadde ng'obulamu bwaffe obw'omubiri bugenda buseebengerera, naye obulamu bwaffe obw'omwoyo bufuulibwa buggya buli lunaku, kyetuva tulema okuddirira." 
2Corinthians4:17 Okubonaabona kuno okutono era okw'akaseera obuseera, kututeekerateekera ekitiibwa ekinene ekitaliggwaawo, era ekitageraageranyizika." 
2Corinthians4:18 Amaaso gaffe tetugatadde ku ebyo ebirabika, wabula ku ebyo ebitalabika. Ebyo ebirabika bya kaseera buseera, naye ebyo ebitalabika, bya lubeerera." 
2Corinthians5:1 Tumanyi nti ensiisira yaffe ey'oku nsi, gwe mubiri gwe tulimu, bw'eryabizibwa, Katonda alituwa ennyumba mu ggulu ey'olubeerera, etaazimbibwa bantu." 
2Corinthians5:2 Kya mazima, nga tukyali mu nsiisira eno, tusinda nga twegomba okwambazibwa omubiri ogw'omu ggulu gwe tulibeeramu," 
2Corinthians5:3 nga tusuubira nti bwe tuligwambazibwa, tuleme kusangibwa nga tuli bwereere." 
2Corinthians5:4 Kuba nga bwe tukyali mu mubiri guno, tusinda nga tuzitoowereddwa, si lwa kuba nti twagala okugwambulwa, wabula twagala kwongera kwambazibwa, olwo ogwo ogufa gulyoke gumiribwe obulamu." 
2Corinthians5:5 Eyatuteekerateekera ekyo ye Katonda, eyatuwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu okuba omusingo." 
2Corinthians5:6 Kyetuva tuguma bulijjo. Era tumanyi nti bwe tuba nga tuli mu mubiri guno, tuba wala ne Mukama." 
2Corinthians5:7 Tutambulira ku kukkiriza, sso si ku kulaba." 
2Corinthians5:8 Tuguma, era kye twandisinze okwagala, kwe kuva mu mubiri guno, tube wamu ne Mukama." 
2Corinthians5:9 N'olwekyo kye tugenderera, kwe kumusanyusa, ne bwe tuba ewala, ne bwe tuba okumpi naye." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ffenna tuli ba kulabika mu maaso g'entebe ya Kristo kw'asalira emisango, buli omu alyoke aweebwe ekimusaanira, okusinziira ku birungi oba ku bibi bye yakola, ng'akyali mu mubiri guno." 
2Corinthians5:11 N'olwekyo nga bwe tumanyi nti kituufu okutya Mukama, tugezaako okukkirizisa abantu. Kyokka Katonda amanyi nga bwe tuli, era nsuubira nti nammwe mumanyi mu mitima gyammwe." 
2Corinthians5:12 Tetuddamu kweyanjula gye muli, naye tubawa kye munaasinziirangako okwenyumiriza ku lwaffe, mulyoke mubenga n'ekyokuddamu abo abeenyumiririza mu byokungulu, sso si mu ebyo eby'omu mutima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Oba nga tulaluse, tulaluse lwa Katonda. Oba nga tulina amagezi agateredde, tuli nago lwa kugasa mmwe," 
2Corinthians5:14 era tufugibwa kwagala kwa Kristo. 
2Corinthians5:15 Tumanyi nti omu yafiirira bonna, olwo abo abalamu balemenga kuba balamu ku lwabwe, wabula babenga balamu ku lw'oyo eyabafiirira, n'azuukira." 
2Corinthians5:16 N'olwekyo, okuva kaakano tetukyakozesa magezi ga bantu buntu okumanya omuntu. Newaakubadde nga twamanyako Kristo mu ngeri eyo, naye kaakano si bwe tumumanyi." 
2Corinthians5:17 Buli eyeegatta awamu ne Kristo, kyava aba muntu muggya: empisa ez'obulamu obw'edda nga ziweddewo, olwo ng'empisa ez'obulamu obuggya zitandise." 
2Corinthians5:18 Ebyo byonna biva eri Katonda eyatutabaganya naye yennyini, ng'ayita mu Kristo, era n'atuwa omulimu ogw'obutabaganya." 
2Corinthians5:19 Kwe kugamba nti Katonda yali mu Kristo, ng'atabaganya abantu bonna naye yennyini, nga tabavunaana bibi byabwe, era yatukwasa obubaka obw'okutabaganya." 
2Corinthians5:20 N'olwekyo tuli babaka ba Kristo, Katonda ng'ali ng'abeegayirira mmwe, ng'ayita mu ffe. Tubeegayirira mu linnya lya Kristo, mutabagane ne Katonda." 
2Corinthians5:21 Kristo ataalina kibi, Katonda yamufuula ekibi, ffe olw'okwegatta awamu ne Kristo, tulyoke tufune obutuukirivu obuva eri Katonda." 
2Corinthians6:1 Kale nga bwe tukolera awamu ne Katonda, tubeegayirira muleme kugayaalirira kisa Katonda kye yabakwatirwa." 
2Corinthians6:2 Katonda agamba nti: “Nakuwuliriza mu kiseera eky'okusaasirirwamu, ne nkuyamba ku lunaku olw'okulokolerwako.” Laba kaakano kye kiseera eky'okusaasirirwamu, era leero lwe lunaku olw'okulokolerwako." 
2Corinthians6:3 Tetwagala kukola kyesittaza muntu n'omu, sikulwa ng'omulimu gwaffe gubaako kye gunenyezebwamu." 
2Corinthians6:4 Naye mu byonna tulaga nga tuli baweereza ba Katonda, nga tugumiikiriza nnyo mu kubonyaabonyezebwa, mu bitukaluubirira, ne mu kunyolwa." 
2Corinthians6:5 Tukubiddwa, tusibiddwa mu makomera, tuyise mu busasamalo, tukoze emirimu, era nga tetwebaka wadde okulya." 
2Corinthians6:6 Era mu butukuvu, mu kumanya, mu kugumiikiriza, mu kuba ab'ekisa, mu kuba ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu era n'okwagala okutaliimu bukuusa, tulaga nga tuli baweereza ba Katonda." 
2Corinthians6:7 Twogera amazima, era tukolera ku maanyi ga Katonda. Era obutuukirivu bye byokulwanyisa bye tulina mu mukono ogwa ddyo n'ogwa kkono." 
2Corinthians6:8 Abamu batussaamu ekitiibwa, abalala batugaya. Abamu batwogerako bubi, abalala batwogerako bulungi. Tuyitibwa balimba, sso nga twogera mazima." 
2Corinthians6:9 Tuli ng'abatamanyiddwa, sso nga bonna batumanyi. Tuli ng'abafudde, sso nga tuli balamu. Newaakubadde nga tubonerezebwa, naye tetuttibwa." 
2Corinthians6:10 Newaakubadde nga tunakuwazibwa, naye tuli basanyufu bulijjo. Tuli ng'abaavu, naye tugaggawaza bangi. Tuli ng'abatalina kantu, naye ddala tulina byonna." 
2Corinthians6:11 Mmwe ab'e Korinto, twogedde lwatu gye muli, tetubakisizza kiri mu mitima gyaffe." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ffe tetubeekwekeredde, wabula mmwe mutwekwekeredde." 
2Corinthians6:13 Njogera nammwe ng'abaana bange, nammwe mube nga ffe bwe tuli eri mmwe, temutwekwekerera." 
2Corinthians6:14 Temwegattanga wamu na batakkiriza, kubanga tekibasaanira mmwe. Kale obutuukirivu butabagana butya n'obujeemu? Oba ekitangaala kitabagana kitya n'ekizikiza?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Era Kristo atabagana atya ne Sitaani? Oba, omugoberezi wa Kristo atabagana atya n'atali mugoberezi wa Kristo?" 
2Corinthians6:16 Era Essinzizo lya Katonda litabagana litya n'ebyo ebitali Katonda? Ffe tuli Ssinzizo lya Katonda Nnannyinibulamu. Nga ye bw'agamba nti: “Nnaabeeranga mu bo, ne ntambuliranga mu bo. Ndiba Katonda waabwe, nabo ne baba bantu bange.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Era Mukama agamba nti: “N'olwekyo mubaveemu, mwawukane nabo. Era temukwatanga ku kitali kirongoofu, olwo nange ndibaaniriza mmwe." 
2Corinthians6:18 Ndiba kitammwe, nammwe ne muba batabani bange ne bawala bange. Bw'atyo Mukama Omuyinzawaabyonna bw'agamba.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Abaagalwa, nga bwe twasuubizibwa ebyo, twetukuze, mu ebyo byonna ebyonoona omubiri, n'ebyonoona omwoyo, tulyoke tubeerere ddala batukuvu abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians7:2 Mutuwe ekifo mu mitima gyammwe. Tetuliiko gwe twakola kabi, tetuliiko gwe twazikiriza, era tetuliiko gwe twalyazaamaanya." 
2Corinthians7:3 Ebyo sibyogedde lwa kubanenya. Nagambye dda nti muli baagalwa baffe, abali naffe bulijjo mu kufa, oba mu bulamu." 
2Corinthians7:4 Mbeesiga nnyo, era mbeenyumiririzaamu nnyo. Newaakubadde tubonyaabonyezebwa, naye nziramu amaanyi, ne nzijula essanyu." 
2Corinthians7:5 Era ne bwe twatuuka mu Makedooniya, tetwawummula n'akatono. Twabonaabona eruuyi n'eruuyi: twali twetooloddwa ennyombo, era ng'emitima gyaffe gyeraliikirira." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kyokka Katonda asanyusa abasobeddwa, yatusanyusa olw'okujja kwa Tito." 
2Corinthians7:7 Si lwa kujja kwe kwokka, naye era n'okututegeeza nga bwe mwamusanyusa. Yatutegeeza nga bwe mwagala ennyo okundabako, nga bwe mulumwa olw'ebyo ebyagwawo, era nga bwe munnumirwa ennyo. Neeyongera okusanyuka olw'ebyo." 
2Corinthians7:8 Newaakubadde nga nabanakuwaza mu bbaluwa yange, ssejjusa. Weewaawo nejjusa kubanga nalaba nti ebbaluwa eyo yabanakuwaza okumala akaseera." 
2Corinthians7:9 Naye kaakano nsanyuka, si lwa kuba nga nabanakuwaza, naye kubanga okunakuwala kwammwe kwabaviiramu okwenenya. Okunakuwala okwo Katonda yakusiima, n'olwekyo tetulina kye twabafiiriza." 
2Corinthians7:10 Okunakuwala okusiimibwa Katonda, kuleeta okwenenya okuvaamu okulokolebwa, era tekuleetera bantu kujulirira. Naye okunakuwala okw'abantu ab'ensi, kuvaamu okufa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Kale mulabe okunakuwala okwo Katonda kw'asiima bye kwabaleetera: mwafuba nnyo, mwennyonnyolako, mwasunguwala, mwatya, mwegomba okundaba, mwewaayo eri Katonda, era mweteekateeka okubonereza buli akola ekibi. Mu byonna mweraga nga temuliiko kye munenyezebwa mu kino." 
2Corinthians7:12 Kale newaakubadde nga nabawandiikira ebbaluwa eyo, saagiwandiika lw'oyo eyakola ekibi, oba olw'oyo eyakolwa ekibi, wabula nagiwandiika lwa kukakasa mu maaso ga Katonda nti mutulumirwa." 
2Corinthians7:13 N'olwekyo twaddamu amaanyi. Ne mu kuddamu amaanyi, tweyongera okusanyuka ennyo olw'essanyu lya Tito, mmwe mwenna gwe mwawonya okweraliikirira." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ne bwe mba nga nabatenda nnyo gy'ali, temwanswaza. Kuba nga byonna bye twabategeeza bwe biri eby'amazima, n'okubatenda eri Tito kweragira ddala nga kwa mazima." 
2Corinthians7:15 Era naye olw'okujjukira nga bwe mwamussaamu ennyo ekitiibwa, yeeyongedde nnyo okubaagala." 
2Corinthians7:16 Nsanyuse kubanga nnyinza okubeesigira ddala mu byonna. 
2Corinthians8:1 Abooluganda, twagala mumanye ekisa Katonda kye yakwatirwa ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo eby'omu Makedooniya." 
2Corinthians8:2 Mu kugezebwa kwabwe, nga babonyaabonyezebwa ennyo, baafuna essanyu lingi, ne libaleetera okugaba nga tebeebalira, newaakubadde nga baavu nnyo." 
2Corinthians8:3 Era nkakasa nti baagaba ng'okufuna kwabwe bwe kuli. Naye era baasinzaawo, ate nga beeyagalidde bokka." 
2Corinthians8:4 Baatwegayirira nnyo bakkirizibwe okwegatta n'abo abayamba abantu ba Katonda. 
2Corinthians8:5 Era baakola kye twali tutasuubira! Okusooka beewaayo eri Mukama, era olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ne beewaayo eri ffe." 
2Corinthians8:6 Kyetwava tusaba Tito eyatandika omulimu ogwo ogw'ekisa ajje agumalirize ne mu mmwe. 
2Corinthians8:7 Kale nga bwe musukkirira mu byonna, mu kukkiriza ne mu kwogera ne mu kumanya ne mu kunyiikirira byonna era ne mu kutwagala, twagala musukkirire ne mu mulimu guno ogw'ekisa." 
2Corinthians8:8 Ekyo sikyogera nga mbalagira bulagizi, wabula mbalaga abalala nga bwe beetegese okuyamba, ndyoke ndabe nti okwagala kwammwe kwa mazima." 
2Corinthians8:9 Mumanyi ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo. Mumanyi nti newaakubadde nga yali mugagga, kyokka yafuuka mwavu ku lwammwe, mmwe mulyoke mugaggawale olw'obwavu bwe." 
2Corinthians8:10 Amagezi ge mbawa ku kino, kwe kumaliriza ekyo kye mwatandika omwaka ogwayita. Mmwe mwasinga, si mu kukola kwokka, naye ne mu kusanyukira kye mukola." 
2Corinthians8:11 Kale obumalirivu bwammwe mu kwagala okukikola, bulabikire mu kukimaliriza, nga mukozesa ebyo bye mulina." 
2Corinthians8:12 Kuba oba nga mwegomba okubaako kye muwaayo, Katonda akkiriza ekyo kye mulina, sso si ekyo kye mutalina." 
2Corinthians8:13 Saagala muyambe balala ate mmwe mwerumye. 
2Corinthians8:14 Naye olw'obwenkanya, mmwe bye mulina ebingi mu kiseera kino, biyambe bo mu kwetaaga kwabwe. Ate ebyabwe bye baliba nabyo ebingi, biriyamba mmwe mu kwetaaga kwammwe, walyoke wabeewo okwenkanankana." 
2Corinthians8:15 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Eyakuŋŋaanya ebingi, tebyamuyitirirako, n'eyakuŋŋaanya ebitono, yafuna ebimumala.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Kyokka twebaze Katonda awadde Tito omwoyo ogubalumirwa ennyo nga ffe gwe tulina. 
2Corinthians8:17 Teyakoma ku kukkiriza bukkiriza kye twamusaba, wabula naye yennyini yali mwetegefu, era ajja kujja gye muli nga yeeyagalidde." 
2Corinthians8:18 Era awamu naye, tubatumidde owooluganda amanyiddwa ennyo ebibiina byonna eby'abakkiriza Kristo. Amanyiddwa kubanga ategeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi." 
2Corinthians8:19 Era ekirala, ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo bimulonze okutuwerekera n'okutuyamba mu mulimu guno ogw'ekisa, gwe tukola olw'okuweesa Katonda ekitiibwa n'okulaga bwe twagala okuyamba." 
2Corinthians8:20 Twegendereza waleme kubaawo atwemulugunyiza olw'engeri gye tugabanyaamu ebirabo abantu bye bawa. 
2Corinthians8:21 Kye tugenderera kwe kukola ebirungi, si mu maaso ga Katonda yekka, wabula ne mu maaso g'abantu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Era awamu nabo, tubatumidde owooluganda omulala, gwe tugezezza emirundi emingi, ne tusanga nga munyiikivu mu bintu bingi. Era kaakano yeeyongedde okuba omunyiikivu, kubanga abeesiga nnyo mmwe." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tito ye, ye mukozi munnange bwe tukola mu kubaweereza mmwe. Era baganda baffe abo, be babaka b'ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo, era abaweesa Kristo ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians8:24 Kale mu maaso g'ebibiina byonna eby'abakkiriza Kristo, mubalage ekikakasa okwagala kwammwe n'okwenyumiriza kwaffe ku lwammwe." 
2Corinthians9:1 Tekinneetaagisa kubawandiikira olw'ebirabo ebikuŋŋaanyizibwa okuyamba abantu ba Katonda ab'omu Buyudaaya. 
2Corinthians9:2 Mmanyi nti muli beetegefu okuyamba, era kindeetera okwenyumiriza eri ab'omu Makedooniya, nga mbagamba bo nti: “Ab'omu Akaya beetegefu okuviira ddala mu mwaka ogwayita.” Era obumalirivu bwammwe bukubirizza bangi mu bo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Naye mmwe mbatumidde, abooluganda, okwenyumiriza kwaffe ku lwammwe kuleme kuba kwa bwereere, wabula mube beetegefu nga bwe nagamba." 
2Corinthians9:4 Sikulwa ng'abamu ku b'omu Makedooniya bajja nange, ne tusanga nga temuli beetegefu, ffe, ne bwe siiyogere ku kuswala okwammwe, ne tufa ensonyi, olw'okubeesigira obwereere." 
2Corinthians9:5 Kyenvudde ndowooza nti kituufu okubatumira abooluganda bansooke okujja gye muli, bateeketeeke ekirabo ekyo kye mwasuubiza, kisangibwe nga kitegekeddwa lwa kweyagalira, sso si lwa kuwalirizibwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Mujjukire nti oyo asiga ng'akekkereza ensigo, alikungula bitono; kyokka oyo asiga ennyingi, alikungula bingi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Kale buli omu akole nga bw'amaliridde mu mutima gwe, si lwa nnaakola ntya, wadde olw'okuwalirizibwa. Katonda ayagala oyo agaba nga musanyufu." 
2Corinthians9:8 Era Katonda ayinza okubawa ebyo ebisinga ku bye mwetaaga, mulyoke mube na bingi bulijjo, era mugabe bingi olwa buli mulimu omulungi." 
2Corinthians9:9 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Yagaba nnyo ng'agabira abaavu. Obutuukirivu bwe bwa mirembe gyonna.” 
2Corinthians9:10 Era Katonda awa omusizi ensigo, n'amuwa n'emmere ey'okulya, anaayazanga ensigo zammwe ne mweyongera okugaba." 
2Corinthians9:11 Anaabagaggawazanga mu byonna ne mugaba nnyo, abantu balyoke beebazenga Katonda olw'ebyo bye tukoze." 
2Corinthians9:12 Okukola omulimu guno tekukoma ku kuyamba bantu ba Katonda kyokka, naye era kwongera okuleetera abantu okwebaza ennyo Katonda." 
2Corinthians9:13 Ekyo kye mukola kikakasa okukkiriza kwammwe, era kireetera abantu okuwa Katonda ekitiibwa, si lwa kukkiriza Amawulire Amalungi kyokka, wabula era mugagondera, ne mubawa ku byammwe era ne muwa n'abalala bonna." 
2Corinthians9:14 N'engeri gye babasabiramu eri Katonda, eraga nga bwe babaagala ennyo, kubanga Katonda yabakwatirwa mmwe ekisa ekitasangikasangika." 
2Corinthians9:15 Katonda yeebazibwe olw'ekirabo kye ekyo ekitanyumizika. 
2Corinthians10:1 Nze nzennyini Pawulo, ayogerwako nti mba mutiitiizi nga ndi nammwe ne mba wa maanyi nga siri nammwe, mbeegayirira olw'obuwombeefu n'obukkakkamu bwa Kristo." 
2Corinthians10:2 Mbasaba nti bwe ndiba nga ndi nammwe, muleme kundeetera kwogeza maanyi, ge nkozesa eri abalala abalowooza nti tugoberera bya nsi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kuba newaakubadde nga tuli mu nsi, naye tetulwana ng'ab'ensi." 
2Corinthians10:4 Ebyokulwanyisa byaffe mu lutalo, tebiri ng'eby'ab'ensi, wabula birina amaanyi agava eri Katonda, okusaanyaawo ebigo." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tumalirawo ddala empaka era na buli ekyekulumbaza okuziyiza Katonda okumanyibwa. Era tujeemulula buli kirowoozo, kiwulire Kristo." 
2Corinthians10:6 Bwe mulimala okugondera ddala, tweteeseteese okubonereza obujeemu bwonna." 
2Corinthians10:7 Mulabe ebintu nga bwe biri. Omuntu bwe yeerowooza nti wa Kristo, ajjukire nti naffe tuli ba Kristo nga ye." 
2Corinthians10:8 Tekinkwasa nsonyi ne bwe mba nga nsukkirizza okwetenda olw'obuyinza bwa Mukama bwe yatuwa olw'okubazimba, sso si olw'okubazikiriza." 
2Corinthians10:9 Sandyagadde kuba ng'abatiisa na bbaluwa zange. 
2Corinthians10:10 Abantu bagamba nti: “Ebbaluwa za Pawulo nkambwe era za maanyi, kyokka bw'abeera naffe aba munafu, era ebigambo bye binyoomebwa.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Alowooza bw'atyo, ategeere nti bye tugamba mu bbaluwa nga tetuli nammwe, era bye tukola nga tuli nammwe." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ffe tetwagala kwebalira mu abo abeetendereza, wadde okwegeraageranya nabo. Bwe beegeraageranya, beegeraageranya ku bo bennyini. Tebalina magezi." 
2Corinthians10:13 Naye ffe tetujja kwenyumiriza nga tetuliiko kkomo. Tujja kukoma ku mirimu Katonda gye yatugerera, nga mw'otwalidde n'ogwo gwe twakola mu mmwe." 
2Corinthians10:14 Nga mmwe bwe muli mu kitundu Katonda kye yatugerera, tetwakibuuka bwe twajja gye muli nga tubategeeza Amawulire Amalungi agafa ku Kristo." 
2Corinthians10:15 Tetwenyumiriza lwa mulimu abalala gwe baakola ebweru w'ekitundu Katonda kye yatugerera. Wabula tusuubira nti okukkiriza kwammwe nga bwe kugenda kweyongera, era n'omulimu gwaffe mu mmwe gweyongera okugaziwa." 
2Corinthians10:16 Olwo tulisobola okutuusa Amawulire Amalungi ku bantu abali mu bitundu ebiri eyo okuyisa ewammwe, nga tetwenyumiriza lwa mulimu ogukoleddwa abalala mu kitundu kyabwe." 
2Corinthians10:17 Kyokka ng'ekyawandiikibwa bwe kigamba, “Eyeenyumiriza, yeenyumirizenga mu Mukama waffe.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Omuntu eyeetenda, si ye akkirizibwa, wabula oyo Mukama gw'asiima." 
2Corinthians11:1 Nandyagadde muŋŋumiikirize mu busirusiru bwange obutono. Ddala muŋŋumiikirize. 
2Corinthians11:2 Mbalinako ebbuba nga Katonda ly'abalinako, kubanga nabaleeta eri Kristo aboogereze, nga muli ng'omuwala embeerera aweebwayo eri bba omu yekka." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kyokka ntya nti ng'omusota bwe gwalimbalimba Haawa olw'obukujjukujju bwagwo, ebirowoozo byammwe bijja kubakyamya, muleme okweweerayo ddala eri Kristo mu mazima." 
2Corinthians11:4 Omuntu bw'ajja n'abategeeza Yesu omulala, atali oyo gwe twabategeeza, oba bwe muweebwa Mwoyo omulala, atali oyo gwe mwaweebwa, oba Amawulire Amalungi amalala, agatali ago ge mwafuna, mwanguwa okubikkiriza." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ndowooza nti abo abatume abakulu ennyo tebalina kye bansinza n'akatono. 
2Corinthians11:6 Nnyinza okuba nga siri mumanyirivu mu kwogera, naye amagezi nnina, era ekyo twakibalaga mu byonna ne mu buli ngeri." 
2Corinthians11:7 Bwe nabategeeza Amawulire Amalungi agava eri Katonda, sirina kye nabasasuza. Neetoowaza, mmwe mulyoke mugulumizibwe. Ekyo nakola kibi?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ebibiina ebirala eby'abakkiriza Kristo nabimalako kumpi buli kantu, okufuna ebinnyamba nga nkola omulimu mu mmwe." 
2Corinthians11:9 Era bwe nabanga nammwe nga neetaaga, siriiko n'omu ku mmwe gwe nazitoowerera. Abooluganda abaava mu Makedooniya bandeetera byonna bye nali neetaaga. Nali mwegendereza, era njija kwegenderezanga nneme okubazitoowerera mmwe mu ngeri yonna." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ng'amazima ga Kristo bwe gali mu nze, tewali alinzigyako kwenyumiriza okwo mu Akaya yonna." 
2Corinthians11:11 Lwaki? Kubanga mmwe sibaagala? Katonda amanyi nti mbaagala. 
2Corinthians11:12 Njija kweyongera okukola ekyo kye nkola kaakano, ndyoke nziyize abo abeenyumiririza mu butume bwabwe, nga bagamba nti bakola nga bwe tukola." 
2Corinthians11:13 Abantu ng'abo beeyita batume, sso nga si bwe bali. Bakozi ab'obukuusa, abeefuula abatume ba Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Era ekyo tekyewuunyisa, kubanga ne Sitaani yefuula malayika ow'ekitangaala." 
2Corinthians11:15 N'olwekyo kyangu n'abaweereza be okwefuula abaweereza b'eby'obutuukirivu. Ku nkomerero baliweebwa ekibasaanira olw'ebikolwa byabwe. 
2Corinthians11:16 Nziramu okugamba nti waleme kubaawo n'omu alowooza nti ndi musirusiru. Naye ne bwe mundowoozaako bwe mutyo, waakiri munzikirize mu busiru bwange nange nneenyumirizeeko akatono." 
2Corinthians11:17 Kye njogera Mukama si ye akinjogeza, wabula mu kwenyumiriza kuno, nkyogera ng'omusirusiru." 
2Corinthians11:18 Naye nga bwe waliwo bangi abeenyumiriza olw'eby'ensi, nange ka neenyumirize." 
2Corinthians11:19 Mmwe nga bwe muli bagezi, mugumiikiriza abasirusiru." 
2Corinthians11:20 Omuntu bw'abafuula abaddu oba bw'abanyaga, oba bw'abawamba, oba bwe yeekulumbaza, oba bw'abakuba mu maaso, mugumiikiriza." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ka njogere nga nswadde, nti ffe ekyo tetwasobola kukikola. Naye omuntu ky'aguma okwenyumiririzaamu, (njogera ng'omusirusiru), nange ŋŋuma okukyenyumiririzaamu." 
2Corinthians11:22 Bo Beebureeyi? Nange bwe ndi. Bo Bayisirayeli? Nange bwe ndi. Bo bazzukulu ba Aburahamu? Nange bwe ndi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bo baweereza ba Kristo? (Njogera ng'omulalu), nze mbasinga. Mbasinga okukola ennyo. Nsibiddwa mu makomera emirundi mingi okusinga bo. Nkubiddwa nnyo okubasinga, era emirundi mingi nabulako katono okufa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Abayudaaya bankuba emirundi etaano emiggo amakumi asatu mu mwenda. 
2Corinthians11:25 Emirundi esatu nakubibwa enga, era olumu nakubibwa amayinja. Eryato lyatwonoonekako emirundi esatu, ne nsula era ne nsiiba mu buziba bw'ennyanja." 
2Corinthians11:26 Mu ŋŋendo zange ennyingi natuukibwako akabi mu migga, akabi ak'abanyazi, akabi ke natuusibwako ab'eggwanga lyange, n'akabi ke natuusibwako ab'amawanga amalala. Natuukibwako akabi mu kibuga, akabi mu ddungu, akabi mu nnyanja, era n'akabi akantuusibwako abooluganda ab'obulimba." 
2Corinthians11:27 Nakolanga nnyo ne nkoowa. Emirundi mingi seebakanga. Nalumwanga enjala n'ennyonta, era nasiibanga emirundi mingi. Nabeeranga mu mpewo, ng'ate sirina na kye neesuulako." 
2Corinthians11:28 Era okwongera ku ebyo, buli lunaku mba nzitoowereddwa okweraliikirira olw'ebibiina byonna eby'abakkiriza Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ani aggwaamu amaanyi, ne simulumirwa? Ani akemebwa n'agwa, ne sisaalirwa?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Oba nga ndi wa kwenyumiriza, nja kwenyumirizanga olw'ebyo ebiraga obunafu bwange." 
2Corinthians11:31 Katonda aweebwa ekitiibwa ennaku zonna, era Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, amanyi nga sirimba." 
2Corinthians11:32 Bwe nali mu Damasiko, omufuzi eyateekebwawo kabaka Arete, yakuuma ekibuga Damasiko ankwate," 
2Corinthians11:33 kyokka ne bampisa mu ddirisa, nga bantadde mu kisero, ne banzisiza ku kisenge, ne mmuwona." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndi wa kwenyumiriza, newaakubadde okwenyumiriza tekugasa. Naye ka njogere ku kulagibwa n'okulabikirwa Mukama waffe." 
2Corinthians12:2 Mmanyi omugoberezi wa Kristo eyatwalibwa mu ggulu erya waggulu ennyo, kati emyaka kkumi n'ena egiyiseewo. Simanyi oba nga ekyo kyabeererawo ddala, oba nga kwali kulabikirwa. Simanyi, Katonda ye amanyi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Era mmanyi nti omuntu oyo, (oba nga ekyo kyabeererawo ddala, oba nga kwali kulabikirwa, simanyi, Katonda ye amanyi)," 
2Corinthians12:4 yatwalibwa mu kifo eky'okwesiima, n'awulira ebigambo ebitannyonnyolekeka, omuntu by'atasobola kwogera." 
2Corinthians12:5 Kale nneenyumirizanga olw'omuntu oyo, naye sijja kwenyumiriza ku lwange, okuggyako olw'ebyo ebiraga bwe ndi omunafu." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kyokka ne bwe nandyagadde okwenyumiriza, sandibadde musirusiru, kubanga nandyogedde mazima. Naye ka nkireke, kubanga saagala wabeewo muntu n'omu andowoozaako bisinga ku ebyo by'andabamu, ne by'awulira njogera." 
2Corinthians12:7 Naye olw'okunziyiza okwekulumbaza olw'ebintu ebyewuunyisa bye nalaba emirundi emingi, naweebwa obulumi obungi mu mubiri gwange, nga ye mubaka wa Sitaani, ambonyeebonye, nneme kwekulumbaza." 
2Corinthians12:8 Emirundi esatu neegayirira Mukama waffe amponye obulumi obwo," 
2Corinthians12:9 kyokka yaŋŋamba nti: “Obuyambi bwe nkuwa bukumala, kubanga amaanyi gange galabikira mu bunafu bwo.” Kyennaavanga nsanyuka okwenyumiriza olw'obunafu bwange, amaanyi ga Kristo galyoke gabeere mu nze." 
2Corinthians12:10 Kale olwa Kristo nsanyukira obunafu, okuvumibwa, ebizibu, okuyigganyizibwa era n'ebinkaluubirira, kubanga lwe mba omunafu, lwe mba ow'amaanyi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Nfuuse ng'omusirusiru, naye mmwe mumpalirizza. Mmwe mwandibadde ab'okunsiima. Kuba newaakubadde nga siriiko bwe ndi, naye abo abatume abakulu ennyo, tebalina kye bansingamu n'akatono." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ebyo ebiraga nti ddala ndi mutume, byakolerwa mu mmwe mu bugumiikiriza obungi. Mwalaba ebyewuunyo, ebyamagero, n'eby'amaanyi." 
2Corinthians12:13 Kale ebibiina ebirala eby'abakkiriza Kristo, bibasinza ki? Okuggyako nti nze saabazitoowerera mmwe. Munsonyiwe olw'obutaba mwenkanya mu kino." 
2Corinthians12:14 Kaakano neeteeseteese okujja gye muli omulundi ogwokusatu, naye sijja kubazitoowerera. Sibanoonyaako byammwe, wabula noonya mmwe. Abaana si be basaana okuterekeranga abazadde baabwe, wabula abazadde be basaana okuterekeranga abaana baabwe." 
2Corinthians12:15 Nze njija kuwaayo ebyange, era nange nneeweereyo ddala ku lwammwe, nga ndi musanyufu nnyo. Kale bwe mbaagala ennyo, mmwe musaana kunjagala katono?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Mukkiriza nti nze saabazitoowerera, naye mugamba nti nali mukalabakalaba, ne mbatega mu lukwe, ne mbakwasa." 
2Corinthians12:17 Mu abo be nabatumira, mulimu gwe nakozesa okubalyakula?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Neegayirira Tito okujja gye muli, era ne ntuma owooluganda omulala awamu naye. Tito oyo ye yabalyakula? Ye nange tetwakolera mu mutima gumu? Era tetwakwata kkubo limu?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Obw'edda mulowooza nti twewolereza mu maaso gammwe? Abaagalwa, ffe abagoberezi ba Kristo byonna bye twogera, tubyogerera mu maaso ga Katonda olw'okubagasa mmwe." 
2Corinthians12:20 Kye ntya, kwe kujja mpozzi ne mbasanga nga muli nga bwe saagala, oba mmwe okundaba nga nninga bwe mutayagala, olwo mpozzi ne wabaawo okuyombagana, obuggya, obusungu, okwefaako, okugeyaŋŋana, olugambo, okwekulumbaza, era n'okutabukatabuka." 
2Corinthians12:21 Era ntya nti bwe ndijja nate, Katonda wange alintoowaza mu maaso gammwe, ne nkungubagira bangi abaakola ebibi ne bateenenya bukaba, n'obwenzi, n'obugwagwa bye baakola." 
2Corinthians13:1 Guno gwe mulundi ogwokusatu gwe njija gye muli. Buli kigambo kirikakasibwa nga waliwo abajulirwa babiri oba basatu. 
2Corinthians13:2 Bwe nali nammwe ku mulundi ogwokubiri nalabula abo abaayonoona edda, era nalabula n'abalala bonna. Ne kaakano, newaakubadde nga siri nammwe, nziramu okubalabula nti bwe ndijja, siribaako gwe nsaasira." 
2Corinthians13:3 Bulijjo mmwe mwagala ekikakasa nti Kristo ayogerera mu nze. Kristo oyo tabafuza bunafu, wabula aba wa maanyi mu nze." 
2Corinthians13:4 Kubanga newaakubadde yakomererwa ku musaalaba nga munafu, kyokka mulamu olw'amaanyi ga Katonda. Naffe mu ye tuba banafu. Kyokka mu kukolagana nammwe, tujjanga kuba naye mu maanyi ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians13:5 Mwekebere era mwegeze mulabe oba nga mukyanyweredde mu kukkiriza. Temumanyi nti Kristo ali mu mmwe? Mpozzi ng'ekigezo ekyo kibalemye! 
2Corinthians13:6 Nsuubira nti mujja kumanya nti ffe tetulemeddwa. 
2Corinthians13:7 Naye tusaba Katonda, muleme kukola kibi, si lwa kwagala kulabika nti twakola bulungi, wabula mmwe mukole ekituufu, ffe ne bwe tunaalabika ng'abalemeddwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Tetuyinza kukola kintu na kimu ekiwakanya amazima, wabula okugalwanirira." 
2Corinthians13:9 Tusanyuka ffe bwe tuba abanafu, naye mmwe ne muba ab'amaanyi. Era kye tubasabira mmwe eri Katonda, kwe kutuukirira." 
2Corinthians13:10 Bino mbibawandiikidde nga sinnajja gye muli, bwe ndijja nneme okuba omukambwe mu kukozesa obuyinza Mukama bwe yampa okubazimba, sso si okubazikiriza." 
2Corinthians13:11 Kale kaakano abooluganda, mweraba. Mufube okuba abatuukiridde, mugumyaŋŋanenga, mulowoozenga bumu, mube n'emirembe, ne Katonda nnannyini kwagala n'emirembe, anaabanga nammwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Mulamusagane mu ngeri eraga nti mwagalana. 
2Corinthians13:13 Abantu ba Katonda bonna babalamusizza. 
2Corinthians13:14 Ekisa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo ky'atukwatirwa, n'okwagala kwa Katonda kw'atwagalamu, n'okussa ekimu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu kw'atuwa, bibeerenga nammwe mwenna." 
Galatians1:1 Nze Pawulo omutume, obutume bwange tebwava mu bantu, wadde okuyita ku muntu n'omu, wabula bwava eri Yesu Kristo, ne Katonda Kitaffe, eyazuukiza Yesu oyo." 
Galatians1:2 Nze n'abooluganda bonna be ndi nabo, tuwandiikira ab'ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo ebiri e Galatiya." 
Galatians1:3 Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo babakwatirwe ekisa, era babawe emirembe." 
Galatians1:4 Kristo oyo yeewaayo olw'ebibi byaffe, alyoke atununule mu mulembe guno omubi, nga Katonda waffe era Kitaffe bwe yayagala." 
Galatians1:5 Katonda oyo aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
Galatians1:6 Mbeewuunya mmwe! Mu kaseera kano akatono, muvudde ku oyo eyabayita olw'ekisa kya Kristo, ne muwuliriza Amawulire Amalungi amalala." 
Galatians1:7 Mu butuufu, tewali Mawulire Malungi malala, wabula waliwo abantu abamu ababatawaanya, nga bagezaako okukyamya Amawulire Amalungi aga Kristo." 
Galatians1:8 Kyokka ne bwe tuba ffe, oba malayika avudde mu ggulu, n'abategeeza Amawulire Amalungi amaawufu ku ago ge twabategeeza, avumirirwe." 
Galatians1:9 Nga bwe twayogera okusooka, era ne kaakano nkiddamu nti: bwe wabangawo abategeeza Amawulire Amalungi amaawufu ku ago ge twabategeeza, avumirirwe." 
Galatians1:10 Kale kaakano nkolerera kusiimibwa bantu, oba Katonda? Oba ngezaako kusanyusa bantu? Singa mbadde nkyanoonya kusanyusa bantu, sandibadde muweereza wa Kristo." 
Galatians1:11 Abooluganda, mbategeeza nti Amawulire Amalungi ge nabategeeza si ga bantu buntu." 
Galatians1:12 Saagafuna kuva ku muntu, era tewali n'omu yaganjigiriza, wabula Yesu yennyini ye yagammanyisa." 
Galatians1:13 Mwawulira nga bwe nabeeranga, nga nkyagoberera eddiini y'Ekiyudaaya, era mwawulira nga bwe nayigganyanga ennyo ekibiina ky'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo, nga ngezaako okukizikiriza." 
Galatians1:14 Era nasinga nnyo Bayudaaya bannange bwe twakula, ne mbasukkirira mu kujjumbira obulombolombo bwa bajjajjaffe." 
Galatians1:15 Naye Katonda yanjawula nga sinnava na mu lubuto lwa mmange, n'ampita olw'ekisa kye." 
Galatians1:16 Era bwe yasiima okummanyisa Omwana we, ndyoke mmutegeeze ab'amawanga amalala, sirina gwe neebuuzaako," 
Galatians1:17 wadde okwambuka e Yerusaalemu eri abo abansooka okuba abatume, wabula nagenda mu Buwarabu, oluvannyuma ne nkomawo e Damasiko." 
Galatians1:18 Ate bwe waayitawo emyaka esatu, ne nnyambuka e Yerusaalemu okulaba Keefa, ne mmala naye ennaku kkumi na ttaano." 
Galatians1:19 Kyokka ssaalaba mulala ku batume, okuggyako Yakobo muganda wa Mukama waffe." 
Galatians1:20 Ndayira mu maaso ga Katonda nti bye mpandiika bya mazima, sirimba." 
Galatians1:21 Oluvannyuma nagenda mu bitundu by'e Siriya ne Kilikiya. 
Galatians1:22 Era nali sinnamanyibwa ba bibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo, ab'omu Buyudaaya," 
Galatians1:23 wabula baawuliranga buwulizi, nti oyo eyatuyigganyanga edda, kaakano ategeeza abantu bakkirize ekyo kye yagezangako okuzikiriza." 
Galatians1:24 Era ne bagulumiza Katonda ku lwange. 
Galatians2:1 Oluvannyuma nga wayiseewo emyaka kkumi n'ena, nayambuka nate e Yerusaalemu, wamu ne Barunaba, nga ntutte ne Tito." 
Galatians2:2 Nagendayo kubanga Katonda yandaga nti nteekwa okugendayo. Ne ntuula n'abatume mu kyama, ne mbanjulira Amawulire Amalungi ge ntegeeza ab'amawanga amalala. Ekyo nakikola, sikulwa ng'omulimu gwe nali nkoze ne gwe nali ŋŋenda okukola, guba ogw'obwereere." 
Galatians2:3 Tito gwe nali naye, newaakubadde nga yali Muyonaani, teyawalirizibwa kukomolebwa." 
Galatians2:4 Waaliwo abooluganda ab'obulimba abaasensera mu kyama okuketta eddembe lyaffe lye tulina mu Kristo Yesu, nga baagala okutuzza mu buddu." 
Galatians2:5 Abo tetwabagonderako n'akatono. Twayagala tulwanirire amazima g'Amawulire Amalungi ku lwammwe. 
Galatians2:6 Abo abaabalibwanga ng'abakulembeze oba ddala bwe bali– ekyo ku nze si nsonga kubanga Katonda tasosola mu bantu– abakulembeze abo, tebalina kye bannyongerako." 
Galatians2:7 Naye baalaba nga nakwasibwa omulimu ogw'okutegeeza ab'amawanga amalala Amawulire Amalungi, nga Peetero bwe yakwasibwa ogw'okugategeeza Abayudaaya." 
Galatians2:8 Katonda eyafuula Peetero okuba omutume w'Abayudaaya, era ye yafuula nange okuba omutume w'ab'amawanga amalala." 
Galatians2:9 Era Yakobo, Keefa ne Yowanne abaalowoozebwanga okuba empagi, bwe baategeera omulimu gwe yampa, ne batukwata mu ngalo, nze ne Barunaba, okulaga nti tuli bumu nabo. Ne tukkaanya: bo bagende eri Abayudaaya, ffe tugende eri ab'amawanga amalala." 
Galatians2:10 Wabula baatusaba tujjukirenga abantu baabwe abaavu, era ekyo nanyiikira nnyo okukikola." 
Galatians2:11 Keefa bwe yajja mu Antiyookiya, namunenya lwatu kubanga yali mukyamu." 
Galatians2:12 Abantu abamu abaava eri Yakobo, bwe baali tebannajja, Keefa yalyanga wamu n'ab'amawanga amalala. Kyokka abantu abo bwe baatuuka, ne yeeyawula ku bali, n'abaawukanako olw'okutya abo abawagira okukomolebwa." 
Galatians2:13 N'Abayudaaya abalala be yali nabo ne beegatta naye, mu bukuusa bwe." 
Galatians2:14 Naye bwe nalaba nga tebagoberedde Mawulire Amalungi mu mazima, ne ŋŋamba Keefa nga tuli mu maaso gaabwe bonna, nti: “Ggwe oli Muyudaaya, naye okwata empisa z'ab'amawanga amalala ezitali za Kiyudaaya. Kale oyinza otya okuwaliriza ab'amawanga amalala okukwata empisa z'Ekiyudaaya?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ffe twazaalibwa nga tuli Bayudaaya, nga tetuli “Ba mawanga malala aboonoonyi,” nga bo bwe bayitibwa." 
Galatians2:16 Naye tumanyi nti omuntu aba omutuukirivu lwa kukkiriza Yesu Kristo, sso si lwa kutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira. Naffe twakkiriza Yesu Kristo tulyoke tube abatuukirivu olw'okukkiriza Kristo, naye si lwa kutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, kubanga tewali n'omu ayinza kufuuka mutuukirivu olw'okutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira." 
Galatians2:17 Kale kaakano bwe tufuba okuba abatuukirivu mu Kristo, ate ne tusangibwa nga naffe tuli boonoonyi, ekyo kitegeeza nti Kristo muweereza wa kibi? Nedda, tekisoboka." 
Galatians2:18 Bwe nziramu okuzimba bye namenya, nneeraga nze nzennyini nga ndi mwonoonyi," 
Galatians2:19 kubanga mu Mateeka, nafa, nga nzitibwa Amateeka, ndyoke mbe mulamu ku bwa Katonda. Nakomererwa ku musaalaba wamu ne Kristo." 
Galatians2:20 Kyokka ndi mulamu, si ku bwange, wabula Kristo ye mulamu mu nze. Era obulamu bwe nnina kaakano, mbulina olw'okukkiriza Omwana wa Katonda, eyanjagala, ne yeewaayo ku lwange." 
Galatians2:21 Sigaana kisa kya Katonda. Naye singa abantu baba batuukirivu lwa kutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, olwo Kristo aba yafiira bwereere." 
Galatians3:1 Mmwe ab'e Galatiya ababuyabuya, ani yabaloga? Mwannyonnyolwa bulungi, ne mulaba Yesu Kristo nga bwe yakomererwa ku musaalaba." 
Galatians3:2 Kino kyokka kye njagala muntegeeze: mwafuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu lwa kubanga mwatuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bwe galagira, oba lwa kuwulira na kukkiriza Amawulire Amalungi?" 
Galatians3:3 Bwe mutyo temulina magezi? Mmwe abaatandika n'amaanyi aga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, ate kaakano mwagala mumalirize n'amaanyi agammwe ku bwammwe?" 
Galatians3:4 Ebyo bye mwabonaabonamu bya bwereere? Ddala si bya bwereere. 
Galatians3:5 Katonda abawa Mwoyo we, era akola ebyamagero mu mmwe, lwa kubanga mutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, oba lwa kubanga mwawulira ne mukkiriza Amawulire Amalungi?" 
Galatians3:6 Mulowooze ku byatuuka ku jjajjaffe Aburahamu. Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Aburahamu yakkiriza Katonda, n'abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu.”" 
Galatians3:7 Kale mutegeere nti abalina okukkiriza, be bazzukulu ba Aburahamu." 
Galatians3:8 Olw'okulengera ebiri mu maaso nti Katonda aliwa ab'amawanga amalala obutuukirivu olw'okukkiriza kwabwe, ekyawandiikibwa kyekyava kitegeeza edda Aburahamu Amawulire Amalungi nti: “Mu ggwe amawanga gonna mwe galiweerwa omukisa.”" 
Galatians3:9 Bwe kityo abo bonna abalina okukkiriza, baweebwa omukisa nga Aburahamu eyalina okukkiriza bwe yaguweebwa." 
Galatians3:10 Abo abeesigama ku kutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, bakolimiddwa, kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Buli ataatuukirizenga byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Amateeka, akolimiddwa.”" 
Galatians3:11 Kimanyiddwa nti tewali n'omu aba mutuukirivu lwa kutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, kubanga, “Omutuukirivu anaabanga mulamu lwa kukkiriza.”" 
Galatians3:12 Naye Amateeka, go tegeesigama ku kukkiriza. Kale, ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Buli atuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, anaabanga mulamu mu go.”" 
Galatians3:13 Naye ffe Kristo yatununula, n'atuggya mu kikoligo ekireetebwa Amateeka, bwe yafuuka ekikolimo ku lwaffe. Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Buli awanikibwa ku muti, akolimiddwa.”" 
Galatians3:14 Kristo yessaako ekikolimo ekyo, omukisa Katonda gwe yasuubiza Aburahamu gulyoke guweebwe n'ab'amawanga amalala olwa Kristo Yesu, era olw'okukkiriza, tulyoke tufune Mwoyo Mutuukirivu eyasuubizibwa." 
Galatians3:15 Abooluganda, ne mu nkola ey'abantu eya bulijjo, omuntu bw'amala okukola endagaano n'enywera, tewali n'omu akkirizibwa kugiggyawo oba okugyongerako." 
Galatians3:16 Ebyo ebyasuubizibwa, byasuubizibwa Aburahamu ne muzzukulu we. Ekyawandiikibwa tekigamba nti: “Ne bazzukulu be,” ng'abangi, wabula kigamba nti “Ne muzzukulu we,” ng'ali omu, ye Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Kye ŋŋamba kye kino nti Amateeka agajja nga wayiseewo emyaka ebikumi bina mu asatu, tegaggyaawo ndagaano eyanywezebwa Katonda, era tegadibya ekyasuubizibwa." 
Galatians3:18 Kale oba nga Katonda ky'awa kyesigama ku Mateeka, olwo kiba tekikyesigamye ku kusuubiza kwe; naye Katonda yakiwa Aburahamu kubanga yakimusuubiza." 
Galatians3:19 Kale Amateeka gaateekebwawo lwaki? Gaateekebwawo, okwonoona kulyoke kumanyike, era gaali ga kubeerawo okutuusa ku kujja kwa muzzukulu wa Aburahamu eyasuubizibwa. Go Amateeka gaaleetebwa bamalayika, nga gayita ku mutabaganya." 
Galatians3:20 Kyokka omutabaganya abaawo nga waliwo enjuyi bbiri. Naye Katonda ali omu. 
Galatians3:21 Kale Amateeka galwanagana n'ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza? Nedda, tekisoboka. Singa gaateekebwawo nga ge gayinza okuleeta obulamu, olwo abantu bandibadde batuukirivu olw'okutuukiriza ebyo bye galagira." 
Galatians3:22 Naye ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti ekibi kifuga byonna, ekyasuubizibwa kiryoke kiweebwe abo abakkiriza, nga kibaweebwa olw'okukkiriza Yesu Kristo." 
Galatians3:23 Okukkiriza bwe kwali tekunnajja, Amateeka gaatukuumanga nga tuli basibe, okutuusa okukkiriza lwe kwalagibwa." 
Galatians3:24 Kale Amateeka gaatukuuma okutuusa Kristo lwe yajja, tulyoke tube batuukirivu olw'okukkiriza." 
Galatians3:25 Naye kaakano okukkiriza nga bwe kwajja, tetukyafugibwa mukuumi." 
Galatians3:26 Olw'okukkiriza, mwenna muli baana ba Katonda mu Kristo Yesu," 
Galatians3:27 kubanga mmwe mwenna ababatizibwa mu Kristo, mwayambala Kristo." 
Galatians3:28 Tewakyali njawulo wakati w'Omuyudaaya n'ow'eggwanga eddala, wakati w'omuddu n'ow'eddembe, wakati w'omusajja n'omukazi. Mwenna muli omu mu Kristo Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Kale nga bwe muli aba Kristo, muli bazzukulu ba Aburahamu, era mulifuna ekyo Katonda kye yasuubiza." 
Galatians4:1 Naye ŋŋamba nti omusika bw'aba ng'akyali mwana muto, tayawulwa na muddu, newaakubadde nga byonna ye nnyinibyo." 
Galatians4:2 Aba mu mikono gya bakuza be, okutuusa ekiseera kitaawe kye yalagira lwe kiggwaako." 
Galatians4:3 Bwe tutyo naffe, bwe twali tukyali bato mu by'omwoyo, twali baddu abafugibwa emisambwa egy'oku nsi kuno." 
Galatians4:4 Naye ekiseera bwe kyatuuka, Katonda n'atuma Omwana we n'azaalibwa omukazi, era n'afugibwa Amateeka" 
Galatians4:5 anunule abo abafugibwa Amateeka, tulyoke tufuuke abaana ba Katonda." 
Galatians4:6 Era olw'okuba abaana ba Katonda, Katonda kyeyava atuma Mwoyo w'Omwana we, mu mitima gyaffe. Mwoyo oyo akoowoola nti: “Aba”, ekitegeeza nti “Kitaffe”!" 
Galatians4:7 Kale kaakano tokyali muddu, wabula oli mwana, era oba ng'oli mwana, Katonda alikuwa ebyo by'awa abaana be." 
Galatians4:8 Edda mwali temumanyi Katonda, n'olwekyo mwali baddu b'ebyo ebitali Katonda." 
Galatians4:9 Naye kaakano nga bwe mumanyi Katonda, oba ka ŋŋambe nti nga bwe mumanyiddwa Katonda, muyinza mutya okuddayo emabega eri obuyinza bw'emisambwa eminafu era egitagasa? Era mwagala giddemu okubafuga?" 
Galatians4:10 Mukuza ennaku, n'emyezi, n'ebiro, era n'emyaka." 
Galatians4:11 Ntya nti sikulwa ng'okutegana kwange mu mmwe kufa bwereere. 
Galatians4:12 Abooluganda, mbeegayirira mubeere nga nze, kubanga nange nafuuka nga mmwe. Temulina kabi ke mwankola." 
Galatians4:13 Mumanyi nga nze okulwala kye kyanfunyisa omukisa ne mbategeeza mmwe Amawulire Amalungi omulundi ogwasooka. 
Galatians4:14 Era newaakubadde nga nabakaluubirira olw'obulwadde bwange, naye temwannyooma, wadde okunneekanasa, wabula mwannyaniriza nga bwe mwandyanirizza malayika wa Katonda, nga bwe mwandyanirizza Kristo Yesu." 
Galatians4:15 Kale essanyu lyammwe eryo lyadda wa? Nze kennyini nnyinza n'okuboogerako nti singa kyali kiyinzika, mwandiggyeemu amaaso gammwe ne mugampa." 
Galatians4:16 Kaakano nfuuse mulabe wammwe olw'okubategeeza amazima? 
Galatians4:17 Abo abalabika ng'ababalumirwa, ebigendererwa byabwe si birungi. Kye baagala kwe kubaggya ku nze, mudde ku luuyi lwabwe." 
Galatians4:18 Naye kirungi okulumirwa abantu, bwe kiba ng'ekigendererwa kirungi. Ekyo kya mazima bulijjo, sso si lwe mba nammwe lwokka." 
Galatians4:19 Baana bange abaagalwa, ng'omukazi bw'alumwa ng'azaala, nange bwe nnumwa bwe ntyo ku lwammwe, okutuusa Kristo lw'alibumbibwa mu mmwe." 
Galatians4:20 Singa ndi nammwe kaakano, nandimanye kye nsaanye okwogera, kubanga ndi mweraliikirivu nnyo ku lwammwe." 
Galatians4:21 Mumbuulire mmwe abaagala okufugibwa Amateeka. Temuwulira Mateeka kye gagamba? 
Galatians4:22 Kyawandiikibwa nti Aburahamu yalina abaana babiri: omu yamuzaala mu muzaana, omulala mu wa ddembe." 
Galatians4:23 Ow'omuzaana yazaalibwa mu ngeri ya bulijjo. Kyokka ye ow'ow'eddembe yazaalibwa lwa kusuubiza kwa Katonda. 
Galatians4:24 Ebyo biri nga lugero: abakazi abo ababiri z'Endagaano bbiri. Emu yakolerwa ku lusozi Sinaayi, ye azaala abaana ab'omuddu. Endagaano eyo ye Hagari." 
Galatians4:25 Hagari oyo lwe Lusozi Sinaayi, oluli mu Buwarabu; afaanaanyirizibwa ne Yerusaalemu ekiriwo kaakano, kubanga kyo n'abantu baakyo bali mu buddu." 
Galatians4:26 Naye Yerusaalemu eky'omu ggulu kya ddembe, era kyo ye nnyaffe." 
Galatians4:27 Kyawandiikibwa nti: “Sanyuka ggwe omugumba atazaala: leekaana nnyo ggwe atalumwanga kuzaala, kubanga omukazi eyalekebwawo, alina abaana bangi okusinga oyo ali ne bba.”" 
Galatians4:28 Kale mmwe, abooluganda, muli baana abaazaalibwa olw'okusuubiza kwa Katonda, nga Yisaaka bwe yali." 
Galatians4:29 Era okufaanana nga bwe kyali mu kiseera kiri, oyo eyazaalibwa mu ngeri eyaabulijjo, bwe yayigganya eyazaalibwa olwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, ne kaakano bwe kiri." 
Galatians4:30 Naye ekyawandiikibwa kigamba kitya? Kigamba nti: “Goba omuzaana n'omwana we, kubanga omwana w'omuzaana talisikira wamu n'ow'ow'eddembe.”" 
Galatians4:31 Kale, abooluganda, ffe tetuli baana ba muzaana, wabula ba wa ddembe." 
Galatians5:1 Kristo yatufuula ba ddembe. Kale munywere, muleme okusibibwa nate mu kikoligo ky'obuddu." 
Galatians5:2 Laba, nze Pawulo mbagamba nti bwe munaakomolebwa, kitegeeza nti Kristo taliiko ky'abagasa." 
Galatians5:3 Era ntegeeza buli muntu akomolebwa nti ateekwa okutuukiriza ebyo byonna Amateeka bye galagira. 
Galatians5:4 Mmwe abaagala okuba abatuukirivu olw'okutuukiriza ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, mwesaze ku Kristo, era mweggye ku kisa kya Katonda." 
Galatians5:5 Naye ffe tusuubira nti Katonda alitufuula abatuukirivu, era ekyo kye tulindirira olw'amaanyi ga Mwoyo wa Katonda akolera mu kukkiriza kwaffe." 
Galatians5:6 Bwe tuba nga twegasse ne Kristo Yesu, okukomolebwa oba obutakomolebwa, tekiriiko kye kifuula. Ekikulu kwe kukkiriza, okukolera mu kwagala." 
Galatians5:7 Mwali bulungi. Ani eyabaziyiza okugondera amazima? 
Galatians5:8 Okusendasenda okwo, si kwa Katonda abayita." 
Galatians5:9 Ekizimbulukusa ekitono, kizimbulukusa ekitole kyonna." 
Galatians5:10 Naye neesiga Mukama nti mujja kulowooza nga nze, era nti oyo abateganya ne bw'aba ani, alibonerezebwa." 
Galatians5:11 Naye nze, abooluganda, oba nga nkyayigiriza abantu nti okukomolebwa kwetaagibwa, lwaki nkyayigganyizibwa? Singa ddala njigiriza ekyo, olwo omusaalaba guba tegukyali kyesittazo." 
Galatians5:12 Nandyagadde abo ababateganya beeraawe! 
Galatians5:13 Abooluganda, mmwe mwayitibwa kuba ba ddembe. Kyokka muleme kufugibwa kwegomba kwa mubiri, nga mwesiga eddembe eryo, wabula mwagalanenga, era buli omu abeerenga muweereza wa munne." 
Galatians5:14 Amateeka gonna gatuukirizibwa mu kiragiro kimu ekigamba nti: “Yagalanga muntu munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala.” 
Galatians5:15 Naye oba nga mulumagana era mulyaŋŋana, mwekuume, sikulwa nga mwezikiriza." 
Galatians5:16 Naye ŋŋamba nti mugobererenga Mwoyo, lwe mutaatuukirizenga ebyo omubiri bye gwegomba." 
Galatians5:17 Ebyo omubiri bye gwegomba birwanagana n'ebyo Mwoyo by'ayagala. Ate ebyo Mwoyo by'ayagala, birwanagana n'ebyo omubiri bye gwegomba. N'ekivaamu, ne mutasobola kukola ebyo bye mwagala." 
Galatians5:18 Naye bwe munaagobereranga Mwoyo, olwo nga temukyafugibwa Mateeka." 
Galatians5:19 Ebikolwa by'omubiri bimanyiddwa bulungi, bye bino: obwenzi, obukaba, obugwenyufu," 
Galatians5:20 okusinza ebitali Katonda, okuloga, obulabe, okuyomba, obuggya, obusungu, empaka, obutakkaanya, okwesalamu," 
Galatians5:21 ettima, obutamiivu, ebinyumu, n'ebirala ebiri ng'ebyo. Ne kaakano nnyongera okubalabula, nga bwe nabalabula okusooka, nti abo abakola ebifaanana ng'ebyo, tebaliba na mugabo mu Bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Galatians5:22 Naye Mwoyo aleeta kwagala, kusanyuka, mirembe, kugumiikiriza, kisa, bulungi, bwesigwa," 
Galatians5:23 buwombeefu, na kwegendereza. Ebyo tebiriiko tteeka libiwakanya." 
Galatians5:24 Era abo aba Kristo Yesu, baakomerera ku musaalaba omubiri gwabwe n'omululu gwagwo, n'okwegomba kwagwo." 
Galatians5:25 Oba nga Mwoyo ye atuwa obulamu, Mwoyo ye abanga atufuga." 
Galatians5:26 Tulemenga okwenyumiriza, wadde buli omu okusosonkereza munne, n'okumukwatirwa obuggya." 
Galatians6:1 Abooluganda, bwe wabangawo agudde mu kibi, mmwe abafugibwa omwoyo, muyambenga omuntu oyo nga muli bakkakkamu. Mwekuumenga, sikulwa nga nammwe mugwa mu kukemebwa." 
Galatians6:2 Mugumiikirizaganenga, kubanga bwe mukola bwe mutyo, muba mutuukirizza etteeka lya Kristo." 
Galatians6:3 Omuntu bwe yeerowooza ng'aliko bw'ali, sso nga taliiko bw'ali, aba yeerimbalimba." 
Galatians6:4 Kyokka buli omu akeberenga ebikolwa bye, alyoke alabe oba nga mu ye mulimu ekimwenyumirizisa, nga teyeegeraageranya na mulala," 
Galatians6:5 kubanga buli omu alyetikka mugugu gwe. 
Galatians6:6 Oyo ayigirizibwa ekigambo kya Katonda, atoole ku bibye by'alina, aweeko amuyigiriza." 
Galatians6:7 Temulimbibwanga, Katonda tabuzaabuzibwa: omuntu ky'asiga era ky'alikungula." 
Galatians6:8 Asiga mu mubiri gwe, mu mubiri mw'alikungula okufa. Kyokka oyo asiga mu Mwoyo, mu Myoyo mw'alikungula obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Galatians6:9 Kale tuleme okukoowa mu kukolanga obulungi, kubanga bwe tutaddirira, ekiseera kirituuka ne tukungula." 
Galatians6:10 Kale nga bwe tulina ebbanga, tukolerenga abantu bonna ebirungi, naddala abo bwe tuli awamu mu kukkiriza." 
Galatians6:11 Mulabe bwe mbawandiikidde n'omukono gwange mu nnukuta ennene. 
Galatians6:12 Abo abaagala okwenyumiririza mu byokungulu, be baagala okubawaliriza okukomolebwa. Bakikola balyoke baleme kuyigganyizibwa olw'omusaalaba gwa Kristo." 
Galatians6:13 N'abo abakomolebwa, tebagoberera ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, wabula baagala mukomolebwe, bo balyoke beenyumirize olw'okukomolebwa kwammwe." 
Galatians6:14 Nze sigenda kwenyumiriza n'akatono, okuggyako okwenyumiririza mu musaalaba gwa Kristo. Olw'omusaalaba ogwo, ensi ngiraba ng'ekomereddwa, nayo endaba ng'omukomerere." 
Galatians6:15 Oba ng'omuntu akomolebwa oba takomolebwa, ekyo si nsonga, wabula ekyetaagibwa kwe kufuuka ekitonde ekiggya."
