Galatians6:16 Emirembe n'okusaasira bibeerenga ku bantu ba Katonda, abo bonna abagoberera ekiragiro kino." 
Galatians6:17 Okuva kaakano tewabanga muntu n'omu anteganya, kubanga enkovu ze nnina ku mubiri gwange za Yesu," 
Galatians6:18 Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo abakwatirwenga ekisa mmwe, abooluganda. Amiina." 
Ephesians1:1 Nze Pawulo omutume wa Kristo Yesu, nga Katonda bwe yayagala, mpandiikira abantu ba Katonda abali mu Efeso, era abeesigwa mu Kristo Yesu." 
Ephesians1:2 Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama Yesu Kristo babakwatirwe mmwe ekisa, era babawe emirembe." 
Ephesians1:3 Ka twebaze Katonda era Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, eyatuweera mu Kristo buli mukisa oguva mu ggulu, ogugasa omwoyo." 
Ephesians1:4 Katonda, ng'ayita mu Kristo yali yamala dda okutulonda nga n'ensi tennatondebwa, tube batukuvu, era abataliiko kamogo mu maaso ge. Olw'okutwagala," 
Ephesians1:5 yatufuula baana be, ng'ayita mu Yesu Kristo, nga bwe yateesa mu kusiima kwe," 
Ephesians1:6 tulyoke tumutendereze olw'ekirabo kye ekyekitiibwa, kye yatuweera mu Mwana we omwagalwa." 
Ephesians1:7 Olw'okufa kwa Kristo, tununulibwa ne tusonyiyibwa ebibi byaffe olw'ekisa kya Katonda ekingi ennyo" 
Ephesians1:8 kye yatukwatirwa. Katonda mu magezi ge ne mu kutegeera kwe," 
Ephesians1:9 yatumanyisa ekyama eky'okwagala kwe, kye yali yategeka edda okutuukiriza mu Kristo." 
Ephesians1:10 Entegeka ye gy'alituukiriza ng'ekiseera kyayo kituuse, kwe kugatta awamu mu Kristo ebintu byonna, ebiri mu ggulu n'ebiri mu nsi, Kristo abe omutwe gwabyo." 
Ephesians1:11 Mu Kristo mwe twalonderwa ne twawulibwa okuba abantu ba Katonda, kubanga eyo ye yali entegeka ya Katonda akola byonna nga bw'asiima," 
Ephesians1:12 ffe abaasooka okuba n'essuubi mu Kristo, tulyoke tutendereze ekitiibwa kya Katonda." 
Ephesians1:13 Era mu Kristo nammwe mwawulira ebigambo eby'amazima, ge Mawulire Amalungi ag'okulokolebwa kwammwe. Mwakkiriza Kristo, era ekiraga nti muli babe, Katonda yabassaako akabonero, ng'abawa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu gwe yasuubiza." 
Ephesians1:14 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu oyo ye atukakasa nti Katonda bw'alimala okununula abantu be, tulifuna ebyo Katonda bye yatusuubiza, tutendereze ekitiibwa kye." 
Ephesians1:15 N'olwekyo, okuva lwe nawulira nti mukkirizza Mukama Yesu, era nti mwagala abantu ba Katonda bonna," 
Ephesians1:16 sirekangayo kwebaza Katonda ku lwammwe. Mbajjukira 
Ephesians1:17 ne mbasabira, Katonda wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, Kitaffe oweekitiibwa, abawe Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abageziwaze, era abamanyise Katonda, mumutegeere." 
Ephesians1:18 Nsaba, emyoyo gyammwe gyeyongere amagezi, mumanye ebyo Katonda bye yabasuubiza bwe mwayitibwa, era mumanye n'obugagga obungi, abantu be bwe bafuna." 
Ephesians1:19 Era nsaba mumanye amaanyi ge amasukkirivu, agakolera mu ffe. Amaanyi ago," 
Ephesians1:20 geego gennyini agaazuukiza Kristo, ne gamutuuza mu ggulu, ng'aliraanye Katonda ku ludda lwe olwa ddyo," 
Ephesians1:21 n'afuga abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza, n'ab'amaanyi, era n'abakungu bonna, si mu bulamu buno bwokka, naye ne mu obwo obugenda okujja." 
Ephesians1:22 Katonda yassa ebintu byonna mu buyinza bwa Kristo, n'amufuula omukulembeze ow'oku ntikko ow'ekibiina ky'abamukkiriza." 
Ephesians1:23 Ekibiina ekyo gwe mubiri gwa Kristo ogumufuula atuukiridde, ye yennyini atuukiriza byonna wonna." 
Ephesians2:1 Nammwe mwali mufiiridde mu bujeemu ne mu bibi byammwe. 
Ephesians2:2 Mwagobereranga empisa embi ez'ensi, nga mufugibwa omwoyo gw'omukulu w'obuyinza obw'omu bbanga, ogwo kati ogufuga abo abajeemera Katonda." 
Ephesians2:3 Naffe ffenna twali bajeemu nga bo, nga tutwalibwa okwegomba kwaffe okubi okw'omubiri, era nga tukola ebyo omubiri n'amagezi gaffe bye byagala. Okufaanana ng'abantu abalala bonna, naffe twali tuteekwa buteekwa okubonerezebwa Katonda." 
Ephesians2:4 Kyokka Katonda ow'ekisa ekingi era atwagala ennyo," 
Ephesians2:5 bwe twali nga tufiiridde mu bujeemu bwaffe, yatuzuukiza wamu ne Kristo. Mwalokolebwa lwa kisa kya Katonda." 
Ephesians2:6 Nga tuli mu Kristo Yesu, Katonda yatuzuukiza wamu naye, era n'atutuuza wamu ne Kristo oyo mu ggulu." 
Ephesians2:7 Yakola ekyo alyoke alage mu mirembe egigenda okujja, obulungi bwe n'ekisa kye ekingi ennyo, kye yatukwatirwa mu Kristo Yesu," 
Ephesians2:8 kubanga bwe mwakkiriza, mwalokolebwa lwa kisa kya Katonda. Okulokolebwa kwammwe tekwava ku mmwe, wabula kyali kirabo kya Katonda." 
Ephesians2:9 Tekwava mu bikolwa byammwe ebirungi, waleme kubaawo yeenyumiriza." 
Ephesians2:10 Katonda ye yatutonda ne tuba nga bwe tuli, twatonderwa mu Kristo Yesu, tukolenga ebikolwa ebirungi, Katonda bye yatuteekerateekera okukolanga." 
Ephesians2:11 Mmwe abaazaalibwa nga muli ba mawanga malala, Abayudaaya be bayita abatali bakomole (kubanga bo beeyita bakomole, abakomolebwa abantu) mujjukire bwe mwali mu biseera ebyayita." 
Ephesians2:12 Olwo temwalina Kristo. Mwali Bannamawanga, nga temubalirwa mu ggwanga lya Yisirayeli. Era temwalina mugabo mu ndagaano ezirimu ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza. Mwali mu nsi nga temulina ssuubi, era nga temulina Katonda." 
Ephesians2:13 Naye kaakano, olw'okwegatta awamu ne Kristo Yesu, mmwe edda abaali batwesudde ewala, mwaleetebwa kumpi olw'okufa kwa Kristo." 
Ephesians2:14 Kristo ye yatuleetera emirembe ne tuba omuntu omu, bwe yawaayo omubiri gwe, n'amenyawo ekisenge eky'obulabe ekyatwawulanga." 
Ephesians2:15 Yadibya etteeka ly'Abayudaaya ne byonna bye lyalagiranga, alyoke afuule Abayudaaya n'ab'amawanga amalala eggwanga limu eriggya, eryegattidde mu ye yennyini, bw'atyo n'aleeta emirembe." 
Ephesians2:16 Yafiira ku musaalaba alyoke amalewo obulabe, era atukomyewo ffenna eri Katonda, nga tuli omuntu omu." 
Ephesians2:17 Mmwe abaali ewala, Kristo yajja n'abategeeza Amawulire Amalungi ag'emirembe, n'agategeeza n'abo abaali okumpi." 
Ephesians2:18 Ffenna tuyita mu ye, nga tuli mu Mwoyo omu, ne tusobola okutuuka mu maaso ga Kitaffe." 
Ephesians2:19 N'olwekyo temukyali Bannamawanga oba abagwira, wabula muli ba kika kimu n'abantu ba Katonda, era muli ba mu nnyumba ya Katonda." 
Ephesians2:20 Mwazimbibwa ku musingi, be batume n'abalanzi, nga Kristo lye jjinja ekkulu ery'entabiro." 
Ephesians2:21 Mu ye ekizimbe kyonna mwe kinywerera, ne kikula, ne kiba essinzizo ettukuvu erya Mukama." 
Ephesians2:22 Era mu ye, mmwe naffe Mwoyo atuzimba, ne tuba ekisulo kya Katonda." 
Ephesians3:1 Olw'ensonga eyo, nze Pawulo omusibe wa Yesu Kristo ku lwammwe ab'amawanga amalala, mbasabira eri Katonda." 
Ephesians3:2 Ndowooza mwawulira nga Katonda yankwasa omulimu ogw'okubategeeza mmwe ebifa ku kisa kye," 
Ephesians3:3 era nga yandaga ekyama kye, nga bwe nawandiika mu bimpimpi." 
Ephesians3:4 Bwe munaasoma bye nawandiika, munaamanya nga bwe ntegeera ekyama kya Kristo." 
Ephesians3:5 Mu mirembe egy'edda, abantu tebaategeezebwa kyama kino, naye kaakano Katonda akibikkulidde abatume be abatukuvu n'abalanzi, ng'ayita mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Ephesians3:6 Ekyama kye kino nti olw'Amawulire Amalungi, Abayudaaya n'ab'amawanga amalala balina ebisaanyizo bye bimu. Bonna bye bitundu eby'omubiri ogumu, era bagabanira wamu ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza ng'ayita mu Kristo Yesu." 
Ephesians3:7 Katonda olw'ekisa kye, yampa ekirabo, amaanyi ge ne gakola mu nze, n'anfuula omuweereza w'Amawulire Amalungi." 
Ephesians3:8 Nze asembayo mu bantu ba Katonda bonna, Katonda yampa omukisa guno okutegeeza ab'amawanga amalala Amawulire Amalungi ag'obugagga bwa Kristo obutaggwaawo." 
Ephesians3:9 Era yampa omukisa okumanyisa abantu bonna ebifa ku kyama kino, Katonda eyatonda byonna kye yali akisizza okuva edda n'edda lyonna." 
Ephesians3:10 Kaakano ng'ayita mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, ayagala amanyise abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza abali mu ggulu, amagezi ge agatakoma." 
Ephesians3:11 Ekyo yakiteekateeka okuva edda n'edda lyonna, n'akituukiririza mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
Ephesians3:12 Olw'okwegatta awamu ne Kristo oyo, era n'olw'okumukkiriza, tuguma ne tusembera eri Katonda nga tetutya." 
Ephesians3:13 Kyenva mbeegayirira, muleme kuterebuka olw'okulaba nga mbonaabona ku lwammwe, kubanga okubonaabona kwange okwo, mmwe kubaweesa kitiibwa." 
Ephesians3:14 Kyenva nfukaamirira Katonda Kitaffe," 
Ephesians3:15 ebika byonna eby'omu ggulu n'eby'oku nsi mwe bisibuka," 
Ephesians3:16 ne mmusaba ye oweekitiibwa ekingi, abajjuze mmwe amaanyi aga Mwoyo we," 
Ephesians3:17 Kristo alyoke abeere mu mitima gyammwe, olw'okukkiriza kwe mulina. Mubeerere ddala mu kwagala, era mukunywereremu," 
Ephesians3:18 mmwe awamu n'abantu ba Katonda bonna, musobole okutegeerera ddala obugazi, n'obuwanvu, n'obugulumivu, n'okukka wansi eby'okwagala kwa Kristo." 
Ephesians3:19 Nsaba mumanye okwagala kwa Kristo okusukkiridde okutegeera kwonna, mulyoke mujjulire ddala Katonda." 
Ephesians3:20 Katonda oyo ayinza okukola ebisingira ddala ebyo bye tusaba oba bye tulowooza, olw'amaanyi ge agakolera mu ffe," 
Ephesians3:21 aweebwe ekitiibwa mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, ne mu Kristo Yesu, kaakano ne mu mirembe egitaggwaawo. Amiina." 
Ephesians4:1 Nze eyasibibwa olwa Mukama, kyenva mbeegayirira mmwe, mube n'empisa ezisaanira obulamu bwe mwayitirwa." 
Ephesians4:2 Mube bakkakkamu, bawombeefu era bagumiikiriza. Mulage okwagalana kwammwe, nga buli omu agumiikiriza munne." 
Ephesians4:3 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu yabafuula omu. Mufube okunywerera mu mirembe egibagatta awamu. 
Ephesians4:4 Omubiri guli gumu, ne Mwoyo omu, ng'ekyo kye mwayitirwa era kye musuubira bwe kiri ekimu." 
Ephesians4:5 Mukama ali omu, n'okukkiriza kumu, n'okubatizibwa kumu," 
Ephesians4:6 Katonda omu, Kitaawe wa bonna, afuga byonna, akolera mu byonna, era abeera mu byonna." 
Ephesians4:7 Kyokka buli omu mu ffe yaweebwa ekirabo ekyenjawulo, nga Kristo bwe yamugerera." 
Ephesians4:8 Ekyawandiikibwa kyekiva kigamba nti: “Bwe yalinnya mu ggulu, yatwala abasibe, n'awa abantu ebirabo.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Okugamba nti yalinnya, kitegeeza ki? Kitegeeza nti yasooka kukka mu bitundu ebya wansi w'ensi." 
Ephesians4:10 Oyo eyakka, ye wuuyo eyalinnya ewala ennyo, n'ayisa eggulu lyonna, alyoke ajjuze byonna." 
Ephesians4:11 Era ye omu oyo eyawa abamu okuba abatume, abalala okuba abalanzi, abalala okutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi, abalala okuba abasumba b'emyoyo, n'abalala okuba abayigiriza." 
Ephesians4:12 Ekyo yakikola olw'okutendeka abantu ba Katonda mu mulimu gw'okuweereza, era n'okuzimba omubiri gwa Kristo," 
Ephesians4:13 okutuusa ffenna lwe tulibeera n'okukkiriza okumu, n'okumanya Omwana wa Katonda, tube bakulu mu by'omwoyo, abatuukiridde mu bulamu bwa Kristo." 
Ephesians4:14 Olwo nga tetukyali baana bato, abazzibwa eno n'eri, abatwalibwa mu muyaga gw'enjigiriza y'abantu abakuusa, abakyamya abalala olw'enkwe ze basala." 
Ephesians4:15 Naye tube ba mazima era abaagalana, tulyoke tukule mu byonna okutuuka ku kwegattira ddala ne Kristo, omutwe gwaffe." 
Ephesians4:16 Kristo oyo ye aleetera omubiri gwonna okwegatta awamu, ennyingo ezigulimu zonna ne zinywezebwa, buli kitundu ne kikola omulimu gwakyo. Olwo omubiri ne gukula, ne guzimbibwa mu kwagalana." 
Ephesians4:17 Kale kye ŋŋamba, era kye ntegeeza mu linnya lya Mukama kye kino, nti mulekere awo okuyisa ng'abantu ab'ensi bwe bayisa, nga bagoberera ebirowoozo byabwe ebitaliimu." 
Ephesians4:18 Amagezi gaabwe gajjudde ekizikiza. Tebalina mugabo mu by'obulamu bwa Katonda, kubanga bajjudde obutamanya, era emitima gyabwe mikakanyavu." 
Ephesians4:19 Tebakyalina nsonyi. Beemalidde mu bya buwemu, era balina omululu ogw'okukola eby'obugwenyufu ebya buli ngeri." 
Ephesians4:20 Kyokka mmwe, Kristo temwamuyiga bwe mutyo." 
Ephesians4:21 Ddala mwawulirako, era mmwe ng'ababe, mwayigirizibwa amazima agali mu Yesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Kale muleme kuba bantu ab'embeera ey'edda gye mwalimu, eyayonooneka olw'okwegomba okw'obulimba." 
Ephesians4:23 Mufuuke baggya mu mwoyo ne mu birowoozo byammwe. 
Ephesians4:24 Mube bantu baggya, abaatondebwa mu kifaananyi kya Katonda mu bwesimbu ne mu butukuvu obw'amazima." 
Ephesians4:25 N'olwekyo, muleke obulimba. Buli muntu ategeezenga munne amazima, kubanga tuli bitundu bya mubiri gumu." 
Ephesians4:26 Bwe wabaawo ekibasunguwaza, mwekuume kireme kubakozesa kibi. Temuzibyanga budde nga mukyasibye obusungu," 
Ephesians4:27 era temwereeterezanga Sitaani. 
Ephesians4:28 Abadde abba, alekere awo okubba, wabula anyiikire okukola emirimu, ng'akozesa emikono gye, alyoke abe ne ky'awa abo abeetaaga." 
Ephesians4:29 Akamwa kammwe kalemenga okwogera ekigambo ekibi ekitasaana, wabula koogerenga ebyo byokka ebirungi ebizimba era ebisaana, biryoke bigase abo ababiwulira." 
Ephesians4:30 Era temunakuwazanga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu wa Katonda, kubanga Mwoyo ke kabonero kwe mulimanyirwa ku lunaku olw'okununulibwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Okunyiiga, okusunguwala, okukaayana, okuvuma, na buli bubi bwonna, bibavengamu." 
Ephesians4:32 Mubenga ba kisa, buli omu alumirwenga munne, era musonyiwaganenga, nga Katonda bwe yabasonyiwa mmwe mu Kristo." 
Ephesians5:1 Kale nga bwe muli abaana ba Katonda, mugezengako okumufaanana," 
Ephesians5:2 era mwagalanenga, nga Kristo bwe yatwagala, ne yeewaayo eri Katonda ku lwaffe, okuba ekirabo era ekitambiro ekiwunya obulungi." 
Ephesians5:3 Muli bantu ba Katonda, n'olwekyo obwenzi n'obugwagwa bwonna, n'okwegomba okubi tebisaana na kwogerebwa mu mmwe." 
Ephesians5:4 Era temusaanira kwogera bya nsonyi, wadde eby'obusiru oba okubalaata, wabula mwebazenga Katonda." 
Ephesians5:5 Mumanyire ddala kino nti omwenzi, wadde akola eby'ensonyi oba alulunkanira eby'ensi, n'abifuula Katonda we, talina mugabo mu Bwakabaka bwa Kristo ne Katonda." 
Ephesians5:6 Walemenga kubaawo ababuzaabuza n'ebigambo ebitaliimu, kubanga olw'ebikolwa ebyo, obusungu bwa Katonda bukola ku bantu abajeemu" 
Ephesians5:7 N'olwekyo temwegattanga nabo. 
Ephesians5:8 Edda mwali ba kizikiza, naye kaakano nga bwe muli aba Mukama, muli ba kitangaala. Kale mutambulenga ng'abantu ab'ekitangaala," 
Ephesians5:9 kubanga mu kitangaala mwe muva obulungi bwonna obutuufu n'amazima. 
Ephesians5:10 Mufubenga okumanya ekisanyusa Mukama. 
Ephesians5:11 Temwegattanga n'abo abakolera mu kizikiza ebyo ebitalina mugaso, wabula mubyatuukirizenga bwatuukiriza," 
Ephesians5:12 kubanga kya nsonyi n'okubyogerako ebyo bye bakola mu kyama. 
Ephesians5:13 Byonna bwe bimala okwatuukirizibwa mu kitangaala, birabikira ddala nga bwe biri," 
Ephesians5:14 kubanga ekyo ekiragibwa, kirabibwa. Kyebava bagamba nti: “Zuukuka ggwe eyeebase, ozuukire, Kristo akwakire.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Kale mubenga beegendereza mu bulamu bwammwe, muleme kuba ng'abatalina magezi, wabula mube ba magezi." 
Ephesians5:16 Muleme kwonoona biseera, kubanga ennaku zino mbi." 
Ephesians5:17 N'olwekyo temuba balagajjavu, wabula mutegeere Mukama ky'ayagala." 
Ephesians5:18 Era muleme kutamiira mwenge, kubanga mujja kweyonoona, wabula mujjuzibwe Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Ephesians5:19 Munyumizaganyenga mu Zabbuli, ne mu nnyimba, ne mu biyiiye Mwoyo by'abasobozesa okuyiiya. Muyimbire Mukama, nga musaakaanya amaloboozi n'omutima gwammwe gwonna." 
Ephesians5:20 Bulijjo mwebazenga Katonda Kitaffe olwa byonna, nga muyita mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Ephesians5:21 Muwuliraganenga olw'okussaamu Kristo ekitiibwa. 
Ephesians5:22 Abakazi muwulirenga babbammwe, nga bwe muwulira Mukama," 
Ephesians5:23 kubanga omusajja gwe mutwe gw'omukazi, nga Kristo bw'ali omutwe gw'ekibiina ky'abamukkiriza, gwe mubiri gwe, era ye yennyini ye mulokozi waagwo." 
Ephesians5:24 Nga ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo bwe kiwulira Kristo, n'abakazi bwe batyo bwe basaana okuwulira babbaabwe mu byonna." 
Ephesians5:25 Mmwe abasajja mwagalenga bakazi bammwe, nga Kristo bwe yayagala ekibiina ky'abamukkiriza, ne yeewaayo ku lwakyo," 
Ephesians5:26 akitukuze, ng'akinaaza n'amazzi n'ekigambo," 
Ephesians5:27 alyoke yeefunire ekibiina ky'abamukkiriza ekyekitiibwa, nga tekiriiko bbala na kamogo, wadde ekintu ekirala ekiri ng'ebyo." 
Ephesians5:28 N'abasajja bwe batyo bwe basaana okwagala bakazi baabwe, nga bwe baagala emibiri gyabwe gyennyini." 
Ephesians5:29 Tewali n'omu yali akyaye omubiri gwe, wabula aguliisa, agujjanjaba, nga Kristo bw'ajjanjaba ekibiina ky'abamukkiriza," 
Ephesians5:30 kubanga tuli bitundu bya mubiri gwe. 
Ephesians5:31 N'ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Omusajja kyanaavanga aleka kitaawe ne nnyina, n'anywerera ku mukazi we, bombi ne baba omuntu omu.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Ekyama kino kikulu, era nze ŋŋamba nti kyogera ku Kristo n'ekibiina ky'abamukkiriza." 
Ephesians5:33 Naye era nammwe, buli musajja ayagalenga mukazi we, nga bwe yeeyagala yennyini, era n'omukazi assengamu bba ekitiibwa." 
Ephesians6:1 Abaana, bazadde bammwe mubawulirenga mu Mukama, kubanga ekyo kye kituufu." 
Ephesians6:2 “Kitaawo ne nnyoko obassangamu ekitiibwa,” kye kiragiro ekisooka, ekirimu okusuubiza nti:" 
Ephesians6:3 “lw'onoobanga obulungi, era n'owangaala ku nsi.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Mmwe abazadde b'abaana muleme kunyiizanga baana bammwe, wabula mubakuze nga mubagunjula, era nga mubayigiriza ebya Mukama." 
Ephesians6:5 Abaddu, bakama bammwe ab'oku nsi mubassengamu nnyo ekitiibwa, era mubawulirenga nga temuliimu bukuusa, nga bwe muwulira Kristo." 
Ephesians6:6 Ekyo temukikola lwa kulabibwa, abantu balyoke babasiime, wabula ekyo Katonda ky'ayagala, mukikolenga n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, ng'abaddu ba Kristo." 
Ephesians6:7 Muweerezenga n'omutima omulungi ng'abakolera Mukama, sso si ng'abakolera abantu." 
Ephesians6:8 Mumanye nti buli muntu, oba muddu, oba wa ddembe, buli kirungi ky'akola, Mukama ky'alimusasula." 
Ephesians6:9 Nammwe bakama b'abaddu muyisenga bwe mutyo abaddu bammwe mu mwoyo gwe gumu,nga temubatiisa. Mumanyi nti Mukama waabwe, era owammwe ali mu ggulu, era ye tasosola mu bantu." 
Ephesians6:10 Eky'enkomerero, mube bagumu mu Mukama waffe, munywezebwe obuyinza bw'amaanyi ge." 
Ephesians6:11 Mukozesenga ebyokulwanyisa byonna ebya Katonda, mulyoke musobole okuziyiza enkwe za Sitaani." 
Ephesians6:12 Tetulwanyisa bantu buntu, wabula tulwanyisa amagye g'emyoyo emibi egy'omu bbanga, egy'abakungu, egy'ab'obuyinza, n'egy'abafuzi ab'omu nsi eno ey'ekizikiza." 
Ephesians6:13 N'olwekyo mukwatenga ebyokulwanyisa byonna ebya Katonda, musobole okuguma ku lunaku olw'akabi, era bwe mulimala okukola byonna, mulyoke musigale nga muli bagumu." 
Ephesians6:14 Kale muyimirire nga mwenywezezza, ng'amazima lwe lukoba lwe mwesibye mu kiwato kyammwe, ate ng'okukola ebituufu, kye kyambalo kyammwe eky'ekyuma eky'omu kifuba." 
Ephesians6:15 Okwetegeka kwammwe kubabeerere ng'engatto mu bigere byammwe, nga mugenda okulangirira Amawulire Amalungi, agaleeta emirembe." 
Ephesians6:16 Okusinga byonna, okukkiriza kubabeerere engabo eneebasobozesanga okuziyiza obusaale bwonna obw'omuliro, obulasibwa Omubi." 
Ephesians6:17 Era mwetikkire obulokozi nga ye nkuufiira yammwe eŋŋumu, mukwate n'ekitala eky'omwoyo, kye kigambo kya Katonda." 
Ephesians6:18 Bulijjo musabenga Katonda, nga mumwegayirira abayambe. Mumusabenga nga Mwoyo bw'anaabaluŋŋamyanga. Ekyo mukikolenga nga temuterebuka, musabirenga abantu ba Katonda bonna." 
Ephesians6:19 Nange munsabire, bwe nnaabanga njogera, mpeebwe eby'okwogera, era mbyogere n'obuvumu, nga mmanyisa abantu ekyama ky'Amawulire Amalungi." 
Ephesians6:20 Ndi mubaka w'Amawulire ago Amalungi newaakubadde nga ndi mu kkomera. Munsabire mbe n'obuvumu mu kugamanyisa abantu nga bwe kinsaanira. 
Ephesians6:21 Tukiko, owooluganda omwagalwa era omuweereza omwesigwa owa Mukama, alibategeeza byonna, mulyoke mumanye ebinfaako ne bye nkola." 
Ephesians6:22 Mmutumye gye muli, mulyoke mumanye bwe tuli, era abagumye emitima." 
Ephesians6:23 Emirembe n'okwagala, awamu n'okukkiriza, ebiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama Yesu Kristo, bibeerenga n'abooluganda bonna." 
Ephesians6:24 Katonda akwatirwenga ekisa abo bonna abaagala Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, emirembe n'emirembe." 
Philippians1:1 Nze Pawulo ne Timoteewo abaweereza ba Kristo Yesu, tuwandiikira mmwe abantu ba Katonda abali e Filippi, abassa ekimu ne Kristo Yesu. Era tuwandiikira n'abalabirizi awamu n'abaweereza." 
Philippians1:2 Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama Yesu Kristo babakwatirwe mmwe ekisa era babawe emirembe. 
Philippians1:3 Neebaza Katonda wange buli lwe mbajjukira," 
Philippians1:4 era buli lwe mbasabira mwenna eri Katonda, nsaba nga ndi musanyufu," 
Philippians1:5 kubanga okuviira ddala ku lunaku olwasooka n'okutuusa kaakano, mwetaba wamu nange mu kubunyisa Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philippians1:6 Nkakasiza ddala nti Katonda eyatandika omulimu omulungi mu mmwe, alyongera okugukola, okutuusa lwe gulimalirizibwa ku lunaku Kristo Yesu lw'aliddirako." 
Philippians1:7 Kino kituufu nze okubalowoozaako bwe ntyo mwenna, kubanga temunva ku mutima, olw'okubanga mwenna mugabana wamu nange ekisa Katonda kye yankwatirwa mu kusibibwa kwange, ne mu kulwanirira n'okunyweza Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philippians1:8 Katonda amanyi nga njogera mazima bwe ŋŋamba nti mwenna mbaagala n'okwagala okuva eri Kristo Yesu. 
Philippians1:9 Kye mbasabira eri Katonda kye kino, okwagala kwammwe kweyongerenga, kujjule amagezi n'okutegeera," 
Philippians1:10 mulyoke musobole okulondawo ekisinga obulungi, olunaku Kristo lw'aliddirako bwe lulituuka, lubasange nga muli balongoofu, abataliiko kamogo," 
Philippians1:11 nga mujjudde ebikolwa ebirungi, Yesu Kristo yekka by'ayinza okubakozesa olw'okuweesa Katonda ekitiibwa n'okumutendereza." 
Philippians1:12 Abooluganda, njagala mumanye nti ebyo ebyantuukako, byongera bwongezi kubunyisa Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philippians1:13 N'ekivuddemu, abaserikale abakuumi b'omu lubiri bonna era n'abalala bonna, bategedde nti ndi mu kkomera lwa kubanga ndi mugoberezi wa Kristo." 
Philippians1:14 Era olw'okusibibwa kwange, abooluganda abasinga obungi beeyongedde okwesiga Mukama, n'okuba n'obuvumu okwogera ekigambo kya Katonda nga tebatya." 
Philippians1:15 Weewaawo abamu bamanyisa Kristo mu bantu lwa buggya na kuvuganya, naye abalala bakikola mu mwoyo mulungi." 
Philippians1:16 Bano bakikola lwa kwagala, kubanga bamanyi nga nateekebwawo lwa kulwanirira Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philippians1:17 Naye bali, Kristo bamumanyisa mu bantu lwa kuvuganya, sso si mu mwoyo mulungi. Balowooza nti banaayongera okunnakuwaza mu busibe bwe ndimu." 
Philippians1:18 Naye nze nfaayo ki? Kristo kasita amanyisibwa mu bantu mu ngeri zonna, oba za bukuusa, oba za mazima, nze nsanyuka busanyusi. Era nja kweyongera okusanyuka," 
Philippians1:19 kubanga mmanyi nti mmwe olw'okunsabira, n'olw'obuyambi bwa Mwoyo wa Yesu Kristo, nditeebwa." 
Philippians1:20 Neesiga era nsuubirira ddala nti sijja kuswala, wabula ne kaakano nja kuguma nga bulijjo, nkole kyonna kye nsobola okugulumiza Kristo, oba mba mulamu, oba nfa." 
Philippians1:21 Nze mba mulamu lwa Kristo, era bwe nfa, mba ngobolodde." 
Philippians1:22 Naye oba nga bwe nsigala nga ndi mulamu mu mubiri lwe nkola ekisinga okugasa, olwo mba simanyi kye nsaana kulondawo." 
Philippians1:23 Nkwatiddwa eruuyi n'eruuyi. Neegomba okuva mu bulamu buno, ŋŋende mbeere ne Kristo, kubanga ekyo kye kisingira ddala obulungi." 
Philippians1:24 Naye okusigala nga nkyali mulamu mu mubiri, kye kisinga okwetaagibwa ku lwammwe." 
Philippians1:25 Ekyo nkikakasa, era mmanyi nti nja kuba nga nkyaliwo, nga ndi nammwe mwenna, mulyoke mweyongere okusanyuka n'okukula mu kukkiriza." 
Philippians1:26 Bwe ndikomawo gye muli, mulyeyongera okwenyumiririza mu Kristo ku lwange." 
Philippians1:27 Naye kyokka obulamu bwammwe bube nga bwe kisaanira Amawulire Amalungi aga Kristo. Ne bwe ndiba nzize oba nga sizze kubalaba, njagala mpulire nti munywedde, mwegasse mu mwoyo gumu, nga mulwanirira okukkiriza okw'Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philippians1:28 Temutya balabe bammwe. Mubeere bazira bulijjo, balyoke bamanye nti bo Katonda ajja kubazikiriza, kyokka mmwe abawonye," 
Philippians1:29 kubanga mwaweebwa omukisa, si kukkiriza Kristo kwokka, wabula n'okubonaabona ku lulwe." 
Philippians1:30 Nammwe muli ku lutalo lwe lumu, lwe mwalaba, era lwe muwulira nti nkyalwana." 
Philippians2:1 Okuba aba Kristo kibawa amaanyi? Okwagala kwe kubasanyusa? Mussa kimu ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu? Mukwatirwagana ekisa, era musaasiragana?" 
Philippians2:2 Kale munzijuze essanyu nga mussa kimu, nga mwagalana, nga mulina omwoyo gumu, era nga mukkiriziganya." 
Philippians2:3 Temukolanga kintu na kimu mu kwepanka, wadde mu kwefaako mwekka, wabula mukolenga byonna mu bwetoowaze, nga temulowooza nti mmwe musinga abalala." 
Philippians2:4 Temufanga ku byammwe byokka, naye mufenga ne ku by'abalala." 
Philippians2:5 Mubenga n'endowooza nga Kristo gye yalina: 
Philippians2:6 Yalina obulamu obw'Obwakatonda, kyokka teyalemera ku kwenkanankana ne Katonda," 
Philippians2:7 wabula yeggyako ekitiibwa, n'afuuka omuweereza. Yeefuula omuntu nga ffe." 
Philippians2:8 Era bwe yessa ku mutindo gw'abantu, ne yeetoowaza, n'aba muwulize n'atuukira ddala ku kufa, ate okufa okw'oku musaalaba." 
Philippians2:9 Katonda kyeyava amugulumiza ennyo, n'amuwa erinnya erisinga amannya gonna," 
Philippians2:10 bonna abali mu ggulu, n'abali ku nsi, era n'abali wansi w'ensi balyoke bafukaamirirenga erinnya lya Yesu," 
Philippians2:11 era bonna baatulenga nti Yesu Kristo ye Mukama, Katonda Kitaffe alyoke aweebwe ekitiibwa." 
Philippians2:12 Kale abaagalwa, nga bwe mwali abawulize bulijjo nga ndi nammwe, kaakano nga bwe siri nammwe, mube bawulize nnyo n'okusinga bwe mwali. Mmwe mwennyini mukolererenga okulokolebwa kwammwe, nga mutya era nga mukankana," 
Philippians2:13 kubanga Katonda ye akolera mu mmwe okubaagazisa n'okubasobozesa okukola by'ayagala. 
Philippians2:14 Byonna mubikolenga awatali kwemulugunya wadde empaka," 
Philippians2:15 mulyoke mube nga temulina musango, wadde kye munenyezebwa, mube baana ba Katonda abatalina bbala, nga muli mu nsi ejjudde abantu ababi era aboonoonefu. Muteekwa okulabika mu bo nga muli ng'emmunyeenye ezimulisa eggulu," 
Philippians2:16 nga mubatuusaako ekigambo ky'obulamu. Bwe munaakolanga bwe mutyo, ndiba n'eky'okwenyumiriza ku lunaku Kristo lw'aliddirako, kubanga ekyo kiriraga nti okufuba n'okukola kwange tebyafiira bwereere." 
Philippians2:17 Singa omusaayi gwange guyiibwa ne gutabulwa n'ekitambiro kye muwa Katonda, kwe kukkiriza kwammwe, nsanyuka ne neesiima wamu nammwe mwenna." 
Philippians2:18 Era nammwe muteekwa okusanyuka bwe mutyo, n'okwesiima awamu nange." 
Philippians2:19 Mukama Yesu Kristo bw'alyagala, nsuubira okubatumira mangu Timoteewo, ndyoke ŋŋume omwoyo olw'okutegeera ebibafaako." 
Philippians2:20 Sirina mulala asobola kubalumirwa nnyo nga ye. 
Philippians2:21 Abalala bonna bafa ku byabwe byokka, tebafa ku bya Yesu Kristo." 
Philippians2:22 Kyokka Timoteewo mumumanyi nti asaana. Mumanyi bw'aweereza awamu nange, ng'ali ng'omwana akola ne kitaawe, nga tukola omulimu gw'okubunyisa Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philippians2:23 Kale oyo gwe nsuubira okutuma gye muli, amangu ddala nga naakamanya nga bwe nnaabeera." 
Philippians2:24 Era nkakasa nti Mukama bw'alisiima, nange nzennyini sirimala bbanga ddene nga sinnajja gye muli." 
Philippians2:25 Era ndabye nga kisaanye okubatumira owooluganda Epafuradito gwe mwantumira okunnyamba mu byetaago byange, era gwe nkola naye, nga tulwanira wamu." 
Philippians2:26 Ayagala nnyo okubalabako mwenna, kyokka yanyolwa nnyo bwe yamanya nti mwawulira bwe yalwala." 
Philippians2:27 Ddala yalwala, era yali kumpi okufa. Kyokka Katonda yamusaasira, era teyasaasira ye yekka, wabula nange yansaasira, obulumi bwange ne buteeyongerako." 
Philippians2:28 Kyenva njagala ennyo okumutuma gye muli, mulyoke musanyuke okuddamu okumulabako, nange ndyoke nkendeeze ku kunakuwala kwange." 
Philippians2:29 Kale mumwanirize n'essanyu lingi ng'owooluganda mu Mukama waffe. Abafaanana ng'oyo mubassengamu ekitiibwa," 
Philippians2:30 kubanga yabulako katono okufa, ng'ali ku mulimu gwa Kristo, bwe yawaayo obulamu bwe, alyoke annyambe ku lwammwe." 
Philippians3:1 Kale kaakano baganda bange, musanyukirenga mu Mukama. Okuddamu ebyo bye nabawandiikira edda tekunkooya, ate mmwe kwongera kubanyweza." 
Philippians3:2 Mwekuumenga ab'empisa embi, era abakomola omubiri obubiri, be mpita embwa." 
Philippians3:3 Ffe bakomolebwa abutuufu, kubanga tusinza Katonda nga Mwoyo we bw'atulaga, era twenyumiririza mu Yesu Kristo. Tetwesiga bikolebwa bukolebwa ku mubiri." 
Philippians3:4 Ne bwe kwandibadde okwesiga ebikolebwa obukolebwa ku mubiri, nze mbasinga abo." 
Philippians3:5 Nze nakomolebwa ku lunaku olw'omunaana okuva ku kuzaalibwa kwange. Eggwanga lyange, ndi Muyisirayeli, ow'omu Kika kya Benyamiini. Ndi Mwebureeyi wawu, omwana w'Abeebureeyi. Nali mu kibiina ekisinga okukwata amateeka g'Ekiyudaaya, kye ky'Abafarisaayo." 
Philippians3:6 Mu kunyiikira, nayigganya ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, era mu kukwata amateeka g'Ekiyudaaya, saaliko kye nnenyezebwamu." 
Philippians3:7 Naye ebyo byonna ebyali eby'omugaso gye ndi, nabiraba ng'okufiirwa olwa Kristo." 
Philippians3:8 Ddala ebintu byonna nabiraba ng'okufiirwa, kubanga okutegeera Kristo Mukama wange, kisinga ebirala byonna. Olwa Kristo nafiirwa ebintu byonna, era mbiraba ng'ebisasiro olw'okufuna Kristo ng'empeera yange," 
Philippians3:9 ndyoke mbeere mu ye, nga sirina butuukirivu bwange ku bwange, obuva mu kukwata amateeka g'Ekiyudaaya, wabula nga nnina obwo obuva mu kukkiriza Kristo, era obuva eri Katonda, obwesigamye ku kukkiriza." 
Philippians3:10 Kye njagala kwe kutegeera Kristo era n'okutegeera amaanyi agava mu kuzuukira kwe. Njagala okugabana ku kubonaabona kwe, era n'okumufaanana mu kufa kwe," 
Philippians3:11 nga nsuubira nti nange ndizuukira. 
Philippians3:12 Sigamba nti ekyo mmaze okukifuna, oba nti mmaze okutuukirira, wabula ŋŋenda mu maaso, nga ngezaako okufuna ekyo Kristo Yesu kye yagenderera mu kunfuula owuwe." 
Philippians3:13 Abooluganda, mmanyi nti sinnakifuna, naye kye nkola, kwe kwerabira eby'emabega, ne nduubirira ebiri mu maaso." 
Philippians3:14 Ŋŋenda mu maaso, ntuuke ku kiruubirirwa, awali ekirabo eky'obulamu obw'omu ggulu, Katonda kye yampitira mu Kristo Yesu." 
Philippians3:15 Kale ffe abakuze mu kukkiriza, ekyo kye tuba tulowoozanga. Naye oba kye mulowooza kirala, na kino Katonda alikibalaga." 
Philippians3:16 Naye tunywerere ku ekyo kye tutuuseeko. 
Philippians3:17 Abooluganda, mungobererenga mwenna, era mugobererenga abo abalina empisa ng'ezaffe." 
Philippians3:18 Ekyo nkibabuulidde emirundi mingi, era kaakano nkiddamu nga nkaaba n'amaziga, nti waliwo bangi, mu mbeera z'obulamu bwabwe, abafuuse abalabe b'omusaalaba gwa Kristo." 
Philippians3:19 Enkomerero yaabwe, kuliba kuzikirira. Olubuto ye Katonda waabwe, ebyandibakwasizza ensonyi bye beenyumiririzaamu, n'ebirowoozo byabwe babimalidde ku bya nsi." 
Philippians3:20 Naye ffe obutaka bwaffe buli mu ggulu, era eyo Omulokozi, Mukama Yesu Kristo gye tumulindirira okuva." 
Philippians3:21 Emibiri gyaffe eminafu egifa, aligifuula ng'ogugwe ogwekitiibwa, ng'akozesa amaanyi agamusobozesa n'okussa ebintu byonna mu buyinza bwe." 
Philippians4:1 Kale baganda bange be njagala ennyo, era be nnumirwa, mmwe ssanyu lyange, era mmwe ngule yange. Abaagalwa, munywererenga bwe mutyo mu Mukama." 
Philippians4:2 Neegayirira Ewudiya ne Suntuke basse kimu mu Mukama. 
Philippians4:3 Era nsaba ggwe mukozi munnange omwesigwa, oyambenga abakazi abo, kubanga baakolera wamu nange omulimu gw'okubunyisa Amawulire Amalungi. Abo awamu ne Kelementi, era n'abakozi bannange abalala, amannya gaabwe gawandiikiddwa mu kitabo ky'obulamu." 
Philippians4:4 Musanyukirenga mu Mukama bulijjo. Nziramu okubagamba nti musanyukenga. 
Philippians4:5 Abantu bonna bamanye nga bwe muli abakkakkamu, Mukama ali kumpi okujja." 
Philippians4:6 Temweraliikiriranga kintu na kimu, naye byonna mubitegeezenga Katonda, nga mumusaba, nga mumwegayirira era nga mumwebaza." 
Philippians4:7 Emirembe gya Katonda egisukkiridde okutegeera kwaffe, ginaakuumanga emitima gyammwe n'emyoyo gyammwe, nga biri wamu ne Yesu Kristo." 
Philippians4:8 Abooluganda eky'enkomerero, ebyo byonna eby'amazima, ebissibwamu ekitiibwa, ebituufu, ebirongoofu, ebyagalibwa, n'eby'ettendo, bye muba mulowoozangako." 
Philippians4:9 Ebyo bye nabayigiriza ne bye nabawa, ebyo bye mwawulira njogera, ne bye mwalaba nkola, era bye mubanga mukola, bye mubanga mutambuliramu, olwo Katonda ow'emirembe anaabeeranga nammwe." 
Philippians4:10 Nfunye essanyu lingi mu Mukama, kubanga kaakano, nga wamaze okuyitawo ebbanga ddene, muzzeemu okunfaako. Kya mazima mwali munfaako, naye mwali temulina bbanga." 
Philippians4:11 Njogera kino si lwa kuba nti ndiko kye neetaaga, kubanga nayiga obutajulirira kantu mu buli mbeera gye mbaamu." 
Philippians4:12 Mmanyi okuba omwavu, era mmanyi okuba omugagga. Mu buli ngeri, ne mu mbeera zonna, nayiga okukkuta n'okulumwa enjala, okuba n'ebingi n'obutaba na kantu." 
Philippians4:13 Nnyinza okugumira byonna olw'amaanyi ga Kristo g'ampa. 
Philippians4:14 Kyokka mwakola bulungi okunziruukirira mu kubonaabona kwange. 
Philippians4:15 Era mmwe ab'e Filippi mumanyi nti bwe natandika okutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi nga nva e Makedooniya, tewaali kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo na kimu ekyampaayo akantu olw'ebyo bye kyafuna, okuggyako mmwe mwekka." 
Philippians4:16 Era ne bwe nali mu Tessalonika, mwampeereza ebyokunnyamba, si mulundi gumu, wabula ebiri." 
Philippians4:17 Ekirabo si kye njagala, naye kye njagala kwe kulaba nti bye mufuna byeyongera obungi." 
Philippians4:18 Naye kaakano mmaze okufuna ebisinga ku ebyo bye neetaaga. Nzijudde olw'okufuna bye mwampeereza, Epafuradito bye yandeetera. Ebirabo bino biri ng'akawoowo akalungi ennyo ak'ekitambiro ekisanyusa, era ekisiimibwa Katonda." 
Philippians4:19 Kale Katonda wange alibawa buli kye mwetaaga, ng'aggya ku bugagga bwe obungi, obuli mu Kristo Yesu." 
Philippians4:20 Katonda waffe, era Kitaffe aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Philippians4:21 Mulamuse abantu ba Katonda bonna abakkiriza Kristo Yesu. Baganda baffe abali nange babalamusizza. 
Philippians4:22 Era abantu ba Katonda bonna, na ddala abo abali mu lubiri lwa Kayisaari babalamusizza." 
Philippians4:23 Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo abakwatirwenga mmwe ekisa. 
Colossians1:1 Nze Pawulo omutume wa Kristo Yesu, nga Katonda bwe yayagala, era n'owooluganda Timoteewo," 
Colossians1:2 tuwandiikira mmwe abantu ba Katonda, era abooluganda abeesigwa mu Kristo, abali mu Kolosaayi. Katonda Kitaffe abakwatirwe mmwe ekisa era abawe emirembe." 
Colossians1:3 Bulijjo twebaza Katonda, Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, nga tubasabira mmwe," 
Colossians1:4 okuva lwe twawulira nga bwe mukkiriza Kristo Yesu, era nga bwe mwagala abantu ba Katonda bonna." 
Colossians1:5 Ebyo byombi mubikola kubanga mulina essuubi ery'okufuna ebirungi ebibaterekeddwa mu ggulu. Essuubi eryo mwalifuna bwe mwategeezebwa ekigambo eky'amazima, ge Mawulire Amalungi" 
Colossians1:6 agagenda gabuna mu nsi yonna, era nga gakola ekyo kye gakoze mu mmwe, okuviira ddala ku lunaku lwe mwasooka okuwulira ku kisa kya Katonda, ne mukitegeerera ddala mu mazima," 
Colossians1:7 nga bwe kyabayigirizibwa Epafura mukozi munnaffe omwagalwa, omuweereza omwesigwa owa Kristo ku lwaffe." 
Colossians1:8 Era ye yatutegeeza okwagala kwammwe, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu kw'abawadde." 
Colossians1:9 Kale naffe okuva lwe twawulira ekyo, tetulekangayo kubasabira na kwegayirira Katonda, abajjuze okumanya by'ayagala, nga mubimanya mu magezi gonna, n'okutegeera okw'omwoyo." 
Colossians1:10 Olwo mulisobola okuba nga Mukama bw'ayagala, nga mumusanyusa mu byonna. Muliba ba mugaso mu buli kirungi kye mukola, era mulyeyongera okumanya Katonda." 
Colossians1:11 Obuyinza bwe obwekitiibwa bulibawa amaanyi gonna, musobole okugumira byonna n'obugumiikiriza, nga muli basanyufu," 
Colossians1:12 nga bwe mwebaza Kitaffe eyabasaanyiza okuba awamu n'abantu be mu kitangaala. 
Colossians1:13 Yatuwonya obuyinza bw'ekizikiza, n'atutwala mu bwakabaka bw'Omwana we omwagalwa," 
Colossians1:14 eyatununula n'atusonyiwa ebibi byaffe. 
Colossians1:15 Kristo yennyini gwe tulabiramu Katonda atalabika, era ye mwana omubereberye, akulira ebitonde byonna." 
Colossians1:16 Ebintu byonna ebiri mu ggulu n'ebiri ku nsi, ebirabika n'ebitalabika, newaakubadde entebe ez'obwakabaka, n'obufuzi bw'amatwale, wadde abakungu n'ab'obuyinza, byonna byatonderwa mu ye era ku lulwe." 
Colossians1:17 Ye yaliwo ng'ebintu byonna tebinnatondebwa; era byonna bibeerawo mu ye. 
Colossians1:18 Ekibiina ky'abamukkiriza gwe mubiri gwe, era ye gwe mutwe gwakyo. Ye y'entandikwa, ye mubereberye mu kuzuukira, kyava aba omubereberye mu byonna." 
Colossians1:19 Katonda yasiima okutuukirira kwonna kubeerenga mu Kristo. 
Colossians1:20 Era yasiima ayite mu ye okutabagana n'ebintu byonna, ebiri mu ggulu n'ebiri mu nsi, ng'aleetawo emirembe olw'okufa kwa Kristo oyo, eyafiira ku musaalaba." 
Colossians1:21 Nammwe edda mwali mweyawudde ku Katonda, era nga muli balabe be olw'ebirowoozo byammwe n'ebikolwa byammwe ebibi." 
Colossians1:22 Naye kaakano Katonda yatabagana nammwe, mu mubiri gwa Kristo eyafa, alyoke abanjule nga muli batukuvu, abataliiko kamogo wadde omusango mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Colossians1:23 Kyokka muteekwa okuba mu kukkiriza, nga muli banywevu, nga temusagaasagana, era nga temuvudde mu kusuubira kwe mwafuna mu Mawulire Amalungi ge mwawulira. Amawulire Amalungi ago, gatuusiddwa ku bantu bonna abali ku nsi, era nze Pawulo, nafuulibwa omuweereza waago." 
Colossians1:24 Kaakano nsanyuka olw'okubonaabona kwe mbonaabonamu ku lwammwe. Era okubonaabona kwange mu mubiri, kutuukiriza ebyo ebyasigalira ku kubonaabona kwa Kristo olw'omubiri gwe, kye kibiina ky'abamukkiriza." 
Colossians1:25 Katonda yanfuula omuweereza w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, n'ampa omulimu ogw'okumanyisiza ddala ekigambo kye ku lwammwe." 
Colossians1:26 Ekigambo kye ekyo, kye kyama ekyali kikisiddwa eri abantu ab'emirembe egy'edda. Naye kaakano akimanyisizza abantu be." 
Colossians1:27 Katonda yayagala okukimanyisa nga bwe kiri eky'omuwendo, era ekyekitiibwa ennyo mu mawanga. Ekyama ekyo ye Kristo ali mu mmwe, era n'ekitiibwa kye musuubira okufuna." 
Colossians1:28 Kristo oyo gwe tumanyisa mu bantu. Tulabula, era tuyigiriza buli omu, nga tukozesa amagezi gonna, tulyoke tuleete buli muntu eri Katonda, ng'atuukiridde mu Kristo." 
Colossians1:29 Ekyo kye nteganira, ne nfuba nga neesiga amaanyi ga Katonda ag'obuyinza, agakolera mu nze." 
Colossians2:1 Njagala mumanye nga bwe nfuba ennyo ku lwammwe, ne ku lw'abo ab'omu Lawodiikiya, era ne ku lw'abo bonna abatandabangako." 
Colossians2:2 Ekyo nkikola, emitima gyabwe giryoke gisanyuke, nga bassa kimu mu kwagalana, bategeerere ddala era bamanyire ddala ekyama kya Katonda. Ekyama ekyo ye Kristo." 
Colossians2:3 Mu ye mwe mukwekeddwa amagezi gonna, n'okumanya kwonna." 
Colossians2:4 Ekyo nkibategeeza, waleme kubaawo ababuzaabuza, ng'akozesa ebigambo ebisendasenda." 
Colossians2:5 Newaakubadde nga siri nammwe mu mubiri, naye ndi wamu nammwe mu mwoyo, era nsanyuka okulaba nti mutebenkedde, nga muli banywevu mu kukkiriza Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 Kale nga bwe mwaweebwa Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe, mwegatte wamu naye mu bulamu bwammwe." 
Colossians2:7 Munywerere ddala mu ye, era mukulire mu ye, nga muli banywevu mu kukkiriza nga bwe mwayigirizibwa, era temukoowanga kwebaza." 
Colossians2:8 Mwekuumenga waleme kubaawo ababuzaabuza, n'abafuula abaddu, ng'akozesa ebigambo eby'amagezi ag'abantu obuntu agataliimu nsa, era ag'obulimba, abantu ge bayigiriza, nga bageesigamya ku buyinza bw'emisambwa, sso si ku Kristo." 
Colossians2:9 Ddala mu Kristo, obwakatonda bwonna mwe buli." 
Colossians2:10 Era ye akulira abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza bonna. Nammwe mu ye mwe mwafunira obulamu obujjuvu," 
Colossians2:11 era mwakomolerwa mu ye. Temwakomolebwa bantu, wabula Kristo ye yabakomola, ng'abambulamu embeera yammwe etetabagana na Katonda." 
Colossians2:12 Bwe mwabatizibwa mwaziikibwa wamu ne Kristo, era mu kubatizibwa mwazuukira wamu naye olw'okukkiriza obuyinza bwa Katonda eyamuzuukiza." 
Colossians2:13 Nammwe abaali bafudde olw'ebibi byammwe n'olw'obutakomolebwa bwammwe mu mubiri, Katonda yabafuula balamu wamu ne Kristo, bwe yatusonyiwa ebibi byaffe byonna." 
Colossians2:14 Yasazaamu era n'aggyawo endagaano eyatuwalirizanga okutuukiriza ebyo amateeka g'Ekiyudaaya bye galagira, n'agikomerera ku musaalaba." 
Colossians2:15 Ku musaalaba ogwo kwe yawangulira abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza, n'abaggyako ebyokulwanyisa, n'abaswaza mu lwatu." 
Colossians2:16 Kale tewabangawo abanenya olw'ebyo ebifa ku byokulya ne ku byokunywa, oba olw'ebyo ebikwata ku nnaku enkulu, ne ku kuboneka kw'omwezi, wadde ku nnaku za Sabbaato." 
Colossians2:17 Ebyo byonna kifaananyi bifaananyi eky'ebyo ebigenda okujja. Naye ekirimu ensa ye Kristo. 
Colossians2:18 Walemenga kubaawo babalimbalimba, nga beesigama ku kwewombeeka okw'obulimba, ne ku kusinza bamalayika, nga beesiga okulabikirwa okutaliimu. Abantu abo beekulumbaliza bwereere olw'ebirowoozo byabwe eby'abantu obuntu," 
Colossians2:19 era baba tebakyali ku Kristo omutwe, aliisa omubiri gwonna, n'agatta ennyingo n'ebinywa byagwo, ne gukula nga Katonda bw'ayagala gukule." 
Colossians2:20 Mwafiira wamu ne Kristo ne muwona obuyinza bw'emisambwa, obufuga ensi. Kale lwaki ate muyisa ng'abakyafugibwa ensi, ne mukkiriza okuweebwa ebiragiro nga bino:" 
Colossians2:21 “Tokwatanga ku kino; tokombanga ku ekyo; kiri tokikoonangako”? 
Colossians2:22 Ebyo byonna okubikola, tekiriiko kye kigasa. Okwo kuba kugoberera biragiro n'okuyigiriza okw'abantu obuntu." 
Colossians2:23 Weewaawo birabika ng'eby'amagezi mu ngeri y'okusinza Katonda, abantu gye beegunjirawo bokka, ne mu kwewombeeka okw'obulimba, era ne mu kubonereza omubiri. Naye tebiriiko kye bigasa mu kufuga okwegomba kw'omubiri." 
Colossians3:1 Mwazuukira wamu ne Kristo. N'olwekyo mulowoozenga ku biri mu ggulu, Kristo gy'atudde ng'aliraanye Katonda, mu kifo ekisinga eby'abalala ekitiibwa." 
Colossians3:2 Mulowoozenga ku bya mu ggulu, sso si ku bya ku nsi," 
Colossians3:3 kubanga mwafa, era obulamu bwammwe bukwekeddwa wamu ne Kristo mu Katonda." 
Colossians3:4 Kristo, obulamu bwammwe, bw'alirabika, olwo nammwe mulirabikira wamu naye mu kitiibwa." 
Colossians3:5 Kale mutte okwegomba okubi okuli mu mmwe: obwenzi, obugwagwa, obukaba, okwegomba okw'ensonyi, n'omululu, kwe kusinza ebitali Katonda." 
Colossians3:6 Katonda asunguwalira abamujeemera ne bakola ebyo. 
Colossians3:7 Era nammwe ebyo bye mwakolanga edda mu bulamu bwammwe. 
Colossians3:8 Naye kaakano bino byonna mubireke: obusungu, ekiruyi, n'ettima. Okuvvoola era n'emboozi embi biremenga kuva mu kamwa kammwe." 
Colossians3:9 Temulimbagananga, kubanga mweyambula obulamu obukadde n'ebikolwa byabwo ebibi," 
Colossians3:10 ne mwambala obulamu obuggya, oyo eyabatonda bw'agenda ayongera okuzza obuggya mu kifaananyi kye, mulyoke mumutegeere bulungi." 
Colossians3:11 Olwo waba tewakyali kwawulamu Muyonaani na Muyudaaya, mukomole n'atali mukomole, munnaggwanga, atali mugunjufu, muddu oba ow'eddembe, wabula Kristo ye byonna, era ye ali mu byonna." 
Colossians3:12 Muli batukuvu, abaagalwa era abalondemu ba Katonda. N'olwekyo mubenga n'omwoyo ogusaasira, mubenga n'ekisa, n'obwetoowaze, n'obuteefu, era n'okugumiikiriza." 
Colossians3:13 Mugumiikirizaganenga era musonyiwaganenga buli lwe wabangawo alina kye yeemulugunyiza munne. Muteekwa okusonyiwagana mu ngeri ye emu nga Mukama waffe bwe yabasonyiwa mmwe. 
Colossians3:14 Era ku ebyo byonna, mwongereeko okwagalana. Okwo kwe kunyweza ebintu byonna awamu, mu kutabagana okujjuvu." 
Colossians3:15 Emirembe gya Kristo gy'agaba, era Katonda gye yabayitira okuba awamu ng'ebitundu eby'omubiri ogumu, giramulenga mu mitima gyammwe; era mwebazenga." 
Colossians3:16 Ekigambo kya Kristo, mu bugagga bwakyo bwonna, kibeerenga mu mitima gyammwe. Muyigirizaganenga era mubuuliriraganenga mu magezi gonna. Nga mujjudde okwebaza mu mitima gyammwe, Katonda mumuyimbire zabbuli, n'ennyimba, n'ebiyiiye, Mwoyo by'abasobozesa okuyiiya." 
Colossians3:17 Buli kintu kye mwogera oba kye mukola, mukikolenga mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu, nga muyita mu ye okwebaza Katonda Kitaffe." 
Colossians3:18 Abakazi muwulirenga babbammwe, ng'abakkiriza Mukama waffe bwe basaana okukola." 
Colossians3:19 Abasajja mwagalenga bakazi bammwe, era temubakambuwaliranga." 
Colossians3:20 Abaana, bazadde bammwe mubawulirenga mu byonna, kubanga ekyo kisanyusa Mukama waffe." 
Colossians3:21 Bakitaabwe b'abaana, temukaluubirizanga baana bammwe okutuuka okwenyiwa, sikulwa nga baterebuka." 
Colossians3:22 Abaddu, bakama bammwe ab'oku nsi mubawulirenga mu byonna, si lwa kulabibwa kyokka, ng'abaagala okusiimibwa abantu, naye mubaweerezenga n'omutima ogutaliimu bukuusa, nga mussaamu Mukama waffe ekitiibwa." 
Colossians3:23 Buli kye mukola, mukikolenga n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, ng'abakolera Mukama waffe, sso si ng'abakolera abantu." 
Colossians3:24 Mumanye nti mulifuna empeera, Mukama waffe gye yasuubiza. Kristo ye Mukama wammwe gwe muweereza." 
Colossians3:25 Oyo akola ekibi, alibonerezebwa olw'ekibi kye yakola, kubanga tewaliba kusaliriza." 
Colossians4:1 Bakama b'abaddu, muyisenga bulungi abaddu bammwe, nga muli benkanya, nga mumanyi nti nammwe mulina Mukama wammwe mu ggulu." 
Colossians4:2 Munyiikirenga okusinza Katonda, nga temuddirira, era nga mumwebaza." 
Colossians4:3 Era naffe mutusabirenga, Katonda atuggulirewo oluggi, tutegeeze abantu ekigambo kye, tubamanyise ekyama kya Kristo. Era ekyo kye kyansibisa mu kkomera." 
Colossians4:4 Munsabire nkitegeeze abantu mu ngeri yennyini gye nsaana okukibategeezaamu. 
Colossians4:5 Abo abatannafuna kukkiriza, mukolaganenga nabo n'amagezi, nga mukozesa buli mukisa gwe mulina." 
Colossians4:6 Bulijjo mwogerenga mu ngeri enyuma era esanyusa, era mumanyenga engeri gye musaana okwanukulamu buli omu." 
Colossians4:7 Tukiko owooluganda omwagalwa, omuweereza omwesigwa era mukozi munnaffe mu mulimu gwa Mukama waffe, ajja kubategeeza byonna ebyantuukako." 
Colossians4:8 Kyenvudde mmutuma gye muli, mumanye nga bwe tuli, era agumye emitima gyammwe." 
Colossians4:9 Era awamu naye, ntumye Onesimo owooluganda era omwagalwa, ow'ewammwe. Bajja kubategeeza byonna ebifa eno." 
Colossians4:10 Arisitaruuko musibe munnange, ne Mariko omujjwa wa Barunaba babalamusizza. Mariko oyo, gwe nabagambako. Bw'ajjanga gye muli mumwanirizanga." 
Colossians4:11 Ne Yesu, ayitibwa Yusto, abalamusizza. Abo be bokka ab'omu bakomole abakola nange omulimu ogw'Obwakabaka bwa Katonda, era abanzizizzaamu ennyo amaanyi." 
Colossians4:12 Epafura ow'ewammwe, omuweereza wa Kristo Yesu, abalamusizza. Era bulijjo abasabira nnyo, mube batuukirivu, abategeeredde ddala Katonda by'ayagala." 
Colossians4:13 Nkikakasa nti Epafura, mmwe awamu n'ab'omu Lawodiikiya, era n'ab'omu Yerapoli, abakoleredde nnyo." 
Colossians4:14 Lukka omusawo omwagalwa, ne Dema babalamusizza." 
Colossians4:15 Mulamuse abooluganda ab'omu Lawodiikiya. Era mulamuse Nunfa, n'ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'e Lawodiikiya." 
Colossians4:16 Ebbaluwa eno bw'emala okusomebwa mu mmwe, mulabe nti esomerwa n'ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'e Lawodiikiya. Era nammwe musome ebbaluwa eriva e Lawodiikiya." 
Colossians4:17 Era mugambe Arikipo nti: “Fuba okutuukiriza omulimu gwa Mukama waffe gwe wakwasibwa.” 
Colossians4:18 Nze Pawulo, nze mpandiise n'omukono gwange okulamusa kuno. Munzijukire mu busibe bwange. Katonda abakwatirwenga mmwe ekisa." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Nze Pawulo ne Siluvaano ne Timoteewo, tuwandiikira ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo abali mu Tessalonika, aba Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama Yesu Kristo. Katonda abakwatirwe ekisa mmwe era abawe emirembe." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Bulijjo twebaza Katonda ku lwammwe mwenna, era tetwosa kubasabira eri Katonda." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Bulijjo nga tuli mu maaso ga Katonda era Kitaffe, tujjukira nga bwe mulaga okukkiriza kwammwe n'okwagala kwammwe, mu ebyo bye mukola. Era tujjukira nga bwe mulaga essuubi lyammwe mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Abooluganda, tumanyi nga Katonda abaagala, era yabalondamu mube ababe," 
1Thessalonians1:5 kubanga bwe twabategeeza Amawulire Amalungi, tegaali bigambo bugambo, wabula gaalimu amaanyi ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, era nga tukakasiza ddala nti bye tugamba bya mazima. Mumanyi bulungi nga bwe twayisanga nga tuli mu mmwe. Ekyo kyali bwe kityo, lwa kwagala kugasa bwammwe." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nammwe mwagoberera empisa zaffe n'eza Mukama waffe, kubanga newaakubadde mwabonaabona olw'ekigambo kya Katonda, naye mwakikkiriza n'essanyu eriva mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Bwe mutyo ne muba ekyokulabirako eri abakkiriza bonna ab'omu Makedooniya n'ab'omu Akaya," 
1Thessalonians1:8 kubanga mwabunya ekigambo kya Katonda, si mu Akaya mwokka, naye wonna wonna baamanya bwe mukkiriza Katonda. Kyetuva tuteetaaga kubaako kye twogera," 
1Thessalonians1:9 kubanga abantu bennyini banyumya nga bwe twajja ewammwe, era nga bwe mwava ku bitali Katonda, ne mudda eri Katonda Nnannyinibulamu era ow'amazima, mumuweereze," 
1Thessalonians1:10 era mulindirire Omwana we okujja ng'ava mu ggulu, gwe yazuukiza, ye Yesu atuwonya obusungu bwa Katonda obugenda okujja." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Abooluganda, mmwe mwennyini mumanyi nti okujja kwaffe gye muli, tekwafa bwereere." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Mumanyi nga bwe twabonaabona, era nga bwe twavumirwa e Filippi, nga tetunnajja gye muli e Tessalonika. Naye Katonda waffe yatugumya, ne tubategeeza mmwe Amawulire Amalungi agava gy'ali, newaakubadde bangi baatuziyizanga." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Bye tubakubiriza si bya bulimba oba eby'obugwagwa, wadde eby'obukuusa." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Naye nga Katonda bwe yatwesiga n'atukwasa Amawulire Amalungi, naffe bwe tutyo bwe tugabategeeza, nga tetugenderera kusanyusa bantu, wabula okusanyusa Katonda akebera emitima gyaffe." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Mumanyi bulungi nti tetukozesanga bigambo bya kubawaanawaana, wadde eby'okukweka omululu gwaffe. Katonda ye mujulirwa waffe." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Tetwegombanga kitiibwa, okukiweebwa mmwe oba abalala, newaakubadde nga twandisobodde okukibasaba mmwe, nga bwe tuli abatume ba Kristo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Naye twegendereza mu mmwe, ng'omuzadde alabirira abaana be." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Twabalumirwa nnyo omwoyo, kyetwava twegomba okubatuusaako Amawulire Amalungi agava eri Katonda. Si ekyo kyokka, naye twegomba n'okuwaayo obulamu bwaffe bwennyini, kubanga twabaagala nnyo." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Abooluganda mujjukire nga bwe twabategeezanga Amawulire Amalungi agava eri Katonda, era nga bwe twafuba ne tutegana, nga tukola emisana n'ekiro, tuleme okuzitoowerera wadde omu ku mmwe." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Mmwe abakkiriza muyinza okutujulira, era ne Katonda atujulira nti empisa zaffe nga tuli mu mmwe zaali ntukuvu, ezituukiridde, era ezitaliiko kya kunenyezebwa." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Mumanyi nti buli omu ku mmwe twabanga naye nga kitaawe w'abaana bw'aba n'abaana be. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Twababuulirira, twabagumya, era twabakubiriza mube mu bulamu obusanyusa Katonda, eyabayita okuba mu Bwakabaka bwe ne mu kitiibwa kye." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Era kyetuva twebaza Katonda bulijjo, kubanga bwe mwawulira ekigambo kye, kye twabategeeza, mwakikkiriza, si nga eky'abantu, wabula mwakkiriza nti ddala kya Katonda. Era ekigambo kye, kye kikolera mu mmwe abakkiriza." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Abooluganda, mufaanana n'ab'ebibiina by'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo Yesu ab'omu Buyudaaya, kubanga mwabonyaabonyezebwa bannansi bannammwe, nga bali bwe baabonyaabonyezebwa Abayudaaya," 
1Thessalonians2:15 abatta Mukama waffe Yesu era n'abalanzi, ate naffe ne batuyigganya. Tebasanyusa Katonda, era balabe b'abantu bonna." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Baagezaako n'okutuziyiza okutegeeza ab'amawanga amalala eby'okubalokola, ekyo ne kyongera ku bibi byabwe bye bazze bakola okuva edda. Ku nkomerero Katonda n'abasunguwalira nnyo." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Abooluganda, bwe mwatwawukanako akaseera akatono (ku maaso, sso si ku mutima), tweyongera nnyo okwegomba okubalabako," 
1Thessalonians2:18 ne twagala okujja gye muli. Nze Pawulo, nagezaako omulundi ogusooka n'ogwokubiri, kyokka Sitaani n'atuziyiza." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Kale Mukama waffe bw'alijja, si mmwe mulibeera essuubi lyaffe n'essanyu lyaffe mu maaso ge? Si mmwe tulisinziirako okwenyumiriza olw'obuwanguzi?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Mmwe kitiibwa kyaffe, era mmwe ssanyu lyaffe." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Kale bwe twalemwa okwongera okugumiikiriza, kyetwava tusalawo okusigala ffekka mu Ateene," 
1Thessalonians3:2 ne tutuma muganda waffe Timoteewo, gwe tukola naye omulimu gwa Katonda nga tutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi aga Kristo. Twamutuma abagumye, era abanyweze mu kukkiriza kwammwe," 
1Thessalonians3:3 waleme kubaawo n'omu aterebuka olw'okuyigganyizibwa. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Bwe twali tukyali nammwe twabategeerezaawo nti tuli ba kubonyaabonyezebwa, era mumanyi nti ekyo kituukiridde." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Nange bwe nalaba nga sikyayinza kugumiikiriza, kwe kubatumira Timoteewo. Namutuma, ndyoke mmanye okukkiriza kwammwe bwe kuli nga ntya nti sikulwa ng'omukemi abakema, okufuba kwaffe ne kuba okw'obwereere." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kaakano Timoteewo ky'ajje akomewo gye tuli ng'ava ewammwe. Atuleetedde amawulire amalungi, agafa ku kukkiriza kwammwe n'okwagala kwammwe. Era atutegeezezza nti bulijjo mutulowoozaako nnyo, era nti mwegomba okutulabako nga naffe bwe twegomba okubalabako." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Kale baganda baffe, newaakubadde nga tuli mu buzibu bungi, ne mu kubonaabona, naye okukkiriza kwammwe kutuzzizzaamu amaanyi," 
1Thessalonians3:8 kubanga bwe muba abanywevu mu Mukama waffe, tuba balamu ddala." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Kale Katonda tunaamuwa ki okumwebaza olw'essanyu lye tulina mu maaso ge ku lwammwe? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Emisana n'ekiro twegayirira nnyo Katonda, tusobole okulabaganako nammwe amaaso n'amaaso, era tulyoke tutuukirize ebikyabula ku kukkiriza kwammwe." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Katonda yennyini era Kitaffe, ne Mukama waffe Yesu, batusobozese okujja gye muli." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Mukama abongeremu okwagalananga n'okwagalanga abantu bonna, nga ffe bwe tubaagala mmwe." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Anyweze emitima gyammwe, Mukama waffe Yesu bw'alijja awamu n'abatukuvu be, mulyoke musangibwe nga temuliiko kya kunenyezebwa, nga muli batukuvu mu maaso ga Katonda waffe era Kitaffe." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Abooluganda, mwatuyigirako nga bwe musaana okubeera, mulyoke musanyuse Katonda, era bwe mutyo bwe mubadde mukola. Kale kaakano eky'enkomerero, tubeegayirira era tubabuulirira mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu, mukole bwe mutyo n'okusingawo," 
1Thessalonians4:2 kubanga mumanyi ebiragiro bye twabawa ku bwa Mukama waffe Yesu nga bwe biri. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Katonda ky'abaagaza, kwe kuba abatukuvu, mwewale obwenzi." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Buli omu mu mmwe ateekwa okumanya okufuganga omubiri gwe mu butukuvu, n'okugussangamu ekitiibwa." 
1Thessalonians4:5 Temufugibwanga kwegomba kwa mubiri, ng'abantu ab'ensi abatamanyi Katonda bwe bakola." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Mu nsonga eno waleme kubaawo akola ebirumya munne, wadde okumutwalako ekikye, kubanga Mukama awoolera eggwanga oly'ebyo byonna. Ebyo byonna twabibalabulamu era twabibategeeza dda." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Katonda teyatuyitira bugwagwa, wabula yatuyitira butukuvu." 
1Thessalonians4:8 N'olwekyo buli anyooma ekyo, aba tanyoomye muntu, wabula aba anyoomye Katonda, abawa mmwe Mwoyo Mutuukirivu we." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Naye ebikwata ku kwagalana, abooluganda, seetaaga kubibawandiikira, kubanga mmwe mwennyini Katonda yabayigiriza okwagalana." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Era bwe mutyo bwe mukola mu booluganda bonna abali mu Makedooniya yonna. Kale baganda baffe, tubeegayirira mukolenga bwe mutyo n'okusingawo." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Munyiikirirenga okuba mu ddembe, mukolenga emirimu gyammwe, nga mukola n'emikono gyammwe nga bwe twabagamba." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Olwo abatakkiriza banaabassangamu ekitiibwa, era muneemaliriranga mu bye mwetaaga." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Abooluganda, twagala mumanye ebikwata ku abo abaafa, muleme kunakuwala ng'abantu abalala abatalina ssuubi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Tukkiriza nti Yesu yafa n'azuukira, era bwe kiriba ne ku abo abaafa nga bakkiriza Yesu: Katonda alibakomyawo wamu ne Yesu." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Tubategeeza ekyo Mukama waffe kye yagamba nti Ye Mukama waffe bw'alijja, ffe abalamu tetulisooka abo abaafa." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Mukama waffe yennyini alikka ng'ava mu ggulu, ekirangiriro nga kirangirirwa, eddoboozi lya Ssaabamalayika nga liwulirwa, era n'ekkondeere lya Katonda nga livuga. Abo abaafa nga bakkiriza Kristo, be balisooka okuzuukira." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Awo naffe abaliba bakyali abalamu, ne tulyoka tutwalibwa wamu nabo mu bire, okusisinkana Mukama waffe mu bbanga. Olwo ne tubeeranga ne Mukama waffe bulijjo." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Kale buli omu agumyenga munne n'ebigambo ebyo. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Baganda bange, tetwetaaga kubawandiikira bifa ku budde n'ebiseera, ebyo we biribeererawo." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Nammwe mwennyini mumanyidde ddala nti olunaku lwa Mukama lujja ng'omubbi bw'ajja ekiro. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Abantu bwe baliba nga bagamba nti: “Mirembe, tewali kabi”, olwo okuzikirizibwa ne kulyoka kubatuukako, ng'okulumwa bwe kujjira omukazi alumwa okuzaala. Tebaliwona n'akatono." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Naye mmwe, baganda bange, temuli mu kizikiza nti olunaku olwo lulibagwikiriza ng'omubbi," 
1Thessalonians5:5 kubanga mwenna muli bantu ba kitangaala, era muli ba misana. Tetuli ba kiro, wadde ab'ekizikiza." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Kale tuleme kwebaka ng'abalala, naye tutunule, tuleme kuba batamiivu." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Abeebaka, beebaka kiro; n'abatamiira batamiira kiro." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kale nga bwe tuli ab'emisana, tuleme kuba batamiivu. Okukkiriza n'okwagalana bitubeerere engabo, n'okusuubira obulokozi kutubeerere enkuufiira," 
1Thessalonians5:9 kubanga Katonda teyatuteekerateekera kubonerezebwa busungu bwe, wabula yatuteekerateekera kulokolebwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 eyatufiirira, tulyoke tube balamu wamu naye, si nsonga oba tufudde oba tuli balamu." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Kale buli omu agumyenga munne, era amuyambenga, nga bwe mukola kati." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Abooluganda, tubeegayirira mumanye abo abakola omulimu mu mmwe, era Katonda b'alonze okubakulembera n'okubayigiriza." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Mubassengamu nnyo ekitiibwa, era mubaagalenga olw'omulimu gwabwe. Mubenga n'emirembe mu mmwe." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Abooluganda, tubeegayiridde mulabulenga abagayaavu, mugumyenga abatali banywevu, muyambenga abanafu, mugumiikirizenga bonna." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mulabe nti mu mmwe tewaba awoolera ggwanga, wabula bulijjo munyiikirirenga okukola ebirungi mu mmwe, ne mu bantu bonna." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Musanyukenga bulijjo. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Musinzenga Katonda buli kiseera. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Mu byonna mwebazenga, kubanga ekyo mmwe ng'abantu ba Kristo, Katonda ky'ayagala mukole." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Temuziyizanga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Temugayanga bya balanzi. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Mwekenneenyenga byonna, mugumirenga ku kirungi," 
1Thessalonians5:22 mwewalenga buli kibi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Katonda yennyini atuwa emirembe, abatukuze. Era emyoyo gyammwe n'obulamu bwammwe n'emibiri gyammwe, bikuumibwe nga biri bulungi, Mukama waffe Yesu bw'alijja, mube nga temuliiko kye munenyezebwa." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Eyabayita mwesigwa, era ekyo alikituukiriza." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Baganda bange, mutusabire." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Mulamuse abooluganda bonna mu kulamusa okw'abantu ba Katonda. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mbalagira, mu linnya lya Mukama waffe, ebbaluwa eno esomerwe abooluganda bonna." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo abakwatirwenga mmwe ekisa. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Nze Pawulo, ne Siluvaano ne Timoteewo, tuwandiikira ab'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ab'omu Tessalonika, abantu ba Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama Yesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama Yesu Kristo babakwatirwe mmwe ekisa era babawe emirembe. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Abooluganda, tuteekwa okwebaza Katonda bulijjo ku lwammwe. Ekyo tusaanye okukikola kubanga okukkiriza kwammwe kukula nnyo, era n'okwagala buli omu mu mmwe kw'ayagalamu banne kweyongera." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Naffe ffennyini kyetuva twenyumiriza ku lwammwe mu bibiina by'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo. Twenyumiriza olw'okugumiikiriza n'olw'okukkiriza kwammwe mu kuyigganyizibwa kwammwe kwonna, ne mu kubonaabona bye mugumira." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ekyo kiraga nti Katonda mwenkanya mu kulamula kwe, kubanga ku nkomerero mulisaanira Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bwe mubonaabonera." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Katonda mwenkanya, alibonereza abo abababonyaabonya," 
2Thessalonians1:7 ate mmwe ababonyaabonyezebwa n'abawa ekiwummulo awamu naffe. Ebyo biribaawo Mukama waffe Yesu bw'alirabika ng'ava mu ggulu, ng'ali ne bamalayika be ab'amaanyi." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Walibaawo n'omuliro ogwaka, abonereze abo abatamanyi Katonda, n'abo abagaana okukkiriza Amawulire Amalungi aga Mukama waffe Yesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Baliweebwa ekibonerezo eky'okuzikirira okw'emirembe n'emirembe, ne bagobebwa mu maaso ga Mukama oweekitiibwa ennyo." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Ebyo biribaawo ku lunaku lw'alijjirako okugulumizibwa mu batukuvu be, bonna abakkiriza ne bamulaba mu kitiibwa kye. Nammwe muliba wamu nabo, kubanga mwakkiriza ebyo bye twabategeeza." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Bulijjo kyetuva tubasabira eri Katonda waffe, abasaanyize ekyo kye yabayitira, era mu buyinza bwe, atuukirize ebirungi byonna bye mumaliridde okukola, ne bye mukola olw'okukkiriza." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Olwo Mukama waffe Yesu alyoke aweebwe ekitiibwa mu mmwe, nammwe muweebwe ekitiibwa mu ye. Ekyo kituukirizibwe olw'ekisa kya Katonda waffe, ne Mukama Yesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Kaakano abooluganda, twagala okubategeeza ebikwata ku kujja kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, era nga bwe tulikuŋŋaanira w'ali." 
2Thessalonians2:2 Tubeegayirira muleme kusagaasagana mangu mu birowoozo byammwe, wadde okweraliikirira, nga mutegeezebwa nti olunaku lwa Mukama lutuuse, ekyo ne bwe kibategeezebwa omulanzi oba mu lugambo, wadde mu bbaluwa egambibwa nti ffe twagiwandiika." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Temukkirizanga muntu n'omu kubabuzaabuza, kubanga olunaku olwo terulituuka ng'okujeemera Katonda tekunnabaawo, era omuntu omwonoonyi, ow'okuzikirira alimala kulabika." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Aliwakanya era alyegulumiza ku buli kintu ekiyitibwa Katonda, oba ekisinzibwa. Era alituukira ddala ne ku kutuula mu ssinzizo lya Katonda, nga ye yennyini yeeyita Katonda." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Temujjukira nti ebyo nabibategeeza bwe nali nkyali nammwe? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Era mumanyi ekimuziyiza okulabika okutuusa ekiseera kye lwe kirituuka alyoke alabike. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Obujeemu weebuli, bukolera mu kyama. Kyokka oyo abuziyiza ajja kubuziyiza okutuusa lw'aliggyibwawo." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Olwo omujeemu oyo alirabika, Mukama Yesu waffe n'alyoka amutta n'omukka ogw'omu kamwa ke, era n'amuzikiriza n'ekitiibwa kye ky'alijjiramu." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Omubi oyo aleetebwa Sitaani, alijja n'akola n'amaanyi mangi ebyamagero ebya buli ngeri, n'ebyewuunyo eby'obulimba." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Era alikozesa buli kibi ekiyinza okukyamya abo ab'okuzikirira, kubanga baagaana amazima agandibalokodde." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Katonda kyava abaleka okubuzibwabuzibwa, bakkirize eby'obulimba," 
2Thessalonians2:12 abo bonna abatakkiriza mazima, balyoke basingibwe omusango, kubanga baasanyukira ekibi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Abooluganda, abaagalwa ba Mukama waffe, tuteekwa okwebaza Katonda bulijjo ku lwammwe, kubanga Katonda yabalonda, mube ababereberye mu kulokolebwa olw'amaanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, abafuula abantu ba Katonda abatukuvu olw'okukkiriza amazima." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Yabayitira mu Mawulire Amalungi, ge twabategeeza, mulyoke mugabane ku kitiibwa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 N'olwekyo, abooluganda, mube banywevu, munywerere ku ebyo eby'amazima bye twabayigiriza mu bigambo oba mu bbaluwa yaffe." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Kale Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo yennyini, ne Katonda Kitaffe, eyatwagala era olw'ekisa kye, n'atuwa essanyu eritaggwaawo n'essuubi eddungi," 
2Thessalonians2:17 abagumye emitima, era abawe amaanyi, mu birungi byonna bye mukola ne bye mwogera." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Eky'enkomerero, abooluganda, mutusabire, ekigambo kya Mukama kiryoke kyeyongere okubuna amangu, era kiweebwe ekitiibwa, nga bwe kyali mu mmwe." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Era mutusabire, tuwone abantu aboonoonyi era ababi, kubanga okukkiriza si kwa bonna." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kyokka Mukama waffe mwesigwa. Alibawa amaanyi mmwe, era alibawonya Omubi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Tubeesiga, kubanga muli ba Mukama, ne tukakasa nti mukola era munaakolanga ebyo bye twabalagira." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Mukama aluŋŋamye emitima gyammwe mu kwagala kwa Katonda n'okugumiikiriza kwa Kristo. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Kale baganda bange, tubalagira mu linnya lya Mukama Yesu Kristo: mwewale abooluganda abagayaavu, era abatagoberera ebyo bye twabayigiriza mmwe." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Mmwe mwennyini mumanyi bulungi nti musaanidde okukola nga ffe bwe twakolanga. Bwe twali nammwe, tetwali bagayaavu." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Tetwalyanga mmere ya bwereere, wabula twakolanga nnyo, nga tufuba emisana n'ekiro, tuleme okukaluubirira wadde omu ku mmwe." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Tetugamba nti tekyanditugwanidde, wabula twayagala kubawa kyakulabirako, namwe mukolenga nga ffe." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ne bwe twali nga tukyali wamu nammwe, twabalagira nti: “Agaananga okukola emirimu, n'okulya talyanga.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Twawulira nti abamu mu mmwe bagayaavu, tebakola mirimu, wabula okweyingiza mu bya bannaabwe." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ab'engeri eyo tubalagira era tubabuulirira mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu, bakolenga emirimu nga bakkakkamu, bafune kye balya." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Abooluganda, temukoowanga kukola bulungi." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Bwe wabangawo agaana okugoberera kye tugamba mu bbaluwa eno, mumugenderere, era muleme kukolagana naye, alyoke akwatibwe ensonyi." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Kyokka temumuyisa ng'omulabe, wabula mumulabule nga muganda wammwe." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Kale Mukama waffe yennyini, nnannyini mirembe, abawenga emirembe bulijjo, buli we mubeera. Mukama abeerenga namwe mmwenna." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Nze Pawulo, okulamusa kuno nze nkuwandiise ne nteekako omukono. Ako ke kabonero akalaga buli bbaluwa gye mba mpandiise. Bwe ntyo bwe mpandiika." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo abakwatirwenga ekisa mmwe mwenna. 
1Timothy1:1 Nze Pawulo omutume wa Kristo Yesu okusinziira ku kiragiro kya Katonda Omulokozi waffe, ne Kristo Yesu essuubi lyaffe," 
1Timothy1:2 nkuwandiikira ggwe Timoteewo, omwana wange ddala mu kukkiriza. Katonda Kitaffe ne Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe bakukwatirwe ekisa, bakusaasire, era bakuwe emirembe." 
1Timothy1:3 Njagala osigale mu Efeso, nga bwe nakusaba nga ŋŋenda e Makedooniya, oziyize abantu baleme kuyigiriza njigiriza ndala." 
1Timothy1:4 Bagambe balekere awo okwemaliranga ku nfumo, ne ku kulondoola enkalala empanvu ez'amannya g'abajjajjaabwe. Ebyo byongera mpaka, mu kifo ky'okuyigiriza abantu ebya Katonda, ebiri mu kukkiriza." 
1Timothy1:5 Ekigendererwa mu kiragiro kino kwe kwagala, okusibuka mu mutima omulongoofu, n'omwoyo omulungi, n'okukkiriza okutaliimu bukuusa." 
1Timothy1:6 Ebyo abantu abamu babivaako, ne badda mu mpaka ezitaliimu mugaso." 
1Timothy1:7 Beefuula abayigiriza b'amateeka ga Katonda, sso nga tebategeera bye boogera, wadde bye bakakasa." 
1Timothy1:8 Tumanyi ng'Amateeka malungi, omuntu bw'agakozesa mu ngeri entuufu." 
1Timothy1:9 Tusaanye tutegeere nti amateeka tegaateekerwawo batuukirivu, wabula gaateekerwawo abo abagamenya n'abajeemu, aboonoonyi n'abatatya Katonda, abatali batuukirivu, n'abavvoola ebya Katonda, abatta bakitaabwe ne bannyaabwe, era n'abatta abantu abalala." 
1Timothy1:10 Gaateekerwawo abenzi n'abalya ebisiyaga, ababuzaawo abantu, abalimba, n'abalayirira obwereere, n'abo bonna abakola ebitakkiriziganya na njigiriza ntuufu." 
1Timothy1:11 Enjigiriza eyo entuufu ye yiiyo ekkiriziganya n'Amawulire Amalungi, era ageekitiibwa, aga Katonda atenderezebwa, agankwasibwa." 
1Timothy1:12 Neebaza Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe, eyampa amaanyi ag'okumuweereza, era eyalaba nga nsaanira, n'ankwasa omulimu gwe." 
1Timothy1:13 Newaakubadde ng'edda namwogerako bubi, ne mmuyigganya, era ne mmuvoola, kyokka yansaasira, kubanga ebyo nabikolanga mu butamanya, nga sinnaba kumukkiriza." 
1Timothy1:14 Mukama waffe yankwatirwa ekisa kingi nnyo, n'ampa okukkiriza, era n'okwagala, bye tufunira mu Kristo Yesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Ekigambo kino kituufu ddala, kisaanye okukkiriza ekigamba nti: “Kristo Yesu yajja mu nsi okulokola aboonoonyi.” Mu bo nze nsingira ddala okuba omwonoonyi." 
1Timothy1:16 Kyokka Katonda yankwatirwa ekisa: mu nze asingira ddala okuba omwonoonyi, Kristo Yesu mw'aba alagira okugumiikiriza kwe okutakoma, era mbe ekyokulabirako eri abo abalimukkiriza, ne bafuna obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
1Timothy1:17 Kabaka ow'olubeerera, atafa era atalabika, Katonda omu yekka, agulumizibwenga era aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
1Timothy1:18 Mwana wange Timoteewo, nkukubiriza ojjukire ebigambo by'abalanzi bye baakwogerako edda, olyoke olwane olutalo n'obuzira," 
1Timothy1:19 ng'okukkiriza era n'omwoyo omulungi, bye byokulwanyisa byo, kubanga abalala abagaana okuba n'omwoyo ogwo omulungi, bafiirwa okukkiriza kwabwe." 
1Timothy1:20 Mu abo mwe muli Yimenaayo ne Alekizanda be nawaayo eri Sitaani balekere awo okuvumanga Katonda. 
1Timothy2:1 Okusookera ddala, mbasaba muwanjagenga, musabenga, mwegayirirenga, era mwebazenga Katonda ku lw'abantu bonna." 
1Timothy2:2 Era musabirenga bakabaka, n'abafuzi abalala bonna, tulyoke tube bulungi, nga tuli mirembe, nga tussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, era nga twegendereza mu buli ngeri." 
1Timothy2:3 Ekyo kye kirungi era ekisiimibwa mu maaso ga Katonda Omulokozi waffe," 
1Timothy2:4 ayagala abantu bonna balokolebwe, era bamanye amazima." 
1Timothy2:5 Kubanga Katonda ali omu, era omutabaganya w'abantu ne Katonda ali omu, ye muntu Kristo Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 eyeewaayo abe omutango olwa bonna. Ekyo kyakakasibwa mu kiseera kyakyo ekituufu. 
1Timothy2:7 Era nze kye nateekerwawo mbe omutume era omuyigiriza w'ab'amawanga amalala, mbategeeze eby'okukkiriza n'eby'amazima. Njogera mazima, sirimba." 
1Timothy2:8 N'olwekyo njagala abasajja, buli wantu beegayirirenga Katonda, nga bayimusa emikono gyabwe emirongoofu, nga tebalina busungu wadde empaka." 
1Timothy2:9 Era njagala abakazi bambalenga ebyambalo ebisaanira, beegenderezenga, nga tebeemalira mu misono gya nviiri, na mu kwewoomya nga bambala ebya zaabu n'amayinja ag'omuwendo, wadde okwambala engoye ez'omuwendo ennyo," 
1Timothy2:10 wabula bakole ebikolwa ebirungi, nga bwe kisaanira abakazi abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa." 
1Timothy2:11 Mu kuyigirizibwa, omukazi asirikenga, nga yeewombeese." 
1Timothy2:12 Sikkiriza mukazi kuyigiriza, wadde okuba n'obuyinza ku musajja, wabula asaana asirike," 
1Timothy2:13 kubanga Adamu ye yasooka okutondebwa, ne kuddako Haawa." 
1Timothy2:14 Era Adamu si ye yalimbibwalimbibwa, wabula omukazi ye yalimbibwalimbibwa, n'agwa mu kibi." 
1Timothy2:15 Kyokka omukazi alirokolerwa mu kuzaala, kasita anaanywereranga mu kukkiriza ne mu kwagala, ne mu butuukirivu, ne mu kwegendereza." 
1Timothy3:1 Kituufu nti: “Buli muntu ayagala okuba omulabirizi, aba yeegombye omulimu mulungi.”" 
1Timothy3:2 Omulabirizi ateekwa okuba nga taliiko ky'anenyezebwamu. Ateekwa okuba n'omukazi omu yekka. Ateekwa okuba nga yeefuga, mwegendereza, mukwata mpola, ayaniriza abagenyi, era ng'amanyi okuyigiriza." 
1Timothy3:3 Ateekwa okuba nga si mutamiivu, era nga si mukambwe, wabula abe nga muwombeefu, nga si muyombi, era nga talulunkanira byakufuna." 
1Timothy3:4 Ateekwa okuba ng'afuga bulungi amaka ge, n'abaana be nga bawulize, era nga ba mpisa." 
1Timothy3:5 Kale omuntu atasobola kufuga maka ge, asobola atya okulabirira ekibiina ky'abakkiririza Katonda mu Kristo?" 
1Timothy3:6 Omulabirizi tateekwa kuba muntu eyaakakkiriza Kristo, sikulwa nga yeekulumbaza, n'asalirwa omusango, nga Sitaani bwe yagusalirwa." 
1Timothy3:7 Ateekwa okuba ng'assibwamu ekitiibwa abo abatali ba mu kibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, aleme kubaako ky'anenyezebwamu, era aleme kugwa mu mutego gwa Sitaani." 
1Timothy3:8 Abadyakoni nabo basaana okuba abantu abassibwamu ekitiibwa, aboogera amazima, abatanywa mwenge mungi, era abatalulunkanira bya kufuna." 
1Timothy3:9 Basaana okukuuma ekyama ky'okukkiriza mu mwoyo omulungi. 
1Timothy3:10 Era basookenga kugezebwa, balyoke baweereze nga tebalina kye banenyezebwamu." 
1Timothy3:11 N'abakazi bwe batyo, nabo basaana okuba abassibwamu ekitiibwa, abatawaayiriza, abeegendereza, era abeesigwa mu buli kimu." 
1Timothy3:12 Omudyakoni ateekwa okuba n'omukazi omu yekka, era ng'asobola okufuga obulungi abaana be, n'amaka ge," 
1Timothy3:13 kubanga ababa bakoze obulungi mu budyakoni, bafuna ekifo ekya waggulu, era baba n'obuvumu bungi mu kukkiriza kwabwe mu Kristo Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Nsuubira okujja amangu gy'oli. Kyokka bino mbikuwandiikira," 
1Timothy3:15 ne bwe ndirwa, omanye bw'osaana okukola mu nnyumba ya Katonda, kye kibiina ky'abakkiriza Katonda Nnannyinibulamu, empagi era omusingi gw'amazima." 
1Timothy3:16 Tewali kubuusabuusa, ekyama ky'eddiini yaffe kikulu ddala, ekigamba nti: “Yalabika nga muntu ddala, n'akakasibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu. Yalabibwa bamalayika, n'amanyisibwa mu mawanga. Yakkirizibwa ab'omu nsi, n'atwalibwa waggulu mu kitiibwa.”" 
1Timothy4:1 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ayogera lwatu nti mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma, walibaawo abasuula okukkiriza, ne bagoberera emyoyo egiwubisa, era ne bagoberera enjigiriza za Sitaani," 
1Timothy4:2 nga bawubisibwa obukuusa bw'abantu abalimba, ab'emitima egiri ng'egyasiriizibwa ekyuma ekyengereredde." 
1Timothy4:3 Abo be baziyiza abantu okufumbiriganwa, era ababagaana okulya ebyokulya ebimu, Katonda bye yawa abakkiriza era abamanyi amazima, okubiryanga nga bamwebaza." 
1Timothy4:4 Kubanga buli kitonde kya Katonda kirungi, era tewali kizira, kasita kiriirwa mu kumwebaza," 
1Timothy4:5 kubanga kitukuzibwa n'ekigambo kya Katonda era n'okumusinza. 
1Timothy4:6 Bw'onootuusa ebigambo ebyo ku booluganda, onooba muweereza mulungi owa Kristo Yesu, ng'oliisibwa n'ebigambo eby'amazima eby'okukkiriza, n'enjigiriza ennungi gye wagoberera." 
1Timothy4:7 Naye enfumo ezitaliimu ddiini, ezitasaana kunyumizibwa, zeewalenga. Weemanyiize okussangamu Katonda ekitiibwa," 
1Timothy4:8 kubanga okwemanyiiza mu by'omubiri kugasa katono, naye okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa kugasa mu byonna, kubanga kuleeta essuubi ery'omu bulamu buno, era n'ery'obwo obugenda okujja." 
1Timothy4:9 Ekigambo ekyo kituufu era kisaana okukkiririza ddala. 
1Timothy4:10 Era kyetuva tutegana ne tufuba, kubanga essuubi lyaffe liri mu Katonda Nnannyinibulamu Omulokozi w'abantu bonna, na ddala ow'abo abakkiriza." 
1Timothy4:11 Abantu balagirenga ebyo, era obibayigirizenga." 
1Timothy4:12 Waleme kubaawo akunyooma olw'obuvubuka bwo, wabula mu kwogera ne mu mpisa, ne mu kwagala, ne mu kukkiriza, ne mu butukuvu, beeranga kyakulabirako eri abakkiriza." 
1Timothy4:13 Nyiikiriranga okusoma ebyawandiikibwa, n'okubuulirira abantu ebya Katonda, n'okubayigiriza okutuusa lwe ndijja." 
1Timothy4:14 Togayaaliriranga ekirabo ekiri mu ggwe kye waweebwa, abantu abakulu bwe baakussaako emikono gyabwe, ng'abalanzi bwe baayogera." 
1Timothy4:15 Ebyo birowoozenga era obissengako omwoyo, bonna balyoke balabe bwe weeyongera okukola obulungi." 
1Timothy4:16 Ebyo binywerereko, nga weekuuma mu mpisa zo, ne mu by'oyigiriza, kubanga bw'okola bw'otyo, olyerokola ggwe wennyini, era n'abo abakuwulira." 
1Timothy5:1 Toboggoleranga musajja mukadde, wabula mubuulirirenga nga kitaawo. Abavubuka babuulirirenga nga baganda bo, abakazi abakadde babuulirirenga nga bazadde bo," 
1Timothy5:2 n'abakazi abato babuulirirenga nga bannyoko, ng'omutima gwo mutukuvu ddala." 
1Timothy5:3 Bannamwandu, abayisa nga bannamwandu ddala, bassengamu ekitiibwa." 
1Timothy5:4 Nnamwandu bw'abanga n'abaana oba abazzukulu, basookenga okuyiga okutuukirizanga ebyo bye bateekwa okukolera ab'omu maka g'ewaabwe, bwe batyo babeeko kye basasula bakadde baabwe, kubanga ekyo kisanyusa Katonda." 
1Timothy5:5 Oyo aba nnamwandu ddala, asigadde yekka, aba yeetadde mu mikono gya Katonda, era anyiikira okwegayirira n'okusaba Katonda emisana n'ekiro." 
1Timothy5:6 Kyokka oyo nnamwandu eyeemalira mu masanyu, aba afudde, newaakubadde ng'akyali mulamu." 
1Timothy5:7 Ebyo bibalagire, baleme kubaako kye banenyezebwamu." 
1Timothy5:8 Kyokka oyo atafa ku babe, naddala ab'omu nnyumba ye, aba yeegaanye okukkiriza, era aba mubi okusinga atakkiriza." 
1Timothy5:9 Nnamwandu atannaweza myaka nkaaga, tomuwandiikanga mu bannamwandu. Era ateekwa kuba nga yafumbirwa omusajja omu." 
1Timothy5:10 Nnamwandu oyo ateekwa okuba nga yakolanga ebikolwa ebirungi: ng'okukuza obulungi abaana be, nga yayanirizanga abagenyi, nga yanaazanga ebigere by'abantu ba Katonda, nga yayambanga abali mu buzibu, era nga yeewangayo nnyo okukola obulungi mu buli ngeri." 
1Timothy5:11 Naye bannamwandu abakyali abato, tokkirizanga kubawandiika mu lubu lwa bannamwandu, kubanga omubiri bwe gulibalemesa okweweerayo ddala eri Kristo, balyagala okufumbirwa." 
1Timothy5:12 Bwe batyo ne bessaako omusango olw'obutatuukiriza ekyo kye baasooka okusuubiza. 
1Timothy5:13 N'ekirala, bayiga okwonoona ebiseera byabwe nga batambula okubuna amayumba. Si bagayaavu kyokka, naye era balina olugambo, era beeyingiza mu bitali byabwe, ne boogera n'ebitasaanira kwogera." 
1Timothy5:14 Kyenva njagala bannamwandu abakyali abato bafumbirwenga, bazaale abaana, era balabirire amaka gaabwe, baleme kuwa mulabe kkubo lya kutwogerako bubi," 
1Timothy5:15 kubanga bannamwandu abamu bakyamye, ne bagoberera Sitaani." 
1Timothy5:16 Naye bwe wabaawo omukkiriza alina bannamwandu ab'olulyo lwe, ye aba abalabiriranga, ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo kireme kuzitoowererwa, kiryoke kisobole okulabiriranga bannamwandu abataliiko abayamba." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakulembeze b'abakkiriza, abafuga obulungi, basaanira empeera nnene, naddala abo abafaabiina mu kutegeeza n'okuyigiriza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda," 
1Timothy5:18 kubanga ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Ente ng'ewuula eŋŋaano, togisibangako mumwa.” Era nti: “Omukozi asaanira empeera ye.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Tokkirizanga ebyo bye bavunaana omukulembeze, okuggyako nga biriko abajulirwa babiri oba basatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Kyokka abo aboonoona, banenyezenga mu lwatu, abalala balyoke batye." 
1Timothy5:21 Nkukuutirira mu maaso ga Katonda ne Kristo Yesu ne bamalayika abatukuvu, okugobereranga ebyo bulijjo, nga teweekubiira, wadde okusaliriza." 
1Timothy5:22 Toyanguyirizanga kussaako mikono gyo ku muntu n'omu. Teweetabanga mu bibi bya balala. Weekuume obeerenga mulongoofu. 
1Timothy5:23 Lekera awo okunywanga amazzi gokka, naye nywangako ne ku twenge tw'emizabbibu olw'olubuto lwo, n'olw'okulwalalwala kwo." 
1Timothy5:24 Ebibi by'abantu abamu birabika mu lwatu, nga tebannasalirwa musango, kyokka eby'abalala birabika luvannyuma." 
1Timothy5:25 N'ebikolwa ebirungi nabyo bwe bityo, birabika mu lwatu. Ne bwe biba nga tebirabise mu lwatu, tebirirema kulabika." 
1Timothy6:1 Abo bonna abali mu kikoligo ky'obuddu, basaana okussaamu ennyo bakama baabwe ekitiibwa, erinnya lya Katonda era n'okukkiriza kwaffe bireme kuvvoolebwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Abaddu abo abalina bakama baabwe abakkiriza, tebabanyoomanga olw'okuba baganda baabwe. Wabula beeyongere bweyongezi okubaweereza obulungi, kubanga abo abagasibwa olw'okuweereza kwabwe, bakkiriza era baagalwa. Ebyo bibayigirizenga era obibakuutirenga." 
1Timothy6:3 Buli muntu ayigiriza mu ngeri endala, nga takkiriziganya n'ebigambo ebituufu ebya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, n'enjigiriza etabagana n'okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa," 
1Timothy6:4 aba ajjudde akazoole k'okubuuzabuuza ku buli kintu n'okuwakana ku buli kigambo, ebivaamu obuggya, okuyomba, okuvuma, okuwaayira," 
1Timothy6:5 n'okukaayana. Ebyo byonna bikolebwa bantu abaayonooneka amagezi, abatakyalina mazima, abalowooza nti okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa kuba kwenoonyeza bya bugagga." 
1Timothy6:6 Weewaawo okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa kulimu obugagga bungi, singa omuntu amatira mu ebyo by'alina," 
1Timothy6:7 kubanga tetulina kye twajja nakyo mu nsi, era tetulina kye tuliggyamu nga tugivaamu." 
1Timothy6:8 Naye bwe tuba n'emmere n'ebyokwambala, ebyo bitumalenga." 
1Timothy6:9 Abo abaagala okugaggawala, bagwa mu kukemebwa, ne bakwatibwa okwegomba okungi okw'obusirusiru, era okw'akabi, okunnyika abantu mu kubula ne mu kuzikirira," 
1Timothy6:10 kubanga okululunkanira ensimbi, ye nsibuko y'ebibi byonna. Olw'okululunkana okwo, abamu bawabye, ne bava mu kukkiriza, ne beereetera obulumi bungi mu mitima gyabwe." 
1Timothy6:11 Naye ggwe omuntu wa Katonda, weewalenga ebyo byonna, ogobererenga obutuukirivu, okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, okukkiriza, okwagala, okugumiikiriza, n'obuteefu."
