1Timothy6:12 Lwana bulungi olutalo olw'okukkiriza, olyoke ofune obulamu obutaggwaawo Katonda bwe yakuyitira, n'oyatulira ddala okukkiriza kwo, mu maaso g'abajulirwa abangi." 
1Timothy6:13 Nkukuutirira mu maaso ga Katonda awa byonna obulamu, n'aga Yesu Kristo eyayatulira ddala amazima mu maaso ga Pontiyo Pilaato," 
1Timothy6:14 okuumenga kye nakulagira, oleme okubaako akamogo, wadde ky'onenyezebwamu, okutuusiza ddala Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo lw'alirabika." 
1Timothy6:15 Okujja kwe okwo, Katonda atenderezebwa era nnannyini buyinza, kabaka wa bakabaka era mukama w'abakama, alikuleeta mu kiseera kyakwo ekituufu." 
1Timothy6:16 Ye yekka atafa era abeera mu kitangaala ekitasemberekeka, tewali yali amulabye, era tewali ayinza kumulaba. Ye weekitiibwa era ye w'obuyinza obutaggwaawo. Amiina." 
1Timothy6:17 Labula abagagga ab'oku nsi kuno, baleme kwegulumiza, wadde okwesiga obugagga obutali bwa lubeerera, wabula beesige Katonda atuwa byonna ebitusanyusa." 
1Timothy6:18 Basaanye okukola obulungi, balyoke babe bagagga mu birungi bye bakola, era babe ba kisa era abagabi." 
1Timothy6:19 Bwe batyo beeterekere obugagga obulibagasa mu biseera ebirijja, ne bubafunyisa obulamu obwannamaddala." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoteewo, kuumanga kye wateresebwa. Weewalenga emboozi ezitassaamu Katonda kitiibwa, n'empaka ez'obusirusiru, abo abeerimba ze bayita ez'amagezi." 
1Timothy6:21 Abamu abagamba nti bagalina, bakyama ne bava mu kukkiriza. Katonda abakwatirwe mmwe ekisa." 
2Timothy1:1 Nze Pawulo, Katonda gwe yasiima okuba omutume wa Kristo Yesu, n'okutegeeza abantu ebifa ku bulamu obwatusuubizibwa, bwe tufunira mu Kristo Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 mpandiikira ggwe omwana wange omwagalwa Timoteewo. Katonda Kitaffe ne Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe bakukwatirwe ekisa, bakusaasire, era bakuwe emirembe." 
2Timothy1:3 Neebaza Katonda gwe mpeereza mu mwoyo omulungi, nga bajjajjange bwe baakola. Bulijjo mmwebaza bwe nkujjukira nga mmwegayirira emisana n'ekiro." 
2Timothy1:4 Bwe nzijukira amaziga ge wakaaba, neegomba okukulaba, ndyoke njijule essanyu." 
2Timothy1:5 Nzijukira okukkiriza kwo okw'amazima, era ne jjajjaawo Looyi ne nnyoko Ewuniike kwe baalina, era kaakati nkakasa nti naawe okulina," 
2Timothy1:6 kyenva nkujjukiza okuseesanga omuliro gw'ekirabo ekiri mu ggwe, Katonda kye yakuwa bwe nakussaako emikono gyange." 
2Timothy1:7 Mwoyo Katonda gwe yatuwa, tatufuula bati, wabula atujjuza amaanyi, n'okwagala n'okwegenderezanga." 
2Timothy1:8 N'olwekyo tokwatibwanga nsonyi okwogera ku bya Mukama waffe, wadde ku nze omusibe we; wabula naawe bonaabona olw'Amawulire Amalungi, ng'oyambibwa amaanyi ga Katonda," 
2Timothy1:9 eyatulokola, n'atuyita tube ababe. Ekyo yakikola nga tasinziira ku ebyo bye twakola, wabula ng'asinziira ku kuteesa kwe ne ku kisa kye, kye yatukwatirwa ng'ayita mu Yesu Kristo okuva edda n'edda lyonna." 
2Timothy1:10 Kaakano ekisa ekyo kitegeereddwa mu kulabika kw'Omulokozi waffe Kristo Yesu, eyaggyawo okufa, n'aleeta obulamu obutaggwaawo, ng'ayita mu Mawulire Amalungi." 
2Timothy1:11 Katonda yannonda ntegeeze abantu Amawulire Amalungi ng'omutume we era omuyigiriza," 
2Timothy1:12 era kyenva mbonaabona bwe ntyo. Kyokka sikwatibwa nsonyi, kubanga mmanyi gwe nakkiriza, era nkakasa nti ayinza okukuuma ekyo kye namuteresa, okutuusa ku lunaku luli." 
2Timothy1:13 Gobereranga ebigambo eby'amazima bye wawulira njogera, era nywereranga mu kukkiriza ne mu kwagala, bye tulina nga tuli mu Kristo Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Ekirungi eky'omuwendo kye wateresebwa kikuumenga, ng'oyambibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abeera mu ffe." 
2Timothy1:15 Omanyi nti ab'omu Asiya bonna banjabulira. Mu abo mwe muli Fugelo ne Erumogene. 
2Timothy1:16 Mukama akwatirwe ekisa ab'omu maka ga Onesiforo, kubanga yambeesabeesa emirundi mingi, era teyakwatibwa nsonyi olw'okubanga ndi musibe." 
2Timothy1:17 Bwe yatuuka e Rooma, yafuba nnyo okunnoonya, era n'anzuula." 
2Timothy1:18 Bw'alituuka mu maaso ga Mukama ku lunaku luli, Mukama amukwatirwe ekisa. Era ggwe omanyi bulungi nnyo byonna bye yakola mu Efeso." 
2Timothy2:1 Kale mwana wange, nywera ng'oyambibwa amaanyi Kristo Yesu g'atuwa." 
2Timothy2:2 Ebyo bye wawulira nga njogera mu maaso g'abajulirwa abangi, biyigirizenga abantu abeesigwa, abalisobola okubiyigiriza abalala." 
2Timothy2:3 Naawe bonaabona ng'omuserikale omulungi owa Kristo Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Tewali muserikale ali ku lutalo eyeeyingiza mu mitawaana egy'abantu abaabulijjo, kubanga ekiba kimuli ku mutima, kwe kusanyusa oyo eyamuwandiika okuba omuserikale." 
2Timothy2:5 Oyo eyeetaba mu mizannyo gy'empaka, taweebwa ngule ya buwanguzi bw'atagoberera biragiro." 
2Timothy2:6 Omulimi eyategana asaanira okusooka okufuna ku bibala. 
2Timothy2:7 Lowooza ku kye ŋŋamba, Mukama ajja kukuwa okutegeera byonna." 
2Timothy2:8 Jjukira nti Yesu Kristo, omuzzukulu wa Dawudi yazuukira, ng'Amawulire Amalungi ge ntegeeza abantu bwe gagamba." 
2Timothy2:9 Olw'Amawulire ago Amalungi kyenva mbonaabona, ne nsibibwa ng'omukozi w'ebibi. Naye ekigambo kya Katonda tekisibiddwa." 
2Timothy2:10 Kyenva ŋŋumira byonna olw'abalondemu ba Katonda, balyoke bafune okulokolebwa, n'ekitiibwa ekitaggwaawo, ebiri mu Yesu Kristo." 
2Timothy2:11 Ekigambo kino kya mazima ekigamba nti: “Oba nga twafiira wamu naye, era tulibeera balamu wamu naye." 
2Timothy2:12 Bwe tugumiikiriza awamu naye, era tulifugira wamu naye. Bwe tumwegaana, era naye alitwegaana." 
2Timothy2:13 Bwe tutaba beesigwa, ye aba mwesigwa, kubanga tayinza kwewakanya.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Ebyo obijjukizenga abantu bo ng'obakuutirira mu maaso ga Katonda, beewalenga okuwakana okutaliimu mugaso, okwonoona abo abawuliriza." 
2Timothy2:15 Fubanga okusiimibwa Katonda, ng'oli mukozi akola ebitakuswaza, era yigirizanga bulungi ekigambo eky'amazima." 
2Timothy2:16 Weewalenga ebigambo ebitassaamu Katonda kitiibwa, era ebitaliimu nsa, kubanga abantu bibongera bwongezi kunyooma Katonda." 
2Timothy2:17 Era ebigambo byabwe birirya nga kookolo. Mu abo mwe muli Yimenaayo ne Fileeto," 
2Timothy2:18 abaakyama ne bava ku mazima, nga bagamba nti okuzuukira kwabaawo dda. Era waliwo abamu be boonoonedde okukkiriza kwabwe." 
2Timothy2:19 Kyokka omusingi Katonda gwe yateekawo mugumu, era guliko akabonero, bye bigambo ebigamba nti: “Mukama amanyi ababe.” Era nti: “Buli ayatula erinnya lya Mukama, ave mu bibi.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Mu nnyumba ennene temubaamu bintu bya zaabu na bya ffeeza byokka, naye mubaamu n'eby'emiti, era n'eby'ebbumba. Ebimu bikozesebwa emirimu egyekitiibwa, n'ebirala egitali gyakitiibwa." 
2Timothy2:21 Buli eyeewala ebibi ebyo byonna, ye anaabanga ekintu ekyekitiibwa, ekitukuziddwa, ekisaanira buli mulimu omulungi." 
2Timothy2:22 N'olwekyo weewalenga okwegomba okubi okw'ekivubuka, ogobererenga obutuukirivu, okukkiriza, okwagalana era n'emirembe, ng'oli wamu n'abo abeegayirira Mukama." 
2Timothy2:23 Weewalenga empaka ez'obusirusiru, ezitaliimu magezi, kubanga omanyi nti zivaamu nnyombo." 
2Timothy2:24 Omuweereza wa Mukama tasaana kuyomba, wabula okuba ow'ekisa eri buli muntu, n'okuba omuyigiriza omulungi, agumiikiriza," 
2Timothy2:25 era ng'aluŋŋamya n'obwetoowaze abo abamuwakanya, osanga Katonda abawa okwenenya, ne bamanya amazima," 
2Timothy2:26 ne bava mu mutego gwa Sitaani gw'abakwasisizza, abakozese by'ayagala." 
2Timothy3:1 Kale manya kino nti mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma walibaawo ebiseera eby'akabi," 
2Timothy3:2 kubanga abantu baliba nga beefaako bokka, nga balulunkanira ebyokufuna, nga beenyumiriza, nga beepanka, nga bavvoola, era nga tebawulira babazaala. Baliba tebeebaza, nga tebafa ku bya Katonda," 
2Timothy3:3 nga tebaagalana, era nga tebatabagana; nga bawaayiriza, nga tebeegendereza, nga bakambwe, nga tebaagala birungi." 
2Timothy3:4 Baliba nga ba nkwe, nga bakakanyavu, nga beegulumiza, nga baagala amasanyu okusinga bwe baagala Katonda;" 
2Timothy3:5 nga kungulu balabika ng'abassaamu eddiini ekitiibwa, sso nga tebakkiriza maanyi gaayo. Abantu abo beewalenga." 
2Timothy3:6 Mu abo mulimu abasensera mu mayumba, ne bawamba abakazi abasirusiru, abajjudde ebibi, era abatwalibwa okwegomba okubi okwa buli ngeri," 
2Timothy3:7 abayiga bulijjo, naye ne batayinziza ddala kutegeera mazima." 
2Timothy3:8 Bali nga Yene ne Yambure abaawakanya Musa. Ne bano bwe batyo bawakanya amazima. Be bantu abaayonooneka amagezi, abatakyalina kukkiriza kutuufu." 
2Timothy3:9 Naye tebalina gye balaga, kubanga obusirusiru bwabwe bujja kumanyibwa abantu bonna, ng'obwa Yane ne Yambure bwe bwamanyibwa." 
2Timothy3:10 Naye ggwe wagoberera okuyigiriza kwange, n'empisa zange, ne kye nduubirira. Era wagoberera okukkiriza kwange, n'okwagala kwange. Era omanyi nga bwe nagumira" 
2Timothy3:11 okuyigganyizibwa n'okubonyaabonyezebwa, ebyantuukako mu Antiyookiya, mu Yikoniyo ne mu Lisitura. Ddala nayigganyizibwa nnyo! Kyokka Mukama yamponya mu byonna." 
2Timothy3:12 Era bonna abaagala okuba mu bulamu obussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa nga bali mu Kristo Yesu, ba kuyigganyizibwanga." 
2Timothy3:13 Naye abantu ababi, n'abalimba balyeyongera okuba ababi, ne babuzaabuza abalala, era nabo ne babuzibwabuzibwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Naye ggwe nywereranga mu ebyo bye wayiga era n'obikkiririza ddala, ng'omanyi abaabikuyigiriza." 
2Timothy3:15 Okuva mu buto bwo, wamanya ebyawandiikibwa ebitukuvu ebiyinza okukugeziwaza, n'olokolebwa olw'okukkiriza Kristo Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Ebyawandiikibwa byonna Ebitukuvu, Katonda ye yabiruŋŋamya, era bigasa mu kuyigiriza, mu kunenya, mu kuluŋŋamya, ne mu kugunjula omuntu akolenga ebituufu," 
2Timothy3:17 omuntu wa Katonda alyoke abe ng'atuukiridde, ng'alina byonna ebyetaagibwa okukola buli mulimu omulungi." 
2Timothy4:1 Nkukuutirira mu maaso ga Katonda ne Kristo Yesu, alisalira abalamu n'abafu omusango, era nkukuutira olw'okujja kwe, n'olw'Obwakabaka bwe," 
2Timothy4:2 tegeezanga abantu ekigambo kya Katonda, ng'onyiikira okuyigirizanga mu biseera ebirungi n'ebitali birungi. Nenyanga, kangavvulanga, era buuliriranga abantu, ng'oli mugumiikiriza." 
2Timothy4:3 Ekiseera kijja, abantu lwe baligaana okuwulira enjigiriza ey'amazima, era olw'okugoberera okwegomba kwabwe, balyekuŋŋaanyiza abayigiriza, ababayigiriza ebyo bye baagala." 
2Timothy4:4 Baligaana okuwuliriza eby'amazima, ne bagoberera enfumo obufumo." 
2Timothy4:5 Naye ggwe beeranga mwetegefu bulijjo, gumiranga okubonyaabonyezebwa, okolenga omulimu ogw'okutegeeza abantu Amawulire Amalungi, otuukirize omulimu gwe waweebwa." 
2Timothy4:6 Nze ndi kumpi okutambirwa. Ekiseera kyange eky'okuva ku nsi kituuse. 
2Timothy4:7 Nnwanye bulungi, mmalirizza olugendo lwange, nkuumye okukkiriza kwange." 
2Timothy4:8 Kye nsigazza kwe kufuna engule ey'obutuukirivu, Mukama omulamuzi omwenkanya gy'alimpeera ku lunaku luli. Taligiwa nze nzekka, naye aligiwa n'abo bonna, abeegomba okujja kwe." 
2Timothy4:9 Fuba okujja amangu gye ndi," 
2Timothy4:10 kubanga Dema yandekawo ng'ayagala eby'oku nsi kuno, n'agenda e Tessalonika. Kuresike yagenda Galatiya, ne Tito n'agenda e Dalumatiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Lukka yekka ye ali nange. Ggyayo Mariko omuleete, kubanga annyamba nnyo ku mulimu." 
2Timothy4:12 Tukiko namutuma mu Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Bw'obanga ojja, ondeeteranga ekkooti yange gye naleka e Turoowa ewa Karipo. Ondeeteranga n'ebitabo, naddala ebyo eby'amaliba." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekizanda omuweesi w'ebikomo yankola bubi nnyo. Mukama alimusasula olw'ebyo bye yakola. 
2Timothy4:15 Naawe mwekuume, kubanga yawakanya nnyo ebigambo byaffe." 
2Timothy4:16 Mu kuwoza kwange okwasooka, tewali n'omu yannyamba, bonna banjabulira. Nsaba Katonda, ekyo kireme kubavunaanibwa." 
2Timothy4:17 Naye Mukama yabeera nange, n'ampa amaanyi, ne nsobola okutegeereza ddala ab'amawanga amalala bonna ekigambo kya Katonda, ne bakiwulira, bw'atyo n'anzigya mu kamwa k'empologoma." 
2Timothy4:18 Era Mukama anamponyanga mu buli kabi, era alintuusa mirembe mu Bwakabaka bwe obw'omu ggulu. Mukama oyo aweebwenga ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
2Timothy4:19 Lamusa Priska ne Akwila, n'ab'omu maka ga Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto yasigala mu Korinto, ate Turofimo namuleka mu Mileeto nga mulwadde." 
2Timothy4:21 Fuba nnyo ojje ng'ekiseera eky'obutiti tekinnatuuka. Ewubulo ne Pudente ne Liino ne Kulawudiyo, awamu n'abooluganda bonna bakulamusizza." 
2Timothy4:22 Mukama abeere naawe, era akukwatirwe ekisa." 
Titus1:1 Nze Pawulo omuweereza wa Katonda, era omutume wa Yesu Kristo. Natumibwa nnyongere mu balondemu ba Katonda okukkiriza, era mbamanyise amazima g'eddiini yaffe," 
Titus1:2 ageesigamye ku kusuubira obulamu obutaggwaawo, Katonda atayinza kulimba bwe yatusuubiza okuva edda n'edda lyonna." 
Titus1:3 Ekiseera bwe kyatuuka, obulamu obwo n'abulagira mu bigambo, bye yankwasa mbitegeeze abantu, nga Katonda Omulokozi waffe bwe yalagira." 
Titus1:4 Nkuwandiikira ggwe Tito omwana wange ddala, mu kukkiriza kwaffe ffenna. Katonda Kitaffe ne Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe bakukwatirwe ekisa, era bakuwe emirembe." 
Titus1:5 Nakuleka mu Kureete, olyoke otereeze ebyo ebyetaaga okutereezebwa, era oteekewo abakulembeze b'ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo, mu buli kibuga, nga bwe nakulagira." 
Titus1:6 Oyo gw'olonda, asaanye okuba nga taliiko ky'anenyezebwamu, era ng'alina omukazi omu. Abaana be bateekwa okuba nga bakkiriza, era nga tebabalirwa mu balalulalu, wadde mu batali bawulize," 
Titus1:7 kubanga omulabirizi nga bw'ali omuweereza wa Katonda, ateekwa okuba nga taliiko ky'anenyezebwamu, nga teyeekulumbaza, nga tasunguwala mangu, nga tatamiira, nga si mukambwe, era nga talulunkanira byakufuna." 
Titus1:8 Wabula ateekwa okuba ng'amanyi okwaniriza abagenyi, era ng'ayagala obulungi, nga mwegendereza, nga mwenkanya, nga mutukuvu, era ng'amanyi okwefuga." 
Titus1:9 Ateekwa okuba omuntu anywerera ku bigambo eby'amazima, nga bwe yabiyigirizibwa, alyoke asobole okunnyonnyola abantu enjigiriza entuufu, era n'okulaga obukyamu bw'abo abagiwakanya." 
Titus1:10 Waliwo bangi abajeemu, naddala abamu ku bakomole, aboogera ebitaliimu era abalimba." 
Titus1:11 Abo basaanye okusirisibwa, kubanga boonoona buli maka, nga bayigiriza ebitasaana, balyoke beefunire amagoba amabi." 
Titus1:12 Omu mu bo, era omulanzi yagamba nti: “Ab'e Kureete bulijjo balimba; zensolo embi, ze mbuto engayaavu!”" 
Titus1:13 Kye yagamba kya mazima. N'olwekyo, oteekwa okubanenyanga n'amaanyi, balyoke babe n'okukkiriza okutuufu." 
Titus1:14 Balemenga okussa omutima ku nfumo ez'obulimba ez'Ekiyudaaya, wadde ku biragiro, abantu abagaana amazima bye bagunja." 
Titus1:15 Eri abalongoofu, ebintu byonna biba birongoofu. Naye eri abo abatali balongoofu n'abatakkiriza, tewaba kirongoofu, kubanga amagezi gaabwe n'ebirowoozo byabwe byayonooneka." 
Titus1:16 Bagamba nti bamanyi Katonda, naye mu bikolwa byabwe bamwegaana. Bagwenyufu era bajeemu; tebasaanira mulimu mulungi na gumu." 
Titus2:1 Naye ggwe yigirizanga ebyo ebitabagana n'enjigiriza entuufu. 
Titus2:2 Kubirizanga abasajja abakulu babenga bateefu, abassibwamu ekitiibwa, abeegendereza, abatuukiridde mu kukkiriza, mu kwagala, ne mu kugumiikiriza." 
Titus2:3 Abakazi abakulu nabo bakubirizenga bw'otyo, babenga n'empisa ezisaanira abantu ba Katonda, nga tebawaayiriza, era nga tebatamiira. Bateekwa okuyigirizanga ebirungi," 
Titus2:4 balyoke bagunjule abakazi abato okwagalanga babbaabwe n'abaana baabwe. 
Titus2:5 Era babenga beegendereza, abakola obulungi emirimu mu maka gaabwe; ab'ekisa era abawulize eri babbaabwe, ekigambo kya Katonda kiremenga kuvvoolebwa." 
Titus2:6 N'abavubuka bakubirizenga babenga beegendereza. 
Titus2:7 Era ggwe oteekwa okuba ekyokulabirako ekirungi mu byonna by'okola, ng'oli mwesimbu era ow'amazima mu kuyigiriza kwo." 
Titus2:8 Buli ky'oyogera kiteekwa okuba ekituufu, era nga tekiriiko kye kinenyezebwamu, oyo akiwakanya alyoke aswale, olw'obutaba na kibi ky'atwogerako." 
Titus2:9 Kubirizanga abaddu bawulirenga bakama baabwe, era babasanyusenga mu byonna, nga tebabawakanya," 
Titus2:10 wadde okubabbako ebyabwe. Naye balagenga obwesigwa obw'amazima mu byonna, abantu balyoke basiime enjigiriza ya Katonda Omulokozi waffe." 
Titus2:11 Kubanga ekisa kya Katonda ekireetera abantu bonna okulokolebwa kirabise. 
Titus2:12 Era kituyigiriza okulekayo obutassaamu Katonda kitiibwa, n'okulekayo okwegomba kw'ensi, tulyoke tube bateefu, abeesimbu, era abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa nga tuli ku nsi kuno," 
Titus2:13 era tube nga tulindirira olunaku olw'omukisa lwe tusuubira, era nga tulindirira okulabika kw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda omukulu era Omulokozi waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Titus2:14 Kristo oyo yeewaayo ku lwaffe, alyoke atununule mu bibi byaffe byonna, atufuule abantu be abalongoofu, abanyiikirira okukola ebirungi." 
Titus2:15 Ebyo by'obanga oyogera ng'obuulirira, era ng'onenya abantu bo n'obuyinza bwonna. Tewabangawo akunyooma." 
Titus3:1 Jjukizanga abantu bo beegenderezenga abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza, babawulirenga, era babenga beetegefu okukola buli mulimu omulungi." 
Titus3:2 Bakuutire balemenga kwogera bubi ku muntu n'omu, era beewalenga okuyomba; babenga bakkakkamu, era bassengamu abantu bonna ekitiibwa," 
Titus3:3 kubanga naffe ffennyini edda twali basirusiru era bajeemu, nga tuwabye, era nga tufugibwa okwegomba kwaffe okubi, n'amasanyu aga buli ngeri. Twali ba ttima era ab'obuggya, nga tukyayibwa, era nga tukyawagana." 
Titus3:4 Naye ekisa kya Katonda Omulokozi waffe, n'okwagala kwe, kw'ayagalamu abantu bwe byalabika," 
Titus3:5 n'atulokola, si lwa bikolwa byaffe ebirungi bye twakola, wabula lwa kusaasira kwe. Yatulokola ng'atunaaza, ne tuzaalibwa omulundi ogwokubiri, ne tufuuka abaggya olwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Titus3:6 gwe yatubunduggulako ku bwa Yesu Kristo Omulokozi waffe. 
Titus3:7 Ekyo yakikola tulyoke tutukuzibwe olw'ekisa kye, era tuweebwe obulamu obutaggwaawo, bwe tusuubira." 
Titus3:8 Ekyo kya mazima. Era ebyo njagala obikakasizenga ddala, abakkiriza Katonda balyoke beemalirenga ku kukola ebikolwa ebirungi. Ebyo birungi era bigasa abantu." 
Titus3:9 Naye weewalenga empaka ez'obusiru, n'okukaayana ku nkalala z'amannya g'abajjajja b'abantu. Era weewalenga okuwakanira ebikwata ku Mateeka. Kubanga ebyo tebiriiko kye bigasa, era bya bwereere." 
Titus3:10 Oyo aleetera abantu obutassa kimu, bw'omalanga okumulabula omulundi ogusooka era n'ogwokubiri, ng'omuleka," 
Titus3:11 kubanga omanyi nti omuntu ng'oyo aba mukyamu, era mwonoonyi, era aba yeesalidde yekka omusango okumusinga." 
Titus3:12 Bwe ndikutumira Aritema oba Tukiko, oyanguwanga okujja gye ndi mu Nikopoli, kubanga eyo gye mmaliridde okubeera mu biseera eby'obutiti." 
Titus3:13 Fuba nga bw'osobola okutegekera Zeena munnamateeka ne Apollo olugendo lwabwe, era olabe nti balina buli kimu kye beetaaga." 
Titus3:14 Era kubiriza abantu baffe bayige okukolanga emirimu omuva ebyetaagibwa, balemenga kubeera awo nga tebaliiko kye bagasa." 
Titus3:15 Bonna abali nange bakulamusizza. Lamusa abatwagala, bwe tulina okukkiriza okumu. Katonda akukwatirwenga ekisa." 
Philemon1:1 Nze Pawulo eyasibibwa olwa Kristo Yesu, era ne Timoteewo muganda waffe, tuwandiikira ggwe Filemooni omwagalwa, era mukozi munnaffe," 
Philemon1:2 ne Affiya mwannyinaffe, ne Arukipo muserikale munnaffe, n'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo ekikuŋŋaanira mu nnyumba yo." 
Philemon1:3 Katonda Kitaffe, ne Mukama Yesu Kristo babakwatirwe mmwe ekisa, era babawe emirembe." 
Philemon1:4 Bulijjo nkusabira bwe mba nga nsinza Katonda wange, ne mmwebaza," 
Philemon1:5 kubanga bambuulira nga bw'okkiriza Mukama waffe Yesu, era nga bw'oyagala abantu ba Katonda bonna." 
Philemon1:6 Era nsaba Katonda nti okussa ekimu n'abalala mu kukkiriza kwo, kukusobozese okutegeerera ddala ebirungi byonna bye tufunira mu Kristo." 
Philemon1:7 Owooluganda, okwagala kwo kunsanyusa nnyo ne njaguza, kubanga emitima gy'abantu ba Katonda wagizzaamu amaanyi." 
Philemon1:8 Kale newaakubadde nga ku lwange nandisobodde okukulagira ky'osaanidde okukola," 
Philemon1:9 naye okwagala kumpalirizza okukwegayirira obwegayirizi, newaakubadde nga ndi Pawulo, omubaka wa Kristo era kaakano omusibe we." 
Philemon1:10 Nkwegayirira olw'omwana wange Onesimo, gwe nzaalidde mu busibe bwange." 
Philemon1:11 Edda yali takugasa, naye kaakano ffembi, ggwe nange, atugasa." 
Philemon1:12 Mmukuweerezza, ye gwe mutima gwange." 
Philemon1:13 Nandyagadde mbeere naye wano, annyambe mu kifo kyo, mu busibe bwange olw'Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philemon1:14 Naye saagadde kukola kintu na kimu nga tokkirizza. Nandyagadde ekirungi ky'okola okikole nga towaliriziddwa, wabula nga weeyagalidde." 
Philemon1:15 Kiyinzika nti Onesimo yakwawukanako akaseera akatono, olyoke omweddize, abeerenga naawe bulijjo," 
Philemon1:16 kaakano nga takyali muddu buddu, wabula nga wa muwendo okusinga omuddu, kubanga waaluganda omwagalwa, naddala eri nze. Ate eri ggwe kisingawo, kubanga muganda wo mu mubiri, ate era muganda wo mu Mukama waffe." 
Philemon1:17 Kale oba nga ndi munno, yaniriza Onesimo nga bwe wandiyanirizza nze." 
Philemon1:18 Oba ng'aliko kye yakusobya, oba oliko ky'omubanja, ebyo bisse ku nze." 
Philemon1:19 Nze Pawulo mpandiise n'omukono gwange gwennyini, nti nze ndisasula, newaakubadde nga naawe wennyini, obulamu bwo nze mbuyimirizzaawo." 
Philemon1:20 Kale owooluganda, njagala nkufunemu omugaso mu Mukama, omutima gwange oguzzeemu amaanyi mu Kristo." 
Philemon1:21 Olw'obuwulize bwo, mpandiise nga neesiga nti ojja kukola kye ŋŋamba." 
Philemon1:22 Era ekirala, ntegekera aw'okusula, kubanga nsuubira nti olw'okusaba kwammwe, ndibaddizibwa." 
Philemon1:23 Epafura, musibe munnange olwa Kristo Yesu, akulamusizza." 
Philemon1:24 Era Mariko ne Arisitaruuko ne Dema era ne Lukka bakozi bannange, nabo bakulamusizza. 14; 2 Tim 4:10,11" 
Philemon1:25 Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo abakwatirwenga mmwe ekisa. 
Hebrews1:1 Edda Katonda yayogeranga ne bajjajjaffe emirundi mingi era mu ngeri nnyingi, ng'ayita mu balanzi." 
Hebrews1:2 Naye mu biseera bino eby'oluvannyuma, ayogedde naffe ng'ayita mu Mwana we, gwe yateekawo okuweebwa byonna, era gwe yayitamu okutonda ebintu byonna." 
Hebrews1:3 Mu ye ekitiibwa kya Katonda mwe kirabikira, era mu ye mwe tulabira ddala Katonda nga bw'afaanana. Era ye awanirira ebintu byonna n'amaanyi g'ekigambo kye. Bwe yamala okusobozesa ebibi by'abantu okusonyiyibwa, n'atuula mu ggulu ku ludda olwa ddyo olwa Katonda Nnannyinibuyinza." 
Hebrews1:4 Omwana yaweebwa ekitiibwa ekisinga ekya bamalayika, nga bwe yaweebwa erinnya erisinga agaabwe." 
Hebrews1:5 Kubanga ani ku bamalayika, Katonda gwe yali agambye nti: “Oli Mwana wange, olwaleero nkuzadde”? Oba nti: “Ndiba Kitaawe, naye n'aba Mwana wange”?" 
Hebrews1:6 Era ate Katonda bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okutuma mu nsi Omwana we omuggulanda, yagamba nti: “Bamalayika ba Katonda bonna bamusinzenga.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Bw'ayogera ku bamalayika agamba nti: “Katonda afuula bamalayika be ng'empewo, n'abaweereza be abafuula ennimi ng'ez'omuliro.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Kyokka bw'ayogera ku Mwana, agamba nti: “Entebe yo ey'obwakabaka, ayi Katonda, ebeerawo emirembe n'emirembe. N'obwakabaka bwo obufugisa bwenkanya." 
Hebrews1:9 Oyagala abantu bakole ebituufu, n'okyawa abantu okukola ebikyamu. Katonda, Katonda wo, kyeyava akufukako omuzigo okukuwa ekitiibwa, n'osanyuka okusinga banno.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Era agamba nti: “Ggwe, Mukama, mu kusooka watonda ensi, n'eggulu ggwe walikola wennyini." 
Hebrews1:11 Byo biriggwaawo, naye ggwe oli wa lubeerera. Byonna birikaddiwa ng'ekyambalo." 
Hebrews1:12 Olibizingako ng'omunagiro, era birikyusibwa ng'ekyambalo. Naye ggwe tokyukako, n'obulamu bwo tebulikoma.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Kale ani ku bamalayika, Katonda gwe yali agambye nti: “Tuula ku ludda lwange olwa ddyo, okutuusa lwe ndifuula abalabe bo, ekirinnyibwako ebigere byo”?" 
Hebrews1:14 Kale bamalayika bonna, si gye myoyo egiweereza Katonda, gy'atuma okuyamba abo ab'okulokolebwa?" 
Hebrews2:1 N'olwekyo kyetuva tuteekwa okunywerera ddala ku ebyo bye twawulira, sikulwa nga tubivaako." 
Hebrews2:2 Oba ng'ebyo ebyayogerwa bamalayika byakakasibwa nga bya mazima, era buli ataabigobereranga, oba eyabijeemeranga, yaweebwanga ekibonerezo ekimusaanira," 
Hebrews2:3 kale ffe tuliwona tutya ekibonerezo, bwe tuligayaalirira obulokozi obukulu obwenkana awo? Obwo Mukama yennyini ye yasooka okubutegeeza abantu, era abo abaabuwulira, ne batukakasa nga bwe buli obw'amazima." 
Hebrews2:4 Ne Katonda yennyini n'akakasa ebigambo byabwe, ng'akola ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero era n'eby'amaanyi ebitali bimu, era ng'agaba n'ebirabo bya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu nga bwe yayagala." 
Hebrews2:5 Katonda teyawa bamalayika kufuga nsi gye twogerako, egenda okubaawo." 
Hebrews2:6 Naye omu, waliwo w'akakasiza mu byawandiikibwa, ng'agamba nti: “Omuntu ataliiko bw'ali, lwaki omulowoozaako? Era omuntu obuntu, lwaki omulumirwa?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wamutonda n'abulako katono okwenkana bamalayika. Wamutikkira engule eyeekitiibwa n'ettendo, n'omuwa okufuga ebintu byonna bye wakola." 
Hebrews2:8 Ebintu byonna wabiteeka mu buyinza bwe.” Bwe yassa ebintu byonna mu buyinza bwe, talina kintu na kimu ky'ataamuwa kufuga. Naye kaakano tetunnalaba nga byonna abifuga." 
Hebrews2:9 Wabula gwe tulaba ye Yesu. Olw'ekisa kya Katonda, yakolebwa n'abulako katono okwenkana bamalayika, alyoke afiirire abantu bonna. Tumulaba ng'atikkiddwa engule eyeekitiibwa n'ettendo, olw'okufa kwe." 
Hebrews2:10 Katonda eyatonda ebintu byonna era abibeesaawo, yasiima okuleeta abaana be abangi mu kitiibwa. N'olwekyo yalaba nga kisaanye okutuukiriza omukulu w'obulokozi bwabwe, ng'ayita mu kubonaabona," 
Hebrews2:11 kubanga abo abatukuzibwa era n'oyo abatukuza, bonna balina Kitaabwe omu. Era Yesu kyava takwatibwa nsonyi okubayita baganda be." 
Hebrews2:12 Agamba nti: “Ndikumanyisa mu baganda bange, ndikutenderereza mu kkuŋŋaaniro wakati.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Era agamba nti: “Nja kwesiganga Katonda.” Era yeeyongera n'agamba nti: “Ndi wano n'abaana, Katonda be yampa.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Kale abo Yesu b'ayita abaana nga bwe bali abantu, naye yennyini yafuuka omuntu nga bo. Yakola bw'atyo, alyoke asobole okufa, era mu kufa kwe, azikirize Sitaani alina obuyinza ku kufa," 
Hebrews2:15 bw'atyo alyoke awe eddembe abo bonna abaali abaddu obulamu bwabwe bwonna olw'entiisa y'okufa. 
Hebrews2:16 Mazima, bamalayika si be yajjirira okuyamba, wabula yajjirira kuyamba bazzukulu ba Aburahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Kyeyava afaanana nga baganda be mu byonna, alyoke aweereze Katonda nga Ssaabakabona ow'ekisa era omwesigwa, asonyiyisa abantu ebibi byabwe." 
Hebrews2:18 Era kaakano asobola okuyamba abo abakemebwa, kubanga ye yennyini yakemebwa era n'abonaabona." 
Hebrews3:1 Kale abooluganda era abantu ba Katonda, abaayitibwa okugabana ku bulamu obw'omu ggulu, mulowooze ku Yesu, Omutume era Ssaabakabona ow'eddiini gye tukkiriza." 
Hebrews3:2 Yali mwesigwa eri Katonda eyamulonda okukola omulimu ogwo, nga Musa bwe yali omwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda yonna." 
Hebrews3:3 Naye ng'omuzimbi bw'aba n'ekitiibwa ekisinga eky'ennyumba gye yazimba, bw'atyo ne Yesu asaanira ekitiibwa ekisinga ekya Musa." 
Hebrews3:4 Buli nnyumba ebaako eyagizimba. Naye eyazimba byonna ye Katonda. 
Hebrews3:5 Ne Musa yali mwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda yonna. Yali muweereza eyakakasa ebyo Katonda bye yali agenda okwogera. 
Hebrews3:6 Kyokka Kristo mwesigwa ng'Omwana akulira ennyumba ya Katonda. Ffe nnyumba ya Katonda, kasita tusigala bulijjo nga tuli banywevu, nga tulina essuubi eryo lye tweyagaliramu." 
Hebrews3:7 Kale nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bw'agamba: “Olwa leero bwe muwulira eddoboozi lye," 
Hebrews3:8 temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe, nga bajjajjammwe bwe baajeema ku lunaku lwe baakemerako Katonda mu ddungu." 
Hebrews3:9 Eyo gye bankemera ne bangeza, ne balaba bye nakola mu myaka amakumi ana." 
Hebrews3:10 Kyennava nsunguwalira abantu abo, ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Bulijjo baba bakyamu mu kulowooza kwabwe, tebamanyanga mateeka gange.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Nasunguwala ne ndayira nti: ‘Siribawa kiwummulo n'akatono.’ ” 
Hebrews3:12 Kale, abooluganda, mwegendereze, waleme kubaawo n'omu ku mmwe aba n'omutima omukakanyavu era ogutakkiriza, n'ava ku Katonda Nnannyinibulamu." 
Hebrews3:13 Mu kifo ky'okuva ku Katonda, mubuuliriragane buli lunaku, nga “Olwaleero” lukyaliwo, waleme kubaawo n'omu ku mmwe obulimba bw'ekibi gwe bukakanyaza omutima," 
Hebrews3:14 kubanga twafuuka abassa ekimu mu Kristo, kasita tunywereza ddala obwesige bwaffe bwe twatandika nabwo, ne tubutuusa ku nkomerero." 
Hebrews3:15 Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Olwaleero bwe munaawulira eddoboozi lya Katonda, temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe, nga bajjajjammwe bwe beewaggula ku Katonda.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Be baani abaawulira eddoboozi lya Katonda ne bamujeemera? Be bo bonna Musa be yakulembera n'abaggya mu Misiri. 
Hebrews3:17 Era be baani Katonda be yasunguwalira okumala emyaka amakumi ana? Be bo abaayonoona, ne bafa, era emirambo gyabwe ne gisigala mu ddungu." 
Hebrews3:18 Era be baani be yalayirira obutayingira mu kiwummulo kye? Be bo abaamujeemera. 
Hebrews3:19 Kale tulaba nti baalemwa okuyingira lwa butakkiriza bwabwe. 
Hebrews4:1 Ekyo Katonda kye yatusuubiza eky'okuyingira mu kiwummulo kye, kikyaliwo. Kale tutye, sikulwa nga wabaawo ku mmwe alemwa okuyingira mu kiwummulo ekyo." 
Hebrews4:2 Naffe twawulira Amawulire Amalungi, nga nabo bwe baagawulira. Naye bye baawulira, tebyabagasa, kubanga bwe baabiwulira, tebaabikkiriza." 
Hebrews4:3 Ffe abakkiriza, ffe tuyingira mu kiwummulo ekyo, nga Katonda bwe yagamba nti: “Nasunguwala ne ndayira nti: ‘Siribawa kiwummulo n'akatono.’ ” Kino yakyogera, newaakubadde ng'emirimu gye gyaggwa, bwe yamala okutonda ensi." 
Hebrews4:4 Olunaku olw'omusanvu lulina we lwogererwako, awagamba nti: “Katonda n'awummula emirimu gye gyonna ku lunaku olw'omusanvu.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Kino era kyogerwako nti: “Siribawa kiwummulo n'akatono.” 
Hebrews4:6 Abo abaasooka okuwulira Amawulire Amalungi, tebaayingira mu kiwummulo ekyo, olw'obutakkiriza bwabwe. N'olwekyo waliwo abalala abakkirizibwa okuyingira." 
Hebrews4:7 Ekyo kiri bwe kityo, kubanga Katonda yateekawo olunaku oluyitibwa “Leero.” Nga wayiseewo emyaka mingi, Katonda alwogerako ng'ayita mu Dawudi, nga bwe twagambye waggulu nti: “Leero bwe munaawulira eddoboozi lya Katonda, temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Singa Yoswa yabatuusa mu kiwummulo, oluvannyuma Katonda teyandyogedde ku lunaku lulala." 
Hebrews4:9 N'olwekyo abantu ba Katonda bakyalinawo ekiwummulo eky'oku lunaku olw'omusanvu," 
Hebrews4:10 kubanga buli muntu, Katonda gw'awa ekiwummulo, awummula emirimu gye, nga Katonda bwe yawummula egigye." 
Hebrews4:11 Kale tufubenga okufuna ekiwummulo ekyo, waleme kubaawo alemwa kuyingira olw'okujeema nga bali." 
Hebrews4:12 Ekigambo kya Katonda kiramu era kikola, era kyogi okusinga ekitala ekirina obwogi ku njuuyi zaakyo zombi. Kiyingirira ddala munda, ne kituuka n'okwawula omutima n'omwoyo, ennyingo n'obusomyo, era kyekenneenya ebirowoozo n'okufumiitiriza okw'omu mutima." 
Hebrews4:13 Tewali kitonde na kimu kiyinza kwekweka Katonda. Ebintu byonna byeruliddwa era birabibwa Katonda, era oyo gwe tugenda okuwoleza." 
Hebrews4:14 Kale tunywereze ddala okukkiriza kwaffe kwe twatula, kubanga tulina Ssaabakabona omukulu bw'atyo, Yesu Omwana wa Katonda, eyayingirira ddala eri Katonda." 
Hebrews4:15 Ssaabakabona gwe tulina, alumirwa wamu naffe, mu bunafu bwaffe, kubanga mu byonna yakemebwa nga ffe bwe tukemebwa, kyokka n'atakola kibi." 
Hebrews4:16 Kale tugume okusemberera entebe ya Katonda nnannyini kisa, alyoke atusaasire, era atukwatirwe ekisa buli lwe tuba twetaaga okuyambibwa." 
Hebrews5:1 Buli ssaabakabona, alondebwa mu bantu n'ateekebwawo okuweereza Katonda ku lwabwe. Awaayo ebirabo n'ebitambiro eri Katonda olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Hebrews5:2 Asobola okukwata empola abo abatamanyi n'abawaba, kubanga naye yennyini munafu mu bintu bingi." 
Hebrews5:3 Era olw'obunafu obwo, ateekwa okuwaayo ebitambiro olw'ebibi bye, nga bw'awaayo olw'ebibi by'abantu abalala." 
Hebrews5:4 Tewali ayinza kwewa kitiibwa ekyo, okuggyako oyo Katonda gw'ayise, nga Arooni bwe yayitibwa." 
Hebrews5:5 Bw'atyo ne Kristo teyeewa yekka kitiibwa kya bwa ssaabakabona, wabula kyamuweebwa Katonda eyamugamba nti: “Oli Mwana wange, olwaleero nkuzadde.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Era awalala Katonda agamba nti: “Ggwe oli kabona emirembe gyonna, mu lubu lwa Melikizeddeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Yesu mu bulamu bwe obw'oku nsi, mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka ne mu maziga, yeegayirira era n'asaba Katonda eyalina obuyinza okumuwonya okufa. Era yawulirwa, kubanga yassangamu Katonda ekitiibwa." 
Hebrews5:8 Newaakubadde nga yali Mwana wa Katonda, yayiga obuwulize, ng'abuyigira mu ebyo bye yabonaabonamu." 
Hebrews5:9 Bwe yamala okutuukirira, n'afuuka ensulo y'obulokozi obutaggwaawo eri abo bonna abamugondera," 
Hebrews5:10 era Katonda n'amufuula Ssaabakabona mu lubu lwa Melikizeddeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Tulina bingi eby'okwogera ku ekyo, era ebizibu okubannyonnyola, kubanga muteegera mpola." 
Hebrews5:12 Kuba newaakubadde nga kaakano mwandibadde muli bayigiriza, naye era mukyetaaga ow'okubayigiriza ebisookerwako mu kuyiga ekigambo kya Katonda. Era mukyasaanira mata, sso si mmere nkalubo." 
Hebrews5:13 Buli akyasaanira amata, aba akyali mwana muto, atayawula kituufu na kikyamu." 
Hebrews5:14 Naye emmere enkalubo ya bantu bakulu, abamaze okuyiga ne bamanya okwawula ekirungi n'ekibi." 
Hebrews6:1 Kale ka tuleke ebyo ebisookerwako mu kunnyonnyola ku Kristo,tweyongere mu maaso okuyiga ebisingawo era eby'ekikulu mu kumukkiriza. Twabayigiriza dda ebigambo ebiri ng'omusingi, era tetwetaaga kubiddamu. Mumanyi bwe kitagasa okgezaakookulokolebwa nga tuyita mu bikolwa byaffe, era mumanyi obukulu obuli mu kukkiriza Katonda." 
Hebrews6:2 Twabayigiriza dda ebifa ku kubatizibwa okwa buli ngeri, n'okussibwako emikono. Mumanyi ebifa ku kuzuukira ne ku kusalirwa omusango okutalikyukako." 
Hebrews6:3 Kaakano ka tugende ku bikulu, era ekyo kye tunaakolanga, Katonda ng'ayagadde." 
Hebrews6:4 Kubanga abo abaamala okufuna ekitangaala kya Katonda, ate ne bakivaamu, tekiriyinzika kubakomyawo mu kwenenya. Baalega ku kirabo eky'omu ggulu, ne bafuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Hebrews6:5 Baamanya obulungi bw'ekigambo kya Katonda, era n'amaanyi ag'emirembe egigenda okujja." 
Hebrews6:6 Ate kaakano baddamu okukomerera ku musaalaba Omwana wa Katonda, era ne bamuswaza mu lwatu." 
Hebrews6:7 Ettaka erinywa enkuba eritonnyako emirundi emingi, ne likuza ebimera abalirima bye beetaaga, Katonda aliwa omukisa." 
Hebrews6:8 Naye bwe likuza amaggwa n'omuddo, liba terikyagasa, era nga lirindiridde kuvumirirwa na kuzikirizibwa muliro." 
Hebrews6:9 Naye abaagalwa, newaakubadde nga twogera bwe tutyo mmwe tetubabuusabuusaamu. Tumanyi nti muli bulungi, era muli mu kkubo eritutuusa mu kulokolebwa," 
Hebrews6:10 kubanga Katonda mwenkanya, tayinza kwerabira mulimu gwe mwakola, n'okwagala kwe mwamulaga mu buyambi bwe mwawa, era bwe muwa abantu be." 
Hebrews6:11 Era twagala nno buli omu mu mmwe okulaganga obunyiikivu obwo, okutuusa ku nkomerero, lwe mulifuna kye musuubira." 
Hebrews6:12 Tetwagala mube bagayaavu, wabula mube ng'abo abakkiriza era abagumiikiriza, ne bafuna ebyasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews6:13 Katonda bwe yasuubiza Aburahamu, yeerayirira yekka, kubanga tewaaliwo amusinga bukulu, gw'ayinza kulayira." 
Hebrews6:14 Yagamba nti: “Mazima ndikuwa omukisa, ne njaza ezzadde lyo.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Aburahamu yagumiikiriza, bw'atyo n'afuna Katonda kye yamusuubiza." 
Hebrews6:16 Abantu balayira oyo abasinga obukulu, era ekirayiro bwe bukakafu obusalawo empaka zaabwe zonna." 
Hebrews6:17 Katonda kyeyava alayira, akakase bye yasuubiza. Yayagala okukakasiza ddala abo abalifuna ebyasuubizibwa, nti bye yasuubiza talibikyusa." 
Hebrews6:18 Katonda yakola ebintu bibiri ebitajjulukuka, era by'atayinza kulimbiramu: yasuubiza, era n'alayira. N'olwekyo ffe abadduka okunoonya obubudamo mu ye, tuddamu nnyo amaanyi, ne tunyweza essuubi lye tuluubirira." 
Hebrews6:19 Essuubi eryo lye linywereza ddala emitima gyaffe ng'ennanga bw'enyweza eryato. Era liyingirira ddala mu kifo ekitukuvu, ekiri emabega w'olutimbe," 
Hebrews6:20 Yesu gye yatusooka okuyingira ku lwaffe, ng'afuuse Ssaabakabona mu lubu lwa Melikizeddeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Melikizeddeki oyo yali kabaka w'e Saalemu era kabona wa Katonda Atenkanika. Aburahamu bwe yali ng'ava mu lutalo mwe yattira bakabaka, Melikizeddeki n'amusisinkana, era n'amuwa omukisa." 
Hebrews7:2 Aburahamu n'awa Melikizeddeki oyo ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi ekya byonna bye yanyaga. Okusooka erinnya Melikizeddeki litegeeza “Kabaka ow'emirembe.” 
Hebrews7:3 Ebimwogerako tebyogera ku kitaawe wadde nnyina, wadde bajjajjaabe. Era tebyogera na ku lunaku lwe yazaalirwako, wadde lwe yafiirako. Afaanaanyirizibwa n'Omwana wa Katonda, aba Kabona ow'olubeerera." 
Hebrews7:4 Kale mulabe ng'omuntu oyo bwe yali omukulu! Aburahamu jjajjaffe omukulu yamuwa ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi eky'ebyo bye yanyaga. 
Hebrews7:5 Bazzukulu ba Leevi abaaweebwa obwakabona, Amateeka gabalagira okusolooza ku bantu ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi, newaakubadde ng'abantu abo baganda baabwe, kwe kugamba nabo bazzukulu ba Aburahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Melikizeddeki si muzzukulu wa Leevi, kyokka yaggya ku Aburahamu ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi, era n'amuwa omukisa, sso nga Aburahamu ye yasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews7:7 Tewali kubuusabuusa, omukulu ye awa omuto omukisa." 
Hebrews7:8 Bwe twogera ku bakabona, ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi kifunibwa abantu abafa. Naye ku Melikizeddeki, kifunibwa oyo akakasibwa Ebyawandiikibwa nti mulamu." 
Hebrews7:9 Oyinza okugamba nti Leevi yennyini aweebwa ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi, naye yakiweerayo mu Aburahamu," 
Hebrews7:10 kubanga yali ng'akyali mu ntumbwe za jjajjaawe Aburahamu, Melikizeddeki bwe yamusisinkana." 
Hebrews7:11 Amateeka gaaweebwa abantu ba Yisirayeli nga geesigamye ku bwakabona bwa Baleevi. Kale singa omulimu gwa bakabona Abaleevi gwali gutuukiridde, tewandyetaagiddwawo kabona mulala okujja, nga wa lubu lwa Melikizeddeki, olutali lwa Arooni." 
Hebrews7:12 Obwakabona bwe bukyusibwa, era n'amateeka tegalema kukyusibwa." 
Hebrews7:13 Mukama waffe ayogerwako ebigambo ebyo, wa mu kika kirala omutavanga muntu n'omu kuweereza nga kabona." 
Hebrews7:14 Kimanyiddwa nti yava mu kika kya Yuda, Musa ky'atayogerangako nti kirivaamu bakabona." 
Hebrews7:15 Ebyo byeyongera okutegeerekeka, bwe wasitukawo kabona omulala ali nga Melikizeddeki," 
Hebrews7:16 ataalondebwa kusinziira ku mateeka n'ebiragiro ebifuga abantu, wabula ku buyinza bw'obulamu obutakoma." 
Hebrews7:17 Oyo ayogerwako nti: “Oli kabona emirembe gyonna, mu lubu lwa Melikizeddeki.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Ekiragiro ekyasooka, kyadibizibwa olw'obunafu n'obutagasa bwakyo," 
Hebrews7:19 kubanga Amateeka tegaliiko kye gaatuukiriza. Kaakano kyewaava waleetebwawo essuubi erisingawo, erituleetera okusemberera Katonda." 
Hebrews7:20 Era kino tekyakolebwa watali kirayiro. Bo Abaleevi baafuulibwa bakabona nga tewali kirayiro. 
Hebrews7:21 Naye Yesu yafuulibwa kabona nga waliwo ekirayiro, Katonda bwe yamugamba nti: “Mukama yalayira, era talyejjusa: Oli kabona emirembe gyonna.”" 
Hebrews7:22 Yesu kyeyava afuuka omuyima w'endagaano esinga obulungi. 
Hebrews7:23 Bakabona bali baali bangi, kubanga baafanga, ne batasobola kusigalawo bbanga lyonna." 
Hebrews7:24 Naye Yesu nga bw'ali omulamu emirembe gyonna, obwakabona bwe bwa lubeerera." 
Hebrews7:25 Kyava ayinza bulijjo okulokola abo abajja eri Katonda nga bayita mu ye, kubanga abeera mulamu ennaku zonna, okubawolerezanga." 
Hebrews7:26 N'olwekyo Ssaabakabona ng'oyo omutuukirivu, ataliiko kisobyo, ataliiko bbala, atabalirwa mu babi, era eyagulumizibwa okukira eggulu, ye yatusaanira." 
Hebrews7:27 Tali nga bassaabakabona abalala. Teyeetaaga kuwaayo buli lunaku bitambiro: okusooka olw'ebibi bye, n'oluvannyuma olw'ebibi by'abalala. Yawaayo ekitambiro omulundi gumu, bwe yeewaayo ye yennyini." 
Hebrews7:28 Amateeka be galonda okuba bassaabakabona, bantu buntu abalina obunafu. Naye ekigambo ky'ekirayiro kya Katonda ekyaddirira Amateeka, kyalonda Mwana omutuukirivu emirembe gyonna." 
Hebrews8:1 Ekigambo ekikulu mu bye twogedde kye kino: Ssaabakabona gwe tulina bw'atyo bwe yenkana, era atudde ku ludda olwa ddyo olw'entebe ey'obwakabaka eya Nnannyinibuyinza mu ggulu." 
Hebrews8:2 Aweereza nga Ssaabakabona mu Kifo Ekitukuvu era mu Weema yennyini etaateekebwawo muntu, wabula Mukama." 
Hebrews8:3 Buli ssaabakabona ateekebwawo okuwaayo ebirabo n'ebitambiro eri Katonda. Ne Ssaabakabona waffe kyava agwanira okubaako ne ky'awaayo. 
Hebrews8:4 Kale singa yali ku nsi, teyandibadde kabona n'akatono, kubanga waliwo bakabona abawaayo ebirabo ng'Amateeka bwe galagira." 
Hebrews8:5 Kye bakola kifaananako bufaananyi, era kisiikirize eky'ebyo ebikolebwa mu ggulu. Ne ku Musa bwe kyali. Bwe yali ng'agenda okukola eweema, Katonda yamulagira nti: “Byonna bikole ng'ogoberera ekyakulagibwa ku lusozi.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Naye kaakano omulimu Yesu gwe yaweebwa, gusinga nnyo ogwa bali obukulu, kubanga n'endagaano gy'alimu ng'omutabaganya, ye esinga obulungi, n'ebisuubizo kw'enyweredde, bye bisinga obulungi." 
Hebrews8:7 Singa endagaano eyasooka teyaliiko ky'enenyezebwamu, tewandibaddewo kyetaagisa yaakubiri." 
Hebrews8:8 Naye Katonda ayogera ng'anenya abantu be nti: “Mukama agamba nti: Ekiseera kirituuka, ne nkola endagaano empya n'abantu ba Yisirayeli, era n'ekika kya Yuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Teriba ng'endagaano gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe, ku lunaku lwe nabakwata ku mukono okubaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, kubanga tebaanywerera ku ndagaano eyo. Nange kyennava ndekayo okubawuliriza. Bw'atyo Mukama bw'ayogera." 
Hebrews8:10 Eno ye ndagaano gye ndikola n'Abayisirayeli ennaku ezo bwe zirituuka, bw'atyo Mukama bw'ayogera. Nditeeka amateeka gange mu magezi gaabwe. Era ndigawandiika mu mitima gyabwe. Ndiba Katonda waabwe, nabo ne baba bantu bange." 
Hebrews8:11 Tewaliba ayigiriza munne, wadde ayigiriza muganda we nti: ‘Manya Mukama.’ Okuviira ddala ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu, bonna balimmanya." 
Hebrews8:12 Ndibasonyiwa okwonoona kwabwe, n'ebibi byabwe siribijjukira nate.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Katonda bw'ayogera ku ndagaano empya, aba akaddiyizza eyo eyasooka. Naye ekyo ekikula ne kikaddiwa, kiba kiri kumpi okuggwaawo." 
Hebrews9:1 Era n'endagaano eyasooka yalina amateeka agaagobererwanga mu kusinza Katonda, era yalina n'ekifo ekitukuvu eky'oku nsi." 
Hebrews9:2 Waateekebwawo ne weema omwali ekikondo ky'ettaala, emmeeza, n'emigaati egiweebwayo eri Katonda. Ekitundu ekyo nga kiyitibwa Ekifo Ekitukuvu." 
Hebrews9:3 Emabega w'olutimbe olwokubiri, we waali Eweema eyitibwa Entukuvu Ennyo." 
Hebrews9:4 Mu yo mwalimu ekyoterezo ky'obubaane, ekyakolebwa mu zaabu. Era mwalimu essanduuko ey'endagaano, ebikkiddwako zaabu enjuyi zonna. Mu ssanduuko eyo, mwalimu ekibya ekya zaabu, omwali mannu. Era mwalimu omuggo gwa Arooni ogwaloka, n'ebipande eby'amayinja okuwandiikiddwa ebiragiro bya Katonda." 
Hebrews9:5 Kungulu ku yo kwaliko bakerubi abeekitiibwa, abasiikirizza entebe ya Katonda nnannyini kusaasira. Ebyo byonna tetuyinza kubyogerako kaakano kinnakimu." 
Hebrews9:6 Ebyo byonna nga bimaze okutereezebwa bwe bityo, bakabona baayingiranga bulijjo mu weema esookerwako, ne batuukiriza omulimu gwabwe." 
Hebrews9:7 Naye mu weema eyookubiri, mwayingirwangamu Ssaabakabona yekka, ng'ayingiramu omulundi gumu buli mwaka, era ng'ateekwa okutwalayo omusaayi gw'awaayo ku lulwe, ne ku lw'ebyonoono by'abantu bye bakola mu butamanya." 
Hebrews9:8 Mu bino byonna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu alaga nti ekkubo erituuka mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Ennyo lyali terinnamanyika, ng'eweema esookerwako ekyayimiriddewo." 
Hebrews9:9 Ekyo kyali kifaananyi bufaananyi eky'ebyo ebiriwo kati. Ebirabo n'ebitambiro ebyo ebyaweebwangayo, tebyayinzanga kutukuza mwoyo gw'oyo abiwaayo." 
Hebrews9:10 Byakomanga ku bya kungulu, ebifa ku kulya ne ku kunywa ne ku bulombolombo obw'okwetukuza, ebyali eby'okubeerawo okutuusa ku kiseera eky'okuzza ebintu byonna obuggya." 
Hebrews9:11 Naye Kristo bwe yajja nga ye Ssaabakabona w'ebirungi ebigenda okujja, yayita mu weema esinga obukulu n'okutuukirira, etaakolebwa bantu, kwe kugamba, eteri ya ku nsi kuno," 
Hebrews9:12 n'ayingirira ddala omulundi gumu mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ng'amaze okutufunira okununulibwa okutaggwaawo. Teyayingirayo na musaayi gwa mbuzi na gwa nnyana, wabula yayingirayo na musaayi gwe gwennyini." 
Hebrews9:13 Omusaayi gw'embuzi n'ogw'ente ennume, n'evvu ly'ente enduusi, ebimansirwa ku abo abatali balongoofu, bibatukuza ne baba balongoofu mu byokungulu." 
Hebrews9:14 Kristo ataliiko kamogo yeewaayo eri Katonda, mu maanyi ga Mwoyo ataggwaawo. Kale omusaayi gwe tegulisingawo nnyo okunaaza emyoyo gyaffe, ne tuweereza Katonda Nnannyinibulamu?" 
Hebrews9:15 N'olwekyo Kristo ye mutabaganya mu ndagaano empya, kubanga abo abaasuubizibwa ebirungi ebitaggwaawo, abasobozesa okubifuna. Ekyo kisoboka, kubanga yafa n'anunula abantu mu bibi byabwe bye baakola nga bakyafugibwa endagaano eyasooka." 
Hebrews9:16 Ekiraamo kikakata ng'eyakiraama amaze kufa. 
Hebrews9:17 Ekiraamo tekikola ng'eyakiraama akyali mulamu, wabula amala kufa, ne kiryoka kikola." 
Hebrews9:18 N'endagaano eyasooka kyeyava ekakasibwa n'omusaayi. 
Hebrews9:19 Musa bwe yamala okutegeeza abantu ebiragiro byonna ebiri mu Mateeka, n'addira omusaayi gw'ennyana n'ogw'embuzi, wamu n'amazzi, n'ebyoya by'endiga ebimyufu, n'akati akayitibwa “Yisopu,” n'amansira ku kitabo ky'Amateeka ne ku bantu bonna," 
Hebrews9:20 nga bw'agamba nti: “Guno gwe musaayi ogukakasa endagaano Katonda gy'abalagidde okutuukiriza.” 
Hebrews9:21 Era mu ngeri ye emu, Musa n'amansira omusaayi ku weema ne ku bintu byonna ebikozesebwa mu kusinza." 
Hebrews9:22 Era mu Mateeka, kumpi buli kintu kitukuzibwa na musaayi, era awatali kuyiwa musaayi, tewabaawo kusonyiyibwa bibi." 
Hebrews9:23 Ebifaananyi by'ebyo eby'omu ggulu byasaanira okutukuzibwa bwe bityo. Naye eby'omu ggulu byennyini, byetaaga okutukuzibwa n'ebitambiro ebisinga obulungi." 
Hebrews9:24 Kristo teyayingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu ekyakolebwa abantu, nga kifaanana bufaananyi nga kiri kyennyini, wabula yayingira mu ggulu lyennyini, gy'ali kaakano, mu maaso ga Katonda ku lwaffe." 
Hebrews9:25 Kristo teyayingira kwewaayo mirundi mingi, nga Ssaabakabona bw'ayingira buli mwaka mu Kifo Ekitukuvu okuwaayo omusaayi ogutali gugwe." 
Hebrews9:26 Olwo Kristo yandibadde ateekwa okubonaabona emirundi mingi okuviira ddala ensi lwe yatondebwa. Naye kaakano yalabika omulundi gumu, mu mirembe gino egikomererayo, alyoke aggyewo ekibi, olw'okwewaayo yennyini." 
Hebrews9:27 Era nga buli muntu bw'afa omulundi ogumu, era bw'amala okufa, n'asalirwa omusango," 
Hebrews9:28 era ne Kristo bw'atyo. Yaweebwayo omulundi gumu okwetikka ebibi by'abangi. Alijja omulundi ogwokubiri, nga tazze kuddamu kulwanyisa kibi, wabula okuyimbula abo abamulindirira." 
Hebrews10:1 Amateeka g'Ekiyudaaya, kisiikirize busiikirize eky'ebirungi ebigenda okujja, sso si kifaananyi kyabyo ekituufu. Tegasobola kutukuliza ddala abo abaddiŋŋana ebitambiro bye bimu, buli mwaka." 
Hebrews10:2 Singa gaali gasobola okubatukuliza ddala, ebitambiro byandibadde tebikyaweebwayo, kubanga ababiwaayo bandibadde batukuliziddwa ddala omulundi gumu, nga tebakyemanyiiko kibi." 
Hebrews10:3 Naye mu bitambiro ebyo, mulimu kujjukizibwa ebibi buli mwaka," 
Hebrews10:4 kubanga omusaayi gw'ente ennume n'ogw'embuzi teguyinza kuggyawo bibi. 
Hebrews10:5 Kristo ng'ajja mu nsi, kyeyava agamba Katonda nti: “Ebitambiro n'ebiweebwayo tewabyagala, naye wanteekerateekera omubiri." 
Hebrews10:6 Ebyokebwa nga biramba, n'ebyo ebiweebwayo olw'ebibi, tewabisiima." 
Hebrews10:7 Kyennava ŋŋamba nti: Nzuuno. Nzize okukola by'oyagala, ayi Katonda, ng'ekyawandiikibwa bwe kinjogerako mu kitabo ky'Amateeka.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Asooka kugamba nti: “Ebitambiro n'ebiweebwayo, n'ebyokebwa ebiramba, n'ebyo ebiweebwayo olw'ebibi, tewabyagala era tewabisiima.” Ekyo yakyogera, newaakubadde ng'ebyo byonna byaweebwangayo ng'Amateeka bwe galagira." 
Hebrews10:9 Ate n'agamba nti: “Nzuuno. Nzize okukola by'oyagala.” N'olwekyo aggyawo ekisooka, alyoke anyweze ekyokubiri." 
Hebrews10:10 Twatukuzibwa kubanga Yesu yakola ekyo Katonda ky'ayagala, bwe yawaayo omubiri gwe omulundi ogumu." 
Hebrews10:11 Buli omu ku bakabona bali, ayimirira buli lunaku, n'awaayo emirundi mingi ebitambiro bye bimu, ebitayinza kuggyawo bibi." 
Hebrews10:12 Naye Kristo yawaayo ekitambiro kimu kyokka ekyamala okuddaabiriza olw'ebibi, n'alyoka atuula emirembe gyonna, ng'aliraanye Katonda, ku ludda olwa ddyo." 
Hebrews10:13 Eyo gy'alindira, okutuusa abalabe be lwe balifuulibwa ekirinnyibwako ebigere bye." 
Hebrews10:14 Olw'okuwaayo ekitambiro ekyo ekimu, abo b'atukuza yabafunira obutuukirivu obw'emirembe gyonna." 
Hebrews10:15 Era ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu kino akitutegeeza. Asooka n'agamba nti: 
Hebrews10:16 “Eno ye ndagaano gye ndikola nabo, ennaku ezo bwe zirituuka. Bw'atyo Mukama bw'ayogera. Nditeeka amateeka gange mu mitima gyabwe, era ndigawandiika mu magezi gaabwe.” Ate n'agamba nti:" 
Hebrews10:17 “N'ebibi byabwe n'obujeemu bwabwe siribijjukira nate.” 
Hebrews10:18 Ebyo bwe bimala okusonyiyibwa, waba tewakyaliwo kuwangayo kitambiro olw'ebibi." 
Hebrews10:19 Kale abooluganda, kaakano tuyinza okuyingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu nga tetulina kutya, kubanga Kristo yafa ku lwaffe," 
Hebrews10:20 n'atuggulirawo ekkubo eriggya era eddamu eriyita mu lutimbe, gwe mubiri gwe." 
Hebrews10:21 Tulina kabona omukulu bw'atyo, afuga ennyumba ya Katonda." 
Hebrews10:22 Kale tusembere eri Katonda n'omwoyo ogutaliimu bukuusa, ogujjudde okukkiriza, nga tulina emitima egitukuziddwa, ne giggwaamu omwoyo omubi, nga n'emibiri gyaffe ginaaziddwa n'amazzi amatukuvu." 
Hebrews10:23 Tunyweze essuubi lye tulina tuleme kulivaako, kubanga Katonda eyasuubiza mwesigwa." 
Hebrews10:24 Tussenga omwoyo ku kukubiriza bannaffe okwagalana n'okukola ebikolwa ebirungi. 
Hebrews10:25 Tuleme kugayaaliriranga nkuŋŋaana z'abagoberezi ba Kristo, ng'abamu bwe bakola. Naye buli omu agumye munne, naddala nga bwe mulaba nti Olunaku lwa Mukama lunaatera okutuuka." 
Hebrews10:26 Kuba singa twonoona mu bugenderevu nga tumaze okutegeezebwa amazima, waba tewakyaliwo kitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Hebrews10:27 Ekiba kisigadde, kwe kuba mu kutya, nga tulindirira okusalirwa omusango, era n'obukambwe bw'omuliro ogugenda okwokya abalabe ba Katonda." 
Hebrews10:28 Omuntu ajeemera amateeka ga Musa, attibwa awatali kusaasirwa, kasita wabaawo abajulirwa babiri oba basatu abamusingisa omusango." 
Hebrews10:29 Kale omuntu alinnyirira Omwana wa Katonda, era omusaayi ogw'endagaano ogwamutukuza, n'agulaba ng'ogutali mutukuvu, era n'anyoomoola Mwoyo ow'ekisa, mulowooza nti talisaanira ekibonerezo ekisingawo obukambwe?" 
Hebrews10:30 Tumanyi oyo eyagamba nti: “Okuwoolera eggwanga kwange, nze ndisasula.” Era nti: “Mukama alisalira abantu omusango.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Kya ntiisa okugwa mu mikono gya Katonda Nnannyinibulamu! 
Hebrews10:32 Mujjukire ebiseera ebyayita, bye mwafuniramu ekitangaala kya Katonda, ne mugumiikiriza okubonyaabonyezebwa okw'amaanyi." 
Hebrews10:33 Emirundi egimu mwavumibwa era ne mubonyaabonyezebwa mu lwatu, emirundi emirala ne mulumirwa wamu n'abo abaakolebwa bwe batyo." 
Hebrews10:34 Mwalumirwa wamu n'abasibe, era mwagumiikiriza n'essanyu nga munyagiddwako ebyammwe, kubanga mwamanya nti mmwe mulina ebisingawo obulungi, era eby'olubeerera." 
Hebrews10:35 Kale temusuulanga buvumu bwammwe, kubanga empeera yaabwo nnene." 
Hebrews10:36 Mwetaaga okugumiikiriza, mulyoke mukole ebyo Katonda by'ayagala, era muweebwe kye yasuubiza." 
Hebrews10:37 “Wasigadde akaseera katono nnyo, oyo ow'okujja, ajje, era talirwa." 
Hebrews10:38 Omutuukirivu wange anaabeeranga mulamu, lwa kukkiriza. Kyokka bw'addayo emabega, sirimusaasira.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Naye ffe tetuli mu abo abadda emabega, ne bazikirira, wabula tuli mu abo abakkiriza, ne balokolebwa." 
Hebrews11:1 Okukkiriza kitegeeza okukakasa nti ebyo ebisuubirwa tulibifuna, era bwe butabuusabuusa mu ebyo bye tutalaba." 
Hebrews11:2 Okukkiriza, kwe kwaleetera abantu ab'edda okusiimibwa Katonda." 
Hebrews11:3 Okukkiriza, kwe kutusobozesa okutegeera nti ebintu byonna byakolebwa kigambo kya Katonda, ebirabika kyebyava bikolebwa nga biggyibwa mu bitalabika." 
Hebrews11:4 Okukkiriza, kwe kwaleetera Abeli okuwaayo eri Katonda ekitambiro ekirungi okusinga ekya Kayini, ne kikakasa nti Abeeli mutuukirivu, kubanga Katonda yasiima ebirabo bye. Era olw'okukkiriza kwe, newaakubadde yafa, akyayogera." 
Hebrews11:5 Okukkiriza, kwe kwaleetera Enoka okutwalibwa eri Katonda, nga tamaze kufa. Era oluvannyuma tewali yamulabako, kubanga Katonda yamutwala. Ekyo kyaba bwe kityo, kubanga bwe yali nga tannatwalibwa, kyakakasibwa nti yasanyusa Katonda." 
Hebrews11:6 Tewali ayinza kusanyusa Katonda awatali kukkiriza, kubanga ajja eri Katonda, ateekwa okukkiriza nti Katonda waali, era nti agabira empeera abo abamunoonya." 
Hebrews11:7 Noowa bwe yalabulwa Katonda ku byali bitannalabika, okukkiriza kwe kwamusobozesa okuwulira Katonda, n'azimba eryato okuwonya amaka ge. Bw'atyo yasalira ensi omusango, n'afuna obutuukirivu obuleetebwa okukkiriza." 
Hebrews11:8 Okukkiriza, kwe kwaleetera Aburahamu okuwulira Katonda, bwe yamuyita ave ewaabwe alage mu nsi gye yali agenda okuweebwa. Bw'atyo n'agenda nga tamanyi gy'alaga." 
Hebrews11:9 Era okukkiriza, kwe kwamuleetera okubeera mu nsi eyamusuubizibwa, n'agibeeramu ng'eri ng'etali yiye, ng'asula mu weema awamu ne Yisaaka ne Yakobo, nabo Katonda be yasuubiza ekintu kye kimu ekyo." 
Hebrews11:10 Aburahamu yalindirira ekibuga Katonda kye yategeka, era kye yazimba, ekirina emisingi emigumu." 
Hebrews11:11 Okukkiriza, kwe kwasobozesa Saara okuba olubuto, newaakubadde nga yali akaddiye. Yakkiriza nti Katonda eyamusuubiza, mwesigwa." 
Hebrews11:12 N'olwekyo omuntu oyo omu Aburahamu, newaakubadde yali ng'afudde, yasibukamu abazzukulu bangi ng'emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu, era ng'omusenyu oguli ku lubalama lw'ennyanja, ogutabalika." 
Hebrews11:13 Abo bonna baafiira mu kukkiriza, nga tebannafuna ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza, wabula nga babirengerera wala, ne babyaniriza, nga bakakasa nti bagenyi era bayise ku nsi kuno." 
Hebrews11:14 Abo aboogera bwe batyo, balaga nti waliwo awalala gye basuubira okusanga obutaka bwabwe." 
Hebrews11:15 Era singa baajulirira ensi gye baavaamu, bandisobodde okuddayo." 
Hebrews11:16 Naye kaakano beegomba obutaka obusinga obulungi, bwe bw'omu ggulu. Katonda kyava takwatibwa nsonyi kuyitibwa Katonda waabwe, kubanga yabateekerateekera ekibuga." 
Hebrews11:17 Aburahamu, Katonda gwe yali asuubizza, bwe yagezebwa, okukkiriza kwe kwamusobozesa okuwaayo Yisaaka, omwana we omu yekka, abe ekitambiro." 
Hebrews11:18 Katonda yali amugambye nti: “Mu Yisaaka mw'olifunira abazzukulu.” 
Hebrews11:19 Aburahamu yamanya nti Katonda ayinza okuzuukiza abafu. Ne Katonda kyeyava amuddiza Yisaaka, ng'ali ng'avudde mu bafu." 
Hebrews11:20 Okukkiriza, kwe kwasobozesa Yisaaka okusabira Yakobo ne Esawu omukisa mu ebyo ebyali bigenda okujja." 
Hebrews11:21 Yakobo bwe yali ng'anaatera okufa, okukkiriza, kwe kwamusobozesa okusabira abaana ba Yosefu omukisa kinnoomu, n'akutama ku muggo gwe, n'asinza Katonda." 
Hebrews11:22 Yosefu bwe yali ng'anaatera okufa, okukkiriza, kwe kwamusobozesa okwogera nti Abayisirayeli baliva mu Misiri, era n'alagira ebirikolebwa ku magumba ge." 
Hebrews11:23 Musa bwe yazaalibwa, okukkiriza, kwe kwaleetera bazadde be okumukwekera emyezi esatu. Baalaba nga mwana mulungi, ne batatya kuwakanya kiragiro kya kabaka." 
Hebrews11:24 Musa bwe yakula, okukkiriza, kwe kwamusobozesa okugaana okuyitibwa omwana wa muwala wa Faraawo." 
Hebrews11:25 Yasiima okubonaabonera awamu n'abantu ba Katonda, okusinga okuba mu ssanyu ery'ekibi eriggwaawo amangu." 
Hebrews11:26 Yalaba nti okuvumibwa olwa Kristo kusingira ddala wala obugagga bw'e Misiri, kubanga yamanya empeera gy'aliweebwa." 
Hebrews11:27 Okukkiriza, kwe kwasobozesa Musa okuva e Misiri, n'atatya busungu bwa kabaka, kubanga yanywera, ng'ali ng'alaba Katonda atalabika." 
Hebrews11:28 Okukkiriza, kwe kwamusobozesa okuteekawo Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, n'amansira omusaayi, Omuzikiriza aleme kutta baggulanda ba Bayisirayeli." 
Hebrews11:29 Okukkiriza, kwe kwasobozesa Abayisirayeli okuyita mu Nnyanja Emmyufu, ng'abayita ku lukalu. Naye Abamisiri bwe baakigezaako, amazzi ne gabasaanyaawo." 
Hebrews11:30 Okukkiriza, kwe kwaleetera ebisenge by'Ekibuga Yeriko okugwa, nga bimaze ennaku musanvu nga byetooloolwa Abayisirayeli." 
Hebrews11:31 Okukkiriza, kwe kwawonya malaaya Rahabu n'atazikiririra wamu n'abo abatakkiriza, kubanga yayaniriza abakessi." 
Hebrews11:32 Nnyongereko ki ate? N'obudde bunaanzigwako bwe njogera ku Gidiyoni, Baraki, Samusooni, Yefuta, Dawudi, Samweli, ne ku balanzi. 16:1 Bassek 2:11; 1 Sam 1:1–25:1" 
Hebrews11:33 Olw'okukkiriza, abo baawangula obwakabaka, ne bakola eby'obutuukirivu, era ne bafuna ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza. Baabuniza obumwa bw'empologoma," 
Hebrews11:34 ne bazikiza omuliro ogw'amaanyi, ne bawona obwogi bw'ekitala. Baali banafu, ne bafuuka ba maanyi. Baafuuka bazira mu ntalo, ne bagoba eggye ly'ab'amawanga amalala." 
Hebrews11:35 Abakazi ne baweebwa abantu baabwe abazuukidde. Abantu abalala baabonyaabonyezebwa, ne bagaana okuteebwa, balyoke bazuukire okufuna obulamu obusinga obulungi." 
Hebrews11:36 N'abalala baasekererwa ne bakubibwa era ne basibibwa, ne bateekebwa mu makomera. 38:6:" 
Hebrews11:37 Baakubibwa amayinja, baasalibwamu n'emisumeeno, baakemebwa, battibwa n'ekitala. Baatambulanga nga bambadde amaliba g'endiga n'ag'embuzi, nga tebalina kantu, nga babonyaabonyezebwa, ne bayisibwa bubi," 
Hebrews11:38 ensi nga tebasaanira. Ne batambulatambulanga mu malungu ne mu nsozi, nga basula mu mpuku ne mu binnya." 
Hebrews11:39 Abo bonna Katonda yabasiima olw'okukkiriza kwabwe. Naye tebaafuna ebyo bye yasuubiza," 
Hebrews11:40 kubanga Katonda yatuteekerateekera ekisinga obulungi: bo baleme okutuukirizibwa, ffe nga tetuliiwo." 
Hebrews12:1 Kale naffe nga bwe tulina abajulirwa abangi bwe batyo abatwetoolodde, tweyambule buli kintu ekituzitoowerera, era n'ekibi ekitwesibako. Twetabe mu mpaka ez'okudduka ezituteereddwawo, era tudduke nga tuli bagumiikiriza," 
Hebrews12:2 nga tutunuulira Yesu yekka eyatandika era atuukiriza okukkiriza kwaffe. Yesu oyo, olw'essanyu lye yali alindirira, yagumira omusaalaba, n'atatya kuswala. Kaakano atudde ku ludda olwa ddyo olw'entebe ya Katonda." 
Hebrews12:3 Mulowoozenga ku kuwakanyizibwa okwenkana awo, aboonoonyi kwe baamuwakanyaamu, mulyoke mulemenga okukoowa n'okuterebuka." 
Hebrews12:4 Mu kulwanyisa ekibi, temunnalwana kutuuka ku kuyiwa musaayi gwammwe." 
Hebrews12:5 Mwerabidde ebigambo ebibabuulirirwa Katonda ng'ayogera nammwe ng'abaana? Agamba nti: “Mwana wange, togayanga kukangavvula kwa Mukama. Era toddiriranga bw'akunenyanga," 
Hebrews12:6 kubanga oyo Mukama gw'ayagala, amukangavvula, era abonereza buli gw'ayita omwana we.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Mugumiikirizenga okukangavvulwa, kubanga Katonda abakangavvula ng'abaana be. Kale mwana ki kitaawe gw'atakangavvula?" 
Hebrews12:8 Naye bwe mutakangavvulwa ng'abalala bwe bakangavvulwa, muba beeboolereze, sso si baana ddala." 
Hebrews12:9 Twalina bakitaffe mu mubiri, abaatukangavvulanga, ne tubassangamu ekitiibwa. Kale tetulisingawo nnyo okugondera Kitaffe mu mwoyo, ne tuba balamu?" 
Hebrews12:10 Bakitaffe abo baatukangavvuliranga ekiseera kitono olw'ebyo bye baayagalanga. Kyokka Katonda atukangavvula olw'okutugasa, tulyoke tugabane ku butukuvu bwe." 
Hebrews12:11 Bwe tuba tukangavvulwa, mu kiseera ekyo okukangavvulwa kufaanana ng'okutaleeta ssanyu wabula obulumi. Naye oluvannyuma, abo abagunjulwa okukangavvulwa okwo, bafuna eddembe n'obutuukirivu." 
Hebrews12:12 Kale muyimuse emikono gyammwe egiragaya, munyweze amaviivi gammwe agajugumira." 
Hebrews12:13 Mutambulirenga mu makubo amagolokofu, awenyera aleme kulemala, wabula awone." 
Hebrews12:14 Mufubenga okuba n'emirembe mu bantu bonna, era mufubenga okuba n'obutukuvu, kubanga we butali tewali aliraba Mukama." 
Hebrews12:15 Mwerinde, waleme kubaawo yeefiiriza kisa kya Katonda. Mwerinde, waleme kubaawo bubi busituka mu mmwe, ne bubatabulatabula, era ne bwonoona bangi." 
Hebrews12:16 Mwerinde, waleme kubaawo mwenzi, oba alulunkanira eby'ensi nga Esawu, eyatunda obusika bwe olw'olulya olumu." 
Hebrews12:17 Mumanyi nti oluvannyuma, bwe yayagala okufuna omukisa, tegwamuweebwa, kubanga teyafuna ngeri ya kujjulula kye yali akoze, newaakubadde yagusaba ng'akaaba." 
Hebrews12:18 Temuzze ng'Abayisirayeli bwe bajja ku Lusozi Sinaayi lwe muyinza okukwatako, era olwaka omuliro. Era temuzze eri ekizikiza ekikutte zzigizigi, ne kibuyaga," 
Hebrews12:19 n'okuvuga kw'eŋŋombe, n'eddoboozi ly'ebigambo, eryaleetera abaaliwulira okwegayirira baleme kweyongera kuliwulira." 
Hebrews12:20 Tebaasobola kugumira kiragiro ekyabaweebwa, ekigamba nti: “Ne bw'eba nsolo n'etuuka ku lusozi, eteekwa okukubibwa amayinja efe!”" 
Hebrews12:21 Ddala ebyalabibwa byali bya ntiisa nnyo, Musa n'atuuka n'okugamba nti: “Ntidde nnyo, ne nkankana!”" 
Hebrews12:22 Naye mmwe muzze ku Lusozi Siyooni, era mu kibuga kya Katonda Nnannyinibulamu, Yerusaalemu eky'omu ggulu, bamalayika enkumi n'enkumi gye bakuŋŋaanidde." 
Hebrews12:23 Muzze mu lukuŋŋaana olunene olw'abaggulanda abaawandiikibwa mu ggulu. Muzze eri Katonda Omulamuzi wa bonna, n'eri emyoyo gy'abatukuvu, abaatuukirizibwa." 
Hebrews12:24 Muzze eri Yesu Omutabaganya ow'endagaano empya. Muzze eri omusaayi ogw'okumansira, ogwogera ebirungi okusinga ogwa Abeeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Mwerinde, muleme kugaana okussaayo omwoyo ku oyo ayogera. Abo abaagaana okuwulira eyabalabula ng'ali ku nsi, tebaawona, n'olwekyo ffe bwe tugaana okuwulira oyo atulabula ng'ali mu ggulu, tetulina we tuliwonera." 
Hebrews12:26 Eddoboozi lye lyanyeenya ensi, naye kaakano yasuubiza nti: “Njija kuddamu okukankanya ensi, ku luno si nsi yokka, naye n'eggulu.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Okugamba nti “Njija kuddamu,” kitegeeza nti ebitonde ebinyeenyezebwa biriggyibwawo, olwo ebyo ebitanyeenyezebwa biryoke bisigalewo." 
Hebrews12:28 Kale nga bwe tufuna obwakabaka obutanyeenyezebwa, twebazenga Katonda, era tumusinzenga nga bw'asiima, nga tumussaamu ekitiibwa era nga tumutya," 
Hebrews12:29 kubanga Katonda waffe, muliro, ayokya!" 
Hebrews13:1 Mwongere okwagalananga ng'abooluganda mu Kristo. 
Hebrews13:2 Temwerabiranga kwaniriza bagenyi, kubanga waliwo abaayaniriza bamalayika nga tebamanyi." 
Hebrews13:3 Mujjukirenga abasibe, nga muli ng'abaasibirwa awamu nabo. Era mujjukirenga abo ababonyaabonyezebwa, kubanga nammwe mulina omubiri." 
Hebrews13:4 Okufumbiriganwa kussibwengamu abantu bonna ekitiibwa, era obufumbo bukuumibwenga nga butukuvu, kubanga abakaba n'abenzi, Katonda alibasalira omusango." 
Hebrews13:5 Mulemenga kuba ba mululu, bye mulina bibamalenga, kubanga Katonda yagamba nti: “Sirikuleka, era sirikwabulira n'akatono”." 
Hebrews13:6 Kyetuva twogera n'obwesige nti: “Mukama ye mubeezi wange, siityenga. Omuntu ayinza kunkola ki?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Mujjukire abakulembeze bammwe, abaabategeeza ekigambo kya Katonda. Mwetegereze ebyo bye baayitamu mu bulamu bwabwe, mugoberere okukkiriza kwabwe." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristo nga bwe yali jjo, bw'ali ne leero, era bw'aliba emirembe n'emirembe." 
Hebrews13:9 Mulemenga kuwubisibwa kuyigiriza okutali kumu, abantu kwe baleetereza. Kirungi okuba n'omutima ogunyweredde ku kisa kya Katonda, sso si ku bulombolombo bwa byakulya, obutagasa abo ababugoberera." 
Hebrews13:10 Tulina alutaari, abo abaweereza mu weema gye batakkirizibwa kuliirako." 
Hebrews13:11 Ssaabakabona atwala omusaayi gw'ensolo mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, n'aguwaayo olw'ebibi, naye zo ne zookerwa ebweru w'olusiisira." 
Hebrews13:12 Ne Yesu kyeyava abonaabonera ebweru wa wankaaki w'ekibuga, alyoke atukuze abantu n'omusaayi gwe." 
Hebrews13:13 Kale tufulume, tugende gy'ali ebweru w'olusiisira, tuswale wamu naye." 
Hebrews13:14 Kubanga ku nsi kuno tetulinaako kibuga kya lubeerera, wabula tunoonya ekyo ekigenda okujja." 
Hebrews13:15 Kale tuweeyo eri Katonda ekitambiro eky'okumutenda, nga tukiyisa mu Yesu, nga twatula erinnya lye n'emimwa gyaffe." 
Hebrews13:16 Era temwerabiranga okukola obulungi n'okuyambagana. Ebyo bye bitambiro ebisanyusa Katonda. 
Hebrews13:17 Muwulirenga abakulembeze bammwe, era mubagonderenga, kubanga be balabirira emyoyo gyammwe, nga ba kugibuuzibwa. Mubasobozese okukikolanga n'essanyu, sso si na buwaze, kubanga ekyo tekiribaako kye kigasa mmwe." 
Hebrews13:18 Mutusabirenga, kubanga tumanyi nti tulina omwoyo omulungi era twagala okukola obulungi mu buli kimu." 
Hebrews13:19 Era mbeegayirira okunsabiranga ennyo, ndyoke nkomezebwewo mangu gye muli." 
Hebrews13:20 Kale Katonda ow'emirembe, eyazuukiza Mukama waffe Yesu, Omusumba w'endiga omukulu, olw'endagaano eteggwaawo, eyanywezebwa n'omusaayi gwe," 
Hebrews13:21 abawe buli kirungi kyonna, mulyoke mukolenga by'ayagala, Katonda oyo akolere mu ffe by'asiima, ng'abiyisa mu Yesu Kristo, asaanidde okuweebwa ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Hebrews13:22 Abooluganda, mbasaba mugumiikirize bye mbabuuliridde, kubanga ebbaluwa eno gye mbawandiikidde, si mpanvu." 
Hebrews13:23 Mbategeeza nti muganda waffe Timoteewo yateebwa. Era bw'alijja amangu, aliba wamu nange lwe ndibalaba mmwe." 
Hebrews13:24 Mulamuse abakulembeze bammwe bonna, n'abantu ba Katonda bonna. Ab'omu Yitaliya babalamusizza." 
Hebrews13:25 Katonda abakwatirwenga ekisa mmwe mwenna. Amiina. 
James1:1 Nze Yakobo omuweereza wa Katonda era owa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mbalamusa mmwe ab'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri ebisaasaanye wonna." 
James1:2 Abooluganda, bwe mutuukibwangako ebizibu ebya buli ngeri, musanyukenga," 
James1:3 nga mumanyi nti okukkiriza kwammwe bwe kugezebwa, kibaviiramu okugumiikiriza." 
James1:4 Okugumiikiriza bwe kunywerera ddala mu mmwe, mufuuka bantu abatuukiriridde ddala era abatalina kibabulako." 
James1:5 Oba nga mu mmwe waliwo abuliddwa amagezi, asabe Katonda agabira bonna n'ekisa awatali kukodowala, galimuweebwa." 
James1:6 Kyokka asabe ng'alina okukkiriza, nga tabuusabuusa n'akatono. Abuusabuusa, afaanaanyirizibwa n'ejjengo ly'ennyanja, empewo ly'etwala n'erizza eno n'eri." 
James1:7 Omuntu ow'engeri eyo aleme kulowooza ng'aliko ky'alifuna okuva eri Mukama," 
James1:8 kubanga wa myoyo ebiri, buli gy'adda tanywererayo." 
James1:9 Owooluganda atali wa kitiibwa, asaanidde asanyuke nga Katonda amugulumizza." 
James1:10 N'omugagga naye asaanidde asanyuke nga Katonda amutoowazizza, kubanga omugagga aliggwaawo ng'ekimuli ky'omuddo." 
James1:11 Enjuba bw'eyaka n'ebbugumu lyayo eringi, ekaza omuddo, ekimuli kyagwo ne kigwa, n'obulungi bw'endabika yaakyo ne buggwaawo. N'omugagga bw'atyo bw'alikala, ng'ali mu ebyo bye yettanira." 
James1:12 Omuntu agumiikiriza mu kugezebwa yeesiimye, kubanga bw'alimala okuwangula, aliweebwa engule ey'obulamu, Katonda gye yasuubiza abamwagala." 
James1:13 Omuntu bw'akemebwanga, tagambanga nti: “Katonda ye ankema.” Katonda takemebwa kibi, era ye yennyini takema muntu n'omu." 
James1:14 Wabula buli akemebwa, asikirizibwa era asendebwasendebwa kwegomba kwe." 
James1:15 Okwegomba okwo ne kulyoka kuba olubuto, ne kuzaala ekibi, ate ekibi ekyo bwe kimala okukula, ne kizaala okufa." 
James1:16 Kale nno baganda bange abaagalwa, temulimbibwalimbibwanga." 
James1:17 Buli kirabo ekirungi, na buli kitone ekituukiridde, kiva mu ggulu, ne kikka okuva eri Katonda Kitaffe eyatonda ebyakira ku ggulu, atayinza kuba na kufuukafuuka, wadde okulimbalimba." 
James1:18 Yateesa ku bubwe, n'atuzaala n'ekigambo eky'amazima, tulyoke tubeere n'ekifo ekisooka mu bitonde bye." 
James1:19 Baganda bange abaagalwa, mumanye kino nti buli muntu abeerenga mwangu okuwulira, kyokka alemenga kubuguutanira kwogera, era alemenga kusunguwala mangu," 
James1:20 kubanga obusungu bw'omuntu tebukola ebyo Katonda by'ayagala. 
James1:21 Kale mulekenga emize gyonna n'empisa embi. Mukkirize n'obuwombeefu ekigambo kya Katonda ekyasigibwa mu mmwe, ekiyinza okulokola obulamu bwammwe." 
James1:22 Ekigambo ekyo mukikolerengako, mulemenga kwerimba, nga mukoma ku kukiwulira buwulizi." 
James1:23 Awulira obuwulizi ekigambo n'atakikolerako, afaanaanyirizibwa n'omuntu eyeeraba mu ndabirwamu." 
James1:24 Yeeraba n'agenda, ate amangwago ne yeerabira bw'afaananye." 
James1:25 Kyokka eyeetegereza amateeka amatuufu agatufuula ab'eddembe, n'aganywererako, atali awulira obuwulizi ne yeerabira, wabula omukozi atuukiriza bye galagira, oyo anaaweebwanga omukisa mu by'akola." 
James1:26 Buli eyeerowooza nga wa ddiini, kyokka n'atafuga lulimi lwe, oyo yeerimba bwerimbi, eddiini ye teriiko ky'egasa." 
James1:27 Eddiini entuufu era eteriiko kamogo mu maaso ga Katonda Kitaffe, ye eno: okulabiriranga bamulekwa ne bannamwandu mu bunaku bwabwe, n'okwekuumanga ensi ereme kutwonoona." 
James2:1 Baganda bange, mmwe abakkiriza Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo oweekitiibwa, temusosolanga mu bantu." 
James2:2 Omuntu ayambadde engoye ennungi, n'empeta eya zaabu, bw'ayingira mu kkuŋŋaaniro lyammwe, n'omwavu ayambadde enziina naye n'ayingira," 
James2:3 ne mwaniriza ayambadde engoye ennungi, ne mumugamba nti: “Ggwe tuula wano awalungi”, ate ne mugamba omwavu nti: “Ggwe yimirira eri”, oba nti: “Tuula wansi, we nteeka ebigere byange”," 
James2:4 muba temwefudde balamuzi abalina endowooza embi? 
James2:5 Muwulire baganda bange abaagalwa! Abaavu mu nsi, Katonda si be yalonda okuba abagagga mu kukkiriza, n'okufuna Obwakabaka bwe yasuubiza abamwagala?" 
James2:6 Naye mmwe munyooma omwavu. Abagagga si be babanyigiriza mmwe, ne babasikaasikanya okubatwala mu mbuga z'amateeka?" 
James2:7 Si be bo abavvoola erinnya eddungi lye muyitibwa? 
James2:8 Naye bwe mutuukiriza etteeka erisingira ddala amateeka gonna, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Yagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala ggwe wennyini,” muba mukoze bulungi." 
James2:9 Naye bwe musosola mu bantu, muba mukoze bubi, era etteeka libasingisa omusango ogw'abamenyi b'amateeka." 
James2:10 Buli akwata amateeka gonna, kyokka n'asobya mu limu, aba n'omusango ogw'okumenya amateeka gonna," 
James2:11 kubanga eyagamba nti: “Toyendanga”, era ye yagamba nti: “Tottanga muntu”. Kale bw'otoyenda, naye n'otta omuntu, oba mumenyi wa mateeka." 
James2:12 N'olwekyo mwogerenga era mukolenga ng'ab'okusalirwa omusango, ng'amateeka agatufuula ab'eddembe bwe gali." 
James2:13 Atalina kisa, alisalirwa omusango eri Katonda awatali kisa. Naye ekisa kiwonya omuntu okusingibwa omusango." 
James2:14 Baganda bange, kigasa ki omuntu bw'agamba nti alina okukkiriza, sso nga talina bikolwa birungi? Okukkiriza okwo kuyinza okumulokola?" 
James2:15 Bwe wabaawo owooluganda omusajja oba omukazi atalina ky'ayambala, era atalina kyakulya kimumala buli lunaku," 
James2:16 omu ku mmwe n'amugamba nti: “Genda mirembe, obugume era okkute,” kyokka nga tamuwadde bye yeetaaga, ekyo kigasa ki?" 
James2:17 N'okukkiriza bwe kutyo: bwe kuba kwokka, nga tekuliiko bikolwa birungi, kuba kufu." 
James2:18 Naye oli ayinza okugamba nti: “Ggwe olina okukkiriza, nze nnina ebikolwa ebirungi.” Ndaga omuntu bw'aba n'okukkiriza, nga talina bikolwa birungi, nange nkulage okukkiriza kwange, nga nsinziira ku bikolwa byange ebirungi." 
James2:19 Okkiriza nga Katonda ali omu? Kirungi. Naye n'emyoyo emibi gikikkiriza, era ne gikankana olw'okutya." 
James2:20 Musirusiru ggwe, oyagala okumanya nti okukkiriza okutalina bikolwa birungi tekuliiko kye kugasa?" 
James2:21 Jjajjaffe Aburahamu, teyasiimibwa Katonda lwa bikolwa bye, bwe yawaayo omwana we Yisaaka ku kyoto okumwokya?" 
James2:22 Olaba nti okukkiriza kwe, kwagendera wamu n'ebikolwa bye, okukkiriza ne kutuukirira olw'ebikolwa." 
James2:23 Olwo ekyawandiikibwa ne kituukirira ekigamba nti: “Aburahamu yakkiriza Katonda, era olw'okukkiriza kwe, Katonda n'amukakasa okuba omutuukirivu, era n'amuyita mukwano gwe.”" 
James2:24 Mulaba nti omuntu asiimibwa Katonda lwa bikolwa birungi by'akola, sso si lwa kukkiriza kwokka." 
James2:25 Ne ku Rahabu malaaya si bwe kyali? Teyasiimibwa Katonda lwa bikolwa bye ebirungi, kubanga yayaniriza ababaka, n'abayamba okudduka ng'abayisa mu kkubo eddala?" 
James2:26 Kale nno ng'omubiri ogutaliimu mwoyo bwe guba omufu, n'okukkiriza bwe kutyo: bwe kutabaamu bikolwa birungi, kuba kufu." 
James3:1 Baganda bange, bangi mu mmwe muleme kuba bayigiriza, kubanga mumanyi nti ffe abayigiriza tulisalirwa omusango n'obukambwe okusinga abalala." 
James3:2 Ffenna emirundi mingi tusobya. Naye oba nga waliwo omuntu atasobya mu by'ayogera, oyo aba atuukiridde, era asobola okufuga omubiri gwe gwonna." 
James3:3 Tuteeka ebyuma mu kamwa k'embalaasi, ziryoke zituwulire, ne tuzitwala gye twagala." 
James3:4 N'amaato nago, newaakubadde manene, enkasi entono ennyo ye egagoba ne gagenda yonna yonna omugoba gy'aba ayagala." 
James3:5 N'olulimi nalwo bwe lutyo: newaakubadde katundu katono ak'omubiri, naye luyinza okwenyumiririza mu bingi. Lowooza ku kibira ekinene bwe kiyinza okwokebwa akaliro akatono." 
James3:6 N'olulimi muliro. Lujjudde obubi. Kitundu kya mubiri gwaffe, naye lwonoona omubiri gwonna. Luteekera ebitonde byonna omuliro, nga luguggya mu muliro ogutazikira." 
James3:7 Ebika by'ensolo n'eby'ennyonyi, n'eby'ebyewalula, n'eby'ebiramu eby'omu nnyanja, bifugika, era byafugibwa dda abantu." 
James3:8 Naye olulimi tewali muntu ayinza kulufuga. Olulimi kye kintu ekibi, ekitafugika, ekijjudde obutwa kattira." 
James3:9 Lwe tutenderezesa Mukama era Kitaffe, era lwe tukolimiza abantu, abaatondebwa mu kifaananyi kya Katonda." 
James3:10 Mu kamwa ke kamu, mwe muva okutendereza era n'okukolima. Baganda bange, ekyo tekigwanira kuba bwe kityo." 
James3:11 Ensulo y'amazzi emu eyinza okuvaamu amazzi agawooma n'agakaawa? 
James3:12 Baganda bange, omutiini guyinza okubala emizayiti, oba omuzabbibu okubala emitiini? Era bwe kityo n'amazzi ag'omunnyo tegayinza kuvaamu malungi." 
James3:13 Mu mmwe mulimu alina amagezi n'okutegeera? Kale abiragirenga mu mpisa ze ennungi, mu bikolwa bye ebirungi by'akola n'obwetoowaze era n'amagezi." 
James3:14 Naye mu mitima gyammwe bwe muba n'obuggya obw'akabi era n'okwefaako mwekka, mulemenga kwewaana n'okulimba nga muwakanya amazima." 
James3:15 Amagezi ag'engeri eyo tegava mu ggulu, wabula ga ku nsi, ga bantu buntu, era ga Sitaani." 
James3:16 Awaba obuggya n'abantu okwefaako bokka, wabaawo kutabuka era n'ebikolwa ebibi ebya buli ngeri." 
James3:17 Naye amagezi agava mu ggulu, okusookera ddala malongoofu, ate ga mirembe, mawombeefu, gawuliriza ensonga, gajjudde ekisa era n'ebikolwa ebirungi; meesimbu, tegaliimu bukuusa." 
James3:18 Obwenkanya kye kibala ekiva mu nsigo abaleesi b'emirembe gye basiga, nga bakolerera emirembe." 
James4:1 Entalo n'ennyombo mu mmwe ziva ku ki? Teziva ku kwegomba kwammwe okulwanira mu mibiri gyammwe? 
James4:2 Mwagala ebintu naye nga temubirina. Mutta abantu, era mwegomba ebintu, sso nga temusobola kubifuna. Muyomba, era ne mulwana. Bye mwetaaga temubifuna, kubanga temubisaba Katonda." 
James4:3 Bwe musaba temufuna kubanga musaba na mutima mubi: musaba bya kwesanyusa bwesanyusa. 
James4:4 Mmwe abantu abatali beesigwa, temumanyi nti okukwana ensi buba bulabe eri Katonda? Buli ayagala okuba mukwano gw'ensi, yeefuula mulabe wa Katonda." 
James4:5 Oba mulowooza nti ekyawandiikibwa nti: “Katonda abubira nnyo omwoyo gwe yateeka mu ffe,” tekirina kye kitegeeza?" 
James4:6 Naye ekisa Katonda ky'akwatirwa abantu, kye kisinga amaanyi. Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Katonda alwanyisa abeekulumbaza, kyokka abeetoowaza abakwatirwa ekisa.”" 
James4:7 Kale mube bawulize eri Katonda. Mulwanyise Sitaani, Sitaani anaabadduka." 
James4:8 Musemberere Katonda, naye anaabasemberera. Munaabe engalo mmwe aboonoonyi, mutukuze emitima mmwe abakuusa." 
James4:9 Munakuwale, mukube ebiwoobe, mukaabe amaziga, okuseka kwammwe kufuuke ebiwoobe, n'essanyu lyammwe lifuuke okunakuwala." 
James4:10 Mwetoowaze mu maaso ga Mukama, ye alibagulumiza." 
James4:11 Baganda bange, temwogeraganangako bubi. Ayogera obubi ku muntu munne, oba amusalira omusango, aba ayogedde bubi ku Mateeka, era ng'agasalidde omusango. Bw'osalira Amateeka omusango, oba tokwata Mateeka ago, wabula oba ogasalira musango." 
James4:12 Eyateeka amateeka era omusazi w'omusango ali omu, era ye ayinza okulokola era n'okuzikiriza. Naye ggwe asalira munno omusango, ggwe ani?" 
James4:13 Kati nno mmwe abagamba nti: “Olwaleero oba jjo tunaagenda mu kibuga gundi, tumaleyo omwaka gumu nga tusuubula, tufune amagoba”," 
James4:14 naye nga temumanyi biribaawo jjo, mumanyi wadde obulamu bwammwe nga bwe buli? Muli ng'olufu olulabika akaseera akatono ne luggwaawo." 
James4:15 Mwandigambye nti: “Mukama bw'anaayagala, tunaaba balamu, era tunaakola kino oba kiri.”" 
James4:16 Naye kaakano mwekulumbaza, ne mwenyumiriza. Okwenyumiriza okw'engeri eyo kwonna kubi." 
James4:17 N'olwekyo amanya ekirungi kye yandikoze n'atakikola, aba akoze kibi." 
James5:1 Kaakano ate mmwe abagagga, mukaabe era mulire olw'obuyinike obujja okubajjira." 
James5:2 Obugagga bwammwe buvunze, n'ebyambalo byammwe biriiriddwa ennyenje." 
James5:3 Zaabu wammwe ne ffeeza bitalazze, era obutalagge obwo bwe bulibalumiriza, ne bulya emibiri gyammwe, ng'omuliro bwe gulya. Mukuŋŋaanyizza obugagga, ng'enkomerero y'ensi eri kumpi okutuuka." 
James5:4 Empeera y'abakozi abaakola mu nnimiro zammwe, gye mwalyazaamaanya, yiino ereekaana, era omulanga gw'abo abaakola, gutuuse mu matu ga Mukama Omuyinzawaabyonna." 
James5:5 Mwesanyusizza ku nsi, ne muwoomerwa ebinyumu. Mugejjedde olunaku olw'okuttibwa." 
James5:6 Mwasala omusango okusinga oyo atagulina, ne mumutta nga tabalwanyisa." 
James5:7 Kale nno baganda bange, mugumiikirizenga okutuusa Mukama lw'alijja. N'omulimi bw'atyo bw'akola: alindirira ennimiro ye okumubalira ebibala eby'omugaso, ng'agumiikiriza okutuusa lw'alifuna enkuba esooka era n'eyo ejja oluvannyuma." 
James5:8 Nammwe mugumiikirizenga, mugume emitima, kubanga Mukama ali kumpi okujja." 
James5:9 Baganda bange, temwemulugunyizagananga, muleme okusalirwa omusango. Omulamuzi ali awo kumpi." 
James5:10 Baganda bange, mulabire ku balanzi abaayogeranga mu linnya lya Mukama, abaabonaabona, ne bagumiikiriza." 
James5:11 Abo abaagumiikiriza, tubayita ba mukisa. Mwawulira Yobu bwe yagumiikiriza, era mumanyi Mukama kye yamukolera oluvannyuma, kubanga Mukama wa kisa era musaasizi." 
James5:12 Naye baganda bange, okusingira ddala, temulayiranga newaakubadde eggulu oba ensi, wadde ekintu ekirala kyonna, naye mugambenga nti: “Weewaawo”, nga mutegeeza nti weewaawo; oba nti “Nedda”, nga mutegeeza nti nedda, muleme kuzza musango." 
James5:13 Waliwo mu mmwe ali mu buyinike? Kale yeegayirire Katonda. Waliwo asanyuka? Kale ayimbe eby'okutendereza Katonda. 
James5:14 Mu mmwe waliwo alwadde? Kale ayite abakulu b'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo, bamusabire nga bwe bamusiiga n'omuzigo mu linnya lya Mukama." 
James5:15 Okusaba okwo okujjudde okukkiriza, kuliwonya omulwadde oyo, Mukama n'amussuusa; era oba nga yakola ebibi, birimusonyiyibwa." 
James5:16 Kale nno mwatuliraganenga ebibi byammwe era musabiraganenga, mulyoke muwone. Okusaba kw'omutuukirivu kwa maanyi era kukola." 
James5:17 Eliya yali muntu nga ffe. Yasaba nnyo Katonda, enkuba ereme kutonnya ku nsi, era n'etetonnya okumala emyaka esatu n'emyezi mukaaga." 
James5:18 N'asaba nate, eggulu ne litonnyesa enkuba, ettaka ne lyeza ebibala." 
James5:19 Baganda bange, omu ku mmwe bw'awabanga n'ava ku mazima, omulala n'amukomyawo," 
James5:20 amanye nti oyo akomyawo omwonoonyi n'amuggya gy'awabidde, aliwonya omwoyo gwe okufa, era alisonyiyisa ebibi bingi." 
1Peter1:1 Nze Peetero omutume wa Yesu Kristo, mpandiikira mmwe abalondemu ba Katonda, abali kati mu Ponto, Galatiya, Kapadookiya, Asiya ne mu Bitiniya, gye mwasaasaanira." 
1Peter1:2 Okuva edda Katonda Kitaffe yabalonda mmwe, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abatukuze, muwulire Yesu Kristo, era mumansibweko omusaayi gwe. Katonda ayongere okubakwatirwa mmwe ekisa, era n'okubawa emirembe." 
1Peter1:3 Katonda, Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo yeebazibwe. Olw'okusaasira kwe okungi, yatuzaala omulundi ogwokubiri, bwe yazuukiza Yesu Kristo. Bw'atyo n'atuwa essuubi eddamu," 
1Peter1:4 ery'okufuna ebirungi ebitaggwaawo, Katonda by'abaterekedde mmwe mu ggulu, gye bitayinza kwonoonekera wadde okufuma." 
1Peter1:5 Olw'okukkiriza kwammwe, Katonda abakuuma n'obuyinza bwe, era alibalokola ku lunaku olw'enkomerero, lwe yategeka okulokolerako." 
1Peter1:6 Ekyo kibasanyusenga, newaakubadde muteekwa okunakuwala okumala akaseera, nga mugezebwa mu bizibu ebya buli ngeri," 
1Peter1:7 okugezebwa okwo kulyoke kulage nti okukkiriza kwammwe kwa mazima. Ne zaabu aggwaawo, naye agezebwa mu muliro. N'okukkiriza kwammwe okw'omuwendo okusinga zaabu, kuteekwa okugezebwa, kulyoke kusaanire ettendo, n'ekitiibwa, n'okugulumizibwa, ku lunaku Yesu Kristo lw'alirabikirako." 
1Peter1:8 Yesu oyo mumwagala, newaakubadde temumulabangako. Mumukkiriza, newaakubadde temumulaba kaakano, ne mujjula essanyu ery'ekitalo era eritalojjeka," 
1Peter1:9 ne mufuna kye mwagenderera mu kukkiriza, kwe kulokoka kw'obulamu bwammwe."
