1Peter1:10 Eby'okulokoka okwo, abalanzi abaalanga ekisa ekyo Katonda kye yali agenda okubakwatirwa mmwe, baabirowoozangako nnyo, ne babyekenneenya." 
1Peter1:11 Baagezaako okumanya ebiseera ebyo Mwoyo wa Kristo eyali mu bo bye yalanga, we birituukira, era n'engeri gye birituukamu, bwe yalanga nga Kristo bw'alibonyaabonyezebwa, era n'ekitiibwa ekiriddirira." 
1Peter1:12 Katonda yabalaga nti ebyo tebaabikola ku lwabwe, wabula ku lwammwe. By'ebyo kaakano bye mubuuliddwa abo ababategeeza Amawulire Amalungi ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, eyatumibwa okuva mu ggulu. Era by'ebyo bamalayika bye beegomba okulaba." 
1Peter1:13 Kale mubenga beetegefu era mwefugenga. Essuubi lyammwe lyonna muliteekenga mu kisa ekiribakwatirwa, Kristo bw'alirabika." 
1Peter1:14 Mube baana bawulize. Obulamu bwammwe temubutambulizanga mu kwegomba kwe mwalina nga mukyali mu butamanya," 
1Peter1:15 naye mubenga batukuvu mu mpisa zammwe zonna, nga Katonda eyabayita bw'ali omutuukirivu." 
1Peter1:16 Kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mubenga batuukirivu, kubanga nze ndi omutuukirivu.”" 
1Peter1:17 Oba nga Katonda mumuyita Kitammwe, ate ng'asala omusango awatali kusaliriza, ng'asinziira ku ebyo buli muntu by'akola, kale mumussengamu ekitiibwa ekiseera kyonna eky'obulamu bwammwe." 
1Peter1:18 Mumanyi nga ffeeza oba zaabu ebiggwaawo, si bye byabanunula mu mpisa zammwe ezitaliimu, ze mwafuna ku bajjajjammwe." 
1Peter1:19 Mwanunulibwa musaayi ogw'omuwendo ennyo, omusaayi gwa Kristo, ali ng'omwana gw'endiga ogutaliiko kamogo wadde ebbala." 
1Peter1:20 Kristo oyo yali yalonderwa dda kino nga n'ensi tennatondebwa, kyokka mu nnaku zino ezaakayita, n'alabibwa ku lwammwe." 
1Peter1:21 Mu ye mwe muyita okukkiriza Katonda eyamuzuukiza n'amuwa ekitiibwa, okukkiriza kwammwe n'okusuubira kwammwe ne kulyoka kunywerera ku Katonda." 
1Peter1:22 Kaakano nga bwe mumaze okutukuza emyoyo gyammwe nga mukkiriza amazima, ne mwagalanira ddala ng'abooluganda, mweyongere okwagalana n'omutima ogutaliimu bukuusa." 
1Peter1:23 Mwazaalibwa omulundi ogwokubiri. Ekyo ekiggwaawo si kye kyabazaala, wabula mwazaalibwa ekyo ekitaggwaawo: kye kigambo kya Katonda ekiwa abantu obulamu era ekyolubeerera." 
1Peter1:24 Ng'ekyawandikibwa bwe kigamba, “Abantu bonna bali ng'omuddo, n'ekitiibwa kyabwe kiri ng'ekimuli ky'omuddo. Omuddo gukala, ekimuli kyagwo ne kigwa." 
1Peter1:25 Naye ekigambo kya Mukama kibeerera emirembe gyonna.” Era ekigambo ekyo, ge Mawulire Amalungi agaabategeezebwa." 
1Peter2:1 Kale mulekenga ettima lyonna, n'obulimba bwonna, n'obukuusa, n'obuggya, n'okwogera obubi kwonna." 
1Peter2:2 Ng'abaana abaakazaalibwa bwe beegomba amata, nammwe mwegombenga amata amalungi agagasa omwoyo, mulyoke muganywe mukule era mulokolebwe." 
1Peter2:3 Ng'ekyawandiikibwa bwe kigamba, “Mwalega ku bulungi bwa Mukama.”" 
1Peter2:4 Mujje gy'ali. Ye lye jjinja eddamu, abantu lye baasuula nga balowooza nti terigasa, kyokka eryalondebwa Katonda era ery'omugaso ennyo." 
1Peter2:5 Mujje gy'ali ng'amayinja amalamu, muzimbe ennyumba ey'omwoyo. Mu yo, mube bakabona abatukuvu, abaweereza ebitambiro eby'omwoyo, ebisiimibwa Katonda mu Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Nalonda ejjinja ery'omuwendo, kati lye nteeka mu Siyooni, libe ekkulu ery'entabiro. Era amukkiriza taliswazibwa”" 
1Peter2:7 Ejjinja lino lya muwendo nnyo eri mmwe abakkiriza, naye eri abo abatakkiriza: “Lye jjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, eryafuuka ekkulu ery'entabiro.”" 
1Peter2:8 Era nti: “Lye jjinja abantu kwe beekoona; lwe lwazi kwe beesittala ne bagwa.” Beesittala, kubanga baajeemera ekigambo kya Katonda. Bwe batyo bwe baateekerwateekerwa." 
1Peter2:9 Naye mmwe muli lulyo lulondobe, bakabona ba Kabaka, ggwanga ttukuvu, bantu ba Katonda bennyini, abaalondebwamu mulyoke mulangirire ebirungi bya Katonda eyabayita okuva mu kizikiza, okuyingira mu kitangaala kye ekyewuunyizibwa. 2:14; Yis 9:2" 
1Peter2:10 Edda temwali ggwanga, naye kaakano muli ggwanga lya Katonda. Edda mwali temusaasirwa Katonda, kyokka kaakano abasaasidde." 
1Peter2:11 Abaagalwa, muli bagenyi abayita obuyisi mu nsi muno. Mbeegayirira mwewale ebyo omubiri bye gwegomba, ebirwanyisa omwoyo." 
1Peter2:12 Mukuumenga empisa zammwe ennungi, olwo abantu ab'ensi be mulimu, newaakubadde baboogerako nti ebikolwa byammwe bibi, basobole okulaba ebirungi bye mukola, bagulumize Katonda ku lunaku lw'alijjirako." 
1Peter2:13 Ku bwa Mukama, muwulire buli kiragiro eky'abo abalina obuyinza, oba kabaka alina obuyinza obw'oku ntikko," 
1Peter2:14 oba abafuzi abalala b'atuma okubonerezanga abakola ebikolwa ebibi, era n'okusiimanga abo abakola ebikolwa ebirungi." 
1Peter2:15 Katonda ayagala mukole ebikolwa ebirungi, musirise abantu abasiru era abatalina kye bamanyi." 
1Peter2:16 Mube ba ddembe, naye eddembe eryo muleme kulyesigamako okuyisa obubi, wabula mulikozese ng'abaweereza ba Katonda." 
1Peter2:17 Mussengamu abantu bonna ekitiibwa, mwagalenga abooluganda. Mutyenga Katonda. Mussengamu abafuzi ekitiibwa." 
1Peter2:18 Abakozi muwulirenga bakama bammwe, mubassengamu ekitiibwa ekijjuvu, si abo bokka abalungi era abakwatampola, naye n'abo abakambwe." 
1Peter2:19 Kya mukisa omuntu bw'abonyaabonyezebwa awatali nsonga, n'agumiikiriza ng'alowooza ku Katonda." 
1Peter2:20 Ttendo ki lye mufuna bwe mugumiikiriza mu kubonerezebwa olw'okukola ebibi? Naye bwe mugumiikiriza mu kubonyaabonyezebwa olw'okukola ebirungi, ekyo Katonda akisiima." 
1Peter2:21 Ekyo kye mwayitirwa, kubanga ne Kristo yabonyaabonyezebwa ku lwammwe, n'abalekera ekyokulabirako, mulyoke mumugoberere." 
1Peter2:22 Ye takolanga kibi, tayogeranga bya bukuusa." 
1Peter2:23 Bwe yavumibwa, ye teyavuma. Abaamubonyaabonya teyabeewerera, wabula yeewaayo eri Katonda asala omusango nga tasaliriza." 
1Peter2:24 Ye yennyini yeetikka ebibi byaffe mu mubiri gwe ku musaalaba, tulyoke tufe eri ekibi, tube balamu mu butuukirivu. Ebiwundu bye, bye byabawonya." 
1Peter2:25 Mwali muwabye ng'endiga, naye kaakano mukomyewo eri omusumba era omulabirizi w'obulamu bwammwe." 
1Peter3:1 Bwe mutyo nammwe abakazi abafumbo, muwulirenga babbammwe, abamu ku bo bwe baba nga tebakkiriza kigambo kya Katonda, balyoke baleetebwe mu kukkiriza olw'empisa zammwe ennungi, nga temulina na kye mubagambye," 
1Peter3:2 kubanga bajja kulaba empisa zammwe ennongoofu era ezibassisaamu ekitiibwa. 
1Peter3:3 Okweyonja kwammwe kulemenga kuba mu byakungulu: mu misono gy'enviiri, n'egy'amajolobera aga zaabu, n'egy'ebyambalo," 
1Peter3:4 naye kube kwa mu mutima munda, okweyonja okutayonooneka, okw'omwoyo omuwombeefu era omuteefu. Okwo kwe kw'omuwendo ennyo mu maaso ga Katonda," 
1Peter3:5 kubanga n'abakazi ab'edda abatukuvu, abaasuubiranga mu Katonda, bwe batyo bwe beeyonjanga, era nga bawulize eri babbaabwe." 
1Peter3:6 Saara bw'atyo bwe yali. Yawuliranga Aburahamu, ng'amuyita mukama we. Oba mwagala okuba bawala be, mube ba mpisa nnungi, nga tewali kibatiisa." 
1Peter3:7 Nammwe abasajja abafumbo, mubenga ne bakazi bammwe mu bulamu bwammwe obw'obufumbo, nga mumanyi nti bo mu kikula kyabwe banafu. Mubassengamu ekitiibwa, kubanga nabo Katonda alibakwatirwa wamu nammwe ekisa ekiwa obulamu. Olwo essaala zammwe teziibengako kiziziyiza." 
1Peter3:8 Eky'enkomerero, mwenna mubenga n'emmeeme emu, buli omu alumirwenga munne, mwagalanenga ng'abooluganda, mubenga ba kisa era beetoowaze." 
1Peter3:9 Oyo akoze ekibalumya, mmwe temumukolanga kibi. Abavumye, mmwe temumuvumanga, wabula mumusabirenga mukisa, kubanga ekyo kye mwayitirwa, mulyoke mufune omukisa." 
1Peter3:10 Ekyawandiikibwa kigamba nti: “Ayagala okufuna obulamu n'okubeera mu ddembe, aziyize olulimi lwe okwogera ekibi, n'emimwa gye okwogera eby'obukuusa." 
1Peter3:11 Era yeewalenga ebibi, akolenga ebirungi. Anoonyenga emirembe, era agigobererenga," 
1Peter3:12 kubanga abakola ebituufu, Mukama abatunuuliza kisa, era awulira bye basaba. Kyokka abakola ebibi abatunuuliza bukambwe.”" 
1Peter3:13 Bwe mwefubirira okukola ebituufu, ani anaabakola akabi?" 
1Peter3:14 Naye ne bwe mubonyaabonyezebwa olw'okukola ebituufu, mulina omukisa. Temubangako be mutya, era temweraliikiriranga." 
1Peter3:15 Mukama wammwe Kristo mumussengamu ekitiibwa mu mitima gyammwe, era mubenga beetegefu bulijjo okuddamu buli muntu ababuuza okunnyonnyola essuubi lye mulina," 
1Peter3:16 wabula nga muddamu n'obuwombeefu n'eggonjebwa. Mubenga n'omutima omulungi, abo ababavuma era ababoogerako obubi olw'empisa zammwe ennungi ez'abagoberezi ba Kristo, balyoke baswale." 
1Peter3:17 Kirungi okubonyaabonyezebwa olw'okukola ebirungi, bwe kuba nga kwe kusiima kwa Katonda, okusinga okubonyaabonyezebwa olw'okukola ebibi." 
1Peter3:18 Ne Kristo yabonyaabonyezebwa olw'ebibi byaffe, n'atufiirira omulundi gumu n'amala. Ye omutuukirivu yafiirira ffe aboonoonyi, alyoke atuzze eri Katonda. Mu mubiri yattibwa, n'addizibwa obulamu mu mwoyo." 
1Peter3:19 Era mu mwoyo, mwe yagendera okuyigiriza emyoyo egiri mu kkomera." 
1Peter3:20 Egyo gye myoyo egy'abo edda abaagaana okuwulira Katonda ng'akyabagumiikirizza, mu kiseera Noowa kye yazimbiramu eryato. Mu lyato eryo abantu abatono, bonna awamu munaana, mwe baawonyezebwa amazzi." 
1Peter3:21 Amazzi ago gaali kabonero k'okubatizibwa, okubalokola mmwe kaakano. Okubatizibwa tekuba kunaazaako kko lya mubiri, wabula kuba kusaba Katonda atuwe omutima omulongoofu olw'okuzuukira kwa Yesu Kristo," 
1Peter3:22 eyalinnya mu ggulu, era aliraanye Katonda ku ludda lwe olwa ddyo, ng'afuga bamalayika n'ab'obuyinza n'ab'amaanyi ab'omu ggulu." 
1Peter4:1 Kale nga Kristo bwe yabonyaabonyezebwa mu mubiri, nammwe mubenga bamalirivu nga ye, kubanga omuntu abonaabona mu mubiri, aba amaze okuleka ekibi," 
1Peter4:2 alyoke amale obulamu bwe bw'akyasigazizza ku nsi, ng'agoberera ebyo Katonda by'ayagala, sso si ebyo ebitwaliriza abantu mu bubi." 
1Peter4:3 Mu biseera ebyayita mwafuna obudde obumala okukola ebyo abantu ab'ensi bye baagala. Mwali mwemalidde mu bwenzi, mu kwegomba okubi, mu butamiivu, mu binyumu, mu bubaga obw'omwenge, ne mu kusinza ebitali Katonda, sso nga kwa muzizo." 
1Peter4:4 Kaakano abantu ab'ensi beewuunya bwe balaba nga temukyabeegattako mu bya ffujjo ng'eryo, ne babavuma." 
1Peter4:5 Baliwoza mu maaso ga Katonda, eyeeteeseteese okusala omusango gw'abalamu n'abafu." 
1Peter4:6 Abafu baasalirwa omusango ng'abantu abalala, nga bakyali mu bulamu obw'omubiri. Kyokka nabo baategeezebwa Amawulire Amalungi nga bamaze okufa, balyoke babe balamu mu mwoyo nga Katonda." 
1Peter4:7 Enkomerero ya byonna eri kumpi. N'olwekyo mubenga beegendereza era beetegefu, nga mwegayirira Katonda." 
1Peter4:8 N'okusingira ddala, mwagalanenga mu mazima, kubanga okwagala kusonyiyisa ebibi bingi." 
1Peter4:9 Mwaniriziganenga awatali kwemulugunya. 
1Peter4:10 Mube bawanika abalungi, Katonda be yakwasa ebirabo bye ebya buli ngeri. Buli omu ekirabo kye yafuna akikozesenga okugasa abalala." 
1Peter4:11 Oyo ayogera, ayogere ebigambo Katonda by'amuwa okwogera. Oyo aweereza, aweereze n'amaanyi Katonda g'amuwa, mu byonna Katonda alyoke agulumizibwenga mu Yesu Kristo, alina ekitiibwa n'obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
1Peter4:12 Abaagalwa, bwe mugezebwa mu muliro, temwewuunyanga ng'abatuukiddwako ekitali kya bulijjo." 
1Peter4:13 Wabula musanyukenga olw'okugabana ku kubonaabona kwa Kristo, ekitiibwa kye bwe kirirabika, mulyoke mujjule essanyu." 
1Peter4:14 Bwe muvumibwa olw'okuba abagoberezi ba Kristo, muli ba mukisa, kubanga Mwoyo oweekitiibwa, Mwoyo wa Katonda, ali mu mmwe." 
1Peter4:15 Waleme kubaawo n'omu ku mmwe abonyaabonyezebwa nga bamulanga okuba omutemu oba omubbi, oba omukozi w'obubi, oba eyeeyingiza mu by'abalala." 
1Peter4:16 Wabula singa omuntu abonyaabonyezebwa nga bamulanga okuba Omukristo, takwatibwanga nsonyi. Atenderezenga Katonda olw'okuyitibwa erinnya eryo." 
1Peter4:17 Ekiseera kituuse omusango okusalibwa nga gutandikira ku ba mu nnyumba ya Katonda. Kale oba nga gutandikidde ku ffe, ku nkomerero guliba gutya ku abo abatakkiriza Mawulire Amalungi agava eri Katonda?" 
1Peter4:18 Era, “Oba nga kizibu oyo akola ebituufu okulokolebwa, oyo atassaamu Katonda kitiibwa n'omwonoonyi baliba batya?”" 
1Peter4:19 Kale nno abo ababonaabona nga Katonda bw'ayagala, bakolenga ebirungi, ng'obulamu bwabwe babukwasa Omutonzi omwesigwa." 
1Peter5:1 Kaakano neegayirira abo abakulembeze mu mmwe. Nange ndi mukulembeze munnaabwe, eyalabirako ddala ku kubonyaabonyezebwa kwa Kristo, era abalirwa mu abo abaligabana ku kitiibwa ekigenda okulabika. Mbeegayirira," 
1Peter5:2 mulunde eggana lya Katonda eryabakwasibwa. Mulirabirire nga Katonda bw'ayagala, si lwa buwaze, wabula nga mwagala. Mukole n'omwoyo ogwewaayo okuweereza, nga temululunkanira kufuna mpeera." 
1Peter5:3 Muleme kwefuula bafuzi b'abo be mwakwasibwa, naye mube kyakulabirako gye bali." 
1Peter5:4 Olwo omusumba omukulu bw'alirabika, muliweebwa engule eyeekitiibwa etefuma." 
1Peter5:5 Nammwe abavubuka muwulirenga abakulu. Mwenna muweerezaganenga nga mujjudde obwetoowaze, kubanga “Katonda tayagala beekulumbaza, kyokka abeetoowaze abakwatirwa ekisa.”" 
1Peter5:6 Kale mwetoowazenga wansi w'omukono gwa Katonda ogw'amaanyi, ye alyoke abagulumize ekiseera nga kituuse." 
1Peter5:7 Mumukwasenga byonna ebibeeraliikiriza, kubanga ye abalabirira." 
1Peter5:8 Mwegendereze era mutunule. Omulabe wammwe Sitaani, atambulatambula ng'empologoma ewuluguma, ng'anoonya gw'anaalya." 
1Peter5:9 Mumuziyize nga muli banywevu mu kukkiriza kwammwe, nga mumanyi nti ne baganda bammwe abali mu nsi yonna, babonaabona nga mmwe." 
1Peter5:10 Bwe mulimala okubonyaabonyezebwako akaseera akatono, Katonda nnannyini kisa, eyabayita okugabana awamu ne Kristo ku kitiibwa kye ekitaggwaawo, ye yennyini alibazza mu mbeera ennungi, alibanyweza, era alibawa amaanyi." 
1Peter5:11 Oyo abe n'obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
1Peter5:12 Mbawandiikidde ebbaluwa eno ennyimpi nga nnyambibwako Siluvaano owooluganda, gwe mmanyi nga mwesigwa. Ngibawandiikidde nga mbakakasa nti ekyo kye kisa kya Katonda kyennyini, era nga mbakuutira okukinywereramu." 
1Peter5:13 Ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Babilooni, nakyo ekyalondebwa Katonda nga mmwe, kibalamusizza. N'omwana wange Mariko naye abalamusizza." 
1Peter5:14 Mulamusagane mu ngeri eraga nti mwagalana. Emirembe gibenga nammwe mwenna aba Kristo. 
2Peter1:1 Nze Simooni Peetero omuweereza era omutume wa Yesu Kristo, mbawandiikira mmwe abaafuna okukkiriza okw'omuwendo ennyo, nga ffe kwe twafuna mu butuukirivu bwa Katonda waffe, era Omulokozi waffe Yesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:2 Katonda ayongere okubakwatirwa mmwe ekisa era n'okubawa emirembe, nga mweyongera okumumanya era n'okumanya Yesu Mukama waffe." 
2Peter1:3 Mukama waffe oyo, mu buyinza bwe nga Katonda, yatuwa byonna bye twetaaga mu bulamu ne mu kumuweereza, nga tumanyi oyo eyatuyita okugabana ku kitiibwa kye ne ku bulungi bwe." 
2Peter1:4 Mu byo mwe yatuweera ebirabo ebinene era eby'omuwendo ennyo bye yatusuubiza, olw'ebirabo ebyo, muwone okuzikirira okuli mu nsi, okuleetebwa okwegomba okubi, mulyoke mugabane ku bwakatonda bwe." 
2Peter1:5 Kale musseeyo nnyo omwoyo, ku kukkiriza kwammwe mwongereko ebikolwa ebirungi, ku bikolwa ebirungi mwongereko okumanya," 
2Peter1:6 ku kumanya mwongereko okwefuga, ku kwefuga mwongereko okugumiikiriza, ku kugumiikiriza mwongereko okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa," 
2Peter1:7 ku kussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa mwongereko okwagalana ng'abooluganda, ku kwagalana ng'abooluganda mwongereko okwagala abantu bonna." 
2Peter1:8 Ebyo bwe muba nabyo ne byeyongera obungi, biribafuula ba mugaso, era abakola ebikolwa ebirungi mu kumanya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:9 Atalina ebyo, alaba kumpi, era muzibe awunaawuna, era aba yeerabidde ng'ebibi bye eby'edda byamusonyiyibwa." 
2Peter1:10 Kale abooluganda, mweyongerenga okufuba ennyo okunywerera mu kuyitibwa kwammwe, ne mu kulondebwa kwammwe. Bwe mukola bwe mutyo, tewali kiribasuula." 
2Peter1:11 Olwo muliyingizibwa n'ekitiibwa mu Bwakabaka obutaggwaawo, obwa Mukama waffe era Omulokozi waffe Yesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:12 N'olwekyo, ebyo njija kubibajjukizanga bulijjo, newaakubadde nga mubimanyi, era nga munyweredde mu mazima ge mwafuna." 
2Peter1:13 Era ndowooza nti nga nkyali mulamu, kituufu okubakubirizanga nga mbajjukiza," 
2Peter1:14 kubanga mmanyi nga nnaatera okweyambula omubiri guno, nga Mukama waffe Yesu bwe yantegeeza." 
2Peter1:15 Njija kukola kye nsobola, okubateerawo ebiribasobozesa okujjukiranga ebyo buli kaseera, nze nga mmaze okufa." 
2Peter1:16 Bwe twabategeeza obuyinza bwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo n'okujja kwe, tetwayogera ngero ezaayiiyizibwa, wabula ekitiibwa kye twakirabirako ddala n'amaaso gaffe." 
2Peter1:17 Twaliwo nga Katonda Kitaffe amuwa ekitiibwa n'ettendo, eddoboozi bwe lyava mu Kitiibwa Ekinene, ne limwogerako nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa, era gwe nsiimira ddala.”" 
2Peter1:18 Eddoboozi eryo, ffe ffennyini twaliwulira nga liva mu ggulu, bwe twali awamu naye ku lusozi olutukuvu." 
2Peter1:19 N'olwekyo tweyongedde okufuna obukakafu ku ebyo abalanzi bye baayogera. Musaanidde okubissaako omwoyo, kubanga biri ng'ettaala eyakira mu kifo eky'ekizikiza, okutuusa obudde lwe bulikya, emmunyeenye ey'oku makya n'eyaka mu mitima gyammwe." 
2Peter1:20 Okusookera ddala, mutegeere kino nti buli kigambo ky'abalanzi ekyawandiikibwa, tewali ayinza kukinnyonnyola ku bubwe yekka," 
2Peter1:21 kubanga tewali mulanzi yali alanze nga yeeyagalidde, wabula abalanzi baayogeranga ebiva eri Katonda, nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ye aboogeza." 
2Peter2:1 Nga bwe waaliwo abalanzi ab'obulimba mu bantu ba Katonda, ne mu mmwe bwe walibaawo abayigiriza ab'obulimba. Balireeta mu nkiso okuyigiriza okukyamu okuzikiriza. Era balyegaana Mukama waabwe eyabanunula, ne beereetera okuzikirizibwa amangu." 
2Peter2:2 Bangi baligoberera empisa zaabwe embi ez'obukaba, ne bavumaganya Ekkubo ery'amazima." 
2Peter2:3 Olw'omululu gwabwe, balifuna amagoba mu mmwe, nga bakozesa ebigambo eby'obulimba. Omulamuzi yamala dda okwetegeka okubasalira omusango okubasinga era oyo ow'okubazikiriza, tasumagira." 
2Peter2:4 Katonda teyasaasira bamalayika abaayonoona, wabula yabasuula mu lukonko emagombe, n'abasibira eyo mu kizikiza, okutuusa lwe balisalirwa omusango." 
2Peter2:5 Era teyasaasira nsi ey'edda, wabula yaleeta omujjuzo ku nsi y'abatamussaamu kitiibwa. Noowa eyakubirizanga abantu okuyisa obulungi, Katonda gwe yawonyaawo, n'abalala musanvu." 
2Peter2:6 Katonda yasalira ebibuga Sodoma ne Gomora omusango, n'abizikiriza n'omuliro, n'abifuula ekyokulabirako eri abo abatalimussaamu kitiibwa." 
2Peter2:7 Yawonya Looti eyali akola ebituufu, era eyali asobeddwa ennyo olw'empisa ez'obukaba ez'abantu ababi." 
2Peter2:8 Omuntu oyo eyali akola ebituufu, ebikolwa byabwe eby'obujeemu bye yalabanga ne bye yawuliranga ng'ali mu bo, buli lunaku byamuleeteranga okunyolwa mu mwoyo gwe omulungi." 
2Peter2:9 Mukama amanyi okuggya mu buzibu abo abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, n'okukuuma ababi okutuusa ku lunaku olw'okusalirwako omusango babonerezebwe," 
2Peter2:10 naddala abo abagoberera okwegomba okubi okw'omubiri ne banyooma okufugibwa Katonda. Abayigiriza ab'obulimba abo tebaliiko kye batya. Beefaako bokka, tebakwatibwa nsonyi kuvuma baakitiibwa." 
2Peter2:11 Sso newaakubadde nga bamalayika be basinga abantu bano amaanyi n'obuyinza, tebabawawaabira mu maaso ga Mukama nga babavuma." 
2Peter2:12 Abantu bano bali ng'ensolo obusolo ezitalina magezi, ezizaalibwa okukwatibwa zittibwe. Bavuma ebintu bye batategeera. Nabo balizikirizibwa ng'ensolo ezo," 
2Peter2:13 baboneebone, nga ye mpeera y'ebibi byabwe. Essanyu lyabwe, kwe kumala olunaku lwonna mu bisanyusa emibiri gyabwe. Be bantu abakwasa ensonyi, era abaswaza, bwe beegatta mu mmwe okulya, sso nga batiguka mu masanyu gaabwe." 
2Peter2:14 Amaaso gaabwe gajjudde obwenzi. Tebakkuta kibi. Basendasenda abantu abatali banywevu. Emitima gyabwe gijjudde omululu. Ba kuzikirira. 
2Peter2:15 Baaleka ekkubo ettuufu, ne bawaba, ne bakwata ekkubo lya Balamu omwana wa Bewori, eyayagala okukola ekibi alyoke afune empeera," 
2Peter2:16 kyokka n'anenyezebwa olw'ekibi kye, endogoyi eteyogera, bwe yayogera ng'omuntu, n'eziyiza eddalu ly'omulanzi oyo." 
2Peter2:17 Abantu abo, bali ng'enzizi ezitaliimu mazzi, era ng'ebire ebitwalibwa embuyaga. Ekifo ekibakuumirwa, kya kizikiza ekikutte zzigizigi." 
2Peter2:18 Boogera ebigambo eby'okwekuza era ebitaliimu makulu, ne basendasenda mu kwegomba okubi okw'omubiri ne mu bukaba, abo abaakava mu bantu abali mu nsobi." 
2Peter2:19 Babasuubiza eddembe, sso nga bo bennyini empisa embi zibafuga buddu, kubanga omuntu aba muddu w'ekyo ekimuwangudde." 
2Peter2:20 Abo abadduka obugwagwa bw'ensi, olw'okumanya Mukama waffe era Omulokozi Yesu Kristo, ate ne baddamu okubwesibamu ne bubawangula, embeera yaabwe ey'oluvannyuma, eba mbi okusinga eyasooka." 
2Peter2:21 Abantu abo, ekyandibasingidde obulungi, bwe butamanya kkubo lya butuukirivu, okusinga lwe bamala okulimanya ne balivaamu, era ne bava ku biragiro ebitukuvu ebyabaweebwa." 
2Peter2:22 Ekyabatuukako kikakasa nti olugero lutuufu olugamba nti: “Embwa eddidde ebisesemye byayo.” Era nti: “Embizzi enaaziddwa, ezzeemu okwekulukuunya mu bitosi.”" 
2Peter3:1 Abaagalwa, kaakano eno ye bbaluwa yange eyookubiri gye mbawandiikira. Mu bbaluwa zombi ngezezzaako okubakubiriza okuba n'endowooza eteriimu bukuusa," 
2Peter3:2 mulyoke mujjukire ebigambo ebyayogerwa edda abalanzi abatukuvu, n'ebiragiro bya Mukama era Omulokozi, ebyabaweebwa abatume bammwe." 
2Peter3:3 Okusookera ddala, mumanye kino nti mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma, walibaawo abantu abagoberera okwegomba kwabwe okubi. Abantu abo balibasekerera mmwe," 
2Peter3:4 nga bagamba nti: “Eyasuubiza nti alijja aluwa? Kasookedde bajjajjaffe bafa, ebintu byonna bikyali nga bwe byali okuviira ddala ku kutondebwa kw'ensi!”" 
2Peter3:5 Kino bakyeyisaako bweyisa. Bamanyi nti edda Katonda yayogera bwogezi, eggulu n'ensi ne bitondebwa, ensi n'ekolebwa ng'eggyibwa mu mazzi, era n'eteekebwa wakati waago." 
2Peter3:6 Amazzi ago era ge gaasaanyaawo ensi ey'edda, n'ezikirira." 
2Peter3:7 Ekigambo kya Katonda ekyo kyennyini, kye kibeesaawo eggulu n'ensi ebiriwo kaakano, ne kibikuuma okutuusa lwe biryokebwa omuliro ku lunaku olw'okusalirako omusango, n'okuzikirira kw'abantu abatassaamu Katonda kitiibwa." 
2Peter3:8 Abaagalwa, kino temukyerabiranga nti eri Mukama, olunaku olumu kye kimu n'emyaka olukumi, n'emyaka olukumi kye kimu n'olunaku olumu." 
2Peter3:9 Mukama talwawo kutuukiriza kye yasuubiza ng'abamu bwe balowooza, kyokka abagumiikiriza mmwe, nga tayagala wabeewo azikirira, wabula bonna beenenye." 
2Peter3:10 Naye Olunaku Mukama lw'alisalirako omusango lulijja ng'omubbi. Ku olwo eggulu lirivaawo nga liwuuma nnyo, n'ebiririko birisaanuusibwa omuliro, era ensi n'ebigikolerwako birisirikka." 
2Peter3:11 Oba ng'ebintu ebyo byonna bigenda kuzikirizibwa bwe bityo, mugwanidde kubeera mutya? Mu bulamu bwammwe mugwanidde kuba batukuvu era abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa," 
2Peter3:12 nga mulindirira era nga mwegomba nnyo Olunaku Katonda lw'alisalirako omusango lutuuke. Ku lunaku olwo, eggulu lirikoleera omuliro ne liggya, n'ebiririko birisaanuusibwa omuliro." 
2Peter3:13 Kyokka nga Katonda bwe yatusuubiza, tulindirira eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya, omuli obutuukirivu." 
2Peter3:14 Kale abaagalwa, nga bwe mulindirira ebyo, mufube, Mukama abasange nga muli mirembe mu maaso ge, nga temuliiko bbala wadde akamogo." 
2Peter3:15 Mumanye nti okugumiikiriza kwa Mukama waffe, gwe mukisa gwammwe ogw'okulokolebwa. Ne muganda waffe omwagalwa Pawulo bw'atyo bwe yabawandiikira mu magezi Katonda ge yamuwa." 
2Peter3:16 Ebyo abyogerako mu bbaluwa ze zonna. Mu zo mulimu ebimu ebizibu okutegeera, abantu abatamanyi n'abatali banywevu, bye bakyamya, nga bwe bakola ne ku byawandiikibwa ebirala, ne kibaviiramu okuzikirira." 
2Peter3:17 Kale nno mmwe abaagalwa, nga ebyo bwe mubitegedde nga bukyali, mwerinde muleme kubuzibwabuzibwa bukyamu bw'ababi, ne muva we munyweredde." 
2Peter3:18 Naye mukule nga muyambibwa Mukama waffe era Omulokozi Yesu Kristo, nga mweyongera okumumanya. Yennyini aweebwenga ekitiibwa, kaakano n'emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
1John1:1 Tubabuulira ku Kigambo ow'obulamu, eyaliwo okuviira ddala olubereberye. Twawulira by'ayogera, twamulaba n'amaaso gaffe, twamutunuulira, era twamukwatako n'engalo zaffe."

1John1:2 Obulamu obwo bwe bwalagibwa, twabulaba. Kale tubwogerako, ne tubategeeza mmwe eby'obulamu obwo obutaggwaawo, obwali awali Kitaffe, era obwatulagibwa."
