Jude1:1 Nze Yuda omuweereza wa Yesu Kristo, era muganda wa Yakobo, mpandiikira mmwe abaayitibwa, ne mwagalibwa Katonda Kitaffe, era abakuumirwa Yesu Kristo." 
Jude1:2 Okusaasira, n'emirembe era n'okwagala byeyongere mu mmwe." 
Jude1:3 Abaagalwa, bwe nali nga nfuba okubawandiikira ku kulokolebwa kwaffe ffenna, ne ndaba nga nteekwa okubawandiikira, nga mbakubiriza okulwanirira okukkiriza, abatukuvu kwe baaweebwa omulundi ogumu ne biggwa." 
Jude1:4 Kubanga abantu abamu abatatya Katonda bebbirira ne beetabika mu mmwe. Be bo abaayogerwako edda nga bwe balisalirwa omusango okubasinga. Be bantu abafuula ekisa kya Katonda ekyekwaso eky'okukolerako eby'obwenzi, ne beegaana Omufuzi waffe omu yekka, era Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Jude1:5 Newaakubadde bino byonna mwabimanya dda, njagala okubajjukiza nti Mukama bwe yamala okuggya abantu be mu Misiri, oluvannyuma yazikiriza abo abatakkiriza." 
Jude1:6 Ne bamalayika abaasukka obukulu bwabwe we bukoma, ne bava mu kifo kyabwe, mujjukire nti Katonda abakuumira mu kizikiza nga basibiddwa enjegere, ze batalivaamu ennaku zonna, okutuusa olunaku olukulu olw'okusalirako omusango lwe lulituuka." 
Jude1:7 Era mu ngeri ye emu, ab'omu Sodoma ne Gomora, n'ebibuga ebirala ebyali biriraanyeewo, abaayenda, ne bakola ebitali bya buwangwa, baaweebwa ekibonerezo eky'omuliro ogutazikira, ne baba ekyokulabirako." 
Jude1:8 Bano nabo bwe bali. Balimbwalimbwa ebirooto byabwe, ne bamalamu emibiri gyabwe ekitiibwa, ne banyooma obuyinza bwa Katonda, era ne bavuma abeekitiibwa ab'omu ggulu." 
Jude1:9 Sso nga Mikayeli ssaabamalayika, bwe yali ayomba ne Sitaani, nga bakaayanira omubiri gwa Musa, teyaguma kumugamba bigambo bivuma ng'amusalira omusango, wabula yagamba nti: “Katonda akunenye!”" 
Jude1:10 Kyokka abo, byonna bye batategeera babivuma; ate ebyo bye bategeera mu buwangwa bwabwe ng'ensolo ezitalina magezi, bye bibazikiriza." 
Jude1:11 Zibasanze, kubanga ekkubo bakutte lya Kayini. Olw'okwagala ebyokufuna, bagudde mu nsobi ya Balamu. Bajeemye nga Koora, ne bazikirira nga ye." 
Jude1:12 Embaga zammwe mwe mulagira okwagalana, baziziyiza okugenda obulungi. Bo bajjirira kulya, nga tebakwatibwa na nsonyi okwefaako bokka. Bali ng'ebire ebitwalibwa embuyaga, ne bitavaamu nkuba. Bali ng'emiti egitaliiko bibala mu makungula, egifiiridde ddala, ne gisimbulwa n'emirandira." 
Jude1:13 Bali ng'amayengo g'ennyanja esiikuuse: babimba ejjovu ly'ebikolwa byabwe eby'ensonyi. Bali ng'emmunyeenye ezenjeera, bategekeddwa okubeeranga mu kizikiza emirembe n'emirembe." 
Jude1:14 Be bo Enoka ow'omusanvu okuva ku Adamu, be yayogerako bwe yalanga nti: “Laba, Mukama ajja n'enkumi n'enkumi z'abatukuvu be," 
Jude1:15 okusalira abantu bonna omusango gusinge bonna abatatya Katonda, olwa byonna bye baakolera mu butamutya, n'olw'ebigambo byonna ebibi, aboonoonyi abatamutya bye baamwogerako.”" 
Jude1:16 Be bo abatolotooma, abeemulugunya, era abagoberera okwegomba kwabwe okubi. Akamwa kaabwe koogera ebigambo eby'okwekulumbaza, era bawaanawaana abalala, olw'okwegasa bennyini." 
Jude1:17 Naye mmwe abaagalwa, mujjukire ebigambo ebyayogerwa edda abatume ba Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Jude1:18 Baabagamba mmwe nti: “Mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma, walibaawo abasekerera abakkiriza, era abagoberera okwegomba kwabwe okubi, nga tebassaamu Katonda kitiibwa.”" 
Jude1:19 Be bo abaleeta okwawukana, abeemalidde ku by'ensi, era abatalina Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Jude1:20 Naye mmwe abaagalwa, okukkiriza kwammwe okutukuvu ennyo kwe kuba kubeera omusingi kwe muzimbira obulamu bwammwe, nga musinza Katonda mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Jude1:21 Munywerere ku kwagala kwa Katonda, nga mulindirira okusaasira kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo okubatuusa mu bulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Jude1:22 Abo ababuusabuusa mubakwatirwe ekisa. 
Jude1:23 Abalala mubawonye, nga mubasika mu muliro; n'abalala mubeegendereze mu kubakwatirwa ekisa, nga mukyawa n'ekyambalo ekyonooneddwa empisa embi." 
Jude1:24 Oyo ayinza okubakuuma ne mutagwa, n'okubatuusa w'ali mu kitiibwa kye nga temuliiko bbala, era nga musanyuka," 
Jude1:25 oyo Katonda omu yekka, atulokola ng'ayita mu Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe, abe n'ekitiibwa, n'obukulu, n'obufuzi, n'obuyinza okuva edda n'edda, ne kaakano, n'emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Revelation1:1 Bino bye bigambo bya Yesu Kristo, Katonda bye yamuwa amanyise abaweereza be, ebyo ebiteekwa okubaawo amangu. Kristo yatuma malayika we, n'abitegeeza omuweereza we Yowanne," 
Revelation1:2 eyayogera byonna bye yalaba. Yayogera ebigambo bya Katonda, n'ebya Yesu Kristo, ebibikakasa." 
Revelation1:3 Wa mukisa asoma ebigambo bino eby'obulanzi, era ba mukisa abawulira ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino, ne babikwata, kubanga ekiseera kiri kumpi byonna ebiwandiikiddwamu lwe binaatuukirizibwa." 
Revelation1:4 Yowanne awandiikira ebibiina omusanvu eby'abakkiriza Kristo ebiri mu Asiya. Ekisa kya Katonda n'emirembe bibeerenga nammwe, nga biva eri Katonda abaawo, era eyabaawo, era ajja okubaawo; era nga biva eri emyoyo omusanvu, egiri mu maaso g'entebe ye ey'obwakabaka;" 
Revelation1:5 era nga biva eri Yesu Kristo, omujulirwa omwesigwa, eyasooka bonna okuzuukira, era afuga bakabaka ab'oku nsi. Kristo oyo atwagala era eyatuggya mu bibi byaffe bwe yatufiirira," 
Revelation1:6 n'atufuula obwakabaka era bakabona ba Katonda era Kitaawe aweebwenga ekitiibwa n'obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
Revelation1:7 Wuuyo ajjira ku bire. Abantu bonna balimulaba, era n'abo abaamufumita balimulaba. Abantu bonna ku nsi balikuba ebiwoobe ku lulwe. Ky'ekyo. Amiina. Zek 12:10; Yow 19:34,37" 
Revelation1:8 Nze ntandikwa era “Nze nkomerero ya byonna,” bw'atyo bw'agamba Mukama Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, abaawo, era eyabaawo, era ajja okubaawo." 
Revelation1:9 Nze Yowanne, muganda wammwe, agabana awamu nammwe ku kubonaabona, ne ku Bwakabaka era ne ku kugumiikiriza, ebiri mu Yesu. Nali ku kizinga ekiyitibwa Patumo, olw'okuba nga nali ntegeezezza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda, era nga mbategeezezza ebifa ku Yesu." 
Revelation1:10 Ku lunaku lwa Mukama, Mwoyo n'anjijako. Ne mpulira emabega wange eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ng'ery'eŋŋombe," 
Revelation1:11 nga ligamba nti: “By'olaba biwandiike mu kitabo, okiweereze ebibiina omusanvu eby'abakkiriza Kristo: eky'e Efeso, eky'e Simiruna, eky'e Perugamo, eky'e Tiyatira, eky'e Sarudi, eky'e Filadelufiya, n'eky'e Lawodiikiya.”" 
Revelation1:12 Awo ne nkyuka okulaba ayogera nange. Bwe nakyuka, ne ndaba ebikondo by'ettaala musanvu ebya zaabu." 
Revelation1:13 Wakati w'ebikondo ebyo, ne ndaba afaanana ng'Omwana w'Omuntu, ng'ayambadde ekyambalo ekituukira ddala ku bigere, era nga yeesibye mu kifuba olukoba olwa zaabu." 
Revelation1:14 Omutwe gwe n'enviiri ze, byali bitukula ng'ebyoya by'endiga ebyeru ng'omuzira. Amaaso ge nga gali ng'ennimi ez'omuliro." 
Revelation1:15 Ebigere bye nga biri ng'ekikomo ekizigule, ekirongooseddwa mu muliro. Eddoboozi lye nga liri ng'ery'amazzi amangi agayiika." 
Revelation1:16 Yali akutte mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo emmunyeenye musanvu. Mu kamwa ke ne muvaamu ekitala ekyogi ku njuuyi zaakyo zombiriri. Obwenyi bwe nga buli ng'enjuba eyaka n'amaanyi gaayo gonna. 
Revelation1:17 Bwe namulaba, ne ngwa okumpi n'ebigere bye, nga ndi ng'afudde. Kyokka n'ankwatako n'omukono gwe ogwa ddyo, n'agamba nti: “Totya, nze w'olubereberye era ow'enkomerero," 
Revelation1:18 era omulamu. Nali nfudde, naye laba kati ndi mulamu emirembe n'emirembe, era nnina obuyinza ku Kufa ne ku Magombe." 
Revelation1:19 Kale wandiika by'olabye, ebiriwo n'ebigenda okubaawo oluvannyuma." 
Revelation1:20 Amakulu g'emmunyeenye omusanvu z'olabye mu mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, n'ag'ebikondo by'ettaala omusanvu ebya zaabu, ge gano: emmunyeenye omusanvu be bamalayika b'ebibiina omusanvu eby'abakkiriza Kristo, ate ebikondo omusanvu eby'ettaala, bye bibiina omusanvu eby'abakkiriza Kristo." 
Revelation2:1 “Malayika w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza eky'omu Efeso, muwandiikire nti: “Oyo akwata emmunyeenye omusanvu mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, era atambulira wakati w'ebikondo by'ettaala omusanvu ebya zaabu, bino by'agamba nti:" 
Revelation2:2 Mmanyi ebikolwa byo n'okufuba kwo, n'okugumiikiriza kwo. Mmanyi nga toyinza kugumiikiriza babi. Era abo abaali beeyita abatume, sso nga si batume, wabageza n'obalaba nga balimba." 
Revelation2:3 Olina obugumiikiriza, wagumira byonna ku lwange, n'ototerebuka." 
Revelation2:4 Kyokka nnina kye nkuvunaana: waleka okwagala kwe walina olubereberye. 
Revelation2:5 Kale jjukira gye wagwa, weenenye, okole bye wakolanga olubereberye. Bw'oteenenye, nja kujja gy'oli, nzigyewo ekikondo kyo eky'ettaala mu kifo kyakyo." 
Revelation2:6 Naye kino kye kirungi ky'olina: okyawa ebikolwa by'abagoberezi ba Nikolaawo, nange bye nkyawa." 
Revelation2:7 “Alina amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo. Awangula ebibi, ndimuwa obuyinza okulya ku bibala by'omuti ogw'obulamu, oguli mu kifo eky'okwesiima ekya Katonda." 
Revelation2:8 “Malayika w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Simiruna muwandiikire nti: “Ow'olubereberye era ow'enkomerero, eyali afudde n'aba omulamu, bino by'agamba nti:" 
Revelation2:9 Mmanyi okubonaabona kwo, n'obwavu bwo, kyokka oli mugagga. Mmanyi n'okuvvoola kw'abo abeeyita Abayudaaya, sso nga si Bayudaaya, wabula bagoberezi ba Sitaani." 
Revelation2:10 Totya ebyo by'ogenda okubonaabonamu. Laba, Sitaani anaatera okuteeka abamu ku mmwe mu kkomera mugezebwe, era mulibonaabonera ennaku kkumi. Beeranga mwesigwa ne bwe kiba kikutuusa ku kufa, nze ndikuwa engule ey'obuwanguzi." 
Revelation2:11 “Alina amatu, awulire ekyo Mwoyo ky'agamba ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo. Awangula amaanyi ga Sitaani, okufa okwokubiri tekulimukolako kabi." 
Revelation2:12 “Malayika ow'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Perugamo, muwandiikire nti: “Oyo alina ekitala ekyogi ku njuuyi zaakyo zombiriri, bino by'agamba nti:" 
Revelation2:13 Mmanyi gy'obeera, awali entebe ey'obwakabaka eya Sitaani. Kyokka onnywereddeko. Ne mu kiseera Antipa, omujulirwa wange omwesigwa mwe yattirwa ewammwe, Sitaani gy'abeera, wasigala okyanzikiriza." 
Revelation2:14 “Naye nnina ebitonotono bye nkuvunaana, kubanga eyo olinayo abagoberera okuyigiriza kwa Balamu, eyayigiriza Balaki okwesittaza Abayisirayeli, balye ebiweereddwayo eri ebyo ebitali Katonda, era bakole eby'obwenzi." 
Revelation2:15 Bw'otyo era naawe olina abagoberera okuyigiriza kw'Abanikolaawo. 
Revelation2:16 Kale weenenye. Bw'oteenenye, nja kujja mangu gy'oli, nnwanyise abantu abo n'ekitala eky'omu kamwa kange." 
Revelation2:17 “Alina amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo. Awangula amaanyi ga Sitaani, ndimuwa ku mannu eyakwekebwa, era ndimuwa ejjinja eryeru, eriwandiikiddwako erinnya eriggya, eritamanyiddwa muntu mulala, wabula oyo alifuna." 
Revelation2:18 “Malayika w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Tiyatira muwandiikire nti: Omwana wa Katonda, alina amaaso agali ng'ennimi z'omuliro, ebigere bye nga biri ng'ekikomo ekizigule, bino by'agamba nti:" 
Revelation2:19 Mmanyi by'okola. Mmanyi okwagala kwo, n'okugumiikiriza kwo, era mmanyi nga by'okola kaakano bingi okusinga bye wakolanga olubereberye." 
Revelation2:20 Naye nnina kye nkuvunaana: omukazi Yezebeeli eyeeyita omulanzi, wamuleka okukyamya abagoberezi bange, ng'abayigiriza okwenda n'okulya ebiweereddwayo eri ebyo ebitali Katonda." 
Revelation2:21 Namuwa ebbanga okwenenya, n'agaana okwenenya obwenzi bwe." 
Revelation2:22 “Kale njija kumuteeka ku ndiri abeere mu kubonaabona okungi wamu n'abo abaayenda naye, bwe bateenenye ebyo bye baakola naye." 
Revelation2:23 Era abagoberezi be ndibatta, ebibiina byonna eby'abakkiriza Kristo biryoke bitegeere nga nze wuuyo akebera ebirowoozo n'emitima. Buli omu ku mmwe ndimuwa ekimusaanidde, nga nsinziira ku bikolwa bye." 
Revelation2:24 “Naye mmwe abalala ab'omu Tiyatira, abatakkiriza kuyigiriza okwo era abatamanyi ebyo abamu bye bayita ebyama ebyomunda ennyo ebya Sitaani, mbagamba nti: sijja kubatikka buzito bulala," 
Revelation2:25 wabula ekyo kye mulina mukinyweze okutuusa lwe ndijja. 
Revelation2:26 Oyo awangula, n'akola bye ndagira okutuusa enkomerero, ndimuwa obuyinza okufuga amawanga," 
Revelation2:27 nga nange bwe nabuweebwa Kitange. Aligafugisa omuggo ogw'ekyuma, aligaasaayasa nga ayasaayasa ebibya eby'ebbumba. Era ndimuwa emmunyeenye ey'oku makya." 
Revelation2:28  
Revelation2:29 “Alina amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo." 
Revelation3:1 “Malayika w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Sarudi muwandiikire nti: Oyo alina emyoyo omusanvu egya Katonda, n'emmunyeenye omusanvu, bino by'agamba nti: Mmanyi by'okola. Mmanyi ng'omanyiddwa nti oli mulamu, sso ng'oli mufu." 
Revelation3:2 Tunula, onyweze ebyo ebikyasigaddewo nga tebinnafa, kubanga mu by'okola sirabamu kituukiridde mu maaso ga Katonda wange." 
Revelation3:3 “Kale jjukira bye wayigirizibwa era bye wawulira, obikwate, weenenye. Bw'otootunule, ndijja ng'omubbi, era tolimanya ssaawa gye ndijjiramu gy'oli." 
Revelation3:4 Naye mu Sarudi olinamu abamu abatonotono abatayonoonanga byambalo byabwe. Balitambula nange nga bambadde engoye enjeru, kubanga basaanidde." 
Revelation3:5 Bw'atyo awangula, alyambazibwa ebyambalo ebyeru, era sirisangula linnya lye mu kitabo ky'obulamu, wabula ndirangirira nti oyo wange, mu maaso ga Kitange n'aga bamalayika be." 
Revelation3:6 “Alina amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo." 
Revelation3:7 “Malayika w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Filadelufiya muwandiikire nti: Oyo omutuukirivu era ow'amazima, alina ekisumuluzo kya Dawudi, era aggulawo ne wataba n'omu ayinza kuggalawo, aggalawo ne wataba n'omu ayinza kuggulawo, bino by'agamba nti:" 
Revelation3:8 Mmanyi by'okola. Nakuggulirawo oluggi olutayinza kuggalwawo muntu n'omu. Mmanyi ng'olina amaanyi matono, kyokka wanywerera ku kigambo kyange n'otonneegaana." 
Revelation3:9 “Kale abo abagoberezi ba Sitaani, abeeyita Abayudaaya sso nga si Bayudaaya, naye nga balimba bulimbi, ndibaleeta mu maaso go, bavuuname kumpi n'ebigere byo, bategeere nti nkwagala," 
Revelation3:10 kubanga wakwata ekiragiro kyange ekigamba nti: ‘Gumiikiriza,’ nange ndikuwonya mu kiseera eky'okugezebwa, ekigenda okujja ku nsi yonna, okugeza abo abali ku nsi." 
Revelation3:11 Njija mangu. Nyweza ky'olina, waleme kubaawo akutwalako ngule yo ey'obuwanguzi." 
Revelation3:12 Awangula, ndimufuula empagi mu Ssinzizo lya Katonda wange, era talirivaamu. Ndimuwandiikako erinnya lya Katonda wange, n'erinnya ly'Ekibuga Yerusaalemu ekiggya, ekikka nga kiva mu ggulu ewa Katonda wange. Era ndimuwandiikako erinnya lyange eriggya." 
Revelation3:13 Alina amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo." 
Revelation3:14 “Malayika w'ekibiina ky'abakkiriza Kristo eky'omu Lawodiikiya muwandiikire nti: Oyo ayitibwa Amiina, Omujulirwa omwesigwa era ow'amazima, asibukamu ebyo Katonda bye yatonda, bino by'agamba nti:" 
Revelation3:15 Mmanyi by'okola. Mmanyi nga tonnyogoga era tobuguma. Waakiri nno obe ng'onnyogoga, oba ng'obuguma!" 
Revelation3:16 Naye kubanga oli wa kibuguumirize: tonnyogoga ate tobuguma, nja kukuwandula ove mu kamwa kange," 
Revelation3:17 kubanga ogamba nti: ‘Ndi mugagga, nnina ebintu bingi, siriiko kye njula.’ Sso nga tomanyi ng'oli munaku era asaasirwa, ng'oli mwavu, muzibe, era ng'oli bwereere." 
Revelation3:18 “Nkuwa amagezi onguleko zaabu eyalongoosebwa mu muliro, olyoke ogaggawale, era onguleko engoye enjeru oyambale, owone ensonyi ez'okuyita obwereere, onguleko n'eddagala ery'okusiiga ku maaso go, olyoke olabe." 
Revelation3:19 “Nze bonna be njagala mbanenya era mbabonereza. Kale nyiikira, weenenye." 
Revelation3:20 Nzuuno nnyimiridde ku luggi, nkonkona. Awulira eddoboozi lyange n'aggulawo oluggi, nnaayingira omumwe, ne tuliira wamu ffembi." 
Revelation3:21 Oyo awangula, ndimukkiriza okutuula awamu nange ku ntebe yange ey'obwakabaka, nga nange bwe nawangula, ne ntuula wamu ne Kitange ku ntebe ye ey'obwakabaka." 
Revelation3:22 “Alina amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba ebibiina by'abakkiriza Kristo.”" 
Revelation4:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne ndaba oluggi olugguddwawo mu ggulu. Era eddoboozi lye nasooka okuwulira nga livuga ng'akagombe ne liŋŋamba nti: “Yambuka wano, nkulage ebiteekwa okuddirira bino.”" 
Revelation4:2 Amangwago Mwoyo n'anjijako, ne ndaba entebe ey'obwakabaka eteekeddwa mu ggulu, era nga ku ntebe eyo kuliko agituddeko." 
Revelation4:3 Oyo eyali agituddeko, ng'endabika ye afaanana ng'amayinja ag'omuwendo aga yasipero ne sarudiyo. Entebe eyo yali yeetooloddwa musoke, afaanana ng'ejjinja eriyitibwa sumaridi." 
Revelation4:4 Okwetooloola entebe ey'obwakabaka, waaliwo entebe ez'obwakabaka endala amakumi abiri mu nnya, nga zituuliddwako abakadde amakumi abiri mu bana, abambadde ebyambalo ebyeru, era nga batikkidde ku mitwe gyabwe engule eza zaabu." 
Revelation4:5 Mu ntebe eyo ey'obwakabaka ne muvaamu okumyansa, n'amaloboozi, n'okubwatuka. Waaliwo n'ettaala musanvu ezaaka mu maaso g'entebe eyo. Ezo gye myoyo omusanvu egya Katonda. Zek 4:2" 
Revelation4:6 Mu maaso g'entebe eyo, waaliwo ekiri ng'ennyanja ey'endabirwamu, ekifaanana ejjinja eritangalijja. Ate okwetooloola entebe eyo, ku buli ludda lwayo, ng'eriyo ebiramu bina, nga mu maaso n'emabega waabyo bijjudde amaaso." 
Revelation4:7 Ekiramu ekisooka kyali kifaanana ng'empologoma, ekyokubiri nga kifaanana ng'ente ennume. Ekyokusatu kyalina amaaso ng'ag'omuntu, ekyokuna nga kifaanana ng'empungu ebuuka." 
Revelation4:8 Buli kimu ku biramu ebyo ebina, nga kirina ebiwaawaatiro mukaaga, era ebiramu ebyo nga bijjudde amaaso enjuyi zonna ne munda, era emisana n'ekiro, awatali kusalawo, nga bigamba nti: “Mutuukirivu, Mutuukirivu, Mutuukirivu, Mukama Katonda, Omuyinzawaabyonna, eyabaawo era abaawo, era ajja okubaawo!”" 
Revelation4:9 Ebiramu ebina, buli lwe byawanga ekitiibwa oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka, era omulamu emirembe n'emirembe, ne bimutenda era ne bimwebaza," 
Revelation4:10 bo abakadde amakumi abiri mu abana ne bavuunama mu maaso g'oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka, omulamu emirembe n'emirembe, ne bamusinza. Ne bateeka engule zaabwe mu maaso g'entebe eyo, nga bwe bagamba nti:" 
Revelation4:11 “Mukama Katonda waffe, osaanidde okutiibwa n'okutendebwa, era n'okubeera n'obuyinza, kubanga ggwe watonda byonna, era byatondebwa ne bibaawo nga bwe wayagala.”" 
Revelation5:1 Ne ndaba omuzingo gw'ekitabo mu mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka, nga kiwandiikiddwa munda ne kungulu, era nga kisibiddwa n'obubonero musanvu." 
Revelation5:2 Awo ne ndaba malayika ow'amaanyi. N'alangirira n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Ani asaanidde okubembula obubonero ku muzingo gw'ekitabo, n'okugwanjuluza?”" 
Revelation5:3 Ne wataba n'omu mu ggulu ne ku nsi, wadde wansi w'ensi, ayinza okwanjuluza omuzingo gw'ekitabo, wadde okugutunulamu." 
Revelation5:4 Nze ne nkaaba nnyo amaziga, kubanga tewaalabikawo asaanira okwanjuluza omuzingo gw'ekitabo, wadde okugutunulamu." 
Revelation5:5 Awo omu ku bakadde n'aŋŋamba nti: “Tokaaba. Laba, Empologoma ow'omu Kika kya Yuda muzzukulu wa Dawudi yawangula, era asobola okubembula obubonero omusanvu, n'okwanjuluza omuzingo gw'ekitabo.”" 
Revelation5:6 Ne ndaba Omwana gw'Endiga ng'ayimiridde wakati awali entebe ey'obwakabaka, nga yeetooloddwa ebiramu ebina, n'abakadde, ng'afaanana ng'eyattibwako. Yalina amayembe musanvu, n'amaaso musanvu, gye myoyo omusanvu egya Katonda, egyatumibwa mu nsi zonna." 
Revelation5:7 N'agenda, n'aggya omuzingo gw'ekitabo mu mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka." 
Revelation5:8 Bwe yagukwata, ebiramu ebina n'abakadde amakumi abiri mu abana, ne bavuunama mu maaso g'Omwana gw'Endiga. Buli omu yalina ennanga n'ebibya ebya zaabu ebijjudde obubaane: ze ssaala z'abantu ba Katonda." 
Revelation5:9 Ne bayimba oluyimba oluggya nga bagamba nti: “Osaanidde okutwala omuzingo gw'ekitabo, n'okubembula obubonero bwagwo, kubanga wattibwa, era olw'okufa kwo, wanunulira Katonda abantu mu bika byonna, ne mu nnimi zonna, ne mu bantu bonna, ne mu mawanga gonna," 
Revelation5:10 n'obafuula Obwakabaka era bakabona ba Katonda waffe, ab'okufuga ensi.”" 
Revelation5:11 Awo ne ntunula era ne mpulira eddoboozi lya bamalayika abangi, enkumi n'enkumi, obukadde n'obukadde, nga beetoolodde entebe ey'obwakabaka n'ebiramu, n'abakadde." 
Revelation5:12 Ne boogera n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Omwana gw'Endiga, ggwe eyattibwa, osaanidde okubeera n'obuyinza, n'obugagga, n'amagezi, n'amaanyi, era osaanidde okuweebwa ekitiibwa, n'okugulumizibwa, n'okutendebwa!”" 
Revelation5:13 Era ne mpulira buli kitonde mu ggulu ne ku nsi, ne wansi w'ensi ne mu nnyanja, byonna nga bigamba nti: “Oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka era n'Omwana gw'Endiga, atenderezebwe, aweebwe ekitiibwa; agulumizibwe, era abe n'obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe!”" 
Revelation5:14 Ebiramu ebina ne bigamba nti: “Amiina.” N'abakadde amakumi abiri mu abana ne bavuunama ne basinza. 
Revelation6:1 Awo ne ndaba Omwana gw'Endiga ng'abembula akamu ku bubonero omusanvu, era ne mpulira ekimu ku biramu ebina, nga kyogera mu ddoboozi eriri nga laddu nti: “Jjangu!”" 
Revelation6:2 Ne ntunula, ne ndaba embalaasi enjeru. Oyo agyebagadde yalina omutego. N'aweebwa engule, n'agenda ng'awangula, alyoke awangulire ddala." 
Revelation6:3 Omwana gw'Endiga bwe yabembula akabonero akookubiri, ne mpulira ekiramu ekyokubiri nga kigamba nti: “Jjangu!”" 
Revelation6:4 Ne wavaayo embalaasi endala, nga mmyufu. Oyo agyebagadde yalina obuyinza okuleeta olutalo ku nsi, abantu battiŋŋane. N'aweebwa ekitala ekinene." 
Revelation6:5 Omwana gw'Endiga bwe yabembula akabonero akookusatu, ne mpulira ekiramu ekyokusatu nga kigamba nti: “Jjangu!” Ne ntunula, ne ndaba embalaasi enzirugavu. Oyo agyebagadde yalina minzaani mu mukono gwe." 
Revelation6:6 Ne mpulira ng'eddoboozi eryogerera wakati w'ebiramu we byali, nga ligamba nti: “Ekigero kimu eky'eŋŋaano, kya mpeera ya lunaku lumu; n'ebigero bisatu ebya bbaale bya mpeera ya lunaku lumu. Omuzigo n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu tobyonoona.”" 
Revelation6:7 Omwana gw'Endiga bwe yabembula akabonero akookuna, ne mpulira ekiramu ekyokuna nga kigamba nti: “Jjangu!”" 
Revelation6:8 Ne ntunula, ne ndaba embalaasi eya kivuvvu. Agyebagadde erinnya lye nga ye Kufa, ate Magombe ng'ajja amugoberera. Ne baweebwa obuyinza ku kitundu ekimu ekyokuna eky'ensi, bassise ekitala n'enjala n'endwadde, n'ebisolo eby'oku nsi." 
Revelation6:9 Omwana gw'Endiga bwe yabembula akabonero akookutaano, ne ndaba wansi wa alutaari, emyoyo gy'abo abattibwa olw'okukkiriza ekigambo kya Katonda, n'olw'okukitegeeza abantu." 
Revelation6:10 Ne boogera n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nga bagamba nti: “Mukama Omutuukirivu era ow'amazima, olituusa ddi obutasalira bantu ba ku nsi musango kubasinga, n'obabonereza olw'okututta?”" 
Revelation6:11 Buli omu ku bo n'aweebwa ekyambalo ekyeru, ne bagambibwa okugira nga balindako akaseera katono okutuusa omuwendo gwa baweereza bannaabwe era baganda baabwe ab'okutiibwa nga bo, lwe guliwera." 
Revelation6:12 Awo ne ndaba Omwana gw'Endiga ng'abembula akabonero ak'omukaaga. Ne wabaawo okukankana kw'ensi okw'amaanyi, n'enjuba n'ezikira n'efaanana ng'ekikutiya ekiddugala, n'omwezi gwonna ne gumyuka ng'omusaayi. 24:29; Mak 13:24-25; Luk 21:25" 
Revelation6:13 Emmunyeenye ne ziva ku ggulu ne zigwa ku nsi, ng'ebibala by'omuti omutiini ebitannayengera bwe bikunkumuka wansi nga kibuyaga ow'amaanyi agunyeenyezza." 
Revelation6:14 Eggulu nalyo ne livaawo ng'omuzingo gw'ekitabo bwe guzingibwako. Buli lusozi na buli kizinga ne biggyibwa mu bifo byabyo. 
Revelation6:15 Bakabaka b'ensi, n'abakungu, n'abakulu b'amagye, n'abagagga, n'ab'amaanyi, n'abantu bonna, abaddu n'ab'eddembe, ne beekweka mu mpuku ne mu njazi ez'oku nsozi." 
Revelation6:16 Ne bagamba ensozi n'amayinja nti: “Mutugweko, mutukweke, oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka aleme kutulaba, era mutuwonye obusungu bw'Omwana gw'Endiga." 
Revelation6:17 Olunaku Katonda n'Omwana gw'endiga lwe balisunguwalirako lutuuse, ani ayinza okuguma?”" 
Revelation7:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne ndaba bamalayika bana, nga bayimiridde ku nsonda ennya ez'ensi, nga baziyiza embuyaga ennya ez'ensi, waleme kubaawo mbuyaga ekunta ku nsi, oba ku nnyanja, wadde ku muti n'ogumu." 
Revelation7:2 Ate ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'ayambuka ng'ava ebuvanjuba, ng'alina akabonero ka Katonda Nnannyinibulamu. N'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ng'ayita bamalayika abana abaalagirwa okukola akabi ku nsi ne ku nnyanja." 
Revelation7:3 N'agamba nti: “Temukola kabi ku nsi, oba ku nnyanja, wadde ku miti, okutuusa lwe tulimala okuteeka akabonero mu byenyi by'abaweereza ba Katonda waffe!”" 
Revelation7:4 Awo ne mpulira omuwendo gw'abo abaateekebwako akabonero. Baali emitwalo kkumi n'ena, mu enkumi nnya, abaava mu buli kika ky'abantu ba Yisirayeli." 
Revelation7:5 Ab'omu Kika kya Yuda, abaateekebwako akabonero, baali omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; ab'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; ab'omu Kika kya Gaadi, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri;" 
Revelation7:6 ab'omu Kika kya Aseeri, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri, ab'omu Kika kya Manasse, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri;" 
Revelation7:7 ab'omu Kika kya Simyoni, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; ab'omu Kika kya Leevi, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; ab'omu Kika kya Yissakaari, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri;" 
Revelation7:8 ab'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; ab'omu Kika kya Yosefu, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; n'ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri." 
Revelation7:9 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne ntunula, ne ndaba ekibiina kinene eky'abantu, omuntu b'atayinza kubala. Baava mu mawanga gonna ne mu bika byonna, ne mu bantu bonna, ne mu nnimi zonna. Ne bayimirira mu maaso g'entebe ey'obwakabaka, ne mu maaso g'Omwana gw'Endiga, nga bambadde ebyambalo ebyeru, nga bakutte n'amatabi g'enkindu." 
Revelation7:10 Ne boogera n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ne bagamba nti: “Twalokolebwa Katonda waffe atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka, era n'Omwana gw'Endiga!”" 
Revelation7:11 Bamalayika bonna baali bayimiridde, nga beetoolodde entebe ey'obwakabaka n'abakadde, n'ebiramu ebina. Awo ne bavuunama mu maaso g'entebe ey'obwakabaka, ne basinza Katonda," 
Revelation7:12 nga bwe bagamba nti: “Amiina. Katonda waffe oweekitiibwa n'amagezi, era ow'obuyinza n'amaanyi agulumizibwenga, atenderezebwenga, era yeebazibwenga emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina.”" 
Revelation7:13 Awo omu ku bakadde n'ambuuza nti: “Bano abambadde ebyambalo ebyeru be baani, era bava wa?”" 
Revelation7:14 Ne mmuddamu nti: “Mukama wange, ggwe omanyi.” N'aŋŋamba nti: “Bano be baayita mu kubonaabona okungi, ne bayoza ebyambalo byabwe ne babitukuza mu musaayi gw'Omwana gw'Endiga." 
Revelation7:15 Kyebavudde babeera mu maaso g'entebe ya Katonda, ne baweereza emisana n'ekiro mu Ssinzizo lye. Era oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka, anaabeeranga nabo ng'abakuuma." 
Revelation7:16 “Tebaliddayo kulumwa njala na nnyonta. Tebalyokebwa njuba, wadde ekyokya ekirala kyonna," 
Revelation7:17 kubanga Omwana gw'Endiga, ali wakati w'entebe ey'obwakabaka, anaabalabiriranga, abakulembere, abatuuse ku nsulo z'amazzi ag'obulamu. Era Katonda alisangula buli zziga mu maaso gaabwe.”" 
Revelation8:1 Omwana gw'Endiga bwe yabembula akabonero ak'omusanvu, ne wabaawo akasiriikiriro mu ggulu okumala nga kitundu kya ssaawa." 
Revelation8:2 Ne ndaba bamalayika musanvu abayimirira mu maaso ga Katonda, ne baweebwa eŋŋombe musanvu." 
Revelation8:3 Ne malayika omulala n'ajja, n'ayimirira mu maaso g'ekyoto, ng'alina ekyoterezo ekya zaabu. N'aweebwa obubaane bungi abuweerereze wamu n'essaala z'abantu ba Katonda bonna, ku kyoto ekya zaabu ekiri mu maaso g'entebe ya Katonda." 
Revelation8:4 Omukka gw'obubaane, awamu n'essaala z'abantu ba Katonda, ne biva mu ngalo za malayika, ne byambuka mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Revelation8:5 Malayika oyo n'atwala ekyoterezo ekyo, n'akijjuza omuliro, ng'aguggya mu kyoto, n'akisuula ku nsi. Ne wabaawo okubwatuka, n'okuwuuma, n'okukankana kw'ensi." 
Revelation8:6 Awo bamalayika omusanvu abaalina eŋŋombe omusanvu, ne bateekateeka okuzifuuwa." 
Revelation8:7 Malayika asooka n'afuuwa eŋŋombe ye, ne wabaawo omuzira n'omuliro nga bitabuddwa n'omusaayi, ne bisuulibwa ku nsi. Ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'ensi ne kiggya, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'emiti, na buli muddo omubisi, ne biggya." 
Revelation8:8 Ne malayika owookubiri n'afuuwa eŋŋombe ye. Ekintu ekiri ng'olusozi olunene olwaka omuliro, ne kisuulibwa mu nnyanja. Ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'ennyanja ne kifuuka omusaayi," 
Revelation8:9 n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'ebitonde eby'omu nnyanja ne kifa, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'amaato aga buli ngeri ne kizikirira." 
Revelation8:10 Malayika owookusatu n'afuuwa eŋŋombe ye. Emmunyeenye ennene n'eva ku ggulu, ng'eyaka ng'omumuli, n'egwa ku kitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'emigga ne mu nzizi z'amazzi." 
Revelation8:11 Erinnya ly'emmunyeenye eyo nga ye Kakaayira. Abantu bangi ne bafa olw'okunywa amazzi ago kubanga gaafuulibwa agakaawa. 
Revelation8:12 Malayika owookuna n'afuuwa eŋŋombe ye. Ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'enjuba, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'omwezi, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'emmunyeenye ne bikubibwa, ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'ekitangaala kyabyo ne kizikira. Ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'olunaku ne kitaba na kitangaala, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'ekiro nakyo bwe kityo." 
Revelation8:13 Bwe natunula, ne mpulira empungu ebuukira waggulu mu bbanga ng'eyogera n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Akabi! Akabi! Akabi kajja kugwira abali ku nsi, eŋŋombe endala bwe zinaavuga, bamalayika abasatu ze bagenda okufuuwa!”" 
Revelation9:1 Awo malayika owookutaano n'afuuwa eŋŋombe ye. Ne ndaba emmunyeenye eyali yava waggulu n'egwa wansi, n'eweebwa ekisumuluzo ekiggula obunnya obutakoma." 
Revelation9:2 Emmunyeenye eyo n'eggulawo obunnya obutakoma. Mu bunnya obwo ne muvaamu omukka ng'oguva mu nkoomi ennene, enjuba n'ebbanga ne bikwata ekizikiza olw'omukka ogwo ogwava mu bunnya." 
Revelation9:3 Mu mukka ogwo ne muvaamu enzige, ne zijja ku nsi, era ne ziweebwa obuyinza, ng'obwo obw'enjaba ez'obusagwa ez'oku nsi ze bulina." 
Revelation9:4 Enzige ezo ne zigaanibwa okwonoona omuddo, oba emiti, wadde ebimera ebirala, wabula okubonyaabonya abantu abo bokka abatalina kabonero ka Katonda mu byenyi byabwe." 
Revelation9:5 Kyokka ne zitakkirizibwa kubatta, wabula okubabonyaabonyeza emyezi etaano. Obulumi omuntu bw'awulira nga zimulumye, nga buli ng'obw'oyo alumiddwa enjaba ey'obusagwa." 
Revelation9:6 Mu nnaku ezo abantu balinoonya olumbe lubatte, ne batalulaba, balyegomba okufa, naye kulibadduka." 
Revelation9:7 Mu ndabika, enzige ezo zaali zifaanana ng'embalaasi ezitegekeddwa olw'olutalo. Ku mitwe gyazo nga kuliko ebifaanana ng'engule eza zaabu, n'amaaso gaazo nga gafaanana ng'ag'abantu." 
Revelation9:8 Obwoya bwazo bwali bufaanana ng'enviiri z'abakazi, amannyo gaazo nga gafaanana ng'ag'empologoma." 
Revelation9:9 Ebifuba byazo byali bibikkiddwako ebintu ebiri ng'engabo ez'ekyuma. Okuwuuma kw'ebiwaawaatiro byazo kwali ng'okw'amagaali amangi, agasikibwa embalaasi ezifubutuka okugenda ku lutalo." 
Revelation9:10 Zaalina emikira ng'egy'enjaba ez'obusagwa, nga giriko n'enkato, era ng'amaanyi gaazo ag'okubonyaabonya abantu okumala emyezi etaano, gali mu mikira gyazo egyo." 
Revelation9:11 Zaalina kabaka waazo azifuga, nga ye malayika w'obunnya obutakoma. Erinnya lye mu Lwebureeyi ye Abaddoni, mu Luyonaani Apoliyoni, eritegeeza Nnamuzisa." 
Revelation9:12 Ekikangabwa ekisooka ne kiggwa, ate ng'ekyaliyo ebikangabwa ebirala bibiri ebijja." 
Revelation9:13 Awo malayika ow'omukaaga n'afuuwa eŋŋombe ye. Ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu nsonda ennya ez'ekyoto ekya zaabu, ekiri mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Revelation9:14 Eddoboozi eryo ne ligamba malayika ow'omukaaga, eyalina eŋŋombe nti: “Sumulula bamalayika abana abasibiddwa ku mugga omunene Ewufuraate.”" 
Revelation9:15 Awo bamalayika abana ne basumululwa. Baali nga baategekerwa dda essaawa eyo, n'olunaku n'omwezi n'omwaka, okutta ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'abantu." 
Revelation9:16 Ne mpulira omuwendo ogw'eggye ery'abeebagadde embalaasi: baali omutwalo gumu emirundi ebiri, emirundi omutwalo gumu." 
Revelation9:17 Era mu kulabikirwa kuno, ne ndaba embalaasi n'abazeebagadde, nga bambadde mu bifuba ebintu ebyengeredde ng'omuliro, ebya bbululu, n'ebya kyenvu. Emitwe gy'embalaasi ezo gyali ng'egy'empologoma, mu kamwa kaazo nga muvaamu omuliro, n'omukka, n'ensasi z'omuliro." 
Revelation9:18 Ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'abantu ne kittibwa ebibonyoobonyo bino ebisatu: omuliro, n'omukka, n'ensasi z'omuliro, ebyavanga mu kamwa k'embalaasi ezo," 
Revelation9:19 kubanga obuyinza bw'embalaasi ezo bwali mu kamwa kaazo ne mu mikira gyazo. Emikira gyazo gyali ng'emisota egirina emitwe, era emitwe egyo nga gye zirumisa." 
Revelation9:20 Abantu abalala abaasigalawo, abatattibwa mu bibonyoobonyo bino, tebeenenya ebyo bye baakolanga, era tebaalekayo kusinza emyoyo emibi n'ebifaananyi ebya zaabu, n'ebya ffeeza, n'eby'ekikomo, n'eby'amayinja, n'eby'emiti, ebitayinza kulaba, oba okuwulira, wadde okutambula." 
Revelation9:21 Era tebeenenya butemu bwabwe, n'obulogo bwabwe, n'obwenzi bwabwe, era n'obubbi bwabwe." 
Revelation10:1 Awo ne ndaba malayika omulala ow'amaanyi, nga ava mu ggulu, ng'akka. Yali ayambadde ekire, ku mutwe gwe nga kuliko musoke; amaaso ge nga gali ng'enjuba, n'ebigere bye, nga biri ng'empagi ez'omuliro." 
Revelation10:2 Yalina mu ngalo ze omuzingo gw'akatabo, nga mubikkule. Ekigere kye ekya ddyo n'akiteeka ku nnyanja, ekya kkono n'akiteeka ku lukalu." 
Revelation10:3 N'aleekaana n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka ng'ery'empologoma ewuluguma. Bwe yaleekaana, eggulu ne libwatuka emirundi musanvu." 
Revelation10:4 Eggulu bwe lyabwatuka emirundi omusanvu, nali ŋŋenda okuwandiika, ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti: “Ebyo eggulu eribwatuse emirundi omusanvu bye lyogedde, bikuume nga bya kyama, era tobiwandiika.”" 
Revelation10:5 Awo malayika gwe nalaba ng'ayimiridde ku nnyanja ne ku lukalu, n'agolola waggulu omukono gwe ogwa ddyo," 
Revelation10:6 n'alayira Katonda Nnannyinibulamu emirembe n'emirembe, eyatonda eggulu ne byonna ebirimu, n'ensi ne byonna ebirimu, n'ennyanja ne byonna ebirimu. Malayika oyo n'agamba nti: “Tewakyali kulwa." 
Revelation10:7 Naye mu kiseera ekyo, malayika ow'omusanvu ky'alifuuyiramu eŋŋombe ye, Katonda alituukiriza ekyama kye, nga bwe yategeeza abaweereza be abalanzi.”" 
Revelation10:8 Eddoboozi lye nawulira nga liva mu ggulu, ne nziramu okuliwulira nga liŋŋamba nti: “Genda okwate omuzingo omwanjuluze, oguli mu ngalo za malayika ayimiridde ku nnyanja ne ku lukalu.”" 
Revelation10:9 Ne ŋŋenda eri malayika, ne mmusaba ampe omuzingo gw'akatabo. N'aŋŋamba nti: “Gukwate ogulye. Gujja kukukaayirira mu lubuto lwo, naye mu kamwa ko, gujja kuwoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki.”" 
Revelation10:10 Ne nzigya omuzingo gw'akatabo mu ngalo za malayika, ne ngulya. Ne guwoomerera mu kamwa kange ng'omubisi gw'enjuki, naye bwe nagumira, ne gukaayira mu lubuto lwange." 
Revelation10:11 Awo malayika n'aŋŋamba nti: “Oteekwa okuddamu okulanga ebyo ebiriba ku bantu abangi, ne ku mawanga, ne ku nnimi, ne ku bakabaka.”" 
Revelation11:1 Ne mpeebwa olumuli olufaanana ng'omuggo, ne wabaawo aŋŋamba nti: “Situka opime Essinzizo lya Katonda, ne alutaari, era obale abasinzizaamu." 
Revelation11:2 Naye oluggya oluli ebweru w'Essinzizo lya Katonda luleke, tolupima, kubanga lwaweebwa bantu ab'ensi, abalirinnyirira ekibuga ekitukuvu, okumala emyezi amakumi ana mu ebiri." 
Revelation11:3 Ndituma abajulirwa bange babiri, nga bambadde ebikutiya, ne mbawa obuyinza bamale ennaku lukumi mu bibiri mu nkaaga, nga bategeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda.”" 
Revelation11:4 Abajulirwa abo ababiri gy'emiti emizayiti ebiri, n'ebikondo by'ettaala ebibiri, ebiri mu maaso ga Mukama w'ensi." 
Revelation11:5 Bwe wabaawo ayagala abo okubakolako akabi, omuliro guva mu kamwa kaabwe, ne gwokya abalabe baabwe. Bwe kityo buli ayagala okubakolako akabi, ateekwa okuttibwa." 
Revelation11:6 Abo balina obuyinza okusiba eggulu, enkuba n'etetonnya mu kiseera kye bategeerezaamu abantu ekigambo kya Katonda. Era balina obuyinza ku mazzi, okugafuula omusaayi. Balina n'obuyinza okuleeta ku nsi ebibonyoobonyo ebya buli ngeri buli lwe baagadde." 
Revelation11:7 Bwe balimala okutegeeza abantu ekigambo kya Katonda, ekisolo ekiva mu bunnya obutakoma, kirirwana nabo, ne kibawangula, ne kibatta." 
Revelation11:8 Emirambo gyabwe girisigala mu nguudo z'ekibuga ekinene, Mukama waabwe mwe yakomererwa ku musaalaba. Erinnya ly'ekibuga ekyo ery'olugero ye Sodoma oba Misiri." 
Revelation11:9 Abantu aba buli ngeri, n'ab'ebika byonna, n'ab'ennimi zonna, n'ab'amawanga gonna, balitunuulira emirambo gyabwe, okumala ennaku ssatu n'ekitundu, ne batagikkiriza kuziikibwa." 
Revelation11:10 Abantu ab'oku nsi balisanyuka olw'okufa kw'abo bombi. Balijaguza, era baliweerezaganya ebirabo, kubanga abalanzi abo ababiri baabonyaabonya nnyo ab'oku nsi." 
Revelation11:11 Ennaku essatu n'ekitundu bwe zaayitawo, omwoyo ogw'obulamu oguva eri Katonda, ne gubayingiramu, ne bava we bagudde ne bayimirira. Abaabalaba ne batya nnyo." 
Revelation11:12 Abalanzi abo ababiri ne bawulira eddoboozi ery'omwanguka eriva mu ggulu nga libagamba nti: “Mujje eno!” Ne balinnya mu ggulu nga bagendera mu kire, ng'abalabe baabwe balaba." 
Revelation11:13 Mu kaseera ako kennyini, ne wabaawo okukankana kw'ensi okw'amaanyi. Ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi eky'ekibuga ne kizikirira, n'abantu kasanvu ne battibwa okukankana kw'ensi. Abantu abaasigalawo ne bakwatibwa entiisa, ne batendereza ekitiibwa kya Katonda ow'omu ggulu." 
Revelation11:14 Ekikangabwa ekyokubiri kiyise, naye laba, ekikangabwa ekyokusatu kinaatera okutuuka!" 
Revelation11:15 Awo malayika ow'omusanvu n'afuuwa eŋŋombe ye. Ne wabaawo amaloboozi ag'omwanguka, nga gagamba nti: “Obwakabaka bw'ensi bufuuse bwa Mukama waffe era bwa Kristo, era anaafuganga emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Revelation11:16 Awo abakadde amakumi abiri mu abana abatuula mu maaso ga Katonda, ku ntebe zaabwe ez'obwakabaka, ne bavuunama, ne basinza Katonda," 
Revelation11:17 nga bwe bagamba nti: “Mukama Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, abaawo era eyabaawo, tukwebaza, kubanga weddizza obuyinza bwo n'otandika okufuga." 
Revelation11:18 Abantu ab'ensi baasunguwala nnyo. Naye n'obusungu bwo ne bujja; obudde ne butuuka okusalira abafu omusango, n'okuwa empeera abaweereza bo abalanzi, n'abantu bo bonna abakulu n'abato abakussaamu ekitiibwa. Era obudde ne butuuka okusaanyaawo abo abazikiriza ensi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Essinzizo lya Katonda ery'omu ggulu ne liggulwawo, n'essanduuko ey'endagaano ye n'erabika mu Ssinzizo lye. Ne wabaawo okumyansa, n'amaloboozi, n'okubwatuka, n'okukankana kw'ensi, n'omuzira mungi." 
Revelation12:1 Ekyewuunyisa ne kirabika ku ggulu: ne wabaawo omukazi ng'ayambadde enjuba, ate ng'omwezi guli wansi w'ebigere bye, ku mutwe gwe nga kuliko engule ya mmunyeenye kkumi na bbiri." 
Revelation12:2 Yali lubuto, ng'alumwa, n'aleekaana mu bulumi obw'okuzaala." 
Revelation12:3 Ekyewuunyisa ekirala ne kirabika ku ggulu: ne wabaawo ogusota ogunene ogumyufu, nga gulina emitwe musanvu, n'amayembe kkumi, nga ku buli mutwe kuliko engule." 
Revelation12:4 Omukira gwagwo ne guwalula ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu eky'emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu, ne gukisuula ku nsi. Ogusota ne guyimirira mu maaso g'omukazi eyali okumpi okuzaala, gulyoke gumire omwana we." 
Revelation12:5 Omukazi n'azaala omwana ow'obulenzi, agenda okufuga amawanga gonna, ng'akozesa omuggo ogw'ekyuma. Kyokka omwana we n'atwalibwa eri Katonda, n'eri entebe ye ey'obwakabaka." 
Revelation12:6 Awo omukazi n'addukira mu ddungu, mu kifo ekyateekebwateekebwa Katonda, omukazi oyo bamuliisize eyo, okumala ennaku lukumi mu bibiri mu nkaaga." 
Revelation12:7 Olwo ne wabaawo olutalo mu ggulu. Mikayeli ne bamalayika be ne balwanyisa ogusota. Ogusota nagwo ne gubalwanyisa ne bamalayika baagwo. 
Revelation12:8 Naye ogusota ne guwangulwa. Gwo ne bamalayika baagwo, ne batakkirizibwa kwongera kusigala mu ggulu." 
Revelation12:9 Ogusota ogwo ogunene, gwe musota ogw'edda oguyitibwa Omubi era Sitaani alimbalimba ensi zonna, ne gusuulibwa ku nsi, awamu ne bamalayika baagwo." 
Revelation12:10 Ne mpulira mu ggulu eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, erigamba nti: “Kaakano Katonda waffe atulokodde. Alaze amaanyi ge, n'obwakabaka bwe, n'obuyinza bwa Kristo we, kubanga oyo alonkoma baganda baffe, n'abaloopa emisana n'ekiro mu maaso ga Katonda waffe, agobeddwa mu ggulu." 
Revelation12:11 Baganda baffe baamuwangula olw'omusaayi gw'Omwana gw'Endiga, n'olw'amazima, ge baategeeza abantu, ne bawaayo obulamu bwabwe okutuuka ne ku kufa." 
Revelation12:12 Kale musanyuke mmwe eggulu n'abalirimu. Naye mmwe ensi n'ennyanja, zibasanze, kubanga Sitaani asse gye muli ng'alina obusungu bungi, ng'amanyi nti alina akaseera katono!”" 
Revelation12:13 Ogusota bwe gwalaba nga gusuuliddwa ku nsi, ne guyigganya omukazi eyazaala omwana ow'obulenzi." 
Revelation12:14 Omukazi n'aweebwa ebiwaawaatiro bibiri eby'empungu ennene, alyoke abuuke atuuke mu kifo kye mu ddungu, gy'alirabirirwa okumala emyaka esatu n'ekitundu ng'ogusota tegumutuukako." 
Revelation12:15 Omusota ne guwandula amazzi okuva mu kamwa kaagwo, nga gali ng'omugga, ne gagoberera omukazi, gamukulugguse." 
Revelation12:16 Naye ensi n'eyamba omukazi: n'eyasamya akamwa kaayo, n'emira omugga ogwava mu kamwa k'ogusota." 
Revelation12:17 Ogusota ne gusunguwalira omukazi, ne gugenda okulwanyisa ab'omu zadde lye abaasigalawo, abo bonna abakwata ebiragiro bya Katonda ne banywerera ku ebyo Yesu bye yabategeeza." 
Revelation12:18 Awo ogusota ne guyimirira ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja. 
Revelation13:1 Awo ne ndaba ekisolo nga kiva mu nnyanja. Kyalina amayembe kkumi n'emitwe musanvu. Kyalina engule ku buli jjembe, ne ku mitwe gyakyo nga kuliko amannya agavvoola Katonda." 
Revelation13:2 Ekisolo ekyo kye nalaba kyali kifaanana ng'engo, ebigere byakyo nga biri ng'eby'eddubu, akamwa kaakyo nga kali ng'ak'empologoma. Ogusota ne guwa ekisolo ekyo amaanyi gaagwo, n'entebe yaagwo ey'obwakabaka, n'obuyinza bungi." 
Revelation13:3 Ogumu ku mitwe gy'ekisolo gwali gulabika ng'ogufumitiddwa ekiwundu eky'okugutta. Naye ekiwundu ekyo eky'okugutta, ne kiwona. Ensi zonna ne zisigala nga zeewuunya ekisolo ekyo." 
Revelation13:4 Abantu ne basinza ogusota, kubanga gwawa ekisolo obuyinza bwagwo. N'ekisolo ne bakisinza, nga bwe bagamba nti: “Ani yenkana ekisolo kino, era ani ayinza okulwana nakyo?”" 
Revelation13:5 Ekisolo ne kirekebwa okwogera eby'okwewaana n'okuvuma Katonda, era ne kikkirizibwa okuba n'obuyinza okumala emyezi amakumi ana mu ebiri." 
Revelation13:6 Ne kitandika okuvvoola Katonda, n'okwogera obubi ku linnya lye, ne ku kifo kye mw'abeera, ne kivuma n'ababeera mu ggulu." 
Revelation13:7 Era ne kikkirizibwa okulwanyisa abantu ba Katonda n'okubawangula, era ne kiweebwa obuyinza ku bika byonna ne ku bantu bonna, ne ku nnimi zonna, ne ku mawanga gonna." 
Revelation13:8 Abantu bonna abali ku nsi, kwe kugamba, abo okuva ensi lwe yatondebwa, abataawandiikibwa mannya gaabwe mu kitabo eky'obulamu eky'Omwana gw'Endiga eyattibwa, balisinza ekisolo ekyo." 
Revelation13:9 Buli alina amatu awulire! 
Revelation13:10 Buli eyategekerwa okutwalibwa mu busibe, wa kusiba. Buli eyategekerwa okuttibwa n'ekitala, wa kufa kitala. Awo okugumiikiriza n'okukkiriza kw'abantu ba Katonda we kutegeererwa." 
Revelation13:11 Awo ne ndaba ekisolo ekirala nga kiva mu ttaka. Kyalina amayembe abiri ng'ag'omwana gw'endiga, era nga kyogera ng'ogusota." 
Revelation13:12 Ne kikozesa obuyinza bwonna obw'ekisolo ekyasooka, nga n'ekyo kyennyini ekyasooka kiraba. Ne kiwaliriza ensi n'abagirimu, basinze ekisolo ekyasooka, ekyawona ekiwundu ekyali ekyokukitta." 
Revelation13:13 Ekisolo kino ekyokubiri ne kikola ebyewuunyo. Ne kiragira omuliro ne guva mu ggulu, ne gukka ku nsi ng'abantu bonna balaba." 
Revelation13:14 Ne kirimbalimba abantu abali ku nsi, nga kikozesa ebyewuunyo bye kyakkirizibwa okukolera mu maaso g'ekisolo ekyasooka. Ne kibalagira okukola ekifaananyi ky'ekisolo ekyo ekyafumitibwa ekitala naye ne kisigala nga kiramu." 
Revelation13:15 Ekisolo kino ekyokubiri ne kikkirizibwa n'okussa omukka ogw'obulamu mu kifaananyi ekyo eky'ekisolo ekyasooka, ekifaananyi kyogere, era kissise bonna abagaana okukisinza." 
Revelation13:16 Abantu bonna, abato n'abakulu, abagagga n'abaavu, ab'eddembe n'abaddu, ekisolo ne kibawaliriza okuteekebwako akabonero ku mukono ogwa ddyo oba mu kyenyi." 
Revelation13:17 Buli muntu n'agaanibwa okubaako ky'agula oba ky'atunda, okuggyako ng'amaze okuteekebwako akabonero ako, kwe kugamba, erinnya ly'ekisolo, oba ennamba etegeeza erinnya lyakyo." 
Revelation13:18 Ekyo kyetaagisa amagezi! Ow'amagezi yeetegereze amakulu g'ennamba y'ekisolo ekyo, kubanga ye nnamba etegeeza erinnya ly'omuntu. Ennamba yaakyo eri lukaaga mu nkaaga mu mukaaga." 
Revelation14:1 Bwe nayimusa amaaso, ne ndaba omwana gw'Endiga ng'ayimiridde ku Lusozi Siyooni, ng'ali wamu n'abantu emitwalo kkumi n'ena mu enkumi nnya, ng'erinnya lye n'erya Kitaawe gawandiikiddwa mu byenyi byabwe." 
Revelation14:2 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu, nga liri ng'ery'okuyira kw'amazzi amangi, era nga liri ng'eddoboozi ly'okubwatuka kw'eraddu okw'amaanyi. Eddoboozi eryo lye nawulira lyali ng'ery'ennyimba z'abakubi b'ennanga nga bakuba ennanga zaabwe." 
Revelation14:3 Ne bayimba oluyimba nga bali mu maaso g'entebe ey'obwakabaka, n'ag'ebiramu ebina, n'ag'abakadde. Oluyimba olwo nga luli ng'oluggya, era nga tewali mulala ayinza kuluyiga, okuggyako abo bokka emitwalo ekkumi n'ena mu enkumi ennya, abaali banunuddwa mu nsi." 
Revelation14:4 Abo be bateeyonoona na bakazi, ne basigala nga batukuvu. Abo ne bagenda n'Omwana gw'Endiga buli gy'agenda. Baanunulwa mu bantu abalala, ne baba ababereberye mu kuweebwayo eri Katonda, n'eri Omwana gw'Endiga." 
Revelation14:5 Teboogerangako bya bulimba, era tebabangako kamogo." 
Revelation14:6 Awo ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'abuukira waggulu mu bbanga, ng'alina Amawulire Amalungi ag'emirembe n'emirembe, g'aweereddwa okutegeeza abali ku nsi, ab'amawanga gonna, n'ab'ebika byonna, n'ab'ennimi zonna, n'abantu bonna." 
Revelation14:7 N'agamba n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Mutye Katonda, mumuwe ekitiibwa, kubanga ekiseera kituuse asale omusango. Kale mumusinze eyatonda eggulu n'ensi, n'ennyanja, n'ensulo z'amazzi.”" 
Revelation14:8 Ne malayika owookubiri n'agoberera ng'agamba nti: “Kigudde, kigudde Babilooni ekibuga ekinene. Ebibi byakyo eby'obukaba n'obwenzi byaleetera amawanga gonna ag'oku nsi okwonoona mu ngeri ye emu. Ekibuga ekyo kyali ng'ekinywesezza amawanga gonna omwenge. Kale Katonda kyaliva agabonereza.”" 
Revelation14:9 Malayika owookusatu n'agoberera bali ababiri, ng'agamba n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Buli muntu asinza ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, n'akkiriza n'okuteekebwako akabonero mu kyenyi kye, oba ku mukono gwe," 
Revelation14:10 Katonda alimubonereza n'obukambwe. Aliba ng'anywa ku mwenge ogw'obusungu bwa Katonda, ogutajunguluddwa, ogufukiddwa mu kikopo ky'obusungu bwa Katonda. Era alibonyaabonyezebwa n'omuliro, n'ebibiriiti, mu maaso ga bamalayika abatukuvu, n'ag'Omwana gw'Endiga." 
Revelation14:11 Omukka ogw'okubonyaabonyezebwa kwabwe gwa kunyooka emirembe n'emirembe. Abasinza ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, na buli alina akabonero k'erinnya lyakyo, tebalibaako we bawummulira emisana n'ekiro.”" 
Revelation14:12 Kino kitegeeza nti abantu ba Katonda basaana okuba n'okugumiikiriza, be bantu ba Katonda abakwata ebiragiro bye, ne bagoberera Yesu n'obwesigwa." 
Revelation14:13 Awo ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu, nga ligamba nti: “Wandiika nti: Okuva kati balina omukisa abafa nga bagoberezi ba Mukama waffe. Ddala bw'atyo Mwoyo bw'agamba nti okutegana kwabwe kuwedde, bawummule, kubanga ebikolwa byabwe bagenda nabyo.”" 
Revelation14:14 Awo ne nnyimusa amaaso, ne ndaba ekire ekyeru, era nga ku kire ekyo, kutuddeko afaanana ng'Omwana w'Omuntu, ng'alina engule eya zaabu ku mutwe gwe, n'ekiwabyo mu ngalo ze." 
Revelation14:15 Awo malayika omulala nava mu Ssinzizo, ng'alangirira n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ng'agamba oyo atudde ku kire nti: “Kozesa ekiwabyo kyo, okungule. Ekiseera eky'amakungula kituuse, kubanga ebikungulwa eby'ensi byengedde.”" 
Revelation14:16 Awo oyo atudde ku kire n'awuuba ekiwabyo kye ku nsi, eby'oku nsi ne bikungulwa." 
Revelation14:17 Malayika omulala n'ava mu Ssinzizo ery'omu ggulu, naye ng'alina ekiwabyo ekyogi." 
Revelation14:18 Awo ne malayika omulala eyalina obuyinza ku muliro n'ava ku kyoto, n'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ng'agamba oyo alina ekiwabyo ekyogi nti: “Kozesa ekiwabyo kyo ekyogi, okungule ebirimba by'emizabbibu egy'oku nsi, kubanga ebirimba byagyo byengedde.”" 
Revelation14:19 Awo malayika n'awuuba ku nsi ekiwabyo kye, n'akungula ebirimba byayo eby'emizabbibu, n'abisuula mu ssogolero eddene ery'obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Revelation14:20 Ebirimba ne bisogolerwa ebweru w'ekibuga, essogolero ne livaamu omusaayi, ne gutuuka ku bugulumivu obusobola okubulizaamu amagulu g'embalaasi, ne gukulukuta kilomita nga ebikumi bisatu." 
Revelation15:1 Ate ne ndaba ekyamagero ekirala mu ggulu, ekinene era ekyewuunyisa. Waaliwo bamalayika musanvu, nga balina ebibonyoobonyo musanvu ebisembayo, kubanga bye bimalayo obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Revelation15:2 Era ne ndaba ekiri ng'ennyanja ey'endabirwamu etabuddwamu omuliro. Ne ndaba n'abo abaawangula ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, ekyalina ennamba nga lye linnya lyakyo, nga bayimiridde ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja eyo ey'endabirwamu, nga bakutte ennanga Katonda ze yabawa." 
Revelation15:3 Ne bayimba oluyimba lwa Musa, omuweereza wa Katonda, n'oluyimba lw'Omwana gw'Endiga, nga bagamba nti: “Mukama, Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, by'okola bikulu era byewuunyisa! Kabaka ow'emirembe n'emirembe, amakubo go matuufu era ga mazima." 
Revelation15:4 Mukama, ani atalikutya era atalissaamu linnya lyo kitiibwa? Ggwe wekka Ggwe mutuukirivu. Abantu b'amawanga gonna balijja ne basinziza mu maaso go, kubanga ebikolwa byo eby'obutuukirivu, birabise.”" 
Revelation15:5 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne ndaba Essinzizo ery'omu ggulu nga liggule, era nga lirimu eweema ekakasa nti Katonda ali n'abantu be." 
Revelation15:6 Mu Ssinzizo eryo, ne muvaamu bamalayika musanvu, abalina ebibonyoobonyo omusanvu, nga bambadde engoye enjeru ezitukula, era nga beesibye mu bifuba enkoba eza zaabu." 
Revelation15:7 Ekimu ku biramu ebina, ne kiwa bamalayika omusanvu ebibya musanvu ebya zaabu, ebijjudde obusungu bwa Katonda, aba omulamu emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation15:8 Essinzizo ne lijjula omukka oguva mu kitiibwa kye, ne mu maanyi ge, nga tewali ayinza kuliyingiramu, okutuusa ebibonyoobonyo omusanvu ebya bamalayika omusanvu, lwe byakomekkerezebwa." 
Revelation16:1 Ne mpulira eddoboozi ery'omwanguka eriva mu Ssinzizo, nga ligamba bamalayika omusanvu nti: “Mugende muyiwe ku nsi ebibya omusanvu eby'obusungu bwa Katonda.”" 
Revelation16:2 Malayika ow'olubereberye n'agenda, n'ayiwa ekibya kye ku nsi. Amabwa amanene era amabi ennyo ne gakwata abantu abaalina akabonero k'ekisolo, n'abo abasinza ekifaananyi kyakyo." 
Revelation16:3 Malayika owookubiri n'ayiwa ekibya kye mu nnyanja. Ennyanja n'efuuka ng'omusaayi gw'omufu, buli kiramu kyonna ekiri mu nnyanja ne kifa." 
Revelation16:4 Malayika owookusatu n'ayiwa ekibya kye mu migga ne mu nsulo z'amazzi, ne bifuuka omusaayi." 
Revelation16:5 Ne mpulira malayika alabirira amazzi ng'agamba nti: “Ggwe Omutuukirivu, abaawo era eyabaawo, omusango ogusaze mu bwenkanya," 
Revelation16:6 kubanga baayiwa omusaayi gw'abantu bo n'ogw'abalanzi, naawe kyovudde obawa omusaayi bagunywe. Ekyo kibasaanidde!”" 
Revelation16:7 Ne mpulira eddoboozi nga liva ku alutaari, nga ligamba nti: “Weewaawo Mukama Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, ky'okoze kya mazima era kituufu.”" 
Revelation16:8 Malayika owookuna n'ayiwa ekibya kye ku njuba, n'ekkirizibwa okwokya abantu n'ebbugumu lyayo ery'omuliro." 
Revelation16:9 Abantu ne bookebwa ebbugumu ery'amaanyi ennyo, ne bavvoola lya Katonda alina obuyinza ku bibonyoobonyo ebyo, ne batava mu bibi byabwe kumuwa kitiibwa." 
Revelation16:10 Malayika owookutaano n'ayiwa ekibya kye ku ntebe y'obwakabaka ey'ekisolo. Obwakabaka bwakyo ne bujjula ekizikiza, abantu ne beeruma ennimi olw'obulumi." 
Revelation16:11 Era olw'obulumi n'olw'amabwa ne bavvoola Katonda, era ne bateenenya ebyo bye baakola." 
Revelation16:12 Malayika ow'omukaaga n'ayiwa ekibya kye mu mugga omunene Ewufuraate. Amazzi gaagwo ne gakalira, okutemera bakabaka abava ebuvanjuba ekkubo." 
Revelation16:13 Ne ndaba emyoyo emibi esatu, egifaanana ebikere, nga giva mu kamwa k'ogusota n'ak'ekisolo, n'ak'omulanzi ow'obulimba." 
Revelation16:14 Egyo gye myoyo emibi egikola ebyewuunyo, era egigenda eri bakabaka b'ensi zonna okubakuŋŋaanya, balwane olutalo ku lunaku olukulu olwa Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, lw'alibonererezaako abakozi b'ebibi bonna." 
Revelation16:15 “Laba njija ng'omubbi. Oyo wa mukisa atunula, n'akuuma ebyambalo bye, n'atatambula bwereere, aleme kuswala mu bantu.”" 
Revelation16:16 Emyoyo egyo emibi ne gikuŋŋaanya bakabaka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Arimageddoni mu Lwebureeyi. 
Revelation16:17 Malayika ow'omusanvu n'ayiwa ekibya kye mu bbanga. Eddoboozi ery'omwanguka ne liva ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka mu Ssinzizo, nga ligamba nti: “Kiwedde!”" 
Revelation16:18 Ne wabaawo okumyansa, n'okuwuuma, n'okubwatuka, n'okukankana kw'ensi okw'amaanyi, okutabangawo kasookedde abantu baba ku nsi. Okukankana kw'ensi okwo kwe kwasingidde ddala okuba okw'amaanyi." 
Revelation16:19 Ekibuga ekinene ne kyabikamu ebitundu bisatu, n'ebibuga eby'ensi zonna ne bigwa. Katonda n'ajjukira Babilooni ekibuga ekinene, n'akinywesa ekikopo eky'omwenge ogw'obusungu bwe." 
Revelation16:20 Ebizinga byonna ne biggwaawo, n'ensozi zonna ne zibulawo." 
Revelation16:21 Omuzira omungi, nga buli kitole kizitowa kitole nga makumi ana, ne guva mu ggulu ne gugwa ku bantu. Abantu ne bavvoola Katonda olw'ekibonyoobonyo eky'omuzira, kubanga kyali kya ntiisa nnyo." 
Revelation17:1 Awo omu ku bamalayika omusanvu abaalina ebibya, n'ajja, n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Jjangu, nkulage omusango malaaya lukulwe gw'asaliddwa. Malaaya oyo kye kibuga ekyazimbibwa okumpi n'amazzi amangi." 
Revelation17:2 Bakabaka b'ensi baayenda naye, n'abantu abali ku nsi ne batamiira omwenge gw'obwenzi bwe.”" 
Revelation17:3 Awo mu mwoyo, malayika n'antwala mu ddungu, ne ndaba omukazi ng'atudde ku kisolo ekimyufu, nga kijjudde amannya agavvoola Katonda, era nga kirina emitwe musanvu, n'amayembe kkumi." 
Revelation17:4 Omukazi oyo yali ayambadde ebya kakobe n'ebimyufu, nga yeewoomezza ne zaabu, n'amayinja ag'omuwendo ennyo, n'ago ge bayita luulu, ng'akutte ebyenyinyalwa n'eby'obugwagwa eby'obwenzi bwe." 
Revelation17:5 Mu kyenyi kye mwali muwandiikiddwamu erinnya ery'amakulu amakusike: “Babilooni ekibuga ekinene, nnyina wa bamalaaya n'ow'ebyenyinyalwa eby'oku nsi.”" 
Revelation17:6 Ne ndaba ng'omukazi oyo atamidde omusaayi gw'abantu ba Katonda, n'ogw'abo abattibwa olw'okukkiriza Yesu. Bwe namulaba, ne nneewuunya nnyo!" 
Revelation17:7 Malayika n'aŋŋamba nti: “Lwaki weewuunya? Ka nkubuulire ekyama ekifa ku mukazi oyo, ne ku kisolo ekimusitudde, ekirina emitwe omusanvu n'amayembe ekkumi." 
Revelation17:8 Ekisolo ky'olabye kyaliwo, kati tekikyaliwo. Naye kinaatera okuva mu bunnya obutakoma, kigende kizikirizibwe. Abantu abali ku nsi, amannya gaabwe nga tegaawandiikibwa mu kitabo kya bulamu okuva ensi lwe yatondebwawo, balyewuunya, bwe baliraba ng'ekisolo ekyaliwo, kati tekikyaliwo, ate nga kiriddamu okulabika." 
Revelation17:9 “Kino kyetaaga amagezi n'okutegeera. Emitwe omusanvu ze nsozi omusanvu, omukazi z'atuddeko," 
Revelation17:10 era be bakabaka musanvu. Abataano ku bo baagwa, omu akyaliwo, omulala tannaba kujja. Era bw'alijja, aliteekwa okumalawo ekiseera kitono." 
Revelation17:11 Ate ekisolo ekyaliwo, kati ekitakyaliwo, ekyo ye kabaka ow'omunaana, kyokka nga wa ku bali omusanvu, era agenda kuzikirizibwa." 
Revelation17:12 “Amayembe ekkumi g'olabye, be bakabaka ekkumi, abatannaweebwa bwakabaka, naye bo n'ekisolo, baliweebwa obuyinza okufuga nga bakabaka, okumala essaawa emu." 
Revelation17:13 Abo bassa kimu, ne bawa ekisolo amaanyi gaabwe n'obuyinza bwabwe." 
Revelation17:14 Balirwanyisa Omwana gw'Endiga, kyokka Omwana gw'Endiga alibawangula, kubanga ye Mukama w'abakama era ye Kabaka wa bakabaka. N'abagoberezi be, be yayita, be yalondamu era abeesigwa, baliwangula wamu naye.”" 
Revelation17:15 Malayika era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Amazzi g'olabye malaaya w'atudde, be bantu aba buli ngeri, n'aba buli kibiina, n'aba buli ggwanga, n'aba buli lulimi." 
Revelation17:16 Amayembe, ekkumi g'olabye, go awamu n'ekisolo, birikyawa malaaya oyo, ne bimuleka yekka, ng'ali bwereere. Birirya omubiri gwe, ne bimwokera ddala," 
Revelation17:17 kubanga Katonda yateeka mu mitima gyabyo okwagala okukola kye yateesa, ne bissa kimu, ne biwa ekisolo obwakabaka, okutuusa ebigambo bya Katonda lwe birituukirira." 
Revelation17:18 Ate omukazi gwe walabye kye kibuga ekinene, ekifuga bakabaka b'ensi.”" 
Revelation18:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'akka ng'ava mu ggulu, ng'alina obuyinza bungi. Ekitiibwa kye ne kimulisa ensi." 
Revelation18:2 N'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Kigudde, Babilooni ekibuga ekinene kigudde! Kifuuse kisulo ky'emyoyo emibi; omukuŋŋaanira emyoyo emyonoonefu gyonna, lye kkuŋŋaaniro ly'ebinyonyi byonna ebibi era ebikyayibwa." 
Revelation18:3 Amawanga gonna gaatamiira omwenge ogw'obwenzi bwakyo. Bakabaka b'oku nsi baayenda nakyo, n'abasuubuzi b'oku nsi baagaggawalira ku kwejalabya kwakyo okuyitiridde.”" 
Revelation18:4 Ate ne mpulira eddoboozi eddala eriva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti: “Abantu bange, mukiveemu, muleme okwetaba mu bibi byakyo n'okugabana ku bibonyoobonyo byakyo," 
Revelation18:5 kubanga ebibi byakyo bituuse mu ggulu, ne Katonda ajjukidde ebyonoono byakyo." 
Revelation18:6 Mukikole bye kyabakola. Ku bikolwa byakyo, mmwe musinzeewo emirundi ebiri. Ekikopo kye kyabatabulira mmwe mukikitabulire emirundi ebiri." 
Revelation18:7 Gye kyakomya okwegulumiza n'okwejalabya, gye muba mukomya okukibonyaabonya n'okukikaabya, kubanga kyewaana nti: ‘Ntudde nga kabaka, siri nnamwandu era siribonaabona n'akatono.’" 
Revelation18:8 Ebibonyoobonyo byakyo: okufa, n'okunakuwala, n'enjala, kyebiriva bikijjira olunaku lumu era ne kyokebwa omuliro, kubanga Mukama Katonda akisalira omusango okukisinga, wa maanyi.”" 
Revelation18:9 Bakabaka b'oku nsi abaayendanga nakyo ne babeera wamu nakyo mu by'amasanyu, bwe baliraba omukka gwakyo nga kyokebwa, balikikaabira ne bakikungubagira." 
Revelation18:10 Baliyimirira wala olw'okutya okubonaabona kwakyo, ne bagamba nti: “Zikusanze, zikusanze ggwe Babilooni ekibuga ekinene! Ggwe ekibuga eky'amaanyi, ozikiriziddwa mu ssaawa emu yokka!”" 
Revelation18:11 Abasuubuzi b'oku nsi nabo bakikaabira ne banakuwala, kubanga tewakyali agula bintu byabwe." 
Revelation18:12 Tewakyali agula zaabu, ne ffeeza, n'amayinja ag'omuwendo, n'ago agayitibwa luulu; engoye eŋŋonvu eza kakobe, n'eza liiri, n'emmyufu; na buli muti ogw'akawoowo, na buli kintu eky'essanga, na buli kintu eky'omuti ogw'omuwendo ennyo; n'eky'ekikomo, n'eky'ekyuma, n'eky'amayinja amalungi." 
Revelation18:13 Era tewakyali agula bya kaloosa, n'ebirungo by'enva, n'obubaane, n'omuzigo ogw'akawoowo oguyitibwa mirra, n'envumbo; omwenge gw'emizabbibu, n'amafuta; obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, n'eŋŋaano; ente n'endiga, n'embalaasi n'ebigaali; abaddu n'abantu abanyagibwa mu lutalo." 
Revelation18:14 Abasuubuzi balikigamba nti: “Ebirungi byonna bye weegombanga okufuna bikufudde, ebyobugagga byonna n'ebyekitiibwa bikuweddeko, era tokyaddayo kubirabako n'akatono.”" 
Revelation18:15 Abasuubuzi b'ebintu ebyo be kyagaggawaza, baliyimirira wala olw'okutya okubonaabona kwakyo, ne bakaaba era ne banakuwala," 
Revelation18:16 ne bagamba nti: “Zikisanze, zikisanze ekibuga ekyo ekinene, ekyayambalanga engoye eŋŋonvu, eza kakobe n'emmyufu; ne kitimbibwa zaabu n'amayinja ag'omuwendo, n'ago agayitibwa luulu." 
Revelation18:17 Kifiiriddwa obugagga obwo bwonna mu ssaawa emu yokka!” Abagoba b'amaato bonna, n'abasaabaze bonna, n'abalunnyanja, na bonna abasuubulira ku nnyanja, baayimirira wala" 
Revelation18:18 bwe baalaba omukka gwakyo nga kiggya, ne baleekaana nga bagamba nti: “Tewabangawo kibuga ekyenkana kino obunene!”" 
Revelation18:19 Ne beeyiira enfuufu mu mitwe, ne baleekaana nga bakaaba era nga bakungubaga, nga bagamba nti: “Zikisanze, zikisanze ekibuga ekinene era ekigagga ennyo, ekyagaggawalirwamu abalina amaato ku nnyanja. Kizikiriziddwa mu ssaawa emu yokka!" 
Revelation18:20 Ggwe eggulu sanyuka, kubanga kizikiriziddwa! Mmwe abantu ba Katonda, nammwe abatume n'abalanzi, musanyuke, kubanga Katonda akisalidde omusango ne gukisinga, olw'ebyo bye kyakola!”" 
Revelation18:21 Awo malayika ow'amaanyi n'asitula ejjinja eriri ng'olubengo olunene, n'alisuula mu nnyanja, ng'agamba nti: “Babilooni ekibuga ekinene bwe kirisuulibwa bwe kityo wansi n'amaanyi mangi, ne kitaddayo kulabibwa!" 
Revelation18:22 Ennyimba z'abakubi b'ennanga, n'ez'abayimbi, n'ez'abafuuyi b'endere n'ab'eŋŋombe, tebiriddayo kuwulirwa mu ggwe, tewaliba mugezi mu mulimu na gumu aliddayo kulabika mu ggwe, wadde eddoboozi ly'olubengo okuddayo okuwulirwa mu ggwe." 
Revelation18:23 Ekitangaala ky'ettaala tekiriddayo kulabika mu ggwe, wadde eddoboozi ly'awasa omugole n'ery'omugole okuddayo okuwulirwa mu ggwe. Abasuubuzi bo baali bakulu nnyo mu nsi, era obulogo bwo bwalimbalimba amawanga gonna!”" 
Revelation18:24 Mu kyo omusaayi gw'abalanzi, n'ogw'abantu ba Katonda, n'ogwa bonna abattibwa ku nsi, mwe gwasangibwa." 
Revelation19:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne mpulira mu ggulu eddoboozi eriri ng'ery'ekibiina ky'abantu ekinene, nga ligamba nti: “Mutendereze Katonda waffe, kubanga obulokozi, n'ekitiibwa n'obuyinza, bibye!" 
Revelation19:2 Ky'asalawo kituufu era kya bwenkanya. Asaze omusango, ne gusinga malaaya lukulwe, eyayonoona ensi n'obwamalaaya bwe. Malaaya oyo abonerezeddwa olw'okutta abaweereza ba Katonda.”" 
Revelation19:3 Era ne bagamba nti: “Mutendereze Katonda! Omukka ogukivaamu gunyooka emirembe n'emirembe!” 
Revelation19:4 Abakadde amakumi abiri mu abana, n'ebiramu ebina, ne bavuunama ne basinza Katonda atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka, nga bwe bagamba nti: “Amiina. Mutendereze Katonda!”" 
Revelation19:5 Era eddoboozi ne liva awali entebe ey'obwakabaka ne ligamba nti: “Mutendereze Katonda waffe mmwe mwenna abaweereza be, nammwe mwenna abato n'abakulu abamussaamu ekitiibwa.”" 
Revelation19:6 Ate ne mpulira eddoboozi eriri ng'ery'ekibiina ky'abantu ekinene, eriri ng'okuwuuma kw'amazzi amangi, era ng'okubwatuka kw'eggulu okw'amaanyi, nga ligamba nti: “Mutendereze Katonda, kubanga Mukama Katonda waffe Omuyinzawaabyonna, ye afuga." 
Revelation19:7 Tusanyuke, tujaguze tutendereze ekitiibwa kye, kubanga ekiseera eky'embaga y'obugole ey'Omwana gw'Endiga kituuse." 
Revelation19:8 Akkiriziddwa okwambala engoye eŋŋonvu, ezitukula era ezitemagana.” Engoye ezo eŋŋonvu, bye bikolwa ebirungi eby'abantu ba Katonda." 
Revelation19:9 Malayika n'aŋŋamba nti: “Wandiika nti: ‘Ba mukisa abayitiddwa ku mbaga ey'obugole ey'Omwana gw'Endiga.’ ” Era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebyo bigambo byennyini Katonda bye yayogera.” 
Revelation19:10 Awo ne nfukamira kumpi ddala n'ebigere bye okumusinza. Kyokka n'aŋŋamba nti: “Leka! Ekyo tokikola! Ndi muweereza munno, era mpeerereza wamu ne baganda bo abanywerera ku mazima Yesu ge yatumanyisa. Sinza Katonda.” Kubanga amazima Yesu ge yatumanyisa, ge gawa abalanzi bye boogera." 
Revelation19:11 Ne ndaba eggulu nga libikkuse, era ne ndaba embalaasi enjeru. Agyebagadde ayitibwa Mwesigwa era ow'amazima. Asala emisango era alwana entalo mu bwenkanya." 
Revelation19:12 Amaaso ge gali ng'ennimi z'omuliro, era atikkidde engule nnyingi ku mutwe gwe. Awandiikiddwako erinnya eritamanyiddwa muntu n'omu, okuggyako ye yekka." 
Revelation19:13 Ayambadde ekyambalo ekyannyikibwa mu musaayi. Erinnya lye ye Kigambo wa Katonda. 
Revelation19:14 Awo ab'eggye ery'omu ggulu ne bamugoberera, nga beebagadde embalaasi enjeru era nga bambadde engoye eŋŋonvu enjeru era ennyonjo." 
Revelation19:15 Mu kamwa ke ne muvaamu ekitala ekyogi eky'okuwangula amawanga. Aligafugisa omuggo ogw'ekyuma, n'alinnya essogolero ly'omwenge gw'obusungu obungi obwa Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna." 
Revelation19:16 Ku kyambalo kye ne ku kisambi kye, alina erinnya eriwandiikiddwako nti: KABAKA WA BAKABAKA, ERA MUKAMA W'ABAKAMA." 
Revelation19:17 Awo ne ndaba malayika ng'ayimiridde ku njuba. N'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka ng'agamba ebinyonyi byonna ebibuuka mu bbanga nti: “Mujje, mukuŋŋaane ku mbaga ennene Katonda gy'akoze," 
Revelation19:18 mulye emirambo gya bakabaka, n'egy'abakulu b'amagye, n'egy'abaserikale, n'egy'embalaasi, n'egy'abazeebagala, n'egy'abantu bonna abaddu n'ab'eddembe, abakulu n'abato!”" 
Revelation19:19 Awo ne ndaba ekisolo, ne bakabaka b'oku nsi n'amagye gaabwe, nga bakuŋŋaanye okulwanyisa oyo eyeebagadde embalaasi, n'eggye lye." 
Revelation19:20 Ekisolo ne kiwambibwa awamu n'omulanzi ow'obulimba, eyakola ebyewuunyo mu maaso gaakyo. Ebyewuunyo ebyo bye yalimbisanga abakkiriza okuteekebwako akabonero k'ekisolo, era abaasinza ekifaananyi kyakyo. Ekisolo ekyo n'omulanzi ow'obulimba, bombi ne basuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro ogwaka ennyo." 
Revelation19:21 Abaasigalawo ne battibwa n'ekitala ekyava mu kamwa k'oyo eyeebagadde embalaasi. Ebinyonyi byonna ne byekkutira emirambo gyabwe. 
Revelation20:1 Awo ne ndaba malayika ng'akka ng'ava mu ggulu, ng'akutte mu ngalo ze ekisumuluzo ky'obunnya obutakoma, n'olujegere olunene." 
Revelation20:2 N'akwata ogusota, omusota ogwo ogw'edda, ye Mukemi era Sitaani, n'agusiba okumala emyaka lukumi." 
Revelation20:3 N'agusuula mu bunnya obutakoma, n'aggalawo, n'ateekako n'envumbo, guleme okuddamu okulimbanga amawanga, okutuusa emyaka olukumi lwe giriggwaako. Egyo bwe giriggwaako, gwa kusumululwa okumala akaseera katono." 
Revelation20:4 Awo ne ndaba entebe ez'obwakabaka, nga zituuliddwako abaweereddwa obuyinza okusala emisango. Era ne ndaba emyoyo gy'abo abaatemwako emitwe nga babalanga okunywerera ku Yesu, ne ku kigambo kya Katonda. Be bo abataasinza kisolo, wadde ekifaananyi kyakyo, era abatakkiriza kuteekebwako kabonero kaakyo mu byenyi byabwe, ne ku mikono gyabwe. Abantu abo baddamu okuba abalamu, ne bafugira wamu ne Kristo emyaka lukumi." 
Revelation20:5 Abafu abalala tebaddamu kuba balamu okutuusa emyaka olukumi lwe gyaggwaako. Okwo kwe kuzuukira okusooka. 
Revelation20:6 Ba mukisa era batukuvu abazuukirira mu kuzuukira kuno okusooka. Abo okufa okwokubiri tekubalinaako buyinza, naye balibeera bakabona ba Katonda era ba Kristo, era balifugira wamu naye emyaka lukumi." 
Revelation20:7 Emyaka egyo olukumi bwe giriggwaako, Sitaani alisumululwa mu kkomera lye." 
Revelation20:8 Era aligenda okulimbalimba Googi ne Magogi, ge mawanga agali wonna wonna ku nsi. Alikuŋŋaanya abantu baago okulwana olutalo, nga bangi ng'omusenyu gw'ennyanja." 
Revelation20:9 Ne batalaaga ensi yonna, ne bazingiza enkambi y'abantu ba Katonda, n'ekibuga Katonda ky'ayagala. Kyokka omuliro ne gukka nga guva mu ggulu, ne gubookya." 
Revelation20:10 Ne Sitaani eyabasendasenda, n'asuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro, ogwaka ennyo, eyasuulibwamu ekisolo n'omulanzi ow'obulimba, mwe banaabonyaabonyezebwanga ekiro n'emisana, emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation20:11 Awo ne ndaba entebe ey'obwakabaka, ennene era enjeru, ne ndaba n'oyo agituddeko. Ensi n'eggulu ne biva mu maaso ge, ne bitaddayo kulabikako." 
Revelation20:12 Ne ndaba abafu, abakulu n'abato, nga bayimiridde mu maaso g'entebe eyo ey'obwakabaka. Ebitabo ne bibikkulwa. N'ekitabo ekirala ne kibikkulwa, kye ky'obulamu. Abafu ne basalirwa omusango okusinziira ku bye baakola, nga bwe byawandiikibwa mu bitabo." 
Revelation20:13 Ennyanja n'ereeta abafu abagirimu. Okufa n'Amagombe nabyo ne bireeta abafu be birina. Bonna ne basalirwa omusango, ng'ebikolwa byabwe bwe byali." 
Revelation20:14 Awo Okufa n'Amagombe ne bisuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro. Ennyanja eyo ey'omuliro kwe kufa okwokubiri. 
Revelation20:15 Era buli muntu eyasangibwa ng'erinnya lye teriwandiikiddwa mu kitabo eky'obulamu, n'asuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro." 
Revelation21:1 Awo ne ndaba eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya. Eggulu eryasooka n'ensi eyasooka byali biweddewo, n'ennyanja nga tekyaliwo." 
Revelation21:2 Ne ndaba Ekibuga Ekitukuvu, Yerusaalemu Ekiggya, nga kikka nga kiva mu ggulu ewa Katonda, nga kitegekeddwa ng'omugole ayonjereddwa bba." 
Revelation21:3 Ne mpulira eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nga lyogerera awali entebe ey'obwakabaka, nga ligamba nti: “Laba, kaakano ekisulo kya Katonda kiri mu bantu; anaabeeranga nabo. Baliba bantu be, Katonda yennyini anaabeeranga nabo, nga ye Katonda waabwe." 
Revelation21:4 Era alisangula buli zziga mu maaso gaabwe. Waliba tewakyali kufa nga tewakyali kunakuwala, oba okukaaba, wadde obulumi, kubanga olwo eby'edda biriba biweddewo.”" 
Revelation21:5 Awo oyo atudde ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka n'agamba nti: “Kati ebintu byonna mbizza buggya.” Era n'agamba nti: “Wandiika ebigambo bino, kubanga bituufu, era byesigibwa.”" 
Revelation21:6 Ate n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebintu bino byonna kati bituukiridde! Nze Alufa ne Omega, entandikwa n'enkomerero. Buli alina ennyonta, ndimuwa buwa amazzi ag'omu luzzi olw'obulamu n'anywa." 
Revelation21:7 “Buli awangula, alifuna ebyo. Ndiba Katonda we, ye n'aba mwana wange." 
Revelation21:8 Kyokka abati, n'abatakkiriza, n'aboonoonefu, n'abatemu, n'abenzi, n'abalogo, n'abasinza ebyo ebitali Katonda, n'abalimba bonna, omugabo gwabwe guliba mu nnyanja ey'omuliro ogwaka ennyo, kwe kufa okwokubiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Awo omu ku bamalayika omusanvu abaalina ebibya omusanvu, ebijjudde ebibonyoobonyo omusanvu eby'enkomerero, n'ajja n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Jjangu nkulage Omugole, muk'Omwana gw'Endiga.”" 
Revelation21:10 Awo Mwoyo n'anjijako, malayika n'antwala ku lusozi olunene era oluwanvu, n'andaga Yerusaalemu ekibuga ekitukuvu, nga kikka nga kiva mu ggulu ewa Katonda." 
Revelation21:11 Okumasamasa kwakyo nga kuli ng'okw'ejjinja ery'omuwendo ennyo eriyitibwa yasipero, eritangalijja." 
Revelation21:12 Kyaliko ekisenge ekikyetoolodde era ekiwanvu, nga kiriko emiryango kkumi n'ebiri, egiriko bamalayika kkumi na babiri, era nga giwandiikiddwako amannya g'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri eby'Abayisirayeli." 
Revelation21:13 Ebuvanjuba kyaliko emiryango esatu, mu bukiikakkono emiryango esatu, mu bukiikaddyo emiryango esatu, n'ebugwanjuba emiryango esatu." 
Revelation21:14 Ekisenge ekyetoolodde ekibuga kyalina emisingi kkumi n'ebiri, nga giriko amannya g'abatume ekkumi n'ababiri, ab'Omwana gw'Endiga." 
Revelation21:15 Malayika eyayogera nange yalina omuggo ogwa zaabu nga gwa kupima ekibuga, n'emiryango gyakyo, n'ekisenge kyakyo ekikyetoolodde." 
Revelation21:16 Enjuyi z'ekibuga ekyo ennya zaali zenkana: ng'obuwanvu bwakyo bwenkana n'obugazi bwakyo. Awo malayika n'apima ekibuga ekyo n'omuggo gwe, ne kiweza kilomita ng'enkumi bbiri mu bina, obuwanvu n'obugazi n'obugulumivu bwakyo nga bwenkanankana." 
Revelation21:17 Era n'apima n'ekisenge kyakyo ekikyetoolodde, ne kiweza mita nga nkaaga obugulumivu. Ekipimo ekikozesebwa abantu, malayika kye yapimisa." 
Revelation21:18 Ekisenge ekyo ekyetoolodde ekibuga, kyali kizimbiddwa n'amayinja ag'omuwendo ennyo aga yasipero. Kyo ekibuga nga kya zaabu mwereere, atangalijja ng'ekirawuli." 
Revelation21:19 Emisingi gy'ekisenge ekyetoolodde ekibuga gyali giyooyooteddwa n'amayinja ag'omuwendo ennyo aga buli ngeri. Omusingi ogusooka gwayooyootebwa n'amayinja aga yasipero, ogwokubiri aga safiro, ogwokusatu aga kaludeedoni, ogwokuna aga simaragido," 
Revelation21:20 ogwokutaano aga sandonikisi, ogw'omukaaga aga sarudiyo, ogw'omusanvu aga kirisolito, ogw'omunaana aga berulo, ogw'omwenda aga topazi, ogw'ekkumi aga kirusopuraso, ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu aga yakinto, ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri aga ametisto." 
Revelation21:21 Ate emiryango ekkumi n'ebiri, gyali amayinja ag'omuwendo ennyo aga luulu kkumi n'abiri, nga buli mulyango gukoleddwa n'ejjinja lya luulu limu. Enguudo z'ekibuga ekyo nga zaabu mwereere, atangalijja ng'ekirawuli." 
Revelation21:22 Mu kibuga ekyo ssaalabamu Ssinzizo, kubanga Mukama Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna era n'Omwana gw'Endiga, bo ye Ssinzizo mu kyo." 
Revelation21:23 Era ekibuga ekyo tekyetaaga njuba, wadde omwezi okukyakira, kubanga ekitiibwa kya Katonda kye kikimulisa, era Omwana gw'Endiga ye ttaala yaakyo." 
Revelation21:24 Abantu b'omu nsi yonna banaatambuliranga mu kitangaala kyakyo, ne bakabaka b'oku nsi ne baleeta ebyobugagga byabwe mu kyo." 
Revelation21:25 Olunaku lwonna emiryango gyakyo tegiggalwenga n'akatono, kubanga eyo teriba kiro." 
Revelation21:26 Ekitiibwa n'ebyobugagga eby'amawanga, birireetebwa mu kyo." 
Revelation21:27 Naye tekiriyingirwamu kintu na kimu ekitali kirongoofu, wadde omuntu n'omu akola eby'ensonyi, oba alimba. Wabula abo bokka abaawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'obulamu eky'Omwana gw'Endiga, be baliyingira mu kibuga ekyo." 
Revelation22:1 Awo malayika n'andaga omugga gw'amazzi ag'obulamu, ogumasamasa ng'endabirwamu, oguva ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka eya Katonda era ey'Omwana gw'Endiga," 
Revelation22:2 ne gukulukutira wakati w'enguudo z'ekibuga ekyo. Eruuyi n'eruuyi w'omugga ogwo, waaliwo omuti ogw'obulamu, ogubala ebibala emirundi kkumi n'ebiri omwaka, nga gubala buli mwezi; amakoola gaagwo nga ga kuwonya amawanga." 
Revelation22:3 Eyo teribaayo nate kikolimo. Entebe ey'obwakabaka eya Katonda era ey'Omwana gw'Endiga, eneebeeranga omwo, era abaweereza ba Katonda banaamusinzanga." 
Revelation22:4 Banaalabanga amaaso ge, era erinnya lye linaabeeranga mu byenyi byabwe." 
Revelation22:5 Ekiro tekiriddayo kubaawo, era tebalyetaaga kitangaala kya ttaala, wadde eky'enjuba, kubanga Mukama Katonda ye anaabeeranga ekitangaala kyabwe, era banaafuganga emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation22:6 Awo malayika n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebigambo bino bituufu ddala, era bya mazima. Era Mukama Katonda awa abalanzi Mwoyo we, atumye malayika we, okulaga abaweereza be ebyo ebiteekwa okubaawo amangu.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Laba, njija mangu. Wa mukisa oyo akwata ebigambo eby'obulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino.”" 
Revelation22:8 Nze Yowanne, nze nawulira era ne ndaba bino. Bwe namala okubiwulira n'okubiraba, ne nvuunama okumpi n'ebigere bya malayika eyandaga bino." 
Revelation22:9 Ye n'aŋŋamba nti: “Leka! Ekyo tokikola! Ndi muweereza munno, era mpeerereza wamu ne baganda bo abalanzi era n'abo abakwata ebigambo ebiri mu kitabo kino. Sinza Katonda.”" 
Revelation22:10 Era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebigambo by'obulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino tobikuuma mu kyama, kubanga ekiseera kiri kumpi, bibeewo." 
Revelation22:11 Naye nga tebinnabaawo, omwonoonyi k'ayongere okwonoona, omugwagwa asigale nga mugwagwa, akola ebituufu ayongere okukola ebituufu, n'omutuukirivu asigale nga mutuukirivu.”" 
Revelation22:12 “Laba, njija mangu. Ndijja n'empeera nsasule buli omu, nga nsinziira ku bye yakola." 
Revelation22:13 Nze Alufa ne Omega, ow'olubereberye, era asembayo: entandikwa n'enkomerero.”" 
Revelation22:14 Ba mukisa abo abooza ebyambalo byabwe, balyoke bakkirizibwe ku muti ogw'obulamu, era bayingire mu kibuga, nga bayita mu miryango." 
Revelation22:15 Naye abo aboonoonefu, n'abalogo, n'abenzi, n'abassi b'abantu, n'abasinza ebyo ebitali Katonda, n'abo bonna abaagala era abakola eby'obulimba, balibeera bweru." 
Revelation22:16 “Nze Yesu, ntumye malayika wange okubategeeza mmwe ab'omu bibiina by'abakkiriza mu nze. Ndi muzzukulu wa Dawudi, era nsibuka mu ye. Nze mmunyeenye ey'oku makya, eyakaayakana.”" 
Revelation22:17 Mwoyo n'Omugole bagamba nti: “Jjangu, Mukama waffe Yesu.” Era buli awulira bino agambe nti: “Jjangu, Mukama waffe Yesu.” Buli alumwa ennyonta ajje, era buli ayagala amazzi agawa obulamu, akkirize okugafuna awatali kusasula." 
Revelation22:18 Ntegeeza buli awulira ebigambo by'obulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino nti: alibyongerako, Katonda alimwongerako ebibonyoobonyo ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:19 Era buli alikendeeza ku bigambo by'obulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino, Katonda alimuggyako omugabo gwe ogw'ebibala by'omuti oguwa obulamu, n'ogw'omu kibuga ekitukuvu, ebyogerwako mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:20 Akakasa bino, agamba nti: “Weewaawo, njija mangu.” Ka kibe bwe kityo. Jjangu Mukama waffe Yesu."
